_metadata.description: IELTS vocabulary example sentences — short cloze-friendly edition

anti.en: He is strongly anti this new policy.
anti.zh: 他强烈反对这项新政策。

antibiotic.en: Overusing antibiotic medication can lead to resistant bacteria that are much harder to treat.
antibiotic.zh: 过度使用抗生素药物可能导致耐药细菌，使治疗变得更加困难。

antibiotics.en: The doctor said antibiotics would help the infection.
antibiotics.zh: 医生说抗生素会帮助治疗感染。

antibody.en: The human body naturally produces antibodies to fight against specific diseases and infections.
antibody.zh: 人体自然产生抗体来对抗特定的疾病和感染。

anticipate.en: City planners need to anticipate population growth when designing new transportation systems.
anticipate.zh: 城市规划者在设计新的交通系统时需要预测人口增长。

anticipated.en: The economic growth was anticipated by experts, yet the actual figures exceeded all previous predictions significantly during the last quarter.
anticipated.zh: 专家预计了经济增长，但实际数字在上一季度显著超过了所有之前的预测。

anticipation.en: There is growing anticipation about the upcoming international climate change conference next month.
anticipation.zh: 人们对下个月即将举行的国际气候变化会议越来越期待。

antigen.en: Antigens trigger the immune system to produce antibodies that can neutralize harmful substances.
antigen.zh: 抗原触发免疫系统产生能够中和有害物质的抗体。

antivirus.zh: 定期更新你的抗病毒软件。

anxiety.zh: 考试焦虑影响许多学生。

anxious.en: She was anxious about her exam results.
anxious.zh: 她对考试结果感到焦虑。

any.en: If you have any questions about the course requirements, please contact the academic advisor immediately.
any.zh: 如果您对课程要求有任何疑问，请立即联系学术顾问。

anybody.en: Can anybody help me with this problem?
anybody.zh: 有人能帮我解决这个问题吗？

anything.en: The modern art museum offers anything from ancient artifacts to cutting-edge digital installations.
anything.zh: 这座现代艺术博物馆提供从古代文物到尖端数字装置的各种展品。

anytime.en: You can call me anytime you like.
anytime.zh: 你随时可以给我打电话。

anyway.en: I was going to be late for the meeting anyway, so I decided to stop for coffee first.
anyway.zh: 反正我要开会迟到了，所以我决定先去买杯咖啡。

anywhere.en: You can find good food anywhere.
anywhere.zh: 你在任何地方都能找到美食。

apart.en: The two buildings stand far apart.

apart from.en: Apart from academic qualifications, employers increasingly value practical work experience and soft skills.
apart from.zh: 除了学历资格外，雇主越来越重视实际工作经验和软技能。

apartment.en: The new apartment complex near the university offers modern amenities including a gym and study rooms.
apartment.zh: 大学附近的新公寓大楼提供现代化的设施，包括健身房和学习室。

apartments.zh: 许多公寓的厨房都很小。

apes.en: Apes share many characteristics with human beings.
apes.zh: 猿与人类有许多共同的特征。

absence.zh: 他的缺席让所有人惊讶。

absent.en: The professor noted that several students were absent from the lecture on climate change.
absent.zh: 教授注意到有几个学生缺席了关于气候变化的讲座。

absolute.en: We have absolute confidence in our plan.
absolute.zh: 我们对计划有绝对的信心。

absolutely.en: This is absolutely the best solution.
absolutely.zh: 这绝对是最好的解决方案。

absorb.en: The sponge can absorb a lot of water.

abundance.en: The garden showed an abundance of flowers.
abundance.zh: 花园里展示了丰富的花朵。

abundant.en: This region has abundant sunshine year-round.
abundant.zh: 这个地区全年阳光充足。

abuse.en: People should not abuse their power.

academia.en: Many researchers struggle to succeed in academia.
academia.zh: 许多研究人员在学术界努力争取成功。

academy.en: She graduated from a music academy.
academy.zh: 她毕业于一所音乐学院。

accelerate.en: The train began to accelerate quickly.

acceleration.en: The acceleration of urban development has led to increased environmental concerns.
acceleration.zh: 城市发展的加速引发了更多的环境担忧。

accent.en: Some international students find it challenging to understand regional accents when communicating with locals.
accent.zh: 一些国际学生在与当地人交流时发现理解地区口音很有挑战性。

accept.en: She decided to accept the job offer.
accept.zh: 她决定接受这份工作邀请。

acceptable.en: The noise level in this area is not acceptable.
acceptable.zh: 这个地区的噪音水平是不可接受的。

access.en: Only teachers can access this room.
access.zh: 只有老师可以进入这个房间。

accessed.en: The online library can be accessed by students using their university login credentials.
accessed.zh: 学生可以使用大学登录凭据访问在线图书馆。

accesses.en: The system automatically accesses user preferences to provide personalized recommendations.
accesses.zh: 系统自动访问用户偏好以提供个性化推荐。

accessibility.en: Governments should prioritize the accessibility of public buildings for people with disabilities.
accessibility.zh: 政府应该优先考虑公共建筑对残疾人的无障碍设施。

accessible.en: The library is accessible to all students.
accessible.zh: 图书馆对所有学生开放。

accessing.en: Many students are concerned about accessing reliable information when conducting online research.
accessing.zh: 许多学生在进行在线研究时担心获取可靠信息的问题。

affected.en: Many traditional communities have been significantly affected by the rapid pace of globalization.
affected.zh: 许多传统社区受到了快速全球化的显著影响。

affecting.en: The aging population is affecting healthcare systems and pension schemes in many countries.
affecting.zh: 人口老龄化正在影响许多国家的医疗保健系统和养老金计划。

affection.en: Studies show that elderly people who receive affection from family members tend to live longer.
affection.zh: 研究表明，得到家人关爱的老年人往往寿命更长。

affective.en: The affective dimension of education, including emotions and attitudes, plays a crucial role in learning.
affective.zh: 教育的情感维度，包括情绪和态度，在学习中起着至关重要的作用。

affects.en: Climate change affects agricultural output and threatens food security in developing nations.
affects.zh: 气候变化影响农业产量，威胁着发展中国家的粮食安全。

afflicted.en: The villagers were afflicted by the drought.
afflicted.zh: 村民们正遭受干旱的折磨。

affluent.en: Affluent societies often consume more resources and generate greater amounts of waste.
affluent.zh: 富裕社会往往消耗更多资源，产生更多废物。

afford.en: Many students cannot afford expensive books.
afford.zh: 很多学生买不起昂贵的书籍。

affordability.en: The government must address the affordability of housing to help low-income earners.
affordability.zh: 政府必须解决住房负担能力问题，以帮助低收入者。

afraid.en: Some students are afraid to express their opinions in classroom discussions.
afraid.zh: 一些学生害怕在课堂讨论中表达自己的观点。

after.en: After completing their studies, many graduates seek employment in urban areas.
after.zh: 完成学业后，许多毕业生在城市地区寻找工作。

aftermath.en: In the aftermath of the pandemic, many businesses had to adapt to new working conditions.
aftermath.zh: 疫情过后，许多企业不得不适应新的工作条件。

afternoon.en: The workshop has been arranged for Thursday afternoon at the community center.
afternoon.zh: 研讨会已安排在周四下午在社区中心举行。

afterwards.en: Participants should review the presentation materials afterwards to enhance understanding.
afterwards.zh: 参与者之后应该复习演示材料以加深理解。

age.en: The average age of the workforce is rising in many industrialized nations.
age.zh: 许多工业化国家的劳动力平均年龄正在上升。

aged.en: The government provides various support programs for aged citizens in our society.
aged.zh: 政府为社会中的老年公民提供各种支持计划。

agencies.en: Many agencies help people find jobs.
agencies.zh: 许多代理机构帮助人们找工作。

agency.en: The government agency announced new policies.
agency.zh: 政府机构宣布了新政策。

agenda.en: The political agenda often prioritizes economic growth over environmental conservation.
agenda.zh: 政治议程往往将经济增长置于环境保护之上。

agent.en: The travel agent booked our hotel.
agent.zh: 旅行代理人帮我们预订了酒店。

agents.en: Travel agents can help you book.
agents.zh: 旅行社代理可以帮你预订。

ages.en: Traditional customs have been preserved and passed down through successive generations over the ages.
ages.zh: 传统习俗在漫长的岁月中被保存下来并代代相传。

along.en: Along with technological advancements, changes in consumer behavior have significantly transformed the retail industry over time.
along.zh: 除了技术进步外，消费者行为的变化也随着时间的推移显著改变了零售业。

alongside.en: The new park was built alongside the river.

alphabet.en: Children learn the alphabet in school.
alphabet.zh: 孩子们在学校学习字母表。

alright.en: Although the weather was poor, the pilot confirmed that everything was alright for landing.
alright.zh: 尽管天气不好，飞行员确认降落的一切都正常。

also.en: The museum offers guided tours in the morning and also provides audio guides in the afternoon.
also.zh: 博物馆上午提供导游讲解，下午也提供语音导览。

alter.en: Global warming can significantly alter ecosystems and threaten the survival of many species.
alter.zh: 全球变暖可以显著改变生态系统，威胁许多物种的生存。

alteration.en: The government proposed an alteration to the current immigration policy last year.
alteration.zh: 政府去年提出了对现行移民政策的修改。

altered.en: The design was altered by the team.

alternative.en: We have no alternative but to wait.
alternative.zh: 我们别无选择只能等待。

alternatively.en: Students can submit their assignments online, or alternatively, hand them in at the office.
alternatively.zh: 学生可以在线提交作业，或者选择将作业交到办公室。

alternatives.en: The report explored several alternatives to address the housing shortage in urban areas.
alternatives.zh: 该报告探讨了解决城市地区住房短缺的几个替代方案。

although.en: Although the initial results were promising, further research is needed to confirm them.
although.zh: 尽管初步结果很有希望，但仍需要进一步研究来确认它们。

altitude.zh: 高海拔使呼吸变得困难。

altogether.en: The project has ten team members altogether.
altogether.zh: 这个项目总共有十名团队成员。

always.en: Regular practice is always essential for achieving high scores in English language examinations.
always.zh: 定期练习对于在英语考试中取得高分总是必不可少的。

amateur.en: He is an amateur chess player.

amaze.en: The rapid advancement of technology never ceases to amaze people around the world.
amaze.zh: 技术的快速进步让世界各地的人们惊叹不已。

amazing.en: The amazing technological advancements in the last decade have transformed how people communicate and access information globally.
amazing.zh: 过去十年惊人的技术进步改变了人们全球沟通和获取信息的方式。

amazon.en: The Amazon flows through South America.

amazonian.en: Amazonian tribes have lived sustainably in the rainforest for thousands of years.
amazonian.zh: 亚马逊部落已经在雨林中可持续地生活了数千年。

ambassador.en: The ambassador delivered a speech about cultural exchange between the two nations.
ambassador.zh: 大使发表了一篇关于两国文化交流的演讲。

amber.en: The amber gemstone glowed warmly in the light.
amber.zh: 琥珀宝石在光线下发出温暖的光芒。

ambiguity.en: The ambiguity in the contract led to a lengthy legal dispute between the two companies.
ambiguity.zh: 合同中的歧义导致两家公司之间发生了漫长的法律纠纷。

ambiguous.en: The instructions were ambiguous, making it difficult for students to complete the task correctly.
ambiguous.zh: 说明含糊不清，使得学生难以正确完成任务。

ambition.en: Her ambition to become a successful researcher motivated her to pursue a doctoral degree.
ambition.zh: 她成为一名成功研究员的雄心激励她攻读博士学位。

aggravate.en: The constant traffic noise only served to aggravate the already stressful situation for residents living near the highway.
aggravate.zh: 持续的交通噪音只会加剧居住在高速公路附近的居民本已紧张的情况。

aggressive.en: The aggressive dog bit the mailman yesterday.
aggressive.zh: 那只攻击性的狗昨天咬了邮递员。

ago.en: I visited Paris three years ago.

agree.en: I agree with your plan for the project.

agreement.en: Both sides finally reached an agreement.

agriculture.en: Agriculture is important for this country.
agriculture.zh: 农业对这个国家很重要。

aid.en: Can you aid me with this task?
aid.zh: 你能帮我做这个任务吗？

ailment.en: He missed work due to a minor ailment.

aim.en: The main aim of this research project is to understand the impact of climate change on coastal communities.
aim.zh: 这个研究项目的主要目的是了解气候变化对沿海社区的影响。

aim at.en: The new government policy aims at reducing youth unemployment through expanded vocational training programs nationwide.
aim at.zh: 新政府政策的目的是通过扩大全国职业培训项目来减少青年失业。

aim to.en: We aim to finish by Friday.
aim to.zh: 我们的目标是周五前完成。

aims.zh: 我们的主要目标很明确。

air.en: The fresh air made everyone feel better.
air.zh: 新鲜空气让每个人都感觉好多了。

air conditioning.en: This room needs better air conditioning.
air conditioning.zh: 这个房间需要更好的空调。

air pollution.en: Air pollution is a serious problem.
air pollution.zh: 空气污染是一个严重问题。

aircraft.en: The aircraft landed safely on the runway.
aircraft.zh: 飞机安全降落在跑道上。

airline.en: The airline offers direct flights to Asia.
airline.zh: 这家航空公司提供直飞亚洲的航班。

airlines.en: Many airlines now serve international routes.
airlines.zh: 现在许多航空公司提供国际航线服务。

airplane.en: The invention of the airplane has fundamentally transformed global commerce, enabling rapid international trade and cultural exchange.
airplane.zh: 飞机的发明从根本上改变了全球商业，实现了快速的国际贸易和文化交流。

airport.en: I will meet you at the airport tomorrow.

aisle seat.en: Passengers who prefer aisle seats often value the freedom to move around without disturbing fellow travelers during flights.
aisle seat.zh: 喜欢靠过道座位的乘客通常重视在飞行中能够自由活动而不打扰其他旅客。

alarm.en: The sudden news alarm the entire team.
alarm.zh: 突如其来的消息让整个团队感到惊恐。

apologise.en: I would like to apologise for my late arrival to the interview yesterday morning.
apologise.zh: 我想为昨天早上面试迟到道歉。

apologize.en: I must apologize for being late today.
apologize.zh: 我必须为今天的迟到道歉。

apology.en: Please accept my sincere apology for any inconvenience caused by the service interruption.
apology.zh: 请接受我对服务中断造成的不便的真诚道歉。

appalling.en: The appalling living conditions in some developing countries require immediate international attention.
appalling.zh: 一些发展中国家恶劣的生活条件需要国际社会立即关注。

apparatus.en: Scientists use specialised apparatus to conduct precise experiments in the laboratory setting.
apparatus.zh: 科学家使用专用仪器在实验室环境中进行精确实验。

apparent.en: Despite the apparent simplicity of the design, the building required highly complex engineering.
apparent.zh: 尽管设计看起来很简单，但这栋建筑需要高度复杂的工程设计。

apparents.en: The apparents differences between the two theories suggest further research is necessary.
apparents.zh: 两种理论之间明显的差异表明需要进一步研究。

appeal.en: The music appeal attracted many listeners.
appeal.zh: 音乐的吸引力吸引了很多听众。

appeal to.en: This advertisement is designed to appeal to young professionals seeking career advancement.
appeal to.zh: 这则广告旨在吸引寻求职业发展的年轻专业人士。

appear.en: The sun will appear at six tomorrow.

appear to.en: The research findings appear to support the hypothesis about climate change impacts.
appear to.zh: 研究结果似乎支持关于气候变化影响的假设。

append.en: Applicants should append a detailed resume to their covering letter when submitting job applications.
append.zh: 申请人在提交求职申请时应在求职信后附上详细简历。

appendix.en: The comprehensive statistical data can be found in the appendix of the research report.
appendix.zh: 详细的统计数据可以在研究报告的附录中找到。

appetite.en: Regular physical exercise can help regulate appetite and improve overall health conditions.
appetite.zh: 经常锻炼可以帮助调节食欲并改善整体健康状况。

appetizer.en: The restaurant offered a complimentary appetizer to welcome new customers during the opening week.
appetizer.zh: 餐厅在开业周期间提供免费开胃菜欢迎新顾客。

applaud.en: Society should applaud individuals who dedicate their careers to environmental conservation efforts.
applaud.zh: 社会应该赞扬那些致力于环境保护事业的人。

apple.en: Many nutritionists recommend eating an apple daily as part of a balanced diet plan.
apple.zh: 许多营养学家建议每天吃一个苹果作为均衡饮食的一部分。

appliance.en: Modern kitchen appliances have significantly reduced the time spent on daily cooking tasks.
appliance.zh: 现代厨房电器大大减少了日常烹饪所花费的时间。

appliances.en: Energy-efficient appliances are becoming increasingly popular among environmentally conscious consumers worldwide.
appliances.zh: 节能电器在全世界注重环保的消费者中越来越受欢迎。

applicable.en: The safety regulations are applicable to all employees working in the manufacturing facility.
applicable.zh: 安全规定适用于在制造工厂工作的所有员工。

applicant.zh: 申请人展示了很强的技能。

application.en: The successful application of technology in education has transformed traditional classroom learning methods.
application.zh: 技术在教育中的成功应用改变了传统的课堂学习方法。

application form.en: I filled out the application form yesterday.

ambitions.en: Her ambitions led her to study abroad.
ambitions.zh: 她的抱负促使她去国外留学。

ambitious.en: She is an ambitious student aiming for top universities.
ambitious.zh: 她是一个有雄心的学生，目标是顶尖大学。

ambulance.en: The ambulance arrived at the accident scene within ten minutes, and paramedics immediately began treating the injured.
ambulance.zh: 救护车在十分钟内到达事故现场，医护人员立即开始治疗伤者。

amend.en: Lawmakers agreed to amend the existing legislation to provide stronger protection for intellectual property rights.
amend.zh: 立法者同意修改现有法律，为知识产权提供更强有力的保护。

amendment.en: The proposed constitutional amendment sparked intense debate among citizens and political representatives alike.
amendment.zh: 拟议中的宪法修正案在公民和政治代表之间引发了激烈的辩论。

amid.zh: 她在嘈杂的环境中工作。

amongst.en: She was amongst the best students.

ample.en: The new campus library provides ample study spaces and resources for the growing student population.
ample.zh: 新校园图书馆为不断增长的学生群体提供了充足的学习空间和资源。

amuse.en: Street performers use various talents to amuse tourists and locals wandering through the city centre.
amuse.zh: 街头艺人们用各种才艺来娱乐在市中心漫步的游客和当地人。

an increase in.en: There is an increase in population.

analyses.en: The analyses show clear patterns in the data.
analyses.zh: 分析显示数据中明显的模式。

analysis.zh: 分析显示出明显的进步。

analyst.en: According to the financial analyst, the company's stock price is expected to rise significantly next quarter.
analyst.zh: 据这位金融分析师称，该公司股价预计在下个季度将大幅上涨。

analysts.zh: 金融分析师研究市场趋势。

analytic.en: Strong analytic abilities are highly valued by employers in today's competitive job market.
analytic.zh: 在当今竞争激烈的就业市场中，强大的分析能力受到雇主的高度重视。

analytical.en: She has an analytical mind for solving problems.
analytical.zh: 她有善于分析问题的头脑。

analytically.en: We must address this challenge analytically if we hope to develop effective long-term solutions.
analytically.zh: 如果我们希望制定有效的长期解决方案，就必须以分析性的方式处理这一挑战。

analyze.en: Students in this course learn to analyze complex texts and evaluate the credibility of sources.
analyze.zh: 这门课程的学生学习分析复杂文本并评估来源的可信度。

analyzed.en: The survey responses were analyzed using advanced statistical software to ensure accurate results.
analyzed.zh: 调查回复使用先进的统计软件进行分析，以确保结果的准确性。

analyzes.en: The documentary critically analyzes the environmental impact of fast fashion on global ecosystems.
analyzes.zh: 这部纪录片批判性地分析了快时尚对全球生态系统的影响。

analyzing.en: The research team spent months analyzing data before reaching any definitive conclusions.
analyzing.zh: 研究团队花了数月时间分析数据，才得出任何确定的结论。

anatomy.en: Medical students must complete comprehensive courses in human anatomy before beginning clinical training.
anatomy.zh: 医学生必须在开始临床培训前完成全面的人体解剖学课程。

ancestor.en: According to family records, my ancestor emigrated from Italy to Australia during the gold rush era.
ancestor.zh: 根据家族记录，我的祖先在淘金时代从意大利移居到澳大利亚。

ancestors.en: Our ancestors lived very different lives.
ancestors.zh: 我们的祖先过着截然不同的生活。

anchor.en: The lighthouse served as an anchor for ships navigating the dangerous coastline during stormy weather.
anchor.zh: 灯塔在暴风雨天气中为航行危险海岸线的船只提供了锚定作用。

ancient.en: Students studied ancient history last semester.
ancient.zh: 学生们上学期学习了古代历史。

and.en: Modern technology has transformed how people communicate and access information in their daily lives.
and.zh: 现代技术改变了人们在日常生活中交流和获取信息的方式。

anecdote.en: The professor began the lecture with a humorous anecdote about her first teaching experience.
anecdote.zh: 教授用一个关于她第一次教学经历的幽默轶事开始了讲座。

anger.en: His anger was obvious to everyone.
anger.zh: 他的愤怒对每个人都很明显。

angle.en: We viewed the problem from a different angle.
angle.zh: 我们从不同的角度看这个问题。

angry.en: Many parents become angry when children spend excessive time on electronic devices instead of studying.
angry.zh: 许多父母在孩子花太多时间使用电子设备而不是学习时会变得生气。

animal.en: Many different animal species live here.
animal.zh: 这里有许多不同的动物物种。

animals.en: Wild animals need protection from hunters.
animals.zh: 野生动物需要保护免受猎人的伤害。

ankle.en: She sprained her ankle while hiking and had to be rescued by mountain rescue teams.
ankle.zh: 她在徒步旅行时扭伤了脚踝，不得不依靠山地救援队营救。

anniversary.en: The couple celebrated their twentieth wedding anniversary with a romantic dinner by the seaside.
anniversary.zh: 这对夫妇在海边享用了浪漫晚餐，庆祝他们的结婚二十周年。

announce.en: The university will announce the scholarship recipients next week during the formal ceremony.
announce.zh: 大学将在下周正式典礼上宣布奖学金获得者。

announced.en: The school announced a new policy.
announced.zh: 学校宣布了一项新政策。

annoy.en: Constant noise from nearby construction sites tends to annoy local residents during working hours.
annoy.zh: 附近建筑工地的持续噪音往往在工作时间内打扰当地居民。

annoying.en: The loud noise is really annoying.
annoying.zh: 嘈杂的声音真的很烦人。

annual.en: The company holds an annual meeting each year.
annual.zh: 公司每年举行一次年度会议。

annual fee.en: The gym charges an annual fee of two hundred pounds.
annual fee.zh: 健身房收取两百英镑的年费。

annually.en: The company reviews employee performance annually to determine promotions and salary adjustments.
annually.zh: 公司每年审查员工绩效，以决定晋升和薪资调整。

anomaly.en: Scientists were puzzled by the unexpected anomaly in the data that contradicted their hypothesis.
anomaly.zh: 科学家们对数据中与他们假设相矛盾的这个意外异常现象感到困惑。

another.en: After completing this research project, we will move on to another phase of the investigation.
another.zh: 完成这个研究项目后，我们将进入调查的下一个阶段。

answer.en: Candidates must provide clear and concise answers to all questions during the job interview.
answer.zh: 候选人必须在求职面试中清晰简洁地回答所有问题。

antarctic.en: The Antarctic waters are extremely cold.
antarctic.zh: 南极地区的水域极其寒冷。

anthropologist.en: The anthropologist studied ancient farming methods.
anthropologist.zh: 人类学家研究古代农业方法。

anthropologists.zh: 人类学家研究古代人类社会。

adopted.en: The couple adopted a child last year.
adopted.zh: 这对夫妇去年收养了一个孩子。

adult.en: Adult education programs have become increasingly popular as older workers seek to update their professional skills.
adult.zh: 成人教育项目越来越受欢迎，因为年长的工人希望更新他们的专业技能。

adults.en: Most adults need about eight hours of sleep.
adults.zh: 大多数成人每天需要大约八小时睡眠。

advance.en: Technology continues to advance at a fast pace.

advancement.en: Her career advancement came after years of work.
advancement.zh: 她的职业晋升是在多年工作后到来的。

advantage.en: Living in a multicultural society offers the distinct advantage of exposing individuals to diverse perspectives and traditions.
advantage.zh: 生活在多元文化社会中具有明显的优势，使个人接触到不同的观点和传统。

advent.en: The advent of the internet changed life.
advent.zh: 互联网的到来改变了生活。

adventure.en: The children love stories about adventure and discovery.
adventure.zh: 孩子们喜欢关于冒险和探索的故事。

adverse.en: Adverse weather conditions delayed our trip.
adverse.zh: 不利的天气条件延误了我们的行程。

adversity.zh: 他在逆境中表现出勇气。

advert.en: I saw an interesting advert on TV.
advert.zh: 我在电视上看到一个有趣的广告。

advertise.zh: 公司在网上为产品做广告。

advertisement.en: I saw an advertisement for a new car.
advertisement.zh: 我看到一个新车的广告。

advertising.en: Advertising plays an important role in modern business.
advertising.zh: 广告在现代商业中起着重要作用。

advice.en: He gave me some useful advice.
advice.zh: 他给了我一些有用的建议。

advise.en: Can you advise me on this problem?
advise.zh: 你能就这个问题给我建议吗？

advisor.en: My advisor helped me choose the courses.

advocate.en: Environmental groups continue to advocate for stronger government policies to protect endangered species and habitats.
advocate.zh: 环保组织继续倡导更强有力的政府政策来保护濒危物种和栖息地。

aerobic.en: Running is a good aerobic exercise.
aerobic.zh: 跑步是一项很好的有氧运动。

aeroplane.en: Modern aeroplanes are designed with advanced fuel-efficient engines to reduce their environmental impact.
aeroplane.zh: 现代飞机采用先进的节能发动机设计，以减少对环境的影响。

aesthetic.en: The garden has a beautiful aesthetic.
aesthetic.zh: 这个花园有美丽的美学设计。

affair.en: The political affair sparked widespread public debate about government transparency and accountability standards.
affair.zh: 这起政治事件引发了公众对政府透明度和问责标准的广泛讨论。

affect.zh: 天气会影响你的心情吗？

achieve.en: She works hard to achieve her goals.
achieve.zh: 她努力工作以实现目标。

achieved.en: The country has achieved remarkable economic growth over the past decade through various reforms.
achieved.zh: 在过去十年里，这个国家通过各种改革取得了显著的经济增长。

achievement.en: Winning the competition was a significant achievement.
achievement.zh: 赢得比赛是一个重大的成就。

achievements.en: The scientist's achievements have contributed significantly to advancing medical research worldwide.
achievements.zh: 这位科学家的成就对推动全球医学研究做出了重大贡献。

achieves.en: Consistent practice achieves better results than sporadic, last-minute study sessions before exams.
achieves.zh: 持续的学习比考试前临时抱佛脚的学习效果更好。

achieving.en: Achieving a sustainable balance between work and personal life remains challenging for modern professionals.
achieving.zh: 在现代社会中，实现工作与个人生活的可持续平衡对职场人士来说仍然具有挑战性。

acid.en: The acid damaged the metal surface.

acid rain.en: Environmental scientists warn that acid rain can cause severe damage to forests and historical buildings.
acid rain.zh: 环境科学家警告说，酸雨可能对森林和历史建筑造成严重损害。

acknowledge.en: I acknowledge my mistake in the report.

acknowledged.zh: 他公开承认了自己的错误。

acknowledgement.en: He received an acknowledgement for his work.

acoustics.en: The acoustics in the concert hall are excellent.
acoustics.zh: 音乐厅的音响效果很棒。

acquaintance.en: Through attending social gatherings, people can expand their circle of acquaintances and build professional networks.
acquaintance.zh: 通过参加社交聚会，人们可以扩大社交圈并建立职业人脉。

acquire.en: It takes time to acquire good writing skills.
acquire.zh: 需要时间才能学会好的写作技巧。

acquired.en: The company was acquired by a larger corporation last year, resulting in significant organisational changes.
acquired.zh: 这家公司去年被一家更大的公司收购，导致了重大的组织变革。

acquires.en: A responsible student acquires knowledge not only from textbooks but also from practical experiences.
acquires.zh: 一个负责任的学生不仅从课本中获取知识，还从实践经验中学习。

acquiring.en: The process of acquiring a second language requires considerable time, patience, and consistent practice.
acquiring.zh: 学习第二语言的过程需要相当多的时间、耐心和持续的练习。

acquisition.en: The acquisition of new vocabulary is essential for achieving a high score in the IELTS reading test.
acquisition.zh: 获取新词汇对于在雅思阅读考试中取得高分至关重要。

acquisitions.en: The museum's recent acquisitions include several valuable artefacts from ancient Egyptian civilisation.
acquisitions.zh: 博物馆最近的收藏包括几件来自古埃及文明的珍贵文物。

acre.en: The university plans to develop a new campus on a parcel of land covering approximately fifty acres.
acre.zh: 大学计划在一块约五十英亩的土地上建设一个新校区。

acres.zh: 这个农场占地五十英亩。

act.en: We must act quickly to solve this problem.
act.zh: 我们必须迅速行动来解决这个问题。

act as.en: This book can act as a guide.

action.zh: 现在需要立即采取行动。

activated.en: The alarm was activated by the smoke.

a head.en: The entrance fee is ten dollars a head.

a host of.en: The new policy created a host of problems.
a host of.zh: 新政策带来了一大堆问题。

a large number of.en: A large number of graduates are struggling to find employment in their chosen fields.
a large number of.zh: 大量毕业生在他们选择的领域找工作时遇到了困难。

a lot.en: She studies a lot for her exams.

a lot of.en: I have a lot of homework to finish tonight.
a lot of.zh: 我今晚有很多作业要完成。

a night.en: We spent a night at the hotel near the beach.
a night.zh: 我们在海滩附近的酒店住了一晚。

a range of.en: The store offers a range of choices.

a result of.en: The accident was a result of careless driving.
a result of.zh: 事故是粗心驾驶的结果。

a series of.en: A series of tests confirmed the diagnosis.
a series of.zh: 一连串的测试证实了诊断。

a set of.en: A set of new questions appeared on the exam.
a set of.zh: 试卷上出现了一组新问题。

a small number of.en: Only a small number of people came.

a sort of.en: It's a sort of special sauce.

a variety of.en: We offer a variety of courses.
a variety of.zh: 我们提供各种各样的课程。

a whole range of.en: The shop offers a whole range of fresh fruits.
a whole range of.zh: 这家店提供各种各样的新鲜水果。

a wide range.en: We offer a wide range of choices.

a wide range of.en: The charity organisation helps people from a wide range of socioeconomic backgrounds.
a wide range of.zh: 这个慈善组织帮助来自各种社会经济背景的人。

a wide variety of.en: The shop has a wide variety of books.
a wide variety of.zh: 这家店有各种各样的书籍。

abandon.en: Some parents feel pressured to abandon their careers to dedicate more time to raising children.
abandon.zh: 一些父母感到压力很大，不得不放弃职业以投入更多时间抚养孩子。

abandoned.en: The abandoned house looked very old.
abandoned.zh: 那座被遗弃的房子看起来很旧。

abbreviation.en: Please clarify what the abbreviation GDP stands for at the beginning of your presentation.
abbreviation.zh: 请在演讲开始时解释一下GDP这个缩写的含义。

able.en: Young people who are able to speak multiple languages have better job prospects in the global market.
able.zh: 能够说多种语言的年轻人在全球就业市场上有更好的前景。

abnormal.en: Doctors recommend that patients with abnormal blood test results should undergo further examination.
abnormal.zh: 医生建议血液检测结果异常的患者应该进行进一步检查。

aboard.en: All passengers must be aboard by nine.
aboard.zh: 所有乘客必须在九点前上车。

about.en: The documentary was about how climate change affects wildlife habitats in the Arctic region.
about.zh: 这部纪录片是关于气候变化如何影响北极地区野生动物栖息地的。

above.en: The bird flew above the tall tree.

students.en: Many students study English for exams.
students.zh: 很多学生为了考试而学习英语。

such as.en: Animals such as dogs are popular pets.
such as.zh: 像狗这样的动物是受欢迎的宠物。

summer.en: Summer is the hottest season of the year.
summer.zh: 夏天是一年中最热的季节。

sunday.en: I prefer to spend Sunday mornings exercising in the park, as it helps me relax and prepare mentally for the week ahead.
sunday.zh: 我更喜欢在周日早晨去公园锻炼，因为这有助于我放松身心，为接下来的一周做好准备。

swiss.en: The Swiss education system is highly regarded worldwide for its combination of theoretical knowledge and practical vocational training.
swiss.zh: 瑞士教育体系因其理论知识和实践职业培训的结合而受到全世界的高度评价。

take part in.en: All students should take part in the activity.
take part in.zh: 所有学生都应该参加这个活动。

teacher.en: A good teacher can inspire students.
teacher.zh: 一位好老师可以激励学生。

teachers.en: Many teachers work in public schools.
teachers.zh: 许多教师在公立学校工作。

tesla.en: My uncle bought a new Tesla car.
tesla.zh: 我叔叔买了一辆新的特斯拉汽车。

thesis.en: I finished writing my thesis last month.
thesis.zh: 我上个月完成了论文写作。

thursday.en: Our group presentation is scheduled for Thursday afternoon, so we need to finalize our slides and rehearse our arguments by Wednesday.
thursday.zh: 我们的小组演讲安排在周四下午，所以我们需要在周三之前完成幻灯片并排练我们的论点。

tuesday.en: The language exchange meeting takes place every Tuesday evening at the university library, providing students with conversation practice opportunities.
tuesday.zh: 语言交流活动每周二晚上在大学图书馆举行，为学生提供对话练习的机会。

universals.en: The theory discusses universals in philosophy.
universals.zh: 该理论讨论了哲学中的普遍原则。

videos.en: Educational videos can enhance classroom learning by providing visual demonstrations that help students understand complex scientific concepts more easily.
videos.zh: 教育视频可以通过提供可视化演示来增强课堂学习，帮助学生更容易理解复杂的科学概念。

vouchers.en: I received some vouchers for my birthday.
vouchers.zh: 我生日时收到了一些代金券。

wednesday.en: I have a job interview scheduled for Wednesday at the downtown office, so I will need to prepare my resume and research the company.
wednesday.zh: 我有一个工作面试安排在市中心办公室的周三，所以我需要准备简历并研究这家公司。

western australia.en: Western Australia has vast mining resources.
western australia.zh: 西澳大利亚州拥有丰富的矿产资源。

work.en: I finish my work before six o'clock.

write about.en: Students must write about their summer holidays.
write about.zh: 学生必须写关于他们暑假的内容。

a big difference.zh: 练习会产生很大的不同。

a bit.en: I am a bit tired today.

a couple of.en: I have a couple of questions.

a dozen.en: I bought a dozen eggs this morning.
a dozen.zh: 今天早上我买了一打鸡蛋。

a few more.en: I need a few more minutes.

a great deal of.en: She spent a great deal of time studying.

applications.en: Mobile applications are widely used now.
applications.zh: 移动应用现在被广泛使用。

apply.en: She will apply for the university next month.
apply.zh: 她下个月会申请那所大学。

apply for.en: I want to apply for the job.

apply to.en: These rules apply to all students.
apply to.zh: 这些规则适用于所有学生。

appoint.en: The university board will appoint a new dean to oversee the faculty of humanities next semester.
appoint.zh: 大学董事会将在下学期任命一位新院长来监督人文学院。

appointment.en: I scheduled an appointment with my academic advisor to discuss my thesis progress next week.
appointment.zh: 我预约了下周与我的学术导师讨论论文进展。

appointments.en: The Prime Minister has several important appointments scheduled during the international summit.
appointments.zh: 首相在国际峰会期间安排了几个重要约会。

appreciate.zh: 游客应该欣赏当地传统。

appreciation.en: She expressed appreciation for his efforts.
appreciation.zh: 她对他的努力表示了欣赏。

apprentice.en: The young apprentice learned traditional craftsmanship skills from master artisans in the workshop.
apprentice.zh: 这位年轻的学徒在 workshop 中向 master 工匠学习传统工艺技能。

apprenticeship.en: Completing a three-year apprenticeship provides valuable practical experience alongside theoretical study.
apprenticeship.zh: 完成三年的学徒期可以提供与理论学习相结合的有价值的实践经验。

approachable.en: The new psychology professor is very approachable and always welcomes questions from students.
approachable.zh: 新来的心理学教授非常平易近人，总是欢迎学生提问。

approached.en: The nervous student approached the examiner after the speaking test to clarify a few points.
approached.zh: 那个紧张的学生在口语考试后走向考官，想澄清几点。

approaches.en: Different cultures adopt various approaches to education, which can greatly influence learning outcomes.
approaches.zh: 不同文化采用不同的教育方法，这会极大地影响学习成果。

approaching.en: With the deadline approaching rapidly, students are working overtime to complete their dissertations.
approaching.zh: 随着截止日期迅速临近，学生们正在加班完成论文。

appropriacy.en: The appropriacy of the research methodology was carefully evaluated before the study began.
appropriacy.zh: 在研究开始前，研究方法的适当性经过了仔细评估。

approval.en: The research proposal requires approval from the ethics committee before it can be implemented.
approval.zh: 该研究 proposal 需要伦理委员会的批准才能实施。

approve.en: The university senate will meet to approve or reject the proposed changes to the curriculum.
approve.zh: 大学参议院将召开会议，批准或否决拟议的课程改革。

approved.en: The plan was approved by the manager.
approved.zh: 这个计划得到了经理的批准。

approximate.en: I can give you an approximate timeline for completing the construction project within three months.
approximate.zh: 我可以给你一个大致的时间表，说明工程在三个月内完成。

approximated.en: The total cost of the international conference was approximated at around fifty thousand dollars.
approximated.zh: 这次国际 conference 的总费用被估算为大约五万美元。

approximately.en: The project will require approximately five million dollars in funding to complete the initial phase of construction within the scheduled timeline.
approximately.zh: 该项目将需要大约五百万美元的资金，以便在预定时间表中完成建设的最初阶段。

active.en: Children should stay active every day.
active.zh: 孩子们应该每天保持活跃。

activists.en: The activists protested outside the office.
activists.zh: 积极分子在办公室外抗议。

activity.en: Extracurricular activity plays a significant role in developing leadership skills and fostering teamwork among students.
activity.zh: 课外活动在培养学生的领导技能和团队合作方面发挥着重要作用。

actor.en: The famous actor donated a substantial portion of his earnings to build schools in underprivileged areas.
actor.zh: 这位著名演员将他收入的很大一部分捐出，用于在贫困地区建设学校。

actors.en: The actors performed on the main stage.
actors.zh: 男演员们在主舞台表演。

actress.en: The talented actress received critical acclaim for her powerful performance portraying a complex historical figure.
actress.zh: 这位才华横溢的女演员在饰演一位复杂的历史人物时获得了评论界的高度赞扬。

actual.en: Despite initial concerns, the actual cost of the renewable energy project turned out to be much lower than expected.
actual.zh: 尽管最初存在担忧，可再生能源项目的实际成本比预期的要低得多。

actually.en: Many people believe that smartphones harm communication skills, but they actually help people stay connected across distances.
actually.zh: 许多人认为智能手机损害了沟通能力，但实际上它们帮助人们跨越距离保持联系。

adapt.zh: 动物必须适应才能生存。

adapt to.en: New immigrants must adapt to local culture.
adapt to.zh: 新移民必须适应当地文化。

adaptation.en: The adaptation helped the species survive.
adaptation.zh: 这种适应帮助该物种生存下来。

adapted.en: She adapted quickly to university life.
adapted.zh: 她很快适应了大学生活。

adapter.en: I need an adapter to charge my phone.
adapter.zh: 我需要一个适配器来给手机充电。

adaptive.zh: 人类是高度适应性的动物。

add.en: Please add more salt to the soup.

add to.en: New members add to our team strength.
add to.zh: 新成员增加了我们团队的力量。

added.en: Teacher added more questions to the test.
added.zh: 老师在测验中增加了更多问题。

addict.en: A recovering gambling addict requires ongoing psychological support and counseling to prevent relapse.
addict.zh: 一位正在康复的赌博成瘾者需要持续的心理支持和咨询来防止复发。

addiction.zh: 他对吸烟的成瘾加深了。

addictive.en: Video game designers sometimes create addictive gameplay mechanics that can negatively impact players' daily lives.
addictive.zh: 电子游戏设计师有时会创造令人上瘾的游戏机制，可能会对玩家的日常生活产生负面影响。

addicts.en: Some drug addicts need medical help.
addicts.zh: 一些吸毒成瘾者需要医疗帮助。

additionally.en: The new housing development will include parks and recreational facilities; additionally, it will feature sustainable energy systems.
additionally.zh: 新的住房开发项目将包括公园和娱乐设施；此外，它还将采用可持续能源系统。

cashier.en: The cashier gave me the change.

changes.en: Life changes when you start a new job.
changes.zh: 开始新工作后，生活会发生变化。

cheque.en: I need to cash this cheque at the bank.
cheque.zh: 我需要去银行兑现这张支票。

city council.en: City Council meets every Monday evening.
city council.zh: 市议会每周一晚上召开会议。

commuter.en: The commuter takes the train to work daily.
commuter.zh: 通勤者每天乘火车上班。

conservatory.en: We grew tomatoes in the conservatory.
conservatory.zh: 我们在温室里种植了番茄。

distribute.en: Please distribute the papers to everyone.
distribute.zh: 请把文件分发给每个人。

driving.en: Driving requires focus and good judgment.
driving.zh: 驾驶需要专注力和良好的判断力。

east africa.en: Lions are common in East Africa.

eco.en: The eco course covers climate change and sustainability.
eco.zh: 生态学课程涵盖气候变化和可持续发展。

happier.en: Children seem happier during summer holidays.
happier.zh: 孩子们在暑假似乎更快乐。

have a look.en: Have a look at this picture.

headings.en: Read the headings before the chapter.

health centre.en: Visit the health centre for advice.

high street.en: The bank is on High Street.

higher.en: Students need higher scores to pass.
higher.zh: 学生需要更高的分数才能及格。

individual.en: Each individual student received a certificate.
individual.zh: 每个学生都收到了一张证书。

joke.en: Please don't joke during the test.

los angeles.en: Los Angeles is a famous city in California.
los angeles.zh: 洛杉矶是加利福尼亚州的一个著名城市。

ready.en: Are you ready for the exam?

run through.zh: 让我们快速检查一遍答案。

saturday.en: Every Saturday morning, I attend a language exchange meeting where I practice English with native speakers from different countries.
saturday.zh: 每个星期六早上，我都会参加一个语言交流活动，在那里我与来自不同国家的母语者练习英语。

select.en: Please select your preferred payment method.
select.zh: 请选择您偏好的付款方式。

shakespeare.zh: 莎士比亚写了著名的戏剧。

shame.en: He felt deep shame after the mistake.
shame.zh: 犯错后他感到深深的羞耻。

sleeping.en: Sleeping enough is important for health.
sleeping.zh: 充足的睡眠对健康很重要。

south africa.en: South Africa is known for its wildlife.
south africa.zh: 南非以其野生动物闻名。

a few.en: A few students passed the test.

aids.en: International organizations work together to provide support and medication for people living with AIDS.
aids.zh: 国际组织合作，为艾滋病患者提供支持和药物治疗。

atm.en: I usually withdraw cash from the ATM near my university campus when I need money for daily expenses.
atm.zh: 当我需要日常开支的钱时，我通常从校园附近的自动取款机取现金。

avenue.en: There is a big supermarket on Main Avenue.
avenue.zh: 缅因大街上有一家大超市。

ball.en: The child kicked the ball across the field.

bags.en: The bags are too heavy to carry.

bees.en: Bees make honey from flower nectar.

boys.en: The boys played football after school.

cv.en: Before applying for a job, candidates should carefully review their CV to ensure all information is accurate and up to date.
cv.zh: 在申请工作之前，候选人应该仔细检查他们的简历，以确保所有信息准确且最新。

call.en: Please call me when you arrive.

october.en: The international conference has been scheduled for October, and participants are advised to book accommodations in advance.
october.zh: 国际会议已安排在十月举行，建议参与者提前预订住宿。

olympics.en: The Olympics happen every four years.
olympics.zh: 奥运会每四年举办一次。

pin.en: For security reasons, banking institutions recommend changing your PIN number at least once every three months.
pin.zh: 出于安全考虑，金融机构建议至少每三个月更换一次您的PIN码。

padded.zh: 为了安全戴上有衬垫的手套。

particular.en: I have no particular reason for coming.

phone number.en: Can you give me your phone number?
phone number.zh: 请给我你的电话号码好吗？

pizza.en: I ordered a pizza for dinner.
pizza.zh: 我点了份披萨作为晚餐。

price.en: The price of this course is reasonable.
price.zh: 这门课程的价格很合理。

psychologists.en: Psychologists study human behavior and emotions.
psychologists.zh: 心理学家研究人类行为和情感。

euros.en: This jacket costs about fifty Euros.
euros.zh: 这件夹克大约五十欧元。

fertilizers.en: Farmers use fertilizers to improve soil quality.
fertilizers.zh: 农民使用肥料来改良土壤质量。

festival.en: We visited the town during the Festival.
festival.zh: 节日期间我们参观了那个小镇。

fishes.en: Many different fishes live in the ocean.
fishes.zh: 许多不同种类的鱼生活在海洋里。

friendship.en: True friendship means helping each other.
friendship.zh: 真正的友谊意味着互相帮助。

go through.en: Applicants must go through multiple rounds of interviews before being offered positions at this competitive company.
go through.zh: 申请者必须经过多轮面试才能获得这家竞争激烈的公司的职位。

goals.en: Her main goals are to graduate and find a job.
goals.zh: 她的主要目标是毕业并找到工作。

grants.zh: 这所大学提供许多补助金。

great britain.en: Great Britain is an island country.

make a booking.en: Please make a booking before visiting the museum.
make a booking.zh: 参观博物馆前请提前预订。

math.en: I study Math at the university.

monday.en: Every Monday morning, I attend a staff meeting where we discuss the progress of various ongoing projects.
monday.zh: 每个周一早上，我都会参加员工会议，讨论各个正在进行的项目的进展情况。

more important.en: More important is to stay healthy.

move.en: Please move your chair a bit.

networks.zh: 社交网络连接世界各地的人们。

new south wales.en: New South Wales is a state in Australia.
new south wales.zh: 新南威尔士州是澳大利亚的一个州。

north america.en: Many species live across North America.
north america.zh: 许多物种生活在北美洲。

november.en: November marks the beginning of the tourist season in many parts of the world, as the weather becomes more pleasant.
november.zh: 十一月标志着世界许多地方旅游季节的开始，因为天气变得更加宜人。

obviously.en: Obviously, regular exercise and a balanced diet are fundamental to maintaining good physical and mental health.
obviously.zh: 显而易见的是，规律的运动和均衡的饮食是保持良好身心健康的根本。

south america.en: Many birds live in South America.
south america.zh: 许多鸟类生活在南美洲。

southeast asia.en: Many factories are in Southeast Asia.

spaces.en: Modern offices often have open spaces for workers.
spaces.zh: 现代办公室通常有供员工使用的开放空间。

special offers.en: There are special offers this week.

accident.en: The accident on the highway caused significant delays during the morning rush hour, affecting thousands of commuters.
accident.zh: 高速公路上的事故导致早高峰期间严重堵车，影响了成千上万的通勤者。

accidentally.en: I accidentally deleted the important file.
accidentally.zh: 我不小心删除了重要文件。

accidents.en: Traffic accidents often cause serious injuries.
accidents.zh: 交通事故经常造成严重伤害。

accommodate.en: The new hotel can accommodate up to 500 guests.
accommodate.zh: 新酒店可容纳多达500位客人。

admission.en: The university admission process has become increasingly competitive over the past decade.
admission.zh: 大学入学过程在过去十年中变得越来越有竞争力。

admit.en: He decided to admit his mistake.
admit.zh: 他决定承认自己的错误。

adolescent.en: Adolescent health education should be a priority in every school curriculum.
adolescent.zh: 青少年健康教育应该是每个学校课程的优先事项。

adolescents.en: Schools provide support programs for adolescents.
adolescents.zh: 学校为青少年提供支持项目。

adopt.en: Many companies choose to adopt new technologies to improve efficiency and remain competitive in the market.
adopt.zh: 许多公司选择采用新技术以提高效率并在市场中保持竞争力。

affordable.en: Affordable housing remains a significant challenge for young families in major cities.
affordable.zh: 负担得起的住房仍然是主要城市年轻家庭面临的重大挑战。

album.en: The photographer's latest album captures the essence of traditional culture in rural areas.
album.zh: 这位摄影师的最新相册捕捉到了农村地区传统文化的精髓。

alcohol.en: The shop does not sell alcohol to teenagers.
alcohol.zh: 这家店不向青少年出售酒精饮料。

alert.en: The alert sound woke everyone in the building.
alert.zh: 警报声吵醒了楼里的所有人。

algae.en: Algae grow quickly in warm water.
algae.zh: 藻类在温暖的水中快速生长。

alone.en: She lives alone in the city.

approximates.en: The population of this coastal city approximates two million, though the exact figure fluctuates seasonally.
approximates.zh: 这座沿海城市的人口约为两百万，尽管确切数字会随着季节变化。

approximating.en: When approximating the age of ancient cave paintings, archaeologists must consider various environmental factors.
approximating.zh: 在估算古代洞穴壁画的年龄时，考古学家必须考虑各种环境因素。

approximation.en: Any approximation of the total cost must include unexpected expenses, labour fees, and potential delays.
approximation.zh: 对总成本的任何估算都必须包括意外开支、人工费用和潜在的延误。

apt.en: The phrase 'global village' is particularly apt for describing how modern technology has connected people worldwide.
apt.zh: '地球村'这个短语特别贴切地描述了现代技术如何将世界各地的人们联系在一起。

aquatic.en: Aquatic plants need lots of water.
aquatic.zh: 水生植物需要大量的水。

aquifers.en: Aquifers provide fresh water for many communities.
aquifers.zh: 含水层为许多社区提供淡水。

arbitrary.en: Critics argue that the selection criteria for university scholarships appear arbitrary and lack transparency.
arbitrary.zh: 批评者认为大学奖学金的选拔标准显得随意且缺乏透明度。

archaeological.en: Archaeological evidence shows ancient settlements here.
archaeological.zh: 考古学证据显示这里有古代定居点。

archaeologists.zh: 考古学家在那里发现了古代工具。

allergic.en: He is allergic to certain foods.

allergies.en: His allergies make him sneeze a lot.
allergies.zh: 他的过敏症让他经常打喷嚏。

allergy.en: Developing an allergy to pollen can significantly affect one's quality of life during spring months.
allergy.zh: 对花粉产生过敏会严重影响一个人在春季期间的生活质量。

alliance.en: The strategic alliance between different countries is essential for addressing global environmental challenges effectively.
alliance.zh: 不同国家之间的战略联盟对于有效应对全球环境挑战至关重要。

allocate.en: Please allocate more time to this project.
allocate.zh: 请为这个项目分配更多时间。

allocated.en: The government has allocated sufficient funds to improve public transportation systems in rural areas over the next five years.
allocated.zh: 政府已拨付充足资金，用于在未来五年内改善农村地区的公共交通系统。

allow for.en: We must allow for unexpected delays.
allow for.zh: 我们必须考虑到意外的延误。

allowance.en: Some parents give their children a weekly allowance to teach them the value of financial responsibility from an early age.
allowance.zh: 一些父母给孩子每周零用钱，以从小就教导他们财务责任的重要性。

ally.en: Finding a reliable ally in the workplace can be crucial when navigating challenging professional situations and career advancement.
ally.zh: 在职场中找到可靠的盟友，在应对挑战性的职业情况和职业晋升时可能至关重要。

administered.en: The nurse administered the vaccine yesterday.

administering.en: Administering examinations fairly requires strict protocols and trained invigilators to maintain academic integrity.
administering.zh: 公平地进行考试需要严格的规程和训练有素的监考人员来维护学术诚信。

administers.en: The university administers multiple entrance tests each year to select qualified candidates from various backgrounds.
administers.zh: 这所大学每年进行多次入学考试，从不同背景中选拔合格的考生。

administrate.en: The new digital system allows managers to administrate resources more efficiently than traditional methods allowed.
administrate.zh: 新的数字系统使管理人员能够比以前更高效地管理资源。

administration.en: The school administration approved the plan.
administration.zh: 学校行政管理部门批准了这个计划。

administrations.en: Different administrations have implemented various policies to address environmental concerns in major cities.
administrations.zh: 不同的行政部门实施了各种政策来解决主要城市的环境问题。

administrator.zh: 管理人员处理日常事务。

administrators.en: School administrators play a crucial role in creating positive learning environments for students from diverse backgrounds.
administrators.zh: 学校管理者在為不同背景的学生营造积极的学习环境方面发挥着关键作用。

admire.en: Many international students admire the British education system's emphasis on developing critical thinking and analytical skills.
admire.zh: 许多国际学生欣赏英国教育体系对培养批判性思维和分析能力的高度重视。

account.en: Can you account for the missing money?

account for.en: Young people account for most users.

accountant.en: My sister works as an accountant in a multinational corporation and earns a competitive salary.
accountant.zh: 我的姐姐在一家跨国公司担任会计，获得有竞争力的薪资。

accumulate.en: Over time, individuals can accumulate significant wealth by investing wisely and maintaining a consistent savings strategy throughout their lives.
accumulate.zh: 随着时间的推移，个人可以通过明智投资和终身保持一致的储蓄策略积累大量财富。

accuracy.en: The test checks accuracy and speed.
accuracy.zh: 测试检查准确性和速度。

accurate.en: It is crucial to provide highly accurate statistics in academic writing to ensure the credibility of the research findings presented.
accurate.zh: 在学术写作中提供高度准确的统计数据至关重要，以确保所呈现研究成果的可信度。

accuse.en: The company was accused of neglecting environmental regulations and faced significant penalties.
accuse.zh: 该公司被指控忽视环境法规，面临重大处罚。

accustomed.en: Having lived abroad for five years, I am now accustomed to different cultural practices.
accustomed.zh: 在国外生活了五年，我现在已经习惯了不同的文化习俗。

ache.en: After sitting at my desk for long hours, I often experience backache and shoulder pain.
ache.zh: 长时间坐在办公桌前，我经常感到背痛和肩痛。

achievable.en: Setting realistic and achievable goals is essential for maintaining motivation and success.
achievable.zh: 设定现实且可实现的目标对于保持动力和取得成功至关重要。

accommodation.en: The university offers affordable accommodation for new students.
accommodation.zh: 大学为新生提供经济实惠的住处。

accompanied.en: He was accompanied by his teacher.

accompany.en: Parents should accompany young children when they first start school to help them adjust smoothly.
accompany.zh: 当小孩子第一次开始上学时，父母应该陪同他们以帮助他们顺利适应。

accomplish.en: It is difficult to accomplish significant goals without consistent effort and a clear plan of action.
accomplish.zh: 如果没有持续的努力和清晰的行动计划，很难实现重大目标。

accomplished.zh: 她是一位技艺高超的钢琴家。

accord.en: The two neighbouring countries signed an accord to resolve their border disputes through peaceful negotiations.
accord.zh: 这两个邻国签署了一项协议，通过和平谈判解决边境争端。

accordance.en: All construction projects must be carried out in accordance with the local building codes and safety standards.
accordance.zh: 所有建设项目必须按照当地的建筑法规和安全标准进行。

according to.en: According to recent research, air pollution in urban areas has become a serious threat to public health.
according to.zh: 根据最新研究，城市地区的空气污染已对公众健康构成严重威胁。

accordingly.en: The company recognized the changing market conditions and adjusted its marketing strategies accordingly.
accordingly.zh: 公司认识到市场条件的变化，并相应地调整了其营销策略。

algorithm.en: The algorithm used by search engines determines which results appear first, significantly influencing the information users can access online.
algorithm.zh: 搜索引擎使用的算法决定了哪些结果首先出现，极大地影响着用户可以获取的信息。

alien.en: The alien visitor came from another planet.
alien.zh: 外星人来自另一个星球。

aligned.en: Her ideas were aligned with the manager's.
aligned.zh: 她的想法与经理的想法一致。

alike.zh: 这对双胞胎看起来很像。

alkaline.en: Some nutritionists recommend consuming alkaline foods because they believe this diet can help balance the body's pH levels.
alkaline.zh: 一些营养师建议食用碱性食物，因为他们认为这种饮食有助于平衡体内的酸碱度。

all.en: All successful entrepreneurs share common traits such as determination, creativity, and the willingness to take calculated risks.
all.zh: 所有成功的企业家都有共同的特质，如决心、创造力以及愿意承担可控风险的意愿。

all around.en: We looked all around the room.
all around.zh: 我们在房间里四处看了看。

all over.en: The mess is all over the floor.
all over.zh: 地板上到处都是乱七八糟的东西。

all year round.en: The weather is warm all year round here.

arithmetic.en: She teaches arithmetic to young children.

arm.en: She rested her arm on the table while listening carefully to the lecture on environmental policy.
arm.zh: 她把胳膊放在桌子上，认真听关于环境政策的讲座。

armchair.en: Sitting in the armchair by the window, the elderly man enjoyed reading the morning newspaper.
armchair.zh: 坐在窗边的扶手椅上，那位老人享受着阅读晨报的时光。

armed.en: The armed forces have been deployed to assist with disaster relief operations in the affected regions.
armed.zh: 武装部队已被部署到灾区协助开展救灾工作。

arms.en: She stretched her arms and yawned.
arms.zh: 她伸了伸胳膊打了个哈欠。

army.en: The army defended the country's borders.

aromas.en: The aromas emanating from the street food stalls attracted numerous tourists to explore local cuisine.
aromas.zh: 街边小吃摊散发出的香气吸引了众多游客来探索当地美食。

around.en: There are various bookshops around the university campus that cater to students' academic needs.
around.zh: 大学校园周围有各种书店，满足学生的学术需求。

around the world.en: Many traditions exist around the world.
around the world.zh: 世界各地存在许多传统。

arousal.en: Emotional arousal can affect decision making.

as much as.en: I have as much as you do.

as soon as.en: As soon as the government announced the new policy, public debate erupted across various media platforms.
as soon as.zh: 政府一宣布新政策，公共辩论就在各媒体平台上爆发了。

as though.en: He acted as though nothing happened.
as though.zh: 他的行为就好像什么都没发生。

as well as.en: He plays football as well as basketball.

ascending.zh: 上升的烟雾让村民们担忧。

ascertaining.en: The team is ascertaining the cause of the problem.
ascertaining.zh: 团队正在查明问题的原因。

ash.en: Ash covered the ground after the fire.
ash.zh: 火灾后，灰烬覆盖了地面。

ashamed.en: Some teenagers feel ashamed to discuss mental health issues due to the persistent social stigma.
ashamed.zh: 由于持续存在的社会污名化，一些青少年不愿谈论心理健康问题。

aside.en: She put the book aside and listened.
aside.zh: 她把书放在一边然后听。

ask.en: Students should not hesitate to ask clarifying questions when encountering unfamiliar concepts in lectures.
ask.zh: 学生在讲座中遇到陌生概念时，不应犹豫是否要提出澄清性问题。

arouse.en: The controversial documentary was designed to arouse public interest in environmental protection and climate change issues.
arouse.zh: 这部有争议的纪录片旨在唤起公众对环境保护和气候变化问题的关注。

arranged.en: The meeting was arranged for Monday.

arrangement.en: I made an arrangement to meet her tomorrow.

arrangements.en: Have you made the travel arrangements yet?
arrangements.zh: 你已经安排好旅行了吗？

array.en: A wide array of products is sold here.
array.zh: 这里出售各种各样的产品。

arrest.en: The police made an arrest after a thorough investigation into the series of thefts that had troubled the neighborhood.
arrest.zh: 警方在对该社区发生的一系列盗窃案进行彻底调查后逮捕了嫌疑人。

arrival.en: We celebrated her arrival at the airport.
arrival.zh: 我们在机场庆祝她的到来。

arrive.en: The bus will arrive at nine.

arrive in.en: We will arrive in London tomorrow.

arrived.en: The train arrived at the station.

arrogant.en: Despite his arrogant attitude during the meeting, the CEO's business strategies proved remarkably effective.
arrogant.zh: 尽管这位首席执行官在会议期间态度傲慢，但他的商业策略被证明非常有效。

arrow.en: Follow the arrow to find us.
arrow.zh: 跟着箭头走就能找到我们。

artefacts.zh: 博物馆展出古代人工制品。

arthritis.en: Many elderly people suffer from arthritis, which can significantly limit their mobility and daily activities.
arthritis.zh: 许多老年人患有关节炎，这会严重影响他们的行动能力和日常活动。

article.en: The article discusses climate change effects.
article.zh: 这篇文章讨论气候变化的影响。

articulate.en: The university professor was able to articulate complex theories in a way that students could easily understand.
articulate.zh: 这位大学教授能够以学生容易理解的方式清晰地表达复杂的理论。

artificial.en: The park uses artificial grass for decoration.
artificial.zh: 公园使用人造草坪来装饰。

ask about.en: During the job interview, the manager asked about my previous work experience and career goals.
ask about.zh: 在求职面试中，经理询问了我的工作经验和职业目标。

asleep.en: Many university students fall asleep during early morning lectures, which negatively affects their learning outcomes.
asleep.zh: 许多大学生在清晨讲座时会睡着，这会对他们的学习效果产生负面影响。

aspect.en: One crucial aspect of environmental protection is reducing plastic waste in oceans and landfills.
aspect.zh: 环境保护的一个关键方面是减少海洋和垃圾填埋场中的塑料垃圾。

aspects.en: Consider all aspects of the problem.

aspiration.en: My main aspiration is to pursue a career in international business and work abroad after graduating.
aspiration.zh: 我的主要愿望是从事国际商务工作，毕业后到国外工作。

aspirations.en: Young people often have ambitious aspirations, but socioeconomic barriers can prevent them from achieving their goals.
aspirations.zh: 年轻人通常有远大的抱负，但社会经济障碍可能会阻止他们实现自己的目标。

aspire.en: Schools should encourage students to aspire to academic excellence while also developing essential life skills.
aspire.zh: 学校应该鼓励学生追求学术卓越，同时也要培养基本的生活技能。

aspirin.en: I took an aspirin for my headache.
aspirin.zh: 我吃了一片阿司匹林来治疗头痛。

assemble.en: Before the conference begins, participants will assemble in the main hall to receive their materials and badges.
assemble.zh: 在会议开始之前，与会者将在大厅集合，领取他们的材料和徽章。

archaeology.en: Archaeology reveals secrets of ancient times.
archaeology.zh: 考古学揭示了古代的秘密。

archeology.en: The field of archeology has advanced significantly with the use of modern technology such as satellite imaging and DNA analysis.
archeology.zh: 随着卫星成像和DNA分析等现代技术的应用，考古学领域取得了重大进展。

archipelago.en: We visited an archipelago last summer.
archipelago.zh: 去年夏天我们参观了一个群岛。

architect.en: The architect designed an innovative building that combines traditional materials with cutting-edge sustainable technology.
architect.zh: 这位建筑师设计了一座将传统材料与尖端可持续技术相结合的创新建筑。

architects.en: The architects designed the new city library.
architects.zh: 建筑师设计了新的城市图书馆。

architectural.en: The city is famous for its architectural beauty.
architectural.zh: 这座城市以其建筑之美而闻名。

architecture.en: The architecture of this building is very modern.
architecture.zh: 这座建筑的设计非常现代。

archives.en: I searched the school archives for old photos.
archives.zh: 我在学校档案室搜索旧照片。

arctic.en: The arctic is extremely cold in winter.
arctic.zh: 北极地区冬天极其寒冷。

area.en: The metropolitan area has experienced rapid population growth over the past decade, putting pressure on urban infrastructure.
area.zh: 这个大都市区在过去十年经历了快速的人口增长，给城市基础设施带来了压力。

artist.en: The famous artist spent decades perfecting his craft, creating masterpieces that are now displayed in museums worldwide.
artist.zh: 这位著名艺术家花费数十年完善他的技艺，创作出如今在世界各地博物馆展出的杰作。

artistic.en: She shows strong artistic talent early.
artistic.zh: 她很小就展现出艺术天赋。

artists.en: Many artists showed their work at the gallery.
artists.zh: 许多艺术家在画廊展示了他们的作品。

as.en: As technology advances, traditional forms of communication are rapidly being replaced by digital platforms and social media applications.
as.zh: 随着技术的进步，传统的交流形式正迅速被数字平台和社交媒体应用程序所取代。

as a result.en: The company invested heavily in employee training programs. As a result, productivity increased by 30% within just one year.
as a result.zh: 公司在员工培训项目上投入了大量资金。结果，一年内生产率提高了30%。

as a whole.en: Consider the situation as a whole.

as far as.en: We walked as far as the river.

as for.en: As for the proposed changes to the curriculum, the administration will announce its final decision next month after carefully reviewing feedback.
as for.zh: 至于课程设置的拟议修改，管理层将在仔细审查反馈后于下月宣布最终决定。

as high as.en: Unemployment rose as high as 20 percent.

as long as.en: Stay as long as you need.

assuming.en: Assuming that the population continues to grow, cities will need to expand their infrastructure significantly.
assuming.zh: 假设人口继续增长，城市将需要大幅扩展其基础设施。

assumption.en: His assumption turned out to be wrong.
assumption.zh: 他的假设原来是错误的。

assumptions.en: Many assumptions about human behavior underpin traditional economic theories in modern research.
assumptions.zh: 许多关于人类行为的假设支撑着现代研究中的传统经济理论。

assure.en: Companies should assure consumers that their personal data will be handled responsibly and securely.
assure.zh: 公司应该向消费者保证，他们的个人数据将得到负责任和安全的处理。

assured.en: She felt assured about her exam results.
assured.zh: 她对考试结果感到有信心。

asteroid.en: Scientists continue to monitor asteroids that pass near Earth to assess potential collision risks.
asteroid.zh: 科学家继续监测掠过地球的小行星，以评估潜在的碰撞风险。

asthma.en: Children growing up in highly polluted areas are more likely to develop asthma during their lifetime.
asthma.zh: 在高度污染地区长大的儿童一生中更有可能患上哮喘。

astonish.en: The ancient artifacts discovered beneath the ruins continued to astonish archaeologists from around the world.
astonish.zh: 在废墟下发现的古代文物继续令来自世界各地的考古学家感到惊讶。

astonishing.en: The test results were astonishing to everyone.
astonishing.zh: 测试结果令所有人惊讶。

astronomer.en: The astronomer discovered a new star.
astronomer.zh: 天文学家发现了一颗新星星。

at some stage.en: Most people face challenges at some stage.
at some stage.zh: 大多数人在某个阶段都会面临挑战。

at the back.en: The garden is at the back.

at the back of.en: The garden is at the back of the house.

at the end of.en: The library is at the end of the road.

at the moment.en: I am studying at the moment.

at the same time.en: Urbanisation has improved access to healthcare, but at the same time, it has created environmental concerns.
at the same time.zh: 城市化改善了医疗保健的获取途径，但同时也带来了环境问题。

at this stage.en: At this stage, it is premature to draw conclusions about the long-term effectiveness of the new policy.
at this stage.zh: 在这个阶段对新政策的长期有效性下结论还为时过早。

athlete.en: Each elite athlete must maintain rigorous discipline in both training and diet to compete at the highest level.
athlete.zh: 每位精英运动员都必须在训练和饮食方面保持严格的自律，才能在最高水平上竞争。

athletes.en: Many athletes train daily to compete.
athletes.zh: 许多运动员每天训练以参加比赛。

athletic.en: The athletic student won first place.
athletic.zh: 那名运动能力强的学生得了第一名。

atlas.en: She found France in the atlas.
atlas.zh: 她在地图册里找到了法国。

atmosphere.en: The restaurant has a warm atmosphere.
atmosphere.zh: 这家餐厅有温馨的氛围。

atmospheric.en: The atmospheric conditions were perfect for flying.
atmospheric.zh: 大气条件非常适合飞行。

atom.en: According to modern physics, every substance in the universe is composed of tiny particles known as atoms that cannot be seen by microscope.
atom.zh: 根据现代物理学，宇宙中的每种物质都是由被称为原子的微小粒子组成的，这些粒子用显微镜也看不见。

atomic.en: Many countries are currently debating the use of atomic energy as an alternative to fossil fuels for sustainable power generation.
atomic.zh: 许多国家目前正在讨论将原子能作为化石燃料的替代品用于可持续发电的问题。

atoms.en: Atoms are too small to see.

attach.en: When submitting assignments through the online portal, students must remember to attach their completed work before the deadline expires.
attach.zh: 通过在线门户提交作业时，学生必须记住在截止日期前附上他们完成的作业。

attached.en: Please see the attached document for details.

attack.en: The enemy will attack the city tonight.
attack.zh: 敌人今晚将攻击这座城市。

assembly.en: The school assembly was held in the main hall where students gathered to listen to the principal's annual speech about academic achievements.
assembly.zh: 学校集会在大厅举行，学生们聚集在那里聆听校长关于学业成就的年度讲话。

assert.en: Many researchers assert that regular physical exercise plays a crucial role in maintaining both physical health and mental well-being.
assert.zh: 许多研究人员断言，定期的体育锻炼对保持身体健康和心理健康都起着至关重要的作用。

asserts.en: She asserts her rights in the meeting.
asserts.zh: 她在会议上维护自己的权利。

assess.en: Before implementing any new educational policy, the government must assess its potential impact on students from various backgrounds.
assess.zh: 在实施任何新的教育政策之前，政府必须评估其对不同背景学生的潜在影响。

assessable.en: The practical skills acquired during vocational training are easily assessable through direct observation and performance evaluation.
assessable.zh: 在职业培训中获得的实际技能可以通过直接观察和表现评估来轻松评估。

assessed.en: The teacher assessed the students' progress.
assessed.zh: 老师评估了学生的进步。

assesses.en: The standardized test assesses students' abilities in reading, writing, listening, and speaking to determine their English proficiency level.
assesses.zh: 标准化测试评估学生在阅读、写作、听力和口语方面的能力，以确定他们的英语水平。

assessing.en: Assessing the long-term effects of climate change requires comprehensive data collected over several decades across multiple regions.
assessing.zh: 评估气候变化的长期影响需要收集跨越多个地区、数十年来的综合数据。

assessment.zh: 评估显示有良好的进展。

assessments.en: Regular assessments help educators identify students who may need additional support as well as those ready for advanced challenges.
assessments.zh: 定期评估帮助教育工作者识别可能需要额外支持的学生，以及准备好接受高级挑战的学生。

assisted.en: The government assisted the victims of the natural disaster by providing emergency shelter and essential supplies.
assisted.zh: 政府通过提供紧急住所和基本物资来帮助自然灾害的受害者。

assisting.en: Many volunteers are assisting the medical team in distributing vaccines to remote villages in the region.
assisting.zh: 许多志愿者正在协助医疗团队向该地区的偏远村庄分发疫苗。

assists.en: Regular physical exercise assists in maintaining a healthy weight and reducing the risk of chronic diseases.
assists.zh: 定期的体育锻炼有助于保持健康体重并降低慢性病的风险。

associate.en: It is unfair to associate a person's success solely with their educational background and family connections.
associate.zh: 将一个人的成功仅仅与其教育背景和家庭关系联系起来是不公平的。

associate with.en: Young people tend to associate happiness with material possessions and professional achievements.
associate with.zh: 年轻人倾向于将幸福与物质财富和职业成就联系在一起。

associated.en: The study is associated with environmental research.
associated.zh: 这项研究与环境研究相关。

association.en: There is a clear association between regular physical exercise and improved mental health among elderly people.
association.zh: 规律的身体锻炼与老年人心理健康改善之间存在明显的关联。

assume.en: I assume you agree with this.

assumed.en: He assumed responsibility for the project.
assumed.zh: 他承担了这个项目的责任。

assumes.en: This theory assumes that individuals always make rational decisions based on complete information.
assumes.zh: 该理论假设个人总是基于完整信息做出理性决策。

asset.en: The most valuable asset in any organization is its employees, as they contribute innovative ideas and professional expertise.
asset.zh: 在任何组织中，最有价值的资产是员工，因为他们贡献创新的想法和专业知识。

assign.en: The professor will assign various reading materials to help students understand the complex theoretical concepts discussed in class.
assign.zh: 教授将布置各种阅读材料，以帮助学生理解课堂上讨论的复杂理论概念。

assignments.en: All assignments must be submitted on Friday.
assignments.zh: 所有作业必须在周五前提交。

assist.en: Please assist me with this task.

assistant.en: The research assistant helped organize the laboratory.
assistant.zh: 研究助理帮助整理实验室。

assistants.en: Multiple assistants were hired to manage the increased workload during the peak conference season and ensure smooth operations.
assistants.zh: 在会议高峰期聘请了多名助理来管理增加的工作量并确保运营顺利进行。

astronomical.en: The cost of the project was astronomical.
astronomical.zh: 这个项目的成本是巨大的。

astronomy.en: Studying astronomy has broadened my understanding of the universe and sparked my interest in scientific research.
astronomy.zh: 学习天文学拓宽了我对宇宙的理解，并激发了我对科学研究的兴趣。

at.en: At university, I had the opportunity to participate in various extracurricular activities that enhanced my leadership skills.
at.zh: 在大学里，我有机会参加各种课外活动，这些活动提高了我的领导能力。

at any time.en: You can call me at any time.

at first.en: At first the lesson seemed difficult.

at least.en: At least five people attended the meeting.
at least.zh: 至少有五个人参加了会议。

at most.en: The factory can process at most five hundred units per day due to the limitations of its current equipment.
at most.zh: 由于现有设备的限制，这家工厂每天最多能加工五百台设备。

at present.en: At present, the city is facing significant challenges in managing waste disposal due to rapid population growth.
at present.zh: 目前，由于人口快速增长，这座城市在管理垃圾处理方面面临重大挑战。

at risk.en: Many species are at risk today.
at risk.zh: 许多物种今天处于危险中。

balancing.en: She is balancing work and study.
balancing.zh: 她正在平衡工作和学习。

balcony.en: She reads books on her balcony.

balloons.en: The children played happily with balloons at the party.
balloons.zh: 派对上孩子们开心地玩着气球。

ban.en: They decided to ban smoking indoors.
ban.zh: 他们决定禁止室内吸烟。

band.en: The band played at the school concert.
band.zh: 乐队在学校音乐会上演奏。

bank.en: I need to visit the bank today.

bank statement.en: I review my bank statement every month to track my expenses and ensure there are no unauthorized charges.
bank statement.zh: 我每月查看银行对账单来追踪我的开支，并确保没有未经授权的费用。

bankbook.en: In some traditional societies, elderly people still prefer using a bankbook to record their savings transactions.
bankbook.zh: 在一些传统社会，老年人仍然喜欢使用存折来记录他们的储蓄交易。

banking.en: Modern banking has revolutionized financial services by enabling people to manage money through smartphone applications.
banking.zh: 现代银行业通过使人们能够通过智能手机应用程序管理资金，彻底改变了金融服务。

banned.en: Smoking is banned in this restaurant.

authorities.en: The local authorities have implemented new regulations to control traffic congestion in the city center during peak hours.
authorities.zh: 地方当局已经实施了新的法规，以在高峰时段控制市中心的交通拥堵。

authority.en: The local authority implemented new regulations to improve public safety within the crowded city center.
authority.zh: 地方当局实施了新规定，以改善拥挤市中心内的公共安全。

automate.en: Many manufacturing companies are choosing to automate their production lines to improve efficiency and reduce operational costs.
automate.zh: 许多制造公司选择将其生产线自动化，以提高效率并降低运营成本。

automatic.en: The door has an automatic lock.

automation.en: Automation has improved efficiency in manufacturing.
automation.zh: 自动化提高了制造业的效率。

automobile.en: The first practical automobile powered by an internal combustion engine was invented in the late nineteenth century.
automobile.zh: 第一辆由内燃机驱动的实用汽车是在十九世纪末发明的。

automobiles.en: Automobiles line the busy downtown street.
automobiles.zh: 汽车排列在繁忙的市中心街道上。

autonomous.en: The region became fully autonomous last year.
autonomous.zh: 该地区去年完全自治了。

baby.en: The baby is sleeping in the room.

bachelor.en: Many young people are choosing to remain bachelors until their thirties, focusing on their careers and personal development goals.
bachelor.zh: 许多年轻人选择三十岁之前保持单身，专注于事业和个人发展目标。

back.en: He went back to his hometown.

background.en: His background in education surprised everyone.
background.zh: 他的教育背景让所有人都很惊讶。

background information.zh: 我们需要更多背景资料。

backpack.en: I carried my backpack to class today.
backpack.zh: 我今天背着书包去上课。

backward.en: She took a step backward to avoid the car.
backward.zh: 她后退一步以避开汽车。

backwards.en: The company took a step backwards when it decided to eliminate its research and development department unexpectedly.
backwards.zh: 公司在意外决定取消研发部门后经历了一次倒退。

bacteria.zh: 细菌可能导致严重的疾病。

bacterium.en: Each bacterium in the laboratory sample was carefully examined under the microscope to determine its specific characteristics.
bacterium.zh: 实验室样本中的每个细菌都经过显微镜仔细检查，以确定其具体特征。

attitude.en: Her positive attitude helped the team succeed.
attitude.zh: 她积极的态度帮助团队取得成功。

attitudes.en: Young people have different attitudes toward work.
attitudes.zh: 年轻人对工作有不同的态度。

attorney.en: The attorney presented compelling evidence to support the defendant's case in court yesterday afternoon with great confidence.
attorney.zh: 律师昨天下午在法庭上以极大的信心提交了支持被告案件的令人信服的证据。

attract.en: Many universities now use scholarships and research opportunities to attract talented international students from diverse backgrounds.
attract.zh: 许多大学现在使用奖学金和研究机会来吸引来自不同背景的有才华的国际学生。

attracted.en: The colorful poster attracted many students.
attracted.zh: 彩色海报吸引了许多学生。

attraction.en: The main attraction of the tourism program is its practical approach to problem-solving and real-world applications.
attraction.zh: 这个旅游项目的主要吸引力在于其解决问题的实用方法和实际应用。

attractive.en: The job offers an attractive salary.
attractive.zh: 这份工作提供有吸引力的薪水。

attribute.en: Successful entrepreneurs often attribute their achievements to continuous learning and the ability to adapt to changing market conditions.
attribute.zh: 成功的企业家往往将他们的成就归功于持续学习和适应不断变化的市场条件的能力。

attributed.en: The success was attributed to hard work.
attributed.zh: 成功被归因于努力工作。

attributes.en: The most desirable attributes in employees today include adaptability, critical thinking skills, and effective communication abilities.
attributes.zh: 如今员工最理想的特质包括适应能力、批判性思维技能和有效的沟通能力。

attributing.en: Researchers are attributing the recent decline in bee populations to the widespread use of pesticides in agriculture.
attributing.zh: 研究人员将蜜蜂数量的近期下降归因于农业中杀虫剂的广泛使用。

attribution.en: The attribution of climate change solely to natural factors ignores substantial scientific evidence supporting human causation.
attribution.zh: 将气候变化完全归因于自然因素忽视了支持人类活动导致气候变化的大量科学证据。

audience.en: The audience gave a standing ovation.

audio.en: The audio equipment in the classroom works well.
audio.zh: 教室里的音频设备运行良好。

auditorium.en: The school auditorium holds five hundred.
auditorium.zh: 学校礼堂可容纳五百人。

auditory.zh: 听觉技能通过练习会提高。

author.en: The author wrote three popular novels.
author.zh: 这位作者写了三本流行小说。

authoritative.en: Students should consult authoritative sources such as peer-reviewed journals rather than relying on unverified online information.
authoritative.zh: 学生应查阅权威来源，如同行评审期刊，而不是依赖未经证实的网络信息。

authoritatively.en: The professor spoke authoritatively about economic theory, citing extensive research and practical case studies.
authoritatively.zh: 这位教授以权威的姿态阐述经济理论，引用了大量研究和实际案例。

autonomy.en: The region has autonomy in education.
autonomy.zh: 这个地区在教育方面享有自治权。

availability.zh: 订购前请检查是否有货。

available.en: Many universities now offer online resources that are available to students around the clock for their studies.
available.zh: 许多大学现在提供全天候可用的在线资源供学生学习使用。

average.en: The average temperature rose this summer.
average.zh: 今年夏天平均气温上升了。

avocado.en: I ate an avocado for breakfast.
avocado.zh: 我早餐吃了一个牛油果。

awake.en: The baby stayed awake all morning.

award.en: The committee will award the prize next week.
award.zh: 委员会下周将颁发奖项。

awards.en: She won two awards this year.
awards.zh: 她今年赢得了两个奖项。

aware.en: Are you aware of the problem?
aware.zh: 你意识到这个问题了吗？

awareness.zh: 学生需要更强的环境意识。

away.en: My house is far away from downtown.

awe.en: Standing before the ancient pyramids, visitors often feel a sense of awe at the architectural achievement.
awe.zh: 站在古金字塔面前，游客常常对这一建筑成就感到敬畏。

awesome.en: That movie last night was awesome.

awful.en: The weather was awful during our holiday.
awful.zh: 我们度假期间天气很糟糕。

awkward.en: Being caught in an awkward situation, the employee struggled to explain why the project deadline had been missed.
awkward.zh: 陷入尴尬境地的员工努力解释为什么项目截止日期被延误了。

axes.en: The lumberjack carried two heavy axes.
axes.zh: 伐木工人扛着两把沉重的斧头。

babies.en: The nursery has several sleeping babies.
babies.zh: 育儿室里躺着几个熟睡的婴儿。

bad.en: The air quality in some major cities is bad, which can lead to various respiratory problems among residents.
bad.zh: 一些大城市的空气质量很差，这可能导致居民出现各种呼吸系统问题。

badly.en: The country's economy performed badly last quarter due to rising inflation and unemployment rates across the nation.
badly.zh: 由于全国通胀和失业率上升，该国上季度的经济表现不佳。

bag.en: I always carry a reusable cloth bag when shopping to reduce my environmental impact and plastic waste.
bag.zh: 我购物时总是携带可重复使用的布袋，以减少对环境的影响和塑料垃圾。

baggage.en: I collected my baggage from the carousel.
baggage.zh: 我从传送带上取走了行李。

baggage allowance.en: Economy class passengers typically receive a baggage allowance of twenty-three kilograms per person on this airline.
baggage allowance.zh: 这家航空公司的经济舱乘客通常每人有二十三公斤的行李托运额度。

baggage claim.en: After collecting their luggage at baggage claim, travelers must proceed through customs before exiting the terminal.
baggage claim.zh: 旅客在行李提取处取到行李后，必须通过海关检查才能离开航站楼。

bailiff.en: The bailiff escorted the defendant out.

bake.en: Many families choose to bake their own bread instead of buying commercially produced loaves from supermarkets.
bake.zh: 许多家庭选择自己烤面包，而不是从超市购买商业生产的面包。

balance.en: You need to balance work and rest.
balance.zh: 你需要平衡工作和休息。

base on.en: Architects should base on traditional principles when designing sustainable modern buildings.
base on.zh: 建筑师在设计可持续的现代建筑时应该以传统原则为基础。

baseball.en: My brother plays baseball every weekend.
baseball.zh: 我哥哥每个周末都打棒球。

based.en: Many policy decisions are based on statistical data collected from various sources.
based.zh: 许多政策决定都是基于从各种来源收集的统计数据。

based on.en: The conclusions of the study are based on interviews with over five hundred participants.
based on.zh: 这项研究的结论是基于对五百多名参与者的访谈。

baseline.en: Researchers established a baseline measurement before implementing the new teaching method.
baseline.zh: 研究人员在实施新的教学方法之前建立了基准测量。

basement.en: We stored old furniture in the basement.
basement.zh: 我们把旧家具存放在地下室。

basic.zh: 理解基本概念是必要的。

basically.en: Governments are basically responsible for ensuring the welfare and safety of their citizens.
basically.zh: 政府基本上负责确保公民的福利和安全。

basin.en: The river basin floods every year.
basin.zh: 河流盆地每年都会发洪水。

basis.en: Decisions regarding urban development should be made on the basis of comprehensive scientific research rather than political convenience.
basis.zh: 城市发展的决策应基于全面的科学研究，而不是政治便利。

behind.en: The cat hid behind the sofa.

being.en: The human being is naturally curious, which explains why we are driven to explore and discover new things.
being.zh: 人类天生好奇，这解释了为什么我们有探索和发现新事物的动力。

belief.en: His belief in hard work helped him succeed.
belief.zh: 他对勤奋的信念帮助他成功了。

believe.en: I believe this plan will work.
believe.zh: 我相信这个计划会有效。

believe in.en: I believe in your hard work.

bell.en: The school bell rang loudly today.
bell.zh: 学校的铃声今天响得很大。

belly.en: He rubbed his belly after lunch.

belong.en: Cultural artifacts discovered in the museum belong to the heritage of the local indigenous community nearby.
belong.zh: 博物馆中发现的文化文物属于附近当地原住民社区的遗产。

belong to.en: These books belong to the library.

beg.en: The man had to beg for food.
beg.zh: 这个人不得不乞讨食物。

begin.en: International students should begin learning the local language as soon as they arrive in the country.
begin.zh: 国际学生应该在抵达该国后立即开始学习当地语言。

beginner.en: This book is perfect for a beginner.
beginner.zh: 这本书非常适合初学者。

beginners.en: This class is perfect for beginners.
beginners.zh: 这个课程非常适合初学者。

beginning.en: We are at the beginning of the course.
beginning.zh: 我们在这门课程的开始阶段。

behalf.en: He spoke on behalf of the team.

behave.en: Students must behave properly in class.
behave.zh: 学生在课堂上必须表现良好。

behavior.en: Good behavior earns respect from others.
behavior.zh: 良好的行为赢得他人尊重。

behaviour.zh: 他的行为让所有人惊讶。

behavioural.en: His behavioural patterns changed after the move.
behavioural.zh: 搬家后他的行为模式改变了。

bar.en: He bought a chocolate bar yesterday.
bar.zh: 他昨天买了一块巧克力。

barbecue.en: We enjoyed a delicious barbecue at the park.
barbecue.zh: 我们在公园享用了美味的烧烤。

barely.en: I barely passed the final exam.
barely.zh: 我勉强通过了期末考试。

bargain.en: This bargain is too good to miss.
bargain.zh: 这个便宜货太划算了，不能错过。

bark.en: The dog started to bark loudly.

barn.en: The farmer stores hay in the old barn.
barn.zh: 农夫把干草存在旧谷仓里。

barren.en: The farmland in this area is barren.
barren.zh: 这个地区的农田是贫瘠的。

barrier.en: Language differences often create a significant barrier for international students adapting to university life in foreign countries.
barrier.zh: 语言差异经常为适应外国大学生活的国际学生造成重大障碍。

barriers.en: Language barriers can cause communication problems.
barriers.zh: 语言障碍会导致沟通问题。

base.en: The research center serves as the primary base for scientists conducting important environmental studies in the region.
base.zh: 这个研究中心是该地区进行重要环境研究的科学家们的主要基地。

basket.en: She carried a basket full of fruits.

bath.en: I take a hot bath every night.

bathroom.en: She takes a shower in the bathroom every evening.
bathroom.zh: 她每天晚上在浴室洗澡。

bathtub.en: The claw-foot bathtub in the heritage hotel room added a charming vintage touch to the overall accommodation experience.
bathtub.zh: 遗产酒店房间里带爪脚浴缸为整体住宿体验增添了迷人的复古气息。

bats.en: Bats fly at night to find food.
bats.zh: 蝙蝠在夜间飞行寻找食物。

battery.en: The battery in my phone died.
battery.zh: 我手机里的电池没电了。

battle.en: They battle against cancer every day.
battle.zh: 他们每天与癌症作斗争。

bay.en: The boat anchored safely in the bay.
bay.zh: 船安全地停泊在海湾里。

be.en: Students who aspire to be successful professionals should develop both academic knowledge and practical communication skills.
be.zh: 渴望成为成功专业人士的学生应该培养学术知识和实践沟通技能。

bean.en: Coffee production relies heavily on the quality of the bean, which varies significantly across different growing regions.
bean.zh: 咖啡生产严重依赖咖啡豆的质量，这在不同的种植地区之间存在显著差异。

beans.en: Beans are a good source of protein.
beans.zh: 豆类是很好的蛋白质来源。

bear.en: I cannot bear this pain any longer.
bear.zh: 我再也无法忍受这种疼痛了。

bears.en: He bears the heavy workload without complaint.
bears.zh: 他没有抱怨地忍受繁重的工作量。

beast.en: Zoo visitors watched the beast eating meat.
beast.zh: 动物园游客看着这只野兽吃肉。

beat.en: The home team managed to beat their opponents by three points, securing their place in the championship final.
beat.zh: 主队以三分优势击败了对手，确保了他们在锦标赛决赛中的位置。

beats.en: I love dancing to the fast beats in this song.
beats.zh: 我喜欢跟着这首歌的快节奏跳舞。

beautiful.zh: 她穿了一条漂亮的裙子。

beauty.en: We admired the beauty of the garden.

because.en: Many students choose to study abroad because they believe it will provide them with better career opportunities in the future.
because.zh: 许多学生选择出国留学，因为他们相信这会为他们未来的职业发展提供更多机会。

because of.en: Because of the rapid population growth, many cities are facing severe housing shortages and rising property prices.
because of.zh: 由于人口快速增长，许多城市正面临严重的住房短缺和房价上涨问题。

become.en: As people become more health-conscious, they tend to choose organic foods and engage in regular exercise.
become.zh: 随着人们变得更加注重健康，他们倾向于选择有机食品并定期锻炼。

bed.en: I go to bed at ten every night.
bed.zh: 我每天晚上十点上床睡觉。

bedroom.en: My bedroom has a big window.
bedroom.zh: 我的卧室有一扇大窗户。

bedsit.en: She lives in a small bedsit.
bedsit.zh: 她住在一个小单间公寓里。

beef.en: I usually order beef noodles for lunch.

beer.en: In many Western countries, it is common to enjoy a cold beer with friends after work to relax and socialise.
beer.zh: 在许多西方国家，下班后和朋友一起喝杯冰啤酒放松和社交是很常见的。

beetles.en: The garden had many colorful beetles.
beetles.zh: 花园里有很多彩色的甲虫。

before.en: It is advisable to read the instructions carefully before attempting to operate any new electrical equipment.
before.zh: 在操作任何新电器设备之前，仔细阅读说明书是明智的。

be aware of.en: Everyone should be aware of the rules.
be aware of.zh: 每个人都应该知道这些规则。
