be called.en: The traditional method of cooking food over an open flame is commonly called barbecuing in many Western cultures around the world.
be called.zh: 在世界各地的许多西方文化中，在明火上烹饪食物的传统方法通常被称为烧烤。

be familiar with.en: Students who plan to take the speaking examination should be familiar with the standard format and common question types used in the test.
be familiar with.zh: 计划参加口语考试的学生应该熟悉考试的标准形式和常见题型。

be happy to.en: Many international universities are happy to provide comprehensive support services to help students settle into their new academic environment.
be happy to.zh: 许多国际大学很乐意提供全面的支持服务，帮助学生在新的学术环境中安顿下来。

be held.en: The meeting will be held tomorrow.

be interested in.en: Young adults today are increasingly interested in pursuing careers in renewable energy to address pressing environmental challenges.
be interested in.zh: 如今的年轻人越来越对从事可再生能源领域的职业感兴趣，以应对紧迫的环境挑战。

be involved in.en: Research demonstrates that when parents are regularly involved in their children's education, students tend to achieve better academic outcomes.
be involved in.zh: 研究表明，当家长定期参与孩子的教育时，学生往往能取得更好的学业成绩。

be part of.en: I want to be part of this project.
be part of.zh: 我想成为这个项目的一员。

beach.en: Children built sandcastles on the beach.
beach.zh: 孩子们在海滩上建沙堡。

beaches.en: Australia has many beautiful sandy beaches.
beaches.zh: 澳大利亚有许多美丽的沙滩。

blind.en: The blind man uses a white cane.
blind.zh: 那位盲人使用白色手杖。

blinds.en: He closed the blinds to block the sunlight.

bloc.en: The trading bloc has significantly boosted economic cooperation among member countries.
bloc.zh: 这个贸易集团大大促进了成员国之间的经济合作。

block.en: A sudden increase in demand could block the smooth functioning of the supply chain.
block.zh: 需求的突然增加可能会阻碍供应链的顺利运作。

blockages.en: The plumber fixed the pipe blockages.
blockages.zh: 水管工修好了管道堵塞。

blocks.en: Large blocks of ice fell from the truck.
blocks.zh: 大冰块从卡车上掉下来。

blond.en: The blond boy has blue eyes.
blond.zh: 那个白肤金发的男孩有蓝眼睛。

blonde.en: The blonde girl sang a beautiful song.
blonde.zh: 那个金发女孩唱了一首动听的歌。

blood.en: Regular exercise can help maintain healthy blood pressure and reduce the risk of heart disease.
blood.zh: 定期锻炼有助于维持健康的血压，降低患心脏病的风险。

between.en: The price difference between economy and business class tickets can be substantial for long-haul flights.
between.zh: 经济舱和商务舱机票之间的价格差异对于长途航班来说可能相当大。

beverage.en: Coffee has become the most popular morning beverage for professionals in urban areas worldwide.
beverage.zh: 咖啡已成为全球城市地区职场人士最受欢迎的早餐饮料。

beverages.en: Many beverages contain too much sugar.
beverages.zh: 许多饮料含有过多糖分。

beyond.en: The benefits of learning a second language extend far beyond simple communication, enhancing cognitive abilities and cultural understanding.
beyond.zh: 学习第二语言的好处远远超出了简单的交流，还能增强认知能力和文化理解。

bible.en: She reads the bible every Sunday.

bibliography.en: Every research paper needs a bibliography.
bibliography.zh: 每篇研究论文都需要参考书目。

bicycle.en: I ride my bicycle to school.

bicycles.en: Many people use bicycles to travel around the city.
bicycles.zh: 很多人骑自行车在城里穿梭。

big.en: The big challenge facing modern educators is integrating technology without losing traditional teaching methods.
big.zh: 现代教育者面临的最大挑战是在不失去传统教学方法的情况下整合技术。

bio-degradable.en: Many countries are now requiring manufacturers to use bio-degradable materials in their products to reduce environmental pollution.
bio-degradable.zh: 许多国家现在要求制造商在产品中使用可生物降解材料，以减少环境污染。

biochemistry.en: A thorough understanding of biochemistry is essential for students pursuing careers in medicine or pharmaceutical research.
biochemistry.zh: 深入了解生物化学对于从事医学或药物研究的学生来说至关重要。

biodiversity.zh: 雨林拥有惊人的生物多样性。

biological.en: Biological factors play a key role.
biological.zh: 生物因素起着关键作用。

biologist.en: The biologist studies plants and animals.
biologist.zh: 生物学家研究植物和动物。

biologists.en: Biologists study plants and animals in nature.
biologists.zh: 生物学家研究自然中的植物和动物。

biomass.en: The forest has a large biomass.
biomass.zh: 这片森林有大量的生物量。

biomedical.en: Biomedical research has made remarkable progress in developing vaccines and treatments for various infectious diseases.
biomedical.zh: 生物医学研究在开发各种传染病疫苗和治疗方面取得了显著进展。

biosphere.en: Human activities have profoundly altered the biosphere, resulting in climate change and ecosystem disruption worldwide.
biosphere.zh: 人类活动深刻改变了生物圈，导致全球气候变化和生态系统破坏。

bike.en: She rides her bike to school.

bikes.en: The store sells new and used bikes.
bikes.zh: 这家店出售新自行车和二手自行车。

bilingual.en: She works as a bilingual secretary.

bill.en: Could you please pay the electricity bill today?
bill.zh: 请您今天付一下电费账单。

billion.en: The company has a billion users.

bills.en: I forgot to pay the bills yesterday.

bin.en: The recycling program requires residents to separate their waste and place each type in the appropriate bin for proper disposal.
bin.zh: 回收计划要求居民将垃圾分类，并将其放入适当的垃圾箱中进行正确处理。

bind.en: Strong social bonds and shared cultural values can bind communities together, creating a sense of belonging and mutual support among residents.
bind.zh: 强大的社会纽带和共同的文化价值观可以将社区团结在一起，在居民之间创造归属感和相互支持。

bins.en: Please throw the paper in the recycling bins.
bins.zh: 请把纸张扔进回收垃圾桶。

bird.en: The observation of bird behavior in national parks provides valuable insights into ecosystem health and environmental changes.
bird.zh: 对国家公园鸟类行为的观察为了解生态系统健康和环境变化提供了宝贵的见解。

birds.en: Many birds sing early in the morning.

biscuit.en: The traditional British biscuit with tea represents an important aspect of cultural heritage that dates back centuries.
biscuit.zh: 传统的英式茶点搭配饼干代表了可追溯到几个世纪的文化遗产的重要方面。

biscuits.en: I had biscuits with my afternoon tea.
biscuits.zh: 我下午喝茶时吃了饼干。

bit.en: The professor explained the complex theory by giving us a bit of background information before diving into details.
bit.zh: 教授在深入讲解细节之前，通过提供一些背景信息来解释这个复杂的理论。

bite.en: If you take a bite of durian fruit, you will immediately understand why it is considered both beloved and controversial.
bite.zh: 如果你尝一口榴莲，你将立即理解为什么它被认为既令人喜爱又备受争议。

bitter.en: The medicine left a bitter taste.

bitterness.en: The medicine left a bitterness in my mouth.
bitterness.zh: 药在我嘴里留下了苦味。

belongings.en: When travelling abroad, it is essential to keep your belongings secure to avoid theft and potential financial loss.
belongings.zh: 出国旅行时，务必保管好个人财物，以避免盗窃和潜在的经济损失。

below.en: The temperature dropped below zero last night.
below.zh: 昨晚温度降到了零度以下。

belt.en: The belt carries products in the factory.
belt.zh: 传送带在工厂里运输产品。

bend.en: Bend your knees when you lift.

beneath.en: The keys are beneath the book on the table.

beneficial.en: Regular exercise is beneficial for overall health.
beneficial.zh: 经常锻炼对整体健康有益。

beneficiaries.en: The new education policy ensures that all beneficiaries have equal access to quality learning resources and opportunities.
beneficiaries.zh: 新的教育政策确保所有受益者都能平等地获得优质学习资源和机会。

beneficiary.en: As the sole beneficiary of the estate, she inherited the family home and all associated financial assets.
beneficiary.zh: 作为该遗产的唯一受益人，她继承了家庭住宅和所有相关的金融资产。

benefited.en: The local community has greatly benefited from the new recycling program that was implemented last year in our city.
benefited.zh: 当地社区从去年在我们城市实施的新回收计划中获益良多。

benefiting.en: The new scholarship program is benefiting students from disadvantaged backgrounds by providing them with equal educational opportunities.
benefiting.zh: 新的奖学金计划正在通过为贫困学生提供平等的教育机会而使他们受益。

benefits.en: What are the benefits of learning English?

benign.en: Although the doctor confirmed the tumor was benign, she recommended annual check-ups to monitor any potential changes in the future.
benign.zh: 虽然医生确认肿瘤是良性的，但她建议每年进行检查以监测未来可能的变化。

beside.en: She sat beside her sister on the bus.
beside.zh: 她在公交车上坐在姐姐旁边。

besides.en: Besides improving physical health, regular exercise also offers significant benefits for mental well-being.
besides.zh: 除了改善身体健康外，定期锻炼还为心理健康提供了显著的好处。

best.en: The best approach to environmental protection combines government regulations with individual efforts from every responsible citizen worldwide.
best.zh: 环境保护的最佳方式是将政府法规与全世界每个负责任公民的个人努力相结合。

betray.en: Plagiarism can seriously betray the trust of academic institutions and result in severe consequences for students' future careers.
betray.zh: 剽窃会严重背叛学术机构的信任，并导致学生未来职业生涯的严重后果。

better.en: Living in urban areas can provide better access to healthcare facilities, quality education, and diverse employment opportunities.
better.zh: 生活在城市地区可以获得更好的医疗设施、优质教育和多样化的就业机会。

bizarre.en: The story had a bizarre ending.
bizarre.zh: 这个故事有一个离奇的结局。

black.zh: 她穿了一条黑色的裙子。

blackboards.en: The teacher wrote on the blackboards.

blame.en: Do not blame others for your mistakes.
blame.zh: 不要把错误归咎于别人。

blank.en: I stared at the blank page.

blanket.en: During cold winter nights, a thick woolen blanket provides essential warmth for people living in poorly insulated homes.
blanket.zh: 在寒冷的冬夜，厚羊毛毯为住在隔热条件差的房屋里的人提供必要的保暖。

blankets.en: We need extra blankets for the cold night.
blankets.zh: 寒冷的夜晚我们需要额外的毛毯。

blast.en: A blast of wind hit the house.

blend.en: Blend the flour and sugar together.
blend.zh: 把面粉和糖混合在一起。

bless.en: Before beginning their meal, some families take a moment to bless the food as an expression of gratitude.
bless.zh: 在开始用餐前，一些家庭会花片刻为食物祈祷，以表达感激之情。

borrow.en: May I borrow your pen for a moment?
borrow.zh: 我可以借一下你的笔吗？

boss.en: The boss gave us more work.

botanist.en: The botanist studied rare flowers in the forest.
botanist.zh: 植物学家在森林里研究稀有花卉。

botany.en: Understanding botany is essential for developing sustainable agricultural practices in modern farming.
botany.zh: 了解植物学对在现代农业中发展可持续农业实践至关重要。

both.en: Both the morning and evening classes were fully booked, so I had to choose an alternative time.
both.zh: 上午和晚上的课程都报满了，所以我不得不选择另一个时间。

both...and.en: The new policy benefits both students and teachers by improving communication and resources.
both...and.zh: 新政策通过改善沟通和资源，使学生和教师都受益。

bother.en: Don't bother me while I work.

bottle.en: The museum displayed an ancient Roman bottle that was remarkably well preserved after centuries.
bottle.zh: 博物馆展示了一个古罗马瓶子，它在几个世纪后保存得非常好。

bottles.zh: 我们回收了很多玻璃瓶。

bottom.en: The book is at the bottom of the shelf.

breast.en: Many health professionals recommend eating grilled chicken breast as a lean source of protein for a balanced diet.
breast.zh: 许多健康专家建议食用烤鸡胸肉作为均衡饮食中瘦蛋白质的来源。

breath.en: After running up the stairs, I had to pause and catch my breath before continuing with my presentation.
breath.zh: 跑上楼梯后，我不得不停下来喘口气，然后继续我的演讲。

breathe.en: Every living thing needs to breathe.

breathing.en: Regular breathing exercises help reduce stress.
breathing.zh: 规律的呼吸练习有助于减轻压力。

breed.en: Some farmers choose to breed cattle specifically for milk production rather than for meat consumption.
breed.zh: 一些农民选择饲养奶牛专门用于产奶，而不是用于肉类消费。

breeding.en: The breeding of endangered species in captivity is often considered a last resort to prevent extinction.
breeding.zh: 在圈养环境中繁殖濒危物种通常被视为防止灭绝的最后手段。

bribe.en: Corruption scandals involving government officials accepting bribes have significantly damaged public trust in institutions.
bribe.zh: 涉及政府官员收受贿赂的腐败丑闻严重损害了公众对机构的信任。

brick.en: The house has red brick walls.

bridge.en: We walked across the old bridge.

brief.en: The meeting was brief and productive.

boost.en: The new policy will boost economic growth.
boost.zh: 新政策将促进经济增长。

boot.en: He kicked the ball with such force that it flew over the goal and hit the boot of a spectator in the front row.
boot.zh: 他用力踢球，球飞过球门，击中了前排一位观众的小腿。

boots.en: Hikers need strong boots for mountains.
boots.zh: 徒步旅行者爬山需要坚固的靴子。

border.en: They crossed the border into Canada.
border.zh: 他们跨越边境进入加拿大。

borders.en: The two countries share long borders.
borders.zh: 这两个国家拥有漫长的边界。

bore.en: The lecturer spoke in such a monotonous voice that he began to bore the entire audience within twenty minutes.
bore.zh: 这位演讲者的声音如此单调，以至于在二十分钟内就开始让全场观众感到厌烦。

bored.en: The bored employee stared out the window, wishing that the tedious meeting would finally come to an end.
bored.zh: 那位感到无聊的员工盯着窗外，希望这场乏味的会议最终能够结束。

boredom.en: Students often feel boredom during long lessons.
boredom.zh: 学生在长时间上课时经常感到无聊。

boring.en: The movie turned out to be very boring.

born.en: Children born into affluent families often have greater access to educational resources and opportunities.
born.zh: 出生在富裕家庭的孩子通常能够获得更多的教育资源和机会。

book.en: I strongly recommend that candidates read at least one informative book on the topic before the examination date arrives.
book.zh: 我强烈建议考生在考试日期之前至少阅读一本关于该主题的书籍。

booking.en: He is booking a car rental for the trip.
booking.zh: 他正在为旅行预订租车。

bookings.zh: 所有酒店预订都已确认。

booklet.en: The informative booklet distributed at orientation provides students with essential details about campus facilities and services.
booklet.zh: 在迎新会上分发的信息手册为学生提供了关于校园设施和服务的基本细节。

booklists.en: The teacher provided booklists for the semester's reading.
booklists.zh: 老师提供了这学期阅读的书单。

books.en: I borrowed some books from the library.
books.zh: 我从图书馆借了一些书。

bookshelf.en: I keep my most treasured novels neatly arranged on the bookshelf positioned beside the window in my study room.
bookshelf.zh: 我把我最珍爱的小说整齐地摆放在书房窗户旁的书架上。

bookshop.en: I bought this novel at the bookshop.
bookshop.zh: 我在这家书店买了这本小说。

bookstore.en: The campus bookstore offers students a comprehensive range of academic textbooks required for all core curriculum subjects.
bookstore.zh: 校园书店为学生提供所有核心课程所需的各种学术教材。

boil.en: The water will begin to boil at 100 degrees Celsius, which is a fundamental concept in chemistry.
boil.zh: 水在100摄氏度时会开始沸腾，这是化学中的一个基本概念。

boiled.en: I boiled the water for tea.

boiler.en: The boiler needs to be repaired soon.

boiling.en: The water was boiling vigorously in the kettle, indicating that it was finally ready for making tea.
boiling.zh: 水在壶里剧烈沸腾，表明它终于准备好泡茶了。

bomb.en: The discovery of an unexploded bomb during construction delayed the urban development project for several weeks.
bomb.zh: 施工期间发现的一枚未爆炸炸弹使城市开发项目推迟了数周。

bond.en: Strong social bonds between community members are essential for maintaining a stable and supportive society.
bond.zh: 社区成员之间牢固的社会纽带对于维持稳定和支持性的社会至关重要。

bonds.en: Strong bonds form between team members.
bonds.zh: 团队成员之间形成紧密的纽带。

bones.en: The dog buried bones in the garden.

bonus.en: Many companies offer performance bonuses to motivate employees and reward exceptional work achievements annually.
bonus.zh: 许多公司提供绩效奖金来激励员工，并每年奖励优秀的工作成就。

blood type.en: Before undergoing major surgery, it is essential to determine the patient's blood type in case an emergency transfusion becomes necessary.
blood type.zh: 在大手术前，确定病人的血型至关重要，以防紧急情况下需要输血。

blood vessel.en: Scientists discovered that damaged blood vessels can repair themselves over time with proper medical treatment and lifestyle changes.
blood vessel.zh: 科学家发现，受损的血管经过适当的医疗和生活方式改变可以随时间自我修复。

blossomed.en: Her business blossomed after the redesign.
blossomed.zh: 重新设计后她的生意蒸蒸日上。

blow.en: The wind was strong enough to blow the door shut.
blow.zh: 风大得足以把门吹关上。

blue.en: The blue sky lifted everyone's mood.
blue.zh: 蓝色的天空提升了每个人的心情。

board.en: Passengers must board the train now.
board.zh: 乘客现在必须登上火车。

boarding pass.en: Please have your boarding pass ready for inspection at the gate, as airport security requires verification before boarding aircraft.
boarding pass.zh: 请在登机口准备好您的登机牌，因为机场安检需要在登机前进行验证。

boat.en: I saw a small boat on the lake.
boat.zh: 我在湖上看到一艘小船。

body.en: Exercise is good for your body.
body.zh: 运动对你的身体有好处。

bounce.en: The ball will bounce when it hits the ground.

bound.en: The project is bound to succeed with good planning.
bound.zh: 有好的计划，这个项目一定会成功。

boundaries.en: There are clear boundaries between the two areas.
boundaries.zh: 这两个区域之间有明确的界限。

boundary.en: The boundary of the national park clearly separates the protected wilderness area from the surrounding farmland.
boundary.zh: 国家公园的边界清楚地将受保护的荒野地区与周围的农田分隔开来。

bowl.en: The bowl is filled with rice.

bowtie.en: Dad wore a bowtie to the wedding.
bowtie.zh: 爸爸在婚礼上戴了领结。

box office.en: The box office opens at nine.

boy.en: The young boy showed exceptional talent in mathematics, solving complex equations that puzzled adults around him.
boy.zh: 那个年轻的男孩展现出非凡的数学天赋，能解开困扰周围成年人的复杂方程式。

brakes.en: The car brakes failed on the hill.
brakes.zh: 汽车刹车在山坡上失灵了。

buzz.en: I heard a buzz from outside.

by.en: She managed to improve her writing skills by practicing essays every single day without fail.
by.zh: 她通过每天坚持练习作文，成功提高了写作技能。

by contrast.en: By contrast, rural areas offer peaceful environments, while cities provide more career opportunities.
by contrast.zh: 相比之下，农村地区提供宁静的环境，而城市则有更多职业机会。

by means of.en: We learn by means of practice.

by the sea.en: We stayed at a hotel by the sea.
by the sea.zh: 我们住在海边的一家酒店。

by the way.en: By the way, have you considered applying for the scholarship that was mentioned in yesterday's assembly?
by the way.zh: 顺便问一下，你考虑过申请昨天集会上提到的那份奖学金吗？

by using.en: We save time by using this tool.
by using.zh: 通过使用这个工具，我们节省时间。

bye.en: I had to say bye to my childhood friends when my family relocated to a different country for work.
bye.zh: 当我的家人因工作搬迁到另一个国家时，我不得不和童年朋友们道别。

cab.en: I took a cab to the airport.

cabinet.en: The newly appointed cabinet held their first meeting to discuss policies aimed at improving public transportation.
cabinet.zh: 新任命的内阁召开了第一次会议，讨论旨在改善公共交通的政策。

burial.en: The burial took place at sunrise.

buried.en: They buried the treasure deep underground.
buried.zh: 他们把宝藏深埋在地下。

burn.en: The fire began to burn the old house.
burn.zh: 火开始燃烧那栋老房子。

burning.en: The burning house was quickly evacuated.
burning.zh: 着火的房子很快被疏散了。

burst.en: The balloon burst with a loud pop.

bury.en: In some cultures, people choose to bury their loved ones in their hometown regardless of where they lived.
bury.zh: 在某些文化中，人们选择将亲人埋葬在家乡，无论他们生前住在何处。

bus.en: Taking the bus to work is often more environmentally friendly than driving a private car alone.
bus.zh: 乘坐公交车上班通常比独自开私家车更环保。

bus stop.en: The bus stop is near the park.
bus stop.zh: 公共汽车站在公园附近。

bush.en: A small bush grew in the corner of the garden where the sunlight barely reached during the day.
bush.zh: 一株小灌木生长在花园的角落里，那里白天几乎照不到阳光。

bushes.en: Birds often build nests in bushes.
bushes.zh: 鸟类经常在灌木丛中筑巢。

bright.en: The sun is very bright today.

brilliant.en: The brilliant idea saved the project.
brilliant.zh: 那个绝妙的想法拯救了整个项目。

bring along.en: You can bring along a friend to the party.
bring along.zh: 你可以带一个朋友来聚会。

broad.en: The river is very broad here.

brochure.en: I picked up a brochure about the tour.
brochure.zh: 我拿了一份关于这次旅游的小册子。

broken.en: The broken chair cannot be used.
broken.zh: 这把坏掉的椅子不能用了。

brother.en: My brother works as a teacher.

built.en: They built a new library in our town.
built.zh: 他们在我们镇上建了一座新图书馆。

bulb.en: The light bulb is too bright.

bullying.en: Bullying at school affects many children.
bullying.zh: 校园欺凌影响许多孩子。

bumps.en: The road had many rough bumps.
bumps.zh: 这条路有很多崎岖的隆起。

bunch.en: A bunch of environmental activists gathered in the city centre to raise awareness about climate change issues.
bunch.zh: 一群环保活动人士聚集在市中心，以提高人们对气候变化问题的认识。

burden.en: Many low-income families bear the financial burden of paying for healthcare, which can lead to difficult choices.
burden.zh: 许多低收入家庭承担着支付医疗费用的经济负担，这可能导致困难的选择。

bureau.en: The Federal Bureau of Investigation released an annual report on crime statistics across different states in the country.
bureau.zh: 联邦调查局发布了全国各州的年度犯罪统计数据报告。

bureaucracy.en: Excessive bureaucracy often creates unnecessary delays and obstacles for businesses trying to obtain operating permits.
bureaucracy.zh: 过度的官僚主义经常为试图获得运营许可证的企业造成不必要的延误和障碍。

burglar.en: The burglar broke into the house at night.
burglar.zh: 窃贼在晚上闯入了房子。

calculation.en: After careful calculation, the economists predicted that the new trade agreement would increase GDP by approximately 3.5 percent annually.
calculation.zh: 经过仔细计算，经济学家预测新的贸易协定将使国内生产总值每年增长约3.5%。

calendar.en: I need to check my calendar for the meeting date.
calendar.zh: 我需要查看日历上的会议日期。

call for.en: The growing concern over air pollution has prompted health organizations to call for stricter emissions standards and better urban planning.
call for.zh: 对空气污染日益增长的担忧促使卫生组织呼吁更严格的排放标准和更好的城市规划。

calm.en: The sea was calm this morning.

calming.en: The music had a calming effect on me.
calming.zh: 音乐对我有镇静的作用。

calorie.en: Consuming too many calories without adequate physical exercise often leads to weight gain and increases the risk of various chronic diseases.
calorie.zh: 摄入过多卡路里而没有足够的体育锻炼通常导致体重增加，并增加各种慢性疾病的风险。

calories.en: This cake contains too many calories for a diet.
calories.zh: 这款蛋糕对减肥来说卡路里太高了。

brown.en: She wore a brown leather jacket.
brown.zh: 她穿着一件棕色皮夹克。

brush.en: Artists often use a fine brush to apply detailed strokes when creating intricate paintings for exhibition in modern art galleries.
brush.zh: 艺术家在创作复杂的画作以便在现代艺术画廊展览时，通常使用细画笔来涂抹细节笔触。

bubbles.en: The children blew colorful bubbles in the park.
bubbles.zh: 孩子们在公园里吹彩色泡泡。

budget.en: We need a strict monthly budget.
budget.zh: 我们需要严格的月度预算。

buds.en: The trees have new buds in spring.

buffet.en: The hotel serves a wonderful buffet breakfast.
buffet.zh: 这家酒店提供很棒的自助早餐。

build.en: The local council plans to build a new sports complex to encourage community participation in physical activities.
build.zh: 地方议会计划建造一个新的体育中心，以鼓励社区居民参与体育活动。

build up.en: Regular exercise can build up your immune system over time, making you more resistant to common illnesses.
build up.zh: 定期锻炼可以随着时间增强你的免疫系统，使你更能抵抗常见疾病。

building.en: The building was designed by a famous architect.
building.zh: 这栋建筑是由一位著名建筑师设计的。

business class.en: The business class passengers were offered complimentary meals and Wi-Fi access during the international flight to London.
business class.zh: 商务舱乘客在飞往伦敦的国际航班上获得了免费餐食和Wi-Fi服务。

bustle.en: The market was full of hustle and bustle.
bustle.zh: 市场充满了熙熙攘攘的喧哗声。

busy.en: The doctor is very busy today.

but.en: Universities claim that higher education develops critical thinking skills, but employers frequently complain about graduate readiness.
but.zh: 大学声称高等教育培养批判性思维能力，但雇主经常抱怨毕业生的准备不足。

butter.en: She spread butter on her toast.

butterflies.en: Colourful butterflies flew across the garden.
butterflies.zh: 五彩缤纷的蝴蝶飞过花园。

buy.en: I need to buy some milk.

buyer.en: The buyer inspected the house carefully.

buyers.zh: 首次购房者为价格苦恼。

cabins.en: The mountain cabins were fully booked.

cable.en: We need to fix the broken cable.
cable.zh: 我们需要修理坏掉的电缆。

cacao.en: The cake contains real cacao from Africa.
cacao.zh: 这个蛋糕含有来自非洲的真可可。

cache.en: The thief had a secret cache of gold.
cache.zh: 小偷有一个秘密藏金处。

cafe.en: I often study at the cafe near home.
cafe.zh: 我经常在家附近的咖啡馆学习。

cafeteria.en: The university cafeteria offers diverse meal options at affordable prices for students with limited budgets.
cafeteria.zh: 大学自助餐厅为预算有限的学生提供价格实惠的多种餐饮选择。

caffeine.en: Caffeine can help you stay awake during lectures.
caffeine.zh: 咖啡因可以帮助你在讲座时保持清醒。

cage.en: The bird lives in a cage.

cake.en: She baked an elaborate three-layer cake decorated with fresh strawberries for her sister's wedding.
cake.zh: 她为姐姐的婚礼烤了一个装饰着新鲜草莓的三层精致蛋糕。

cakes.en: The bakery sells fresh cakes daily.
cakes.zh: 这家面包店每天都卖新鲜蛋糕。

cameras.zh: 监控摄像头监视着这座建筑。

camp.en: Many families choose to camp in the wilderness during summer holidays to reconnect with nature and escape city life.
camp.zh: 许多家庭选择在暑假期间到野外露营，以重新亲近自然并逃离城市生活。

campaign.en: The marketing campaign reached thousands of people.
campaign.zh: 营销活动吸引了数千人。

camps.en: Two opposing camps argued about the new plan.
camps.zh: 两个对立的阵营争论新计划。

campsite.zh: 我们找到了一个安静的露营地。

campus.en: The new campus has modern facilities.

campuses.en: Students walk between the two campuses daily.
campuses.zh: 学生们每天在两个校园之间走动。

can.en: Students can access online learning resources through the university website and study from anywhere in the world.
can.zh: 学生可以通过大学网站访问在线学习资源，从世界任何地方学习。

capacity.en: The new stadium has a large seating capacity.
capacity.zh: 新体育场有很大的座位容量。

capital.en: Paris is the capital of France.

capitalism.en: The country adopted capitalism in the 1990s.
capitalism.zh: 这个国家在90年代采用了资本主义。

capsule.en: Space agencies are developing new capsule technology to safely transport astronauts on future missions to Mars.
capsule.zh: 航天机构正在开发新的太空舱技术，以便在未来火星任务中安全运送宇航员。

captain.en: The team captain must demonstrate strong leadership skills to motivate players and ensure cooperation during high-pressure competitive situations.
captain.zh: 队长必须展现强大的领导技能，以激励球员并确保在高压竞争情况下的合作。

captive.en: The captive mice lived in the laboratory.
captive.zh: 被监禁的老鼠生活在实验室里。

captivity.en: Animals in captivity often become depressed.
captivity.zh: 被关押的动物经常变得抑郁。

capture.en: Photographs can capture significant moments in history, allowing future generations to understand the emotional context of past events.
capture.zh: 照片可以捕捉历史上的重要时刻，让后代了解过去事件的情感背景。

car.en: I drive my car to work every day.

car park.en: The car park is behind the building.

career.en: She chose teaching as her career.
career.zh: 她选择教学作为她的事业。

carefully.en: Please read the instructions very carefully.
carefully.zh: 请非常仔细地阅读说明。

careless.en: Careless handling of personal data online can lead to identity theft and serious privacy violations.
careless.zh: 在网上草率处理个人数据可能导致身份盗用和严重的隐私侵犯。

caries.en: Dental caries, commonly known as tooth decay, affects a significant portion of the global population regardless of age.
caries.zh: 龋齿，通常称为蛀牙，影响着全球相当大比例的人口，不分年龄。

carnival.en: The school held a carnival last week.
carnival.zh: 学校上周举办了嘉年华活动。

carolina.en: North Carolina has many beautiful mountains.
carolina.zh: 北卡罗来纳州有许多美丽的山脉。

carpet.en: In many cultures, removing one's shoes before stepping on a carpet is a customary practice demonstrating respect.
carpet.zh: 在许多文化中，进门脱鞋再踏上地毯是一种表示尊重的习俗。

carried.en: The nurse carried the patient carefully.

carrier.en: Mobile phone carriers are increasingly competing to offer faster networks and more affordable data packages for consumers.
carrier.zh: 移动电话运营商正在越来越多地竞争，为消费者提供更快速的网络和更实惠的数据套餐。

carrot.en: Many nutritionists argue that eating carrots regularly can significantly improve eye health due to their high vitamin A content.
carrot.zh: 许多营养学家认为，由于胡萝卜富含维生素A，定期食用可以显著改善眼睛健康。

carry.en: Universities should carry more responsibility for ensuring that graduates possess practical skills for the job market.
carry.zh: 大学应该承担更多责任，确保毕业生具备就业市场所需的实用技能。

carry out.en: We will carry out the experiment.

carry-on.en: According to most airline regulations, passengers are typically permitted to bring one carry-on bag onto the aircraft at no additional cost.
carry-on.zh: 根据大多数航空公司的规定，乘客通常可以免费携带一个随身行李登上飞机。

cartilage.en: Injuries to the cartilage in the knee joint often require lengthy rehabilitation periods for athletes to fully recover.
cartilage.zh: 膝关节软骨的损伤通常需要漫长的康复期，运动员才能完全恢复。

carve.en: Indigenous communities traditionally carve intricate patterns into wood and stone to preserve their cultural heritage.
carve.zh: 原住民社区传统上会在木头和石头上雕刻复杂的图案，以保存他们的文化遗产。

carved.en: The artist carved a beautiful statue.
carved.zh: 艺术家雕刻了一座美丽的雕像。

carvings.en: Visitors admire the detailed carvings in the museum.
carvings.zh: 游客们欣赏博物馆里精美的雕刻。

canal.en: The boat sailed through the narrow canal.

canals.en: Many historic cities were built near canals because waterways provided an efficient method for transporting goods and materials.
canals.zh: 许多历史城市都建在运河附近，因为水道提供了一种运输货物和材料的有效方法。

canary.en: In the past, miners used canaries as early warning signals for dangerous gases underground to ensure their safety.
canary.zh: 过去，矿工们用金丝雀作为地下危险气体的早期预警信号以确保安全。

cancel.en: We decided to cancel the event.
cancel.zh: 我们决定取消这次活动。

cancellation.en: The cancellation of the international conference caused inconvenience for many participants who had already booked accommodations.
cancellation.zh: 国际会议的取消给许多已经预订住宿的参与者带来了不便。

cancelled.en: The flight was cancelled due to fog.

cancer.zh: 早期发现有助于治疗癌症。

candidate.en: Each job candidate must demonstrate relevant skills and experience during the formal interview process to secure the position.
candidate.zh: 每位求职候选人都必须在正式面试过程中展示相关技能和经验以获得该职位。

candidates.en: The job candidates arrived early for the interview.
candidates.zh: 求职候选人们很早就到了面试现场。

candle.en: She lit a candle for light.

case.en: In this case, the government decided to implement stricter environmental regulations to address pollution concerns in major cities.
case.zh: 在这个案例中，政府决定实施更严格的环境法规来解决主要城市的污染问题。

case studies.en: The teacher uses many case studies.
case studies.zh: 老师使用很多案例研究。

case study.en: The case study showed good results.
case study.zh: 案例分析显示了良好的结果。

cash.en: I prefer to pay using cash.

cassette.en: He played an old cassette tape.

cast.en: The cast gathered on stage before the show.
cast.zh: 演员们在演出前聚集在舞台上。

castle.en: The castle stands on the hill.

castles.en: We visited several old castles in Wales.
castles.zh: 我们在威尔士参观了几座古老的城堡。

casual.en: The office allows casual dress on Fridays.
casual.zh: 公司允许周五穿休闲服装。

casualty.en: The earthquake resulted in numerous casualties, prompting immediate international humanitarian aid to the affected region.
casualty.zh: 地震造成大量人员伤亡，促使国际社会立即向受灾地区提供人道主义援助。

car parks.en: There are several car parks near the shopping centre.
car parks.zh: 购物中心附近有几个停车场。

carbon dioxide.en: Plants absorb carbon dioxide during photosynthesis.
carbon dioxide.zh: 植物在光合作用过程中吸收二氧化碳。

carbon footprint.en: Individuals can significantly reduce their carbon footprint by choosing public transport, cycling, or walking instead of driving.
carbon footprint.zh: 个人可以通过选择公共交通、骑自行车或步行而不是开车来显著减少碳足迹。

carbon monoxide.en: Carbon monoxide detectors are essential safety devices in homes because this gas is invisible and potentially lethal.
carbon monoxide.zh: 一氧化碳探测器是家庭必备的安全设备，因为这种气体无色且可能致命。

card catalogue.en: The library uses a card catalogue.

cardiovascular.en: Regular cardiovascular exercises such as running and swimming can strengthen the heart and improve overall blood circulation.
cardiovascular.zh: 定期进行跑步和游泳等心血管锻炼可以增强心脏功能并改善整体血液循环。

care.en: Please take care of my little sister.

care for.en: Many young professionals find it challenging to care for their ageing parents while pursuing demanding careers.
care for.zh: 许多年轻专业人士在追求事业的同时发现照顾年迈的父母具有挑战性。

candy.en: Many parents express concern about the amount of candy their children consume, as excessive sugar intake can lead to serious health problems.
candy.zh: 许多家长对孩子们摄入的糖果量表示担忧，因为过量摄入糖分会导致严重的健康问题。

canisters.zh: 这些小罐装着压缩气体。

canoes.en: The boys paddled their canoes across the lake.
canoes.zh: 男孩们划着独木舟穿过湖面。

canopy.en: We sat under the canopy to avoid the rain.

canteen.en: Many students eat lunch at the school canteen.
canteen.zh: 很多学生在学校食堂吃午饭。

canyon.en: The canyon stretched across the desert.

capabilities.en: The smartphone has many impressive capabilities.
capabilities.zh: 这款智能手机有许多令人印象深刻的功能。

capability.en: The new training programme aims to enhance employees' capability to adapt to rapidly changing workplace technologies.
capability.zh: 新的培训计划旨在提高员工适应快速变化的工作场所技术的能力。

capable.en: Modern computers are capable of processing vast amounts of information much faster than human beings ever could.
capable.zh: 现代计算机能够处理大量信息，速度远快于人类。

champion.en: The champion trained hard every day.
champion.zh: 这位冠军每天刻苦训练。

championship.en: She won the tennis championship last week.
championship.zh: 她上周赢得了网球锦标赛。

chance.en: Students chance upon useful resources online.
chance.zh: 学生偶然在网上发现有用的资源。

chancellor.en: The university chancellor delivered an inspiring speech about the importance of innovation in higher education.
chancellor.zh: 大学校长发表了关于高等教育创新重要性的鼓舞人心的演讲。

change.en: Technological change has transformed the way people communicate, work, and access information in modern society.
change.zh: 技术变革改变了现代社会中人们的沟通、工作和获取信息的方式。

channel.en: The ferry crosses the English Channel daily.
channel.zh: 渡轮每天穿越英吉利海峡。

chaos.en: The classroom fell into chaos during the fire drill.
chaos.zh: 火灾演练期间，教室陷入了混乱。

chapter.en: Each chapter has several key points.

chapters.en: The book comprises twelve distinct chapters, each focusing on different aspects of environmental conservation.
chapters.zh: 这本书包含十二个不同的章节，每个章节都关注环境保护的不同方面。

character.en: She has a very kind character.

center.en: The shopping center offers a variety of retail stores and entertainment options for visitors throughout the day.
center.zh: 这个购物中心全天为游客提供各种零售商店和娱乐选择。

central.en: The central park is very large.

century.en: This temple is over a century old.
century.zh: 这座寺庙已有上百年历史。

ceramics.en: The course teaches students traditional ceramics.
ceramics.zh: 这门课程教授学生传统制陶工艺。

cereals.en: Whole cereals are good for health.

ceremonies.zh: 这些仪式非常丰富多彩。

certain.en: I am certain about my answer.

certainly.en: She will certainly pass the exam.

certainty.en: With certainty, we can say that climate change poses one of the greatest challenges facing humanity today.
certainty.zh: 可以肯定地说，气候变化是当今人类面临的最大挑战之一。

celebrate.en: We celebrate the New Year together.

celebrated.en: She is a celebrated author in the country.
celebrated.zh: 她是这个国家著名的作家。

celebration.en: The celebration of traditional festivals plays a crucial role in preserving cultural identity across generations.
celebration.zh: 传统节日的庆祝活动在代际传承中发挥着至关重要的作用，维护着文化认同。

cell.en: Scientists discovered that each human cell contains approximately three billion base pairs of DNA.
cell.zh: 科学家发现，每个人类细胞包含大约三十亿个DNA碱基对。

cells.en: The human body has billions of cells.

cellular.en: The cellular phone has revolutionized communication, enabling people to connect instantly across great distances.
cellular.zh: 手机彻底改变了通讯方式，使人们能够即时跨越遥远的距离进行联系。

celsius.en: Water freezes at zero degrees celsius.

cement.en: The workers poured cement onto the foundation.
cement.zh: 工人们把水泥倒在地基上。

census.en: The government conducts a census every ten years to gather accurate population data for policy planning.
census.zh: 政府每十年进行一次人口普查，为政策规划收集准确的人口数据。

cent.en: Despite rising living costs, many families believe that every cent spent on education yields long-term benefits.
cent.zh: 尽管生活成本不断上涨，许多家庭认为花在教育上的每一分钱都会带来长期收益。

categorising.en: When categorising the survey responses, researchers must establish clear criteria to ensure consistency and reliability throughout the process.
categorising.zh: 在分类整理调查回复时，研究人员必须建立明确的标准以确保整个过程的一致性和可靠性。

categorization.en: The categorization of different species helps scientists understand evolutionary relationships and ecological roles within various habitats.
categorization.zh: 不同物种的分类有助于科学家理解各栖息地内的进化关系和生态作用。

categorized.en: The books in the university library are categorized by subject matter, publication date, and author nationality for easy access.
categorized.zh: 大学图书馆的书籍按主题、出版日期和作者国籍进行分类，以便于检索。

categorizes.en: The research report categorizes the main challenges facing urban development into economic, social, and environmental issues.
categorizes.zh: 该研究报告将城市发展面临的主要挑战分为经济、社会和环境问题。

categorizing.en: Categorizing information effectively is a crucial skill for students preparing for academic examinations and writing dissertations.
categorizing.zh: 有效地对信息进行分类是准备学术考试和撰写论文的学生的一项关键技能。

category.en: Applicants must select the appropriate category for their research before submitting papers to the international conference.
category.zh: 申请者在向国际会议提交论文前必须选择合适的研究类别。

cater.en: Modern universities strive to cater to diverse student needs through flexible course offerings and comprehensive support services.
cater.zh: 现代大学通过灵活的课程设置和全面的支持服务努力满足不同学生的需求。

cater for.en: The restaurant can cater for two hundred guests.
cater for.zh: 这家餐厅可供应两百位客人的餐食。

catering.en: The school is catering to different learning styles.
catering.zh: 学校正在满足不同的学习风格。

caterpillars.en: The caterpillars ate all the leaves on the plant.
caterpillars.zh: 毛毛虫吃光了植物上的所有叶子。

certification.en: She earned her teaching certification last year.
certification.zh: 她去年获得了教师资格证。

chain.en: A disruption in the supply chain can lead to significant delays and increased costs for consumers.
chain.zh: 供应链的中断可能导致消费者面临显著的延误和成本增加。

chain store.en: Chain stores often have the advantage of offering lower prices due to their ability to purchase goods in bulk.
chain store.zh: 连锁店由于能够批量采购商品，往往具有提供更低价格的优势。

chalk.en: Despite the widespread use of digital devices in classrooms, many teachers still prefer using chalk for explaining complex mathematical concepts.
chalk.zh: 尽管数字设备在教室里被广泛使用，许多教师仍然更喜欢用粉笔来解释复杂的数学概念。

challenge.en: She decided to challenge her limits.
challenge.zh: 她决定挑战自己的极限。

challenged.en: The scientist challenged the old theory.
challenged.zh: 这位科学家挑战了旧理论。

chamber.en: The king held a meeting in the chamber.
chamber.zh: 国王在房间里召开了会议。

cat.en: Researchers studying the behavior of the cat in urban environments have discovered unexpected adaptations that allow them to thrive alongside humans in cities.
cat.zh: 研究城市环境中猫行为的研究人员发现了它们在城市中与人类共存时产生的意想不到的适应性变化。

catalog.en: The museum maintains a comprehensive catalog of its artifacts, enabling scholars to trace the historical significance of each exhibit with ease.
catalog.zh: 博物馆保存着藏品的完整目录，使学者们能够轻松追溯每件展品的历史意义。

catalogs.en: Librarians catalogs all new books each week.
catalogs.zh: 图书管理员每周将所有新书编目分类。

catastrophe.en: The environmental catastrophe caused by the oil spill devastated local ecosystems and posed significant challenges for wildlife conservation efforts in the region.
catastrophe.zh: 石油泄漏造成的环境灾难摧毁了当地生态系统，给该地区的野生动物保护工作带来了巨大挑战。

categories.en: The report covers several different categories.
categories.zh: 报告涵盖几个不同的类别。

categorisation.en: The categorisation of ancient artifacts requires extensive knowledge of historical periods, cultural contexts, and material composition to ensure accuracy in museum displays.
categorisation.zh: 古代文物的分类需要广泛的历史时期、文化背景和材料成分知识，以确保博物馆展览的准确性。

categorise.en: It is essential for researchers to categorise data systematically before conducting any statistical analysis, as this ensures the validity of their conclusions.
categorise.zh: 研究人员在进行任何统计分析之前，必须系统地对数据进行分类，因为这能确保其结论的有效性。

categorised.en: The study participants were categorised according to their age, income level, and educational background to ensure a representative sample in the research.
categorised.zh: 研究参与者按照年龄、收入水平和教育背景进行分类，以确保研究中样本的代表性。

categorises.en: The report categorises environmental problems into three main groups: pollution, habitat destruction, and overexploitation of natural resources for clarity.
categorises.zh: 该报告将环境问题清晰地分为三类：污染、栖息地破坏和自然资源的过度开发。

cathedral.en: The cathedral stands in the city center.

caution.en: Motorists should exercise caution when driving in foggy conditions to avoid accidents.
caution.zh: 司机在雾天驾驶时应该格外小心，以避免事故发生。

cautious.en: She gave a cautious answer to the question.
cautious.zh: 她谨慎地回答了这个问题。

cave.en: Tourists often visit the limestone cave to admire the stunning stalactites, although authorities restrict access to protect the fragile natural environment.
cave.zh: 游客经常参观石灰岩洞穴以欣赏令人惊叹的钟乳石，尽管当局限制进入以保护脆弱的自然环境。

caves.en: Bats live in dark caves nearby.
caves.zh: 蝙蝠住在附近的黑暗山洞里。

cavity.en: Regular dental check-ups can help prevent cavities from developing into more serious problems.
cavity.zh: 定期的牙科检查可以帮助防止蛀牙演变成更严重的问题。

cease.en: The company decided to cease production of the outdated model to focus on newer technology.
cease.zh: 该公司决定停止生产过时的型号，以便专注于更新的技术。

ceiling.en: There is a beautiful painting on the ceiling.
ceiling.zh: 天花板上有一幅美丽的画。

characterisation.en: The characterisation of the character was detailed.

characterised.en: The period was characterised by change.
characterised.zh: 这个时期的特点是变革。

characteristics.zh: 这些植物有独特的特征。

charge.en: How much do they charge for this?

charity.en: They donate money to a local charity every year.
charity.zh: 他们每年向当地慈善机构捐款。

charm.en: Despite its industrial appearance, the old district has a unique charm that attracts tourists seeking authentic cultural experiences.
charm.zh: 尽管外观工业化，这个老城区有一种独特的魅力，吸引着寻求真实文化体验的游客。

chart.en: The chart compares population growth in cities.
chart.zh: 图表比较了城市人口增长。

chat.en: They chat with each other online.

chemist.en: The chemist studied the new element.
chemist.zh: 化学家研究了这个新元素。

cherish.en: As people grow older, they tend to cherish the time spent with family members more than material possessions.
cherish.zh: 随着人们年龄的增长，他们往往比物质财富更珍惜与家人共度的时光。

cherry.en: She ate a sweet cherry after lunch.
cherry.zh: 她午饭后吃了一颗甜樱桃。

chess.zh: 他每个周末下国际象棋。

chest.en: The doctor checked his chest carefully.
chest.zh: 医生仔细检查了他的胸部。

chicken.en: I prefer chicken to beef for lunch.

chicks.en: The chicks follow their mother around.
chicks.zh: 小鸡们到处跟着它们的母亲。

chief.en: He is the chief manager of the company.

cheap.en: This phone is cheap but good.

cheaper.en: Buying online is often much cheaper.

cheapest.en: This is the cheapest option available.

cheat.en: Students who cheat on exams not only violate academic integrity but also miss valuable learning opportunities.
cheat.zh: 考试作弊的学生不仅违反了学术诚信，也错过了宝贵的学习机会。

check.en: Teachers should regularly check students' understanding before moving on to new topics.
check.zh: 老师应该在进入新话题前定期检查学生的理解情况。

check in.en: Passengers must check in at least two hours before their international flight departs.
check in.zh: 乘客必须在国际航班起飞前至少两小时办理登机手续。

check out.en: Please check out before twelve o'clock.

check-in.en: Online check-in has become increasingly popular among travellers seeking to save time at airports.
check-in.zh: 在线值机在寻求节省机场时间的旅客中变得越来越受欢迎。

check-up.en: Regular medical check-ups are essential for early detection of potential health problems.
check-up.zh: 定期体检对于及早发现潜在健康问题至关重要。

choice.en: Making the right choice about your career path requires careful consideration of your skills and interests.
choice.zh: 做出正确的职业选择需要仔细考虑你的技能和兴趣。

choices.en: We have three good choices for dinner.
choices.zh: 晚餐我们有三个不错的选择。

cholesterol.en: Medical experts recommend reducing foods high in cholesterol to maintain cardiovascular health.
cholesterol.zh: 医学专家建议减少高胆固醇食物的摄入以维持心血管健康。

choose.en: You must choose your subjects carefully.
choose.zh: 你必须仔细选择你的科目。

chop.en: Please chop the vegetables before cooking.
chop.zh: 请在烹饪前把蔬菜切碎。

chores.en: She does household chores every weekend.

chromosome.en: Scientists have identified specific genes located on chromosomes that determine certain inherited characteristics.
chromosome.zh: 科学家已经识别出位于染色体上决定某些遗传特征的特定基因。

chronic.en: He suffers from chronic back pain.

chunks.en: He broke the ice into large chunks.

church.en: The church is open every Sunday.

civic.en: Civic education should be a mandatory part of the school curriculum to prepare young people for responsible citizenship.
civic.zh: 公民教育应该成为学校课程的必修部分，以培养年轻人成为负责任的公民。

civilian.en: The government has implemented new programmes to support civilian populations affected by the recent natural disaster.
civilian.zh: 政府已实施新方案，以支持受近期自然灾害影响的平民。

civilians.en: International humanitarian law strictly prohibits military forces from targeting civilians during armed conflicts.
civilians.zh: 国际人道主义法律严格禁止军队在武装冲突中以平民为目标。

civilisation.en: Ancient civilisation developed here long ago.
civilisation.zh: 古代文明很久以前在这里发展。

civilisations.en: Historians compare how different civilisations developed unique systems of government throughout history.
civilisations.zh: 历史学家比较不同文明如何在历史发展中形成独特的政府制度。

civility.en: The lack of civility in online discussions often leads to misunderstandings and unnecessary conflicts.
civility.zh: 网络讨论中缺乏文明礼貌常常导致误解和不必要的冲突。

civilization.en: The collapse of the Mayan civilization remains a subject of intense scholarly debate and research.
civilization.zh: 玛雅文明的崩溃仍然是学术界激烈辩论和研究的主题。

civilizations.en: Many ancient civilizations flourished along major rivers because of the fertile soil and reliable water supply.
civilizations.zh: 许多古代文明在主要河流沿岸繁荣发展，因为那里土壤肥沃、水源充足。

civilize.en: Missionaries in the colonial era believed they could civilize indigenous populations through education and religious conversion.
civilize.zh: 殖民时代的传教士认为他们可以通过教育和宗教皈依来教化土著居民。

checking account.en: I opened a checking account at the local bank to manage my daily expenses and receive my salary.
checking account.zh: 我在本地银行开了一个活期账户来管理日常开支和领取工资。

checklist.en: Please review the checklist before the meeting.

checkout.en: The hotel checkout time is at noon, so we need to vacate our room and return the key by then.
checkout.zh: 酒店的退房时间是中午，所以我们需要在那个时候退房并归还钥匙。

checkup.en: Regular medical checkups are essential for maintaining good health and detecting potential problems early.
checkup.zh: 定期体检对于保持健康和及早发现潜在问题至关重要。

cheek.en: The child had rosy cheeks after running around in the playground under the warm afternoon sun.
cheek.zh: 在温暖的午后阳光下绕着操场跑完后，这个孩子的脸颊红扑扑的。

cheerful.en: Despite facing numerous challenges, she maintained a cheerful disposition throughout her university years.
cheerful.zh: 尽管面临重重挑战，她在整个大学期间都保持着开朗的性格。

cheese.en: I prefer cheese on my sandwiches.
cheese.zh: 我喜欢在三明治上加奶酪。

chef.en: The renowned chef demonstrated how to prepare traditional dishes using locally sourced organic ingredients.
chef.zh: 这位著名厨师展示了如何使用当地采购的有机食材烹制传统菜肴。

chefs.zh: 厨师们准备了很棒的菜肴。

cigar.en: My uncle smokes a cigar after work.

cigarette.en: The government has significantly increased taxes on cigarettes to discourage young people from taking up smoking.
cigarette.zh: 政府大幅提高了香烟税，以阻止年轻人开始吸烟。

cigarettes.en: He tried to quit cigarettes last year.

cinema.en: We went to the cinema together.

circle.en: Poverty often creates a vicious circle where lack of education leads to low income and further limits future opportunities.
circle.zh: 贫困常常造成一个恶性循环，缺乏教育导致低收入，进而限制未来的机会。

circuit.en: The circuit broke during the experiment.

circular.en: The building has a circular design.

circulating.en: Rumors are circulating about the merger.
circulating.zh: 关于合并的谣言正在传播。

circulation.en: Regular exercise is essential for maintaining good blood circulation throughout the human body.
circulation.zh: 定期锻炼对于维持人体良好的血液循环至关重要。

circumstance.en: Under no circumstance should students submit assignments that contain plagiarized content from other sources.
circumstance.zh: 在任何情况下，学生都不应该提交包含抄袭内容的作业。

circumstances.en: Under no circumstances should students be allowed to use mobile phones during important examinations at school.
circumstances.zh: 在任何情况下，都不应允许学生在学校的重要考试期间使用手机。

cite.en: You should cite sources when writing a research paper.
cite.zh: 写研究论文时应该引用资料来源。

cited.zh: 专家引用了重要的研究。

citizen.en: Every responsible citizen should actively participate in community activities and contribute to the development of local society.
citizen.zh: 每个负责任的公民都应该积极参与社区活动，为当地社会的发展做出贡献。

citizens.zh: 所有公民享有平等权利。

citizenship.en: Many immigrants view obtaining citizenship in their adopted country as a significant milestone in their personal journey.
citizenship.zh: 许多移民将获得移居国的公民身份视为个人旅程中的重要里程碑。

citrus.en: The citrus fruit tasted very fresh.
citrus.zh: 这种柑橘类水果尝起来非常新鲜。

city.en: This city has many tall buildings.

city centre.en: The shop is in the city centre.

city gardens.en: Many people relax in city gardens.
city gardens.zh: 许多人在城市花园里放松。

chief executive.en: The chief executive announced new plans.
chief executive.zh: 行政长官宣布了新计划。

child.en: Research has demonstrated that a child's early educational experiences can profoundly influence their long-term academic achievement.
child.zh: 研究表明，儿童的早期教育经历会深刻影响他们长期的学业成就。

childcare.zh: 这里的儿童托管服务很贵。

childhood.en: He spent his childhood in the countryside.

children.en: Many children play in the park.
children.zh: 许多孩子在公园里玩耍。

chill.en: The night air began to chill my bones.
chill.zh: 夜风开始让我感到寒冷。

chimpanzees.en: Chimpanzees use tools to gather food.
chimpanzees.zh: 黑猩猩使用工具获取食物。

chimps.en: Researchers observed the chimps using tools.
chimps.zh: 研究人员观察黑猩猩使用工具。

chip.en: The computer chip processes data quickly.
chip.zh: 电脑芯片快速处理数据。

chocolate.en: The child loves chocolate more than anything.

classes.en: All the classes start at eight o'clock.
classes.zh: 所有班级八点开始上课。

classic.en: This is a classic example of the problem.
classic.zh: 这是该问题的典型案例。

classical.en: She prefers classical music to pop songs.
classical.zh: 比起流行歌曲，她更喜欢古典音乐。

classical music.en: She enjoys listening to classical music.

classification.en: The classification of animals is important.

classified.en: The librarian classified the new books by subject.
classified.zh: 图书管理员按主题对新书进行分类。

classify.en: Scientists must classify new discoveries according to established criteria to maintain consistency in research.
classify.zh: 科学家必须根据既定标准对新发现进行分类，以保持研究的一致性。

classmates.zh: 我的同班同学组织了一场聚会。

classroom.en: Students arrived at the classroom early.

clause.en: Before signing the contract, it is crucial to read every clause carefully to understand your obligations.
clause.zh: 在签合同之前，仔细阅读每个条款以了解你的义务至关重要。

coat.en: Paint the coat evenly on the wall.
coat.zh: 把涂层均匀地刷在墙上。

cocktail.en: At the welcome reception, guests were offered an assortment of fruit cocktails and refreshing beverages.
cocktail.zh: 在欢迎招待会上，客人们得到了各种水果鸡尾酒和清爽饮料的款待。

cocoa.en: I enjoy drinking a cup of cocoa.
cocoa.zh: 我喜欢喝一杯可可饮料。

coconuts.en: Tropical islands grow many fresh coconuts.
coconuts.zh: 热带岛屿种植许多新鲜椰子。

code.en: She learned to write computer code last year.
code.zh: 她去年学了写电脑代码。

coded.en: The ancient manuscript was coded in a mysterious language that historians struggled to decipher for decades.
coded.zh: 这份古代手稿用一种神秘的语言编码，历史学家们几十年来一直努力破译。

codes.en: Modern encryption codes protect sensitive personal information from unauthorized access and cyber threats.
codes.zh: 现代加密代码保护敏感的个人信息免受未经授权的访问和网络威胁。

codification.en: The codification of traditional practices into formal laws helped preserve cultural heritage for future generations.
codification.zh: 将传统习俗编纂成正式法律有助于为子孙后代保留文化遗产。

client.en: The lawyer advised her client to reach an out-of-court settlement to save both time and money.
client.zh: 律师建议她的当事人达成庭外和解以节省时间和金钱。

clients.en: The company serves many important clients.
clients.zh: 这家公司为许多重要客户服务。

cliffs.en: Birds live on the cliffs by the sea.
cliffs.zh: 鸟类生活在海边的悬崖上。

climate change.en: Climate change affects global weather patterns.
climate change.zh: 气候变化影响全球天气模式。

climatic.zh: 气候条件影响作物生长。

climb.en: We climb the mountain every summer.

climbing.en: The children are climbing the tall tree in the garden.
climbing.zh: 孩子们正在花园里爬那棵大树。

clinic.en: I visited the clinic for a check-up.

clinical.en: The doctor has clinical experience in surgery.
clinical.zh: 这位医生有外科临床经验。

civilized.en: In a truly civilized society, people should respect each other's differences and work together harmoniously.
civilized.zh: 在一个真正文明的社会中，人们应该尊重彼此的差异并和谐地合作。

civilizes.en: Education civilizes individuals by teaching them moral values and social responsibilities from an early age.
civilizes.zh: 教育通过从小教导个人道德价值观和社会责任来使他们文明化。

civilizing.en: Travel can have a civilizing effect on people by exposing them to different cultures and perspectives.
civilizing.zh: 旅行可以通过让人们接触不同的文化和观点而产生教化作用。

claim.en: She will claim compensation for the damage.

clapping.en: The clapping continued for several minutes.

clarification.en: We need more clarification on this.

clarify.en: Students should clarify any doubts they have before the exam to avoid unnecessary confusion and mistakes.
clarify.zh: 学生在考试前应该澄清任何疑问，以避免不必要的困惑和错误。

clarinet.en: She learned to play the clarinet in school.
clarinet.zh: 她在学校学会了吹单簧管。

clash.en: There was a violent clash between protesters and police in the city center yesterday evening, resulting in injuries.
clash.zh: 昨天晚上，市中心发生了抗议者和警察之间的暴力冲突，导致人员受伤。

class.en: The new employee quickly rose to the top class of performers in the company through her dedication and skill.
class.zh: 这位新员工通过她的奉献精神和技能，迅速成为公司表现最优秀的员工之一。

co-operative.en: A co-operative approach to problem-solving often yields better results than working in isolation.
co-operative.zh: 合作解决问题的方法往往比单独工作产生更好的结果。

co-worker.en: My co-worker generously shared his research notes, which significantly improved my analysis.
co-worker.zh: 我的同事慷慨地分享了他的研究笔记，这大大改进了我的分析。

coach.en: The coach helps players improve their skills.
coach.zh: 教练帮助运动员提高技能。

coaches.en: The coaches train the team every morning.
coaches.zh: 教练每天早上训练队伍。

coal.en: Coal is still used in some power plants.
coal.zh: 煤在一些发电厂仍在使用。

coalition.en: The coalition of environmental organisations successfully advocated for stricter regulations on industrial emissions.
coalition.zh: 环保组织联盟成功倡导对工业排放实施更严格的监管。

coarse.en: The coarse fabric of the traditional clothing was well-suited to the region's hot and dusty climate.
coarse.zh: 传统服装的粗糙面料非常适合该地区炎热多尘的气候。

coast.en: Many people enjoy living near the southern coast.
coast.zh: 许多人喜欢住在南部海岸附近。

coastline.en: The storm damaged the entire coastline.
coastline.zh: 暴风雨破坏了整条海岸线。

cloakroom.en: Please leave your coats in the cloakroom.

clock.en: The clock on the wall shows eight o'clock.
clock.zh: 墙上的时钟显示八点了。

clone.en: Although scientists have successfully cloned animals, the ethical implications of cloning humans remain highly controversial.
clone.zh: 尽管科学家已经成功克隆动物，但克隆人类的伦理问题仍然存在极大争议。

close.en: The shop is close to the school.

closed.en: Due to extensive renovations, the historical library will remain closed to the public for the next six months.
closed.zh: 由于大规模翻修，这座历史悠久的图书馆将在接下来六个月内不对公众开放。

closely.en: Watch closely and follow my steps.

cloth.en: Wipe the table with a clean cloth.

clothes.en: I need to buy new clothes for the interview.
clothes.zh: 我需要为面试买新衣服。

clothing.en: She buys clothing for her children online.
clothing.zh: 她在网上给孩子买衣服。

cloud.en: The dark clouds gathering on the horizon suggested that a severe storm was approaching rapidly.
cloud.zh: 地平线上聚集的乌云表明一场猛烈的暴风雨正在迅速逼近。

clouds.en: Scientists study how pollution affects the formation of clouds, which plays a vital role in regulating the Earth's temperature and climate.
clouds.zh: 科学家研究污染如何影响云的形成，这在调节地球温度和气候方面起着至关重要的作用。

cloudy.en: It was cloudy all day yesterday.

club.en: He plays golf at the private club every Sunday.
club.zh: 他每周日都在私人俱乐部打高尔夫球。

clubhouse.en: Members gathered at the golf clubhouse.
clubhouse.zh: 会员们聚集在高尔夫球俱乐部会所。

clubroom.en: We meet in the clubroom every Friday.
clubroom.zh: 我们每周五在俱乐部会议室碰面。

clubs.en: Many students joined different clubs at school.
clubs.zh: 许多学生在校加入了不同的俱乐部。

clue.en: The detective found no useful clue at the crime scene, making the investigation extremely challenging for the police.
clue.zh: 侦探在犯罪现场没有找到有用的线索，这使得警方调查变得极其困难。

clues.en: Police found important clues at scene.
clues.zh: 警察在现场发现了重要线索。

clumsy.en: The clumsy waiter accidentally knocked over a tray of dishes, causing an embarrassing situation in the restaurant.
clumsy.zh: 那个笨手笨脚的服务员不小心打翻了一托盘盘子，在餐厅造成了一个尴尬的场面。

clusters.en: The flowers grow in small clusters.

clay.en: The artist shaped the clay into a vase.
clay.zh: 艺术家把黏土塑造成一个花瓶。

clean.en: Please clean your room this weekend.
clean.zh: 请这个周末打扫你的房间。

cleaned.en: The cleaned dishes are on the shelf.
cleaned.zh: 清洁后的盘子在架子上。

cleaner.en: The room needs a professional cleaner.
cleaner.zh: 这个房间需要专业清洁工。

clear.en: It is clear that renewable energy will play a vital role in addressing climate change in coming decades.
clear.zh: 很明显，可再生能源将在未来几十年应对气候变化方面发挥至关重要的作用。

clearance.en: The plane needs clearance to land.
clearance.zh: 飞机需要许可才能降落。

clearly.en: The speaker clearly demonstrated how sustainable farming practices can increase yields while protecting ecosystems.
clearly.zh: 演讲者清楚地展示了可持续农业实践如何在保护生态系统的同时提高产量。

clever.en: She is clever enough to solve this.
clever.zh: 她足够聪明能解决这个问题。

click.en: Visitors can simply click on the website to book tickets online, avoiding the long queues at the venue.
click.zh: 游客可以简单地点击网站在线预订门票，避免在场馆排长队。

commission.zh: 委员会批准了这份报告。

commissioned.en: The government has commissioned a new report on climate change to assess the effectiveness of current environmental policies.
commissioned.zh: 政府委托撰写了一份关于气候变化的新报告，以评估当前环境政策的有效性。

commissioner.en: The education commissioner announced that all schools must implement new safety guidelines starting from next semester.
commissioner.zh: 教育专员宣布，所有学校必须从下学期开始实施新的安全指南。

commissioners.en: The commissioners met to discuss the proposed urban development project and its potential impact on local communities.
commissioners.zh: 专员们开会讨论了拟议的城市开发项目及其对当地社区的潜在影响。

commissioning.en: The commissioning of new public transportation systems has significantly reduced traffic congestion in major cities.
commissioning.zh: 新公共交通系统的投入使用大幅减少了主要城市的交通拥堵。

commissions.en: Many artists earn a living through commissions, creating custom pieces for private collectors and corporate clients.
commissions.zh: 许多艺术家通过接受委托谋生，为私人收藏家和公司客户创作定制作品。

commit.en: I commit to helping my colleagues.

commitment.en: Her commitment to the project was impressive.
commitment.zh: 她对这个项目的奉献精神令人印象深刻。

commitments.en: Despite his many professional commitments, he always makes time to volunteer at the local community center on weekends.
commitments.zh: 尽管他有诸多职业承诺，他总是会在周末抽出时间在当地社区中心做志愿者。

commits.en: The company commits substantial resources to research and development each year to maintain its competitive advantage.
commits.zh: 该公司每年投入大量资源用于研发，以保持其竞争优势。

come from.en: Most students in our class come from China.
come from.zh: 我们班大多数学生来自中国。

come up with.en: The committee needs to come up with practical solutions to address the growing housing shortage in major cities.
come up with.zh: 委员会需要想出切实可行的解决方案，以解决主要城市日益严重的住房短缺问题。

comedy.en: We watched a funny comedy last night.
comedy.zh: 昨晚我们看了一部有趣的喜剧。

comet.en: Scientists use advanced telescopes to track the trajectory of each comet passing through our solar system.
comet.zh: 科学家使用先进的天文望远镜来追踪经过太阳系的每颗彗星的轨迹。

comets.en: Comets orbit the sun in space.
comets.zh: 彗星在太空中围绕太阳运行。

comfort.zh: 这把椅子提供了极好的舒适感。

comfortable.en: These shoes are very comfortable to wear.

command.en: She can command the room easily.

commands.en: The computer executes all commands quickly.
commands.zh: 这台电脑快速执行所有指令。

commemorate.en: Every year on this date, citizens gather at the memorial to commemorate those who lost their lives in the war.
commemorate.zh: 每年这一天，公民们都会聚集在纪念馆前，纪念那些在战争中牺牲的人。

codify.en: The government decided to codify the existing environmental regulations into a single comprehensive document for easier reference.
codify.zh: 政府决定将现行环境法规编纂成一份单一的综合文件以便查阅。

coding.en: Many universities now offer courses in coding to prepare students for careers in the rapidly growing technology sector.
coding.zh: 许多大学现在提供编程课程，以培养学生进入快速发展的科技行业就业。

coffee.en: I drink coffee every morning before class.
coffee.zh: 我每天早上上课前喝咖啡。

coffee shop.en: The coffee shop near campus has become a popular meeting place for students to study and collaborate on projects.
coffee shop.zh: 校园附近的咖啡店已成为学生学习和协作项目的热门聚会场所。

cognitive.zh: 认知能力在童年时期发展。

coherent.en: A coherent argument requires clear evidence, logical structure, and well-organized paragraphs to persuade readers effectively.
coherent.zh: 一篇连贯的文章需要清晰的证据、逻辑结构和组织良好的段落来有效说服读者。

coin.en: The ancient Roman coin discovered during the archaeological dig provided valuable insights into historical trade practices.
coin.zh: 考古发掘中发现的古罗马硬币为了解历史贸易实践提供了宝贵的见解。

coincide.en: The timing of the exam period tends to coincide with increased stress levels among university students each year.
coincide.zh: 考试时间往往与每年大学生压力增加的时期相吻合。

coincided.zh: 今年我们的生日是同一天。

coincidentally.en: Coincidentally, the new library opened on the same day as the university celebrated its fiftieth anniversary.
coincidentally.zh: 巧合的是，新图书馆开放的当天正是大学庆祝其五十周年校庆的日子。

coined.en: He coined a new term for it.
coined.zh: 他为它创造了一个新术语。

coins.zh: 孩子们喜欢收集旧硬币。

collaborating.en: The scientists are collaborating on new research.
collaborating.zh: 科学家们正在合作进行新研究。

collaboration.en: The team achieved success through collaboration.
collaboration.zh: 团队通过合作取得了成功。

collapse.en: The old bridge may collapse during storms.
collapse.zh: 那座旧桥在暴风雨中可能会倒塌。

colleague.en: My colleague in the science department helped me understand the complex methodology used in the recent climate study.
colleague.zh: 我科学系的同事帮助我理解了最近气候研究中使用的复杂方法。

colleagues.zh: 我的同事们非常乐于助人。

collect.en: Schools should collect feedback from students regularly to identify areas that need improvement in the curriculum.
collect.zh: 学校应该定期收集学生反馈，以识别课程中需要改进的领域。

collecting.en: He is collecting data for research.

collection.en: The museum has an impressive art collection.
collection.zh: 这家博物馆有一个令人印象深刻的艺术收藏品。

collective.en: We made a collective decision together.
collective.zh: 我们一起做出了集体决定。

collectively.en: The residents collectively raised concerns about the proposed construction project and its potential environmental impact.
collectively.zh: 居民们共同对拟议的建设项目及其潜在环境影响表示担忧。

collectors.en: The collectors displayed their rare stamps proudly.
collectors.zh: 收藏家们骄傲地展示他们的珍稀邮票。

college.en: She studies at a local college.
college.zh: 她在当地的一所学院学习。

collisions.zh: 这些碰撞造成了重大损害。

colonial.en: The colonial architecture in the old quarter reflects the historical influence of European settlers on local urban development.
colonial.zh: 老城区的殖民时期建筑反映了欧洲定居者对当地城市发展的历史影响。

colony.en: The bee colony produced much honey.
colony.zh: 这个蜂群产了很多蜂蜜。

color.zh: 蓝色是我最喜欢的颜色。

colored.en: The artist used colored pencils to create a vibrant illustration that captured the essence of urban life in the city.
colored.zh: 艺术家用彩色铅笔创作了一幅充满活力的插图，捕捉了城市都市生活的精髓。

commence.en: The construction of the new shopping centre will commence next month, creating thousands of employment opportunities for local residents.
commence.zh: 新的购物中心的建设将于下个月开始，为当地居民创造数千个就业机会。

comment.en: In his opening comment, the speaker outlined the main objectives of the conference before presenting detailed research findings.
comment.zh: 在开场评论中，演讲者概述了会议的主要目标，然后展示详细的研究结果。

commentary.en: The documentary provided insightful commentary on environmental issues, highlighting the urgent need for sustainable development practices.
commentary.zh: 这部纪录片对环境问题提供了有洞察力的评论，强调了可持续发展的紧迫性。

commentator.en: A renowned political commentator was invited to explain the implications of the new legislation on the evening news programme.
commentator.zh: 一位著名的政治评论员受邀在晚间新闻节目中解释新立法的含义。

commentators.en: Various financial commentators expressed concern about the potential economic impact of the proposed tax changes on small businesses.
commentators.zh: 多位金融评论员对拟议的税收变化对小企业的潜在经济影响表示担忧。

commented.en: The research team commented that their findings challenge previously accepted theories about climate change adaptation strategies.
commented.zh: 研究团队评论说，他们的发现挑战了先前关于气候变化适应策略的公认理论。

commenting.en: Commenting on the rapid technological advancement, experts predicted significant changes in how people will work and communicate.
commenting.zh: 在评论 rapid technological advancement 时，专家们预测人们的工作和交流方式将发生重大变化。

comments.zh: 请在下面写下你的评论。

commerce.en: The development of e-commerce has revolutionized global commerce, enabling businesses to reach customers in distant markets efficiently.
commerce.zh: 电子商务的发展彻底改变了全球商业，使企业能够有效地接触遥远市场的客户。

commercial.en: We need a commercial space for the event.
commercial.zh: 我们需要一个商业场地来举办活动。

committed.en: The company committed serious violations of safety rules.
committed.zh: 这家公司严重违反了安全规定。

committee.en: The committee meets monthly to discuss plans.
committee.zh: 委员会每月开会讨论计划。

committing.en: Some people argue that committing resources to nuclear energy is risky despite its clean energy potential.
committing.zh: 一些人认为，尽管核能具有清洁能源的潜力，但投入资源发展核能是危险的。

commodity.en: Oil is an important global commodity.
commodity.zh: 石油是重要的全球商品。

common.en: This is a common problem for students.
common.zh: 这对学生来说是个常见问题。

common sense.en: Common sense helps solve everyday problems.
common sense.zh: 常识有助于解决日常问题。

commonly.en: This mistake is commonly seen in tests.
commonly.zh: 这个错误在考试中很常见。

communicate.zh: 团队成员必须清晰沟通。

communicated.en: The ancient civilization communicated its beliefs through elaborate architectural structures and intricate artistic designs.
communicated.zh: 古代文明通过精心设计的建筑结构和复杂的艺术图案来传达其信仰。

communicates.en: The documentary effectively communicates the urgent need for global cooperation to address climate change challenges.
communicates.zh: 这部纪录片有效地传达了全球合作应对气候变化挑战的紧迫性。

column.en: The data was clearly presented in a column chart, making it easy to identify the upward trend in renewable energy usage over five years.
column.zh: 数据以柱状图的形式清晰呈现，使人们容易识别出五年间可再生能源使用量的上升趋势。

coma.en: Medical advances have significantly improved survival rates for patients who fall into comas after serious car accidents.
coma.zh: 医学进步显著提高了严重车祸后陷入昏迷的患者的存活率。

combat.en: The government launched plans to combat pollution.
combat.zh: 政府启动计划防止污染。

combination.en: A combination of skills is needed.

combine.zh: 我们把工作和娱乐结合起来。

combined.en: The combined score was higher than expected.

combs.en: The shop sells hair combs and brushes.
combs.zh: 这家店出售发梳和刷子。

combustion.en: The incomplete combustion of fossil fuels releases harmful pollutants that contribute to respiratory diseases.
combustion.zh: 化石燃料的不完全燃烧会释放有害污染物，导致呼吸系统疾病。

come.en: With proper education and awareness campaigns, more people will come to appreciate the importance of biodiversity conservation.
come.zh: 通过适当的教育和宣传活动，越来越多的人将会认识到生物多样性保护的重要性。

come along.en: The development of sustainable infrastructure is coming along gradually as governments increase funding for green projects.
come along.zh: 随着政府对绿色项目投入的增加，可持续基础设施的建设正在逐步推进。

compensated.en: The workers were well compensated for the extra hours they worked during the demanding project deadline.
compensated.zh: 工人们因在紧张的项目截止日期期间加班而获得了丰厚的补偿。

compensates.en: The company compensates its employees fairly for any business-related travel expenses incurred during work.
compensates.zh: 该公司公平地补偿员工在工作期间产生的任何商务差旅费用。

compensating.en: The government introduced compensating measures to help small businesses affected by the unexpected economic changes.
compensating.zh: 政府推出了补偿措施，以帮助受意外经济变化影响的小型企业。

compensation.zh: 工人们得到了公平的补偿。

compensatory.en: Students may need to undertake compensatory coursework if they fail to meet the required academic standards.
compensatory.zh: 如果学生未能达到要求的学术标准，他们可能需要参加补偿性课程学习。

compete.en: Many athletes compete in the Olympics.
compete.zh: 许多运动员在奥运会上竞争。

compete with.en: Small companies compete with big firms.

competent.en: A competent professional should possess both strong theoretical knowledge and practical skills in their field.
competent.zh: 一位称职的专业人士应在其领域具备扎实的理论知识和实践技能。

competition.en: The competition among students is fierce.
competition.zh: 学生之间的竞争很激烈。

competitions.zh: 学生们参加了几个比赛。

communicating.en: Effective communication is essential when communicating with people from different cultural backgrounds.
communicating.zh: 有效的沟通对于与来自不同文化背景的人交流至关重要。

communication.en: Good communication is important at work.
communication.zh: 良好的沟通在工作中很重要。

communications.en: Improvements in telecommunications and communications infrastructure have connected people worldwide.
communications.zh: 电信和通讯基础设施的改善使全世界的人们联系在一起。

communicative.en: Learners who are more communicative tend to develop language skills more rapidly than reserved students.
communicative.zh: 更善于交际的学习者往往比沉默寡言的学生更快地掌握语言技能。

communicator.en: A skilled communicator must be able to adapt their message to suit different audiences effectively.
communicator.zh: 一位熟练的沟通者必须能够有效地调整自己的信息以适应不同的受众。

communicators.en: The best communicators understand that listening is just as important as speaking in any dialogue.
communicators.zh: 最好的沟通者明白，在任何对话中，倾听和说话同样重要。

communities.en: Online communities have created new opportunities for people to connect and share interests globally.
communities.zh: 在线社区为人们在全球范围内联系和分享兴趣创造了新机会。

commute.en: Many city workers face long commutes that consume several hours of their daily schedule.
commute.zh: 许多城市工人面临漫长的通勤，每天要花几个小时在路途上。

compact.en: The apartment is compact but well-designed.
compact.zh: 这间公寓虽然小，但设计得很好。

companion.en: Having a reliable study companion can significantly improve motivation and learning outcomes.
companion.zh: 拥有一个可靠的学习伙伴可以显著提高学习动力和效果。

company.en: She works for a technology company.
company.zh: 她在一家科技公司工作。

comparatively.en: Comparatively speaking, the cost of living in smaller cities is much more affordable than in major metropolitan areas.
comparatively.zh: 相对来说较小城市的生活成本比主要都市区要便宜得多。

compare.en: When you compare the educational systems of different countries, you often find significant variations in teaching approaches and assessment methods.
compare.zh: 当比较不同国家的教育系统时，经常会发现教学方法评估方法存在显著差异。

compared.en: The results were compared in the study.
compared.zh: 结果在研究中进行了比较。

compared with.en: Compared with the previous generation, today's young people have access to considerably more information through digital devices and internet connectivity.
compared with.zh: 与上一代人相比，今天的年轻人可以通过电子设备和互联网连接获得更多的信息。

comparison.en: A close comparison of the two policies reveals that environmental protection measures have become increasingly strict over recent years.
comparison.zh: 对这两项政策的仔细比较表明，近年来环境保护措施变得越来越严格。

compatible.en: The new software is fully compatible with existing systems, which means companies do not need to replace their current computer equipment.
compatible.zh: 新软件与现有系统完全兼容，这意味着公司不需要更换当前的计算机设备。

compel.en: The law compels all companies to provide adequate training for employees to ensure workplace safety standards are maintained at all times.
compel.zh: 法律迫使所有公司为员工提供足够的培训，以确保工作场所安全标准始终得到维护。

compelling.zh: 她提出了一个令人信服的论点。

compensate.en: The company will compensate for the damage.

comprehensive.zh: 报告提供了全面的分析。

comprise.en: The curriculum comprises theoretical lectures, practical workshops, and field research to provide well-rounded education.
comprise.zh: 该课程由理论讲座、实践研讨会和实地研究组成，以提供全面的教育。

comprised.en: The class is comprised of twenty students.
comprised.zh: 这个班由二十名学生组成。

comprises.zh: 这个团队由五名成员组成。

compulsory.en: Physical education is compulsory at school.
compulsory.zh: 体育课在学校是必修的。

computable.en: Not all social phenomena are easily computable, as human behavior often involves complex emotional factors.
computable.zh: 并非所有社会现象都能轻易计算，因为人类行为往往涉及复杂的情感因素。

computation.en: The computation of complex statistical models requires advanced software, substantial processing power, and skilled analysts.
computation.zh: 复杂统计模型的计算需要先进的软件、强大的处理能力和熟练的分析师。

computational.en: Computational methods have revolutionized scientific research by enabling the analysis of massive datasets and simulations.
computational.zh: 计算方法通过使大规模数据集和模拟分析成为可能，彻底改变了科学研究。

computations.en: The computations required for climate modeling demand supercomputers capable of processing billions of calculations daily.
computations.zh: 气候建模所需的计算需要超级计算机，它们能够每天处理数十亿次计算。

competitive.en: She is very competitive in sports.
competitive.zh: 她在运动方面非常有竞争力。

competitors.en: The company lost market share to competitors.
competitors.zh: 该公司市场份额被竞争对手抢走了。

compile.en: Students must compile a comprehensive list of references before submitting their research papers.
compile.zh: 学生在提交研究论文前必须编制一份全面的参考文献清单。

compiled.en: She compiled the report from many sources.
compiled.zh: 她从多个来源编制了报告。

complain.en: Do not complain about small problems.

complaint.en: The hotel received numerous complaints regarding the noise levels from the construction site nearby.
complaint.zh: 酒店收到了许多关于附近建筑工地噪音水平的投诉。

complaints.zh: 办公室收到了很多抱怨。

complement.en: The new software features are designed to complement the existing system and improve workflow efficiency.
complement.zh: 新软件功能旨在补充现有系统并提高工作流程效率。

complete.en: The workers complete the building construction on time.
complete.zh: 工人们按时完成了建筑施工。

complex.en: This is a complex problem to solve.

complexities.en: Many international students underestimate the complexities of adapting to a new educational system and cultural environment.
complexities.zh: 许多国际学生低估了适应新教育体系和文化环境的复杂性。

complexity.en: I understand the complexity of this problem.
complexity.zh: 我理解这个问题的复杂性。

compliance.en: The company ensures full compliance with regulations.
compliance.zh: 公司确保完全遵守规定。

complicate.en: The sudden change in visa regulations threatened to complicate the travel plans of thousands of international students.
complicate.zh: 签证法规的突然变化可能使数千名国际学生的旅行计划变得复杂。

complicated.en: The situation is more complicated than expected.

complication.en: The main complication with this research project is the insufficient funding available from both government and private sectors.
complication.zh: 这个研究项目的主要障碍是政府和私营部门提供的资金不足。

comply.en: All companies must comply with new regulations.
comply.zh: 所有公司必须遵守新法规。

comply with.en: Companies that fail to comply with environmental protection regulations may face severe penalties and damage to their reputation.
comply with.zh: 未能遵守环境保护法规的公司可能面临严厉处罚并损害其声誉。

compute.en: According to recent studies, researchers use complex statistical formulas to compute the rate of environmental change over the past five decades.
compute.zh: 根据最近的研究，研究人员使用复杂的统计公式来计算过去五十年环境变化的速度。

computed.en: The scientist computed the average global temperature increase using data from multiple reliable sources collected over many years.
computed.zh: 这位科学家使用多年来收集的多个可靠来源的数据计算了全球平均温度的升高。

computerized.en: Many modern factories have become highly computerized, significantly reducing the need for manual labor while increasing overall productivity.
computerized.zh: 许多现代工厂已经高度计算机化，大大减少了对体力劳动的需求，同时提高了整体生产率。

computes.en: The sophisticated algorithm computes the results automatically, which saves researchers a considerable amount of time and effort.
computes.zh: 这个复杂的算法自动计算结果，这为研究人员节省了大量时间和精力。

computing.en: Computing skills are important for modern jobs.
computing.zh: 计算技能对现代工作很重要。

conceal.en: He tried to conceal his disappointment.
conceal.zh: 他试图隐藏自己的失望。

conceive.en: It is increasingly difficult to conceive of modern life without the internet and digital communication technologies.
conceive.zh: 越来越难以想象没有互联网和数字通信技术的现代生活是什么样子。

conceived.en: She conceived the idea last month.
conceived.zh: 她上个月想出了这个主意。

confuse.en: The similar spelling of words like 'affect' and 'effect' often confuse students who are studying for the IELTS examination.
confuse.zh: 'affect'和'effect'等相似的单词拼写经常让准备雅思考试的学生感到困惑。

confused.en: She looked confused by the question.
confused.zh: 她看起来被这个问题弄糊涂了。

confusing.en: The instructions in the reading section were quite confusing, which made it challenging for test-takers to finish on time.
confusing.zh: 阅读部分的说明相当令人困惑，这使得考生很难按时完成。

confusion.en: The new rule caused much confusion.
confusion.zh: 新规定引起了很多困惑。

congenital.en: Medical researchers are studying congenital heart defects in newborns to develop more effective treatment methods.
congenital.zh: 医学研究人员正在研究新生儿先天性心脏缺陷，以开发更有效的治疗方法。

congestion.en: Traffic congestion causes delays every morning.
congestion.zh: 交通堵塞每天早上造成延误。

congratulate.en: The university president chose to congratulate all graduates on their remarkable achievements during the commencement ceremony.
congratulate.zh: 大学校长选择在毕业典礼上祝贺所有毕业生取得的卓越成就。

congress.en: The international congress brought together leading scientists to discuss potential solutions for climate change and environmental protection.
congress.zh: 这次国际大会汇集了顶尖科学家，讨论气候变化和环境保护的潜在解决方案。

conjunction.en: We use a conjunction to connect two ideas.
conjunction.zh: 我们用连词连接两个想法。

connect.en: Modern technology allows people to connect with others worldwide, facilitating cultural exchange and international collaboration.
connect.zh: 现代技术使人们能够与世界各地的人建立联系，促进文化交流和国际合作。

connected.en: The two ideas are closely connected.

connection.en: There is no connection between them.

conquered.en: The team conquered all the difficulties.

conscience.en: A person with a strong conscience would never consider cheating on important examinations.
conscience.zh: 一个有强烈良心的人永远不会考虑在重要考试中作弊。

conscious.en: She is conscious of the problem.

consensus.en: The team reached a consensus on the plan.
consensus.zh: 团队对该计划达成了共识。

consent.en: Written consent must be obtained from participants before any personal data can be collected for research purposes.
consent.zh: 在出于研究目的收集任何个人数据之前，必须获得参与者的书面同意。

consented.en: The local residents consented to the construction of the new highway after the government promised noise reduction measures.
consented.zh: 在当地政府承诺采取噪音 reduction 措施后，当地居民同意了新高速公路的建设。

consenting.en: All consenting adults should have the freedom to choose their own lifestyle without discrimination.
consenting.zh: 所有同意的成年人应该有权自由选择自己的生活方式而不受歧视。

condemn.en: Human rights organizations condemn the use of violence against civilians in conflict zones worldwide.
condemn.zh: 人权组织谴责世界各地冲突地区针对平民使用暴力的行为。

condition.en: The poor living conditions in urban slums contribute significantly to the spread of infectious diseases.
condition.zh: 城市贫民窟恶劣的生活条件极大地促进了传染病的传播。

conduct.zh: 教师应该正确地进行教学。

conducting.en: While conducting the interview, the researcher asked participants about their daily eating habits and exercise routines.
conducting.zh: 在 conducting the interview 时，研究人员询问了参与者他们的日常饮食习惯和锻炼情况。

conduction.en: Heat conduction through metal cookware allows food to be heated quickly and cooked evenly.
conduction.zh: 金属炊具的热传导能够快速加热食物并使其均匀受热。

conductor.en: The orchestra conductor raised his baton dramatically to signal the beginning of the final movement.
conductor.zh: 管弦乐队的指挥家戏剧性地举起指挥棒，宣告最终乐章的开始。

conducts.en: The environmental agency conducts regular monitoring of air quality in major metropolitan areas.
conducts.zh: 环境机构在主要城市地区进行定期的空气质量监测。

cones.en: She bought two strawberry ice cream cones.
cones.zh: 她买了两个草莓冰淇淋甜筒。

confidential.zh: 这些信息是严格保密的。

confine.en: The government should not confine environmental policies to mere symbolic gestures but implement substantial changes.
confine.zh: 政府不应将环境政策局限于象征性的姿态，而应实施实质性变革。

confined.en: The patient was confined to bed rest.

confirm.zh: 请在网上确认您的预订。

confirmation.en: We received confirmation of our booking yesterday.
confirmation.zh: 我们昨天收到了预订确认。

conflict.en: The two families resolved their conflict peacefully.
conflict.zh: 两个家族和平解决了他们的冲突。

conform.en: Students must conform to school rules.
conform.zh: 学生必须遵守学校规则。

confront.en: Society must confront the growing problem of digital addiction among young people rather than ignoring its serious consequences.
confront.zh: 社会必须正视年轻人日益严重的数字成瘾问题，而不是忽视其严重后果。

confronted.zh: 他直接面对了这个问题。

confer.en: The royal society will confer an honorary title upon the distinguished scientist for his contributions.
confer.zh: 皇家学会将授予这位杰出科学家荣誉头衔，以表彰他的贡献。

conference.en: The conference starts at nine tomorrow.

conference centre.en: The modern conference centre offers state-of-the-art facilities for conducting business meetings.
conference centre.zh: 这个现代化的会议中心为商务会议提供最先进的设施。

conferences.en: Many young researchers attend conferences to establish professional networks in their field.
conferences.zh: 许多年轻研究人员参加学术会议，以在其领域建立专业人脉网络。

conferred.en: The university conferred doctoral degrees on all candidates who completed their research successfully.
conferred.zh: 大学向所有成功完成研究的候选人授予了博士学位。

conferring.en: The ceremony of conferring degrees will take place in the main auditorium next week.
conferring.zh: 学位授予仪式将于下周在主礼堂举行。

confers.en: Regular reading habit confers the benefit of improved vocabulary and analytical thinking skills.
confers.zh: 规律的阅读习惯能够带来提高词汇量和分析思维能力的好处。

confess.en: Many teenagers confess that excessive use of social media negatively affects their academic performance.
confess.zh: 许多青少年承认过度使用社交媒体会对他们的学业成绩产生负面影响。

confidence.en: The speaker delivered the presentation with confidence.
confidence.zh: 演讲者自信地做了演示。

confident.en: He feels confident about the exam results.
confident.zh: 他对考试成绩很有信心。

conclude.en: From the evidence presented, we can conclude that renewable energy is becoming increasingly cost-effective in modern society.
conclude.zh: 从所呈现的证据来看，我们可以得出结论，可再生能源在现代社会中正变得日益经济实惠。

concluded.en: The scientist concluded the research results.
concluded.zh: 科学家总结了研究结果。

concludes.en: The author concludes that rapid technological advancement has fundamentally transformed how people communicate and build relationships.
concludes.zh: 作者得出结论，快速的科技进步从根本上改变了人们交流和建立关系的方式。

concluding.en: In concluding remarks, the speaker emphasized that collective international action is essential for addressing climate change effectively.
concluding.zh: 在总结发言中，演讲者强调，集体性的国际行动对于有效应对气候变化至关重要。

conclusion.en: The report ends with a clear conclusion.
conclusion.zh: 报告以一个明确的结论结尾。

conclusions.en: The study's conclusions support this theory.
