conclusions.zh: 这项研究的结论支持这一理论。

conclusive.en: Although several studies have been conducted, the evidence is not conclusive enough to support the proposed policy changes.
conclusive.zh: 尽管已进行了多项研究，但证据仍不够充分，不足以支持拟议的政策改革。

concrete.zh: 他们建了一堵混凝土墙。

concurrent.en: The concurrent rise in both unemployment rates and housing costs has created significant social and economic challenges for many families.
concurrent.zh: 失业率和住房成本的同时上升给许多家庭带来了重大的社会和经济挑战。

concurrently.en: Many students choose to study part-time while concurrently working in their chosen field to gain practical professional experience.
concurrently.zh: 许多学生选择半工半读，同时在他们选择的领域工作以获得实际的职业经验。

conceptualization.en: The conceptualization of sustainable development requires understanding both environmental and economic factors.
conceptualization.zh: 可持续发展的概念化需要理解环境和经济因素。

conceptualize.en: It is difficult to conceptualize the scale of climate change without seeing the data firsthand.
conceptualize.zh: 如果不亲眼看到数据，就很难概念化气候变化的规模。

conceptually.en: While conceptually sound, the proposed solution may be difficult to implement in practice.
conceptually.zh: 虽然概念上合理，但提议的解决方案在实践中可能难以实施。

concern.en: One of the main concerns about urbanization is the strain it places on natural resources.
concern.zh: 关于城市化的主要担忧之一是它对自然资源造成的压力。

concerned.en: I am very concerned about you.

concerned about.en: Parents are concerned about exam results.

concerning.en: The survey revealed some concerning trends in youth unemployment rates across different regions.
concerning.zh: 调查显示了不同地区青年失业率的一些令人担忧的趋势。

concert.en: We attended a rock music concert.
concert.zh: 我们参加了一场摇滚音乐会。

concerts.en: Summer concerts are held in the park.
concerts.zh: 夏季音乐会在公园举行。

concession.en: Students can buy a concession ticket for movies.
concession.zh: 学生可以购买电影减价票。

concentrate.en: Students should concentrate during the listening test.
concentrate.zh: 学生在听力测试时应该集中注意力。

concentrate on.en: You must concentrate on your studies.

concentrated.en: The concentrated effort of the research team finally led to a significant breakthrough in renewable energy technology.
concentrated.zh: 研究团队专注的努力最终在可再生能源技术方面取得了重大突破。

concentrates.en: The government concentrates on improving healthcare infrastructure to provide better medical services for citizens.
concentrates.zh: 政府专注于改善医疗基础设施，为公民提供更好的医疗服务。

concentrating.en: She found concentrating on her thesis difficult while simultaneously working part-time at a demanding company.
concentrating.zh: 她发现在一家要求严格的公司兼职的同时，很难集中精力撰写论文。

concentration.en: Concentration is key to effective learning.
concentration.zh: 专注对有效学习至关重要。

concept.en: The concept is quite difficult to understand.

conception.en: His conception of success has changed dramatically after experiencing various challenges during his entrepreneurial journey.
conception.zh: 在创业过程中经历各种挑战后，他对成功的观念发生了巨大变化。

concepts.en: Understanding fundamental economic concepts helps individuals make more informed decisions about personal financial management.
concepts.zh: 理解基本的经济概念帮助个人在个人财务管理方面做出更明智的决定。

conceptual.en: The theoretical framework relies heavily on conceptual models from cognitive psychology to explain human decision-making processes.
conceptual.zh: 这个理论框架在很大程度上依赖于认知心理学的概念模型来解释人类的决策过程。

contain.en: The comprehensive report contains detailed analysis of market trends and consumer behavior patterns across different regions.
contain.zh: 这份综合报告包含了不同地区市场趋势和消费者行为模式的详细分析。

container.en: The shipping container was loaded onto the cargo ship after passing all customs and security inspections at the port.
container.zh: 这艘运输集装箱在通过港口的所有海关和安全检查后被装上了货船。

containers.en: The containers are full of goods.

containing.en: The box containing keys is lost.

contains.en: This book contains useful vocabulary for exams.
contains.zh: 这本书包含有用的考试词汇。

contaminate.en: Factory emissions can contaminate the air and water supplies, posing serious health risks to nearby communities.
contaminate.zh: 工厂排放物会污染空气和水源，对附近社区造成严重的健康风险。

contamination.en: Food contamination can cause serious illness.
contamination.zh: 食物污染可能导致严重疾病。

contemplate.en: Before making major life decisions, it is wise to contemplate all possible consequences and seek professional advice.
contemplate.zh: 在做重大人生决定之前，明智的做法是深思熟虑所有可能的后果并寻求专业建议。

contemporary.zh: 当代艺术反映现代社会。

constitutive.en: Education is a constitutive element of personal development and has a profound impact on society.
constitutive.zh: 教育是个人发展的基本要素，对社会产生深远的影响。

constrain.en: Financial limitations often constrain the ability of developing nations to invest in modern infrastructure.
constrain.zh: 资金限制经常制约发展中国家投资建设现代基础设施的能力。

constrained.en: Many low-income families are constrained by the high cost of housing in major urban centres.
constrained.zh: 许多低收入家庭受到大城市高房价的限制。

constraining.en: The most constraining factor for small businesses is frequently the lack of access to affordable credit.
constraining.zh: 小企业最受限的因素通常是无法获得负担得起的信贷。

constrains.en: Increasing environmental regulations constrains industrial expansion while promoting sustainable practices.
constrains.zh: 日益严格的环境法规限制了工业扩张，同时促进了可持续发展实践。

constraint.en: One major constraint on educational reform is the limited funding available for schools and teachers.
constraint.zh: 教育改革的 一个主要限制是学校和教师获得的资金有限。

constraints.en: We faced many budget constraints this year.
constraints.zh: 我们今年面临许多预算限制。

construct.en: Governments should construct comprehensive policies that address both economic growth and environmental protection.
construct.zh: 政府应该制定综合性的政策，同时解决经济增长和环境保护问题。

constructed.en: The bridge was constructed last year.

constructing.en: While constructing new housing developments, authorities should preserve green spaces for community use.
constructing.zh: 在建设新的住宅区时，当局应该保留绿地供社区使用。

constituent.en: As a member of parliament, she regularly meets with her constituents to discuss local issues and concerns.
constituent.zh: 作为国会议员，她定期与当地选民会面，讨论地方事务和关注的问题。

constituents.en: The main constituents of a healthy diet include fresh fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins.
constituents.zh: 健康饮食的主要成分包括新鲜水果、蔬菜、全谷物和瘦肉蛋白。

constitute.en: These rules constitute the basic guidelines.
constitute.zh: 这些规则构成基本准则。

constituted.en: The independent inquiry committee was constituted in 2015 to investigate alleged financial misconduct.
constituted.zh: 独立调查委员会于2015年成立，调查涉嫌的财务不当行为。

constitutes.en: Regular physical activity constitutes an essential component of maintaining both physical and mental well-being.
constitutes.zh: 定期的体育活动是保持身体和心理健康的重要组成部分。

constituting.en: The various departments, constituting the entire organization, collaborate closely to achieve shared objectives.
constituting.zh: 构成整个组织的各个部门紧密合作，以实现共同目标。

constitution.en: Many democratic nations have a written constitution that establishes the fundamental principles of governance.
constitution.zh: 许多民主国家都有成文宪法，确立国家治理的基本原则。

constitutional.en: The supreme court ruled that the proposed legislation was not constitutional and therefore could not be enacted.
constitutional.zh: 最高法院裁定拟议的立法不符合宪法，因此无法颁布。

constitutionally.en: The president is constitutionally obligated to address the nation during times of national emergency.
constitutionally.zh: 根据宪法规定总统有义务在国家紧急状态期间向全国发表讲话。

constitutions.en: Different countries have constitutions that reflect their unique historical, cultural, and political circumstances.
constitutions.zh: 不同国家的宪法反映了各自独特的历史、文化和政治环境。

considerable.en: Considerable effort was needed for this project.
considerable.zh: 这个项目需要相当大的努力。

considerably.en: Air quality in urban areas has improved considerably since the government implemented stricter emission standards.
considerably.zh: 自从政府实施更严格的排放标准以来，城市地区的空气质量已大大改善。

consideration.en: Please give this matter careful consideration.

consist.en: A balanced diet should consist of蛋白质，碳水化合物，脂肪 and essential vitamins for optimal health.
consist.zh: 均衡饮食应包含蛋白质、碳水化合物、脂肪和必需维生素，以保持最佳健康状态。

consist of.en: The research team consists of scientists from various disciplines, including biology, chemistry, and environmental science.
consist of.zh: 研究团队由来自不同学科的科学家组成，包括生物学、化学和环境科学。

consisted.en: The team consisted of five experts.
consisted.zh: 这个团队由五位专家组成。

consistency.en: The consistency of the results across multiple experiments strengthened the validity of the scientific theory.
consistency.zh: 多次实验结果的一致性加强了该科学理论的有效性。

consistent.en: Results must be consistent and reliable.

consistently.en: The company has consistently ranked among the top employers in terms of workplace satisfaction and employee benefits.
consistently.zh: 在职场满意度和员工福利方面，该公司始终位列最佳雇主行列。

consisting.en: Modern smartphones consist of hundreds of components, consisting of sophisticated processors, sensors, and display technology.
consisting.zh: 现代智能手机由数百个组件组成，包括复杂的处理器、传感器和显示技术。

consents.en: The patient consents to the medical procedure after being fully informed about the potential risks involved.
consents.zh: 患者在充分了解潜在风险后，同意接受该医疗程序。

consequence.en: One significant consequence of rapid urbanization is the displacement of traditional communities and loss of cultural heritage.
consequence.zh: 快速城市化的一个重要后果是传统社区的迁移和文化遗产的丧失。

consequences.en: We must consider the consequences of our actions.
consequences.zh: 我们必须考虑行动的后果。

consequent.en: The heavy rainfall and the consequent flooding caused widespread disruption to transportation and daily life in the region.
consequent.zh: 暴雨及其引发的洪水对该地区的交通和日常生活造成了广泛的中断。

consequently.en: The government increased taxes on luxury goods, and consequently, consumer spending in this sector decreased significantly over the year.
consequently.zh: 政府提高了奢侈品的税收，因此，该领域的消费者支出在这一年中显著下降。

conservation.zh: 野生动物保护保护濒危物种。

conservationists.en: Conservationists work hard to protect endangered species.
conservationists.zh: 自然资源保护者努力保护濒危物种。

conservative.en: Many older people have conservative views about marriage.
conservative.zh: 很多老年人对婚姻有保守的看法。

conserve.en: We must conserve water during the drought.
conserve.zh: 干旱期间我们必须节约用水。

consume.en: The average person in developed countries consumes far more resources than they actually need for daily survival.
consume.zh: 发达国家的人均资源消耗量远远超过他们的日常生存所需。

consumed.en: By the time the meeting started, she had already consumed three cups of strong coffee to stay alert.
consumed.zh: 会议开始时，她已经喝了三杯浓咖啡来保持清醒。

consumer.en: The consumer electronics market has expanded significantly over the past decade, creating numerous employment opportunities.
consumer.zh: 消费电子产品市场在过去十年中显著扩张，创造了大量就业机会。

consumers.en: Consumers prefer products with good reviews.
consumers.zh: 消费者更喜欢评价好的产品。

consumes.en: The factory consumes enormous amounts of water and electricity every day to maintain its production operations.
consumes.zh: 这家工厂每天消耗大量的水和电力来维持生产运营。

consuming.en: She has a consuming interest in art.
consuming.zh: 她对艺术有强烈的兴趣。

consumption.en: Water consumption has increased this year.

contact.en: Please contact me if you have questions.

contagious.en: Laughter can be highly contagious, which explains why it spreads so quickly through social gatherings and public places.
contagious.zh: 笑声具有很强的传染性，这解释了为什么它在社交聚会和公共场所传播得如此迅速。

consists.en: The team consists of four experts.
consists.zh: 这个团队由四位专家组成。

consolidation.en: The consolidation of both departments saved money.
consolidation.zh: 两个部门的合并节省了开支。

consonants.en: Students must learn these consonants first.
consonants.zh: 学生必须先学这些辅音。

constantly.en: Students today are constantly exposed to vast amounts of information online, which requires developing strong critical thinking skills.
constantly.zh: 当今学生不断接触网络上的海量信息，这需要培养强大的批判性思维能力。

constants.en: While many aspects of culture change over time, family bonds and traditions remain important constants in society worldwide.
constants.zh: 虽然文化的许多方面会随着时间而改变，但家庭纽带和传统仍然是世界各地社会中重要的常量。

constellation.en: The constellation Orion is easily recognizable in the night sky and has been referenced throughout history in various cultures.
constellation.zh: 猎户座星座在夜空中很容易辨认，并且在各种文化的历史中都有提及。

constipation.en: Constipation is a common digestive issue that can often be prevented through a balanced diet rich in fibre and regular exercise.
constipation.zh: 便秘是一种常见的消化问题，通常可以通过富含纤维的均衡饮食和定期锻炼来预防。

constituencies.en: Politicians must balance the interests of different constituencies when making decisions that affect the entire nation and its economy.
constituencies.zh: 政治家在做出影响整个国家和经济决策时，必须平衡不同选区的利益。

constituency.en: Each constituency in the country is represented by a single member of parliament who serves as their voice in government.
constituency.zh: 该国的每个选区都由一名国会议员代表，作为他们在政府中的代言人。

contrasts.en: The article contrasts traditional teaching methods with modern approaches to education in developed nations.
contrasts.zh: 这篇文章将发达国家的传统教学方法与现代教育方法进行了对比。

contribute.zh: 每个人都可以贡献想法。

contribute to.en: Exercise can contribute to better health.

contributes.en: Online education contributes significantly to making learning more accessible for people in remote areas.
contributes.zh: 在线教育为偏远地区的人们更方便地获取学习资源做出了重大贡献。

contributing.en: Contributing to community volunteer programs helps students develop important leadership skills.
contributing.zh: 参与社区志愿者项目有助于培养学生重要的领导能力。

contributions.en: The government acknowledged all contributions made by volunteers during the disaster relief efforts.
contributions.zh: 政府表彰了所有在救灾工作中做出贡献的志愿者。

contributor.en: He was a key contributor to the project's success through his innovative problem-solving approach.
contributor.zh: 他通过创新的问题解决方法成为该项目成功的关键贡献者。

contributors.en: The researchers were among the primary contributors to the groundbreaking environmental study.
contributors.zh: 这些研究人员是这项突破性环境研究的主要贡献者。

contextually.en: When studying historical events, researchers must analyze the material contextually to avoid misinterpretation.
contextually.zh: 在研究历史事件时，研究人员必须从语境角度分析材料，以避免误解。

continent.en: Africa is the second largest continent.

continual.en: The continual rise in sea levels poses a serious threat to coastal communities around the world.
continual.zh: 海平面持续上升对世界各地的沿海社区构成严重威胁。

continually.en: The city is continually growing and changing.
continually.zh: 这座城市在不断发展和变化。

continuous.en: The continuous rain caused flooding in the city.
continuous.zh: 持续不断的降雨导致城市发生洪水。

continuously.en: The machine runs continuously for hours.

contract.en: We signed a contract with the new company.
contract.zh: 我们和那家新公司签了合同。

contracted.en: The muscles in the body become contracted after prolonged periods of physical inactivity.
contracted.zh: 长时间身体不活动后，身体的肌肉会收缩。

contracting.en: The contracted economy has led to higher unemployment rates and reduced consumer spending.
contracting.zh: 不断萎缩的经济导致失业率上升和消费支出减少。

contempt.en: Many young people today show contempt for traditional values and prefer to establish their own standards of behavior.
contempt.zh: 当今许多年轻人对传统价值观表现出蔑视，更倾向于建立自己的行为标准。

contend.en: Scientists contend that this is true.
contend.zh: 科学家们主张这是真的。

content.en: Are you content with your results?

contest.en: The government decided to contest the court's ruling regarding environmental protection policies in coastal regions.
contest.zh: 政府决定对法院关于沿海地区环境保护政策的裁决提出质疑。

context.en: You must understand the context first.

contexts.en: The same policy may produce vastly different outcomes in various contexts, depending on economic and cultural factors.
contexts.zh: 同样的政策在不同的背景下可能产生截然不同的结果，这取决于经济和文化因素。

contextual.en: Researchers need to consider multiple contextual factors when evaluating the effectiveness of educational programs.
contextual.zh: 研究人员在评估教育项目的有效性时，需要考虑多个背景因素。

contextualization.en: The contextualization of historical events requires examining not only the facts but also the social circumstances of the era.
contextualization.zh: 对历史事件的背景化研究不仅需要审视事实，还需要考察那个时代的社会状况。

contextualize.en: To fully understand the economic crisis, we must contextualize it within the broader framework of global market changes.
contextualize.zh: 为了充分理解这场经济危机，我们必须将其置于全球市场变化的更广泛框架中来分析。

cookery.en: He learned basic cookery at school.
cookery.zh: 他在学校学了基础烹调术。

cooled.en: The soup has cooled down enough to eat.
cooled.zh: 汤已经凉到可以吃的温度了。

cooling.en: The weather is cooling down after summer.
cooling.zh: 夏天过后天气正在降温。

cooperate.zh: 团队必须合作才能成功。

cooperating.en: The team is cooperating to finish the project.
cooperating.zh: 团队正在合作完成这个项目。

cooperation.en: Team success depends on cooperation among members.
cooperation.zh: 团队成功取决于成员之间的合作。

cooperative.en: The team was very cooperative during the project.
cooperative.zh: 团队在项目中非常配合。

contractor.en: The general contractor coordinated with various subcontractors to ensure the renovation project was completed within budget and on schedule.
contractor.zh: 总承包商与各分包商协调，以确保翻新项目在预算内按时完成。

contractors.en: Many construction companies prefer hiring independent contractors instead of full-time employees to reduce operational costs significantly.
contractors.zh: 许多建筑公司更喜欢雇用独立承包商而不是全职员工，以显著降低运营成本。

contracts.en: The government should enforce stricter regulations on employment contracts to protect workers' rights and prevent exploitation.
contracts.zh: 政府应该对雇用合同实施更严格的监管，以保护工人权利并防止剥削。

contradict.en: Recent scientific studies appear to contradict earlier claims about the effectiveness of this treatment method for chronic conditions.
contradict.zh: 最近的科学研究似乎与早期关于这种慢性病治疗方法有效性的说法相矛盾。

contrary.en: Contrary to popular belief, obtaining a university degree does not automatically ensure immediate employment upon graduation nowadays.
contrary.zh: 与普遍看法相反，获得大学学位如今并不能自动确保毕业后立即就业。

contrary to.en: Contrary to popular assumption, many elderly people are quite comfortable with using smartphones and social media platforms.
contrary to.zh: 与普遍假设相反，许多老年人非常习惯使用智能手机和社交媒体平台。

contrast.zh: 这些颜色在一起形成很好的对比。

contrasted.en: The research report contrasted the economic growth of developed nations with the challenges faced by developing countries.
contrasted.zh: 研究报告将发达国家的经济增长与发展中国家面临的挑战进行了对比。

contrasting.en: The documentary presents two contrasting perspectives on immigration, highlighting both its economic benefits and social challenges.
contrasting.zh: 这部纪录片呈现了两种截然不同的移民观点，突出了移民的经济效益和社会挑战。

contrastingly.en: Contrastingly, cultures that emphasize group achievement tend to produce students who are more collaborative than competitive.
contrastingly.zh: 相反，强调集体成就的文化往往培养出比竞争型学生更具合作精神的学生。

controllers.en: The controllers regulate temperature in the system.
controllers.zh: 控制器调节系统中的温度。

controls.en: The government strictly controls industrial pollution.
controls.zh: 政府严格控制工业污染。

controversial.en: That controversial plan caused a lot of debate.
controversial.zh: 那个有争议的计划引发了很多讨论。

controversy.zh: 这项政策引起了即时争议。

convene.en: The international climate summit will convene next week to address urgent environmental challenges facing developing nations.
convene.zh: 国际气候峰会将于下周召开，讨论发展中国家面临的紧迫环境挑战。

convened.en: A panel of distinguished scientists was convened to evaluate the safety and effectiveness of the new vaccine.
convened.zh: 一个由杰出科学家组成的小组被召集来评估新疫苗的安全性和有效性。

convenes.en: The university convenes an annual conference each autumn where researchers present their latest academic discoveries.
convenes.zh: 大学每年秋季召开一次会议，研究人员在会上展示他们最新的学术发现。

convenience.en: The convenience of online shopping has transformed consumer behavior and significantly impacted traditional retail businesses.
convenience.zh: 网购的便利性改变了消费者行为，并显著影响了传统零售业。

convenience store.en: Convenience stores have become essential in urban areas, offering quick access to daily necessities for busy residents.
convenience store.zh: 便利店在城市地区变得不可或缺，为忙碌的居民提供日常必需品的快速获取渠道。

convert.en: Many people decide to convert their savings into different currencies to take advantage of better exchange rates.
convert.zh: 许多人会将储蓄转换成不同的货币以获得更好的汇率。

converted.en: The old factory was converted into apartments.

convey.en: The report will convey the main findings.
convey.zh: 这份报告将传达主要发现。

convict.en: The judge will convict the defendant if the prosecution can prove guilt beyond reasonable doubt.
convict.zh: 如果控方能证明被告无疑点地有罪，法官将对其进行定罪。

convicted.en: He was convicted of the crime.

convince.en: Sales representatives must convince potential customers that their products offer genuine value for money.
convince.zh: 销售代表必须说服潜在客户相信他们的产品能带来真正的性价比。

convinced.en: I am convinced that practice is important for learning.
convinced.zh: 我确信练习对学习很重要。

convincing.en: The witness provided a convincing account of the incident that helped resolve the legal dispute.
convincing.zh: 证人提供了令人信服的事件描述，有助于解决这起法律纠纷。

cook.en: My mother will cook dinner tonight.

cooker.en: The new cooker works very well.

convenient.en: The location is very convenient for students.
convenient.zh: 这个位置对学生来说很方便。

convening.en: The United Nations is convening an emergency summit to address the growing humanitarian crisis in the region.
convening.zh: 联合国正在召开紧急峰会，讨论该地区日益严重的人道主义危机。

convention.en: The international convention on wildlife protection was signed by over 180 countries to prevent endangered species extinction.
convention.zh: 超过180个国家签署了国际野生动物保护公约，以防止濒危物种灭绝。

conventional.en: Conventional methods remain popular in schools.
conventional.zh: 传统方法在学校仍然很受欢迎。

conventionally.en: Conventionally, women have been underrepresented in leadership positions, but companies are now actively promoting gender diversity.
conventionally.zh: 传统上，女性在领导职位上的代表性不足，但企业现在正积极推动性别多样性。

conventions.en: Social conventions regarding appropriate behaviour vary significantly between different cultures and require cultural sensitivity.
conventions.zh: 关于适当行为的社会习俗在不同文化之间差异很大，需要文化敏感性。

conversation.en: We had an interesting conversation yesterday.
conversation.zh: 我们昨天进行了一次有趣的谈话。

conversations.en: Practice conversations with native speakers daily.
conversations.zh: 每天和母语者练习对话。

converse.en: When I studied abroad, I had to converse with local people to improve my language skills rapidly.
converse.zh: 在国外留学时，我不得不与当地人交谈以快速提高语言能力。

conversely.en: Remote work allows greater flexibility; conversely, it may lead to feelings of isolation and reduced team collaboration.
conversely.zh: 远程工作提供了更大的灵活性；反之，它可能导致孤独感并减少团队协作。

coordinated.en: The team made a coordinated effort.
coordinated.zh: 团队做出了协调一致的努力。

coordinates.en: The map coordinates enabled the expedition team to navigate safely through the remote wilderness area.
coordinates.zh: 地图坐标使探险队能够安全地穿越偏远荒野地区。

coordinating.en: The coordinating role requires strong interpersonal skills to manage diverse teams working on complex projects.
coordinating.zh: 协调角色需要强大的人际交往能力来管理从事复杂项目的多元化团队。

coordination.en: Good coordination is needed for this project.
coordination.zh: 这个项目需要良好的协调。

coordinators.en: The event coordinators spent months planning logistics to ensure the conference would run smoothly.
coordinators.zh: 活动协调员花了数月时间规划后勤工作，以确保会议顺利进行。

cope.en: I cannot cope with this problem.

cope with.en: It is hard to cope with so much stress.
cope with.zh: 很难应对这么大的压力。

copier.en: Please fix the copier in the office.
copier.zh: 请修理办公室里的复印机。

county.en: He grew up in a small county.

coup.en: The military coup led to widespread protests and international condemnation from neighbouring countries.
coup.zh: 军事政变导致了广泛的抗议活动，并受到邻国的国际谴责。

couple.en: I met the couple at the coffee shop.
couple.zh: 我在咖啡店遇到了那对夫妻。

coupon.en: Customers can use discount coupons downloaded from the official website to save money on purchases.
coupon.zh: 顾客可以使用从官方网站下载的折扣券来节省购物费用。

courage.en: It takes considerable courage to admit mistakes publicly and accept responsibility for one's actions.
courage.zh: 公开承认错误并为自己的行为承担责任需要相当的勇气。

course.en: I enrolled in an English course last week.
course.zh: 我上周报名了一个英语课程。

coursework.en: She finished all her coursework on time.
coursework.zh: 她按时完成了所有课程作业。

court.en: The case will go to court next month.
court.zh: 这个案件下个月将开庭审理。

courtesy.en: It is common courtesy to inform the host in advance if you cannot attend a dinner invitation.
courtesy.zh: 如果不能出席晚餐邀请，提前告知主人是基本的礼貌。

courtroom.en: The witness stood in the courtroom.

correctly.en: Please spell your name correctly on the form.
correctly.zh: 请在表格上正确拼写你的名字。

correlates.en: Study time correlates with exam scores.
correlates.zh: 学习时间与考试成绩相关。

correlation.en: There is a correlation between study time and grades.
correlation.zh: 学习时间与成绩之间存在相关性。

correspond.en: The results of the experiment do not correspond with the predictions made by the theoretical model.
correspond.zh: 实验结果与理论模型所做的预测不一致。

corresponded.en: The ancient texts corresponded with archaeological evidence, providing a clearer picture of early civilizations.
corresponded.zh: 古代文献与考古证据相吻合为了解早期文明提供了更清晰的图景。

correspondence.en: Email correspondence has largely replaced traditional letters in modern business communication practices.
correspondence.zh: 电子邮件通信在现代商业交流实践中已 largely取代了传统信件。

correspondent.en: The foreign correspondent provided detailed reports on the cultural traditions observed during her assignment.
correspondent.zh: 这位驻外记者详细报道了她在派遣期间观察到的文化传统。

corresponding.en: Each problem has a corresponding solution.
corresponding.zh: 每个问题都有相应的解决方案。

correspondingly.en: As demand for organic products increases, correspondingly higher prices are charged by retailers.
correspondingly.zh: 随着有机产品需求的增加，零售商相应收取更高的价格。

corresponds.en: The increase in temperature corresponds with the rise in global carbon emissions over recent decades.
corresponds.zh: 气温上升与近几十年全球碳排放的增加相一致。

counsellor.en: The counsellor gave useful career advice.
counsellor.zh: 辅导员给出了有用的职业建议。

count.en: We count the votes every election.
count.zh: 每次选举我们都会计算票数。

count on.en: Students should count on their own efforts and perseverance rather than relying solely on external support or circumstances.
count on.zh: 学生应该依靠自己的努力和毅力，而不是完全依赖外部支持或环境条件。

counter.en: This medicine can counter the effect.
counter.zh: 这种药可以抵消那个效果。

counterpart.en: The education minister met with his counterpart from the neighbouring country to discuss strategies for improving digital literacy in schools.
counterpart.zh: 教育部长与邻国同行会面，讨论提高学校数字素养的策略。

counterparts.zh: 我们的产品胜过同类产品。

counting.en: She is counting the number of participants.
counting.zh: 她正在计算参与者的数量。

countless.en: There are countless stars in the sky.

country.en: Which country would you like to visit most?
country.zh: 你最想去哪个国家旅游？

countryside.en: The countryside is peaceful and beautiful.

corners.en: The cat sat in the corners of the room.
corners.zh: 那只猫坐在房间的角落里。

coronary.en: Coronary heart disease remains one of the leading causes of death in developed nations with sedentary lifestyles.
coronary.zh: 冠心病仍然是久坐不动生活方式发达国家的主要死因之一。

corporate.en: The corporate team made the decision.
corporate.zh: 公司团队做出了这个决定。

corporately.en: The company must act corporately to ensure consistent environmental standards are maintained across all branches.
corporately.zh: 公司必须以企业化方式运作，确保所有分支机构维持一致的环境标准。

corporates.en: The new tax regulations will significantly impact how corporates structure their financial operations and reporting.
corporates.zh: 新的税收法规将显著影响企业如何构建其财务运作和报告。

corporation.en: The corporation opened a new branch overseas.
corporation.zh: 这家公司在海外开设了新分公司。

corporations.en: Many international corporations have relocated their manufacturing facilities to developing countries seeking cheaper labor.
corporations.zh: 许多国际公司已将制造工厂迁至寻求廉价劳动力的发展中国家。

corps.en: The diplomatic corps plays a vital role in maintaining peaceful relations between nations during conflicts.
corps.zh: 外交使团在冲突期间维护国家间和平关系方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

corrections.en: The teacher made corrections on the paper.
corrections.zh: 老师在试卷上做了修改。

corridor.en: The corridor leads to the main hall.

corrupt.en: Corrupt officials who abuse their power for personal gain should face severe legal consequences and public scrutiny.
corrupt.zh: 滥用职权谋取私利的腐败官员应该面临严厉的法律制裁和公众监督。

cortex.en: The cerebral cortex plays a vital role in processing sensory information and facilitating complex thought patterns in humans.
cortex.zh: 大脑皮层在处理感官信息和促进人类复杂思维模式方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

cosmetics.en: She works at a cosmetics store downtown.
cosmetics.zh: 她在市中心的一家化妆品店工作。

cosmic.en: The cosmic exploration missions have provided valuable insights into the origins of the universe and potential habitable planets.
cosmic.zh: 宇宙探索任务为了解宇宙起源和可能适宜居住的星球提供了宝贵的见解。

cost.en: The dress cost her fifty dollars.
cost.zh: 这条裙子花了她五十美元。

costly.zh: 那是一个代价高昂的错误。

costumes.zh: 孩子们穿着鲜艳的服装。

cot.en: The baby sleeps in the cot.

copper.en: Copper is a good conductor of electricity.

copy.en: Please copy this document for me.

coral.en: Coral reefs are home to many fish.
coral.zh: 珊瑚礁是许多鱼类的家园。

core.en: Math is a core subject in school.
core.zh: 数学是学校的核心科目。

cored.en: The apple was cored before being sliced for the fruit salad to ensure even texture throughout.
cored.zh: 苹果在切片做水果沙拉前被去核，以确保整体口感均匀。

cores.en: The research team extracted several cores from the seabed to study sediment layers and climate history.
cores.zh: 研究团队从海底提取了多个岩芯，以研究沉积物层和气候历史。

coring.en: Coring techniques are widely used in geology to obtain underground samples for scientific analysis.
coring.zh: 取芯技术广泛应用于地质学，以获取地下样本进行科学分析。

cork.en: He pulled the cork from the bottle.

corn.en: The farmer grows corn every year.

corner.en: She waited at the corner for me.

cottage.en: The charming stone cottage nestled in the countryside attracts tourists seeking a peaceful escape from city life.
cottage.zh: 这座迷人的石屋坐落在乡村，吸引了寻求远离城市喧嚣的游客。

cottages.en: The cottages by the lake look very cozy.
cottages.zh: 湖边的小屋看起来非常舒适。

cotton.zh: 棉质衣服摸起来很柔软。

couch.en: Research indicates that excessive time spent on the couch contributes to various health problems in modern society.
couch.zh: 研究表明，过多时间坐在沙发上会导致现代社会的各种健康问题。

cough.en: The persistent cough caused by air pollution has become a serious public health concern in many cities.
cough.zh: 由空气污染引起的持续咳嗽已成为许多城市严重的公共健康问题。

could.en: Local businesses could benefit significantly from improved public transportation infrastructure connecting suburban areas to city centres.
could.zh: 当地企业可以从连接郊区与市中心的公共交通基础设施改善中获益匪浅。

councillor.en: The councillor attended the local meeting.
councillor.zh: 这位市议员参加了本地会议。

counsel.en: Before making major financial decisions, individuals should seek professional counsel to understand potential risks and benefits.
counsel.zh: 在做出重大财务决策之前，个人应寻求专业建议以了解潜在的風險和收益。

counselling.zh: 学校提供免费咨询服务。

creators.en: The creators of the innovative mobile application were praised for their creative vision and technical expertise in the field.
creators.zh: 这款创新移动应用的创作者因其创意愿景和技术专长而受到赞誉。

creature.en: A strange creature appeared in the garden.
creature.zh: 花园里出现了一种奇怪的生物。

creatures.en: Many sea creatures live in the deep ocean.
creatures.zh: 许多海洋生物生活在深海里。

credential.en: When applying for teaching positions abroad, having the appropriate academic credentials is absolutely essential.
credential.zh: 在申请海外教学职位时，拥有适当的学术证书是绝对必要的。

credit.zh: 请把我的账户记入贷方。

credit card.en: I paid with my credit card.

credited.en: The significant improvement in air quality is largely credited to the government's strict environmental regulations.
credited.zh: 空气质量的显著改善很大程度上归功于政府的严格环境法规。

crediting.en: Many historians believe that crediting achievements solely to individual leaders overlooks the contributions of ordinary people.
crediting.zh: 许多历史学家认为，将成就完全归功于个别领导人忽视了普通人的贡献。

creditor.en: Before approving the loan application, the creditor carefully examined the borrower's financial history and credit score.
creditor.zh: 在批准贷款申请之前，债权人仔细审查了借款人的财务历史和信用评分。

creditors.en: The company is currently negotiating with its creditors to restructure the substantial debts accumulated over recent years.
creditors.zh: 公司目前正在与债权人谈判重组近年来积累的大量债务。

crack.en: Be careful not to crack the egg when cooking.
crack.zh: 做饭时小心不要打破鸡蛋。

cracking.en: The walls are cracking after the earthquake.
cracking.zh: 地震后墙壁出现了裂缝。

craft.en: Learning a traditional craft requires patience and skill, which appeals to many tourists seeking authentic cultural experiences.
craft.zh: 学习传统手工艺需要耐心和技巧，这吸引了许多寻求真实文化体验的游客。

craftsmen.en: Local craftsmen sell handmade products at the market.
craftsmen.zh: 当地工匠在市场上出售手工产品。

crash.en: The sudden crash in the stock market caused widespread economic instability and affected the financial security of many investors globally.
crash.zh: 股市的突然崩盘导致广泛的经济不稳定，影响了全球许多投资者的财务安全。

crater.en: The meteor left a huge crater.
crater.zh: 流星留下了一个巨大的弹坑。

crave.en: Many teenagers crave independence from their parents.
crave.zh: 许多青少年渴望独立于父母。

crazy.en: Some people believe it is crazy to spend billions of dollars on space exploration rather than solving poverty.
crazy.zh: 一些人认为将数十亿美元花费在太空探索而不是解决贫困问题上是疯狂的。

cream.en: I apply cream on my face every night.
cream.zh: 我每晚在脸上涂护肤霜。

crystal.en: The crystal clear water of the mountain spring is safe to drink without any additional treatment or purification.
crystal.zh: 山泉清澈透明的水无需任何额外处理或净化即可安全饮用。

crystals.en: The scientist examined the crystals under a microscope.
crystals.zh: 科学家在显微镜下检查水晶。

cubic.en: The box has a cubic shape.
cubic.zh: 这个盒子是立方体形状。

cue.en: The sudden applause from the audience served as a clear cue for the performer to begin the final act.
cue.zh: 观众突然爆发的掌声清楚地提示表演者可以开始最后一个节目了。

cues.en: The brain uses visual cues to help process information.
cues.zh: 大脑利用视觉线索来帮助处理信息。

cuisine.en: Traditional French cuisine is renowned worldwide for its sophisticated techniques and emphasis on high-quality ingredients.
cuisine.zh: 传统法国菜以其精湛的烹饪技术和对优质食材的重视而闻名于世。

culprit.en: The police caught the culprit yesterday.

cultivate.en: We must cultivate good reading habits.
cultivate.zh: 我们必须培养良好的阅读习惯。

cultivated.en: The cultivated land produces high yields.

courtyard.en: Many students study in the courtyard.
courtyard.zh: 许多学生在院子里学习。

cousin.en: My cousin lives in Beijing now.

cover.en: The cover of the book is torn.

coverage.en: The media coverage of the event was extensive.
coverage.zh: 媒体对事件的报道很广泛。

coverage lettering.en: The map shows clear coverage lettering.
coverage lettering.zh: 地图显示了清晰的覆盖范围标注。

covered.en: The table is covered with a cloth.

cow.en: In many developing countries, a single cow can provide a family with milk, cheese, and other essential dairy products.
cow.zh: 在许多发展中国家，一头奶牛可以为家庭提供牛奶、奶酪和其他必要的乳制品。

coworker.en: My coworker offered to help me finish the project ahead of schedule, which I really appreciated.
coworker.zh: 我的同事主动提出帮我提前完成项目，我非常感激。

cows.en: The farmer owns several cows and horses.
cows.zh: 那个农夫养了几头奶牛和马。

crabs.en: The crabs crawled along the sandy shore.

credits.en: Students must earn a minimum of 120 credits before they can graduate from the university program.
credits.zh: 学生必须在毕业前获得至少120学分。

crescent.en: A crescent moon hung above the hill.
crescent.zh: 一轮弯月挂在山丘上方。

crew.en: The film crew started work at dawn.
crew.zh: 电影摄制组黎明时分开始工作。

crime.en: The crime was reported to police.

criminal.en: The criminal justice system aims to balance punishment with rehabilitation for offenders.
criminal.zh: 刑事司法系统旨在平衡对犯罪者的惩罚与改造。

crisis.en: The global financial crisis had a devastating impact on employment rates across many developed nations worldwide.
crisis.zh: 全球金融危机对许多发达国家的就业率产生了毁灭性的影响。

crispy.en: The chef prepared a crispy duck dish that was highly praised by guests at the restaurant.
crispy.zh: 主厨准备了一道酥脆的鸭肉菜肴，受到了餐厅客人的高度赞扬。

criteria.en: The selection criteria are very strict.

criterion.en: The main criterion for selecting candidates is their ability to demonstrate strong analytical skills.
criterion.zh: 选拔候选人的主要标准是他们展示强大分析能力的能力。

critic.en: The art critic wrote a comprehensive review praising the exhibition's innovative approach to modern sculpture.
critic.zh: 艺术评论家撰写了一篇全面的评论，赞扬该展览对现代雕塑的创新手法。

critical.en: Critical thinking is important for students.
critical.zh: 批判性思维对学生很重要。

criticised.en: The plan was criticised for being too costly.
criticised.zh: 这个计划因费用太高而受到批评。

criticize.en: Rather than simply criticize existing systems, we should focus on proposing practical solutions to address their shortcomings.
criticize.zh: 我们不应该仅仅批评现有制度，而应该专注于提出切实可行的解决方案来弥补其不足。

critics.zh: 评论家们赞扬了这部新电影。

crop.en: The failure of the rice crop due to drought has had devastating consequences for local farmers and food security.
crop.zh: 因干旱导致水稻作物歉收，对当地农民和粮食安全造成了毁灭性后果。

crops.en: The farmers harvest their crops in autumn.
crops.zh: 农民们在秋季收获农作物。

cross.en: The research will cross-examine data from multiple sources to ensure the validity of our conclusions.
cross.zh: 该研究将交叉检验来自多个来源的数据，以确保我们结论的有效性。

crow.en: A crow sat on the roof.

crowd.en: A large crowd gathered in the city square to protest against the new government policy.
crowd.zh: 一大群人聚集在城市广场上抗议新的政府政策。

created.en: The museum was created in the 19th century to preserve historical artifacts for future generations.
created.zh: 这座博物馆创建于19世纪，旨在为后代保存历史文物。

creates.en: Modern technology creates new opportunities for remote workers to collaborate across different time zones.
creates.zh: 现代技术为远程工作者创造了在不同 timezone 协作的新机会。

creating.en: Children learn essential skills by creating art projects that encourage imagination and self-expression.
creating.zh: 孩子们通过创作艺术项目来学习基本技能，这些项目培养想象力和自我表达能力。

creation.en: This painting is her latest creation.
creation.zh: 这幅画是她的最新创作。

creations.en: The artist's creations reflect her unique perspective on the relationship between nature and modern society.
creations.zh: 这位艺术家的作品反映了她对自然与现代社会关系的独特视角。

creative.en: She has a very creative mind.

creatively.en: The government should invest creatively in education to prepare students for the challenges of tomorrow.
creatively.zh: 政府应该在教育方面进行创新性投资，为学生应对未来的挑战做好准备。

creativeness.en: Art classes help develop students' creativeness.
creativeness.zh: 美术课有助于培养学生的创造性。

creativity.zh: 孩子们在学校需要创造力。

creator.en: The ancient monument stands as a testament to the ingenuity of its unknown creator.
creator.zh: 这座古老的纪念碑证明了其不知名创造者的聪明才智。

crown.en: The king wore a golden crown.

crucial.en: Water is crucial for all life.
crucial.zh: 水对所有生命至关重要。

crude.en: The country's economy still depends heavily on exporting crude oil rather than refined petroleum products.
crude.zh: 该国经济仍然严重依赖出口原油而非精炼石油产品。

cruel.en: Many believe that imprisonment is a more effective punishment than cruel and unusual treatment.
cruel.zh: 许多人认为监禁比残酷和不寻常的惩罚更有效。

cruise.en: The luxury cruise ship offered passengers a variety of entertainment options and exotic destinations.
cruise.zh: 这艘豪华游轮为乘客提供各种娱乐选择和异国目的地。

crush.en: The ancient library was threatened when a flood threatened to crush the irreplaceable historical manuscripts.
crush.zh: 当洪水威胁要压毁这些不可替代的历史手稿时，古老的图书馆面临威胁。

crushed.en: The ice was crushed into small pieces.

cry.en: Some cultures believe that allowing babies to cry excessively can cause long-term psychological damage.
cry.zh: 一些文化认为让婴儿过度哭泣可能导致长期心理损害。

crying.en: The baby is crying loudly now.

date.en: Can I have your phone number and date?
date.zh: 我能问一下你的电话号码和约会时间吗？

datum.en: Each datum collected during the experiment was meticulously recorded for further analysis.
datum.zh: 实验中收集的每条数据都被仔细记录下来以供进一步分析。

daughter.en: Many parents encourage their daughter to pursue higher education in competitive fields.
daughter.zh: 许多父母鼓励他们的女儿在竞争激烈的领域接受高等教育。

dawn.en: The marathon race traditionally begins at dawn to avoid the scorching midday heat.
dawn.zh: 马拉松比赛传统上在黎明时分开始，以避免正午的酷热。

day off.en: I take a day off on Friday.

daylight.en: The children play outside in daylight.
daylight.zh: 孩子们在日光下到户外玩耍。

daytime.en: It is very hot during daytime.

dead.en: His grandfather has been dead for five years.
dead.zh: 他的祖父已经去世五年了。

deadline.en: Students must submit their research papers before the deadline to avoid penalties.
deadline.zh: 学生必须在截止日期前提交研究论文以避免处罚。

deadly.zh: 疟疾是一种致命的疾病。

cure.en: Although there is no definitive cure for the common cold, scientists continue to research effective treatments.
cure.zh: 虽然目前还没有治愈普通感冒的明确方法，但科学家们继续研究有效的治疗方法。

curiosity.en: Children show natural curiosity about the world.
curiosity.zh: 孩子们对世界表现出天生的好奇心。

curious.en: The child is always curious about new things.
curious.zh: 这个孩子总是对新鲜事物感到好奇。

curiously.en: Curiously, countries with abundant natural resources often face greater economic and political challenges.
curiously.zh: 令人好奇的是，拥有丰富自然资源的国家往往面临更大的经济和政治挑战。

currency.en: You can exchange currency at the bank.
currency.zh: 你可以在银行兑换货币。

current.en: The current situation is quite difficult.

currently.en: She currently works at a bank.

curse.en: In many developing nations, the curse of corruption has severely hindered sustainable economic development.
curse.zh: 在许多发展中国家，腐败的诅咒严重阻碍了可持续经济发展。

cut down.en: We must cut down trees to build.
cut down.zh: 我们必须砍倒树木来建造。

cut down on.en: Doctors recommend that patients cut down on their sugar intake to prevent health problems.
cut down on.zh: 医生建议患者减少糖分摄入以预防健康问题。

cuttings.en: She saved newspaper cuttings about the event.
cuttings.zh: 她保存了关于这件事的报纸剪报。

cyberspace.en: Many teenagers spend excessive hours exploring cyberspace without understanding its potential dangers.
cyberspace.zh: 许多青少年花大量时间探索网络空间，却不理解其潜在的危险。

cycle.en: I cycle to work every morning.
cycle.zh: 我每天早上骑自行车上班。

cycled.en: The participants cycled from London to Brighton to raise money for charity.
cycled.zh: 参与者从伦敦骑自行车到布莱顿，为慈善机构筹款。

cycles.en: Business cycles often follow predictable patterns of economic growth and recession.
cycles.zh: 商业周期往往遵循可预测的经济增长和衰退模式。

cyclic.en: Scientists study the cyclic nature of seasons to understand climate patterns better.
cyclic.zh: 科学家研究季节的循环性质，以便更好地理解气候模式。

cyclical.en: Economists analyse cyclical trends to predict future market conditions and advise investors.
cyclical.zh: 经济学家分析周期性趋势，以预测未来的市场状况并为投资者提供建议。

cycling.en: Cycling to work saves money and keeps me fit.
cycling.zh: 骑自行车上班省钱又健身。

dances.en: Her dances are graceful and beautiful.

dancing.en: She enjoys dancing in her free time.
dancing.zh: 她喜欢在空闲时间跳舞。

danger.en: There is danger in climbing alone.

dangerous.en: Playing near the road is dangerous.

daring.en: The firefighter made a daring rescue yesterday.
daring.zh: 那位消防员昨天进行了一次大胆的救援。

dark.en: Many people prefer to work in a dark room with soft lighting rather than in bright, fully illuminated office spaces.
dark.zh: 许多人更喜欢在光线昏暗的房间里工作，而不是在明亮的、完全照明的办公空间中。

darkness.en: The cat disappeared into the darkness.

data.zh: 数据显示出明显的趋势。

database.en: The company stores data in a database.
database.zh: 公司在数据库中存储数据。

cultivation.en: The cultivation of vegetables requires patience.

culturally.en: Some societies are culturally adapted to harsh climates, developing unique housing and clothing traditions accordingly.
culturally.zh: 一些社会在文化上已经适应了恶劣的气候，相应地发展出独特的住房和服装传统。

culture.zh: 中国文化吸引全世界的游客。

cultured.en: A truly cultured individual appreciates various forms of art, music and literature from different historical periods.
cultured.zh: 一个真正有文化修养的人会欣赏不同时期的各种艺术、音乐和文学形式。

cultures.en: Different cultures celebrate festivals in unique ways.
cultures.zh: 不同的文化以独特的方式庆祝节日。

cumulative.en: The cumulative effect of small daily habits can lead to significant improvements in overall health and academic performance over time.
cumulative.zh: 微小日常习惯的累积效应随着时间的推移会导致整体健康和学业表现的显著改善。

cup.en: The exhausted hiker gratefully accepted a cup of hot coffee from the lodge owner after the long trek.
cup.zh: 在长途跋涉后，疲惫的徒步旅行者感激地接受了旅舍老板递来的一杯热咖啡。

cupboard.en: I found the cups in the cupboard.
cupboard.zh: 我在碗橱里找到了杯子。

curable.en: Thanks to groundbreaking research, many previously incurable diseases are now curable with proper medical treatment.
curable.zh: 多亏了突破性的研究，许多以前无法治愈的疾病现在可以通过适当的医疗手段治愈。

cyclists.zh: 骑行者必须遵守交通规则。

cynical.en: After years of broken promises, many citizens have become cynical about the effectiveness of political reforms.
cynical.zh: 在多年承诺落空之后，许多公民对政治改革的有效性变得愤世嫉俗。

cytoplasm.en: The cytoplasm contains various organelles that perform essential functions necessary for cell survival and growth.
cytoplasm.zh: 细胞质包含各种执行细胞存活和生长所必需功能的重要细胞器。

daily.en: I read the news daily online.

dairy.en: She bought dairy products at the store.

daisy.en: She planted a beautiful white daisy.
daisy.zh: 她种了一朵漂亮的白色雏菊。

dam.en: The construction of a new dam will provide renewable hydroelectric power for thousands of households in the region.
dam.zh: 新大坝的建设将为该地区数千户家庭提供可再生的水力发电。

damage.en: The storm caused serious damage to crops.
damage.zh: 暴风雨对农作物造成严重损害。

damp.en: The basement felt cold and damp.

dams.en: The construction of large dams often generates significant controversy regarding their impact on local ecosystems and downstream water supplies.
dams.zh: 大型水坝的建设常常因其对当地生态系统和下游供水的影响而引发重大争议。

curtain.en: The heavy curtain fell slowly after the performance, signaling the end of the theatrical production.
curtain.zh: 演出结束后，厚重的幕布缓缓落下，标志着戏剧演出的结束。

curtains.en: She opened the curtains to let in sunlight.
curtains.zh: 她拉开窗帘让阳光进来。

curve.en: The curve of the bridge was carefully designed by engineers to withstand strong winds and earthquakes.
curve.zh: 桥梁的曲线是工程师精心设计的，以抵御强风和地震。

curved.en: The road has a curved path.

cushion.en: She sank into the comfortable cushion on the sofa and began reading her favorite novel.
cushion.zh: 她陷入沙发上舒适的坐垫中，开始阅读她最喜欢的小说。

custom.en: It is a long-standing custom in many cultures to celebrate the harvest season with traditional festivals.
custom.zh: 在许多文化中，庆祝丰收季节的传统节日是长期以来的习俗。

customer.en: Each customer received a small gift.
customer.zh: 每位顾客都收到了一份小礼物。

customers.en: The shop serves hundreds of customers daily.
customers.zh: 这家店每天服务数百名顾客。

customs.zh: 不同的文化有不同的习俗。

cut.en: We need to cut costs this year.
cut.zh: 我们今年需要削减成本。

deaf.en: Many deaf students face significant challenges in traditional educational environments that are not designed to accommodate their specific needs.
deaf.zh: 许多聋哑学生在传统教育环境中面临重大挑战，因为这些环境并非专为满足他们的特殊需求而设计。

deal.en: She knows how to deal with problems.

deal with.en: Students must learn to deal with pressure.
deal with.zh: 学生必须学会应对压力。

dealing.en: He is good at dealing with problems.

dean.en: The dean of the faculty announced new scholarship programs designed to attract more international students to the university.
dean.zh: 学院院长宣布了新的奖学金项目，旨在吸引更多国际学生来该校就读。

dear.en: The cost of housing in major metropolitan areas has become increasingly dear, pushing many young professionals to seek alternatives.
dear.zh: 主要大都市地区的住房成本变得越来越昂贵，促使许多年轻专业人士寻找其他选择。

death.en: The death rate has fallen over the years.
death.zh: 这些年来死亡率下降了。

debate.en: They will debate the new policy tomorrow.
debate.zh: 他们明天将辩论这项新政策。

defend.zh: 他们必须保卫自己的国家。

defendant.en: The defendant denied all charges and insisted that he was completely innocent of any wrongdoing in the case.
defendant.zh: 被告否认所有指控，坚称自己在案件中完全无罪。

defense.en: The government announced plans to strengthen its defense systems to protect the country from potential external threats.
defense.zh: 政府宣布计划加强防御系统，以保护国家免受潜在的外部威胁。

defer.en: Many students choose to defer their university enrollment for a year to gain valuable work experience first.
defer.zh: 许多学生选择推迟一年入学，以便首先获得宝贵的工作经验。

deficiency.en: The doctor explained that his ongoing health problems were caused by a serious nutritional deficiency in his diet.
deficiency.zh: 医生解释说，他持续的健康问题是由饮食中严重的营养缺乏引起的。

deficit.en: The company reported a large deficit.

definable.en: Although happiness may seem abstract, it can be broken down into clearly definable components such as satisfaction.
definable.zh: 虽然幸福看似抽象，但它可以分解为可明确定义的组成部分，如满足感。

define.en: Before starting any research project, it is essential to clearly define the objectives and scope of the study.
define.zh: 在开始任何研究项目之前，必须明确界定研究的目标和范围。

defined.en: The terms are clearly defined in the contract.
defined.zh: 合同中清楚地定义了这些条款。

defines.en: The ability to think critically and solve problems effectively defines a successful professional in any field.
defines.zh: 批判性思考和有效解决问题的能力是任何领域成功专业人士的标志。

debt.en: He is struggling to pay off his debt.

debtor.en: The debtor was required to attend court hearings to discuss a repayment plan after failing to meet loan obligations.
debtor.zh: 这名债务人在未能履行贷款义务后，被要求参加法庭听证会讨论还款计划。

debtors.en: Financial institutions often sell the outstanding debts of debtors to collection agencies at a significant discount.
debtors.zh: 金融机构经常以大幅折扣将债务人的未偿债务出售给催收机构。

debts.en: Managing multiple debts simultaneously requires careful budgeting and prioritization of high-interest financial obligations.
debts.zh: 同时管理多项债务需要仔细的预算规划和对高息债务的优先处理。

decade.en: He worked here for almost a decade.
decade.zh: 他在这里工作了近十年。

decades.zh: 这座城市几十年来发生了变化。

decay.en: Tooth decay remains one of the most prevalent health concerns among school-aged children worldwide.
decay.zh: 蛀牙仍然是全世界学龄儿童最普遍的健康问题之一。

deceit.en: The politician's deceit was exposed when journalists discovered he had lied about his academic qualifications.
deceit.zh: 当记者发现这位政客伪造了学历资格时，他的欺骗行为被曝光了。

deceive.en: Companies that deliberately deceive consumers about product quality may face severe legal penalties and reputation damage.
deceive.zh: 故意欺骗消费者产品质量的公司可能面临严厉的法律处罚和声誉损害。

decent.en: Access to decent housing and healthcare are fundamental rights that governments should guarantee for all citizens.
decent.zh: 获得体面的住房和医疗保健是各国政府应为所有公民保障的基本权利。

defining.en: The defining characteristic of modern cities is the rapid pace of daily life and constant connectivity.
defining.zh: 现代城市的定义性特征是日常生活和持续联系的快节奏。

definite.en: There is a definite link between regular exercise and improved mental health in adults.
definite.zh: 定期锻炼与成年人心理健康改善之间存在明确的联系。

definitely.en: This will definitely improve our results.
definitely.zh: 这肯定会改善我们的结果。

definitions.en: Different definitions of quality of life exist, ranging from economic indicators to subjective well-being.
definitions.zh: 生活质量有不同的定义，从经济指标到主观幸福感不等。

deforestation.zh: 采伐森林破坏世界各地的自然栖息地。

degradation.en: The degradation of soil is concerning.

degree.en: She earned a degree in biology.

dehydrate.en: Extreme heat can dehydrate the human body rapidly, leading to serious health complications if untreated.
dehydrate.zh: 极端高温会迅速导致人体脱水，如果不及时治疗会导致严重的健康问题。

declining.en: The company's profits are declining rapidly.
declining.zh: 公司的利润正在迅速下降。

decorate.en: We want to decorate the room.

decoration.en: The decoration made the room look brighter.
decoration.zh: 装饰让房间看起来更明亮。

decrease.en: The population continues to decrease slowly.

dedicate.en: Scientists who dedicate their lives to researching renewable energy sources deserve our utmost respect and support.
dedicate.zh: 那些毕生致力于研究可再生能源的科学家值得我们最高的尊重和支持。

dedicated.en: She is dedicated to improving her English skills.
dedicated.zh: 她专注于提高英语技能。

deduce.en: From the archaeological evidence, researchers can deduce that the civilization flourished during the third century BCE.
deduce.zh: 从考古证据中，研究人员可以推断出该文明在公元前三世纪繁荣发展。

deduced.en: The detective deduced the identity of the culprit after carefully analyzing the clues left at the crime scene.
deduced.zh: 侦探在仔细分析犯罪现场留下的线索后推断出了嫌疑人的身份。

deducted.en: The total cost was calculated after deducting all applicable taxes and administrative fees from the original price.
deducted.zh: 在从原价中扣除所有适用的税费和管理费后计算出了总成本。

deducting.en: The company is currently deducting a small percentage of employees' salaries for the workplace pension scheme.
deducting.zh: 公司目前正在从员工工资中扣除一小部分用于职场养老金计划。

delay.en: The project experienced a significant delay due to unexpected technical difficulties, which affected the overall timeline.
delay.zh: 由于意外的技术困难，该项目经历了严重的延误，影响了整体时间安排。

delegate.en: The manager decided to delegate some of her responsibilities to junior staff members to improve team efficiency.
delegate.zh: 经理决定将她的一些职责委托给初级员工，以提高团队效率。

delete.en: Students should delete irrelevant information from their essays to maintain clarity and focus on key arguments.
delete.zh: 学生应该删除论文中的无关信息，以保持清晰度并专注于关键论点。

deliberate.en: After careful and deliberate consideration, the committee reached a consensus on the proposed policy changes.
deliberate.zh: 经过仔细和审慎的考虑，委员会就拟议的政策变化达成了共识。

deliberately.en: She deliberately chose to skip the meeting.

delicate.en: Be careful with that delicate glass vase.
delicate.zh: 小心那个精致的玻璃花瓶。

delicious.en: This homemade cake is absolutely delicious.
delicious.zh: 这个自制蛋糕非常美味。

delight.en: The children's faces filled with pure delight when they opened their presents on Christmas morning.
delight.zh: 在圣诞早晨打开礼物时，孩子们的脸上充满了纯粹的喜悦。

delighted.en: The teacher was delighted with the student work.
delighted.zh: 老师对学生的作业感到高兴。

deliver.en: The company promised to deliver the package.

deliveries.en: Online deliveries arrive within two days.
deliveries.zh: 网购的货物两天内送达。

delivery.zh: 快速配送让网购顾客满意。

delve.en: We must delve deeper into this topic.
delve.zh: 我们必须更深入地探究这个话题。

demand.en: There is a consistently growing demand for sustainable renewable energy sources in many developing national economies today.
demand.zh: 如今在许多发展中的国家经济中，对可持续可再生能源的需求正在持续增长。

dementia.en: Dementia primarily affects elderly populations, though it can occasionally occur at younger ages.
dementia.zh: 痴呆症主要影响老年群体，虽然它偶尔也会发生在较年轻的人群中。

democracy.en: Democracy allows citizens to actively participate in decision-making through regular elections.
democracy.zh: 民主使公民能够通过定期选举积极参与决策过程。

democratic.en: Our country has a democratic government.

demographic.zh: 人口结构变化影响住房需求。

demonstrable.en: The benefits of regular exercise on mental health are demonstrable through extensive research.
demonstrable.zh: 定期锻炼对心理健康的益处已通过广泛研究得到证明。

deduction.en: The tax deduction allowed her to save a considerable amount of money during the annual financial assessment.
deduction.zh: 税务扣除让她在年度财务评估中节省了大量资金。

deductions.en: After all deductions were made from his monthly salary, his take-home pay was significantly reduced.
deductions.zh: 所有扣除项从他的月薪中扣除后，他的实际收入明显减少了。

deducts.en: The employer deducts a percentage of each employee's salary for national insurance contributions monthly.
deducts.zh: 雇主每月从每位员工的工资中扣除一定比例用于国家保险缴款。

deem.en: The university admissions committee may deem it necessary to request additional documents from applicants.
deem.zh: 大学招生委员会可能认为有必要向申请者要求提供补充材料。

deemed.en: His work was deemed excellent by the teacher.
deemed.zh: 他的作品被老师认为很优秀。

deep.en: The river is very deep here.

default.en: If borrowers default on their student loans, they risk damaging their credit ratings significantly.
default.zh: 如果借款人的学生贷款违约，他们的信用评分可能会受到严重损害。

defeat.en: The governing party suffered a devastating defeat in the local elections, losing numerous seats to the opposition.
defeat.zh: 执政党在地方选举中遭遇了毁灭性的失败，向反对党失去了大量席位。

defect.en: Despite the numerous defects discovered in the original design, the company decided to proceed with production.
defect.zh: 尽管在原始设计中发现了许多缺陷，公司仍决定继续生产。

defence.zh: 这个国家加强了防御能力。

deception.en: The advertisement turned out to be pure deception.
deception.zh: 这个广告原来是纯粹的欺骗。

decide.en: Many university graduates find it increasingly difficult to decide which career path to pursue after completing their studies.
decide.zh: 许多大学毕业生发现在完成学业后越来越难决定走哪条职业道路。

decide on.en: After extensive research and consultation, the planning committee finally decided on building the new hospital in the suburbs.
decide on.zh: 经过广泛研究和咨询后，规划委员会最终决定在郊区建造新医院。

decision.en: Making a decision was very difficult for her.
decision.zh: 做决定对她来说非常困难。

decisions.en: Good decisions lead to good outcomes.
decisions.zh: 好的决定带来好的结果。

decisive.en: The prime minister took decisive action to combat climate change by introducing stricter environmental regulations.
decisive.zh: 总理通过实施更严格的环境法规采取了果断行动来应对气候变化。

deck.en: The crew walked on the deck.

declare.en: The health ministry may declare a public health emergency if the infectious disease outbreak continues to spread rapidly.
declare.zh: 如果传染病爆发继续快速蔓延，卫生部可能会宣布公共卫生紧急状态。

declared.en: The president declared a national holiday.
declared.zh: 总统宣布了一个全国假日。

decline.en: There has been a significant decline in the number of students choosing to study humanities recently.
decline.zh: 最近选择学习人文学科的学生数量显著下降。

department.en: She works in the HR department.

department store.en: She works at a large department store.
department store.zh: 她在一家大型百货商店工作。

departmental.zh: 这次会议需要各部门代表参加。

departure.en: The departure was scheduled for noon.

depend.en: Children depend entirely on their parents for food, shelter, emotional support, and educational opportunities.
depend.zh: 孩子们完全依赖父母提供食物、住所、情感支持和教育机会。

depend on.en: Our success will depend on hard work.
depend on.zh: 我们的成功将取决于努力工作。

dependence.en: We must reduce our dependence on oil.
dependence.zh: 我们必须减少对石油的依赖。

dependent.en: Success is dependent on hard work.

dependent upon.en: The project is dependent upon funding.

dependents.en: When filing income tax returns, individuals must accurately declare all their dependents to receive proper deductions.
dependents.zh: 在申报所得税时，个人必须准确申报所有受抚养人以获得适当的扣除。

desert.en: Camels can survive in the desert easily.
desert.zh: 骆驼能轻易地在沙漠中生存。

desertification.en: Desertification caused by climate change has severely affected agricultural productivity in many developing countries.
desertification.zh: 气候变化导致的沙漠化严重影响了许多发展中国家的农业生产力。

deserve.en: All students who work hard and achieve good results deserve to be recognized and rewarded for their efforts.
deserve.zh: 所有努力学习并取得好成绩的学生都应该因其努力而得到认可和奖励。

design.en: The architect will design a modern building.
design.zh: 建筑师将设计一座现代化建筑。

designate.en: The government plans to designate certain coastal areas as protected marine reserves to preserve marine biodiversity.
designate.zh: 政府计划将某些沿海地区指定为海洋保护区，以保护海洋生物多样性。

designated.en: The city council has allocated specific funds for designated areas where new public parks will be constructed soon.
designated.zh: 市议会已为指定区域拨付专项资金，不久将在这些区域建设新的公共公园。

designed.en: The new shopping mall was designed with sustainable materials and energy-efficient systems to reduce environmental impact.
designed.zh: 新的购物中心采用可持续材料和节能系统设计，以减少对环境的影响。

designer.en: The designer created a beautiful dress.
designer.zh: 设计师创作了一件漂亮的裙子。

designers.en: The designers created a modern plan.
designers.zh: 设计师们制定了一个现代化方案。

designing.en: While designing sustainable buildings, architects must incorporate renewable energy sources and environmentally friendly construction methods.
designing.zh: 在设计可持续建筑时，建筑师必须整合可再生能源和环保的建筑方法。

denote.en: The different colours on the map denote various climate zones across the country.
denote.zh: 地图上不同的颜色表示该国不同的气候带。

dense.en: The forest is very dense here.

density.en: This area has high population density.
density.zh: 这个地区人口密度很高。

dental.en: Regular dental check-ups are essential for maintaining good oral health and preventing serious problems.
dental.zh: 定期牙科检查对于保持良好的口腔健康和预防严重问题至关重要。

dentist.en: I visited the dentist for a checkup.
dentist.zh: 我去牙科医生那里做检查。

dentist's.en: I have an appointment at the dentist's tomorrow.
dentist's.zh: 我明天在牙科医生诊疗所有个预约。

dentistry.en: Modern dentistry has evolved significantly, offering pain-free treatments that were unimaginable decades ago.
dentistry.zh: 现代牙科学已经发生了显著变化，提供着几十年前难以想象的无痛治疗。

deny.en: Some people deny the existence of climate change despite overwhelming scientific evidence.
deny.zh: 尽管有压倒性的科学证据，一些人仍然否认气候变化的存在。

depart.en: The train will depart from platform seven at exactly 3:30 PM, so please arrive early.
depart.zh: 火车将于下午3点30分准时从七号站台出发，请提前到达。

deriving.en: Many English words are derived from Latin and Greek roots, which can help students expand their vocabulary more efficiently.
deriving.zh: 许多英语单词源自拉丁语和希腊语词根，这可以帮助学生更高效地扩大词汇量。

dermatology.en: Advances in dermatology have led to innovative treatments for skin conditions that affect millions of people worldwide.
dermatology.zh: 皮肤学的进步已经带来了影响全球数百万人的皮肤病创新疗法。

descend.en: The ancient tribe believed their ancestors would descend from the mountains to bless the harvest each autumn.
descend.zh: 这个古老的部落相信他们的祖先会在每年秋天从山上降临，为丰收祈福。

descendants.en: The descendants still live in the old village.
descendants.zh: 后代们仍然住在老村子里。

descended.en: This family is descended from royalty.

descent.en: The plane began its descent to land.
descent.zh: 飞机开始下降准备着陆。

describe.en: When you describe your experience to others, try to use vivid language that captures the essence of the moment.
describe.zh: 当你向他人描述经历时，尝试使用生动的语言来捕捉当时的情景。

described.en: The teacher described the process clearly.
described.zh: 老师清楚地描述了这个过程。

description.en: Can you give a brief description?

descriptions.en: The descriptions in the book are vivid.

deregulated.en: In recent decades, many countries have deregulated their energy markets to encourage competition and reduce prices for consumers.
deregulated.zh: 近几十年来，许多国家已经放宽了对能源市场的管制，以鼓励竞争并降低消费者的价格。

deregulation.en: The deregulation of the banking sector led to increased innovation but also higher risks for investors and consumers.
deregulation.zh: 银行业的放松管制带来了更多创新，但也为投资者和消费者带来了更高的风险。

derivation.en: Understanding the mathematical derivation of this formula is essential for solving advanced engineering problems effectively.
derivation.zh: 理解这个公式的数学推导对于有效解决高级工程问题至关重要。

derivations.en: The mathematics textbook contains several detailed derivations that illustrate key principles and help students develop analytical skills.
derivations.zh: 这本数学教科书包含几个详细的推导过程，阐释了关键原理并帮助学生培养分析能力。

derivative.en: Many film critics argue that certain modern movies are merely derivative of classic Hollywood narratives and lack originality.
derivative.zh: 许多电影评论家认为，某些现代电影仅仅是好莱坞经典叙事的衍生作品，缺乏原创性。

derivatives.en: Financial derivatives can serve as valuable risk management tools when investors use them responsibly and with proper understanding.
derivatives.zh: 当投资者负责任地并且充分理解时，金融衍生品可以成为宝贵的风险管理工具。

derive.en: Academic reading requires students to develop skills that enable them to derive meaning from complex and challenging texts.
derive.zh: 学术阅读要求学生培养技能，使他们能够从复杂且具有挑战性的文本中获取意义。

derive from.en: Linguistic scholars have extensively documented how many English words derive from ancient Latin and Greek language roots.
derive from.zh: 语言学家已经广泛记录了许多英语单词源自古拉丁语和希腊语词根。

derived.en: The word is derived from Latin.

derives.en: Legal historians trace how much of the Western legal tradition derives from the sophisticated systems of Roman law.
derives.zh: 法律历史学家追溯西方法律传统中有多少源自罗马法的复杂体系。

depress.en: Rising unemployment rates tend to depress consumer confidence and subsequently slow down overall economic growth in the country.
depress.zh: 不断上升的失业率往往会打击消费者信心，并随后减缓该国的整体经济增长。

depressant.en: Alcohol is classified as a depressant that slows down the central nervous system and can impair judgment and coordination.
depressant.zh: 酒精被归类为一种抑制剂，会减缓中枢神经系统的活动，并可能损害判断力和协调能力。

depressed.en: She felt depressed after losing her job.

depression.en: Many people suffer from depression today.
depression.zh: 如今许多人遭受抑郁之苦。

deprivation.zh: 睡眠不足会影响学生的表现。

deprive.en: The new policy may deprive rural communities of essential healthcare services if hospitals are forced to close due to budget cuts.
deprive.zh: 如果医院因预算削减而被迫关闭，新政策可能会剥夺农村社区获得基本医疗服务的机会。

deprived.en: Children from deprived areas need support.
deprived.zh: 贫困地区的儿童需要支持。

depth.en: The pool has a depth of two meters.

depths.en: The divers explored the ocean depths.
depths.zh: 潜水员探索了海洋深处。

deputy.en: The deputy prime minister will address the parliament tomorrow while the prime minister attends the international summit in Geneva.
deputy.zh: 副总理明天将在议会发表讲话，而总理将在日内瓦出席国际峰会。

depending.en: The cost of living varies greatly depending on the city where individuals choose to reside permanently.
depending.zh: 生活成本差异很大，取决于个人选择永久居住的城市。

depict.en: The documentary aims to depict the daily challenges faced by elderly people living alone in modern society.
depict.zh: 这部纪录片旨在描绘现代社会独居老人所面临的日常挑战。

depicted.en: The photograph depicted a peaceful scene.
depicted.zh: 照片描绘了一个宁静的场景。

deplete.en: If governments do not implement effective conservation policies, we will deplete our natural resources much faster.
deplete.zh: 如果各国政府不实施有效的保护政策，我们将更快地耗尽自然资源。

depletion.en: The depletion of the ozone layer has led to increased UV radiation, posing significant health risks worldwide.
depletion.zh: 臭氧层的消耗导致紫外线辐射增加，对全球构成重大的健康风险。

deposit.en: I paid a deposit for the apartment.

deposited.en: The bank deposited the check yesterday.

deposits.en: Landlords require tenants to pay deposits before moving in.
deposits.zh: 房东要求租客在入住前支付押金。

demonstrably.en: The scientific study demonstrably proves that human activities significantly affect global weather patterns through increased emissions.
demonstrably.zh: 这项科学研究明显证明，人类活动通过增加排放显著影响全球天气模式。

demonstrate.en: Students were asked to demonstrate their critical thinking skills by analyzing complex case studies and presenting logical arguments.
demonstrate.zh: 学生们被要求通过分析复杂的案例研究并提出合乎逻辑的论点来展示他们的批判性思维能力。

demonstrated.en: The teacher demonstrated the method clearly.
demonstrated.zh: 老师清楚地演示了这个方法。

demonstrates.en: Emerging evidence demonstrates a clear correlation between excessive screen time and declining mental health among adolescents.
demonstrates.zh: 新出现的证据表明，过度使用屏幕设备与青少年心理健康下降之间存在明显的相关性。

demonstrating.en: The professor is demonstrating practical applications of economic theories by examining real-world market scenarios and case studies.
demonstrating.zh: 这位教授正在通过研究真实世界的市场情景和案例研究来展示经济理论的实际应用。

demonstration.en: The university organized a public demonstration to showcase cutting-edge research in renewable energy and sustainable technologies.
demonstration.zh: 这所大学组织了一场公开展示，展示可再生能源和可持续技术方面的前沿研究。

demonstrations.en: Large-scale demonstrations have become increasingly common as citizens express concerns about environmental and social policies.
demonstrations.zh: 随着公民对环境和社会政策表达担忧，大规模示威活动变得越来越普遍。

demonstrator.en: The demonstrator carefully explained the experimental procedure to ensure all participants understood the scientific methodology involved.
demonstrator.zh: 演示者仔细解释了实验程序，以确保所有参与者理解所涉及的科学方法。

demonstrators.en: The peaceful demonstrators gathered in the city center to raise public awareness about climate change and environmental protection.
demonstrators.zh: 和平示威者聚集在市中心，以提高公众对气候变化和环境保护的认识。

denial.en: Climate change denial remains a controversial stance that continues to hinder progress on implementing effective environmental policies.
denial.zh: 气候变化否认主义仍然是一种有争议的立场，继续阻碍有效环境政策的实施进程。

developed.en: The city developed quickly over ten years.
developed.zh: 城市在十年间快速发展。

developers.en: Software developers must prioritize user privacy when designing applications that collect personal data.
developers.zh: 软件开发人员在设计收集个人数据的应用程序时必须优先考虑用户隐私。

developing countries.en: Schools need help in developing countries.
developing countries.zh: 发展中国家的学校需要帮助。

development.en: The development of artificial intelligence has significantly transformed various industries worldwide.
development.zh: 人工智能的发展已经显著改变了全球各行各业。

developmental.en: The child reached an important developmental milestone.
developmental.zh: 这个孩子达到了一个重要的发育里程碑。

deviate.en: Students should not deviate from the established guidelines when writing their academic assignments.
deviate.zh: 学生在撰写学术作业时不应偏离已建立的指导方针。

device.en: The smartphone has become an indispensable communication device that connects people across the globe.
device.zh: 智能手机已经成为连接全球人民的不可或缺的通讯设备。

devices.en: Modern electronic devices make life more convenient.
devices.zh: 现代电子设备让生活更便利。

devise.en: Urban planners need to devise innovative solutions to address the growing problem of traffic congestion.
devise.zh: 城市规划者需要设计创新的解决方案来应对日益严重的交通拥堵问题。

devised.zh: 她想出了一个聪明的解决办法。

destroy.en: Pollution continues to destroy our environment.
destroy.zh: 污染继续破坏我们的环境。

destroyed.en: The fire destroyed the entire building.

destruction.en: The fire caused total destruction of the building.
destruction.zh: 这场火灾导致建筑物完全毁灭。

destructive.zh: 这场暴风雨极具破坏性。

detach.en: Living in urban areas often allows people to detach from nature and its seasonal cycles entirely.
detach.zh: 生活在城市地区通常让人们完全脱离自然及其季节循环。

detect.en: The test can detect early signs of disease.
detect.zh: 这种检测可以察觉疾病的早期症状。

detection.en: Early detection is important for treatment.
detection.zh: 早期探测对治疗很重要。

detector.en: Airport security detectors have become increasingly sophisticated in identifying potential threats and contraband.
detector.zh: 机场安检探测器在识别潜在威胁和违禁品方面变得越来越精密。

deter.en: High prices may deter young buyers.
deter.zh: 高价可能阻止年轻买家。

devote.en: Many students choose to devote their free time to learning new languages to improve their career prospects.
devote.zh: 许多学生选择把空闲时间用于学习新语言，以提高他们的职业前景。

devote to.en: She has devoted herself to environmental conservation for over two decades, working tirelessly on various projects.
devote to.zh: 她二十多年来一直致力于环境保护，不知疲倦地从事各种项目工作。

devoted.en: She is devoted to her work.

diabetes.en: He has diabetes and needs daily insulin.
diabetes.zh: 他患有糖尿病，需要每天注射胰岛素。

diagnose.en: Doctors can now diagnose certain conditions much earlier thanks to advanced medical imaging technology.
diagnose.zh: 由于先进的医学影像技术，医生现在能够更早地诊断出某些疾病。

diagnosed.en: The doctor diagnosed the patient with a serious illness.
diagnosed.zh: 医生诊断出这位病人患有严重疾病。

diagnosis.en: Early diagnosis of diseases saves lives.
diagnosis.zh: 疾病的早期诊断挽救生命。

diagnostic.en: The diagnostic tests revealed several issues with the patient's cardiovascular system that required immediate attention.
diagnostic.zh: 诊断测试揭示了患者心血管系统的几个需要立即处理的问题。

diagram.en: The teacher drew a clear diagram on the board to explain how the water cycle operates in nature.
diagram.zh: 老师在黑板上画了一个清晰的图表来解释自然界中水循环是如何运作的。

diagrams.en: The science textbook includes helpful diagrams.
diagrams.zh: 科学教材包含了有用的图表。

designs.en: She creates beautiful designs for clothes.
designs.zh: 她为服装设计漂亮的图案。

desirable.en: A good work-life balance is desirable.
desirable.zh: 良好的工作与生活平衡是值得拥有的。

desire.en: She has a strong desire to succeed.

desks.en: Students sit at their desks daily.
desks.zh: 学生们每天坐在书桌前。

despair.en: Do not despair when facing difficulties.

desperate.en: The team made a desperate effort.
desperate.zh: 团队做出了拼命的努力。

despite.en: Despite the heavy rain, the outdoor concert continued as planned, demonstrating the organizers' commitment to the audience.
despite.zh: 尽管下着大雨，户外音乐会仍按计划进行，表明了组织者对观众的承诺。

dessert.en: I always save room for dessert.

destination.en: We reached our destination at noon.
destination.zh: 我们中午到达了目的地。

destinations.zh: 这些目的地非常受欢迎。

detergent.en: Please add more detergent to the wash.
detergent.zh: 请在洗涤时多加些洗衣粉。

deteriorate.en: His health began to deteriorate quickly.
deteriorate.zh: 他的健康开始迅速恶化。

determination.en: Her determination helped her succeed in life.
determination.zh: 她的决心帮助她在生活中取得成功。

determine.en: We need to determine the exact cost.
determine.zh: 我们需要确定确切的成本。

determined.en: She is determined to finish on time.

detox.en: Medical professionals recommend a regular detox program to eliminate accumulated toxins from the body and improve overall health.
detox.zh: 医学专业人士建议进行定期排毒疗程，以清除体内积累的毒素并改善整体健康状况。

detrimental.en: Air pollution is detrimental to health.

devastating.en: The flood was devastating to the village.
devastating.zh: 洪水对村庄造成了毁灭性破坏。

devastation.en: The widespread devastation caused by the flood destroyed crops, infrastructure, and displaced numerous families from their homes.
devastation.zh: 洪水造成的大范围破坏摧毁了农作物和基础设施，并使许多家庭流离失所。

develop.en: Universities play a crucial role in helping students develop critical thinking skills essential for their future careers.
develop.zh: 大学在帮助学生培养对未来职业至关重要的批判性思维能力方面发挥着关键作用。

difficulty.en: Many students face difficulty understanding complex academic texts, which is why effective reading strategies are essential.
difficulty.zh: 许多学生在理解复杂的学术文章时面临困难，这就是为什么有效的阅读策略至关重要。

diffusion.en: The diffusion of new technologies has transformed how people communicate, work, and access information globally.
diffusion.zh: 新技术的传播已经改变了人们在全球范围内沟通、工作和获取信息的方式。

digest.en: Before the exam, students should digest all the key concepts covered in the course materials and lecture notes.
digest.zh: 在考试前，学生应该消化吸收课程材料和课堂笔记中涵盖的所有关键概念。

digestion.en: Proper digestion is essential for maintaining good health, which is why dietary habits deserve careful attention and study.
digestion.zh: 适当的消化对保持健康至关重要，这就是为什么饮食习惯值得认真关注和研究。

digestive.en: The digestive system plays a crucial role in breaking down food and absorbing nutrients necessary for human survival.
digestive.zh: 消化系统在分解食物和吸收人类生存所必需的营养方面起着至关重要的作用。

digging.en: They are digging a hole in the ground.
digging.zh: 他们正在地上挖一个洞。

digit.en: Each digit in a telephone number serves a specific function, and forgetting even one can prevent successful communication.
digit.zh: 电话号码中的每个数字都有特定功能，即使忘记一个也可能导致通讯失败。

dignity.en: The universal principle of human dignity suggests that every individual deserves respect regardless of their social status.
dignity.zh: 人类尊严的普遍原则表明，每个个人无论社会地位如何都应受到尊重。

dilemma.en: Faced with the dilemma of choosing between a stable job and pursuing further education, she ultimately decided to study abroad.
dilemma.zh: 面对在稳定工作和继续深造之间选择的困境，她最终决定出国学习。

died.en: The famous actor died last year.
died.zh: 这位著名演员去年去世了。

diesel.en: This truck runs on diesel fuel.

diet.en: Many people try to diet for health.
diet.zh: 许多人为了健康尝试节食。

differ.en: The two answers differ in several ways.
differ.zh: 这两个答案在几个方面不同。

difference.en: There is a significant difference between learning a language in a classroom setting and acquiring it through immersion in a foreign country.
difference.zh: 在课堂环境中学习语言与在外国通过沉浸式学习语言之间存在显著差异。

differences.zh: 我们必须尊重文化差异。

different.en: People from different cultural backgrounds often have varying perspectives on issues related to family values and social responsibilities.
different.zh: 来自不同文化背景的人往往对家庭价值观和社会责任相关问题有不同的看法。

differentiate.en: We must differentiate between facts and opinions.
differentiate.zh: 我们必须区分事实和观点。

difficulties.en: Many students face difficulties when adapting to a new educational system, especially if language barriers exist between them and their professors.
difficulties.zh: 许多学生在适应新的教育体系时面临困难，特别是当他们与教授之间存在语言障碍时。

dialect.en: She speaks a local dialect fluently.
dialect.zh: 她能流利地说当地方言。

dialogue.en: The film has interesting dialogue between characters.
dialogue.zh: 这部电影的角色对话很有趣。

diameter.en: Measure the diameter of the circle carefully.

diarrhea.en: Medical professionals advise international travelers to drink only bottled water to prevent diarrhea caused by contaminated food sources.
diarrhea.zh: 医疗专业人士建议国际旅行者只饮用瓶装水，以预防因受污染食物来源引起的腹泻。

dictate.en: We cannot dictate how people think.
dictate.zh: 我们不能支配人们的思想。

dictation.en: The teacher gave a dictation exercise.
dictation.zh: 老师进行了一次听写练习。

dictionaries.en: Students often use dictionaries to check new words.
dictionaries.zh: 学生经常使用字典来查阅新单词。

dictionary.en: She looked up the word in a dictionary.
dictionary.zh: 她在字典里查了这个词。

die.en: The flowers will die without enough water.
die.zh: 没有足够的水，花会枯萎。

dimension.en: The dimension of the environmental problem is far greater than most people realize, requiring immediate action.
dimension.zh: 环境问题的严重程度远比大多数人所认识的要大，需要立即采取行动。

dimensions.en: We measured the dimensions of the room.
dimensions.zh: 我们测量了房间的尺寸。

diminish.en: As economies develop, traditional farming practices gradually diminish in many rural communities.
diminish.zh: 随着经济的发展，传统农业实践在许多农村地区逐渐减少。

diminishing.zh: 他们的资源正在迅速减少。

dining.en: We are dining at a restaurant tonight.

dining hall.en: The university dining hall serves over three thousand meals daily to students and faculty members.
dining hall.zh: 大学食堂每天为学生和教职员工提供三千多份餐食。

dining room.en: We usually eat dinner in the dining room.
dining room.zh: 我们通常在餐厅吃晚饭。

dinner.en: I cooked dinner for my family.

dinosaurs.zh: 恐龙很久以前就灭绝了。

dioxide.en: Carbon dioxide levels are rising globally.
dioxide.zh: 全球二氧化碳水平正在上升。

disorient.en: The sudden change in weather during the trip could disorient travelers who are unfamiliar with the local climate conditions.
disorient.zh: 旅行期间天气的突然变化可能会让不熟悉当地气候条件的游客感到迷失方向。

disoriented.en: After the long-haul flight, many tourists felt disoriented and struggled to adjust to the new time zone.
disoriented.zh: 经过长途飞行后，许多游客感到迷失方向，难以适应新的时区。

disorienting.en: The lack of clear signage in the new shopping mall proved disorienting for first-time visitors.
disorienting.zh: 新购物中心的指示牌不清晰，对首次到访的顾客造成了方向迷失的困扰。

disparity.en: There remains a significant disparity in educational opportunities between urban and rural areas in developing countries.
disparity.zh: 发展中国家的城市和农村地区之间在教育机会方面仍然存在显著差距。

dispatch.en: The government promised to dispatch emergency relief supplies to the affected regions within 48 hours.
dispatch.zh: 政府承诺在48小时内向受灾地区运送紧急救援物资。

displace.en: The proposed highway construction project would displace hundreds of families from their ancestral homes.
displace.zh: 拟建的高速公路项目将使数百户家庭被迫离开他们的祖宅。

displaced.en: The flood displaced many families from homes.
displaced.zh: 洪水使许多家庭流离失所。

displacement.en: The displacement of the object was measured.

display.en: The museum will display ancient artifacts tomorrow.
display.zh: 博物馆明天将展示古代文物。

disability.en: The program supports people with physical disability.
disability.zh: 这个项目帮助身体有残疾的人。

disable.en: The malware was designed to disable the entire network system and steal sensitive information.
disable.zh: 这种恶意软件旨在破坏整个网络系统并窃取敏感信息。

disabled.en: The building has access for disabled people.
disabled.zh: 这栋建筑为残疾人提供通道。

disadvantage.en: One disadvantage of living alone is the cost.
disadvantage.zh: 独自生活的其中一个劣势是费用。

disadvantages.en: There are many disadvantages to working at night.
disadvantages.zh: 夜间工作有很多不利因素。

disagree.en: They often disagree about important decisions.
disagree.zh: 他们经常在重要决定上意见不一致。

disagreement.en: There was some disagreement among team members.
disagreement.zh: 团队成员之间存在一些分歧。

disappear.en: The snow will disappear when spring arrives.

disappearance.en: The disappearance was sudden and unexplained.
disappearance.zh: 消失是突然且无法解释的。

disappoint.en: I hope this new policy will not disappoint citizens who expect the government to address environmental concerns more effectively.
disappoint.zh: 我希望这项新政策不会让那些期望政府更有效解决环境问题的公民失望。

disappointed.en: She felt disappointed after failing the exam.
disappointed.zh: 她考试不及格后感到失望。

disappointing.zh: 他的考试成绩令人失望。

disaster.en: The earthquake was a major disaster for the region.
disaster.zh: 地震对该地区来说是一场重大灾难。

disastrous.en: The disastrous earthquake destroyed many buildings.
disastrous.zh: 那场灾难性的地震摧毁了许多建筑。

discard.en: Consumers are strongly encouraged to discard old electronic devices at designated recycling points to prevent environmental pollution.
discard.zh: 强烈鼓励消费者将废旧电子设备送到指定的回收点，以防止环境污染。

discern.en: It can be difficult for young people to discern fact from fiction when browsing through various sources of information online.
discern.zh: 年轻人在浏览各种网络信息来源时，很难辨别事实与虚构之间的区别。

discharge.en: The battery will discharge if left unused.

discipline.en: Students must learn discipline in school.
discipline.zh: 学生必须在学校学会自律。

disclose.en: The company was reluctant to disclose its annual revenue figures to the public during the press conference.
disclose.zh: 这家公司在新闻发布会上不愿向公众披露其年度收入数据。

discount.en: The store offers a discount on Tuesdays.

discourse.en: The discourse on sustainable development has gained considerable momentum in academic circles over recent years.
discourse.zh: 近年来，可持续发展的话题在学术界获得了相当大的关注。

discover.en: Students discover new ideas every day.
discover.zh: 学生们每天发现新想法。

discovery.zh: 这个发现改变了科学思维。

discreet.en: The ambassador handled the sensitive diplomatic negotiations in a discreet manner to avoid unnecessary controversy.
discreet.zh: 大使以谨慎的方式处理敏感的外交谈判，以避免不必要的争议。

discrepancy.en: There is a significant discrepancy between the statistical data provided by the two government agencies.
discrepancy.zh: 两个政府机构提供的统计数据之间存在显著差异。

discrete.en: The research project was divided into three discrete phases, each focusing on a distinct aspect of the phenomenon.
discrete.zh: 这个研究项目被分为三个独立的阶段，每个阶段专注于这一现象的不同方面。

diploma.en: After completing her university diploma in environmental science, she was able to secure a position at a research institute.
diploma.zh: 完成环境科学大学文凭后，她能够在一家研究机构获得职位。

diplomatic.en: Using diplomatic skills is essential when negotiating business contracts with international partners from different cultural backgrounds.
diplomatic.zh: 在使用不同文化背景的国际合作伙伴协商业务合同时，外交技巧至关重要。

dipping.en: The recent economic report indicates that consumer confidence has been dipping consistently over the past three months.
dipping.zh: 最近的经济报告显示，消费者信心在过去三个月持续下降。

direct.en: The professor encouraged students to ask direct questions during lectures rather than speaking in vague or indirect terms.
