direct.zh: 教授鼓励学生在讲座中提出直接的问题，而不是含糊或间接地表达。

direct flight.en: Taking a direct flight from London to Sydney saves approximately four hours compared to connecting flights with layovers.
direct flight.zh: 从伦敦直飞悉尼比中途转机航班节省大约四个小时。

direct line.en: Call me on the direct line.

directions.en: I need clear directions to the station.
directions.zh: 我需要去车站的清晰方向。

directly.en: The new rule directly affects all employees.
directly.zh: 新规定直接影响所有员工。

director.en: The director of studies approved the plan.
director.zh: 系主任批准了这个计划。

discriminate.en: The law makes it illegal to discriminate against anyone based on their age, gender, or ethnic background in the workplace.
discriminate.zh: 法律明确规定，在工作场所基于年龄、性别或种族背景歧视任何人是违法的。

discrimination.en: Despite significant legal advances, racial discrimination continues to pose serious challenges in many societies around the world.
discrimination.zh: 尽管法律取得了重大进展，种族歧视仍在世界各地继续构成严峻挑战。

discs.en: The doctor examined his spinal discs.
discs.zh: 医生检查了他的脊椎间盘。

discuss.zh: 让我们讨论这个重要问题。

discussed.en: The team discussed the project plan today.
discussed.zh: 团队今天讨论了项目计划。

discussion.en: We had a long discussion about the project.
discussion.zh: 我们就这个项目进行了长时间讨论。

disease.en: The disease spread quickly across the country.
disease.zh: 这种疾病迅速蔓延到全国。

diseases.zh: 许多疾病是可以预防的。

disestablish.en: Some political activists argue that the time has come to disestablish the church from its traditional role in education.
disestablish.zh: 一些政治活动家认为，教会从其在教育领域的传统角色中脱离出来的时机已经成熟。

disgrace.en: The financial scandal brought disgrace upon the company's reputation and resulted in the resignation of several senior executives.
disgrace.zh: 这起财务丑闻给公司的声誉带来了耻辱，并导致几位高管辞职。

disguise.en: Many species of insects use camouflage to disguise themselves as leaves or branches to avoid predators.
disguise.zh: 许多昆虫种类使用伪装将自己伪装成树叶或树枝，以躲避捕食者。

disgust.en: He looked at the food with disgust.

dish.en: The famous chef prepared a traditional regional dish that showcased the unique culinary heritage of the area.
dish.zh: 这位著名厨师准备了一道展示该地区独特烹饪遗产的传统菜肴。

dishes.en: I will wash the dishes after dinner.

dishwasher.en: She loaded the dirty dishes into the dishwasher.
dishwasher.zh: 她把脏盘子放进洗碗机里。

disinfect.en: Nurses must disinfect the medical equipment.
disinfect.zh: 护士必须给医疗设备消毒。

dismiss.en: The committee chose to dismiss the proposal without further discussion, citing budget constraints.
dismiss.zh: 委员会以预算限制为由选择不理会该提案，不再进一步讨论。

dismissal.en: Employees who feel their dismissal was unjust may choose to pursue legal action against their former employer.
dismissal.zh: 认为被解雇不公平的员工可能会选择对前雇主提起法律诉讼。

disorder.en: The room was in complete disorder.

diverted.en: Traffic was diverted due to road construction.
diverted.zh: 由于道路施工，交通被转移。

divided.en: The class was divided into two groups.

divine.en: Many ancient civilizations believed that natural disasters were signs of divine intervention.
divine.zh: 许多古代文明认为自然灾害是神圣干预的征兆。

diving.en: The students are diving into the pool.

division.en: The sales division hired two new workers.
division.zh: 销售部门雇佣了两名新员工。

divorce.en: They decided to divorce after ten years of marriage.
divorce.zh: 他们结婚十年后决定离婚。

dizzy.en: After running for thirty minutes without stopping, I felt dizzy and had to sit down immediately.
dizzy.zh: 连续跑了三十分钟后，我感到头晕目眩，不得不立刻坐下来。

dna.en: DNA evidence helped solve the crime.

do something about.en: We must do something about this.
do something about.zh: 我们必须对此采取措施。

dispute.en: The legal dispute between the two companies was finally resolved through arbitration rather than litigation.
dispute.zh: 两家公司之间的法律争端最终通过仲裁而非诉讼得到解决。

disputes.en: Land disputes often occur between neighbors.
disputes.zh: 邻居之间经常发生土地纠纷。

disregard.en: Do not disregard the safety rules.

disrupt.en: Technological innovations can disrupt established industries and force companies to adapt their business models.
disrupt.zh: 技术创新可能扰乱成熟的行业，并迫使企业调整其商业模式。

disrupted.en: The storm disrupted our flight schedule.
disrupted.zh: 暴风雨打乱了我们的航班时刻表。

disruption.en: The noise caused disruption to work.

dissertation.en: She is writing her university dissertation now.
dissertation.zh: 她现在正在写大学毕业论文。

dissimilar.en: Although the two cities are geographically close, they are culturally dissimilar in many fascinating ways.
dissimilar.zh: 尽管这两个城市地理位置相近，但在许多迷人的方面文化差异很大。

dissolve.en: The sugar will dissolve completely in the hot water within a few minutes if you stir it regularly.
dissolve.zh: 如果你定期搅拌，糖会在几分钟内在热水中完全溶解。

dissolved.en: The sugar dissolved completely in water.

dog.en: The dog waits patiently by the door.

dolphins.en: Research has shown that dolphins possess remarkable intelligence and are capable of complex social interactions.
dolphins.zh: 研究表明，海豚具有非凡的智慧，能够进行复杂的社会互动。

domestic.en: Domestic flights are cheaper than international ones.
domestic.zh: 国内航班比国际航班便宜。

domesticated.en: Cats were domesticated thousands of years ago.
domesticated.zh: 猫在几千年前就被驯化了。

dominance.zh: 这家公司获得了市场支配地位。

dominant.en: English is the dominant language here.
dominant.zh: 英语是这里的主要语言。

dominate.en: Large multinational corporations tend to dominate global markets, making it difficult for small businesses to compete effectively.
dominate.zh: 大型跨国公司往往主导全球市场，使小企业难以有效竞争。

dominated.en: The market was dominated by a few large companies controlling most of the supply chain.
dominated.zh: 市场被几家控制大部分供应链的大公司所主导。

distortions.zh: 镜子产生了滑稽的扭曲影像。

distraction.en: The noise was a major distraction during the exam.
distraction.zh: 考试期间噪音是一个主要的干扰因素。

distress.en: The news caused her great distress.
distress.zh: 这个消息让她非常忧虑。

distributed.en: Resources should be distributed equally among all regions to ensure fair development and social stability nationwide.
distributed.zh: 资源应在所有地区之间平等分配，以确保全国范围内的公平发展和社会稳定。

distributes.en: The government distributes educational resources to schools based on student enrollment numbers and regional needs.
distributes.zh: 政府根据学生入学人数和地区需求向学校分配教育资源。

distributing.en: The international charity is distributing food packages and medical supplies to communities affected by the earthquake.
distributing.zh: 这个国际慈善机构正在向受地震影响的社区分发食物包和医疗用品。

distribution.en: The distribution of food took all morning.
distribution.zh: 分发食物花了整个上午。

distributions.en: Statistical analyses often compare different distributions of data to identify patterns and draw meaningful conclusions.
distributions.zh: 统计分析经常比较不同的数据分布以识别模式并得出有意义的结论。

distributive.en: Some economists argue that a distributive approach to taxation could help reduce income inequality in society.
distributive.zh: 一些经济学家认为，累进税制的方法可以帮助减少社会中的收入不平等。

doctor.en: The doctor checked my temperature today.
doctor.zh: 医生今天检查了我的体温。

doctorate.en: A doctorate degree can significantly enhance one's career prospects in academic and research-oriented positions.
doctorate.zh: 博士学位可以显著提升个人在学术和研究导向职位上的职业前景。

doctors.zh: 许多医生建议定期运动。

doctrine.en: The new educational doctrine places greater emphasis on practical skills development rather than theoretical knowledge alone.
doctrine.zh: 新的教育学说更加重视实践技能的培养，而不是仅仅关注理论知识。

documentary.zh: 他们看了一部自然纪录片。

documentation.en: Proper documentation of all experimental procedures is essential for ensuring the reproducibility of scientific research.
documentation.zh: 对所有实验程序进行适当的记录对于确保科学研究的可重复性至关重要。

documenting.en: The researcher is documenting the local traditions.
documenting.zh: 研究员正在记录当地传统。

documents.en: International students are required to submit all necessary documents before the application deadline for university admission.
documents.zh: 国际学生必须在大学入学申请截止日期前提交所有必要的文件。

distance.en: The school is a short distance from here.

distant.zh: 我远方的表亲住在国外。

distill.en: Writers often distill complex ideas into simple, accessible language for their readers.
distill.zh: 作家们经常将复杂的观点提炼成简单易懂的语言供读者阅读。

distinct.en: These two species have distinct characteristics.
distinct.zh: 这两个物种有明显的特征。

distinction.en: There is no distinction between them.

distinctive.en: The restaurant has a distinctive style.
distinctive.zh: 这家餐厅有独特的风格。

distinctly.en: The speaker distinctly emphasized the importance of cultural sensitivity in international business negotiations.
distinctly.zh: 演讲者清楚地强调了国际商务谈判中文化敏感性的重要性。

distinguish.en: Can you distinguish fact from opinion?
distinguish.zh: 你能区分事实和观点吗？

distort.en: Social media can distort public perception by presenting only partial information about current events.
distort.zh: 社交媒体可以通过只呈现当前事件的片面信息来扭曲公众的认知。

distortion.en: The photo shows clear distortion of images.
distortion.zh: 照片显示出明显的图像失真。

displayed.en: The chart displayed a clear upward trend in global temperatures over the past century, illustrating environmental concerns.
displayed.zh: 图表显示了上个世纪全球温度的明显上升趋势，阐明了环境问题。

displaying.en: The museum is displaying rare ancient artifacts from the Ming Dynasty, providing visitors with a unique cultural experience.
displaying.zh: 博物馆正在展出明朝的稀有文物，为游客提供独特的文化体验。

displays.en: The advertisement displays the product's key features and benefits clearly to attract potential customers.
displays.zh: 广告清楚地展示产品的关键特性和优势，以吸引潜在客户。

disposal.en: Proper waste disposal protects the environment.
disposal.zh: 适当的废物处理保护环境。

dispose.en: Local authorities must dispose of industrial waste responsibly to minimize environmental pollution and protect public health.
dispose.zh: 地方当局必须负责任地处理工业废物，以减少环境污染并保护公众健康。

dispose of.en: Residents are encouraged to dispose of recyclable materials in separate bins to promote sustainable waste management practices.
dispose of.zh: 鼓励居民将可回收材料放入不同的垃圾箱，以促进可持续的废物管理实践。

disposed.en: They disposed of the old furniture.

disproportion.en: There is a disproportion between the number of qualified applicants and the limited number of available job positions.
disproportion.zh: 合格的申请者数量与有限的就业机会之间存在不成比例的现象。

disproportionate.en: Some argue that wealthy nations bear a disproportionate burden in addressing global climate change challenges.
disproportionate.zh: 一些人认为富裕国家在应对全球气候变化挑战方面承担了不成比例的负担。

disproportionately.en: Lower-income families are disproportionately affected by rising housing costs in major metropolitan areas worldwide.
disproportionately.zh: 低收入家庭受到全球主要城市房价上涨的不成比例影响。

distributor.en: The company appointed a new distributor to expand its market reach in Southeast Asian countries.
distributor.zh: 该公司任命了一家新的分销商，以扩大其在东南亚国家的市场份额。

distributors.en: Several local distributors were invited to participate in the product launch event last month.
distributors.zh: 上个月，几家当地分销商受邀参加了产品发布会。

district.en: Our school is in the central district.

disturb.en: Please do not disturb the speaker unless you have a genuine question about the research findings.
disturb.zh: 请不要打扰演讲者，除非您对研究结果有真正的问题。

disturbance.en: The noise disturbance from the construction site has significantly affected residents' quality of life.
disturbance.zh: 建筑工地传来的噪音干扰严重影响了居民的生活质量。

disturbing.en: The news report was very disturbing.
disturbing.zh: 这则新闻报道令人非常不安。

diver.zh: 潜水员在水下发现了宝藏。

diversity.en: The city has great cultural diversity.
diversity.zh: 这座城市有丰富的文化多样性。

divert.en: The government decided to divert traffic away from the city centre to reduce air pollution levels.
divert.zh: 政府决定将交通从市中心引开，以降低空气污染水平。

drama.en: We watched a drama on television.
drama.zh: 我们在电视上看了一部戏剧。

dramatic.en: There was a dramatic change in sales.

dramatically.en: The population of rural areas has declined dramatically over the past fifty years due to urbanization and economic migration.
dramatically.zh: 由于城市化和经济迁移，农村地区人口在过去五十年里急剧下降。

draw.en: Please draw a line on the paper.

draw on.en: Writers often draw on personal experiences.
draw on.zh: 作家经常利用个人经历。

drawback.en: The main drawback is the cost.

drawbacks.en: There are several drawbacks to this plan.

drawer.en: I keep all my important documents organized in the top drawer of my desk for easy access whenever needed.
drawer.zh: 我把所有重要文件整理好放在书桌最上层的抽屉里，以便随时需要时方便取用。

drawings.en: The architect's drawings show the building design.
drawings.zh: 建筑师的图纸展示了建筑设计方案。

drugs.en: Some drugs can be harmful to your health.
drugs.zh: 有些药物可能对你的健康有害。

drugstore.en: I stopped by the drugstore on my way to work to pick up some essential medication and toiletries.
drugstore.zh: 我在上班途中顺路去了药店，买了一些必要的药物和洗漱用品。

drummer.zh: 这位鼓手保持完美的节奏。

drums.en: I play drums in the school band.

drunk.en: He was drunk after the party.

dry.en: The clothes are dry after one hour.

dual.en: The university offers dual degree programs that allow students to earn qualifications in two fields simultaneously.
dual.zh: 这所大学提供双学位项目，允许学生同时获得两个领域的资格证书。

dub.en: The studio decided to dub the English movie into Mandarin so that local audiences could fully enjoy the story.
dub.zh: 制片公司决定将这部英语电影配音成普通话，以便当地观众能够充分欣赏这个故事。

dubbed.en: The town was dubbed 'The Old Port'.
dubbed.zh: 这个城镇被称作'老港口'。

duck.en: A duck crossed the road slowly.
duck.zh: 一只鸭子慢慢穿过马路。

doorbell.en: The doorbell rang while I was cooking.

doors.en: Please close the doors when you leave.

dopamine.en: Exercise increases dopamine in the brain.
dopamine.zh: 锻炼会增加大脑中的多巴胺。

dormitory.en: Living in a dormitory during my first year helped me develop lasting friendships and adapt quickly to university life.
dormitory.zh: 大学第一年住在宿舍帮助我建立了持久的友谊，并使我能够迅速适应大学生活。

dosage.en: Always follow the doctor's dosage instructions carefully.
dosage.zh: 始终严格遵守医生的剂量指示。

dot.en: There is a red dot on the paper.

double.en: The price may double next year.

doubt.en: I doubt that he will come today.

download.en: I need to download the file first.
download.zh: 我需要先下载这个文件。

downstairs.en: My office is downstairs in the basement.
downstairs.zh: 我的办公室在楼下的地下室。

downtown.zh: 那家新店在市中心开业了。

downward.en: The ball rolled downward on the hill.

dozens.en: She has received dozens of job offers.
dozens.zh: 她收到了很多份工作邀请。

drag.en: The heavy traffic in the morning can significantly drag on commuters' productivity and increase their overall stress levels.
drag.zh: 早上拥挤的交通会严重影响上班族的效率，并增加他们的整体压力水平。

dragged.en: The car was dragged slowly along the road.
dragged.zh: 这辆车被缓慢地拖在路上。

drain.en: Drain the water from the sink.

drained.en: The swimming pool was drained for cleaning.
drained.zh: 游泳池被抽干进行清洗。

dominates.en: In many developing countries, multinational corporations dominate the local markets, often leaving small businesses struggling to compete effectively for customers.
dominates.zh: 在许多发展中国家，跨国公司主导当地市场，常常使小企业难以有效地与顾客竞争。

dominating.en: The dominating influence of social media on young people has raised concerns among parents and educators about its long-term effects on mental health.
dominating.zh: 社交媒体对年轻人的主导影响已引起家长和教育工作者对其长期心理健康影响的担忧。

domination.en: Some historians argue that the domination of Western media globally perpetuates cultural stereotypes and undermines the diversity of local traditions.
domination.zh: 一些历史学家认为，西方媒体在全球的主导地位延续了文化刻板印象，并破坏了当地传统的多样性。

donate.en: Many people donate clothes to charity.
donate.zh: 很多人向慈善机构捐赠衣服。

donations.en: The charity received many donations last month.
donations.zh: 慈善机构上个月收到了很多捐款。

donors.en: The hospital thanked all the donors.
donors.zh: 医院感谢所有的捐献者。

doom.en: Environmental scientists predict that continued deforestation will spell doom for countless species that depend on forest ecosystems for survival.
doom.zh: 环境科学家预测，持续的森林砍伐将给无数依赖森林生态系统生存的物种带来毁灭。

doomed.en: Traditional print newspapers are increasingly doomed to fail as younger generations prefer getting their news from online sources and social media platforms.
doomed.zh: 随着年轻一代更倾向于从网络资源和社交媒体平台获取新闻，传统印刷报纸注定要失败。

door.en: Please close the door on your way out.

door-to-door.en: Many companies offer door-to-door service now.
door-to-door.zh: 许多公司现在提供送货上门服务。

driving licence.en: You must carry your driving licence when driving.
driving licence.zh: 开车时必须携带驾驶执照。

drone.en: The farmer uses a drone to spray crops.
drone.zh: 农民使用无人机喷洒农作物。

drop-off.en: There was a drop-off in sales last month.
drop-off.zh: 上个月销售额出现了急剧下降。

dropout.en: Comprehensive research suggests that early intervention programs can significantly reduce school dropout rates among disadvantaged youth populations.
dropout.zh: 综合研究表明，早期干预项目可以显著降低弱势青年群体中的辍学率。

dropped.en: The temperature dropped significantly last night.

dropping.en: The leaves are dropping from the trees.

drown.en: Young children should be taught essential water safety skills at an early age to prevent dangerous drowning incidents around swimming pools.
drown.zh: 应该从小就教幼儿基本的水上安全技能，以防止在游泳池周围发生危险的溺水事件。

drug.en: The innovative development of targeted new drugs has significantly improved survival rates for cancer patients, offering renewed hope for recovery.
drug.zh: 靶向新药的创新研发显著提高了癌症患者的存活率，为康复带来了新的希望。

ducks.en: Many ducks swim in the lake every morning.
ducks.zh: 每天早晨许多鸭子在湖里游泳。

due to.en: The game was cancelled due to heavy rain.

dug.en: The dog dug a hole in the garden.
dug.zh: 狗在花园里挖了一个洞。

dull.en: The lecture on economic theory was so dull that several students fell asleep before it ended.
dull.zh: 关于经济理论的讲座非常枯燥，以至于几位学生在结束前就睡着了。

dumb.en: Despite appearing dumb at first glance, the documentary revealed how intelligent these creatures truly are.
dumb.zh: 尽管乍一看似乎很迟钝，但这部纪录片展示了这些动物实际上有多么聪明。

dump.en: Please dump the trash in the bin.

durable.en: This backpack is very durable and lasts for years.
durable.zh: 这个背包很耐用，能用很多年。

duration.en: The course duration is three months.
duration.zh: 这门课程的持续时间是三个月。

during.en: During the summer months, many cities experience increased tourist activity and higher accommodation costs.
during.zh: 在夏季期间，许多城市会经历游客活动增加和住宿费用上涨的情况。

dream.en: I dream of becoming a doctor.

dress.en: Dress quickly before the meeting starts.
dress.zh: 会议开始前快点穿衣服。

dried.en: I bought some dried fruit for snack.
dried.zh: 我买了一些干果作为零食。

drift.en: Leaves drift slowly across the calm lake.
drift.zh: 树叶缓缓飘过平静的湖面。

drilled.en: Workers drilled holes for the new fence.

drink.en: Health experts recommend that people drink at least eight glasses of water daily to maintain proper hydration and bodily functions.
drink.zh: 健康专家建议人们每天至少喝八杯水，以保持适当的水分和身体机能。

drinking water.en: Everyone needs access to clean drinking water.
drinking water.zh: 每个人都需要获得干净的饮用水。

drinks.en: Soft drinks and sugary beverages have been linked to increasing rates of obesity and related health problems among children.
drinks.zh: 软饮料和含糖饮料与儿童肥胖和相关健康问题的增加有关。

driven.en: She is a driven student who studies late.
driven.zh: 她是一个发愤图强的学生，学习到很晚。

driver.en: The bus driver was very friendly today.
driver.zh: 今天公交车司机非常友好。

ego.en: Some psychologists argue that excessive ego can prevent individuals from accepting constructive criticism and improving themselves.
ego.zh: 一些心理学家认为，过度的自我会导致个人无法接受建设性的批评和自我提升。

eighty.en: My grandmother is nearly eighty years old.

either.en: You can choose either option for this task.
either.zh: 你可以为这个任务选择任一选项。

either...or.en: Candidates for this position must demonstrate either extensive work experience or relevant academic qualifications.
either...or.zh: 该职位的候选人必须展示丰富的工作经验或相关的学术资格。

eject.en: Modern aircraft are equipped with advanced systems that can automatically eject passengers in case of critical emergencies.
eject.zh: 现代飞机配备了先进的系统，在紧急情况下可以自动弹出乘客。

el nino.en: El Nino weather patterns have significantly disrupted agricultural production in several developing countries this year.
el nino.zh: 厄尔尼诺天气模式今年严重扰乱了几个发展中国家的农业生产。

elaborate.en: The wedding featured an elaborate decoration scheme.
elaborate.zh: 婚礼采用了精心设计的装饰方案。

elapse.en: Several decades will elapse before the full environmental impact of current industrial practices becomes evident.
elapse.zh: 需要几十年时间才能显现当前工业实践的完整环境影响。

elastic.en: Modern employment contracts often include elastic clauses that allow companies to adjust working hours based on demand.
elastic.zh: 现代雇佣合同通常包含弹性条款，允许公司根据需求调整工作时间。

eating.zh: 健康饮食提高你的精力。

echo.en: The politician's speech seemed to echo the concerns of ordinary working families.
echo.zh: 这位政治家的演讲似乎呼应了普通工薪家庭的担忧。

echoes.en: The echoes in the cave were loud.

eclipse.en: The sudden financial crisis caused an eclipse of consumer confidence in the market.
eclipse.zh: 突如其来的金融危机导致市场消费者信心大幅下降。

ecological.en: The ecological system is very balanced.
ecological.zh: 这个生态系统非常平衡。

ecologist.en: The ecologist studies the relationship between animals and plants.
ecologist.zh: 这位生态学家研究动植物之间的关系。

economical.en: Electric vehicles are becoming a more economical choice as traditional fuel prices continue to rise.
economical.zh: 随着传统燃料价格持续上涨，电动汽车正成为一种更经济的选择。

economically.en: Many rural communities are struggling economically due to the lack of sustainable employment opportunities.
economically.zh: 由于缺乏可持续的就业机会，许多农村社区正面临经济困难。

economics.en: She studies economics at the university.

economies.en: Developing economies often face challenges such as inadequate infrastructure and limited access to quality education.
economies.zh: 发展中经济体经常面临基础设施不足和优质教育机会有限等挑战。

economist.zh: 经济学家预测了市场增长。

economists.en: Many economists believe that international trade agreements benefit all participating nations in the long term.
economists.zh: 许多经济学家认为，国际贸易协定从长远来看会使所有参与国受益。

economy class.en: Although economy class seats offer less legroom and narrower seats, many travelers prefer them for the affordable prices.
economy class.zh: 虽然经济舱座位提供的腿部空间和座位宽度较小，但许多旅客因其价格实惠而更喜欢它们。

ecosystem.en: The forest ecosystem supports many species.
ecosystem.zh: 森林生态系统支持许多物种。

ecosystems.zh: 自然生态系统保护生物多样性。

ecstasy.en: While the word ecstasy can describe a state of intense happiness, it is unfortunately also associated with illegal drugs.
ecstasy.zh: 虽然ecstasy一词可以描述极度快乐的状态，但不幸的是它也与非法毒品有关。

edge.en: Our product has an edge over competitors.
edge.zh: 我们的产品比竞争对手有优势。

effectively.en: She manages the team very effectively.

effectiveness.en: We tested the effectiveness of the new method.
effectiveness.zh: 我们测试了新方法的有效性。

effects.en: The medicine has few side effects.
effects.zh: 这种药几乎没有副作用。

efficient.en: She is very efficient at her job.

efficiently.en: Modern cities must learn to manage their resources efficiently to accommodate rapidly growing urban populations.
efficiently.zh: 现代城市必须学会高效管理资源，以容纳快速增长的城市人口。

effort.en: More effort is needed to succeed.

egg.en: Would you like an egg for breakfast?
egg.zh: 你早餐想要一个鸡蛋吗？

eggs.en: The recipe needs two fresh eggs.
eggs.zh: 这个食谱需要两个新鲜鸡蛋。

edible.en: Only the red mushrooms are edible.
edible.zh: 只有红色蘑菇可以食用。

edit.en: Before submitting the essay, students should carefully edit their work to eliminate grammatical errors and improve clarity.
edit.zh: 在提交论文之前，学生应该仔细编辑他们的作品，以消除语法错误并提高清晰度。

editing.zh: 视频剪辑需要很多小时。

edition.en: This is the second edition of the textbook.

educate.en: Schools educate children in many subjects.
educate.zh: 学校教育孩子学习多门科目。

educated.en: An educated workforce is important for development.
educated.zh: 受过教育的劳动力对发展很重要。

education.en: Quality education is important for children.
education.zh: 优质教育对儿童很重要。

educational.en: This is an educational program for children.
educational.zh: 这是一个面向儿童的教育节目。

educators.en: The educators met to discuss new teaching methods.
educators.zh: 教育工作者们开会讨论新的教学方法。

effect.en: The new policy had a positive effect on workers.
effect.zh: 新政策对工人们产生了积极的影响。

during the week.en: I am busy during the week.

dusk.en: Birds fly home at dusk every evening.
dusk.zh: 每天傍晚时分鸟儿飞回家。

dutch.en: My Dutch colleague speaks excellent English.
dutch.zh: 我的荷兰同事英语说得很好。

duties.en: He has many duties at work.
duties.zh: 他在工作中有许多职责。

duty.en: It is our duty to protect the environment.
duty.zh: 保护环境是我们的责任。

duty-free.en: Airports often have duty-free shops where travellers can purchase expensive items at significantly reduced prices.
duty-free.zh: 机场通常有免税商店，旅客可以在那里以大幅降低的价格购买昂贵物品。

dwell.en: Many young professionals choose to dwell in urban areas despite high living costs for better career prospects.
dwell.zh: 尽管生活成本很高，许多年轻专业人士还是选择居住在城市地区以获得更好的职业前景。

dwell on.en: Instead of dwelling on past failures, individuals should focus on learning lessons and building a successful future.
dwell on.zh: 个人不应该纠结于过去的失败，而应该专注于吸取教训和创造成功的未来。

dwellings.en: Ancient dwellings were built from stone.

dye.en: She wants to dye her hair red.

dynamic.en: The city has a very dynamic atmosphere.
dynamic.zh: 这座城市有非常活跃的氛围。

dynasty.en: That dynasty ruled China for many years.
dynasty.zh: 那个朝代统治中国很多年。

each day.en: I practice speaking English each day after school.
each day.zh: 每天放学后我都练习英语口语。

each week.en: I go to the gym each week.

eager.en: Young graduates are eager to enter the job market and apply the theoretical knowledge they acquired during their studies.
eager.zh: 年轻毕业生渴望进入就业市场，将他们在学习期间获得的理论知识付诸实践。

eagles.en: Eagles are flying high above the mountain peaks.
eagles.zh: 鹰在山峰上空高高飞翔。

ear.en: She whispered something in his ear.

early.en: She always arrives early to class.

earn.zh: 学生们在暑假期间赚钱。

earnest.en: The student made an earnest attempt to improve her writing skills before the important examination date.
earnest.zh: 这名学生在重要的考试日期之前认真地尝试提高她的写作技能。

ears.en: She covered her ears during the noise.
ears.zh: 她在噪音中捂住了耳朵。

earth.en: Scientists studying the earth have discovered new evidence about how continents were formed millions of years ago.
earth.zh: 研究地球的科学家发现了关于大陆数百万年前如何形成的新证据。

earthquake.zh: 地震摧毁了许多建筑物。

ease.en: The music helped ease her stress.
ease.zh: 音乐帮助她缓解了压力。

east.en: The wind is blowing from the east today.

eastern.en: The eastern part of the city is quieter.

easy.en: The test was easy for him.
easy.zh: 这项测试对他来说很容易。

eat meat.en: Some people choose not to eat meat for health.
eat meat.zh: 有些人为了健康选择不吃肉。

eaters.en: Most meat eaters have strong habits.
eaters.zh: 大多数肉食者有强烈的饮食习惯。

employed.en: The company employed fifty new workers.
employed.zh: 公司雇用了五十名新工人。

employee.en: Each employee is entitled to receive health insurance benefits from the company.
employee.zh: 每位员工都有权从公司获得医疗保险福利。

employees.en: All employees must follow the rules.
employees.zh: 所有员工必须遵守规则。

employer.en: My current employer provides flexible working hours and generous annual leave.
employer.zh: 我目前的雇主提供灵活的工作时间和丰厚的年假。

employers.en: Many employers require previous work experience.
employers.zh: 许多雇主要求有之前的工作经验。

employment.en: The government wants to increase employment.
employment.zh: 政府希望增加就业机会。

enable.en: Modern technology can enable students to access various educational resources from anywhere in the world instantly.
enable.zh: 现代技术使学生能够立即从世界任何地方获取各种教育资源。

enclose.en: Please enclose a copy of your identification document with the application form.
enclose.zh: 请随申请表附上您的身份证明文件副本。

enclosure.en: The animals stayed inside the enclosure.

electrode.en: Scientists are developing new electrodes that can monitor brain activity without invasive surgical procedures.
electrode.zh: 科学家们正在开发能够无创监测大脑活动的新型电极。

electron.en: The flow of electrons through a circuit creates the electrical current that powers modern electronic devices.
electron.zh: 电子在电路中的流动产生为现代电子设备供电的电流。

electronic.en: Electronic devices have changed daily life.
electronic.zh: 电子设备改变了日常生活。

electronics.en: Electronics are sold on the second floor.

elegant.en: An elegant solution solved the problem.
elegant.zh: 一个优雅的解决方案解决了这个问题。

element.en: Trust is considered an essential element in building strong and lasting personal relationships.
element.zh: 信任被认为是建立牢固持久人际关系的基本要素。

elementary.en: Students start with elementary grammar exercises.
elementary.zh: 学生从初级语法练习开始。

elements.en: The harsh elements damaged the roof.
elements.zh: 恶劣的天气损坏了屋顶。

elephants.en: Elephants can live for many years.

elevate.en: Regular exercise can elevate mood and improve overall mental health when practiced consistently over time.
elevate.zh: 坚持定期锻炼可以提升情绪并随着时间推移改善整体心理健康。

embryo.en: Scientists are conducting research on embryo development to better understand genetic disorders and potential treatments.
embryo.zh: 科学家正在对胚胎发育进行研究，以更好地了解遗传疾病和潜在的治疗方法。

emerged.en: New problems emerged during the work.

emergence.en: The emergence of new technology changed our lives.
emergence.zh: 新技术的出现改变了我们的生活。

emergency.en: Call me in case of emergency.

emigrate.en: Many skilled professionals choose to emigrate to developed nations seeking better career opportunities and living standards.
emigrate.zh: 许多技术专业人员选择移居发达国家，以寻求更好的职业机会和生活水平。

eminent.en: The eminent scientist delivered a compelling lecture on climate change and its impact on global ecosystems.
eminent.zh: 这位杰出的科学家就气候变化及其对全球生态系统的影响发表了引人入胜的演讲。

emission.en: Factories must reduce their emission of harmful pollutants to comply with environmental regulations effectively.
emission.zh: 工厂必须减少有害污染物的排放，以有效遵守环境法规。

emissions.en: Factory emissions have increased over time.
emissions.zh: 工厂排放量随着时间增加了。

email.en: I sent an email to my professor.
email.zh: 我给教授发了封电子邮件。

email address.en: Please send it to my email address.
email address.zh: 请发送到我的电子邮箱。

emails.en: I check my emails every morning.
emails.zh: 我每天早上查收电子邮件。

embark.en: Young people should embark on their careers with determination and a willingness to learn new skills.
embark.zh: 年轻人应该带着决心和愿意学习新技能的态度开始他们的职业生涯。

embarked.en: She embarked on her new career last month.
embarked.zh: 她上个月开始了新的职业生涯。

embarrass.en: It would embarrass me greatly to make a presentation without proper preparation in front of examiners.
embarrass.zh: 在没有充分准备的情况下在考官面前做演讲会让我非常尴尬。

embed.en: The documentary aims to embed cameras in remote communities to capture their authentic daily lives.
embed.zh: 这部纪录片旨在将摄像机嵌入偏远社区,以捕捉他们真实的日常生活。

embedded.en: The chip is embedded in the device.

embody.en: The Olympic champion seems to embody the spirit of perseverance and dedication that inspires millions.
embody.zh: 这位奥运冠军似乎体现了激励数百万人的毅力和奉献精神。

elbow.en: I accidentally bumped my elbow against the table while reaching for the book on the high shelf in the library.
elbow.zh: 我在图书馆伸手去够高架上的书时，不小心把胳膊肘撞到了桌子上。

elder.en: In many traditional societies, young people are expected to show respect to their elder family members at all times.
elder.zh: 在许多传统社会中，年轻人被期望始终尊敬年长的家庭成员。

elect.en: The citizens will elect a new parliament next month to represent their views and make important decisions for the country.
elect.zh: 市民们将在下个月选举新的议会，代表他们的观点并为国家做出重要决定。

election.en: The recent presidential election has attracted international attention and sparked heated debates about democracy and governance.
election.zh: 最近的总统选举吸引了国际关注，并引发了关于民主和治理的激烈辩论。

elective.en: Many university students choose to take elective courses in art and music to develop their creativity beyond their major.
elective.zh: 许多大学生选择选修艺术和音乐课程，以在专业之外培养他们的创造力。

electric.en: The car runs on electric power.

electrical.en: The electrical system needs urgent repair.
electrical.zh: 电气系统需要紧急维修。

electricity.en: Electricity is essential for modern daily life.
electricity.zh: 电力对现代日常生活来说是必不可少的。

elevated.en: The elevated platform gave speakers a clear view.
elevated.zh: 抬高的平台让演讲者有清晰的视野。

elevator.en: Many modern buildings have replaced traditional staircases with elevators to accommodate elderly residents and visitors.
elevator.zh: 许多现代建筑已经用电梯取代了传统楼梯，以方便老年居民和访客。

eligible.en: Are you eligible for this job?
eligible.zh: 你有资格申请这份工作吗？

eliminate.zh: 运动可以有效消除压力。

eliminated.en: The new policy eliminated the problem.
eliminated.zh: 新政策消除了这个问题。

elite.en: Only the elite joined the club.
elite.zh: 只有精英才能加入这个俱乐部。

eloquent.en: The eloquent speaker captivated the audience with her powerful arguments about environmental protection and sustainability.
eloquent.zh: 这位雄辩的演讲者用她关于环境保护和可持续发展的有力论点吸引了观众。

elsewhere.en: While some countries struggle with water scarcity, others manage resources effectively, suggesting solutions might be found elsewhere in the world.
elsewhere.zh: 虽然一些国家挣扎于水资源短缺，其他国家有效管理资源，表明解决方案可能在世界其他地方找到。

emit.en: The factory was found to emit harmful pollutants into the atmosphere, causing significant environmental concerns.
emit.zh: 该工厂被发现向大气中排放有害污染物，引起严重的环境担忧。

emitting.en: The factory is emitting smoke into the air.
emitting.zh: 工厂正在向空气中排放烟雾。

emotion.en: It is natural for people to experience a wide range of emotion when confronting traumatic events.
emotion.zh: 当面对创伤性事件时，人们经历各种情绪是很自然的。

emotional.en: She became emotional after hearing the news.
emotional.zh: 听到这个消息后，她变得很激动。

emotions.zh: 音乐可以表达强烈的情感。

empathy.en: Developing empathy is essential for healthcare professionals who must understand their patients' suffering.
empathy.zh: 培养同理心对医护人员来说至关重要，他们必须理解患者的痛苦。

emperor.en: The ancient emperor built a great palace.
emperor.zh: 这位古代皇帝建造了一座伟大的宫殿。

emphases.en: Modern education systems have significantly shifted their emphases from rote memorisation to critical thinking skills.
emphases.zh: 现代教育系统已显著地将重点从死记硬背转向批判性思维技能。

emphasis.en: The teacher placed strong emphasis on grammar.

emphasise.en: Teachers always emphasise the importance of reading.
emphasise.zh: 老师们总是强调阅读的重要性。

emphasised.en: The professor emphasised the importance of critical thinking in academic writing during the lecture on research methodology.
emphasised.zh: 教授在关于研究方法论的讲座中强调了批判性思维在学术写作中的重要性。

emphasising.en: Emphasising the urgent need for sustainable development, the government has recently introduced comprehensive new environmental policies.
emphasising.zh: 强调可持续发展的迫切需求，政府最近推出了全面的新环境政策。

emphasize.en: Students should emphasize the importance of using credible sources when writing academic research papers for university.
emphasize.zh: 学生在为大学撰写学术研究论文时应强调使用可靠来源的重要性。

emphasized.en: The teacher emphasized the main points.

emphasizing.en: The comprehensive report, emphasizing the numerous benefits of renewable energy sources, received widespread support from environmental groups.
emphasizing.zh: 这份强调可再生能源众多好处的综合报告得到了环保组织的广泛支持。

emphatic.en: The minister gave an emphatic rejection to the proposed policy changes during the international conference held in Geneva.
emphatic.zh: 部长在日内瓦举行的国际会议上坚决拒绝了拟议的政策改革。

emphatically.en: The committee emphatically opposed the controversial plan due to its potential negative social impact on local communities.
emphatically.zh: 委员会坚决反对这项有争议的计划，因为它可能对当地社区产生负面影响。

empire.en: The Roman Empire expanded across Europe, leaving a lasting legacy on modern legal systems and architecture today.
empire.zh: 罗马帝国在欧洲扩张，对现代法律体系和建筑留下了持久的遗产。

empirical.en: The study provides empirical evidence for the theory.
empirical.zh: 这项研究为该理论提供了以经验为根据的证据。

employ.en: Many international companies now employ advanced artificial intelligence technology to improve workplace efficiency and productivity.
employ.zh: 许多国际公司现在采用先进的人工智能技术来提高工作效率和生产力。

entrepreneurs.en: Many entrepreneurs start their own businesses.
entrepreneurs.zh: 许多企业家创办自己的企业。

envelope.en: Before mailing the application, she carefully sealed the envelope containing all the required academic documents.
envelope.zh: 在邮寄申请之前，她仔细封好了装有所有所需学业文件的大信封。

environmentalists.zh: 环保人士抗议森林砍伐。

environmentally.en: Companies should operate more environmentally responsibly to minimize their negative impact on natural ecosystems.
environmentally.zh: 公司应该以更加环境负责的方式运营，以减少对自然生态系统的负面影响。

environments.en: Children develop better social skills when they are raised in nurturing and supportive family environments.
environments.zh: 在充满关爱和支持的家庭环境中成长的孩子往往能发展出更好的社交技能。

envisage.en: Urban planners envisage a future where green spaces are integrated throughout densely populated metropolitan areas.
envisage.zh: 城市规划者设想未来绿色空间将融入人口密集的城市地区。

enzyme.en: Enzymes are biological catalysts that accelerate chemical reactions essential for maintaining cellular functions.
enzyme.zh: 酶是生物催化剂，可加速对维持细胞功能至关重要的化学反应。

ending.en: The movie has a surprising ending.
ending.zh: 这部电影有一个令人惊讶的结局。

endless.en: The road seemed endless in the darkness.
endless.zh: 黑暗中这条路似乎没有尽头。

endure.en: The ancient civilization managed to endure harsh climatic conditions for thousands of years.
endure.zh: 这个古老的文明在恶劣的气候条件下生存了数千年。

enduring.en: She has an enduring love of art.
enduring.zh: 她对艺术有持久的热爱。

energetic.en: The children are very energetic in the morning.
energetic.zh: 孩子们早上总是精力充沛。

energetically.en: She energetically defended her research findings during the academic conference and impressed the audience.
energetically.zh: 她在学术会议上充满活力地为自己的研究发现辩护，给观众留下了深刻印象。

energies.en: Governments should direct their energies toward improving public education systems and healthcare services.
energies.zh: 政府应该将精力集中在改善公共教育体系和医疗服务上。

energy.zh: 我们需要更多清洁能源。

enforce.en: The government must enforce new laws.
enforce.zh: 政府必须强制执行新法律。

enough.en: Many students do not have enough time to complete all their assignments before the deadline each semester.
enough.zh: 许多学生没有足够的时间在每学期截止日期前完成所有作业。

enough time.en: We have enough time to finish.
enough time.zh: 我们有足够的时间完成。

enquire about.en: International students should enquire about the visa requirements before submitting their applications.
enquire about.zh: 国际学生在提交申请之前应该询问签证要求。

enrich.en: Education can enrich a person's life.
enrich.zh: 教育能丰富一个人的生活。

enroll.en: Prospective students must enroll in the program by completing the online registration form before the deadline.
enroll.zh: 未来的学生必须在截止日期前完成在线注册才能加入该项目。

enrolled.en: She enrolled in a cooking class.
enrolled.zh: 她报名参加了一个烹饪班。

enrollment.en: The enrollment period for next semester begins in March and ends on the fifteenth of April.
enrollment.zh: 下学期的注册期从三月开始，到四月十五日结束。

ensuite.en: When searching for accommodation, many international students prefer renting rooms with ensuite bathroom facilities.
ensuite.zh: 在寻找住宿时，许多国际学生更喜欢租带有独立卫浴设施的房间。

ensure.en: Please ensure you arrive on time.

engineering.en: She studied mechanical engineering at university.
engineering.zh: 她在大学学习机械工程。

engraving.en: The engraving shows a beautiful landscape.
engraving.zh: 这幅版画展示了一幅美丽的风景。

engravings.en: The museum displays ancient stone engravings.

enhance.en: Training can enhance your job skills.
enhance.zh: 培训可以提高你的工作技能。

enjoy.en: I enjoy reading books in my free time.
enjoy.zh: 我喜欢在空闲时间看书。

enlarge.en: The museum decided to enlarge its exhibition space to accommodate the growing collection of contemporary artworks from various countries.
enlarge.zh: 博物馆决定扩大展览空间，以容纳来自不同国家的日益增长的当代艺术收藏品。

enlighten.en: The documentary aimed to enlighten viewers about the environmental challenges facing endangered species in their natural habitats.
enlighten.zh: 这部纪录片旨在启发观众了解濒危物种在自然栖息地面临的环境挑战。

enormous.en: The elephant has an enormous body.
enormous.zh: 大象有一个巨大的身体。

enthusiasm.en: She showed great enthusiasm for the new project.
enthusiasm.zh: 她对这个新项目表现出极大的热情。

enthusiastic.en: The team was enthusiastic about the project.
enthusiastic.zh: 团队对这个项目充满热情。

entire.en: He spent the entire day studying.

entirely.en: The success of the project cannot be attributed entirely to one individual; it required the collaborative efforts of the entire team.
entirely.zh: 这个项目的成功不能完全归功于一个人；它需要整个团队的协作努力。

entities.en: In a globalized economy, multinational corporations and small businesses are treated as distinct legal entities with different obligations.
entities.zh: 在经济全球化的背景下，跨国公司和小型企业被视为具有不同义务的独立法律实体。

entitle.en: Upon completing the university program, graduates are entitled to receive an official certificate that acknowledges their academic achievement.
entitle.zh: 完成大学课程后，毕业生有权获得正式证书，以确认其学术成就。

entitled.zh: 这份报告名为《全球变暖》。

entity.en: The research institute functions as a separate legal entity, enabling it to secure funding and enter into contracts independently.
entity.zh: 该研究机构作为独立法人实体运作，能够独立获得资金和签订合同。

entrance.en: Wait for me at the entrance.

entrepreneur.en: A successful entrepreneur must demonstrate adaptability and resilience to navigate challenges and achieve sustainable business growth.
entrepreneur.zh: 一位成功的企业家必须表现出适应能力和韧性，才能应对挑战并实现可持续的业务增长。

ensured.en: The government ensured that all students had access to quality education by implementing new funding policies.
ensured.zh: 政府通过实施新的 funding 政策，确保所有学生都能获得优质教育。

ensures.en: Regular exercise ensures better physical health and also improves mental well-being over time.
ensures.zh: 定期锻炼确保更好的身体健康，同时也随着时间改善心理健康。

ensuring.en: By ensuring proper waste management in urban areas, cities can significantly reduce environmental pollution.
ensuring.zh: 通过确保城市地区 proper waste management，城市可以显著减少环境污染。

entail.en: The research project will entail extensive fieldwork and data collection from multiple sources.
entail.zh: 这个研究项目将需要 extensive fieldwork 并从多个来源收集数据。

enterprise.en: The local enterprise has created numerous job opportunities for residents in the surrounding community.
enterprise.zh: 这家 local enterprise 为周边社区的居民创造了 numerous job opportunities。

enterprises.zh: 小型企业创造了许多就业机会。

entertain.en: The conference aims to entertain delegates while providing valuable insights into current industry trends.
entertain.zh: 这次会议旨在让代表们 entertainment，同时提供有关当前行业趋势的宝贵见解。

entertaining.en: The lecture was both informative and entertaining.
entertaining.zh: 讲座既有教育意义又有趣。

entertainment.en: Television is a popular form of entertainment.
entertainment.zh: 电视是一种受欢迎的娱乐形式。

enforceable.en: The new environmental regulations must be clearly enforceable if they are to have any meaningful impact on reducing carbon emissions.
enforceable.zh: 新的环境法规必须是明确可执行的，如果它们要对减少碳排放产生任何有意义的影响。

enforced.en: The strict smoking ban was enforced throughout the city center, resulting in significantly cleaner air for pedestrians.
enforced.zh: 严格的禁烟令在整个市中心执行，导致行人呼吸的空气明显更清洁。

enforcement.en: Effective enforcement of intellectual property laws requires both stronger penalties and improved international cooperation among governments.
enforcement.zh: 知识产权法的有效执法需要更严厉的处罚和各国政府之间更好的国际合作。

enforces.en: The regulatory body enforces strict safety standards on all construction companies to prevent workplace accidents and injuries.
enforces.zh: 监管机构对所有建筑公司执行严格的安全标准，以防止工作场所的事故和伤害。

engaging.en: Many students find that engaging in classroom discussions significantly improves their understanding of complex academic concepts.
engaging.zh: 许多学生发现，参与课堂讨论能显著提高他们对复杂学术概念的理解。

engage.en: Universities should actively engage with local businesses to create internship opportunities that benefit both students and employers.
engage.zh: 大学应该积极与当地企业合作，创造让双方都受益的实习机会。

engage in.en: Young people who engage in regular community volunteer work tend to develop better leadership skills than their peers.
engage in.zh: 经常参与社区志愿工作的年轻人往往比同龄人培养出更好的领导能力。

engaged.en: Students were engaged in the discussion.

engine.en: The engine makes a strange noise.
engine.zh: 发动机发出奇怪的噪音。

engineer.en: My brother works as an engineer.

essence.en: Patience is the essence of teaching.

essentially.en: Essentially, the success of any educational reform depends on adequate funding and teacher training programs.
essentially.zh: 从本质上讲，任何教育改革的成功都取决于充足的资金和教师培训项目。

establish.en: Governments should establish clear guidelines to regulate the use of artificial intelligence in the workplace.
establish.zh: 政府应该制定明确的指导方针来规范工作场所中人工智能的使用。

established.en: The company has established a good reputation.
established.zh: 这家公司已经建立了良好的声誉。

establishes.en: The study establishes a direct correlation between regular physical activity and improved mental health outcomes.
establishes.zh: 这项研究确定了定期体育锻炼与改善心理健康状况之间的直接相关性。

establishing.en: Establishing effective communication channels between employers and employees can significantly improve workplace productivity.
establishing.zh: 在雇主和员工之间建立有效的沟通渠道可以显著提高工作场所的生产力。

establishments.en: Many traditional establishments have struggled to compete with online retailers in the current economic climate.
establishments.zh: 在当前的经济环境下，许多传统企业难以与在线零售商竞争。

estate.en: They visited a beautiful country estate.
estate.zh: 他们参观了一座美丽的乡村庄园。

esteem.en: Many people believe that high self-esteem is essential for achieving success in both academic and professional settings.
esteem.zh: 许多人认为，高的自尊对于在学术和职业环境中取得成功至关重要。

estimate.en: It is difficult to estimate the exact number of people affected by climate change each year.
estimate.zh: 很难估计每年受气候变化影响的确切人数。

estimated.en: The project was estimated at 2 million.

estimates.en: Recent estimates suggest that the global population will reach 9 billion by the year 2050.
estimates.zh: 最近的估计表明，到2050年全球人口将达到90亿。

estimating.en: Estimating the long-term effects of technological advancements remains a significant challenge for researchers.
estimating.zh: 估计技术进步的长期影响仍然是研究人员面临的重大挑战。

estimation.en: In my estimation, the government's new education policy will benefit students from disadvantaged backgrounds.
estimation.zh: 据我估计，政府的新的教育政策将使弱势背景的学生受益。

estimations.en: Various estimations of economic growth rates have been published by different international organizations.
estimations.zh: 不同的国际组织发布了各种经济增长率的估计。

eternal.en: The eternal question of whether an individual's success is determined by nature or nurture continues to debate.
eternal.zh: 关于个人成功是由先天还是后天决定的这个永恒问题仍在争论中。

ethanol.en: Ethanol is commonly used as fuel.

ethic.en: Professional conduct requires adherence to a strict code of ethics to maintain public trust and accountability.
ethic.zh: 职业行为要求遵守严格的道德准则，以维护公众信任和责任感。

equates.en: The research equates access to clean water with significant improvements in public health outcomes for rural communities.
equates.zh: 研究表明，获得清洁水源等同于农村社区公共健康状况的显著改善。

equating.en: Equating material wealth with personal success often leads to shallow relationships and unfulfilled lives.
equating.zh: 将物质财富与个人成功等同起来，往往会导致人际关系肤浅和生活空虚。

equation.en: The equation between educational investment and economic productivity has been extensively documented by economists.
equation.zh: 教育投资与生产力之间的关系已被经济学家广泛记录。

equations.en: Understanding complex mathematical equations enables scientists to predict weather patterns with remarkable accuracy.
equations.zh: 理解复杂的数学方程式使科学家能够非常准确地预测天气模式。

equator.en: Tropical rainforests near the equator support an extraordinary diversity of plant and animal species.
equator.zh: 赤道附近的热带雨林支持着极为丰富的植物和动物物种多样性。

equip.en: Professional development programs aim to equip teachers with innovative pedagogical strategies for diverse classrooms.
equip.zh: 专业发展项目旨在让教师掌握针对不同课堂的创新教学策略。

equip with.en: The new initiative will equip community centres with digital resources to support remote learning for children.
equip with.zh: 新计划将为社区中心配备数字资源，以支持儿童的远程学习。

equipment.en: The lab has new equipment for experiments.

equity.en: The government has implemented policies to promote equity in healthcare access for underserved populations.
equity.zh: 政府已实施政策，以促进医疗服务对服务不足人群的公平获取。

epidemic.en: The epidemic spread quickly across the city.

episode.en: The most distressing episode in my childhood was when I was bullied at school for several months.
episode.zh: 我童年中最痛苦的经历是在学校被欺负了几个月的那段时光。

episodes.en: Each TV series has twelve episodes.

episodic.en: The show has an episodic format.
episodic.zh: 这个节目是分集播出的形式。

epoch.en: We are currently living in an unprecedented epoch shaped by rapid technological advancement and climate change.
epoch.zh: 我们正生活在由快速技术进步和气候变化塑造的前所未有的时代。

equal.en: All students should have equal opportunities.
equal.zh: 所有学生应该有平等的机会。

equally.zh: 两位候选人都同样合格。

equate.en: Some people wrongly equate wealth with happiness, but numerous studies show this correlation is weak.
equate.zh: 一些人错误地将财富等同于幸福，但大量研究表明这种相关性很弱。

equated.en: In the past, professional success was often equated with university degrees from prestigious institutions.
equated.zh: 在过去，职业成功常被等同于拥有名牌大学的学位。

ethical.en: There are ethical concerns about testing.
ethical.zh: 测试引发了伦理方面的担忧。

ethnic.en: She has an ethnic background from China.

eucalyptus.en: The eucalyptus tree smells very fresh.

evacuate.en: The authorities ordered residents to evacuate the coastal areas immediately before the hurricane made landfall.
evacuate.zh: 当局在飓风登陆前立即下令沿海地区的居民撤离。

evaluate.en: The teacher will evaluate our essays tomorrow.
evaluate.zh: 老师明天会批改我们的作文。

evaluated.en: The effectiveness of the new educational policy was evaluated through comprehensive analysis of student outcomes.
evaluated.zh: 新的教育政策的有效性通过对学生成绩的全面分析进行了评估。

evaluates.en: The independent auditor evaluates financial statements annually to ensure compliance with accounting standards.
evaluates.zh: 独立审计员每年评估财务报表以确保符合会计准则。

evaluating.en: Evaluating the long-term impact of climate change on agriculture requires extensive research and data collection.
evaluating.zh: 评估气候变化对农业的长期影响需要广泛的研究和数据收集。

evaluations.en: Regular performance evaluations help identify employees who would benefit from additional training and development.
evaluations.zh: 定期的绩效评估有助于识别能从额外培训和发展中受益的员工。

error.en: Please check your answer for any error.
error.zh: 请检查答案是否有错误。

erupt.en: Violent protests erupted in the city centre after the government announced controversial new taxation policies last week.
erupt.zh: 在上周政府宣布有争议的新税收政策后，暴力抗议在市中心爆发。

eruption.en: The volcano eruption caused widespread evacuations.
eruption.zh: 火山喷发导致大规模疏散。

escalate.en: Environmental experts warn that if we do not take immediate action, climate change will escalate and cause more severe natural disasters.
escalate.zh: 环境专家警告说，如果我们不立即采取行动，气候变化将会加剧并导致更严重的自然灾害。

escalator.en: The modern shopping centre features a convenient escalator system that allows customers to move easily between different floors.
escalator.zh: 这家现代化购物中心设有便捷的自动扶梯系统，让顾客能够轻松地在不同楼层之间穿梭。

escape.en: The prisoner tried to escape from jail.

escort.en: The visiting foreign dignitaries were accompanied by a security escort throughout their official programme in the capital city.
escort.zh: 来访的外国官员在首都的正式访问期间全程由安全护送队陪同。

especially.zh: 儿童尤其需要良好的营养。

essay.en: I need to finish my history essay by Friday.
essay.zh: 我需要在周五前完成历史论文。

essay writing.en: Essay writing is an important skill for students.
essay writing.zh: 论文写作对学生来说是一项重要技能。

evaluative.en: The evaluative process requires students to demonstrate critical thinking skills and provide evidence-based judgments about various social issues.
evaluative.zh: 评估过程要求学生展示批判性思维能力，并对各种社会问题提供基于证据的判断。

evaporate.en: If you leave a glass of water uncovered, it will gradually evaporate into the atmosphere over the course of several days.
evaporate.zh: 如果你把一杯水敞开放置，它会在几天内逐渐蒸发到大气中。

evaporates.en: The water quickly evaporates in heat.

eve.en: On the eve of the important examination, many candidates experience heightened anxiety and find it difficult to concentrate on revision.
eve.zh: 在重要考试的前夕，许多考生会感到高度焦虑，发现很难集中精力复习。

even.en: The government has implemented policies to ensure that even the most disadvantaged members of society can access quality healthcare services.
even.zh: 政府已实施政策，确保即使是社会最弱势的成员也能获得优质的医疗服务。

even though.en: She kept studying even though she was tired.
even though.zh: 她尽管很累仍然继续学习。

event.en: The cultural event attracted thousands of visitors who came to experience traditional music, food, and artistic performances from different regions.
event.zh: 这次文化活动吸引了数千名游客前来体验来自不同地区的传统音乐、美食和艺术表演。

events.en: Many events took place last month.
events.zh: 上个月发生了很多事件。

eventual.en: Through years of dedicated research and experimentation, the scientist believed her efforts would lead to the eventual discovery of a cure.
eventual.zh: 通过多年专注的研究和实验，这位科学家相信她的努力将最终带来一种疗法的发现。

equivalently.en: This environmental challenge can be addressed equivalently through scientific research and comprehensive policy implementation measures.
equivalently.zh: 这一环境挑战可以通过科学研究和全面的政策实施措施得到同等的解决。

equivalents.en: Many ancient civilizations developed mathematical equivalents to modern calculus, enabling them to construct complex architectural structures.
equivalents.zh: 许多古代文明发展出了现代微积分的数学等价物，使它们能够建造复杂的建筑结构。

era.en: The digital era changed how we work.
era.zh: 数字时代改变了我们的工作方式。

erase.en: Modern technology makes it possible to erase errors from documents efficiently, saving significant time in academic and professional settings.
erase.zh: 现代技术使得高效地擦除文档中的错误成为可能，在学术和职业环境中节省了大量时间。

erect.en: The national monument was erected to honor the heroes who fought bravely for the country's independence and freedom.
erect.zh: 这座国家纪念碑是为了纪念为国家独立和自由而英勇战斗的英雄们而建立的。

erode.en: Constant financial pressures and job insecurity can erode a person's confidence and sense of professional self-worth over time.
erode.zh: 持续的经济压力和工作不安全感会随着时间的推移侵蚀一个人的自信和职业自我价值感。

eroded.en: The wind has eroded the cliff over years.

err.en: Researchers must err on the side of caution when interpreting complex statistical data to prevent misleading conclusions.
err.zh: 研究人员在解释复杂统计数据时必须谨慎行事，以避免得出误导性的结论。

exceeded.en: Sales exceeded the target this year.
exceeded.zh: 今年的销售额超过了目标。

exceedingly.en: The candidate performed exceedingly well in the interview, impressing all the panel members with her thoughtful responses.
exceedingly.zh: 候选人在面试中表现得极其出色，她深思熟虑的回答给所有评委留下了深刻印象。

excel.en: She hopes to excel in her new job.
excel.zh: 她希望在新工作中表现出色。

excellence.en: The school values academic excellence above all.
excellence.zh: 这所学校把学业卓越视为最重要的事。

excellent.en: She received an excellent grade on her final exam.
excellent.zh: 她在期末考试中取得了优秀的成绩。

except for.en: All passed except for two students.
except for.zh: 除了两名学生外，其他人都通过了。

exception.en: There is always an exception to rules.

exceptional.en: She is an exceptional student in her class.

exhibitions.zh: 当地展览展示新兴艺术家。

exile.en: The political exile returned to his homeland after decades of living abroad due to persecution for his beliefs.
exile.zh: 这位政治流亡者因信仰遭受迫害而在海外生活数十年后返回祖国。

exit.en: According to fire safety regulations, every public building must have clearly marked emergency exits for evacuation.
exit.zh: 根据消防安全法规，每栋公共建筑都必须有明确标识的紧急疏散出口。

exotic.zh: 许多游客喜欢外来水果。

expand.en: The company plans to expand its business.

expanded.en: The company expanded its operations last year.

expanding.en: With an expanding population and increasing demand for housing, urban planners face significant challenges.
expanding.zh: 随着人口不断增长和住房需求增加，城市规划者面临着重大挑战。

excluded.en: Children were excluded from the meeting.
excluded.zh: 孩子们被排除在会议之外。

excludes.en: The survey excludes participants who have not resided in the country for at least five years.
excludes.zh: 该调查不包括在澳大利亚居住不足五年的人。

excluding.en: The average household income, excluding taxes and mandatory deductions, is approximately fifty thousand dollars.
excluding.zh: 不包括税收和强制性扣除的家庭平均收入约为五万美元。

exclusion.en: The exclusion of indigenous perspectives from historical records has led to an incomplete understanding of the past.
exclusion.zh: 历史记录中排除土著观点导致对过去的理解不完整。

exclusionary.en: Critics argue that immigration policies in some countries are overly exclusionary and fail to acknowledge cultural diversity.
exclusionary.zh: 批评者认为，一些国家的移民政策过于排斥，未能承认文化多样性。

exclusive.en: The magazine offers exclusive interviews with world leaders and provides in-depth analysis of global affairs.
exclusive.zh: 该杂志提供与世界领导人的独家专访，并对全球事务进行深入分析。

exclusively.en: This service is exclusively for members.
exclusively.zh: 这项服务仅对会员开放。

exclusivity.en: The exclusivity of private clubs often attracts wealthy individuals who value privacy and networking opportunities.
exclusivity.zh: 私人俱乐部的排他性经常吸引重视隐私和社交机会的富有人士。

excrete.en: The human body naturally excretes toxins through sweat, urine, and other metabolic processes.
excrete.zh: 人体通过汗液、尿液和其他代谢过程自然排出毒素。

excursion.zh: 我们计划了一次学校郊游。

eventually.en: He eventually found a good job after months.
eventually.zh: 几个月后他终于找到了一份好工作。

ever.en: Have you ever tried Chinese food?

every time.en: Every time I study I feel more confident.
every time.zh: 每次学习，我都感到更有信心。

everybody.en: Everybody should follow the classroom rules.
everybody.zh: 每个人应该遵守课堂规则。

everyday life.en: Technology has changed our everyday life.
everyday life.zh: 科技改变了我们的日常生活。

everything.en: While modern technology simplifies many tasks, relying on it for everything can diminish essential human skills and critical thinking abilities.
everything.zh: 虽然现代技术简化了许多任务，但依赖它做一切事情可能会削弱基本的人类技能和批判性思维能力。

evidenced.en: The negative impact of air pollution on public health is evidenced by the rising rates of respiratory diseases.
evidenced.zh: 空气污染对公众健康的负面影响已被呼吸系统疾病发病率上升所证实。

exaggerate.en: Some people tend to exaggerate the difficulties of learning a new language, but with consistent practice, significant progress is definitely achievable.
exaggerate.zh: 有些人倾向于夸大学习新语言的困难，但只要坚持练习，取得显著进步是完全可能的。

exaggerated.zh: 这个故事明显被夸大了。

exam.en: The final exam is next week.

examination.en: The medical examination took one hour.

examined.en: The researcher examined the samples carefully to determine the presence of any harmful chemicals in the water.
examined.zh: 研究人员仔细检查了样本，以确定水中是否存在任何有害化学物质。

example.en: The government should set a positive example by implementing effective sustainable environmental policies nationwide.
example.zh: 政府应该通过在全国范围内实施有效的可持续环境政策来树立正面榜样。

excavated.en: Archaeologists excavated the ancient ruins last summer.
excavated.zh: 考古学家去年夏天发掘了古代遗址。

excavation.zh: 这次挖掘花了几个月时间。

excess baggage.en: Many airlines now charge passengers extra fees for excess baggage, which has become a significant concern for budget travelers worldwide.
excess baggage.zh: 许多航空公司现在向乘客收取超额行李附加费，这已成为全球预算旅客关注的重要问题。

excessive.en: Excessive homework can harm students' health.
excessive.zh: 过多的作业会损害学生的健康。

exchange.zh: 学生们在课堂上交换想法。

exchange rate.en: Fluctuations in the exchange rate can significantly impact international trade and affect the profitability of exported goods.
exchange rate.zh: 汇率波动会严重影响国际贸易，并影响出口商品的盈利能力。

exchanges.zh: 文化交流建立国际理解。

excite.en: The prospect of a challenging career never fails to excite ambitious graduates who are eager to make their mark.
excite.zh: 充满挑战的职业前景总是让渴望有所成就的雄心勃勃的毕业生兴奋不已。

excitement.en: She felt a surge of excitement.

exciting.zh: 这是一个令人激动的机会。

exclaim.en: Visitors often exclaim in amazement when they witness the breathtaking natural beauty of certain destinations for the first time.
exclaim.zh: 当游客第一次目睹某些目的地令人惊叹的自然美景时，他们常常惊讶地发出赞叹。

exclude.en: Schools should not exclude students from participating in group activities based solely on their academic abilities or disabilities.
exclude.zh: 学校不应仅基于学生的学业能力或残疾而将他们排斥在集体活动之外。

expert.zh: 专家给出了有用的建议。

expertise.en: She has expertise in computer programming and design.
expertise.zh: 她在计算机编程和设计方面有专门技能。

experts.en: The experts offered valuable advice during the meeting.
experts.zh: 专家们在会议期间提供了宝贵的建议。

expire.en: My student visa will expire next month, so I need to apply for an extension as soon as possible.
expire.zh: 我的学生签证下个月到期，所以我需要尽快申请续签。

explain.en: Can you explain this rule to me?
explain.zh: 你能向我解释这个规则吗？

explains.en: The teacher explains the lesson clearly.
explains.zh: 老师清晰地讲解了这节课。

explanation.en: Can you give me a clear explanation?
explanation.zh: 你能给我一个清楚的解释吗？

explicit.zh: 老师给出了明确的指示。

explicitly.en: The university policy explicitly states that plagiarism in any form will result in serious academic consequences.
explicitly.zh: 大学政策明确规定，任何形式的抄袭都将导致严重的学术后果。

areas.en: Different areas of study require various approaches and methodologies to achieve optimal results in academic research.
areas.zh: 不同的研究领域需要各种方法和策略，以在学术研究中取得最佳结果。

arena.en: The political arena is becoming increasingly competitive.
arena.zh: 政治舞台正变得越来越有竞争性。

argue.en: They argue about the new policy.
argue.zh: 他们就新政策争论起来。

argues.en: She argues that practice matters more.

argument.en: She made a strong argument in the debate.
argument.zh: 她在辩论中提出了有力的论点。

arid.en: The region has a hot arid climate.

arise.en: Problems often arise when we rush work.
arise.zh: 问题往往在我们赶工作时出现。

arising.en: Problems are arising from this issue.
arising.zh: 问题正从这个事件中产生。

aristocrat.en: In the past, an aristocrat typically enjoyed privileges such as land ownership and access to exclusive education.
aristocrat.zh: 在过去，贵族通常享有土地所有权和接受精英教育等特权。

aristotle.zh: 亚里士多德写关于哲学的文章。

attacks.en: The patient had two asthma attacks.

attain.en: With consistent effort and proper guidance, students can attain excellent results in their academic pursuits.
attain.zh: 通过持续的努力和适当的指导，学生可以在学业追求中获得优异的成绩。

attempt.en: I will attempt to solve the problem.
attempt.zh: 我会尝试解决这个问题。

attempt to.en: Students attempt to solve the problem.
attempt to.zh: 学生们试图解决这个问题。

attend.en: She will attend the meeting tomorrow.

attendance.en: Regular school attendance is crucial for children's academic development and social skills.
attendance.zh: 规律的上学出勤对孩子的学业发展和社交技能至关重要。

attended.en: Yesterday I attended an important meeting.
attended.zh: 昨天我参加了一个重要会议。

attention.en: The teacher asked students to pay attention.
attention.zh: 老师要求学生集中注意力。

attic.en: We store old books in the attic.
attic.zh: 我们把旧书存放在阁楼里。

exhaust.en: The constant demands of work eventually exhaust employees, leading to decreased productivity and burnout.
exhaust.zh: 工作持续的要求最终耗尽员工的精力，导致生产率下降和倦怠。

exhausted.en: I felt exhausted after the long exam.
exhausted.zh: 长时间考试后我感到筋疲力尽。

exhibit.en: The museum will exhibit ancient artifacts from the Ming Dynasty to showcase China's rich cultural heritage.
exhibit.zh: 博物馆将展出明朝时期的古代文物，展示中国丰富的文化遗产。

expands.en: As the population grows, the city expands rapidly into surrounding rural areas, causing urban sprawl.
expands.zh: 随着人口增长，这座城市迅速向周边农村地区扩展，造成城市扩张。

expansion.en: The company planned rapid market expansion.
expansion.zh: 公司计划快速扩展市场。

expect.en: Students should expect rigorous academic standards when pursuing higher education abroad.
expect.zh: 学生应该预期海外高等教育有严格的学术标准。

expectations.zh: 我的父母有很高的期望。

expected.en: The results were expected to improve.

expedition.en: The expedition explored the remote mountain.
expedition.zh: 探险队探索了偏远的山脉。

expeditions.en: Scientists led several polar expeditions last year.
expeditions.zh: 科学家去年组织了多次极地探险。

exacerbating.en: The drought is exacerbating food shortages.
exacerbating.zh: 干旱正在加剧粮食短缺。

exact.en: I cannot give you the exact number of participants, but it was approximately five hundred people who attended the conference.
exact.zh: 我无法给你确切的参与者人数，但大约有五百人参加了这次会议。

exactly.en: Exactly five people attended the meeting.
exactly.zh: 正好有五个人参加了会议。

excuse.en: Please excuse my late arrival to class.

execute.en: The manager will execute the new plan next month.
execute.zh: 经理将于下个月执行新计划。

executive.en: The executive team meets every Monday to discuss the company's performance and make important decisions about the future.
executive.zh: 执行团队每周一开会讨论公司业绩，并对未来做出重要决策。

executives.en: The executives met to discuss strategy.

exempt.en: In some countries, small businesses are exempt from certain tax regulations to encourage entrepreneurship and economic growth.
exempt.zh: 在一些国家，小企业可以免缴某些税收，以鼓励创业和经济增长。

exercise.en: I try to exercise every morning.

construction.en: The construction took nearly one year.
construction.zh: 建设花了将近一年时间。

constructions.en: Ancient stone constructions throughout the region attract numerous tourists each year.
constructions.zh: 该地区周围的古代石制建筑每年吸引大量游客。

constructive.en: Students benefit greatly from constructive feedback that highlights both strengths and areas for improvement.
constructive.zh: 学生从建设性的反馈中获益匪浅，这种反馈既肯定优点也指出改进之处。

constructs.en: Social psychology examines how cultural values construct our understanding of personal identity.
constructs.zh: 社会心理学研究文化价值观如何构建我们对个人身份的理解。

consult.en: Individuals should consult with medical professionals before starting any new exercise programme.
consult.zh: 个人在开始任何新的锻炼计划之前应该咨询医疗专业人员。

consultancy.en: The multinational company hired a management consultancy to improve its operational efficiency.
consultancy.zh: 这家跨国公司聘请了一家管理咨询公司来提高运营效率。

consultant.zh: 他聘请了一位商业顾问。

consultants.en: The company hired expert financial consultants.
consultants.zh: 公司聘请了专业的财务顾问。

consultation.en: The government conducted widespread public consultation before implementing the new environmental regulations.
consultation.zh: 政府在实施新的环境法规之前进行了广泛的公众咨询。

branch.en: He works at the London branch.

branches.en: The company has many branches overseas.
branches.zh: 这家公司在海外有许多分公司。

brand.en: This brand is very popular among young people.
brand.zh: 这个品牌在年轻人中很受欢迎。

brave.en: It takes a brave decision to change careers after working in the same field for decades.
brave.zh: 在同一领域工作数十年后转行需要勇敢的决定。

breach.en: The security breach exposed sensitive customer data and damaged the company's reputation.
breach.zh: 安全漏洞暴露了敏感的客户数据，损害了公司的声誉。

bread.en: I bought fresh bread from the shop.
bread.zh: 我从商店买了新鲜面包。

break.en: We need a short break before the next class.
break.zh: 下一节课前我们需要短暂休息。

breakdown.en: The breakdown in communication between team members led to significant project delays.
breakdown.zh: 团队成员之间沟通的破裂导致了项目严重的延误。

breakfast.en: I always eat breakfast at seven.

breakthrough.zh: 科学家取得了重大突破。

coordinate.en: The government needs to coordinate efforts between different departments to address environmental issues effectively.
coordinate.zh: 政府需要协调各部门之间的努力，以有效应对环境问题。

encompass.en: The course will encompass all topics.
encompass.zh: 这门课程将涵盖所有主题。

encounter.en: Students may encounter significant difficulties when adapting to new learning environments in foreign countries.
encounter.zh: 学生在适应外国新学习环境时可能会遇到重大困难。

encouragement.en: His encouragement made me try again.
encouragement.zh: 他的鼓励让我再次尝试。

endanger.en: Industrial pollution can endanger public health and damage ecosystems in surrounding communities.
endanger.zh: 工业污染可能危及公众健康并破坏周边社区的生态系统。

endangered.en: The panda is an endangered animal species.

endeavor.en: We endeavor to finish the project on time.
endeavor.zh: 我们尽力按时完成项目。

components.en: The failure was attributed to multiple faulty components in the industrial machinery.
components.zh: 故障归因于工业机械中的多个有缺陷的部件。

compose.en: The committee will compose a detailed report on the environmental impact of the project.
compose.zh: 委员会将撰写一份关于该项目环境影响的具体报告。

composed.en: The music was composed by a young artist.
composed.zh: 这首音乐由一位年轻艺术家创作。

composers.en: Many famous composers from the Romantic era drew significant inspiration from nature.
composers.zh: 许多浪漫主义时期的著名作曲家从大自然中获得了重要的灵感。

composition.en: Our English composition is due on Monday.
composition.zh: 我们的英语作文星期一要交。

compost.en: Using compost in agricultural practices can significantly reduce reliance on chemical fertilizers.
compost.zh: 在农业实践中使用堆肥可以大大减少对化肥的依赖。

compound.en: The chemical compound found in certain plants has shown promising results in medical research.
compound.zh: 在某些植物中发现的化合物已在医学研究中显示出可喜的结果。

comprehend.zh: 孩子们无法理解这本书。

expel.en: The university decided to expel the student for repeatedly violating academic integrity policies, which raised concerns about fairness in disciplinary procedures.
expel.zh: 大学决定开除这个学生，因为他反复违反学术诚信政策，这引发了对纪律处分程序公平性的担忧。

expend.en: During physical exercise, the human body expends considerable energy to maintain optimal function and regulate body temperature effectively.
expend.zh: 在体育锻炼期间，人体消耗大量能量以维持最佳功能并有效调节体温。

expense.en: The expense was higher than expected.

expenses.en: I need to cut my monthly expenses.
expenses.zh: 我需要减少每月的开支。

expensive.en: This restaurant is too expensive for us.
expensive.zh: 这家餐厅对我们来说太贵了。

experience.zh: 学生在国外体验新文化。

experiment.zh: 科学家用新方法做实验。

experimentation.zh: 科学家偏好谨慎的实验。

experiments.zh: 实验显示出清晰的结果。

endemic.en: Malaria is endemic in tropical regions.
endemic.zh: 疟疾在热带地区是地方性的。

enforcing.en: The government is enforcing stricter environmental regulations to combat air pollution in major cities.
enforcing.zh: 政府正在实施更严格的环境法规，以对抗主要城市的空气污染。

evidently.en: Evidently, the new waste management policy has significantly reduced landfill contributions in urban areas.
evidently.zh: 显然，新的废物管理政策已大幅减少了城市地区的垃圾填埋量。

evil.en: Some philosophers argue that ignoring climate change is one of the greatest evil acts of our generation.
evil.zh: 一些哲学家认为，忽视气候变化是我们这一代人最大的恶行之一。

evoke.en: His speech could evoke strong emotions.
evoke.zh: 他的演讲能唤起强烈的情感。

evolution.en: Darwin studied the evolution of species.
evolution.zh: 达尔文研究物种的进化。

evolve.en: Public attitudes toward sustainable living continue to evolve as more people recognize the urgency of climate action.
evolve.zh: 随着越来越多的人认识到气候行动的紧迫性，公众对可持续生活的态度持续转变。

evolved.en: The species evolved over millions of years.
evolved.zh: 这个物种经过数百万年进化。

explode.en: The bomb could explode at any moment.
explode.zh: 这颗炸弹随时可能爆炸。

exploded.en: The balloon exploded with a loud pop.
exploded.zh: 气球发出一声巨响爆炸了。

exploit.en: We should exploit new opportunities for business growth.
exploit.zh: 我们应该利用新的商业增长机会。

exploitation.en: The exploitation of natural resources must stop.
exploitation.zh: 自然资源的开发必须停止。

explored.en: The team explored several new ideas.
explored.zh: 团队探索了几个新想法。

explorer.en: The explorer traveled through dense forests.
explorer.zh: 探险者穿越了茂密的森林。

explorers.zh: 早期的探险家发现了新大陆。

explosion.en: The explosion of the population causes housing problems.
explosion.zh: 人口的激增导致住房问题。

external.en: The building has no external damage.
external.zh: 这栋建筑没有外部损坏。

externally.en: The university has been externally audited to ensure that all financial records meet international standards.
externally.zh: 这所大学已接受外部审计，以确保所有财务记录符合国际标准。

extinct.en: Dinosaurs became extinct millions of years ago.
extinct.zh: 恐龙在数百万年前灭绝了。

extinction.zh: 许多物种今天面临灭绝。

extinguish.en: Firefighters worked through the night to extinguish the flames before they could spread to nearby buildings.
extinguish.zh: 消防员彻夜工作，在火势蔓延到附近建筑物之前将其扑灭。

extra.en: We need extra time to finish the project.
extra.zh: 我们需要额外的时间来完成项目。

extra cost.en: There is no extra cost for this service.
extra cost.zh: 这项服务没有额外费用。

extraction.en: The extraction of oil damages the environment.

failed.en: He failed the test because he did not study.
failed.zh: 他因为没学习所以考试不及格。

failure.en: The project ended in complete failure.

fair.en: The judge made a fair decision in the case.
fair.zh: 法官在这个案件中做出了公平的决定。

fairly.en: Although the exam was challenging, she performed fairly well and achieved a respectable score overall.
fairly.zh: 虽然考试具有挑战性，但她表现得相当不错，总体取得了不错的成绩。

fairy.en: The story had a fairy tale ending.
fairy.zh: 这个故事有童话般的结局。

faith.en: Faith helped him through difficult times.
faith.zh: 信仰帮助他度过了艰难时期。

fake.en: Someone tried to fake the signature.

falcons.en: Falcons are fast and skilled hunters.
falcons.zh: 猎鹰是快速且熟练的猎手。

fall behind.en: Students who do not manage their time effectively may fall behind in their academic responsibilities.
fall behind.zh: 不能有效管理时间的学生可能会在学业责任方面落后。

exposure.en: Too much sun exposure can harm skin.
exposure.zh: 过多晒太阳会伤害皮肤。

exposures.en: Multiple exposures to various teaching methodologies help students develop versatile learning strategies and adaptable skills.
exposures.zh: 多次接触不同的教学方法帮助学生培养多样化的学习策略和适应能力。

express.en: Students should express their ideas clearly.
express.zh: 学生应该清楚地表达自己的想法。

expressions.en: His facial expressions showed he was surprised.
expressions.zh: 他的面部表情显示他很惊讶。

extend.en: The government will extend the deadline by one week.
extend.zh: 政府将把截止日期延长一周。

extended.en: The meeting has an extended deadline now.
extended.zh: 会议的截止日期现在延长了。

extension.en: I need an extension for my assignment.

extensively.en: The impact of social media on adolescent mental health has been studied extensively by psychologists worldwide.
extensively.zh: 社交媒体对青少年心理健康的影响已被世界各地的心理学家广泛研究。

extent.en: We cannot measure the full extent of the damage.
extent.zh: 我们无法衡量损害的全部程度。

extravagant.en: Many people consider buying designer brands an extravagant way to spend money, especially when affordable alternatives are equally durable.
extravagant.zh: 许多人认为购买名牌是一种奢侈的消费方式，尤其是当更便宜的替代品同样耐用的时候。

extreme.en: Extreme weather conditions such as hurricanes and floods have become more frequent due to climate change, causing widespread damage.
extreme.zh: 由于气候变化，飓风和洪水等极端天气条件变得更加频繁，造成了广泛的破坏。

extremely.en: The weather was extremely hot last summer.
extremely.zh: 去年夏天天气非常炎热。

eye.en: The human eye is capable of distinguishing approximately ten million different colors, making our visual perception remarkably sophisticated.
eye.zh: 人眼能够区分大约一千万种不同的颜色，使我们的视觉感知非常复杂。

eye contact.en: Good speakers make eye contact with the audience.
eye contact.zh: 好的演讲者会与观众进行眼神交流。

eyesight.en: Prolonged screen time can gradually deteriorate one's eyesight, which is why eye doctors recommend taking regular breaks.
eyesight.zh: 长时间使用屏幕会逐渐损害视力，这就是眼科医生建议定期休息的原因。

fabric.zh: 这块织物摸起来很柔软。

fabrics.en: This shop sells many types of fabrics.

fabulous.en: The museum's new exhibition features a fabulous collection of ancient artifacts that attract visitors from around the world.
fabulous.zh: 博物馆的新展览展示了一系列精美的古代文物，吸引来自世界各地的参观者。

face.en: The government must face the growing concern about environmental degradation and take immediate action to address this critical issue.
face.zh: 政府必须正视日益严重的环境退化问题，并立即采取行动来解决这一关键问题。

facial.en: She applied a facial cream before bed.

facilitate.en: This tool can facilitate better teamwork.
facilitate.zh: 这个工具可以促进更好的团队合作。

facilitated.en: The conference was facilitated by experts in the field who guided discussions on climate change and sustainable development.
facilitated.zh: 该会议由该领域的专家主持，他们引导了关于气候变化和可持续发展的讨论。

facilitates.en: Regular physical exercise facilitates better sleep patterns and improves concentration levels throughout the day.
facilitates.zh: 定期的体育锻炼促进更好的睡眠模式，并提高全天的注意力水平。

facilitating.en: The government is facilitating economic recovery by implementing new policies that support small businesses.
facilitating.zh: 政府正在通过实施支持小型企业的新政策来促进经济复苏。

facilitation.en: The facilitation of learning requires not only knowledge of the subject but also strong interpersonal skills.
facilitation.zh: 学习的促进不仅需要学科知识，还需要较强的人际交往能力。

facilitator.en: A skilled facilitator can guide group discussions effectively while ensuring all participants have an equal voice.
facilitator.zh: 一位熟练的引导者可以有效地引导小组讨论，同时确保所有参与者都有平等的发言权。

facilitators.en: Experienced facilitators create a supportive environment where participants feel comfortable sharing diverse perspectives.
facilitators.zh: 经验丰富的引导者创造一个支持性的环境，让参与者能够舒适地分享不同的观点。

facilities.en: The school has excellent sports facilities.
facilities.zh: 这所学校有优秀的体育设施。

facility.en: The sports facility provides equipment and training areas for athletes at all skill levels to practice regularly.
facility.zh: 该体育设施为各级别运动员提供设备和训练场地，以便他们定期练习。

fact.en: It is a well-established fact that regular exercise contributes to both physical and mental well-being.
fact.zh: 众所周知，定期锻炼有助于身心健康。

factor.en: The economic factor plays a significant role in determining the success of any development project.
factor.zh: 经济因素在决定任何发展项目的成功方面起着重要作用。

factored.en: When the environmental costs were factored into the analysis, the project appeared far less viable.
factored.zh: 当环境成本被纳入分析时，该项目看起来远不那么可行。

factories.zh: 这里有很多工厂生产汽车。

factoring.en: Factoring in the rising energy prices, the company revised its production forecast downward.
factoring.zh: 考虑到能源价格上涨，公司向下修正了生产预测。

factory.en: The factory produces thousands of cars each year.
factory.zh: 工厂每年生产数千辆汽车。

factual.en: Please check the factual information in the report.
factual.zh: 请检查报告中的事实信息。

faculty.en: The faculty met to discuss the new policy.
faculty.zh: 教职员工开会讨论新政策。

fade.en: Over time, the vivid colors of the ancient mural began to fade due to exposure to direct sunlight.
fade.zh: 随着时间的推移，由于暴露在阳光直射下，古代壁画鲜艳的色彩开始褪色。

fail.en: Many small businesses fail in the first year.
fail.zh: 许多小企业第一年就倒闭了。

false.en: The false advertising led to many customers demanding refunds, highlighting the importance of honest marketing practices.
false.zh: 虚假的广告导致许多顾客要求退款，凸显了诚实营销实践的重要性。

fame.en: The book brought her fame and wealth.
fame.zh: 这本书给她带来了名声和财富。

familiar.en: The song sounds very familiar to me.
familiar.zh: 这首歌对我来说很熟悉。

families.zh: 不同的家庭有不同的传统。

family.en: She runs a family business in town.
family.zh: 她在城里经营一家家族企业。

family members.en: All family members attended the wedding.
family members.zh: 所有家庭成员都参加了婚礼。

famine.en: Famine remains a serious issue in developing countries, where climate change and conflict exacerbate food shortages.
famine.zh: 饥荒仍然是发展中国家面临的严重问题，气候变化和冲突加剧了粮食短缺。

famous.zh: 她成为了一位著名的作家。

fan.en: The fan bought concert tickets online.
fan.zh: 粉丝在网上买了演唱会门票。

fancy.zh: 她买了一件花哨的连衣裙。

export.en: The government plans to export more agricultural products to increase its national income significantly this year.
export.zh: 政府计划出口更多的农产品以显著增加今年的国民收入。

exported.en: Last year, the company exported over one million units to various Asian markets, generating significant revenue.
exported.zh: 去年，该公司向多个亚洲市场出口了超过一百万台设备，创造了可观的收入。

exporter.en: China has become one of the world's largest exporter of electronic products, dominating global markets.
exporter.zh: 中国已成为世界上最大的电子产品出口国之一，在全球市场占据主导地位。

exporters.en: Many exporters have benefited significantly from the favourable trade agreements established between countries recently.
exporters.zh: 许多出口商已从近年来各国之间签订的有利贸易协定中获得了显著收益。

exporting.en: The factory is currently exporting textiles to several European countries, including Germany and France.
exporting.zh: 这家工厂目前正在向包括德国和法国在内的几个欧洲国家出口纺织品。

exports.en: The government's new policy aims to boost agricultural exports significantly to improve farmers' income.
exports.zh: 政府的新政策旨在大幅增加农产品出口，以提高农民的收入。

expose.en: Travelling abroad can expose young people to different cultures and help them develop broader perspectives.
expose.zh: 出国旅行可以让年轻人接触不同的文化，帮助他们拓展更广阔的视野。

exposed.en: Children should not be exposed to violence.
exposed.zh: 儿童不应接触暴力内容。

exposes.en: The documentary exposes the environmental damage caused by certain industries and raises public awareness.
exposes.zh: 这部纪录片揭露了某些行业造成的环境破坏，并提高了公众意识。

exposing.en: The journalist is exposing the corruption scandal that has affected thousands of innocent citizens.
exposing.zh: 这位记者正在揭露这起已影响数千名无辜公民的腐败丑闻。

fields.en: Many farmers work in the rice fields.
fields.zh: 许多农民在稻田里工作。

fierce.en: The competition among graduates for desirable jobs has become increasingly fierce in recent years.
fierce.zh: 近年来，毕业生之间对理想工作的竞争变得日益激烈。

fifty.en: About fifty people came to the event.
fifty.zh: 大约五十人参加了活动。

fight.en: Governments should take immediate action to fight against environmental degradation and pollution.
fight.zh: 政府应该立即采取行动来对抗环境退化和污染问题。

fighting.en: The soldiers are fighting bravely for their country.
fighting.zh: 士兵们正勇敢地为国家而战

figure.en: I can't figure out this problem.

figure out.en: Researchers are working hard to figure out the main causes of the recent economic decline.
figure out.zh: 研究人员正在努力找出最近经济下滑的主要原因。

figures.en: The sales figures are rising fast.
figures.zh: 销售数字正在快速上升。

file.en: Applicants must file their completed forms before the deadline to be considered for the scholarship.
file.zh: 申请人必须在截止日期前提交填好的表格才有资格获得奖学金。

files.en: I saved the important files to my computer.
files.zh: 我把重要文件保存到电脑上。

feast.en: During the harvest festival, villagers prepared a magnificent feast featuring traditional dishes from different regions.
feast.zh: 在丰收节期间，村民们准备了一场盛大的宴会，展示了来自不同地区的传统菜肴。

feat.en: Climbing the peak was an incredible feat.
feat.zh: 登上山峰是一项难以置信的壮举。

feathers.en: The colorful feathers belong to a tropical bird.
feathers.zh: 这些色彩斑斓的羽毛属于一种热带鸟类。

feature.en: One distinctive feature of traditional Japanese architecture is the seamless integration of indoor and outdoor spaces.
feature.zh: 日本传统建筑的一个显著特点是室内外空间的无缝融合。

featured.en: The documentary featured interviews with several immigration experts who shared their insights on global migration patterns.
featured.zh: 这部纪录片采访了几位移民专家，分享了他们对全球迁移模式的见解。

features.zh: 这门课程以实践训练为特色。

featuring.en: The international conference, featuring speakers from forty countries, addressed pressing environmental challenges facing our planet.
featuring.zh: 这次国际会议邀请了来自四十个国家的演讲者，讨论地球面临的紧迫环境挑战。

federal.en: The federal government passed a law.
federal.zh: 联邦政府通过了一项法律。

fee.en: Many universities have significantly increased their tuition fees, making higher education less accessible for low-income families.
fee.zh: 许多大学大幅提高了学费，使低收入家庭更难接受高等教育。

feeble.en: Despite their feeble attempts to address the problem, the committee failed to propose any effective solutions.
feeble.zh: 尽管他们试图解决这个问题，但委员会未能提出任何有效的解决方案。

female.en: The female workers received equal pay.
female.zh: 女性工人获得了同等的报酬。

feminine.en: The study examined how society influences the development of feminine traits in young girls during their formative years.
feminine.zh: 这项研究探讨了社会如何在女孩成长过程中影响其女性特质的发展。

fence.en: They built a fence around their garden.
fence.zh: 他们在花园周围建了围栏。

fences.en: The fences protect the garden from deer.
fences.zh: 栅栏保护花园免受鹿的侵害。

ferry.en: The ferry service connects the mainland with several remote islands, providing essential transportation for local residents.
ferry.zh: 渡轮服务将大陆与几个偏远岛屿连接起来，为当地居民提供必要的交通服务。
