fertile.en: The farmer grows crops on fertile land.
fertile.zh: 农民在肥沃的土地上种植庄稼。

fertilisers.en: Farmers use fertilisers to improve crop yield.
fertilisers.zh: 农民使用肥料来提高作物产量。

fertility.en: The soil has high fertility for farming.
fertility.zh: 这片土壤有很高的肥力，适合耕作。

festivals.en: Many festivals are celebrated in spring.

fetch.en: Many families in rural areas still have to fetch water from wells located several kilometers away from their homes.
fetch.zh: 许多农村家庭仍然需要从离家几公里外的井里取水。

feud.en: The long-standing feud between the two neighboring communities has finally been resolved through mediation and dialogue.
feud.zh: 这两个相邻社区之间长期存在的争端最终通过调解和对话得到解决。

fever.en: The child has a high fever.

few.en: Only a few students in the class managed to achieve a perfect score on the challenging English proficiency test.
few.zh: 班上只有少数学生在这次具有挑战性的英语水平测试中取得了满分。

fiber.en: Health experts recommend consuming foods rich in fiber because they promote better digestion and overall wellbeing.
fiber.zh: 健康专家建议食用富含纤维的食物，因为它们能促进更好的消化和整体健康。

fibre.en: Fibre is good for your health.
fibre.zh: 纤维对你的健康有好处。

fibres.en: These fibres come from natural plants.
fibres.zh: 这些纤维来自天然植物。

fiction.en: Science fiction is my favorite genre.
fiction.zh: 科幻小说是我最喜欢的类型。

field.en: He works in the education field.

field trip.en: We went on a field trip yesterday.
field trip.zh: 我们昨天去实地考察了。

fascinated.en: She was fascinated by the magic show.

fascinating.en: This documentary about space is fascinating.
fascinating.zh: 这部关于太空的纪录片引人入胜。

fashion.zh: 时尚潮流每季都在变化。

fashionable.en: She always wears fashionable clothes to work.
fashionable.zh: 她总是穿时髦的衣服去上班。

fast.en: The train moved fast across the countryside.

fast food.en: Fast food consumption has increased dramatically worldwide, contributing to health problems such as obesity and heart disease.
fast food.zh: 快餐消费在全球范围内急剧增加，导致了肥胖和心脏病等健康问题。

fat.en: Too much fat in your diet is unhealthy.
fat.zh: 饮食中过多的脂肪不利于健康。

fatal.en: The fatal accident on the highway highlighted the urgent need for stricter safety regulations for heavy vehicles.
fatal.zh: 高速公路上这起致命事故凸显了对重型车辆实施更严格安全法规的迫切需要。

fate.en: The fate of endangered species depends largely on government policies and international conservation efforts.
fate.zh: 濒危物种的命运很大程度上取决于政府政策和国际保护努力。

father.en: My father works at a local bank.
father.zh: 我父亲在本地一家银行工作。

feed.en: Farmers feed their animals every morning.

feed on.en: These birds feed on insects in the summer.
feed on.zh: 这些鸟在夏天以昆虫为食。

feedback.en: Students receive feedback on their writing.
feedback.zh: 学生收到关于写作的反馈。

feeding.en: Feeding wild animals is not allowed.

feel.en: Many international students feel anxious about adapting to a new culture, but this experience often leads to personal growth.
feel.zh: 许多留学生对适应新文化感到焦虑，但这种经历通常会带来个人成长。

feelings.zh: 他无法隐藏自己的情感。

fees.en: The university fees are quite expensive.

feet.en: My feet are cold from walking outside.
feet.zh: 我的脚因为在外面走而冰冷。

fellow.en: I shared books with my fellow students.

fellowship.en: The research fellowship allowed me to work alongside distinguished scholars and conduct independent research in my field of interest.
fellowship.zh: 这个研究奖学金让我能够与杰出学者一起工作，并在我的研究领域进行独立研究。

fantastic.en: The fantastic scenery of the mountain region吸引了国内外游客前来观赏，旅游业因此蓬勃发展。
fantastic.zh: fantastic 的山脉风光吸引了国内外游客前来观赏，旅游业因此蓬勃发展。

fantasy.en: Many young readers are drawn to fantasy novels because they provide an escape from the stresses of daily life.
fantasy.zh: 许多年轻读者被奇幻小说所吸引，因为它们为读者提供了逃离日常生活压力的途径。

far.en: Although the new shopping centre is located far from residential areas, it still receives a large number of visitors daily.
far.zh: 尽管新购物中心位于远离居民区的地方，它每天仍然接待大量访客。

fare.en: What is the bus fare to downtown?
fare.zh: 去市中心的公交车费是多少？

farm.en: They farm rice in the south.

farmer.en: The farmer explained that this year's harvest was particularly poor due to unexpected floods during the planting season.
farmer.zh: 这位农民解释说，由于种植季节遭遇意外洪水，今年的收成特别差。

farmers.en: Local farmers grow rice and vegetables.
farmers.zh: 当地农民种植水稻和蔬菜。

farming.en: Modern farming uses less water now.
farming.zh: 现代农业现在用水更少。

farmland.en: We need more farmland to grow food.
farmland.zh: 我们需要更多的耕地来种植粮食。

fascinate.en: The ancient Egyptian pyramids continue to fascinate archaeologists and historians who seek to understand their mysteries.
fascinate.zh: 古埃及金字塔继续吸引着渴望了解其奥秘的考古学家和历史学家。

fatigue.en: The fatigue from long working hours often leads to decreased productivity, poor decision-making, and serious health issues.
fatigue.zh: 长期工作导致的疲劳常常引起生产力下降、决策失误以及严重的健康问题。

favor.en: Some argue that governments should not favor certain industries over others when allocating limited resources.
favor.zh: 有人认为，政府在分配有限资源时不应该偏袒某些行业。

favorite.en: My favorite part of studying abroad was experiencing different cultures and learning from diverse perspectives.
favorite.zh: 我在国外留学期间最喜欢的部分就是体验不同的文化并从多样的视角中学习。

favour.en: I favour the second plan option.
favour.zh: 我赞成第二个计划方案。

favourable.en: The weather conditions were favourable for the event.
favourable.zh: 天气条件对这次活动很有利。

favourite.zh: 阅读是我最喜欢的爱好。

fax.en: Please send this document by fax today.
fax.zh: 请今天通过传真发送这份文件。

fear.en: I fear the results of the test.
fear.zh: 我担心这次考试的结果。

feasible.zh: 这个计划看起来是可行的。

fill out.en: Participants should fill out the survey questionnaire to provide valuable feedback.
fill out.zh: 参与者应填写调查问卷，以提供有价值的反馈。

filled.en: The room was filled with laughter.

film.en: My friend wants to film the whole event.
film.zh: 我朋友想拍摄整个活动。

films.en: I enjoy watching classic films on weekends.
films.zh: 我喜欢周末看经典电影。

filter.en: Please filter the water before drinking.

final.en: Students who fail the final examination will have the opportunity to retake it in August.
final.zh: 未能通过期末考试的学生将有机会在八月重考。

finalise.en: The government plans to finalise the new environmental regulations by the end of the month.
finalise.zh: 政府计划在本月底前最终确定新的环境法规。

finalised.en: The terms of the agreement have been finalised after months of careful negotiation.
finalised.zh: 经过数月的仔细谈判，协议的条款已经最终确定。

financed.en: The construction of the new library was financed by the local government and private investors.
financed.zh: 新图书馆的建设由当地政府和私人投资者资助。

finances.en: Many university students find it difficult to manage their finances while balancing academic workload.
finances.zh: 许多大学生发现，在平衡学业的同时管理自己的财务是很困难的。

financial.en: The company is facing financial difficulties.
financial.zh: 这家公司正面临财务困难。

financially.en: Some families are not financially stable enough to afford higher education for their children.
financially.zh: 有些家庭经济不够稳定，无法负担子女的高等教育费用。

financing.en: The financing of healthcare systems remains a significant challenge for developing countries.
financing.zh: 医疗体系的融资对发展中国家来说仍然是一个重大挑战。

find.en: Researchers often find that their initial hypotheses need to be revised after conducting experiments.
find.zh: 研究人员经常发现，在进行实验后，他们最初的假设需要修改。

find out.en: Students should find out about entry requirements before submitting their university applications.
find out.zh: 学生在提交大学申请之前应该了解入学要求。

find out more about.en: We should find out more about this subject.
find out more about.zh: 我们应该了解更多关于这个主题的信息。

finding.en: The finding that air pollution has significant effects on public health has been widely documented.
finding.zh: 空气污染对公众健康有重大影响这一发现已得到广泛记录。

fine.en: The weather was fine during the holiday, so many families chose to visit outdoor attractions.
fine.zh: 假期期间天气很好，所以许多家庭选择去户外景点游玩。

finger.en: She cut her finger while cooking.

fingers.en: She typed on the keyboard with ten fingers.
fingers.zh: 她用十个手指在键盘上打字。

finish.en: Students must finish their assignments before the deadline to avoid losing marks on their final grades.
finish.zh: 学生必须在截止日期前完成作业，以避免在最终成绩中失分。

finished.en: He finished his work ahead of schedule.

finite.en: The earth's resources are finite, which is why governments must implement policies to promote recycling and conservation.
finite.zh: 地球资源是有限的，这就是为什么各国政府必须实施促进回收利用和保护的政策。

fire.en: The soldiers began to fire at the enemy.
fire.zh: 士兵们开始向敌人开火。

fireball.en: The fireball lit up the night sky.

fires.en: Several fires broke out in the forest.
fires.zh: 森林里发生了数起火灾。

fireworks.en: The fireworks lit up the night sky.

first.en: The first time I visited London, I was immediately struck by the historic architecture throughout the city.
first.zh: 我第一次访问伦敦时，立刻被整个城市的历史建筑所震撼。

first aid.en: Everyone should learn basic first aid skills.
first aid.zh: 每个人都应该学习基本的急救技能。

first century.en: This temple dates back to the first century.
first century.zh: 这座寺庙可以追溯到第一世纪。

first class.en: She prefers to fly first class.

first draft.en: She finished the first draft of her novel.

first of all.en: First of all, it is important to understand the main argument before attempting to write a critical analysis.
first of all.zh: 首先，在尝试写批判性分析之前，理解主要论点是很重要的。

fiscal.en: The government announced new fiscal policies aimed at reducing the national debt and stimulating economic growth.
fiscal.zh: 政府宣布了旨在减少国债和刺激经济增长的新财政政策。

fish.en: We had fish and rice for dinner.
fish.zh: 我们晚餐吃了鱼和米饭。

fisheries.en: Many fisheries are near the coast.
fisheries.zh: 许多渔场位于海岸附近。

fisherman.en: The fisherman sold fresh fish at the market.
fisherman.zh: 渔夫在市场上卖新鲜鱼。

flavor.en: Many tourists are surprised by the diverse flavor combinations they encounter when trying authentic international cuisine for the first time.
flavor.zh: 许多游客在第一次尝试正宗的国际美食时，会对他们遇到的多样化口味组合感到惊讶。

flavour.en: Add cinnamon to flavour the rice pudding.

flaw.en: Despite its apparent strength, the construction of the new bridge was found to have a serious structural flaw during the inspection.
flaw.zh: 尽管新桥外表坚固，但在检查过程中人们发现其结构存在严重的缺陷。

flee.en: During the conflict, thousands of civilians were forced to flee their homes in search of safety and shelter in neighbouring countries.
flee.zh: 在冲突期间，数千名平民被迫逃离家园，到邻国寻找安全和庇护。

fleet.en: The shipping fleet plays a crucial role in international trade, transporting goods between continents and supporting the global economy.
fleet.zh: 船队在国际贸易中起着至关重要的作用，在各大洲之间运输货物并支撑全球经济。

flesh.en: As people age, the flesh on their faces tends to lose elasticity, which often leads to the formation of wrinkles and fine lines.
flesh.zh: 随着人们年龄增长，面部皮肤往往会失去弹性，这通常会导致皱纹和细纹的形成。

flexible.en: My boss is flexible about my working hours.
flexible.zh: 我的老板对我的工作时间很灵活。

flick.en: With a quick flick of his wrist, the chef demonstrated how to properly toss vegetables in a hot wok to achieve perfect texture.
flick.zh: 厨师快速挥动手腕，示范了如何正确地在热锅中翻炒蔬菜以达到完美的质地。

flight.en: My flight leaves at noon tomorrow.
flight.zh: 我的航班明天中午起飞。

flights.en: Many international flights were delayed yesterday.
flights.zh: 昨天许多国际航班延误了。

fixed.en: The price is fixed and cannot be changed.
fixed.zh: 价格是固定的，不能更改。

fixture.en: The old fireplace has been a fixture in this house for over a hundred years, adding to its charm.
fixture.zh: 这个老壁炉已经成为这所房子一百多年来的固定装置，增添了它的魅力。

flag.en: The flag was raised at dawn.

flags.en: Many flags flew at the stadium.
flags.zh: 体育场里飘扬着许多旗帜。

flame.en: The small flame on the candle flickered gently, casting dancing shadows across the dimly lit room.
flame.zh: 蜡烛上的小火苗轻轻摇曳，在昏暗的房间里投下舞动的影子。

flap.en: When birds flap their wings rapidly, they can generate enough lift to take off from the ground quickly.
flap.zh: 当鸟类快速拍打翅膀时，它们可以产生足够的升力快速从地面起飞。

flare.en: Tensions between the two nations began to flare after the disputed border incident was widely reported in media.
flare.zh: 在争议边界事件被媒体广泛报道后，两国之间的紧张关系开始升级。

flash.en: A bright flash lit up the dark room.
flash.zh: 一道明亮的闪光照亮了黑暗的房间。

flat.en: The road ahead is flat and easy to drive.

flatter.en: The young politician tried to flatter the voters by praising their community during the campaign speech.
flatter.zh: 这位年轻的政治家在竞选演讲中试图通过赞扬他们的社区来讨好选民。

fishermen.en: The fishermen returned with a big catch.
fishermen.zh: 渔民们带着大丰收回来了。

fishing.en: Fishing is a relaxing outdoor activity.
fishing.zh: 钓鱼是一项轻松的户外活动。

fishing industry.en: The fishing industry employs many local people.
fishing industry.zh: 捕渔业雇佣了许多当地人。

fission.en: Nuclear power plants generate electricity through fission, a process that splits atoms to release massive amounts of energy.
fission.zh: 核电站通过裂变产生电力，这是一个分裂原子以释放大量能量的过程。

fist.en: The athlete raised his fist in triumph after crossing the finish line in first place at the marathon.
fist.zh: 这位运动员在马拉松比赛中第一个冲过终点线后，胜利地举起了拳头。

fit.en: Regular exercise helps people stay fit and significantly reduces the risk of developing chronic diseases.
fit.zh: 定期锻炼帮助人们保持健康，并大大降低患慢性疾病的风险。

fit in.en: She wants to fit in at school.

fitness.en: Regular exercise improves your fitness level.
fitness.zh: 经常锻炼会提高你的健康水平。

fitness centre.en: I go to the fitness centre daily.

fix.en: The government needs to fix the housing crisis by building more affordable homes for low-income families.
fix.zh: 政府需要通过为低收入家庭建造更多经济实惠的住房来解决住房危机。

finalising.en: The university is finalising its admission criteria for the upcoming academic year after extensive consultations.
finalising.zh: 经过广泛咨询后，大学正在敲定下一学年的招生标准。

finalist.en: After months of intensive preparation, she was thrilled to be named a finalist in the international singing competition.
finalist.zh: 经过数月的紧张准备，她很高兴被命名为国际歌唱比赛的决赛选手。

finalists.en: The judges carefully evaluated all submissions and selected three finalists who will compete in the grand finale.
finalists.zh: 评委仔细评估了所有提交的作品，并选出了三名将在总决赛中竞争的选手。

finality.en: The finality of the examination results meant that students had to accept their scores and plan their next steps accordingly.
finality.zh: 考试结果的最终性意味着学生必须接受分数，并相应地规划下一步。

finalize.en: The project team needs to finalize the research proposal before the deadline to secure additional funding from the university.
finalize.zh: 项目团队需要在截止日期前敲定研究方案，以从大学获得额外资金。

finalized.en: Once the travel itinerary has been finalized, participants will receive detailed information about accommodation and activities.
finalized.zh: 一旦旅行行程最终确定，参与者将收到关于住宿和活动的详细信息。

finalizing.en: The research team is finalizing the discussion chapter of their thesis, incorporating feedback from their supervisors.
finalizing.zh: 研究小组正在完成论文的讨论章节，整合导师的反馈意见。

finals.en: During finals week, the campus library remains open twenty-four hours to accommodate students preparing for their examinations.
finals.zh: 在期末考试周期间，校园图书馆全天24小时开放，以容纳准备考试的学生。

finance.en: The bank will finance our business.
finance.zh: 银行将为我们的企业融资。

fold.en: She carefully fold the map along its creased lines before placing it back into her travel bag.
fold.zh: 她小心地沿着折痕把地图折好，然后放回旅行袋里。

folded.en: She folded the clean clothes neatly on the bed.
folded.zh: 她把干净的衣服整齐地叠在床上。

folk.zh: 民间音乐听起来很传统。

folklore.en: This village has interesting folklore about dragons.
folklore.zh: 这个村庄有关于龙的民间传说。

followers.en: The celebrity has many online followers.
followers.zh: 这位名人有许多在线追随者。

fond.en: I have always been fond of reading historical novels that transport me to different eras and places.
fond.zh: 我一直喜欢阅读把我带到不同年代和地方的历史小说。

food.en: Fresh food is good for your health.
food.zh: 新鲜食物对你的健康有益。

food chain.en: The food chain is essential for life.
food chain.zh: 食物链对生命至关重要。

flow.en: The steady flow of information between departments is essential for maintaining efficiency in any large organization.
flow.zh: 部门之间稳定的信息流对于维持任何大型组织的效率至关重要。

flower.en: The cherry blossom is a flower that holds significant cultural importance in Japanese tradition and tourism.
flower.zh: 樱花是一种在日本传统和旅游业中具有重要文化意义的花卉。

flu.en: During winter, the flu spreads rapidly, and public health officials recommend vaccination to prevent infection.
flu.zh: 在冬季，流感传播迅速，公共卫生官员建议接种疫苗以预防感染。

fluctuate.en: Oil prices tend to fluctuate due to geopolitical tensions and changes in global supply and demand.
fluctuate.zh: 由于地缘政治紧张局势以及全球供需变化，石油价格往往会有波动。

fluid.en: Water is a common fluid on Earth.
fluid.zh: 水是地球上常见的流体。

flush.en: When she spoke in public, her face would flush red due to anxiety and fear of judgment.
flush.zh: 当她在公开场合讲话时，由于紧张和害怕被评判，她的脸会涨得通红。

flute.en: She plays the flute in the band.

flux.en: The education system has been in a state of flux, with constant reforms being implemented to improve outcomes.
flux.zh: 教育体系一直处于不断变化之中，不断有改革措施被实施以改善教育成果。

food production.en: Food production is essential for human survival.
food production.zh: 食品生产对人类生存至关重要。

food source.en: Fishing is their main food source.
food source.zh: 捕鱼是他们主要的食物来源。

food supply.en: The food supply is running low.

foods.en: Fresh foods are better for health.
foods.zh: 新鲜食品对健康更有益。

fool.en: Do not try to fool your teacher.
fool.zh: 不要试图愚弄你的老师。

foot.en: I hurt my foot while running.

football.en: The children play football every Saturday.

footbridge.en: We crossed the footbridge over the river.
footbridge.zh: 我们穿过河上的人行桥。

footer.en: Please write your name in the footer.
footer.zh: 请把你的名字写在页脚。

footprints.en: We saw footprints in the snow.
footprints.zh: 我们在雪地里看到了脚印。

forecasts.zh: 天气预报帮助我们计划。

forehead.en: The athlete wiped the sweat from his forehead after completing the exhausting marathon race.
forehead.zh: 这位运动员在完成马拉松比赛后，擦掉了额头的汗水。

foreign.en: She learned to speak a foreign language.

foremost.en: Education is foremost among the government's priorities, with substantial funding allocated to schools and universities.
foremost.zh: 教育是政府的首要优先事项，学校和大学获得了大量资金支持。

foresee.en: It is difficult to foresee how technological advancements will reshape the job market in the coming years.
foresee.zh: 很难预见技术进步将如何重塑未来几年的就业市场。

forest.en: Many animals live in the forest.
forest.zh: 许多动物生活在森林里。

forests.en: Many animals live in the tropical forests.
forests.zh: 许多动物生活在热带森林中。

forever.en: Nothing lasts forever in this world.

forfeit.en: Athletes who violate doping regulations may forfeit their medals and face lengthy suspensions from competition.
forfeit.zh: 违反兴奋剂规定的运动员可能会被剥夺奖牌，并面临长期禁赛。

forge.en: The craftsman used traditional techniques to forge intricate metal designs for the royal palace gates.
forge.zh: 这位工匠使用传统技术为皇宫大门锻造出复杂的金属图案。

forgotten.en: I had forgotten her birthday completely.
forgotten.zh: 我完全忘记了她的生日。

fork.en: When eating at formal dinners, it is important to hold the fork in your left hand and the knife in your right.
fork.zh: 在正式晚宴上用餐时，用左手拿叉、右手拿刀是很重要的。

form.en: Students must fill out a registration form to enrol in university courses at the beginning of each semester.
form.zh: 学生必须在每学期初填写登记表才能注册大学课程。

formal.en: The meeting will be formal and professional.
formal.zh: 会议将是正式且专业的。

format.en: The format of the IELTS listening test requires candidates to answer forty questions within thirty minutes.
format.zh: 雅思听力考试的格式要求考生在三十分钟内回答四十道题。

formation.en: The formation of professional networks during university years can significantly benefit graduates in their future careers.
formation.zh: 大学期间建立专业人脉网络对毕业生未来的职业发展大有裨益。

former.en: The former president gave a speech yesterday.
former.zh: 前总统昨天发表了演讲。

formidable.en: Learning a new language presents a formidable challenge, but consistent practice and immersion can lead to fluency over time.
formidable.zh: 学习一门新语言是一个艰巨的挑战，但持续练习和沉浸其中可以随着时间推移达到流利程度。

formula.en: Students must memorize this math formula.
formula.zh: 学生必须记住这个数学公式。

fly.zh: 鸟儿每年冬天飞往南方。

flyer.en: She handed out a colorful flyer.
flyer.zh: 她分发了一张色彩缤纷的传单。

flying.en: The birds are flying across the blue sky.

focus on.en: Students should focus on their main goals.
focus on.zh: 学生应该专注于他们的主要目标。

focused.en: A focused study schedule is essential for achieving high scores in the IELTS examination.
focused.zh: 专注的学习计划对于在雅思考试中取得高分至关重要。

focuses.en: The documentary focuses on the impact of climate change on coastal communities worldwide.
focuses.zh: 这部纪录片关注气候变化对世界各地沿海社区的影响。

focusing.en: The company is focusing its resources on developing sustainable energy solutions.
focusing.zh: 该公司正集中资源开发可持续能源解决方案。

focussed.en: Despite the interruptions, the speaker remained calmly focussed on delivering the key message.
focussed.zh: 尽管受到干扰，演讲者仍然平静地专注于传达关键信息。

focussing.en: Focussing too much on examination techniques can sometimes overshadow the joy of genuine learning.
focussing.zh: 过于注重考试技巧有时会掩盖真正学习的乐趣。

foe.en: In the battle against environmental degradation, pollution is our greatest foe that demands immediate action.
foe.zh: 在对抗环境退化的斗争中，污染是我们最大的敌人，需要立即采取行动。

footwear.en: The store sells all types of footwear.

for centuries.en: This tradition has existed for centuries.
for centuries.zh: 这个传统已经存在了数个世纪。

for example.en: Government investment in public transport can reduce traffic congestion, for example, by expanding metro systems.
for example.zh: 政府在公共交通方面的投资可以减少交通拥堵，例如通过扩建地铁系统。

for instance.en: Some argue that social media platforms should regulate content more strictly; for instance, they could require identity verification.
for instance.zh: 一些人认为社交媒体平台应该更严格地监管内容；例如，他们可以要求身份验证。

for one thing.en: I prefer living in urban areas, for one thing, because of the greater access to healthcare and education facilities.
for one thing.zh: 我更喜欢住在城市地区，一方面是因为能够更好地获得医疗和教育设施。

for the first time.en: He visited Japan for the first time.

foraging.en: The birds are foraging for seeds in the field.
foraging.zh: 鸟儿正在田野里觅食寻找种子。

forbid.en: Many countries forbid the use of certain harmful chemicals in food production to protect consumer health and safety.
forbid.zh: 许多国家禁止在食品生产中使用某些有害化学物质，以保护消费者的健康和安全。

force.en: The government decided to force large companies to reduce carbon emissions by introducing strict new environmental regulations last year.
force.zh: 政府去年决定通过引入严格的新环境法规来迫使大公司减少碳排放。

forecast.en: The weather forecast predicted rain today.
forecast.zh: 天气预报预测今天有雨。

fling.en: Many young people fling themselves into university life without considering the long-term consequences of their career choices.
fling.zh: 许多年轻人不考虑职业选择的长期后果，就全身心投入大学生活。

float.en: The boat will float on the water.

flock.en: Tourists flock to this beach during summer.
flock.zh: 游客们在夏季涌向这片海滩。

flood.en: Heavy rain can flood the streets.

flooding.en: The heavy rain caused flooding in the streets.
flooding.zh: 大雨导致街道发生洪水。

floor.en: The library provides a quiet study space on the third floor for students preparing for their examinations.
floor.zh: 图书馆为准备考试的学生在三楼提供一个安静的学习空间。

floors.en: She cleaned all the floors yesterday.
floors.zh: 她昨天打扫了所有的地板。

flour.en: The price of flour has increased significantly due to poor harvests, affecting bread production across the country.
flour.zh: 由于收成不佳，面粉价格大幅上涨，影响了全国的面包生产。

from.en: The main ideas can be extracted from the text to better understand the author's argument.
from.zh: 可以从文本中提取主要观点，以便更好地理解作者的观点。

front.en: The front wall is painted white.

frontier.en: The frontier between traditional and modern teaching methods continues to evolve in education.
frontier.zh: 传统教学方法和现代教学方法之间的界限在教育领域继续演变。

frost.en: Frost covered the grass this morning.

frown.en: Many teachers frown upon students who use mobile phones during class time.
frown.zh: 许多老师对学生在上课时间使用手机表示不满。

fruit.en: These trees fruit every summer season.
fruit.zh: 这些树每年夏天都会结果。

fruit trees.en: Farmers grow many fruit trees here.
fruit trees.zh: 农民在这里种植许多果树。

frustrate.en: Technical problems during the exam can frustrate students and affect their performance.
frustrate.zh: 考试期间的技术问题可能会让考生感到沮丧并影响他们的表现。

frustrating.en: The inconsistent public transport system in the city is frustrating for daily commuters.
frustrating.zh: 城市中不一致的公共交通系统让日常通勤者感到沮丧。

frustration.en: His frustration grew with each failed attempt.
frustration.zh: 每次失败的尝试都让他更加沮丧。

foul.en: The foul smell emanating from the nearby industrial plant has become a serious environmental concern for local residents.
foul.zh: 附近工业园区散发的恶臭已成为当地居民严重的环保问题。

found.en: Researchers found that children who engage in outdoor activities develop better social skills than those who stay indoors.
found.zh: 研究人员发现，从事户外活动的孩子比待在家里的孩子具有更好的社交能力。

foundation.en: The charity relies on donations to the foundation.
foundation.zh: 这个慈善机构依靠基金会的捐款。

founder.en: She is the founder of this company.
founder.zh: 她是这家公司的创办者。

fountain.en: The children played near the fountain.
fountain.zh: 孩子们在喷泉附近玩耍。

fountains.en: The park has several beautiful fountains.
fountains.zh: 公园里有几个漂亮的喷泉。

four.en: Recent statistics show that four out of ten university graduates struggle to find employment in their field of study.
four.zh: 最新统计显示，十分之四的大学毕业生难以在所学专业领域找到工作。

four weeks.en: The holiday lasts for four weeks.

fox.en: A clever fox escaped from the zoo.
fox.zh: 一只狡猾的狐狸从动物园逃跑了。

forthcoming.en: The forthcoming environmental summit will bring together world leaders to discuss climate change mitigation strategies.
forthcoming.zh: 即将举行的环境峰会将汇集各国领导人，共同讨论气候变化缓解策略。

fortunate.en: Those who are fortunate enough to live in developed countries often have better access to healthcare and education.
fortunate.zh: 那些有幸生活在发达国家的人通常能够更好地获得医疗和教育资源。

fortunately.en: Fortunately, the government introduced new policies to support small businesses during the economic downturn last year.
fortunately.zh: 幸运的是，政府在去年的经济低迷期间推出了支持小企业的新政策。

fortune.en: She made a fortune in business.
fortune.zh: 她在生意上赚了一大笔钱。

forty.en: The course lasts for forty days.

forum.en: Social media platforms have become an important forum for young people to express their opinions on social issues.
forum.zh: 社交媒体平台已成为年轻人表达对社会问题看法的重要论坛。

forward.en: We must move forward with our plan.
forward.zh: 我们必须推进我们的计划。

fossil.zh: 科学家发现了一块古老的化石。

fossil fuel.en: Reducing our dependence on fossil fuels is essential for combating air pollution and mitigating climate change effects.
fossil fuel.zh: 减少对化石燃料的依赖对于防治空气污染和缓解气候变化影响至关重要。

foster.en: Schools play a vital role in fostering critical thinking skills that prepare students for success in their careers.
foster.zh: 学校在培养学生批判性思维能力方面发挥着至关重要的作用，为学生的职业成功做好准备。

fridge.en: I put the milk back in the fridge.

friend.en: My best friend lives next door.
friend.zh: 我最好的朋友住在隔壁。

friends.en: My friends helped me a lot.
friends.zh: 我的朋友们帮了我很多。

fright.en: The sudden loud noise from the explosion gave everyone in the building a terrible fright.
fright.zh: 爆炸的突然巨响让大楼里的每个人都吓了一大跳。

frighten.en: Loud noises can frighten small children.
frighten.zh: 噪音会让小孩子受到惊吓。

frightened.en: The frightened child hid behind her mother.
frightened.zh: 那个受惊的孩子躲在她母亲身后。

fringe.en: Some fringe political groups are gaining unexpected popularity among young voters recently.
fringe.zh: 一些边缘政治团体最近在年轻选民中获得意想不到的支持。

frog.en: The frog jumped into the pond.

frogs.en: The frogs croaked loudly near the pond.
frogs.zh: 青蛙在池塘边大声鸣叫。

formulae.en: The scientist derived several complex formulae to explain the chemical reaction occurring in the experiment.
formulae.zh: 科学家推导出几个复杂的公式来解释实验中发生的化学反应。

formulas.en: Companies must follow specific formulas when calculating their annual tax obligations to the government.
formulas.zh: 公司在计算年度纳税义务时必须遵循特定的公式。

formulate.en: Students should learn to formulate clear and logical arguments before writing their academic essays.
formulate.zh: 学生应该在写学术论文前学会形成清晰且有逻辑的论点。

formulated.en: The scientist formulated a new hypothesis.
formulated.zh: 科学家提出了一个新假设。

formulating.en: The research team is formulating a new hypothesis that could revolutionise our understanding of genetics.
formulating.zh: 研究团队正在构建一个新的假设，这可能会革新我们对遗传学的理解。

formulation.en: The successful formulation of the marketing campaign contributed significantly to the company's growth.
formulation.zh: 营销活动的成功制定对公司的增长做出了重大贡献。

formulations.en: Various formulations of the medication have been tested to determine which is most effective for patients.
formulations.zh: 药物的各种配方已经过测试，以确定哪种对患者最有效。

forsake.en: Many young professionals choose to forsake high-paying jobs in cities to pursue a simpler lifestyle in rural areas.
forsake.zh: 许多年轻专业人士选择放弃城市的高薪工作，去农村地区追求更简单的生活方式。

fort.en: The ancient fort located on the hilltop served as a crucial defensive structure during the medieval period.
fort.zh: 位于山顶的古堡垒在中世纪时期是重要的防御建筑。

forth.en: He went forth into the unknown.

freight.en: The freight train arrived at the station early.
freight.zh: 货运列车一大早就到达了车站。

frequency.en: The radio station changed its frequency.

frequent.en: His frequent absences annoyed his colleagues.
frequent.zh: 他频繁的缺席惹恼了同事。

frequently.en: Students frequently ask about exam dates.
frequently.zh: 学生们经常询问考试日期。

fresh water.en: We need fresh water to drink.

freshman.en: As a freshman at university, I had to adapt to a new environment, make friends, and manage my own schedule independently.
freshman.zh: 作为大学新生，我不得不适应新环境、交朋友，并独立管理自己的时间安排。

freshwater.en: Freshwater lakes are important for life.

friction.en: Cultural friction can arise when people from different backgrounds work together, but it often leads to innovative solutions.
friction.zh: 来自不同背景的人一起工作时可能会产生文化摩擦，但这往往能带来创新的解决方案。

frameworks.en: Many academic disciplines rely on theoretical frameworks to organize complex research and ensure methodological consistency.
frameworks.zh: 许多学科依赖理论框架来组织复杂的研究，并确保方法论的一致性。

frank.en: The interviewer appreciated the candidate's frank discussion about previous work experience and career aspirations.
frank.zh: 面试官很欣赏候选人坦诚地讨论之前的工作经验和职业期望。

frankly.en: Frankly speaking, many young people today struggle with work-life balance due to increasing professional demands.
frankly.zh: 坦白地说，由于职业要求的不断增加，如今许多年轻人在工作与生活平衡方面都很挣扎。

fraternity.en: Joining a university fraternity can help international students build social networks and adapt to a new culture.
fraternity.zh: 加入大学兄弟会可以帮助国际学生建立社交网络并适应新文化。

free.en: Many universities provide students with free access to online academic journals and research databases.
free.zh: 许多大学为学生免费提供在线学术期刊和研究数据库的访问权限。

free of charge.en: Children under twelve can enter free of charge.
free of charge.zh: 十二岁以下儿童可免费入场。

freedom.en: Everyone deserves the freedom to make choices.
freedom.zh: 每个人都应该有权自由地做出选择。

freeway.en: The construction of a new freeway has eased traffic congestion and improved transportation links between cities.
freeway.zh: 新高速公路的建设缓解了交通拥堵，并改善了城市之间的交通联系。

freeze.en: Water begins to freeze at zero degrees.

freezer.en: The freezer keeps food fresh longer.
freezer.zh: 冰柜能让食物保存更久。

gaol.en: The convict was sentenced to five years in gaol for committing financial fraud against elderly victims.
gaol.zh: 这名罪犯因诈骗老年受害者被判处五年监禁。

gap.en: The gap between rich and poor is growing.

garage.en: My car is parked in the garage.

garden.en: Our garden has many beautiful flowers.
garden.zh: 我们的花园有许多美丽的花。

gardening.en: Gardening is my favorite weekend hobby.
gardening.zh: 园艺是我周末最喜欢的爱好。

gardens.zh: 我们参观了美丽的公共花园。

garlic.en: This pasta has too much garlic.
garlic.zh: 这个意大利面蒜放太多了。

garment.en: The garment industry remains one of the largest employers in many developing countries around the world.
garment.zh: 服装业仍然是世界上许多发展中国家最大的雇主之一。

garments.zh: 这家工厂生产昂贵的服装。

gas.en: The gas smell was coming from the kitchen.
gas.zh: 厨房里飘出天然气的味道。

gasoline.en: The price of gasoline has increased.

gasp.en: When the doctor announced the unexpected test results, I could not help but gasp in complete shock and disbelief.
gasp.zh: 当医生宣布出乎意料的检查结果时，我不禁完全震惊地倒吸一口凉气。

gastritis.en: He was diagnosed with gastritis last month.
gastritis.zh: 他上个月被诊断出患有胃炎。

gate.en: The security guard opened the main gate to allow the tourists to enter the historical palace for the guided tour.
gate.zh: 安保人员打开大门，让游客进入历史宫殿参加导览游。

gates.en: The park closes its gates at sunset.

gather.en: Villagers gather at the market each morning.
gather.zh: 村民们每天早上在市场集合。

gathered.en: The students gathered in the hall for the meeting.
gathered.zh: 学生们聚集在大厅参加会议。

gatherers.en: Gatherers collected fresh berries near the river.
gatherers.zh: 采集者在河边采集新鲜浆果。

gauge.en: It is important to gauge public opinion through surveys and interviews before implementing major policy changes in society.
gauge.zh: 在社会中实施重大政策变革之前，通过调查和访谈来衡量公众意见是很重要的。

gay.en: Despite increased social acceptance, many gay individuals continue to face challenges and discrimination in various aspects of life.
gay.zh: 尽管社会接受度有所提高，许多同性恋者在生活的各个方面仍然面临挑战和歧视。

furnished.en: The furnished apartment included a bed, sofa, and dining table, which saved me the considerable expense of buying furniture.
furnished.zh: 这套带家具的公寓配有一张床、一张沙发和一张餐桌，这省去了我购买家具的大量费用。

furniture.en: Modern furniture designers increasingly prioritize sustainability by using recycled and eco-friendly materials.
furniture.zh: 现代家具设计师越来越重视可持续性，使用可回收和环保材料。

further.en: The government should take further action to address environmental pollution before the situation becomes irreversible.
further.zh: 政府应该采取进一步行动来解决环境污染问题，以免情况变得不可逆转。

further research.en: We need further research on this topic.
further research.zh: 我们需要对这个话题做进一步的研究。

furthermore.en: Furthermore, the government should invest more in renewable energy sources to reduce carbon emissions significantly over the next decade.
furthermore.zh: 此外，政府应投资更多可再生能源，以在未来十年显著减少碳排放。

fury.en: The local residents expressed their fury when they learned that the new factory would operate around the clock.
fury.zh: 当地居民得知新工厂将全天候运营时表达了强烈的愤怒。

fuse.en: The musician decided to fuse classical music elements with contemporary pop rhythms to create a unique sound.
fuse.zh: 这位音乐家决定将古典音乐元素与现代流行节奏融合，创造出独特的音乐风格。

fusion.en: Fusion cuisine combines ingredients and cooking techniques from different cultures to produce innovative dishes.
fusion.zh: 融合菜将不同文化的食材和烹饪技术结合在一起，制作出创新菜肴。

fuss.en: The celebrity made an unnecessary fuss about the minor criticism, which only drew more attention to the issue.
fuss.zh: 这位名人对小小的批评大惊小怪，反而让更多人关注了这个问题。

future.en: We must protect our planet's future.
future.zh: 我们必须保护地球的未来。

fun.en: The children had fun at the park.
fun.zh: 孩子们在公园玩得很开心。

function.en: This button helps the system function properly.
function.zh: 这个按钮帮助系统正常运作。

functional.en: Although the new library is highly functional with modern facilities, it lacks the traditional atmosphere of older institutions.
functional.zh: 尽管新图书馆设施现代化、功能齐全，但它缺少旧建筑的传统氛围。

functionally.en: Functionally speaking, the new transport system has improved accessibility for residents in suburban areas.
functionally.zh: 从功能角度来看，新的交通系统改善了郊区居民的无障碍出行。

functioned.en: The emergency response team functioned remarkably well during the crisis, coordinating efforts across multiple agencies.
functioned.zh: 应急响应小组在危机期间表现出色，协调了多个机构的努力。

functioning.en: A well-functioning healthcare system requires adequate funding, trained personnel, and efficient management.
functioning.zh: 一个运作良好的医疗系统需要充足的资金、训练有素的人员和高效的管理。

functions.en: Modern smartphones serve multiple functions, effectively replacing cameras, calculators, and navigation devices.
functions.zh: 现代智能手机具有多种功能，有效取代了相机、计算器和导航设备。

fund.en: The university plans to fund new research projects on renewable energy through government grants and private donations.
fund.zh: 大学计划通过政府拨款和私人捐款资助可再生能源的新研究项目。

fundamental.en: Reading is a fundamental skill for every student.
fundamental.zh: 阅读是每个学生的基本技能。

fundamentally.en: Fundamentally, economic development should not come at the expense of environmental protection and sustainability.
fundamentally.zh: 从根本上说，经济发展不应以牺牲环境保护和可持续发展为代价。

gadget.en: Modern gadgets such as smartphones and tablets have completely transformed how we communicate, work, and access information in daily life.
gadget.zh: 智能手机和平板电脑等现代小玩意彻底改变了我们日常交流、工作和获取信息的方式。

gadgets.en: Modern gadgets have changed how we communicate.
gadgets.zh: 现代小装置改变了我们的交流方式。

gain.en: I hope to gain more experience.

galaxy.en: The Milky Way is our galaxy.

gallery.en: Many tourists visit the art gallery every day.
gallery.zh: 许多游客每天参观这座美术馆。

gallon.en: In some countries, fuel is sold by the gallon, which represents a different measurement system from what many people are accustomed to.
gallon.zh: 在一些国家，燃油按加仑出售，这与许多人习惯的计量系统不同。

gamble.en: Some people choose to gamble at casinos hoping to win money, but the financial risks often significantly outweigh the potential rewards.
gamble.zh: 一些人在赌场赌博希望能赢钱，但财务风险通常远远大于潜在回报。

game.en: Playing board games with family members can effectively strengthen bonds and provide important educational benefits for young children.
game.zh: 与家人一起玩棋盘游戏可以有效加强亲情，并为幼儿提供重要的教育益处。

games.en: We played games at the birthday party.
games.zh: 我们在生日聚会上玩游戏。

gang.en: Joining a gang can lead to criminal behavior and have serious negative consequences for young people and their communities.
gang.zh: 加入帮派可能导致犯罪行为，并对年轻人及其社区产生严重的负面后果。

funded.en: The research project was funded by the government, allowing scientists to explore renewable energy solutions for the future.
funded.zh: 这个研究项目由政府资助，使科学家们能够探索未来的可再生能源解决方案。

funding.en: The government is funding new schools.

funds.en: The charity organization raised substantial funds to support education initiatives in developing countries last year.
funds.zh: 该慈善组织去年筹集了大量资金，用于支持发展中国家的教育计划。

funeral.en: Attending a funeral can be an emotionally challenging experience that requires sensitivity, respect, and cultural understanding.
funeral.zh: 参加葬礼可能是一段充满情感挑战的经历，需要敏感、尊重和文化理解。

fungus.zh: 真菌在潮湿环境中生长。

fur.en: The cat has soft black fur.
fur.zh: 这只猫有柔软的黑色皮毛。

furious.en: The manager became furious when she discovered that the project budget had been exceeded without proper authorization.
furious.zh: 当经理发现项目预算在未经适当授权的情况下被超出时，她变得非常愤怒。

furnace.en: During the harsh winter months, the old furnace in many buildings struggles to maintain adequate warmth for residents.
furnace.zh: 在严冬期间，许多建筑物的老旧熔炉难以保持足够的温度来为居民保暖。

furnish.en: The new apartment was difficult to furnish because it had an irregular layout and limited storage space throughout.
furnish.zh: 新公寓很难布置，因为它的布局不规则，而且整个空间储物空间有限。

gaze.en: During the interview, the candidate maintained a steady gaze at the panel members, which demonstrated her confidence and professionalism.
gaze.zh: 在面试过程中，候选人一直稳定地注视着小组成员，这展示了她的自信和专业素养。

geared.en: The course is geared toward beginners.

gee.en: "Gee, I didn't expect that result," she exclaimed when the unexpected data suddenly appeared on the computer screen during the presentation.
gee.zh: “天哪，我没料到那个结果，”当意外数据在演示期间突然出现在电脑屏幕上时，她惊呼道。

gender.en: Gender equality is an important issue worldwide.
gender.zh: 性别平等是全世界的重要议题。

general.en: This is the general rule for everyone.
general.zh: 这是对每个人都适用的一般规则。

generally.en: Generally speaking, students who actively participate in group discussions develop better communication skills than those who remain silent.
generally.zh: 一般来说，积极参与小组讨论的学生比保持沉默的学生能培养更好的沟通能力。

generate.en: Solar panels generate electricity from sunlight.
generate.zh: 太阳能电池板从阳光中产生电能。

generated.en: Scientists generated new data from the experiment.
generated.zh: 科学家从实验中产生了新数据。

fuel.en: The rising demand for electricity continues to fuel the debate over whether nuclear power is safe.
fuel.zh: 不断增长的电力需求继续加剧了关于核电是否安全的争论。

fulfill.en: The government must fulfill its promise to improve public healthcare services across the entire country.
fulfill.zh: 政府必须履行其改善全国公共医疗服务的承诺。

fulfilled.en: He fulfilled his promise to visit his grandmother.
fulfilled.zh: 他履行了去看望祖母的承诺。

full.en: The hall was full of people.

full of.en: The room is full of books.

full-time.en: Many young professionals prefer full-time employment because it provides greater job security and better benefits.
full-time.zh: 许多年轻专业人士更喜欢全职工作，因为它能提供更大的工作保障和更好的福利。

fume.en: Workers were forced to leave the factory when dangerous chemicals began to fume during the manufacturing process.
fume.zh: 当危险化学品在制造过程中开始冒烟时，工人们被迫离开工厂。

fumes.en: Prolonged exposure to toxic fumes from vehicles has been linked to various respiratory diseases among city residents.
fumes.zh: 长期接触车辆排放的有毒烟雾与城市居民的各种呼吸系统疾病有关。

gifts.en: The children received gifts on their birthday.
gifts.zh: 孩子们在生日时收到了礼物。

giggle.en: The sound of children giggling in the playground often reminds adults of their own carefree childhood memories.
giggle.zh: 孩子们在操场上咯咯笑的声音常常让成年人想起自己无忧无虑的童年记忆。

gill.en: Each fish has a gill for breathing.
gill.zh: 每条鱼都有一个用于呼吸的鳃。

girl.en: The girl is reading a book.

give.en: Charitable organizations encourage people to give donations during natural disasters to help affected communities recover quickly.
give.zh: 慈善机构鼓励人们在自然灾害期间捐款，以帮助受灾社区迅速恢复。

give up.en: You should never give up on your dreams.

glaciers.en: The glaciers are melting due to climate change.
glaciers.zh: 冰川正在因气候变化而融化。

glad.en: I am glad you came today.

glance.en: First impressions are often formed within seconds of a glance, which explains why body language matters in interviews.
glance.zh: 第一印象往往在短短几秒的一瞥中形成，这解释了为什么肢体语言在面试中很重要。

gland.en: The pituitary gland regulates growth and metabolism by producing hormones that control other endocrine glands throughout the body.
gland.zh: 脑下垂体通过产生控制全身其他内分泌腺的激素来调节生长和新陈代谢。

geological.zh: 地质调查花了几个月时间。

geology.en: My friend studies geology at university.
geology.zh: 我朋友在大学学习地质学。

geothermal.en: The hotel uses geothermal energy for heating.
geothermal.zh: 这家酒店使用地热能供暖。

germ.en: Scientists discovered a new strain of germ that has developed resistance to conventional antibiotic treatments.
germ.zh: 科学家发现了一种对传统抗生素治疗产生耐药性的新型细菌菌株。

germs.zh: 洗手可以去除有害细菌。

gesture.en: The government's gesture of goodwill towards neighboring countries helped ease tensions in the diplomatic crisis.
gesture.zh: 政府对邻国做出的善意姿态有助于缓解外交危机中的紧张局势。

get.en: Students who get adequate sleep before exams typically perform better than those who stay up late studying.
get.zh: 在考试前获得充足睡眠的学生通常比熬夜学习的学生表现更好。

get along with.en: The ability to get along with people from different backgrounds is increasingly valued in today's globalized workplace.
get along with.zh: 在当今全球化的职场中，与不同背景的人相处的能力越来越受到重视。

get hold of.en: I need to get hold of my teacher.
get hold of.zh: 我需要联系到我的老师。

get in touch with.en: Get in touch with your teacher.

get on with.en: I get on with my classmates well.

get rid of.en: The government should implement policies to help residents get rid of household waste responsibly.
get rid of.zh: 政府应该实施政策，帮助居民负责任地处理生活垃圾。

get there.en: We will get there by noon.

get to.en: When did you get to school?

ghost.en: The little girl is afraid of the dark ghost story.
ghost.zh: 这个小女孩害怕那个黑暗的鬼故事。

giant.en: Apple is a giant company in tech.
giant.zh: 苹果是一家科技巨头公司。

gift.en: Receiving a thoughtful gift from a friend can significantly strengthen interpersonal relationships.
gift.zh: 收到朋友贴心的礼物可以大大加强人际关系。

gift card.en: Many shoppers prefer purchasing gift cards as presents because they offer flexibility in choice.
gift card.zh: 许多购物者喜欢购买礼品卡作为礼物，因为它们提供了更多的选择灵活性。

gifted.en: The gifted child learned languages quickly.
gifted.zh: 这个有天赋的孩子学语言很快。

glory.en: The athlete felt an overwhelming sense of glory when standing on the Olympic podium.
glory.zh: 当站在奥运领奖台上时，这位运动员感到一种难以言喻的荣耀。

glove.en: The surgeon must wear a sterile glove during the operation to prevent infection.
glove.zh: 外科医生在手术过程中必须佩戴无菌手套以防止感染。

gloves.en: Winter gloves are essential for protecting your hands against the cold weather.
gloves.zh: 冬季手套对于保护你的手免受寒冷天气是必不可少的。

glow.en: The soft glow of the campfire created a warm and inviting atmosphere for everyone.
glow.zh: 营火柔和的光芒为大家营造了温暖而诱人的氛围。

glue.en: The strong adhesive glue can bond different materials together effectively.
glue.zh: 这种强力粘合剂可以有效地将不同的材料粘合在一起。

go ahead.en: Please go ahead and start the meeting.

go back.en: I want to go back home now.

go out.en: We often go out on Fridays.

go over.en: Let's go over the notes before the exam.
go over.zh: 考试前让我们复习一下笔记。

go round.en: The news started to go round the office.
go round.zh: 消息开始在办公室流传。

glare.en: The glare from the computer screen caused severe eye strain for many office workers throughout the day.
glare.zh: 电脑屏幕的眩光导致许多上班族一整天都严重眼睛疲劳。

glass.en: I filled the glass with water.

glasses.en: I cannot see clearly without my glasses.

glide.en: The bird seemed to glide effortlessly through the air as it rode the wind currents above the mountains.
glide.zh: 那只鸟似乎毫不费力地顺着山顶的气流在空中滑翔。

glimpse.en: She caught a glimpse of her favorite author.
glimpse.zh: 她瞥见了她最喜欢的作家。

global.en: Global warming is a serious problem.
global.zh: 全球变暖是一个严重的问题。

global warming.en: Global warming poses a significant threat to coastal communities and marine ecosystems around the world.
global warming.zh: 全球变暖对世界各地的沿海社区和海洋生态系统构成重大威胁。

globalisation.zh: 全球化影响全世界的中小企业。

globe.en: Our products sell across the globe.

gloom.en: Despite the initial gloom surrounding the economic recession, there are now clear signs of recovery emerging.
gloom.zh: 尽管经济衰退最初令人沮丧，但现在有明显的复苏迹象出现。

go wrong.en: Something might go wrong with the plan.

goal.en: My goal is to pass the exam.

goat.en: In some rural areas, keeping goats is a common practice as they provide milk, meat, and valuable wool.
goat.zh: 在一些农村地区，养山羊是一种常见做法，因为它们提供牛奶、肉和珍贵的羊毛。

goats.en: Wild goats climbed the steep mountain.
goats.zh: 野山羊攀爬陡峭的山峰。

gold.en: He received a gold award for his work.

good.en: A good education provides students with not only knowledge but also critical thinking skills for their future.
good.zh: 良好的教育不仅为学生提供知识，还培养他们面向未来的批判性思维能力。

goodbye.en: The teacher said a heartfelt goodbye to her students on the last day of the academic year.
goodbye.zh: 老师在学年末对学生说了发自内心的告别。

generates.en: The rapid development of technology generates numerous opportunities for young professionals in urban areas.
generates.zh: 技术的快速发展为城市地区的年轻专业人士创造了大量机会。

generating.en: Renewable energy sources like solar power are generating increasing interest among governments worldwide.
generating.zh: 太阳能等可再生能源正引起世界各国政府越来越大的兴趣。

generation.en: The younger generation tends to be more environmentally conscious than their parents.
generation.zh: 年轻一代往往比他们的父母更具环保意识。

generations.en: Traditional cultural practices have been passed down through generations in many indigenous communities.
generations.zh: 传统文化习俗在许多原住民社区中代代相传。

generators.en: Many rural areas in developing countries still rely on diesel generators as their primary electricity source.
generators.zh: 发展中国家的许多农村地区仍然依赖柴油发电机作为主要电力来源。

generous.en: The government has been generous in providing financial support to small businesses affected by the pandemic.
generous.zh: 政府在为受疫情影响的小企业提供财政支持方面非常慷慨。

genes.zh: 有些基因控制身体外观。

genetic.en: Genetic research helps us understand diseases.
genetic.zh: 基因研究帮助我们了解疾病。

geneticist.en: The geneticist studies inherited traits in plants.
geneticist.zh: 这位遗传学家研究植物的遗传特征。

genetics.en: Genetics plays an important role in health.
genetics.zh: 遗传学在健康中扮演重要角色。

genome.en: Scientists are studying the human genome.
genome.zh: 科学家正在研究人类基因组。

genre.en: Students should be encouraged to explore various literary genre to develop a broader appreciation of different writing styles.
genre.zh: 应该鼓励学生探索各种文学体裁，以培养对不同写作风格的更广泛欣赏。

gentle.en: She has a gentle voice and calm manner.

gentlemen.en: The gentlemen held the door for us.
gentlemen.zh: 那些绅士为我们扶住了门。

geographers.en: Geographers play a crucial role in understanding how climate change affects different regions around the world.
geographers.zh: 地理学家在理解气候变化如何影响世界各地不同地区方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

goodness.en: The goodness of her character was evident in how she volunteered to help elderly neighbors every weekend.
goodness.zh: 她善良的品质体现在每周都自愿帮助年长的邻居。

goods.en: Many developing countries rely heavily on exporting goods such as textiles and agricultural products for foreign exchange.
goods.zh: 许多发展中国家严重依赖出口纺织品和农产品等商品来获取外汇。

gossip.en: While gossip may seem harmless, it can damage relationships and create unnecessary conflicts within communities.
gossip.zh: 虽然八卦看似无害，但它可能会损害关系并在社区内造成不必要的冲突。

govern.en: The regulations that govern environmental protection have become increasingly strict due to growing climate awareness.
govern.zh: 由于人们越来越意识到气候变化，保护环境的法规变得更加严格。

governance.zh: 良好的治理需要透明度。

governed.en: The school is governed by strict rules.
governed.zh: 学校受严格规章制度管理。

government.en: The local government approved the new plan.
government.zh: 当地政府批准了这个新计划。

government policy.en: The new government policy affects schools.

governmental.en: The governmental policy changed last year.

governor.en: The governor announced plans to improve public transportation infrastructure to reduce traffic congestion.
governor.zh: 州长宣布了改善公共交通基础设施的计划，以减少交通拥堵。

green.en: The leaves turn green in spring.

green energy.en: The government has invested heavily in green energy sources such as solar and wind power to reduce carbon emissions.
green energy.zh: 政府已大力投资太阳能和风能等绿色能源，以减少碳排放。

greenest.en: This park is the greenest in our city.
greenest.zh: 这个公园是我们城市中最绿的。

greenhouse.en: The greenhouse grows tomatoes in winter.
greenhouse.zh: 温室在冬天种植西红柿。

greet.en: When international students arrive at university, they are typically greeted by senior students who help them adjust.
greet.zh: 当国际学生到达大学时，他们通常会得到高年级学生的迎接，帮助他们适应新环境。

grey.en: She wore a grey coat yesterday.
grey.zh: 她昨天穿了一件灰色外套。

grief.en: The loss of a loved one can cause intense grief, and people need time and support to cope with such emotions.
grief.zh: 失去所爱的人会导致强烈的悲痛，人们需要时间和支持来应对这种情感。

grim.en: The unemployment statistics present a grim picture of the current economic situation in many developing countries.
grim.zh: 失业统计数据展示了许多发展中国家当前经济形势的严峻局面。

grin.en: When asked about his success, the athlete could not help but grin and attribute his achievements to years of hard work.
grin.zh: 当被问及他的成功时，这位运动员忍不住咧嘴一笑，并将他的成就归功于多年的努力训练。

grand.en: The grand building stands in the city center.
grand.zh: 那座宏伟的建筑位于市中心。

grandfather.en: My grandfather tells wonderful stories about his youth.
grandfather.zh: 我爷爷讲关于他年轻时代的精彩故事。

grandmother.en: My grandmother cooks delicious food every day.
grandmother.zh: 我祖母每天都做美味的饭菜。

grant.en: The university will grant him a scholarship.
grant.zh: 大学将给他提供奖学金。

grapes.en: I bought fresh grapes from the market.
grapes.zh: 我从市场买了新鲜葡萄。

graph.en: Please draw a graph showing monthly sales.
graph.zh: 请画一张显示月度销售额的图表。

graphic.en: The graphic designer created colorful posters.
graphic.zh: 平面设计师创作了彩色海报。

graphics.en: The graphics on this website are very clear.
graphics.zh: 这个网站的图表非常清晰。

grasp.en: I can grasp the main idea.

grass.en: The children played on the green grass.
grass.zh: 孩子们在绿草地上玩耍。

grasses.en: Children like to play on the soft grasses.
grasses.zh: 孩子们喜欢在柔软的草地上玩耍。

grateful.en: I am grateful for your help.

grave.en: This is a very grave situation.
grave.zh: 这是个非常严重的情况。

graves.en: We visited the old graves in the village.
graves.zh: 我们参观了村子里的旧坟墓。

gravity.zh: 重力使行星保持在轨道上。

gray.en: The gray morning sky suggested that rain would arrive before noon, so we brought umbrellas.
gray.zh: 灰蒙蒙的早晨天空表明雨会在中午之前到来，所以我们带了雨伞。

grazing.en: The cows are grazing in the field.

great.en: Reading is a great habit that helps students develop critical thinking skills and broaden their knowledge.
great.zh: 阅读是一种很好的习惯，可以帮助学生培养批判性思维能力并拓宽知识面。

greed.en: His greed led to his downfall.
greed.zh: 他的贪婪导致了他的垮台。

grab.en: She tried to grab the falling book.

grace.en: The ancient temple was decorated with elaborate carvings that added grace to its already impressive architecture.
grace.zh: 这座古老的寺庙装饰着精美的雕刻，为其本身令人赞叹的建筑增添了优雅。

grade.en: She worked hard to pass the grade.
grade.zh: 她努力学习以通过这个年级。

gradual.en: The gradual increase in temperature has led to significant changes in agricultural patterns across the region.
gradual.zh: 温度的逐渐上升导致该地区农业模式的重大变化。

gradually.en: The weather is gradually getting warmer.

graduate.en: She will graduate from university next year.

graduation.en: The graduation ceremony was a memorable occasion that celebrated the achievements of students who had worked hard for years.
graduation.zh: 毕业典礼是一个难忘的时刻，表彰了学生们多年来的努力和成就。

grain.en: Farmers grow rice and other grain.
grain.zh: 农民种植水稻和其他谷物。

gram.en: Add one gram of salt to the soup.

grammar.en: Grammar is important for English writing.
grammar.zh: 语法对英语写作很重要。

grind.en: The constant grind of daily life in a big city can lead to significant stress and eventually cause burnout among workers.
grind.zh: 大城市日常生活的持续煎熬可能导致严重的压力，并最终造成员工倦怠。

grip.en: The government must tighten its grip on environmental regulations to effectively combat climate change and protect natural ecosystems.
grip.zh: 政府必须加强对环境法规的控制，以有效应对气候变化并保护自然生态系统。

grips.en: The story grips my full attention.
grips.zh: 这个故事紧紧抓住了我的注意力。

groan.en: Many local residents groan loudly about the increasing noise pollution from nearby construction sites that disrupt their daily lives and peace.
groan.zh: 许多当地居民大声抱怨附近建筑工地不断增加的噪音污染扰乱了他们的日常生活和安宁。

groceries.en: Online shopping for groceries has become increasingly popular among busy professionals who have limited time for traditional supermarket visits.
groceries.zh: 网购食品杂货在时间有限、无暇光顾传统超市的忙碌专业人士中变得越来越受欢迎。

grocery.en: I bought food at the grocery.
grocery.zh: 我在食品杂货店买了食物。

gross.en: The restaurant's gross income increased last year.
gross.zh: 这家餐厅去年的总收入增加了。

ground.en: The ball fell to the ground quickly.

ground floor.en: My office is on the ground floor.

groundwater.zh: 污染可能污染地下水供应。

halt.en: The project came to a sudden halt.

ham.en: The ham sandwich I bought from the cafeteria was not as fresh as I had expected.
ham.zh: 我从自助餐厅买的火腿三明治没有我预期的那么新鲜。

hammer.en: The carpenter carefully used a hammer to drive the nail into the sturdy wooden beam.
hammer.zh: 木匠小心翼翼地用锤子把钉子敲进坚固的木梁里。

hand.en: Please hand me that book from the table.
hand.zh: 请把那本书从桌上递给我。

hand in.en: Please hand in your homework today.

handbag.en: She left her handbag on the bus.
handbag.zh: 她把手提包落在公交车上了。

handbook.en: The university handbook outlines all the academic policies and procedures for undergraduates.
handbook.zh: 大学手册概述了针对本科生的所有学术政策和程序。

handful.en: A handful of people attended the meeting.
handful.zh: 只有少数人参加了会议。

handouts.zh: 老师给了我们印刷讲义。

headache.en: The constant headache made it difficult for the student to concentrate during the important examination period.
headache.zh: 持续的头痛使这个学生在重要的考试期间难以集中注意力。

header.en: Check the header on this page.

headline.en: The newspaper headline drew public attention to the government's controversial new education policy reform proposal.
headline.zh: 报纸头条引起了公众对政府有争议的新教育改革方案的关注。

headmaster.en: The headmaster delivered an inspiring speech at the graduation ceremony, encouraging students to pursue their dreams boldly.
headmaster.zh: 校长在毕业典礼上发表了鼓舞人心的演讲，鼓励学生大胆追求梦想。

headphones.en: She listens to music with headphones.

headquarters.en: The company relocated its headquarters to a modern office building in the city centre to accommodate growing staff numbers.
headquarters.zh: 公司将总部迁至市中心的一栋现代化办公楼，以容纳不断增长的员工数量。

heal.en: It took several months for the athlete's injured ankle to heal completely after undergoing rehabilitation treatment.
heal.zh: 经过康复治疗后，运动员受伤的脚踝花了几个月才完全康复。

healing.en: The healing process took several weeks.
healing.zh: 愈合过程花了几个星期。

health.en: Health is more important than wealth.

health care.en: Health care is important for everyone.
health care.zh: 健康护理对每个人都很重要。

haul.en: They had to haul the heavy boxes.
haul.zh: 他们不得不拖运这些沉重的箱子。

haunt.en: The tragic memories of the earthquake continue to haunt survivors even decades after the disaster occurred.
haunt.zh: 地震的悲惨记忆即使在灾难发生几十年后仍然困扰着幸存者。

haunting.en: The photo had a haunting beauty.
haunting.zh: 这张照片有一种难忘的美。

have.en: Many international students have difficulty adapting to the academic writing style required at universities.
have.zh: 许多国际学生难以适应大学要求的学术写作风格。

have access to.en: Students have access to the computer lab.
have access to.zh: 学生可以使用计算机实验室。

hazard.en: Smoking is a major health hazard.
hazard.zh: 吸烟是主要的健康危害。

hazardous.en: Working in hazardous conditions without proper safety equipment increases the risk of serious workplace injuries.
hazardous.zh: 在没有适当安全设备的情况下在危险环境中工作会增加严重工作伤害的风险。

head.en: Let's head to the library now.

head for.en: As the deadline approaches, students should head for the library to complete their assignments on time.
head for.zh: 随着截止日期的临近，学生们应该去图书馆按时完成作业。

harness.en: We can harness solar power for energy.
harness.zh: 我们可以利用太阳能作为能源。

harsh.en: The judge gave a harsh sentence.
harsh.zh: 法官做出了严厉的判决。

harvest.en: Farmers traditionally gather their harvest in autumn when crops reach full maturity and ripeness.
harvest.zh: 农民传统上在秋季收获，此时农作物完全成熟。

harvested.en: The harvested crops filled the entire truck.
harvested.zh: 收获的农作物装满了整辆卡车。

harvesting.en: Farmers are harvesting rice in autumn.
harvesting.zh: 农民们正在秋季收割水稻。

haste.en: Making important career decisions in haste often leads to unsatisfactory outcomes and future regrets.
haste.zh: 草率地做出重要职业决定往往会导致不满意的结果和未来的遗憾。

hat.en: In some cultures, wearing a hat indoors is considered disrespectful, whereas in others it is perfectly acceptable.
hat.zh: 在某些文化中，室内戴帽子被视为不尊重，而在其他文化中则完全可接受。

hatch.en: Some species of birds hatch their eggs in carefully constructed nests built from twigs and feathers.
hatch.zh: 一些鸟类在用树枝和羽毛精心建造的巢中孵化它们的蛋。

hatched.en: The baby birds finally hatched today.
hatched.zh: 小鸟们终于在今天孵化了。

hate.en: I hate waiting in long lines.

guilt.en: She felt guilt after lying to him.
guilt.zh: 她对他撒谎后感到内疚。

guilty.en: After years of litigation, the defendant was finally found guilty of fraud and sentenced to prison.
guilty.zh: 经过多年的诉讼，被告终于被判犯有欺诈罪并被判处监禁。

guitar.en: My brother can play the guitar well.

gulf.en: A wide gulf exists between their views.
gulf.zh: 他们的观点之间存在巨大鸿沟。

gum.en: Chewing gum has been shown to improve concentration and memory during extended study sessions.
gum.zh: 研究表明，嚼口香糖可以提高长时间学习过程中的注意力和记忆力。

gun.en: The government has implemented stricter regulations on gun ownership to reduce violent crimes.
gun.zh: 政府实施了更严格的枪支拥有法规以减少暴力犯罪。

guns.en: The debate over guns continues to divide public opinion across the country.
guns.zh: 关于枪支的辩论继续分裂着全国的公众意见。

gut.en: Sometimes you have to trust your gut feeling when making important life decisions.
gut.zh: 有时候在做出重要人生决定时，你必须相信自己的直觉。

guy.en: A nice guy helped me today.
guy.zh: 今天有个好人帮助了我。

gym.en: I go to the gym every morning.

handset.en: She picked up the handset and answered quickly.

handwriting.en: Some educators believe that teaching children handwriting skills improves their cognitive development.
handwriting.zh: 一些教育工作者认为，教孩子书写技能可以促进他们的认知发展。

hang.en: Please hang the map on the wall.

hang on.en: Please hang on for a moment while I transfer your call to the appropriate department.
hang on.zh: 请稍等片刻，我将把您的电话转接到相关部门。

happen to.en: I happen to have some experience in this field, so I can contribute to the research project.
happen to.zh: 我恰好在这个领域有一些经验，所以我能为研究项目做出贡献。

happiness.zh: 金钱买不到真正的幸福。

happy.en: Although many people are not happy with their current jobs, they feel trapped by financial obligations.
happy.zh: 尽管许多人对目前的工作不满意，但被经济义务所束缚。

harbor.en: The boats returned to the harbor.

habit.en: I have a morning reading habit.

habitat.en: The forest is the natural habitat.

habits.zh: 良好的学习习惯能提高成绩。

hail.en: The new renewable energy policy has been hailed by environmental experts as a major breakthrough for sustainability.
hail.zh: 新的可再生能源政策被环境专家誉为可持续发展的重大突破。

hair.en: She has long black hair and brown eyes.
hair.zh: 她有黑色的长发和棕色的眼睛。

hairdresser.en: My hairdresser gave me a great haircut.
hairdresser.zh: 我的理发师给我剪了个很棒的发型。

half.en: She slept for half the afternoon.

half an hour.en: It takes half an hour to get there.

hall.en: The ceremony took place in the main hall.

harbors.en: Many ships anchor in the busy harbors.
harbors.zh: 许多船只停泊在繁忙的海港。

hard.en: This question is hard to answer.

hard work.en: Success requires hard work and dedication.
hard work.zh: 成功需要努力工作和奉献精神。

harden.en: Extreme heat can harden the surface of soil, making it difficult for plants to absorb water and essential nutrients.
harden.zh: 极端高温会使土壤表面变硬，使植物难以吸收水分和必需的营养。

hardly.en: She had hardly completed her presentation when the audience began asking challenging questions about her research.
hardly.zh: 她刚完成演示，观众就开始对她的研究提出具有挑战性的问题。

hardship.en: Many families faced considerable hardship during the economic recession, struggling to meet their basic living needs.
hardship.zh: 经济衰退期间，许多家庭面临相当大的困难，难以满足基本的生活需求。

hardy.en: These hardy plants can survive cold winters.
hardy.zh: 这些耐寒植物能度过寒冷的冬天。

harmony.en: The team works in perfect harmony.

health center.en: The new health center in our neighborhood provides affordable medical services to local residents.
health center.zh: 我们社区附近的新健康中心为当地居民提供负担得起的医疗服务。

health problems.en: Many workers suffer from health problems today.
health problems.zh: 如今许多工人饱受健康问题困扰。

healthcare.en: Good healthcare is important for everyone.
healthcare.zh: 良好的医疗保健对每个人都很重要。

healthy.en: Eating vegetables helps you stay healthy.
healthy.zh: 吃蔬菜帮助你保持健康。

heap.en: The children left their toys in a heap on the living room floor after playing.
heap.zh: 孩子们玩耍后把玩具乱堆在客厅地板上。

hear.en: From the top of the mountain, you could hear the wind whistling through the trees.
hear.zh: 从山顶上，你可以听到风穿过树林的呼啸声。

hear about.en: Did you hear about the news?

hear from.en: I look forward to hearing from you regarding my job application next week.
hear from.zh: 我期待下周收到您关于我工作申请的消息。

hearing.en: His hearing has improved with the new device.
hearing.zh: 他的听力用新设备后有所改善。

hearing loss.en: Loud music can cause hearing loss.
hearing loss.zh: 大声听音乐可能导致听力损失。

hero.en: Many young people consider firefighters and doctors as modern heroes who risk their lives for others.
hero.zh: 许多年轻人把消防员和医生视为冒着生命危险帮助他人的现代英雄。

heroine.en: The film portrays a brave heroine who fights against social injustice to protect her community.
heroine.zh: 这部电影描绘了一位勇敢的女英雄，她为保护社区与不公正的社会现象作斗争。

heroism.en: The soldier was awarded a medal for his heroism in rescuing hostages during the dangerous operation.
heroism.zh: 这位士兵因在危险行动中营救人质所展现的英雄主义而被授予勋章。

hesitate.en: Many job applicants hesitate to negotiate their salary because they fear losing the employment opportunity.
hesitate.zh: 许多求职者犹豫是否谈判薪资，因为他们害怕失去就业机会。

hidden.en: The message was hidden in the book.
hidden.zh: 那条消息藏在那本书里。

hide.en: Children like to hide during the game.
hide.zh: 孩子们在玩游戏时喜欢躲藏。

hierarchy.en: In many corporate hierarchies, important decisions must be approved by multiple levels of management.
hierarchy.zh: 在许多公司等级制度中，重要决策必须获得多个管理层级的批准。

high.en: The mountain has a high peak all year.
high.zh: 这座山有一年四季高耸的山峰。

high level.en: The international conference brought together high level diplomats to discuss peace negotiations.
high level.zh: 这次国际会议汇集了高级别外交官来讨论和平谈判。

high school.en: After graduating from high school, many students face the challenging decision of choosing a university major.
high school.zh: 从高中毕业后，许多学生面临选择大学专业的艰难决定。

heaven.en: Many people believe in heaven after death.
heaven.zh: 许多人相信死后会上天堂。

heavens.en: The heavens were filled with stars.

heavy.en: This box is too heavy for me to lift.
heavy.zh: 这个盒子太重了，我搬不动。

hectares.en: The new park covers about twenty hectares of land.
hectares.zh: 新公园占地面积约二十公顷。

hedge.en: Planting a natural hedge along the property boundary can provide shelter from wind and reduce noise pollution from nearby roads.
hedge.zh: 在房产边界处种植天然树篱可以挡风，并减少来自附近道路的噪音污染。

heel.en: The celebrity was photographed wearing designer shoes with dangerously high heels while attending the international fashion week event.
heel.zh: 这位名人在参加国际时装周活动时被拍到穿着设计感十足的高跟鞋。

height.en: The height of the tree is ten meters.

heightened.en: His anxiety heightened before the exam.
heightened.zh: 考试前他的焦虑加深了。

heir.en: The sole heir to the family business studied international commerce at university before taking over the company's operations last year.
heir.zh: 这家家族企业的唯一继承人大学学习国际商务后，于去年接管了公司的运营。

helicopter.en: A helicopter flew over the building.

hill.zh: 我们一起爬上了那座小山。

hills.en: We hiked over the hills today.
hills.zh: 今天我们翻越了那些小山。

hilltop.en: The castle sits on a hilltop.

him.en: The manager offered him a promotion after observing his exceptional performance for several months.
him.zh: 经理在观察了他几个月的出色表现后，给他提供了晋升机会。

himself.en: The man cooked dinner for himself tonight.
himself.zh: 这个男人今晚为自己做了晚餐。

hind.en: The horse injured its hind leg.

hinder.en: Strict environmental regulations may hinder industrial growth but are essential for sustainable development.
hinder.zh: 严格的环境法规可能会阻碍工业增长，但对可持续发展至关重要。

hint.en: She gave me a useful hint.
hint.zh: 她给了我一个有用的提示。

hip.en: Doctors recommend that people maintain strong hip muscles through regular exercise to prevent injuries.
hip.zh: 医生建议人们通过定期锻炼来保持强壮的髋部肌肉，以防止受伤。

hire.en: The company decided to hire him.

higher education.en: Many students pursue higher education at universities.
higher education.zh: 许多学生在大学接受高等教育。

highest.en: She achieved the highest grade in class.
highest.zh: 她取得了班里最高的成绩。

highlight.en: The museum's main highlight is its extensive collection of ancient Egyptian artifacts dating back thousands of years.
highlight.zh: 这座博物馆的主要亮点是其丰富的古埃及文物收藏，可追溯到数千年前。

highlighting.en: Highlighting key points helps students learn.
highlighting.zh: 强调重点能帮助学生学习。

highlights.en: Her presentation highlights the main points.

highly.en: This book is highly recommended for students.
highly.zh: 这本书强烈推荐给学生。

highway.en: The construction of a new highway has considerably reduced travel time between the two major cities in the region.
highway.zh: 一条新高速公路的建设大大缩短了该地区两个主要城市之间的旅行时间。

highways.en: Highways connect major cities across the country.
highways.zh: 高速公路连接全国主要城市。

hike.en: We plan to hike on Sunday.

hiking.zh: 我们喜欢在山里徒步旅行。

helicopters.en: Helicopters flew over the mountain rescue area.
helicopters.zh: 直升机飞过山区救援区域。

hell.en: The tourists described the crowded and humid market as absolute hell during the peak summer months.
hell.zh: 游客们形容在夏季高峰期间，拥挤潮湿的市场简直是地狱。

hello.en: A simple hello can break the ice when meeting someone from a different cultural background for the first time.
hello.zh: 当第一次遇到来自不同文化背景的人时，简单的问候可以打破僵局。

helmet.en: Workers must wear a helmet on the construction site.
helmet.zh: 工人们必须在建筑工地戴头盔。

help.en: Advanced computer programs can help scientists analyze large amounts of data more efficiently than before.
help.zh: 先进的计算机程序可以帮助科学家更高效地分析大量数据。

help with.en: Can you help with the cleaning?

hemisphere.en: The Northern Hemisphere has winter now.

hen.en: In many developing countries, families keep hens in their backyards as a sustainable source of protein and income.
hen.zh: 在许多发展中国家，家庭在院子里养鸡作为蛋白质和收入的可持续来源。

hence.en: The company failed to adapt to market changes, hence their significant loss of revenue during the last financial quarter.
hence.zh: 该公司未能适应市场变化，因此他们在上个财政季度遭受了显著的收入损失。

heart.en: Exercise is good for your heart.
heart.zh: 锻炼对你的心脏有好处。

heart attack.en: According to recent medical research, heart attack rates have increased significantly among middle-aged adults who lack physical activity.
heart attack.zh: 根据最近的医学研究，缺乏体育锻炼的中年人心脏病的发病率显著增加。

heart disease.en: Heart disease is a major health concern.
heart disease.zh: 心脏病是一个主要的健康问题。

heartbeat.en: My heartbeat increased during the exam.
heartbeat.zh: 考试时我的心跳加快了。

hearts.en: The king wore three hearts on his shield.
hearts.zh: 国王的盾牌上有三颗心。

heat.en: Please heat the soup before serving.

heater.en: During harsh winters, a reliable heater becomes essential for maintaining comfortable indoor temperatures in many households.
heater.zh: 在严冬季节，可靠的加热器对于许多家庭保持舒适的室内温度变得至关重要。

heating.en: The rising cost of heating has led many families to install better insulation in their homes to reduce energy bills.
heating.zh: 供暖成本的上涨促使许多家庭在房屋中安装更好的隔热材料以减少能源账单。

heave.en: Construction workers must heave heavy materials carefully throughout the day, which often results in physical strain and injuries.
heave.zh: 建筑工人每天必须小心地举起重物，这常常导致身体劳损和受伤。

herald.en: The arrival of spring is often heralded by the emergence of flowers and the return of migratory birds to temperate regions.
herald.zh: 春天的到来常常以花朵的绽放和候鸟返回温带地区为标志。

herb.en: Many traditional medicine systems incorporate various herbs to treat ailments, although scientific evidence for their efficacy varies considerably.
herb.zh: 许多传统医学体系使用各种草药来治疗疾病，尽管其疗效的科学证据差异很大。

herbicide.en: The widespread use of chemical herbicides in modern agriculture has raised concerns about environmental pollution and potential health risks.
herbicide.zh: 现代农业中化学除草剂的广泛使用引发了人们对环境污染和潜在健康风险的担忧。

herbivores.en: Deer and rabbits are common herbivores.
herbivores.zh: 鹿和兔子是常见的食草动物。

herd.en: Indigenous communities have traditionally relied on their ability to herd livestock such as sheep and goats for their livelihood and survival.
herd.zh: 土著社区传统上依靠放牧绵羊和山羊等牲畜来维持生计和生存。

herds.en: Herds of cattle moved across the field.

here.en: The archaeological evidence discovered here indicates that this area was inhabited by humans approximately five thousand years ago.
here.zh: 在这里发现的考古证据表明，该地区大约在五千年前就有人类居住。

heritage.en: China has a rich cultural heritage.
heritage.zh: 中国有丰富的文化遗产。

hiring.en: The company is hiring new staff.

historian.zh: 这位历史学家研究古代文明。

historians.zh: 历史学家研究过去的事件。

historic.en: This was a historic moment for the country.
historic.zh: 这是该国有历史意义的时刻。

historical.en: The historical building attracts many tourists.
historical.zh: 这座历史建筑吸引许多游客。

history.en: History helps us learn from the past.
history.zh: 历史帮助我们从过去中学习。

hit.en: The ball hit the window and broke it.
hit.zh: 球击中了窗户并把它打碎了。

hitchhike.en: When he was a student, he decided to hitchhike across the country during his summer vacation to experience different cultures.
hitchhike.zh: 作为一名学生，他决定在暑假期间搭便车周游全国，体验不同的文化。

hobbies.en: Reading and painting are my hobbies.
hobbies.zh: 阅读和绘画是我的爱好。

hobby.zh: 阅读是我最喜欢的爱好。

hopeful.en: She remained hopeful despite the challenges.
hopeful.zh: 尽管面临挑战，她仍然充满希望。

hopefully.en: Hopefully the weather will be nice tomorrow.

horizon.en: The sun rises above the horizon.

hormones.en: Hormones control growth during teenage years.
hormones.zh: 激素控制青少年时期的生长发育。

horn.en: The sounding of the ship's horn echoed across the harbor, signaling the official beginning of the maritime festival.
horn.zh: 船鸣声在港口回荡，标志着航海节的正式开始。

horror.en: The accident filled everyone with horror.
horror.zh: 那场事故让每个人都感到恐惧。

horse.en: The horse ran fast across the field.

horses.en: The horses are running in the field.

hour.en: Many students spend several hours every day preparing for the IELTS examination to improve their chances of success.
hour.zh: 许多学生每天花几个小时准备雅思考试，以提高他们成功的机会。

house.en: I live in a small house near school.
house.zh: 我住在学校附近的一所小房子里。

household.en: Each household needs to pay utility bills.
household.zh: 每个家庭都需要支付水电费。

households.zh: 现在大多数家庭都有电脑。

housewife.en: My grandmother was a traditional housewife who managed all household chores without any modern appliances.
housewife.zh: 我的祖母是一位传统家庭主妇，在没有任何现代电器的情况下管理所有家务。

housework.en: Modern appliances have significantly reduced the amount of time people spend on housework compared to previous generations.
housework.zh: 与现代电器与前几代人相比大大减少了人们做家务的时间。

housing.en: The government should invest more in affordable housing to address the growing homelessness problem in major cities.
housing.zh: 政府应该增加对经济实惠住房的投资，以解决主要城市日益严重的无家可归问题。

hover.en: A helicopter began to hover over the accident scene, and rescue teams quickly arrived to assist the victims.
hover.zh: 一架直升机开始悬停在事故现场上空，救援队迅速赶到协助受害者。

how.en: Understanding how children develop language skills is essential for educators who want to design effective teaching methods.
how.zh: 了解儿童如何发展语言技能，对于想要设计有效教学方法的教育工作者来说至关重要。

how to use.en: Learn how to use Excel functions.

hockey.en: The children enjoy playing hockey after school.
hockey.zh: 孩子们放学后喜欢打曲棍球。

hold.en: Please hold this bag for me.

hole.en: There is a hole in my sock.

holes.en: There are holes in the socks.

holiday.en: Many families prefer to take a holiday abroad during the summer months to experience different cultures.
holiday.zh: 许多家庭喜欢在夏季出国度假，以体验不同的文化。

holidays.en: Where will you spend your holidays?

hollow.en: The hollow tube was very light.

hollywood.zh: 好莱坞制作许多著名电影。

holy.en: Jerusalem is considered a holy city by followers of three major world religions: Judaism, Christianity, and Islam.
holy.zh: 耶路撒冷被三大世界宗教的追随者视为圣城：犹太教、基督教和伊斯兰教。

however.en: However, despite these measures implemented by the government, the environmental problem persists in many developing countries.
however.zh: 然而，尽管政府采取了这些措施，环境问题仍然在许多发展中国家存在。

huge.en: The company made a huge profit last year.
huge.zh: 这家公司去年获得了巨额利润。

human.en: Human health depends on clean air.
human.zh: 人类健康依赖于清洁的空气。

human activity.en: Human activity has changed many landscapes.
human activity.zh: 人类活动改变了许多地貌。

humble.en: Despite his remarkable success in business, he remained humble and continued to work hard every day.
humble.zh: 尽管他在商业上取得了显著成功，他仍然保持谦逊，继续每天努力工作。

humidity.en: High humidity can make even moderate temperatures feel uncomfortably hot and extremely unpleasant for people.
humidity.zh: 高湿度会使即使是适中的温度也让人感到不舒服地炎热，对人们来说极其难受。

humiliate.en: The professional athlete was publicly humiliated by the doping scandal that emerged after the international competition.
humiliate.zh: 那名职业运动员因国际比赛后曝光的兴奋剂丑闻而受到公开羞辱。

humor.en: A skilled and effective teacher uses humor appropriately to engage students and make lessons more memorable.
humor.zh: 一位熟练有效的教师会适当使用幽默来吸引学生，让课程更加令人难忘。

homestay.en: Many international students choose a homestay while studying abroad.
homestay.zh: 许多留学生在海外学习时选择家庭寄宿。

homework.en: Teachers assign homework not only to reinforce classroom learning but also to develop students' time management skills.
homework.zh: 教师布置家庭作业不仅是为了巩固课堂学习，也是为了培养学生的时间管理能力。

honest.en: He is an honest worker we trust.
honest.zh: 他是一个我们信任的诚实员工。

honestly.en: Honestly speaking, the most challenging part of learning a new language is overcoming the fear of making mistakes.
honestly.zh: 说实话，学习一门新语言最具挑战性的部分是克服犯错的恐惧。

honey.en: My sister drinks tea with honey.

honor.en: The university held a ceremony to honor students who had achieved exceptional results in their academic pursuits.
honor.zh: 大学举办了一场仪式，表彰在学术追求中取得优异成绩的学生。

honors.en: She graduated with honors, receiving the highest academic distinction awarded by the faculty of sciences.
honors.zh: 她以优异成绩毕业，获得了理学院授予的最高学术荣誉。

hook.en: Please hook your coat on the rack.

hooks.en: Hang your coat on the hooks.
hooks.zh: 把你的外套挂在钩子上。

hope.en: Despite facing numerous obstacles, the young entrepreneur maintained hope that her innovative startup would succeed.
hope.zh: 尽管面临众多障碍，这位年轻的企业家仍然抱有希望，相信她的创新初创公司会成功。

hose.en: The gardener carefully unwound the hose from the reel and began watering the flowers in the early morning sunshine.
hose.zh: 园丁小心翼翼地从卷轴上解开浇水软管，开始在清晨的阳光中浇灌花朵。

hospital.en: She works as a nurse at the hospital.

hospitality.zh: 主人表现得非常热情好客。

host.en: She will host the party tonight.

hostage.en: The dramatic rescue of the hostage after three days of captivity was celebrated as a significant victory by the entire nation.
hostage.zh: 在三天囚禁后，人质戏剧性地获救，整个国家都将此庆祝为一项重大胜利。

hostel.en: I stayed at a cheap hostel.
hostel.zh: 我住在一个便宜的旅社。

hostile.en: His hostile attitude made negotiations difficult.
hostile.zh: 他敌意的态度使谈判变得困难。

hot.en: The debate on immigration has become one of the hottest political topics in contemporary electoral campaigns across Europe.
hot.zh: 移民辩论已成为当代欧洲竞选活动中最热门的话题之一。

hotel.en: We stayed at a nice hotel.
hotel.zh: 我们住在一个不错的旅馆。

hotels.en: Many hotels line the main street.
hotels.zh: 许多酒店沿着主街排列。

humour.en: Good humour helps in difficult situations.
humour.zh: 好的幽默感有助于应对困难局面。

hundreds.en: Hundreds of people waited in line.

hung.en: A beautiful painting hung on the wall.
hung.zh: 一幅美丽的画挂在墙上。

hunger.en: Many children still suffer from hunger.
hunger.zh: 许多儿童仍在遭受饥饿之苦。

hungry.en: Children who start the school day without breakfast often feel hungry and struggle to concentrate effectively in class.
hungry.zh: 那些不吃早餐就开始一天学校生活的孩子经常会感到饥饿，并且在课堂上难以有效集中注意力。

hunt.en: New graduates must hunt for employment opportunities actively and prepare thoroughly for every job interview they attend.
hunt.zh: 应届毕业生必须积极寻找就业机会，并为参加的每一次工作面试做好充分准备。

hunt for.en: They hunt for new job opportunities.
hunt for.zh: 他们寻找新的工作机会。

hunters.en: Hunters tracked the animal through the forest.
hunters.zh: 猎人穿过森林追踪那只动物。

hunting.en: Farmers are hunting for better seeds.
hunting.zh: 农民正在寻找更好的种子。

immigrants.en: Many immigrants work hard to build new lives.
immigrants.zh: 许多移民努力建立新生活。

immigrate.en: Skilled professionals often choose to immigrate to nations offering better career opportunities and higher standards of living.
immigrate.zh: 技术专业人员通常选择移民到提供更好职业机会和生活水平的国家。

immigrated.en: He immigrated to Australia twenty years ago and has since become a successful business owner in Melbourne.
immigrated.zh: 他二十年前移民到澳大利亚，此后成为墨尔本一位成功的企业主。

immigrates.en: Whenever someone immigrates to a foreign country, they must adapt to new cultural norms and social expectations.
immigrates.zh: 每当有人移民到外国时，他们必须适应新的文化规范和社会期望。

immigrating.en: The process of immigrating requires extensive documentation, medical examinations, and financial proof of stability.
immigrating.zh: 移民过程需要大量文件、体检和稳定的经济证明。

immigration.en: Immigration policies continue to be a contentious topic in political debates across many developed nations.
immigration.zh: 移民政策继续成为许多发达国家政治辩论中的争议话题。

immune.en: Vaccines help make children immune to diseases.
immune.zh: 疫苗帮助儿童对疾病免疫。

immune system.en: Regular exercise and a balanced diet can significantly strengthen the immune system against various illnesses.
immune system.zh: 定期锻炼和均衡饮食可以显著增强免疫系统抵御各种疾病的能力。

immunity.en: Herd immunity can only be achieved when a sufficient percentage of the population has been vaccinated.
immunity.zh: 只有当足够比例的人口接种疫苗后，才能实现群体免疫。

impact.en: The significant impact of social media on mental health has become a major concern for psychologists worldwide.
impact.zh: 社交媒体对心理健康的重大影响已成为全世界心理学家关注的主要问题。

hurdle.en: The main hurdle in finding affordable housing is the high demand and limited supply in metropolitan areas across the country.
hurdle.zh: 在这个国家的主要城市地区，找到负担得起的住房的主要障碍是需求高且供应有限。

hurry.en: We must hurry to catch the bus.
hurry.zh: 我们必须赶快去赶公交车。

hurt.en: She hurt her leg in the fall.

husband.en: Her husband works as an engineer.
husband.zh: 她的丈夫是一名工程师。

hut.en: Traditional huts made of local materials often provide better insulation than modern concrete buildings in extreme weather conditions.
hut.zh: 在极端天气条件下，用当地材料建造的传统茅屋通常比现代混凝土建筑提供更好的隔热效果。

hybrid.en: Hybrid learning combines online and traditional classes.
hybrid.zh: 混合学习结合在线和传统课程。

hydro.en: The city built a new hydro system.
hydro.zh: 这座城市建造了一个新的水利系统。

hydrogen.en: Water contains two atoms of hydrogen.

hygiene.en: Maintaining proper hygiene in public places is essential for preventing the spread of infectious diseases among communities.
hygiene.zh: 在公共场所保持适当的卫生对于防止传染病在社区传播至关重要。

hypertension.en: Medical experts warn that hypertension is becoming increasingly common among young adults due to sedentary lifestyles and poor diets.
hypertension.zh: 医学专家警告说，由于久坐不动的生活方式和不良饮食，高血压在年轻人中变得越来越常见。

illegally.en: The factory was found to be illegally dumping toxic waste into the nearby river, causing significant environmental damage to the ecosystem.
illegally.zh: 这家工厂被发现非法向附近河流倾倒有毒废物，对生态系统造成了严重的环境破坏。

illinois.zh: 伊利诺伊州是中西部的一个州。

illiterate.en: Many illiterate adults want to learn reading.
illiterate.zh: 许多文盲成年人想学习阅读。

illness.en: His illness kept him at home for weeks.
illness.zh: 他的病让他在家休息了好几周。

illogical.en: Some employees find the decision-making process in the company completely illogical, as it often ignores practical considerations.
illogical.zh: 一些员工认为公司的决策过程完全不合逻辑，因为它经常忽视实际考虑。

illogically.en: He argued illogically during the debate, jumping from one unrelated point to another without providing coherent evidence.
illogically.zh: 他在辩论中不合逻辑地争论，从一个无关的论点跳到另一个，没有提供连贯的证据。

illuminate.en: The professor used various diagrams and real-world examples to illuminate complex concepts for the students in the lecture.
illuminate.zh: 教授在讲座中使用各种图表和现实世界的例子来阐明学生的复杂概念。

illuminated.en: The street lights illuminated the road.

illusion.en: Many young people unfortunately live under the dangerous illusion that success comes easily without genuine hard work and dedication.
illusion.zh: 许多年轻人不幸生活在一种危险的幻觉中，认为成功可以轻易获得，无需真正的努力和奉献。

illustrate.en: Charts can illustrate the sales trends.
illustrate.zh: 图表可以说明销售趋势。

illustrated.en: The graph illustrated a dramatic rise in university enrollment rates across developing nations over the past decade.
illustrated.zh: 该图表说明了过去十年发展中国家大学入学率的急剧上升。

illustrates.en: This case study illustrates how community-based initiatives can effectively address environmental challenges.
illustrates.zh: 这个案例研究说明了社区倡议如何有效应对环境挑战。
