link.zh: 研究人员已经证实了定期锻炼与成年人心理健康改善之间的直接联系。

linked.en: The two cities are linked by rail.

linking.en: The project focuses on linking traditional farming methods with modern technology to increase agricultural productivity.
linking.zh: 该项目专注于将传统农业方法与现代技术相结合，以提高农业生产力。

links.en: Social media links can significantly influence how information spreads and shapes public opinion in digital communities.
links.zh: 社交媒体链接可以极大地影响信息在数字社区中的传播方式并塑造公众舆论。

lion.en: The lion roared loudly at noon.

licences.en: In many countries, fishing and hunting require special licences that are issued by local authorities to regulate activities.
licences.zh: 在许多国家，钓鱼和狩猎需要由当地政府颁发的特别许可证来规范活动。

licencing.en: The government is currently reviewing the process of licencing new medical practitioners to ensure higher standards of care.
licencing.zh: 政府目前正在审查新医疗从业人员的许可程序，以确保更高的护理标准。

licensed.en: Only licensed professionals are permitted to operate heavy machinery in construction zones for safety reasons.
licensed.zh: 出于安全考虑，只有获得许可的专业人员才允许在建筑工地操作重型机械。

licenses.en: Some businesses require multiple licenses from different government agencies before they can legally start operations.
licenses.zh: 一些企业在合法开业前需要从不同的政府机构获得多个许可证。

licensing.en: The licensing process takes about two weeks.
licensing.zh: 许可流程大约需要两周。

lick.en: The ice cream was melting so quickly that it began to lick the sides of the cone as I ate.
lick.zh: 冰淇淋融化得很快，在我吃的时候开始沿着蛋筒边缘流下来。

lid.en: Please ensure the cooking pot has a tight lid to prevent steam from escaping during the boiling process.
lid.zh: 请确保烹饪锅有紧密的盖子，以防止沸腾过程中蒸汽逸出。

lie.en: The old manuscript lay in the museum vault, where it had remained undisturbed for several centuries.
lie.zh: 那份古老的手稿躺在博物馆的库房里，已经完好无损地保存了几个世纪。

lie in.en: The greatest advantage of online education lies in its flexibility for students with busy schedules.
lie in.zh: 在线教育最大的优势在于它为日程繁忙的学生提供了灵活性。

liberalize.en: Many developing nations are beginning to liberalize their trade policies to stimulate economic growth and attract foreign investment.
liberalize.zh: 许多发展中国家开始放宽贸易政策，以刺激经济增长并吸引外国投资。

liberate.en: The development of online education has helped to liberate students from the constraints of geographical location.
liberate.zh: 在线教育的发展帮助学生摆脱了地理位置的限制。

liberated.en: Modern women have become more liberated in pursuing careers traditionally dominated by men in various industries.
liberated.zh: 现代女性在追求各行业传统上由男性主导的职业方面变得更加开放。

liberation.en: The liberation movement in the 1960s brought significant social changes and reshaped public attitudes towards equality.
liberation.zh: 20世纪60年代的解放运动带来了重大的社会变革，并重塑了公众对平等的态度。

liberties.en: In democratic societies, citizens must carefully balance their personal liberties with their responsibilities to the community.
liberties.zh: 在民主社会中，公民必须谨慎平衡个人自由与对社区的责任。

liberty.en: The concept of liberty is fundamental to understanding the values and principles that guide modern democratic nations.
liberty.zh: 自由的概念对于理解指导现代民主国家的价值观和原则至关重要。

librarian.en: The librarian helped me find the book.
librarian.zh: 图书管理员帮我找到了那本书。

libraries.zh: 学生们经常在图书馆学习。

library.en: I often study at the school library.
library.zh: 我经常在学校图书馆学习。

licenced.en: In most countries, medical practitioners must be properly licenced before they are permitted to treat patients independently.
licenced.zh: 在大多数国家，医疗从业者必须获得适当的许可才能被允许独立治疗病人。

letter.en: The professor asked students to write a formal letter to the university administration requesting an extension for their assignments.
letter.zh: 教授要求学生写一封正式信函给大学管理层，请求延长作业截止日期。

letters.en: I wrote several letters to her.

level.en: The unemployment level has decreased significantly over the past year due to new economic policies implemented by the government.
level.zh: 由于政府实施的新经济政策，过去一年失业水平显著下降。

levels.en: There are different levels in this course.
levels.zh: 这门课程有不同的级别。

lever.en: The government can use taxation as a lever to influence consumer behavior and encourage environmentally friendly practices.
lever.zh: 政府可以将税收作为杠杆来影响消费者行为，并鼓励环保实践。

levy.en: The local government decided to levy a new environmental tax on manufacturing companies to reduce industrial pollution significantly.
levy.zh: 地方政府决定对制造企业征收新的环境税，以大幅减少工业污染。

liable.en: Companies are legally liable for any environmental damage caused by their manufacturing processes and must pay compensation.
liable.zh: 公司在法律上对其制造过程造成的任何环境损害承担责任，必须支付赔偿。

liberal.en: The liberal arts education system encourages students to develop critical thinking and broad intellectual perspectives across disciplines.
liberal.zh: 文科教育体系鼓励学生在各学科中培养批判性思维和广阔的学术视野。

liberalism.en: Classical liberalism advocates for minimal government intervention in economic and personal affairs while protecting individual freedoms.
liberalism.zh: 古典自由主义主张对经济和个人事务的最小政府干预，同时保护个人自由。

liberalization.en: The liberalization of trade policies has significantly increased international commerce and strengthened economic cooperation among nations.
liberalization.zh: 贸易政策的自由化显著促进了国际商业的发展，并加强了各国间的经济合作。

lions.en: The number of lions in Africa has declined significantly due to habitat loss and illegal hunting, raising concerns among wildlife conservationists.
lions.zh: 由于栖息地丧失和非法狩猎，非洲狮子的数量大幅下降，引起了野生动物保护主义者的担忧。

lip.en: Critics argue that the government offers only lip service to environmental protection without implementing effective measures.
lip.zh: 批评者认为，政府只是对环境保护做表面文章，而没有实施有效的措施。

liquor.en: The regulation on liquor sales varies considerably across different countries, with some imposing strict age restrictions and high taxes.
liquor.zh: 不同国家对酒类销售的法规差异很大，有些国家实施严格的年龄限制和高税收。

listen.en: To improve their speaking skills, language learners should listen attentively to native speakers and mimic their pronunciation patterns.
listen.zh: 为了提高口语能力，语言学习者应该认真听母语者的讲话并模仿他们的发音模式。

listen to.en: Students should listen to the teacher.

listening.en: Listening skills help students learn better.
listening.zh: 听力技巧帮助学生更好地学习。

literacy.en: Computer literacy is essential in modern workplaces.
literacy.zh: 计算机识字能力在现代工作场所中必不可少。

limestone.en: Limestone is common in cave formations.
limestone.zh: 石灰岩在洞穴中很常见。

limit.en: We must limit our spending this month.
limit.zh: 我们必须限制这个月的开支。

limitation.en: A significant limitation of this study is that the sample size may not accurately represent the entire population.
limitation.zh: 这项研究的一个显著局限性是，样本量可能无法准确代表整个人群。

limitations.zh: 每个计划都有其局限性。

limited.en: Our time and money are limited.
limited.zh: 我们的时间和金钱有限。

limp.en: After the accident, he was forced to limp to the nearest hospital for immediate medical attention.
limp.zh: 事故发生后，他不得不一瘸一拐地走向最近的医院寻求紧急医疗救治。

lind.zh: 林德是一个安静的村庄。

line.en: The professor asked students to follow a clear line of reasoning when presenting their arguments in essays.
line.zh: 教授要求学生在论文中表达论点时遵循清晰的逻辑思路。

lineages.en: Many royal families preserve their lineages for centuries.
lineages.zh: 许多皇室家族将血统延续了几个世纪。

linear.en: The research found a clear linear relationship between hours spent studying and academic performance scores.
linear.zh: 研究发现，花在学习上的时间与学业成绩之间存在明显的线性关系。

life.en: Many people believe that the quality of life is more important than the length of it in modern society.
life.zh: 许多人认为在现代社会中，生活质量比寿命长度更重要。

life cycle.en: Every living thing has its own life cycle.
life cycle.zh: 每个生物都有自己的生活周期。

life expectancy.zh: 全球预期寿命有所提高。

lifecycle.en: Every product has its own lifecycle.
lifecycle.zh: 每个产品都有其自己的生命周期。

lifeguards.en: Lifeguards watch swimmers carefully at the beach.
lifeguards.zh: 救生员在海滩上仔细观察游泳者。

lifespan.zh: 健康食品可以延长寿命。

lifestyle.en: A healthy lifestyle requires daily exercise.
lifestyle.zh: 健康的生活方式需要每天锻炼。

lift.zh: 请小心地举起这个箱子。

lifting.en: Lifting heavy boxes is hard work.
lifting.zh: 搬重箱子是辛苦的工作。

locate.en: The archaeologists were able to locate the ancient ruins using satellite imagery and ground-penetrating radar technology.
locate.zh: 考古学家能够使用卫星图像和探地雷达技术来定位古代遗址。

located.en: The school is located near the river.

locating.en: Locating suitable accommodation in major cities has become increasingly challenging due to rising rental costs.
locating.zh: 由于租金上涨，在主要城市找到合适的住所变得越来越困难。

location.en: This is a perfect location for a school.
location.zh: 这是建学校的完美地点。

locations.zh: 我们参观了两个不同的地方。

locator.en: The GPS locator on the hiking trail helps outdoor enthusiasts navigate safely through remote wilderness areas.
locator.zh: 徒步路线上的GPS定位器帮助户外运动爱好者安全穿越偏远荒野地区。

loch.en: The famous loch attracts many tourists.
loch.zh: 这个著名的湖吸引了许多游客。

lock.en: Please lock the door before leaving.

locked.en: He locked the door before leaving.

locker.en: He put his bag in the school locker.
locker.zh: 他把书包放在学校寄物柜里。

look forward to.en: I look forward to hearing from you soon.
look forward to.zh: 我期待很快收到您的回复。

look into.en: The government should look into the issue of air pollution in major cities and implement stricter regulations.
look into.zh: 政府应该调查主要城市的空气污染问题，并实施更严格的法规。

look through.en: I need to look through these documents.

loom.en: The threat of climate change continues to loom over future generations and requires immediate action from world leaders.
loom.zh: 气候变化的威胁持续笼罩着后代，需要世界各国领导人立即采取行动。

loop.en: The computer program uses a loop function to process large amounts of data efficiently and reduce processing time.
loop.zh: 这个电脑程序使用循环函数来高效处理大量数据并减少处理时间。

loose.en: The loose button might fall off soon.
loose.zh: 这颗松动的扣子可能很快会掉。

loosen.en: Regular exercise and stretching can help loosen tight muscles and improve overall flexibility and mobility.
loosen.zh: 定期锻炼和伸展运动可以帮助放松紧绷的肌肉，改善整体灵活性和活动能力。

lord.en: In medieval England, the lord had absolute authority over the peasants who lived and worked on his estate.
lord.zh: 在中世纪的英格兰，领主对居住和工作在他庄园里的农民拥有绝对权威。

lorries.en: Large lorries delivered goods to the city.
lorries.zh: 大型卡车把货物送到城市。

lorry.en: The local council has proposed restricting lorry access to city centers during peak hours to reduce traffic congestion.
lorry.zh: 地方议会提议在高峰时段限制卡车进入市中心，以减少交通拥堵。

literary.zh: 文学书籍提高语言能力。

literate.en: While most young people are computer literate, fewer demonstrate strong traditional literacy skills in reading and writing.
literate.zh: 虽然大多数年轻人都精通电脑，但很少有人在传统读写能力方面表现出色。

literature.en: I study English literature at university.
literature.zh: 我在大学学习英国文学。

litre.en: I purchased a two litre bottle of filtered water to stay properly hydrated during my afternoon study session.
litre.zh: 我买了一瓶两升的纯净水，以在下午学习时保持充足的水分。

litres.en: The car needs fifty litres of petrol.
litres.zh: 这辆车需要五十升汽油。

litter.en: There was litter all over the park.

little.en: Despite having only a little time remaining before the deadline, I managed to complete my research paper successfully.
little.zh: 尽管在截止日期前只剩一点时间，我还是成功完成了我的研究论文。

live.en: Many graduates aspire to live in metropolitan cities where they can access better career opportunities and cultural amenities.
live.zh: 许多毕业生渴望生活在能够获得更好职业机会和文化设施的大都市。

live in.en: Many young people live in the city center.
live in.zh: 许多年轻人住在市中心。

logo.en: The company logo looks very modern.
logo.zh: 公司标志看起来很现代。

lonely.en: She felt lonely after moving to a new city.
lonely.zh: 搬到新城市后，她感到很孤独。

long.en: The long working hours required by some professions often lead to burnout and stress, affecting both physical and mental health.
long.zh: 某些职业要求的长时间工作经常导致倦怠和压力，影响身心健康。

longitude.en: The ship's position was determined by calculating its latitude and longitude using advanced satellite navigation systems available today.
longitude.zh: 这艘船的位置是通过使用当今先进的卫星导航系统计算其纬度和经度来确定的。

look.en: When you look at the statistics, it becomes clear that education directly impacts earning potential and career opportunities.
look.zh: 当你查看统计数据时，很明显教育直接影响赚钱能力和职业机会。

look after.en: Parents are responsible for looking after their children's basic needs until they reach adulthood and become independent.
look after.zh: 父母有责任照顾孩子的基础需求，直到他们成年并独立。

look at.en: Please look at the picture on the wall.

look for.en: Many graduates are looking for jobs that offer both competitive salaries and meaningful career advancement opportunities.
look for.zh: 许多毕业生正在寻找既有竞争力薪酬又有意义职业发展机会的工作。

locomotive.en: The locomotive pulled twenty carriages across the countryside, transporting both passengers and freight efficiently.
locomotive.zh: 火车头拖着二十节车厢穿过乡村，高效地运送乘客和货物。

locomotives.en: Modern locomotives are significantly more fuel-efficient than those manufactured a century ago.
locomotives.zh: 现代火车头比一个世纪前制造的火车头燃油效率高得多。

lodge.en: We stayed at a mountain lodge.

log.en: Researchers keep a detailed log of all observations made during their field studies.
log.zh: 研究人员在他们的田野调查期间详细记录所有观察结果。

logging.zh: 伐木破坏了古老的森林。

logical.en: This is a logical way to solve the problem.
logical.zh: 这是解决问题的合乎逻辑的方式。

logically.en: Students should approach essay writing logically, first gathering research before drafting their arguments.
logically.zh: 学生应该逻辑地进行论文写作，先收集研究资料再起草论点。

logician.en: The logician spent decades developing new systems of reasoning that transformed mathematical analysis.
logician.zh: 这位逻辑学家花费数十年开发新的推理系统，改变了数学分析领域。

logicians.en: Ancient Greek logicians laid the foundation for systematic thinking in Western philosophy and science.
logicians.zh: 古希腊逻辑学家为西方哲学和科学中的系统性思维奠定了基础。

loaf.en: During the summer holidays, many teenagers tend to loaf around at home instead of engaging in productive activities.
loaf.zh: 暑假期间，许多青少年倾向于在家无所事事，而不是从事有意义的活动。

loan.en: I need a small loan from the bank.
loan.zh: 我需要从银行借一小笔贷款。

lobby.en: Environmental organisations lobby parliamentarians to introduce stricter laws protecting endangered species from extinction.
lobby.zh: 环保组织向国会议员游说，要求出台更严格的法律保护濒危物种免于灭绝。

local.en: We prefer local food to foreign food.

local community.en: The local community organized a festival.
local community.zh: 当地社区组织了一场节日活动。

local council.en: The local council approved the new park plan.
local council.zh: 地方议会批准了新的公园计划。

local people.en: Local people welcome tourists to their town.
local people.zh: 当地人欢迎游客来到他们的城镇。

local residents.zh: 当地居民喜欢这个公园。

locality.en: The coastal locality is renowned for its picturesque landscapes and thriving fishing industry.
locality.zh: 这个沿海地区以其风景如画的景观和繁荣的渔业而闻名。

locals.en: The locals were very friendly to visitors.
locals.zh: 本地人对游客非常友好。

live on.en: Many rural communities still live on subsistence farming, growing crops and raising animals for their own consumption and survival.
live on.zh: 许多农村社区仍然依靠自给农业为生，种植农作物和饲养牲畜供自己消费和生存。

livelihoods.en: Many families depend on fishing for their livelihoods.
livelihoods.zh: 许多家庭依靠捕鱼为生。

liver.en: The doctor examined his liver condition.
liver.zh: 医生检查了他的肝脏状况。

livestock.en: Farmers raised livestock on the farm.

living.en: The rising cost of living in metropolitan areas has forced many young people to reconsider their career choices.
living.zh: 大都市生活成本的上涨迫使许多年轻人重新考虑他们的职业选择。

living room.en: Our living room is very big.

lizards.zh: 蜥蜴经常藏在岩石下面。

load.en: University students often carry a heavy academic load, balancing multiple courses, assignments, and extracurricular activities.
load.zh: 大学生通常承受着沉重的学业负担，需要平衡多门课程、作业和课外活动。

loads.en: She loads the boxes onto the truck.

lose.en: Many students lose marks in the writing section because they fail to address all parts of the question properly.
lose.zh: 许多学生在写作部分失分，因为他们没有恰当地回答问题的所有部分。

loss.en: The company suffered a huge financial loss.
loss.zh: 公司遭受了巨大的经济损失。

lost.en: I lost my wallet on the bus.
lost.zh: 我在公交车上丢了钱包。

lot.en: A lot of research has been conducted into the effects of social media on young people's mental health.
lot.zh: 关于社交媒体对年轻人心理健康的影响，已经进行了大量研究。

lots of.en: There are lots of books in the library.

lottery.en: He won a million in the lottery.

loud.en: She spoke in a very loud voice.
loud.zh: 她用非常大的声音说话。

lounge.en: Passengers can relax in the airport lounge.
lounge.zh: 乘客可以在机场休息室放松。

love.en: Young children typically love exploring new environments and learning through play, which is crucial for their development.
love.zh: 幼儿通常喜欢探索新环境并通过玩耍来学习，这对他们的发展至关重要。

lovely.en: We spent a lovely afternoon together.
lovely.zh: 我们一起度过了一个美好的下午。

mainland.en: The island is far from the mainland.

mainly.en: The population is mainly young students.

mainstream.en: This idea is now part of the mainstream.
mainstream.zh: 这个想法现在是主流的一部分。

maintain.en: We must maintain high quality standards.
maintain.zh: 我们必须保持高质量标准。

maintained.en: The university has maintained its reputation for academic excellence for over fifty years.
maintained.zh: 这所大学五十多年来一直保持着学术卓越的声誉。

maintaining.en: Maintaining a healthy work-life balance is crucial for long-term productivity and well-being.
maintaining.zh: 保持健康的工作与生活平衡对长期生产力和身心健康至关重要。

maintains.en: The report maintains that environmental regulations should be strengthened immediately to combat climate change.
maintains.zh: 该报告坚持认为应立即加强环境法规以应对气候变化。

maintenance.en: Regular maintenance keeps the car running.
maintenance.zh: 定期保养能保持汽车正常运行。

maize.en: Farmers grow maize in this field.
maize.zh: 农民在这块地里种植玉米。

majorities.en: In most democratic elections, majorities determine the final outcome of the vote and shape national policies.
majorities.zh: 在大多数民主选举中，多数票决定投票结果并塑造国家政策。

machines.zh: 现代机器使工作更容易。

mad.en: The decision to cancel the project without warning left many employees feeling absolutely mad about the poor management.
mad.zh: 取消项目而未发出警告的决定让许多员工对糟糕的管理感到非常愤怒。

madam.en: The customer service representative politely addressed the guest as madam and asked how she could assist with her inquiry.
madam.zh: 客服代表礼貌地称呼这位客人为女士，并询问她可以如何帮助处理她的咨询。

magazine.en: I read a magazine on the train.

magic.en: The magic show amazed all the children.
magic.zh: 魔术表演让所有孩子惊叹。

magistrate.en: The magistrate delivered a fair verdict after carefully considering all the evidence presented by both prosecution and defense lawyers.
magistrate.zh: 法官在仔细考虑了控方和辩护律师提供的所有证据后，作出了公正的裁决。

magnet.en: Scientists discovered that certain rare earth elements can function as powerful magnets when combined with specific metal alloys.
magnet.zh: 科学家发现，某些稀土元素与特定金属合金结合时，可以作为强力磁铁发挥作用。

magnetic.en: He has a magnetic personality that attracts people.
magnetic.zh: 他有一种吸引人的磁性人格。

magnificent.en: The view from the top is magnificent.
magnificent.zh: 从顶部看到的景色很壮丽。

malignant.en: Early detection of malignant tumors significantly improves patients' chances of successful treatment and recovery.
malignant.zh: 恶性肿瘤的早期发现能显著提高患者成功治疗和康复的机会。

mall.en: Let's meet at the shopping mall tomorrow.

malnutrition.en: Malnutrition during early childhood can lead to permanent cognitive damage and developmental problems.
malnutrition.zh: 童年早期的营养不良可能导致永久性的认知损害和发育问题。

mammal.en: The dolphin is a highly intelligent marine mammal that communicates through complex vocalizations.
mammal.zh: 海豚是一种高度智慧的海洋哺乳动物，通过复杂的发声进行交流。

mammals.en: Mammals are warm-blooded animals that feed their young with milk.
mammals.zh: 哺乳动物是温血动物，用乳汁喂养幼崽。

mammoths.en: Hunters once chased mammoths across ancient plains.
mammoths.zh: 猎人曾在古老的平原上追捕猛犸象。

man.en: Man has always sought to understand the natural world through scientific inquiry and exploration.
man.zh: 人类始终通过科学探究和探索来寻求理解自然界。

manage.en: She can manage her time well.
manage.zh: 她能管理好自己的时间。

management.en: The management team made an important decision.
management.zh: 管理团队做出了一个重要的决定。

manager.en: The manager approved my vacation request.
manager.zh: 经理批准了我的假期请求。

managers.en: Effective managers must possess strong communication skills to ensure that all team members understand their specific responsibilities.
managers.zh: 有效的管理者必须具备强大的沟通技巧，以确保所有团队成员理解他们的具体职责。

mangrove.en: Mangrove trees grow near the coast.

manifest.en: The negative effects of pollution will manifest in declining public health and environmental degradation over time.
manifest.zh: 污染的负面影响将随着时间推移在公共健康下降和环境恶化中显现出来。

mankind.en: Throughout history, mankind has developed innovative technologies to overcome environmental challenges and improve living standards.
mankind.zh: 纵观历史，人类开发了创新技术来克服环境挑战并提高生活水平。

manner.en: The professor spoke in a calm manner, ensuring that all students understood the complex theoretical concepts clearly.
manner.zh: 教授以平静的方式讲话，确保所有学生都清楚地理解了复杂的理论概念。

manoeuvre.en: He manoeuvre the car into the small space.
manoeuvre.zh: 他把车移进了那个小空间。

mansion.en: The historic mansion was transformed into a luxury hotel that attracts thousands of tourists every year.
mansion.zh: 这座历史悠久的豪宅被改造成一家每年吸引数千名游客的豪华酒店。

mantle.en: A thick mantle of snow covered the mountain.
mantle.zh: 厚厚的积雪覆盖了整座山。

manual.en: The manual is very clear and easy to follow.
manual.zh: 这本说明书非常清晰易懂。

low.en: The plane flew low over the hills.

lowland.en: The lowland areas suffer from floods.
lowland.zh: 低洼地区遭受洪水侵袭。

loyalty.en: Loyalty is an important quality in friendship.
loyalty.zh: 忠诚是友谊中重要的品质。

loyalty card.en: Using a loyalty card at supermarkets can help consumers accumulate points that can be redeemed for discounts.
loyalty card.zh: 在超市使用会员卡可以帮助消费者积累积分，这些积分可以兑换折扣。

lubricate.en: It is important to lubricate the moving parts of machinery regularly to prevent wear and extend its lifespan.
lubricate.zh: 定期润滑机械的运动部件以防止磨损并延长其使用寿命是很重要的。

luck.en: Finding affordable housing in major cities is often a matter of luck rather than careful planning.
luck.zh: 在大城市找到负担得起的住房通常与其说是仔细规划，不如说是运气问题。

luckily.en: Luckily, I arrived at the airport two hours early, which gave me plenty of time to check in and go through security.
luckily.zh: 幸运的是，我提前两小时到达机场，这给了我足够的时间办理登机手续和通过安检。

lucky.en: She felt lucky after winning the prize.

luggage.zh: 请把行李放在头顶行李架上。

lump.en: Many university students prefer to pay their tuition fees as a lump sum rather than in monthly installments throughout the year.
lump.zh: 许多大学生更喜欢一次性缴清学费，而不是全年按月分期付款。

lunar.en: They studied the lunar calendar carefully.

lunch.en: I have lunch at twelve every day.

lung.en: Doctors warn that smoking one pack of cigarettes per day can cause severe damage to the lung over time.
lung.zh: 医生警告称，每天吸一包香烟随着时间的推移会对肺部造成严重损害。

lure.en: The lure of high salaries in big cities often attracts young graduates to leave their hometowns and relocate.
lure.zh: 大城市高薪资的诱惑常常吸引年轻毕业生离开家乡并搬迁至此。

lush.en: The garden had lush green plants.
lush.zh: 花园里有葱翠的绿色植物。

luxury.en: She enjoyed the luxury of a hot bath.
luxury.zh: 她享受了热水澡的舒适。

machine.en: The automated machine has replaced many manual workers in factories, raising concerns about widespread job displacement.
machine.zh: 自动化机器取代了工厂中的许多体力劳动者，引发了人们对普遍失业的担忧。

majority.en: The majority of people agreed with the plan.
majority.zh: 大多数人同意这个计划。

majors.en: When choosing university majors, students should carefully consider both their personal interests and potential career prospects.
majors.zh: 选择大学专业时，学生应该仔细考虑自己的个人兴趣和潜在的职业前景。

make.en: Parents should make time to read with their children every day to improve literacy rates in the long term.
make.zh: 父母应该每天抽出时间与孩子一起阅读，以长期提高识字率。

make a note of.en: I always make a note of new vocabulary in a dedicated notebook for systematic exam preparation.
make a note of.zh: 我总是在专门的笔记本上记下新词汇，以便系统地备考。

make out.en: It can be difficult to make out what the speaker is saying when there is significant background noise.
make out.zh: 当有明显的背景噪音时，很难听清说话者的内容。

make sure.en: Please make sure the door is locked.

make up.en: Women in that culture make up their faces daily.
make up.zh: 那个文化中的女性每天化妆。

make use of.en: Students should make use of the library resources.
make use of.zh: 学生应该使用图书馆资源。

malaria.en: Malaria is common in tropical regions.
malaria.zh: 疟疾在热带地区很常见。

male.en: The male athlete won the race.

magnify.en: The microscope can magnify tiny cells to hundreds of times their original size, allowing scientists to observe them clearly.
magnify.zh: 显微镜可以将微小的细胞放大数百倍，让科学家们能够清晰地观察它们。

magnitude.en: The magnitude of the environmental problem requires immediate action from governments and individuals worldwide.
magnitude.zh: 环境问题的严重性需要各国政府和个人立即采取行动。

maid.en: In many countries, families employ a maid to help with household chores such as cleaning and cooking.
maid.zh: 在许多国家，家庭雇佣女佣来帮忙做打扫和烹饪等家务。

main.en: The main advantage of living in the city is the convenient access to public transportation and healthcare.
main.zh: 住在城市的主要优势是能够方便地使用公共交通和医疗保健。

main course.en: For the main course, I ordered grilled salmon with roasted vegetables, which was both delicious and nutritious.
main course.zh: 主菜我点了烤三文鱼配烤蔬菜，既美味又营养。

main entrance.en: The main entrance is on the left side.

main hall.en: The ceremony takes place in the main hall.

main road.en: The shop is located on the main road.

mariners.en: Ancient mariners used stars to navigate.

marked.en: Her improvement was marked last month.
marked.zh: 上个月她的进步很明显。

marketing.en: Marketing plays a key role in business success.
marketing.zh: 营销在商业成功中起着关键作用。

marketplace.en: The local marketplace opens every Saturday morning.
marketplace.zh: 当地集市每周六早上开门。

marks.en: The teacher marks the students' homework.

marriage.en: Their marriage has lasted twenty years.
marriage.zh: 他们的婚姻已持续二十年。

married.en: The married couple has two children.
married.zh: 这对已婚夫妇有两个孩子。

marry.en: Individuals should wait until they are emotionally and financially ready before they decide to marry.
marry.zh: 个人应该在情感和经济上都准备好之后再决定结婚。

marsh.en: A marsh is home to many water birds.
marsh.zh: 沼泽是许多水鸟的栖息地。

maximize.en: Companies should maximize their use of renewable energy sources to reduce their environmental impact significantly.
maximize.zh: 公司应该最大化利用可再生能源来显著减少对环境的影响。

maximized.en: The new factory design maximized the available floor space while simultaneously minimizing energy consumption.
maximized.zh: 新的工厂设计在最大化可用地板空间的同时也最小化了能源消耗。

maximizes.en: A well-organized study schedule maximizes learning efficiency and greatly improves knowledge retention.
maximizes.zh: 合理的学习安排能最大化学习效率并大大提高知识记忆力。

maximizing.en: Maximizing the benefits of technology in education requires proper training programs for all teachers.
maximizing.zh: 最大化教育技术的好处需要对所有教师进行适当的培训项目。

mayor.en: The mayor announced ambitious plans to build a modern cultural center in the heart of the downtown area.
mayor.zh: 市长宣布了在市中心建造现代化文化中心的宏伟计划。

maze.en: The children got lost in the garden maze.
maze.zh: 孩子们在花园迷宫里迷路了。

meadow.en: Many species of colorful butterflies can be observed in the wildflower meadows during the summer months.
meadow.zh: 许多种类的彩色蝴蝶可以在夏季的野花草地上观察到。

meal.en: We enjoyed a delicious meal together.
meal.zh: 我们一起享用了美味的一餐。

manufacture.en: Many factories in Asia manufacture electronic devices for international markets and global consumers.
manufacture.zh: 亚洲的许多工厂为国际市场和全球消费者生产电子设备。

manufacturer.en: The car manufacturer announced plans to invest heavily in electric vehicle development next year.
manufacturer.zh: 这家汽车制造商宣布计划明年大力投资电动汽车开发。

manufacturers.en: Car manufacturers are adapting to changes.
manufacturers.zh: 汽车制造商正在适应变化。

manufacturing.en: The manufacturing process takes three weeks.
manufacturing.zh: 制造过程需要三周时间。

manuscript.en: Researchers carefully examined the ancient manuscript to understand historical writing practices.
manuscript.zh: 研究人员仔细检查了这本古老的手稿，以了解历史上的书写习惯。

many.en: Many university graduates face significant challenges when entering the competitive job market.
many.zh: 许多大学毕业生在进入竞争激烈的就业市场时面临重大挑战。

maple.en: The maple leaves turn red in fall.

maps.en: Modern digital maps have revolutionized how people navigate cities and find directions.
maps.zh: 现代数字地图彻底改变了人们在城市中导航和寻找方向的方式。

marathon.en: Training for a marathon requires months of dedicated preparation and consistent physical exercise.
marathon.zh: 参加马拉松训练需要数月的专注准备和持续的体育锻炼。

meals.en: The hotel provides three meals daily.
meals.zh: 这家酒店每天提供三餐。

mean.en: Although the mean temperature has increased globally, the impact varies significantly across different regions and communities.
mean.zh: 尽管全球平均温度有所上升，但不同地区和社区受到的影响差异显著。

meaning.en: What is the exact meaning of this word?
meaning.zh: 这个词的确切意思是什么？

means.en: Public transportation is an effective means of reducing traffic congestion and improving air quality in urban areas.
means.zh: 公共交通是减少城市交通拥堵和改善空气质量的有效手段。

meantime.en: The new library is under construction; in the meantime, students can use temporary facilities nearby on campus.
meantime.zh: 新图书馆正在建设中；在此期间，学生可以使用校园附近的临时设施。

meanwhile.en: The government plans to reduce taxes; meanwhile, private companies are encouraged to invest more in renewable energy sources.
meanwhile.zh: 政府计划减税；与此同时，鼓励私营企业更多地投资可再生能源来源。

measure.en: Scientists measure the room temperature daily.

measured.en: The study measured the impact of technology on children's social development over a five-year period with careful methodology.
measured.zh: 该研究通过仔细的方法论，测量了技术对儿童社会发展在五年期间的影响。

measurement.en: The measurement took only five minutes.
measurement.zh: 这个测量只花了五分钟。

match.en: The colors do not match well.

material.zh: 我们需要更多建筑材料。

materialism.en: Some critics argue that excessive materialism in modern society has led to environmental degradation and a decline in community values.
materialism.zh: 一些批评者认为，现代社会中过度的物质主义已导致环境恶化和社会价值观的衰落。

materials.en: The building materials arrived this morning.
materials.zh: 建筑材料今天早上到了。

mathematician.en: The mathematician presented a new theory.
mathematician.zh: 这位数学家提出了一个新理论。

mathematics.en: Mathematics is her favorite university subject.
mathematics.zh: 数学是她大学最喜欢的科目。

maths.en: She found maths challenging initially but with consistent practice, she improved significantly and earned excellent examination results.
maths.zh: 她最初觉得数学很难，但通过持续练习，她取得了显著进步并在考试中取得了优异成绩。

matriculation.en: Successful matriculation at prestigious universities often requires meeting strict academic standards and passing rigorous entrance examinations.
matriculation.zh: 成功进入名牌大学通常需要达到严格的学术标准并通过严格的入学考试。

marshal.en: The event organizer worked hard to marshal all the volunteers before the international conference officially began.
marshal.zh: 活动组织者在国际会议正式开始前努力召集了所有的志愿者。

marvel.en: I marvel at how quickly she learned English.
marvel.zh: 我惊异于她学英语的速度之快。

marvelous.en: The science students found the laboratory's new equipment a marvelous addition to their research capabilities.
marvelous.zh: 理科学生发现实验室的新设备对他们进行研究的能力是一个极好的补充。

mask.en: During the pandemic, people were required to wear a mask in indoor public spaces to prevent the spread of disease.
mask.zh: 在大流行期间，人们被要求在室内公共场所佩戴口罩以防止疾病传播。

mass.en: Mass production reduces the cost of goods.
mass.zh: 大规模生产降低了商品成本。

massachusetts.en: Massachusetts is in the northeastern United States.
massachusetts.zh: 马萨诸塞州位于美国东北部。

massive.en: The company faces massive financial problems.
massive.zh: 这家公司面临巨大的财务问题。

master.en: It takes years to master a new skill.
master.zh: 掌握一门新技能需要数年时间。

masterpiece.en: Art historians widely consider Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa to be one of the greatest masterpieces in Western art.
masterpiece.zh: 艺术史学家普遍认为达芬奇的蒙娜丽莎是西方艺术中最伟大的杰作之一。

mat.en: Students placed their belongings neatly on the mat before entering the examination hall to take their IELTS test.
mat.zh: 学生们在进入雅思考试考场前把他们的物品整齐地放在垫子上。

matter.en: It does not matter at all.

mattress.en: Many consumers believe that investing in a quality mattress is essential for maintaining good sleep health.
mattress.zh: 许多消费者认为投资一张优质床垫对保持良好睡眠健康至关重要。

mature.en: She seems very mature for her age.
mature.zh: 她看起来比同龄人成熟。

max.en: This is the max I can give.
max.zh: 这是我能给予的最大量。

maximisation.en: The maximisation of available resources is crucial for ensuring the long-term success of any business enterprise.
maximisation.zh: 可用资源的最大化对确保任何企业的长期成功至关重要。

maximised.en: The company has maximised its revenue through strategic partnerships and effective marketing campaigns over the past year.
maximised.zh: 在过去一年中，该公司通过战略伙伴关系和有效的营销活动实现了收入最大化。

maximises.en: Efficient time management maximises the output of workers while simultaneously reducing stress and burnout in the office.
maximises.zh: 高效的时间管理可以最大化员工产出，同时减少办公室里的压力和倦怠。

maximising.en: Maximising stakeholder engagement is essential for building trust and ensuring the sustainability of community projects.
maximising.zh: 最大化利益相关者的参与对于建立信任和确保社区项目的可持续性至关重要。

maximization.en: The maximization of shareholder returns remains a primary objective for most publicly traded companies worldwide.
maximization.zh: 股东回报的最大化仍然是全球大多数上市公司的主要目标。

marble.en: The palace floor is made of marble.
marble.zh: 宫殿的地板是大理石做的。

march.en: Thousands of protesters chose to march through the city centre to demonstrate their strong opposition to the proposed development.
march.zh: 成千上万的抗议者选择穿过市中心游行，以表达他们对拟议开发项目的强烈反对。

margin.en: There is a small margin of error.

marginal.en: The marginal increase in temperature may seem insignificant, yet scientists warn it could trigger major environmental changes.
marginal.zh: 温度的微小上升可能看起来微不足道，但科学家警告说这可能引发重大环境变化。

marginalization.en: The marginalization of indigenous communities remains a serious concern, as it often results in limited access to education and healthcare.
marginalization.zh: 原住民社区的边缘化仍然是一个严重问题，因为它通常导致他们获得教育和医疗的机会受限。

marginalize.en: Without proper representation in parliament, rural populations risk being marginalized in decisions that directly affect their daily lives.
marginalize.zh: 如果没有在议会中的适当代表权，农村人口在直接影响其日常生活的决策中就有被边缘化的风险。

marginalized.en: The government has implemented new programs specifically designed to assist marginalized groups in accessing essential social services.
marginalized.zh: 政府已实施专门计划，以帮助边缘化群体获得必要的社会服务。

marginalizing.en: Some sociologists argue that the current education system is marginalizing students from lower-income families by failing to provide adequate support.
marginalizing.zh: 一些社会学家认为，现行教育体系因未能提供足够的支持而正在边缘化来自低收入家庭的学生。

margins.en: Publishers frequently operate on very tight margins, which can unfortunately lead to compromises in the quality of books produced.
margins.zh: 出版商经常在极薄的利润空间中运营，这不幸地可能导致所出版书籍质量的妥协。

marine.en: Marine life is fascinating to study.
marine.zh: 海洋生物学习起来很迷人。

metaphor.en: The author used a powerful metaphor comparing society to a complex machine in her thought-provoking essay.
metaphor.zh: 这位作者在她发人深省的文章中用一个有力的比喻，将社会比作一台复杂的机器。

meteor.en: When a meteor enters Earth's atmosphere, it creates a bright streak of light known as a shooting star.
meteor.zh: 当流星进入地球大气层时，它会产生一道被称为流星的明亮光带。

meteorology.en: Advances in meteorology have significantly improved our ability to forecast severe weather events accurately.
meteorology.zh: 气象学的进步显著提高了我们准确预测恶劣天气事件的能力。

meter.en: The electricity meter measures how much power households consume each month for billing purposes.
meter.zh: 电表测量家庭每月消耗的电量，用于计费。

methodological.en: The study received praise for its rigorous methodological approach to investigating social behavior patterns.
methodological.zh: 该研究因其严谨的方法论方法调查社会行为模式而受到称赞。

methodologies.en: Different methodologies work better for different research projects.
methodologies.zh: 不同的方法论对不同的研究项目效果更好。

mentor.en: Having a qualified mentor can significantly improve a student's academic performance and future career prospects.
mentor.zh: 拥有一位合格的导师可以显著提高学生的学业成绩和未来职业前景。

menu.en: Can I see the menu please?

merchandise.en: The university bookstore sells a wide range of merchandise including clothing, stationery, and textbooks.
merchandise.zh: 大学书店销售各种商品，包括服装、文具和教科书。

merchant.en: The local merchant has been running the family business for over three generations with great success.
merchant.zh: 这位当地商人成功经营家族企业已超过三代。

merchants.zh: 当地商人出售新鲜农产品。

mercury.en: Mercury is a liquid metal at room temperature.
mercury.zh: 汞是一种在室温下呈液态的金属。

mercy.en: The judge showed mercy by reducing the sentence for the young defendant who was a first-time offender.
mercy.zh: 法官对这位首次犯罪且年轻的被告表现出仁慈，减轻了刑罚。

mere.en: The mere possibility of failure should not prevent ambitious individuals from pursuing their entrepreneurial dreams.
mere.zh: 仅仅失败的可能性不应该阻止有抱负的人追求他们的创业梦想。

merely.en: Many students believe that memorizing vocabulary is merely a preliminary step towards achieving fluency in a new language.
merely.zh: 许多学生认为背诵词汇仅仅是实现新语言流利度的初步步骤。

merge.en: The two major technology companies decided to merge last year to strengthen their competitive position globally.
merge.zh: 这两家主要的科技公司去年决定合并，以加强其在全球的竞争地位。

melt.en: The snow will melt in warm weather.
melt.zh: 雪在温暖的天气里会融化。

melting.en: The snow is melting quickly in spring.

member.en: Every member of the research team was required to contribute innovative ideas during the weekly brainstorming session to solve complex problems.
member.zh: 研究团队的每个成员都被要求在每周的头脑风暴会议上贡献创新想法，以解决复杂问题。

members.en: All members attended the meeting yesterday.
members.zh: 所有成员昨天都参加了会议。

members of the public.en: Members of the public attended the meeting.
members of the public.zh: 普通民众参加了这次会议。

membership.en: The gym offers a discounted membership rate for students under the age of twenty-five, making fitness facilities more affordable for young adults.
membership.zh: 这家健身房为25岁以下的学生提供折扣会员费率，使年轻人更能负担得起健身设施。

memo.en: The manager circulated a memo explaining the new office policies regarding remote work, outlining expectations for communication and performance standards.
memo.zh: 经理发布了一份备忘录，解释关于远程工作的新办公室政策，概述了沟通和绩效标准的期望。

memorial.en: The city built a beautiful memorial to honour the soldiers who sacrificed their lives during the war, creating a peaceful space for reflection.
memorial.zh: 这座城市为纪念在战争中牺牲的士兵建造了一座美丽的纪念碑，创造了一个供人沉思的宁静空间。

memories.en: We shared our sweet memories together.
memories.zh: 我们一起分享美好的回忆。

memorise.en: Students must memorise vocabulary for exams.
memorise.zh: 学生必须记住考试词汇。

merit.en: The merit of this approach is that it allows students to learn at their own pace and develop critical thinking skills.
merit.zh: 这种方法的优势在于它允许学生按照自己的节奏学习并培养批判性思维能力。

merry.en: Despite the cold weather, the market square was filled with merry shoppers enjoying the winter festival decorations.
merry.zh: 尽管天气寒冷，广场上挤满了享受冬季节日装饰的欢乐购物者。

mess.en: The office is in a complete mess.

message.en: The key message of the advertisement is that our products can significantly improve your daily quality of life.
message.zh: 广告的核心信息是我们的产品可以显著改善您的日常生活质量。

messages.en: I received several messages from her.
messages.zh: 我收到了她的几条信息。

messenger.en: In ancient times, messengers traveled long distances on horseback to deliver urgent news between kingdoms.
messenger.zh: 在古代，信使骑马长途跋涉在王国之间传递紧急消息。

messy.en: Living in a messy room can lead to increased stress levels and difficulty focusing on important tasks.
messy.zh: 生活在杂乱的房间里可能导致压力增加，难以专注于重要任务。

metabolic.en: Exercise can improve your metabolic rate.
metabolic.zh: 运动可以提高你的新陈代谢率。

metabolism.en: Regular physical exercise can boost your metabolism and help the body burn calories more efficiently throughout the day.
metabolism.zh: 定期的体育锻炼可以促进新陈代谢，帮助身体在一天中更有效地燃烧卡路里。

metal.en: This gate is made of metal.

meditate.en: Many people choose to meditate in the morning to reduce stress and improve concentration before starting their day.
meditate.zh: 许多人在早晨选择冥想来减轻压力，并在一天开始前提高专注力。

meditation.en: Meditation helps me relax after work.
meditation.zh: 冥想帮助我下班后放松。

mediterranean.en: The Mediterranean climate is warm and dry.

medium.en: Please choose a medium size for the shirt.

meet.en: Students from different cultural backgrounds have the opportunity to meet and exchange ideas during international exchange programs.
meet.zh: 来自不同文化背景的学生有机会在国际交流项目中相遇并交流想法。

meet up.en: Let's meet up at the café tomorrow.
meet up.zh: 我们明天在咖啡馆见面吧。

meeting.en: The meeting scheduled for tomorrow afternoon has been postponed due to the speaker's unexpected travel arrangements.
meeting.zh: 明天下午安排的会议由于演讲者意外的旅行安排而被推迟。

meetings.en: We have several meetings this week.

melody.en: The soothing melody played by the street musician attracted a crowd of passersby who stopped to appreciate the music.
melody.zh: 街头音乐家演奏的舒缓旋律吸引了一群路人停下来欣赏音乐。

melon.en: This sweet melon costs five dollars.

mediate.en: The government appointed a neutral party to mediate between the labor union and the management to resolve the ongoing strike peacefully.
mediate.zh: 政府指定了一个中立方在工会和管理层之间进行调解，以和平方式解决持续进行的罢工事件。

mediator.en: The mediator helped settle the labor dispute.
mediator.zh: 调解员帮助解决了劳动争议。

medical.en: He received medical treatment after the accident.
medical.zh: 事故后他接受了医疗治疗。

medical care.en: Good medical care is important for everyone.
medical care.zh: 良好的医疗保健对每个人都很重要。

medically.en: Although the patient was medically certified as fit to resume work, she still felt emotionally unprepared for the transition.
medically.zh: 尽管病人已在医学上被确认可以恢复工作，但她仍然感到心理上还没有准备好。

medication.en: The doctor prescribed new medication for my illness.
medication.zh: 医生为我的病开了新药。

medicine.en: She studied medicine at a university in London.
medicine.zh: 她在伦敦的一所大学学习医学。

medieval.en: The medieval castle is open to visitors every day.
medieval.zh: 这座中世纪城堡每天对游客开放。

measurements.en: The scientists took precise measurements of the samples to ensure the accuracy of their research findings.
measurements.zh: 科学家们对样本进行了精确的测量，以确保研究结果的准确性。

measuring.en: Measuring the effectiveness of educational programs requires both quantitative data and qualitative feedback from students.
measuring.zh: 衡量教育项目的有效性需要定量数据和来自学生的定性反馈。

meat.en: I bought some fresh meat for dinner.
meat.zh: 我买了些新鲜肉做晚餐。

mechanic.en: When my car broke down, I took it to a qualified mechanic who quickly diagnosed the engine problem.
mechanic.zh: 当我的车抛锚时，我把它送到了一名合格的机械师那里，他很快诊断出了发动机问题。

mechanics.en: I need to understand the mechanics of this system.
mechanics.zh: 我需要了解这个系统的运作方式。

mechanism.en: The mechanism controls the machine's operation.
mechanism.zh: 这个机制控制机器的运行。

medal.en: The athlete was overjoyed when she won the gold medal at the international swimming competition.
medal.zh: 这位运动员在国际游泳比赛中获得金牌时欣喜若狂。

media.en: Social media influences young people today.
media.zh: 社交媒体影响着如今的年轻人。

memorize.en: Many language learners believe they must memorize extensive vocabulary lists to achieve fluency in a foreign language.
memorize.zh: 许多语言学习者认为，他们必须记住大量的词汇表才能达到外语流利程度。

memory.zh: 好的记忆力有助于学习。

menace.en: The factory is a menace to the environment.
menace.zh: 这家工厂是环境的威胁。

mend.en: Community mediation programs can effectively help mend broken relationships between neighbors involved in disputes.
mend.zh: 社区调解项目可以有效地帮助修复卷入纠纷的邻里之间破裂的关系。

mental.en: Students face a lot of mental pressure.
mental.zh: 学生面临很大的心理压力。

mental health.en: Governments should allocate more resources to improve mental health services in schools and workplaces.
mental health.zh: 政府应该拨出更多资源来改善学校和工作场所的心理健康服务。

mentality.en: A growth mentality encourages individuals to view challenges as opportunities for learning and personal development.
mentality.zh: 成长型心态鼓励个人将挑战视为学习和个人发展的机会。

mentally.en: People who engage in regular physical exercise tend to perform better mentally in cognitively demanding tasks.
mentally.zh: 经常进行体育锻炼的人在认知要求高的任务中往往表现得更好。

mention.en: It is worth mentioning that technological advancement has revolutionized the way we communicate and access information.
mention.zh: 值得提及的是，技术的进步彻底改变了我们交流和获取信息的方式。

mentioned.en: The teacher mentioned the test date.

microorganism.en: Scientists studying the microorganism discovered that it can survive in extreme temperatures and harsh conditions.
microorganism.zh: 研究这种微生物的科学家发现，它能在极端温度和恶劣条件下生存。

microorganisms.en: Microorganisms play an important role in nature.
microorganisms.zh: 微生物在自然界中扮演重要角色。

microphone.en: Please speak into the microphone clearly.
microphone.zh: 请对着麦克风清楚地说话。

microscope.en: Under the microscope, the cells showed unusual patterns that warranted further investigation by the research team.
microscope.zh: 在显微镜下，这些细胞显示出需要研究团队进一步调查的异常模式。

microwave.en: I heated my lunch in the microwave.
microwave.zh: 我在微波炉里加热了午餐。

mid.en: We will meet in mid afternoon.
mid.zh: 我们将在下午三点左右见面。

midday.en: The meeting will start at midday tomorrow.

middle.en: The middle seat is the best.

midnight.en: Students preparing for important examinations often study late into the midnight hours to cover all material.
midnight.zh: 为重要考试做准备的学生经常学习到深夜，以涵盖所有材料。

midst.en: In the midst of the economic crisis, the government introduced new policies to support small businesses.
midst.zh: 在经济危机中，政府推出了支持小企业的新政策。

mile.en: The old factory is located approximately a mile from the residential area, causing concerns about environmental pollution.
mile.zh: 那家旧工厂位于住宅区约一英里外，引发了人们对环境污染的担忧。

militant.en: The government has implemented strict security measures to prevent militant groups from destabilizing the region.
militant.zh: 政府已实施严格的安全措施，以防止武装组织破坏该地区的稳定。

military.en: He joined the military last year.

milk.en: Please buy some milk on your way home.
milk.zh: 请你在回家路上买些牛奶。

mill.en: The old mill produced fresh flour.
mill.zh: 那家老磨坊生产新鲜面粉。

millennium.en: This tradition lasts over a millennium.
millennium.zh: 这个传统延续了一千多年。

millimetre.en: Architects must calculate measurements precisely, often down to the nearest millimetre, to ensure structural safety.
millimetre.zh: 建筑师必须精确计算尺寸，通常精确到毫米，以确保结构安全。

million.en: The charity organization raised millions of dollars to provide clean water supplies to remote villages.
million.zh: 该慈善组织筹集了数百万美元，为偏远村庄提供清洁饮用水。

mimic.en: Children like to mimic their teachers.
mimic.zh: 孩子们喜欢模仿他们的老师。

mind.en: Would you mind opening the window?

minimise.en: We must minimise the risk of errors.
minimise.zh: 我们必须把出错的风险降到最低。

minimize.en: Companies can minimize their environmental impact by adopting renewable energy sources and sustainable practices.
minimize.zh: 公司可以通过采用可再生能源和可持续做法来最大限度地减少对环境的影响。

mining.en: The company is mining for gold overseas.
mining.zh: 这家公司在海外开采金矿。

minister.en: The minister announced new education rules.
minister.zh: 部长宣布了新的教育规定。

ministry.en: The Ministry of Health has launched a nationwide campaign to promote vaccination among vulnerable populations.
ministry.zh: 卫生部发起了一场全国性运动，以促进弱势群体的疫苗接种。

minor.en: It was only a minor injury.

minorities.en: The government must implement policies that protect the rights of minorities and promote equal opportunities.
minorities.zh: 政府必须实施保护少数群体权利并促进平等机会的政策。

minority.en: The minority group demanded equal rights.
minority.zh: 这个少数群体要求平等权利。

minors.en: Strict laws prohibit the sale of alcohol and tobacco products to minors in most developed countries.
minors.zh: 在大多数发达国家，严格的法律禁止向未成年人出售酒精和烟草产品。

metre.en: The table is one metre long.

metres.en: The pool is twenty metres long.

metric.en: The metric system has become the universal standard for measuring length, weight and volume across most countries.
metric.zh: 公制系统已成为大多数国家测量长度、重量和体积的通用标准。

metro.en: The new metro line has significantly reduced commuting time for thousands of residents living in the suburbs.
metro.zh: 新的地铁线路大大缩短了居住在郊区成千上万居民的通勤时间。

metropolitan.en: The metropolitan area has heavy traffic every day.
metropolitan.zh: 大都市地区每天交通都很拥堵。

mice.en: The mice were running in the kitchen.
mice.zh: 老鼠正在厨房里跑来跑去。

microbe.en: Scientists discovered a new microbe in the deep ocean that can potentially break down plastic waste efficiently.
microbe.zh: 科学家在深海中发现了一种新的微生物，可能能够有效地分解塑料废物。

microbes.en: Scientists studied the microbes in soil.
microbes.zh: 科学家研究土壤中的微生物。

microbiology.en: She decided to pursue a career in microbiology after completing her undergraduate degree in biological sciences.
microbiology.zh: 在完成生物科学的本科学位后，她决定从事微生物学领域的职业。

mindset.en: A positive mindset helps students succeed.
mindset.zh: 积极的心态有助于学生成功。

mine.en: Is this textbook mine or yours?
mine.zh: 这本教科书是我的还是你的？

mineral.en: Many developing nations rely heavily on the export of natural resources, such as coal or any valuable mineral, to sustain their economies.
mineral.zh: 许多发展中国家严重依赖自然资源的出口，如煤炭或任何有价值的矿物，来维持其经济。

mineralogy.en: The field of mineralogy requires extensive scientific training and laboratory experience to identify various geological specimens accurately.
mineralogy.zh: 矿物学领域需要广泛的科学培训和实验室经验才能准确识别各种地质标本。

minerals.en: Bananas contain important vitamins and minerals.
minerals.zh: 香蕉含有重要的维生素和矿物质。

miners.en: The miners worked underground for long hours.
miners.zh: 矿工们在地下长时间工作。

mingle.en: During the reception, international students had the opportunity to mingle with professors and fellow researchers from diverse academic backgrounds.
mingle.zh: 在招待会上，国际学生有机会与来自不同学术背景的教授和研究伙伴交流。

miniature.en: The science museum features a miniature model of the solar system that demonstrates the relative positions of planets in an engaging way.
miniature.zh: 科学博物馆展示了一个太阳系的微型模型，以引人入胜的方式展示行星的相对位置。

minibus.en: The children wait for the school minibus every morning.
minibus.zh: 孩子们每天早上等校车。

minimal.en: The new policy aims to cause minimal disruption to local businesses while implementing necessary environmental protection measures effectively.
minimal.zh: 新政策旨在在对当地企业造成最小干扰的同时，有效实施必要的环境保护措施。

minus.en: The temperature dropped to minus five degrees Celsius overnight, making it extremely challenging for outdoor construction workers to continue their duties.
minus.zh: 夜间气温骤降至零下五摄氏度，给户外建筑工人继续作业带来了极大的挑战。

minute.en: The professor emphasised every minute detail of the research methodology, ensuring students fully understood the experimental procedures.
minute.zh: 教授强调了研究方法中的每一个细节，确保学生充分理解实验程序。

minutes.en: The secretary wrote the minutes during the meeting.
minutes.zh: 秘书在会议期间写了会议记录。

miracle.en: Medical professionals often describe the patient's recovery as nothing short of a miracle given the severity of the initial diagnosis.
miracle.zh: 鉴于最初诊断的严重性，医疗专业人员经常将病人的康复描述为简直是奇迹。

mirror.en: She looked at herself in the mirror.

misconceptions.zh: 老师纠正了几个错误观念。

miserable.en: Living in overcrowded and miserable housing conditions has been linked to increased rates of mental health issues among urban residents.
miserable.zh: 生活在过度拥挤和恶劣的住房条件下与城市居民心理健康问题发病率的增加有关。

misery.en: Poverty creates a cycle of misery that affects not only physical health but also restricts access to quality education and employment opportunities.
misery.zh: 贫困造成了一种痛苦的循环，不仅影响身体健康，还限制了获得优质教育和就业机会的机会。

misfortune.en: Despite facing considerable misfortune early in his career, the author's perseverance eventually led to international literary recognition.
misfortune.zh: 尽管在职业生涯早期遭遇了相当大的不幸，这位作家的坚持最终赢得了国际文学界的认可。

misinterpret.en: Listeners should pay close attention to tone and context to avoid misinterpret the speaker's intended meaning during cross-cultural communication.
misinterpret.zh: 在跨文化交流中，听众应密切注意语气和语境，以避免误解说话者的真实意图。

misinterpreted.en: The survey results were misinterpreted, which caused the government to implement ineffective policies based on flawed conclusions.
misinterpreted.zh: 调查结果被错误解读，导致政府根据有缺陷的结论实施了无效的政策。

mislead.en: Advertisements that mislead consumers should be strictly regulated to protect public trust in commercial messaging.
mislead.zh: 误导消费者的广告应该受到严格监管，以保护公众对商业信息的信任。

miss.en: Students who miss classes regularly tend to perform significantly worse than those with consistent attendance records.
miss.zh: 经常缺课的学生往往比出勤率稳定的学生表现差得多。

missed.en: I missed the early morning bus.

missile.en: The missile crisis highlighted the urgent need for international dialogue to prevent potential nuclear conflicts.
missile.zh: 导弹危机凸显了国际对话对于防止潜在核冲突的迫切需要。

missing.en: The missing book was finally found.

mission.en: His mission is to help poor children.
mission.zh: 他的使命是帮助贫困儿童。

mist.en: The ancient temple emerged through the morning mist, creating a breathtaking view for early morning visitors.
mist.zh: 古庙从晨雾中浮现，为清晨的游客创造了令人惊叹的景色。

mistaken.en: I was completely mistaken about the date.

might.en: Climate change might lead to more frequent extreme weather events in coastal regions worldwide.
might.zh: 气候变化可能导致全球沿海地区更频繁地出现极端天气事件。

mighty.en: The mighty rivers of the continent have played a crucial role in the development of ancient civilizations.
mighty.zh: 这片大陆上强大的河流在古代文明的发展中发挥了关键作用。

migraine.en: Many students experience migraines during exam periods due to high stress and lack of sleep.
migraine.zh: 许多学生在考试期间由于高度压力和睡眠不足而出现偏头痛。

migrants.zh: 移民寻找更好的工作机会。

migrate.en: Some animals migrate seasonally to find suitable breeding grounds and abundant food sources.
migrate.zh: 一些动物会季节性地迁徙，以寻找合适的繁殖地和充足的食物来源。

migrated.en: Many families migrated to the city for work.
migrated.zh: 许多家庭为了工作迁移到城市。

migrating.en: Many birds are migrating south for winter.
migrating.zh: 许多鸟类正在向南迁徙过冬。

migratory.en: Migratory birds fly south in winter.

mild.en: The climate in this coastal region remains relatively mild throughout the year, attracting many tourists.
mild.zh: 这个沿海地区的气候全年相对温和，吸引了许多游客。

modified.en: The recipe was modified for vegetarians.
modified.zh: 食谱被改良以适合素食者。

modifies.en: Climate change modifies ecosystems in ways that scientists are still working to fully understand.
modifies.zh: 气候变化正在以科学家仍在努力完全理解的方式改变生态系统。

modify.en: Researchers continue to find ways to modify existing materials to make them more environmentally sustainable.
modify.zh: 研究人员继续寻找方法来改造现有材料，使其更加环保可持续。

modifying.en: The challenge of modifying traditional manufacturing processes requires innovative thinking and substantial investment.
modifying.zh: 改造传统制造工艺的挑战需要创新思维和大量投资。

moist.en: The soil feels moist after the rain.

moisture.en: The plant needs moisture to grow.
moisture.zh: 植物需要水分才能生长。

molecular.en: The molecular structure of water is simple.

molecule.en: Each molecule of water contains two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom bonded together.
molecule.zh: 每个水分子都包含两个氢原子和一个通过化学键结合的氧原子。

molecules.en: Water is made of small molecules.

moment.en: Wait here for a moment please.

momentum.en: The renewable energy movement has gained significant momentum in recent years due to growing environmental concerns.
momentum.zh: 由于日益增长的环境问题，可再生能源运动近年来获得了显著的动力。

monarch.en: The British monarch traditionally plays a symbolic role in constitutional governance without holding direct political power.
monarch.zh: 英国君主在宪法治理中传统上扮演象征性角色，不掌握直接的政治权力。

monastery.en: Ancient monasteries in the Himalayas serve as important centers for preserving cultural and religious traditions that date back centuries.
monastery.zh: 喜马拉雅山脉的古修道院是保存可追溯到几个世纪前的文化和宗教传统的重要中心。

monetary.en: The government implemented new monetary policies to control inflation and stabilize the national economy during the crisis.
monetary.zh: 政府在危机期间实施了新的货币政策来控制通货膨胀和稳定国民经济。

money.en: I need to save more money this year.

monitor.en: Parents should monitor their children's screen time carefully to ensure healthy development and adequate physical activity.
monitor.zh: 父母应该仔细监控孩子的屏幕使用时间，以确保他们健康成长和充足的体育活动。

monitored.en: The teacher monitored student progress closely.
monitored.zh: 老师密切监测学生的进步情况。

mobilize.en: The government launched a campaign to mobilize public support for environmental protection policies across the country.
mobilize.zh: 政府发起了一场运动，在全国范围内动员公众支持环境保护政策。

mock.en: Some students tend to mock their peers who speak with different accents, which creates an unwelcoming learning atmosphere.
mock.zh: 一些学生倾向于嘲笑说话带不同口音的同龄人，这造成了不友好的学习氛围。

mode.en: Many traditional teaching methods are being replaced by an online learning mode in the current digital era.
mode.zh: 在当前的数字时代，许多传统教学方法正被在线学习模式所取代。

model.en: He is a model student in our school.
model.zh: 他是我们学校的模范学生。

modem.en: I need a new modem for internet.
modem.zh: 我需要一个新调制解调器来上网。

moderate.en: The weather in spring is usually moderate.
moderate.zh: 春天的天气通常很温和。

moderately.en: The research indicates that moderately priced restaurants often provide better value for money than expensive establishments.
moderately.zh: 研究表明，价格适中的餐厅往往比昂贵的餐厅提供更好的性价比。

modern.zh: 现代技术让生活更便捷。

modification.en: The proposed modification to building regulations would require all new constructions to meet stricter environmental standards.
modification.zh: 拟议的建筑法规修改将要求所有新建筑必须满足更严格的环境标准。

mistakes.zh: 每个人有时都会犯错误。

mistress.en: The headmistress announced that the school would implement stricter policies regarding student attendance and academic performance.
mistress.zh: 校长宣布学校将实施更严格的关于学生出勤和学业表现的政策。

misunderstand.en: International students may misunderstand cultural references that native speakers take for granted in everyday conversations.
misunderstand.zh: 国际学生可能会误解母语者在日常对话中视为理所当然的文化典故。

mix.en: The ability to mix theoretical knowledge with practical experience is essential for success in today's competitive job market.
mix.zh: 将理论知识与实践经验相结合的能力在当今竞争激烈的就业市场中至关重要。

mixed.en: The audience gave mixed reviews after the performance.
mixed.zh: 演出结束后观众的评价褒贬不一。

mixture.en: Add the flour to the mixture slowly.
mixture.zh: 慢慢地把面粉加入混合物中。

moan.en: Rather than moan about the challenges they face, successful entrepreneurs focus on finding creative solutions to problems.
moan.zh: 成功的创业者不会抱怨他们面临的挑战，而是专注于寻找问题的创新解决方案。

mobile phone.en: My mobile phone battery died yesterday.
mobile phone.zh: 我的手机电池昨天用完了。

mobility.zh: 公共交通改善了城市出行。

more efficient.en: The new system is more efficient than before.

more or less.en: The two cities are more or less the same size, with populations around two million each.
more or less.zh: 这两个城市规模大致相同，人口都在两百万左右。

more quickly.en: She finished the test more quickly than expected.
more quickly.zh: 她比预期更快完成了考试。

more than half.en: More than half of the class passed.
more than half.zh: 超过一半的学生通过了。

moreover.en: The project requires significant funding; moreover, it demands a team of skilled professionals to ensure successful implementation.
moreover.zh: 该项目需要大量资金；此外，它还需要一支熟练的专业团队来确保成功实施。

morning.en: Many commuters prefer to travel in the morning to avoid heavy traffic during rush hours.
morning.zh: 许多通勤者喜欢在早晨出行，以避开高峰时段的拥堵交通。

mortal.en: All human beings are mortal, which is why it is crucial to leave a positive legacy for future generations.
mortal.zh: 所有人类都是终有一死的，这就是为什么为后代留下积极遗产至关重要。

monitoring.en: The system is monitoring traffic conditions in real time.
monitoring.zh: 系统正在实时监控交通状况。

monitors.en: Environmental scientists monitors wildlife populations in protected areas to track ecosystem health and biodiversity changes over time.
monitors.zh: 环境科学家监测保护区的野生动物种群，以追踪生态系统健康状况和生物多样性的变化。

monitory.en: The teacher gave a monitory look to the students who were not paying attention during the important lecture.
monitory.zh: 老师向那些在重要讲座中不专心听讲的学生投以警告的眼神。

monkey.en: In some Asian countries, trained monkeys are used to harvest coconuts from tall palm trees efficiently and quickly.
monkey.zh: 在一些亚洲国家，受过训练的猴子被用来高效快速地从高高的椰树上采摘椰子。

monkeys.zh: 猴子生活在热带森林里。

monopoly.en: The government broke up the telecom monopoly.

monotonous.en: Working on an assembly line can become monotonous, leading to boredom and decreased job satisfaction among factory workers.
monotonous.zh: 在流水线上工作可能会变得单调乏味，导致工厂工人感到厌倦和工作满意度下降。

monster.en: The building looked like a monster on the street.
monster.zh: 那栋建筑在街上看起来像个庞然大物。

month.en: The research project is expected to take approximately six months to complete successfully with all the required data.
month.zh: 这个研究项目预计需要大约六个月的时间来收集所有所需数据并成功完成。

monthly.en: I pay a monthly fee for this service.
monthly.zh: 我每月为这项服务付费。

mosquito.en: The mosquito bite left a red mark on my arm that took several days to heal completely.
mosquito.zh: 蚊子叮咬在我手臂上留下了一个红印，完全愈合需要好几天。

mosquitoes.en: In tropical regions, mosquitoes are considered one of the most dangerous insects due to the diseases they transmit.
mosquitoes.zh: 在热带地区，蚊子被认为是最危险的昆虫之一，因为它们会传播疾病。

moss.en: Ancient stone walls covered in soft green moss create a peaceful atmosphere in traditional gardens.
moss.zh: 被柔软的绿色苔藓覆盖的古石墙在传统花园中营造出一种宁静的氛围。

most.en: Most university students today prefer to use digital resources rather than traditional printed textbooks.
most.zh: 今天大多数大学生更喜欢使用数字资源而不是传统的印刷教科书。

most common.en: This is the most common problem we see.
most common.zh: 这是我们遇到的最常见的问题。

most popular.en: This is the most popular restaurant.

mostly.en: The weather is mostly sunny here.
mostly.zh: 这里的天气大部分时间是晴天。

motel.en: Budget travelers often choose motels along highways because they offer convenient parking and affordable accommodation.
motel.zh: 预算有限的旅客经常选择高速公路沿线的汽车旅馆，因为它们提供便利的停车和实惠的住宿。

mother.en: My mother cooks dinner every evening.
mother.zh: 我母亲每天晚上做晚餐。

motion.en: The machine is in constant motion.

monument.en: The monument commemorates the historic event.
monument.zh: 这座纪念碑是为了纪念那个历史事件。

monumental.en: Building the bridge was a monumental task.
monumental.zh: 建造那座桥是一项巨大的工程。

mood.en: The music puts me in a good mood.

moon.en: Landing on the moon was a significant achievement for humanity, demonstrating advanced technological capabilities and inspiring future generations to explore space.
moon.zh: 登月是人类的一项重大成就，展示了先进的技术水平，并激励后代探索太空。

moor.en: The hikers became disoriented while crossing the moor during their expedition, highlighting the need for proper navigation equipment in unfamiliar terrain.
moor.zh: 徒步旅行者在穿越荒野时迷失了方向，凸显了在陌生地形中携带适当导航设备的必要性。

mop.en: The janitor efficiently used a mop to clean the school corridors after the morning classes ended, maintaining a hygienic environment for students.
mop.zh: 看门人在上午课程结束后有效地使用拖把清洁学校走廊，为学生保持一个卫生的环境。

moral.en: Honesty is a basic moral principle.
moral.zh: 诚实是一项基本的道德原则。

morality.en: The decline in morality among some social groups has raised concerns among educators who believe that ethical education should be strengthened in schools.
morality.zh: 一些社会群体道德水准的下降引起了教育工作者的担忧，他们认为学校应该加强道德教育。

more.en: With technological advances, more students are now able to access quality education through online platforms, breaking geographical barriers worldwide.
more.zh: 随着科技进步，越来越多的学生现在可以通过在线平台获得优质教育，打破了世界各地的地理障碍。

more and more.en: More and more urban residents are choosing to live in smaller apartments, reflecting a shift in lifestyle preferences and economic considerations among young people.
more and more.zh: 越来越多的城市居民选择住在较小的公寓，这反映了年轻人生活方式偏好和经济考虑的变化。

move on to.en: After discussing the causes of climate change, we should move on to examining potential solutions that governments could implement.
move on to.zh: 在讨论气候变化的原因之后，我们应该继续研究各国政府可以实施的潜在解决方案。

movements.en: Regular movements help keep you healthy.
movements.zh: 经常运动有助于保持健康。

movie.en: We watched a movie last night.
movie.zh: 我们昨晚看了一部电影。

moving.en: They are moving to a new apartment.

much.en: Urban areas have changed much in recent decades due to rapid industrialisation and population growth.
much.zh: 由于快速的工业化和人口增长，城市地区近几十年来发生了很大变化。

much better.en: This new plan is much better.

much less.en: I don't have time for TV much less for travel.
much less.zh: 我连看电视的时间都没有，更不用说旅行了。

mud.en: The children played in the mud.

motivate.en: Teachers should use various teaching methods to motivate students and help them achieve their full academic potential.
motivate.zh: 教师应该使用各种教学方法来激励学生，帮助他们充分发挥学术潜能。

motive.en: What was his motive for doing this?
motive.zh: 他这样做的动机是什么？

motorcycle.en: My brother rides a motorcycle to work.

motorway.en: The construction of new motorways can significantly reduce travel time and boost economic growth in rural regions.
motorway.zh: 新高速公路的建设可以显著缩短旅行时间，并促进农村地区的经济增长。

mould.en: They mould the clay into shapes.
mould.zh: 他们把黏土塑造成形状。

mounds.en: Mounds of leaves covered the garden.

mount.en: Costs continued to mount over time.

mountain.en: The view from the top of the mountain was absolutely breathtaking, with snow-capped peaks stretching endlessly toward the horizon.
mountain.zh: 从山顶俯瞰的景色令人叹为观止，白雪皑皑的山峰延伸至地平线。

mountainous.en: The country has many mountainous regions.

mourn.en: When the beloved monarch passed away, the entire nation gathered together to mourn and honor her remarkable legacy.
mourn.zh: 当受人爱戴的君主去世时，全国人民聚集在一起哀悼并缅怀她卓越的遗产。

mouse.en: Scientists often use the laboratory mouse in medical research because its genetic makeup shares many similarities with humans.
mouse.zh: 科学家经常在医学研究中使用实验鼠，因为它的基因构成与人类有许多相似之处。

mouses.en: The computer lab has fifty new mouses.
mouses.zh: 计算机实验室有五十个新鼠标。

mouth.en: Dental professionals recommend brushing your teeth at least twice daily to maintain good oral health and hygiene.
mouth.zh: 牙科专业人士建议每天至少刷牙两次，以保持良好的口腔健康和卫生。

move into.en: Our family will move into the new house soon.
move into.zh: 我们家很快将搬进新房子。

move on.en: After completing university, graduates must learn to move on and embrace new challenges in the professional world.
move on.zh: 完成大学学业后，毕业生必须学会向前看，拥抱职场中的新挑战。

muddy.en: The muddy path through the forest became completely impassable after several days of continuous rainfall and flooding.
muddy.zh: 在持续数日的降雨和洪水之后，穿过森林的泥泞小径变得完全无法通行。

mug.en: Many students prefer to bring their own reusable mug to the campus café rather than using disposable paper cups.
mug.zh: 许多学生喜欢自带可重复使用的马克杯去校园咖啡馆，而不是使用一次性纸杯。

multi.en: The multi-purpose room serves many uses.
multi.zh: 这个多功能房间有很多用途。

multicultural.en: Our city is becoming more multicultural.
multicultural.zh: 我们的城市正在变得更加多元文化。

multifunctional.en: The newly built multifunctional sports arena can be transformed into a concert venue or conference hall within hours.
multifunctional.zh: 这座新建的多功能体育馆可以在数小时内改造成音乐会场地或会议厅。

multiple.zh: 这个问题有多个解决方案。

multiply.en: If the population continues to multiply at the current rate, cities will need to build significantly more housing and infrastructure.
multiply.zh: 如果人口继续以目前的速度增长，城市将需要建造更多的住房和基础设施。

multitude.en: A multitude of factors, including economic inequality and lack of educational opportunities, contribute to the rising crime rates.
multitude.zh: 包括经济不平等和教育机会不足在内的众多因素导致了犯罪率的上升。

municipal.en: The municipal government announced plans to invest heavily in public transportation to reduce traffic congestion and pollution.
municipal.zh: 市政府宣布计划在公共交通方面加大投资，以减少交通拥堵和污染。

musicians.en: The band has talented young musicians.
musicians.zh: 乐队有才华横溢的年轻音乐家。

mussels.en: We collected fresh mussels from the beach.
mussels.zh: 我们从海滩收集了新鲜贻贝。

must.en: Candidates must demonstrate strong communication skills and analytical abilities if they hope to succeed in job interviews.
must.zh: 候选人如果希望在求职面试中取得成功，就必须展示出强大的沟通能力和分析能力。

mutation.en: Researchers discovered that a specific mutation in the DNA sequence could cause cells to grow abnormally and form tumors.
mutation.zh: 研究人员发现，DNA序列中的某个特定突变可能导致细胞异常生长并形成肿瘤。

mute.en: In order to maintain examination integrity, all electronic devices must be set to mute or completely turned off.
mute.zh: 为了维护考试完整性，所有电子设备必须设置为静音或完全关闭。

mutter.en: Some people tend to mutter complaints under their breath when they disagree with decisions made by their superiors.
mutter.zh: 有些人在不同意上司做出的决定时，会低声喃喃抱怨。

mutton.en: Traditional mutton dishes remain popular in many cultures, particularly during festive celebrations and religious ceremonies.
mutton.zh: 传统羊肉菜肴在许多文化中仍然很受欢迎，特别是在节日庆典和宗教仪式期间。

mutual.en: The two companies established a mutual agreement to share research findings and collaborate on future development projects.
mutual.zh: 两家公司达成了相互协议，共享研究成果并合作开展未来的开发项目。

mutually.en: The two countries reached a mutually beneficial agreement.
mutually.zh: 两国达成了互利的协议。

nanotechnology.zh: 纳米技术正在改变医学。

nap.en: Taking a short nap in the afternoon can significantly improve cognitive function and productivity for students preparing for their exams.
nap.zh: 下午小睡一会儿可以显著提高准备考试的学生们的认知功能和生产力。

napkin.en: Many restaurants have replaced traditional cloth napkins with paper ones to reduce water consumption and environmental impact.
napkin.zh: 许多餐厅用纸餐巾取代传统的布餐巾，以减少用水量和环境影响。

napping.en: The baby is napping in the bedroom.
napping.zh: 婴儿正在卧室里睡午觉。

narrative.en: The narrative was clear and simple.

nasa.en: NASA sent a new telescope to space.
nasa.zh: 美国国家航空航天局向太空发射了新望远镜。

nasty.en: The nasty weather conditions forced the cancellation of outdoor events, disappointing thousands of spectators who had eagerly anticipated the festivals.
nasty.zh: 恶劣的天气条件迫使户外活动取消，令成千上万热切期待节日的观众感到失望。

nation.en: The nation has a rich culture.
nation.zh: 这个国家有着丰富的文化。

mysterious.zh: 他们发现了一个神秘的洞穴。

mystery.en: The mystery puzzled all the students.
mystery.zh: 这个谜让所有学生都很困惑。

myth.en: This is just a common myth.
myth.zh: 这只是一个常见的错误观念。

nail.en: Parents should keep their children's fingernails trimmed short and clean to prevent the spread of bacteria and infections.
nail.zh: 父母应该保持孩子的指甲短小干净，以防止细菌和感染的传播。

naive.zh: 她天真的观点让所有人都感到惊讶。

naked.en: Some people argue that the naked human body should not be considered inherently offensive in art or public spaces.
naked.zh: 有些人认为裸体在艺术或公共场所中不应被视为本质上具有冒犯性。

name.en: The government plans to name the newly built highway after the famous poet to honor his significant contributions to literature.
name.zh: 政府计划以这位著名诗人的名字命名这条新建的高速公路，以纪念他对文学的重大贡献。

namely.en: The scholarship is available for students studying specific subjects, namely science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.
namely.zh: 这项奖学金面向学习特定学科的学生，即科学、技术、工程和数学。

names.en: The guide names the main tourist attractions.
names.zh: 指南说出了主要的旅游景点。

murmur.en: The murmur of the crowd grew louder as the speaker approached the stage, building anticipation.
murmur.zh: 当演讲者走近舞台时，人群的低语声越来越大，增添了期待感。

muscle.en: Regular exercise helps build strong muscle.
muscle.zh: 经常锻炼有助于增强肌肉。

muscular.en: The muscular physique of the swimmer gave him a significant advantage in competitive events.
muscular.zh: 这位游泳运动员强壮的体格使他在比赛中具有显著优势。

museum.en: We visited the art museum yesterday.
museum.zh: 我们昨天参观了艺术博物馆。

mushroom.en: The biologist discovered a rare mushroom species in the rainforest that had unique medicinal properties.
mushroom.zh: 这位生物学家在雨林中发现了一种具有独特药用价值的稀有蘑菇。

mushrooms.en: These mushrooms grew after the rain.
mushrooms.zh: 这些蘑菇雨后长出来了。

music.en: I listen to music when I exercise.

musical.en: She shows a strong musical ability.
musical.zh: 她表现出很强的音乐能力。

musician.en: The celebrated musician conducted a masterclass where aspiring artists learned advanced performance techniques.
musician.zh: 这位著名音乐家开设了一门大师班，让有抱负的艺术家学习高级表演技巧。

national park.en: We visited a beautiful national park last summer.
national park.zh: 去年夏天我们参观了一个美丽的国家公园。

nationality.en: Applicants must declare their nationality when completing the visa application form online.
nationality.zh: 申请人在网上填写签证申请表时必须申报其国籍。

nations.en: Several nations attended the climate summit.
nations.zh: 几个国家参加了气候峰会。

native.en: He is a native speaker of English.

natural gas.en: The transition from coal to natural gas has helped reduce air pollution in many industrial cities.
natural gas.zh: 从煤炭向天然气的转型帮助许多工业城市减少了空气污染。

natural resources.en: Natural resources are limited on Earth.
natural resources.zh: 地球上的自然资源有限。

naturally.en: Children naturally learn language skills through meaningful interaction with parents and peers.
naturally.zh: 儿童通过与父母和同伴的有意义的互动自然地学习语言技能。

net.en: The net profit was fifty thousand.

nets.en: Fishermen use nets to catch fish.

networked.en: In modern offices, computers are networked to enable seamless sharing of resources and data.
networked.zh: 在现代办公室里，计算机是联网的，以实现资源和数据的无缝共享。

networking.en: Professional networking plays a crucial role in career development and finding job opportunities.
networking.zh: 职业人脉在职业发展和寻找工作机会方面起着至关重要的作用。

neural.en: The neural system controls body functions.
neural.zh: 神经系统控制身体功能。

neurological.en: The patient showed no neurological symptoms.
neurological.zh: 病人没有表现出神经症状。

neurology.en: Neurology is a fascinating medical specialty that studies the complex workings of the human brain.
neurology.zh: 神经学是一门研究人脑复杂运作方式的迷人医学专业。

neuron.en: Each individual neuron in the brain can form thousands of connections with other neurons.
neuron.zh: 大脑中的每个神经元可以与其他神经元形成数千个连接。

neurons.en: Neurons send signals throughout the brain.
neurons.zh: 神经元在大脑中传递信号。

negatives.en: Despite the negatives of urban living, many people still choose cities for better job opportunities and cultural experiences.
negatives.zh: 尽管城市生活有诸多负面影响，但许多人仍然为了更好的工作机会和文化体验而选择留在城市。

neglect.en: The garden fell into neglect after winter.
neglect.zh: 冬天过后花园无人打理。

negligible.en: The impact of small changes in daily habits may seem negligible, but over time they can lead to significant improvements.
negligible.zh: 日常习惯的小变化似乎影响微乎其微，但随着时间的推移，它们可以带来显著的改善。

neighbor.en: My neighbor offered to water my plants while I was away on vacation, which I really appreciated.
neighbor.zh: 我度假期间，我的邻居主动提出帮我浇花，我非常感激。

neighborhood.en: The neighborhood where I grew up had a strong sense of community with regular gatherings and local festivals.
neighborhood.zh: 我成长的社区有很强的社区感，经常举办聚会和当地节日活动。

neighborhoods.en: Different neighborhoods offer various shops and restaurants.
neighborhoods.zh: 不同的社区提供各种各样的商店和餐馆。

neighbour.en: My neighbour always keeps the garden tidy.
neighbour.zh: 我的邻居总是把花园打理得很整洁。

neighbourhood.en: My neighbourhood has a small park nearby.

neighbourhoods.en: Many neighbourhoods have experienced increased property values as a result of recent urban development projects.
neighbourhoods.zh: 许多社区由于最近的城市开发项目而经历了房产增值。

neuroscience.zh: 神经科学研究揭示大脑功能。

neuroscientist.en: The neuroscientist studies how the brain works.
neuroscientist.zh: 这位神经科学家研究大脑如何工作。

neutral.en: She tried to stay neutral in the debate.
neutral.zh: 她在辩论中努力保持中立。

neutron.en: Scientists discovered that neutron stars contain extraordinarily dense matter that cannot be found anywhere on Earth.
neutron.zh: 科学家发现中子星包含在地球上任何地方都找不到的极密集物质。

never.en: I have never been to Beijing.

nevertheless.en: The economy has slowed down significantly; nevertheless, experts predict a recovery in the coming fiscal year.
nevertheless.zh: 经济显著放缓；然而，专家预测下一财政年度将出现复苏。

new.en: The new methodology adopted by the university has significantly improved students' engagement with laboratory work.
new.zh: 大学采用的新方法显著提高了学生对实验工作的参与度。

new products.zh: 这家公司推出了新产品。

newcomer.en: The newcomer found the office procedures confusing.
newcomer.zh: 新人发现办公室流程令人困惑。

nearly.en: Nearly all students passed the exam.
nearly.zh: 几乎所有学生都通过了考试。

neat.en: The neat arrangement of files on the desk helped me quickly locate the important documents I needed for my presentation.
neat.zh: 桌上整齐排列的文件帮助我快速找到了演示文稿所需的重要文件。

nebula.en: Scientists have discovered a new nebula in a distant galaxy using powerful telescopes, which provides valuable insights into star formation.
nebula.zh: 科学家们使用 powerful 望远镜在遥远的星系中发现了一个新的星云，这为了解恒星形成提供了宝贵的见解。

necessarily.en: More money doesn't necessarily mean happiness.
necessarily.zh: 更多的钱不一定意味着幸福。

necessary.en: Hard work is necessary for success.
necessary.zh: 努力工作对成功是必要的。

necessity.en: Clean water is a basic necessity.
necessity.zh: 干净的水是基本的必需品。

neck.en: He wears a scarf around his neck.
neck.zh: 他脖子上围着一条围巾。

necklace.en: The antique necklace belonged to her grandmother and held significant sentimental value, representing an important family heirloom.
necklace.zh: 这条古董项链是她祖母的，承载着重要的情感价值，代表着一件珍贵的家庭传家宝。

need.en: There is an urgent need to address environmental pollution before it causes irreversible damage to ecosystems worldwide.
need.zh: 迫切需要解决环境污染问题，以免对全球生态系统造成不可逆转的损害。

need more.en: We need more time to finish this project.
need more.zh: 我们需要更多时间完成这个项目。

naughty.en: Children who are naughty in class often struggle to concentrate on their studies and may fall behind academically.
naughty.zh: 调皮的孩子们在课堂上往往难以集中精力学习，可能会落后于学业。

nausea.en: Many tourists experience nausea and dizziness when traveling by boat, which is commonly known as seasickness.
nausea.zh: 许多游客乘船旅行时会感到恶心和头晕，这就是通常所说的晕船。

naval.en: The naval fleet conducted a major exercise near the coast to demonstrate the country's maritime defense capabilities.
naval.zh: 海军舰队在海岸附近进行了一次重大演习，以展示该国的海上防御能力。

navigate.en: Maps help us navigate new cities.
navigate.zh: 地图帮助我们在新城市中导航。

navigators.en: Ancient navigators used stars for guidance.
navigators.zh: 古代航海者用星星导航。

navy.en: Joining the navy can provide young people with valuable training and discipline that benefits them throughout their lives.
navy.zh: 加入海军可以为年轻人提供宝贵的训练和纪律，这对他们的终身都有益处。

near.en: The park is near my house.

nearby.en: The nearby park has a small lake.
nearby.zh: 附近的公园有一个小湖。

nearest.en: The nearest hospital is about two kilometres away.
nearest.zh: 最近的医院大约两公里远。

neighbouring.en: The neighbouring house has a large garden.
neighbouring.zh: 邻近的房子有一个大花园。

neither.en: I like neither coffee nor tea.

neither...nor.en: Neither the government nor the private sector has been able to fully resolve the housing shortage in major cities.
neither...nor.zh: 无论是政府还是私营部门都未能完全解决主要城市的住房短缺问题。

neolithic.en: Archaeologists found neolithic tools in caves.
neolithic.zh: 考古学家在洞穴中发现了新石器时代的工具。

nephew.en: My nephew recently graduated from university with a degree in environmental science and hopes to work in conservation.
nephew.zh: 我侄子最近从大学毕业，获得了环境科学学位，希望能从事保护工作。

nerve.zh: 这个测试需要很强的胆量。

nervous.en: I felt nervous before the job interview.

ness.en: The ship passed the rocky ness safely.
ness.zh: 船安全地经过了岩石海角。

nest.en: The birds built a nest in the tree.

nests.en: Birds built their nests in the tall trees.
nests.zh: 鸟儿在高高的树上筑巢。

need to be able to.en: You need to be able to speak English.

need to have.en: You need to have a valid passport.

negate.en: Failure to cite sources properly in academic essays can negate months of diligent research and hard work on the project.
negate.zh: 在学术论文中未能正确引用来源可能会否定数月来的勤奋研究和努力工作。

negated.en: The referee's decision was ultimately negated by the official rules, restoring fairness and maintaining the integrity of the game.
negated.zh: 裁判的决定最终被官方规则所否决，恢复了公平性并维护了比赛的完整性。

negates.en: Constant classroom distractions and noise often negates the benefits of even the most carefully designed curriculum by teachers.
negates.zh: 持续的课堂干扰和噪音通常会抵消教师精心设计的课程所带来的好处。

negating.en: Negating the value of traditional knowledge systems can lead to cultural misunderstanding and the loss of ancestral wisdom.
negating.zh: 否定传统知识体系的价值可能导致文化误解和祖先智慧的丧失。

negation.en: The philosopher's argument represented a complete negation of established scientific principles that had been accepted for centuries.
negation.zh: 这位哲学家的论点代表了对已被接受数百年的既定科学原理的完全否定。

negative.en: That had a negative impact on me.
negative.zh: 那对我产生了负面影响。

negatively.en: Climate change continues to impact agricultural productivity negatively, threatening food security and livelihoods in vulnerable regions.
negatively.zh: 气候变化继续对农业生产力产生负面影响，威胁着脆弱地区的粮食安全和生计。

nonsense.en: The argument presented in the essay was complete nonsense and lacked any credible evidence.
nonsense.zh: 文章中提出的论点完全是胡说八道，缺乏任何可信的证据。

noodles.en: I made noodles for dinner last night.
noodles.zh: 我昨晚做了面条当晚餐。

noon.en: The conference is scheduled for noon, so participants should arrive at least thirty minutes early.
noon.zh: 会议安排在中午，所以参与者应该至少提前三十分钟到达。

nor.en: The government did not provide sufficient funding, nor did it offer any meaningful support for the proposed project.
nor.zh: 政府没有提供足够的资金，也没有为拟议的项目提供任何有意义的支持。

norm.en: Working late has become the norm here.
norm.zh: 在这里加班已成为常态。

normally.en: Nobody is normally in the office.
normally.zh: 正常情况下办公室里没有人。

north.en: The cold wind comes from the north.

northeast.en: The coastal areas in the northeast of the country experience heavy rainfall during the monsoon season.
northeast.zh: 该国东北部的沿海地区在季风季节会经历大量降雨。

northern.en: The northern part of the country is cold.
northern.zh: 这个国家的北部地区很寒冷。

newsletter.en: The company sends a weekly newsletter.
newsletter.zh: 公司每周发送时事通讯。

newspaper.en: Despite the rise of digital media, many people still prefer reading the newspaper in the morning with their coffee.
newspaper.zh: 尽管数字媒体兴起，许多人仍然喜欢早晨边喝咖啡边看报纸。

next.en: The next step in the research process involves analyzing the data collected from the survey participants.
next.zh: 研究过程的下一步包括分析从调查参与者收集的数据。

next to.en: The park is next to the shopping center.

nice.en: The weather was particularly nice during the outdoor festival, allowing visitors to enjoy the activities comfortably.
nice.zh: 户外节日期间的天气特别好，让游客能够舒适地享受活动。

niche.en: Small businesses often succeed by finding a niche market that larger corporations have overlooked, allowing them to build a loyal customer base.
niche.zh: 小企业通常通过寻找大公司忽视的利基市场而获得成功，从而使它们能够建立忠诚的客户群。

nickel.en: Some economists predict that nickel prices will increase due to growing demand for electric vehicle batteries.
nickel.zh: 一些经济学家预测，由于电动汽车电池的需求增长，镍价将会上涨。

niece.en: My niece recently graduated from university with a degree in environmental science and is now seeking employment.
niece.zh: 我的侄女最近大学毕业，获得了环境科学学位，现在正在找工作。

night.en: The stars shine bright at night.

nowhere.en: The lost key was nowhere to be seen.
nowhere.zh: 丢失的钥匙哪里都找不到。

nuclear.en: Many countries use nuclear energy for electricity.
nuclear.zh: 许多国家使用核能发电。
