nuclear energy.en: Proponents argue that nuclear energy is essential for reducing carbon emissions and effectively combating climate change.
nuclear energy.zh: 支持者认为核能对于减少碳排放和有效应对气候变化至关重要。

nucleus.en: The research team discovered that the nucleus of the cell plays a more crucial role in genetic inheritance than previously believed.
nucleus.zh: 研究团队发现，细胞核在遗传中的作用比以前认为的更加重要。

nuisance.en: The constant construction noise outside the library became a serious nuisance for students trying to concentrate on their studies.
nuisance.zh: 图书馆外持续的施工噪音对努力学习的学生造成了严重的干扰。

numb.en: After hours of waiting in the freezing cold, my fingers became completely numb and I could barely hold my pen.
numb.zh: 在寒冷的天气里等了几个小时后，我的手指完全麻木了，几乎握不住笔。

number.en: A growing number of universities are now offering online courses to accommodate students from diverse geographical backgrounds.
number.zh: 越来越多的大学现在提供在线课程，以容纳来自不同地区背景的学生。

numbers.en: We learn numbers in mathematics class.
numbers.zh: 我们在数学课上学数字。

numerical.en: The numerical data shows a slight increase.

numerous.en: The city has numerous parks and gardens.
numerous.zh: 这座城市有许多公园和花园。

northern ireland.en: Northern Ireland has beautiful green landscapes.
northern ireland.zh: 北爱尔兰有美丽的绿色风景。

northwest.en: The wind comes from the northwest today.
northwest.zh: 今天的风来自西北方向。

nose.en: Some researchers believe that animals can literally smell danger with their highly sensitive nose.
nose.zh: 一些研究人员认为，动物可以用其高度敏感的鼻子闻到危险。

not.en: Urbanization does not necessarily lead to the decline of traditional cultural practices in all cases.
not.zh: 城市化并不一定会导致所有情况下传统文化习俗的衰落。

not always.en: Technological solutions are not always the most effective approach to environmental problems.
not always.zh: 技术解决方案并不总是解决环境问题的最有效方法。

not enough.en: The food is not enough for everyone.

not only...but also.en: The new policy aims to not only reduce unemployment but also improve workplace conditions.
not only...but also.zh: 新政策不仅旨在降低失业率，还要改善工作条件。

not to mention.en: The city offers excellent public transportation, not to mention its world-class healthcare system.
not to mention.zh: 这座城市提供优质的公共交通，更不用说其世界级的医疗体系了。

not too bad.en: The movie was not too bad.

notable.en: This discovery was a notable achievement.
notable.zh: 这个发现是一项显著的成就。

nightmare.en: The traffic congestion was a nightmare, causing me to arrive at the examination centre two hours late and miss the listening test.
nightmare.zh: 交通拥堵是一场噩梦，导致我晚了两小时到达考试中心，错过了听力测试。

nine.en: According to the report, nine out of ten students preferred flexible learning schedules over traditional fixed timetables.
nine.zh: 根据报告，十分之九的学生更喜欢灵活的课程安排，而不是传统的固定时间表。

nineteen.en: The study involved nineteen participants from diverse socioeconomic backgrounds to ensure the research findings were comprehensive.
nineteen.zh: 这项研究涉及来自不同社会经济背景的十九名参与者，以确保研究结果的全面性。

ninety.en: Approximately ninety percent of the global population now has access to mobile communication technology in some form.
ninety.zh: 目前全球约百分之九十的人口以某种形式使用移动通讯技术。

nitrogen.en: Nitrogen makes up most of the air.
nitrogen.zh: 氮气构成了空气的大部分。

no.en: There is no definitive evidence that suggests online education produces inferior academic outcomes compared to traditional classroom learning.
no.zh: 没有确凿的证据表明在线教育产生的学术成果比传统课堂学习差。

no charge.en: The WiFi here is no charge.

no longer.en: That old shop is no longer open.

noble.en: She has a noble character and kind heart.
noble.zh: 她有高尚的品格和善良的心。

nobody.en: Nobody knew the answer to the question.
nobody.zh: 没有人知道这个问题的答案。

notify.en: The university will notify all applicants of their admission status by the end of this month.
notify.zh: 大学将在本月结束前通知所有申请者他们的录取状态。

notion.en: I have a vague notion about this topic.
notion.zh: 我对这个话题有一个模糊的概念。

notions.en: Traditional notions about gender roles have evolved significantly in contemporary society.
notions.zh: 传统性别角色的观念在当代社会已经发生了重大变化。

notorious.en: The area is notorious for traffic jams.
notorious.zh: 这个地区因交通堵塞而闻名。

notwithstanding.en: Notwithstanding the initial setbacks, the company achieved remarkable success in the competitive market.
notwithstanding.zh: 尽管最初遭遇挫折，这家公司在竞争激烈的市场中取得了显著成功。

nourish.en: Schools should nourish children's intellectual curiosity through engaging and interactive learning experiences.
nourish.zh: 学校应该通过富有吸引力和互动性的学习体验来培养儿童的知识好奇心。

novel.en: She had a novel idea for the project.
novel.zh: 她对这个项目有个新奇的想法。

novelty.en: The idea lost its novelty quickly.
novelty.zh: 这个想法很快失去了新奇感。

now.en: Many universities now offer online courses that allow students to study from anywhere.
now.zh: 许多大学现在提供在线课程，让学生可以随时随地学习。

nowadays.zh: 现在很多人都使用智能手机。

nocturnal.en: Owls are nocturnal and hunt at night.
nocturnal.zh: 猫头鹰是夜间活动的，夜出捕猎。

nod.en: During the job interview, the applicant gave a slight nod to indicate understanding of the interviewer's question.
nod.zh: 在求职面试期间，申请人对面试官的问题微微点头表示理解。

noise.en: The noise from traffic kept me awake.

noises.en: Strange noises came from the old house.
noises.zh: 从老房子里传来奇怪的声音。

noisy.en: The noisy street disturbed my sleep.
noisy.zh: 吵闹的街道打扰了我的睡眠。

nominal.en: The university charges only a nominal fee for using the library facilities, which benefits students from low-income families.
nominal.zh: 大学对使用图书馆设施只收取象征性费用，这使低收入家庭的学生受益。

nominate.en: The committee decided to nominate the innovative research project for this year's prestigious scientific award.
nominate.zh: 委员会决定提名这个创新研究项目角逐今年的著名科学奖。

non-traditional.en: Non-traditional students, such as single parents and older adults, often face unique challenges when returning to education.
non-traditional.zh: 非传统学生，如单亲家长和成年人，在重返教育领域时经常面临独特的挑战。

none.en: None of the students passed the exam.

nonetheless.en: The weather forecast predicted heavy rain for the outdoor event; nonetheless, the organizers decided to proceed as scheduled.
nonetheless.zh: 天气预报预测户外活动将有大雨；尽管如此，组织者决定按计划进行。

notably.en: The study found notably higher levels of air pollution in urban areas compared to rural regions, highlighting the urgent need for environmental policies.
notably.zh: 研究发现，城市地区的空气污染水平明显高于农村地区，凸显了制定环境政策的迫切需要。

note.en: It is important to note that economic development and environmental protection can coexist with proper planning and government intervention.
note.zh: 重要的是要注意，经济发展和环境保护可以通过适当的规划和政府干预实现共存。

notebook.en: I wrote the notes in my notebook.
notebook.zh: 我把笔记写在笔记本里。

notes.en: She takes notes during the lecture.

nothing.en: There is nothing in the box.

notice.en: Did you notice the small sign?
notice.zh: 你注意到那个小标志了吗？

notice board.en: The notice board shows tomorrow's exam schedule.
notice board.zh: 公告板显示明天的考试安排。

noticeable.en: There was a noticeable improvement in her work.
noticeable.zh: 她的工作有了明显的进步。

noticeboard.zh: 查看布告牌了解最新消息。

noticed.en: She noticed a mistake in her work.
noticed.zh: 她注意到工作中的错误。

obtaining.en: Obtaining a university degree has become increasingly competitive in recent years, requiring more qualifications than ever before.
obtaining.zh: 获得大学学位在近年来变得日益竞争激烈，需要比以往更多的资格证明。

obtains.en: The researcher obtains valuable data through careful observation and systematic analysis of various sources.
obtains.zh: 研究人员通过仔细观察和对各种来源的系统分析获得有价值的数据。

obvious.en: It was an obvious mistake to fix.

occasion.en: The wedding was a memorable occasion.
occasion.zh: 婚礼是一个难忘的场合。

occasional.en: Despite occasional setbacks during the experiment, the scientists eventually achieved their desired results.
occasional.zh: 尽管实验过程中偶尔遇到挫折，科学家们最终取得了预期的结果。

occasionally.en: I occasionally eat fast food for lunch.

occupied.en: The army occupied the city quickly.
occupied.zh: 军队迅速占领了这座城市。

occupy.en: Social media platforms occupy much of our daily time and attention, affecting productivity at work.
occupy.zh: 社交媒体平台占据了我们日常的大部分时间和注意力，影响了工作效率。

occur.en: Accidents can occur at any time.

occurred.en: The environmental disaster occurred when industrial waste was accidentally dumped into the river last summer.
occurred.zh: 那场环境灾难发生在去年夏天，当时工业废料被意外倾倒进了河里。

occurrence.en: The occurrence of extreme weather events has increased significantly over the past decade.
occurrence.zh: 过去十年来，极端天气事件的发生频率显著增加。

occurrences.en: Scientists documented multiple occurrences of unusual marine behaviour during their research expedition.
occurrences.zh: 科学家在研究考察期间记录了多次异常的海洋行为。

occurring.en: The problem occurring in urban areas involves excessive noise pollution from traffic and construction.
occurring.zh: 城市地区发生的问题涉及来自交通和建设的过度噪音污染。

occurs.en: Carbon dioxide occurs naturally in the atmosphere, but human activities have dramatically increased its concentration.
occurs.zh: 二氧化碳自然存在于大气中，但人类活动已大幅增加了其浓度。

ocean.en: The ocean covers most of Earth.
ocean.zh: 海洋覆盖了地球的大部分。

ocean floor.en: Many species live on the ocean floor.

oceans.en: Many fish live in the world's oceans.
oceans.zh: 许多鱼类生活在世界各大海洋中。

odd.en: It's odd that she left without saying goodbye.
odd.zh: 她没说再见就离开了，这很奇怪。

odds.en: The odds of finding a solution to climate change improve significantly when nations collaborate effectively.
odds.zh: 当各国有效合作时，找到气候变化解决方案的可能性会显著提高。

official.zh: 官方报告已经准备好了。

officials.en: Government officials met to discuss the plan.
officials.zh: 政府官员开会讨论这个计划。

offset.en: Companies are encouraged to plant trees to offset their carbon emissions and contribute to environmental sustainability.
offset.zh: 企业被鼓励种植树木以抵消碳排放，为环境可持续发展做出贡献。

offspring.en: Research shows that parents who encourage creativity in their offspring often produce more innovative and confident individuals.
offspring.zh: 研究表明，鼓励子女发挥创造力的父母往往能培养出更有创新精神和自信的人。

often.en: Young people often underestimate the long-term benefits of learning a second language for their future career prospects.
often.zh: 年轻人经常低估学习第二语言对他们未来职业发展的长期益处。

oil.en: We need more oil for the car.

oil spill.en: The environmental consequences of the oil spill lasted for decades, destroying countless marine habitats and wildlife populations.
oil spill.zh: 石油泄漏的环境后果持续了数十年，摧毁了无数海洋栖息地和野生动物种群。

okay.en: While traditional classroom learning is okay for some students, others thrive better in hands-on practical learning environments.
okay.zh: 虽然传统课堂学习对一些学生来说还可以，但其他学生在动手实践的学习环境中表现更好。

old.en: In many Asian cultures, old people are highly respected for their accumulated wisdom and life experience.
old.zh: 在许多亚洲文化中，老年人因其积累的智慧和生活经验而受到高度尊重。

older.en: My older brother works at a hospital.
older.zh: 我的哥哥在一家医院工作。

observed.zh: 她观察到孩子们在玩耍。

observer.en: As a passive observer at the meeting, I was able to understand how decisions are made within the organization.
observer.zh: 作为会议的被动观察者，我能够理解该组织如何做出决策。

observers.en: The observers noted changes in the weather patterns.
observers.zh: 观察人士注意到天气模式的变化。

obsess.en: Many teenagers tend to obsess over their appearance, which can negatively impact their mental health and self-esteem.
obsess.zh: 许多青少年容易对自己的外表过于执着，这可能对他们的心理健康和自尊产生负面影响。

obsession.en: His obsession with games is unhealthy.
obsession.zh: 他对游戏的痴迷不健康。

obstacle.en: The main obstacle to implementing the new policy is the lack of public awareness and understanding.
obstacle.zh: 实施新政策的主要障碍是公众缺乏意识和理解。

obstacles.en: There are many obstacles on the road to success.
obstacles.zh: 成功路上有许多困难障碍。

obtain.en: She worked hard to obtain good grades.
obtain.zh: 她努力学习以获得好成绩。

obtainable.en: The information about scholarship opportunities is easily obtainable through the university's official website and guidance office.
obtainable.zh: 关于奖学金机会的信息可以通过大学官方网站和指导办公室轻松获取。

obtained.en: The researchers obtained valuable data from the survey, which helped them draw important conclusions about consumer behavior.
obtained.zh: 研究人员从调查中获得了宝贵的数据，这帮助他们得出了关于消费者行为的重要结论。

odor.en: The unpleasant odor emanating from the nearby waste treatment plant has become a serious concern for residents living in the surrounding area.
odor.zh: 附近垃圾处理厂散发出的难闻气味已成为周边居民严重关注的问题。

odours.en: Strange odours came from the lab.
odours.zh: 实验室传来奇怪的气味。

off.en: Parents should ensure their children spend less time off school by encouraging them to participate in extracurricular activities and homework.
off.zh: 家长应该确保孩子花更多时间在学习上，而不是荒废学业，应鼓励他们参加课外活动和完成作业。

offend.en: Tourists visiting foreign countries should be respectful of local customs, as certain behaviors may unintentionally offend cultural sensitivities.
offend.zh: 访问外国的游客应尊重当地习俗，因为某些行为可能会无意中冒犯文化敏感性。

offenders.en: First-time offenders often receive lighter sentences.
offenders.zh: 首次犯罪的罪犯通常会获得较轻的判决。

offense.en: In some cultures, making jokes about religious beliefs is considered a serious offense and can lead to social conflict or legal consequences.
offense.zh: 在某些文化中，拿宗教信仰开玩笑被视为严重冒犯，可能导致社会冲突或法律后果。

offensive.en: The use of offensive language in public discourse is generally condemned and may damage one professional reputation in workplace settings.
offensive.zh: 在公共言论中使用攻击性语言通常会受到谴责，并可能在工作场所损害个人职业声誉。

offer.en: The university will offer additional scholarships to students from low-income families to ensure equal access to higher education opportunities.
offer.zh: 大学将为低收入家庭的学生提供额外奖学金，以确保他们有平等接受高等教育的机会。

office.en: She works at a downtown office.
office.zh: 她在市中心的办公室工作。

nuts.en: I eat nuts for a healthy snack.
nuts.zh: 我吃坚果作为健康零食。

nylon.en: Nylon is widely used in the textile industry because it is both durable and relatively inexpensive.
nylon.zh: 尼龙在纺织工业中被广泛使用，因为它既耐用又相对便宜。

oak.en: The table is made of solid oak.
oak.zh: 这张桌子是用实心橡木制成的。

oath.en: Before giving testimony in court, witnesses are required to take an oath promising to tell the truth.
oath.zh: 在法庭作证之前，证人必须宣誓承诺说实话。

obese.en: Obese patients need special medical care.
obese.zh: 肥胖患者需要特殊的医疗护理。

obesity.en: Obesity is a growing health problem.
obesity.zh: 肥胖是一个日益严重的健康问题。

obey.en: All students must obey the rules.
obey.zh: 所有学生必须遵守规则。

object.en: The museum's collection includes various objects dating back to ancient civilizations from different continents.
object.zh: 博物馆的收藏包括来自不同大洲的古代文明的各种物品。

object to.en: Local residents strongly object to the government's plan to build a new airport near their community.
object to.zh: 当地居民强烈反对政府在他们社区附近建设新机场的计划。

objection.en: The defence lawyer raised an objection to the prosecutor's question during the courtroom trial.
objection.zh: 辩护律师在法庭审判中对检察官的问题提出了反对。

objective.en: My objective is to pass the exam.

objectively.en: The historian objectively analyzed primary sources without allowing her cultural background to affect her interpretation of the events.
objectively.zh: 这位历史学家客观地分析了原始资料，不让她的文化背景影响她对这些事件的解读。

obligation.en: Citizens have a moral obligation to protect the environment by reducing waste and recycling materials whenever possible.
obligation.zh: 公民有道德义务通过尽可能减少废物和回收材料来保护环境。

oblige.en: The university felt obliged to provide additional support services for international students adapting to a new academic environment.
oblige.zh: 这所大学觉得有义务为适应新学术环境的国际学生提供额外的支持服务。

obscure.zh: 这位作家相对不太有名。

observation.en: Her careful observation helped solve the case.
observation.zh: 她仔细的观察帮助解决了这个案件。

observatory.en: The newly built observatory allows astronomers to observe distant galaxies and collect data about the universe's expansion.
observatory.zh: 新建的天文台让天文学家能够观测遥远的星系并收集有关宇宙膨胀的数据。

observe.en: Students visiting the nature reserve will observe how wildlife adapts to urban expansion and habitat fragmentation.
observe.zh: 参观自然保护区的学生将观察野生动物如何适应城市扩张和栖息地碎片化。

nurse.en: Many countries are experiencing a significant shortage of qualified nurse professionals in their public healthcare systems.
nurse.zh: 许多国家的公共医疗系统正面临合格护士专业人员严重短缺的问题。

nursery.en: The children go to nursery every morning.
nursery.zh: 孩子们每天早上去托儿所。

nursing.en: She is nursing her sick mother at home.
nursing.zh: 她在家里照顾生病的母亲。

nurture.en: Parents nurture children with patience and love.
nurture.zh: 父母用耐心和爱养育孩子。

nut.en: Research has shown that consuming nuts in moderation can help reduce the risk of heart disease in adults.
nut.zh: 研究表明，适量食用坚果有助于降低成年人患心脏病的风险。

nutrient.en: Scientists are studying how specific nutrient deficiencies can contribute to the development of chronic diseases.
nutrient.zh: 科学家正在研究特定营养素缺乏如何导致慢性疾病的发生。

nutrients.zh: 植物需要营养物质才能生长。

nutrition.en: Good nutrition is important for growth.
nutrition.zh: 良好的营养对成长很重要。

nutritional.en: Children need nutritional food for growth.
nutritional.zh: 儿童需要营养食物以促进成长。

nutritious.en: Health experts recommend that students eat nutritious breakfasts before exams to maintain optimal concentration levels.
nutritious.zh: 健康专家建议学生在考试前食用有营养的早餐，以保持最佳专注力水平。

organ.en: The human body contains numerous vital organs, each performing specific functions essential for survival and overall health.
organ.zh: 人体包含许多重要器官，每个器官执行维持生命和整体健康所必需的特殊功能。

organic.en: Organic food costs more than regular food.
organic.zh: 有机食品比普通食品更贵。

organic farming.en: Organic farming avoids using chemical pesticides.
organic farming.zh: 有机农业避免使用化学农药。

organisation.en: The charity organisation helps poor children.
organisation.zh: 这个慈善组织帮助贫困儿童。

organisational.en: Strong organisational skills are essential for managing complex projects with multiple deadlines and diverse team members.
organisational.zh: 强大的组织能力对于管理具有多个截止日期和不同团队成员的复杂项目至关重要。

organisations.en: Many organisations support environmental protection efforts.
organisations.zh: 许多组织支持环境保护工作。

organiser.en: The event organiser sent the schedule yesterday.
organiser.zh: 事件组织者昨天发送了日程表。

organism.en: Every living organism requires nutrients, water, and energy to maintain its biological processes and ensure survival.
organism.zh: 每个生物体都需要营养、水和能量来维持其生物过程并确保生存。

opened.en: The opened book lay on the desk.

opening.en: The opening ceremony of the Olympics was broadcast to millions of viewers worldwide.
opening.zh: 奥运会的开幕式向全球数百万观众进行了直播。

opening hours.en: Many museums extend their opening hours during the summer holiday to accommodate tourists.
opening hours.zh: 许多博物馆在暑假期间会延长开放时间，以满足游客的需求。

opera.en: The opera starts at eight tonight.

operate.en: You must learn to operate this machine.
operate.zh: 你必须学会操作这台机器。

operated.en: The company has operated successfully in Southeast Asia for over twenty years.
operated.zh: 这家公司在东南亚成功运营了二十多年。

operation.en: The machine is in operation now.

operational.en: All computers in the laboratory must be fully operational before the examination begins.
operational.zh: 实验室里所有电脑必须在考试开始前完全正常运行。

operator.en: The operator answered the phone quickly.

operators.en: The operators work in shifts at the factory.
operators.zh: 工厂的操作员轮班工作。

optimism.en: His optimism helped him overcome many difficulties.
optimism.zh: 他的乐观帮助他克服了许多困难。

optimistic.en: She remained optimistic despite the difficult situation.
optimistic.zh: 尽管情况困难，她仍然保持乐观。

optimists.en: Most optimists believe the future will improve.
optimists.zh: 大多数乐观主义者相信未来会改善。

optimum.en: This room provides optimum working conditions.
optimum.zh: 这个房间提供最佳工作条件。

option.en: The government should seriously consider the option of introducing congestion charges to reduce urban traffic.
option.zh: 政府应该认真考虑引入拥堵费以减少城市交通的选项。

optional.en: The exam has an optional essay section.
optional.zh: 这次考试有一个可选的作文部分。

options.en: Students have several options for their future career.
options.zh: 学生有几个未来职业选择。

or.en: Governments must invest in renewable energy sources or face increasingly severe consequences from climate change.
or.zh: 各国政府必须投资可再生能源，否则将面临气候变化带来的日益严重的后果。

oral.en: The oral exam will be held next week.

orange.en: She wore an orange dress to the party.
orange.zh: 她穿了一条橙色连衣裙去参加聚会。

orbit.en: Satellites are placed in orbit around the Earth to facilitate modern global communication systems effectively.
orbit.zh: 卫星被放置在与地球的轨道上以有效地促进现代全球通信系统。

orcas.zh: 虎鲸是美丽的海洋生物。

orchards.en: Many tourists visit the apple orchards during autumn to experience picking fresh fruit directly from trees.
orchards.zh: 许多游客在秋季参观苹果园，体验直接从树上采摘新鲜水果的乐趣。

orchestra.en: She joined the school orchestra last year.
orchestra.zh: 她去年加入了学校管弦乐队。

order.en: The professor asked students to submit their assignments in order of arrival to ensure a fair marking process.
order.zh: 教授要求学生按到达顺序提交作业，以确保公平的评分过程。

ordinary.en: The meal was ordinary but filling.
ordinary.zh: 这顿饭很普通但很饱人。

ore.en: Australia is extremely rich in mineral ore resources, which significantly contribute to the country's export economy.
ore.zh: 澳大利亚拥有极其丰富的矿砂资源，这对国家的出口经济做出了重大贡献。

on the coast.en: Many tourists enjoy visiting towns on the coast.
on the coast.zh: 许多游客喜欢参观沿海城镇。

on the contrary.en: Some people believe that technology reduces face-to-face communication; on the contrary, it has enabled us to connect more easily.
on the contrary.zh: 一些人认为科技减少了面对面交流；恰恰相反，它使我们更容易联系。

on the other hand.en: Working from home offers great flexibility; on the other hand, it may lead to social isolation and reduced work-life balance.
on the other hand.zh: 在家工作提供了很大的灵活性；另一方面，它可能导致社交孤立和工作生活平衡的减少。

on time.en: He always arrives at meetings on time.

on top of.en: On top of his demanding job, he volunteers at a local charity every weekend to help underprivileged children.
on top of.zh: 除了繁忙的工作之外，他每个周末都在当地慈善机构做志愿者，帮助贫困儿童。

once.en: Once the new airport is completed, it will significantly improve transportation links between major cities in the region.
once.zh: 一旦新机场建成，它将大大改善该地区主要城市之间的交通联系。

once a month.en: I visit my parents once a month.
once a month.zh: 我每月去看望父母一次。

one.en: One of the main challenges facing developing countries is providing adequate healthcare services to rural populations.
one.zh: 发展中国家面临的主要挑战之一是为农村人口提供足够的医疗服务。

one third.en: One third of the students passed the exam.
one third.zh: 三分之一的学生通过了考试。

opinion.en: While everyone is entitled to their own opinion, evidence-based arguments are more persuasive in academic writing.
opinion.zh: 虽然每个人都有权拥有自己的观点，但在学术写作中，基于证据的论点更具说服力。

opponent.en: During the debate, each opponent presented compelling arguments to support their respective positions on environmental protection policies.
opponent.zh: 在辩论中，每位对手都提出了令人信服的论点来支持各自在环境保护政策上的立场。

oppose.en: Many citizens choose to oppose the proposed legislation due to concerns about its potential impact on civil liberties.
oppose.zh: 许多市民因担心拟议立法对公民自由的潜在影响而选择反对该法案。

opposed.en: She is opposed to the new rules.

opposite.en: The park is on the opposite side of the street.

opposition.zh: 来自工人们的强烈反对。

oppress.en: Throughout history, authoritarian regimes have sought to oppress dissenting voices through censorship and intimidation of independent media outlets.
oppress.zh: 纵观历史，专制政权一直试图通过审查和恐吓独立媒体来压制异议声音。

opt.en: Many students opt to study abroad after graduation.
opt.zh: 许多学生毕业后选择出国留学。

optical.en: Recent advances in optical technology have revolutionised medical diagnostics, enabling doctors to detect diseases at much earlier stages than previously possible.
optical.zh: 光学技术的最新进展彻底改变了医学诊断，使医生能够比以前更早地发现疾病。

one way.en: There is one way to solve this.
one way.zh: 解决这个问题有一个办法。

ongoing.en: The ongoing research shows promising results.
ongoing.zh: 正在进行的研究显示出有前景的结果。

onion.en: When cooking, the onion releases a chemical compound that causes tears in the eyes of the chef.
onion.zh: 烹饪时，洋葱会释放一种导致厨师眼睛流泪的化学化合物。

online.en: Many students prefer studying online now.
online.zh: 现在很多学生喜欢在线学习。

only.en: It is only through continuous practice that language learners can achieve true fluency in a foreign language.
only.zh: 只有通过持续练习，语言学习者才能在外语中达到真正的流利程度。

only a few.en: Only a few students passed the difficult exam.
only a few.zh: 只有少数学生通过了这次难考试。

onset.en: Early treatment can slow disease onset.
onset.zh: 早期治疗可以减缓疾病发作。

onto.en: The cat jumped onto the table.

onwards.en: The team moved onwards to the next stage.
onwards.zh: 团队继续向下一阶段推进。

olive.en: The olive tree has been cultivated in Mediterranean countries for thousands of years, providing both food and oil that are essential to local cuisine.
olive.zh: 橄榄树在地中海国家已经种植了数千年，提供的食物和油是当地美食的重要组成部分。

olympic.en: The olympic Games are held every four years.
olympic.zh: 奥运会每四年举办一次。

on.en: On arriving at the university, new students are required to attend an orientation session where they can learn about campus facilities and resources.
on.zh: 新生到达大学后必须参加迎新会，在那里他们可以了解校园设施和资源。

on account of.en: Many outdoor events were cancelled on account of the heavy rainfall that had been forecast for several days in advance by meteorologists.
on account of.zh: 由于气象学家提前预报的大雨，许多户外活动被取消了。

on average.en: People sleep seven hours on average each night.
on average.zh: 人们每晚平均睡七个小时。

on behalf of.en: The ambassador spoke on behalf of the government during the international conference, emphasizing the need for global cooperation on climate issues.
on behalf of.zh: 大使在国际会议上代表政府发言，强调了在气候问题上进行全球合作的必要性。

on campus.zh: 大多数学生住在校园里。

on sale.en: The new textbook edition will be on sale at the campus bookstore next week, with a special discount available for students who purchase early.
on sale.zh: 新版教科书下周将在校园书店发售，提前购买的学生可享受特别折扣。

our.en: The government should invest more in our education system to prepare young people for future challenges.
our.zh: 政府应该加大对我国教育系统的投资，为年轻人应对未来挑战做准备。

ours.en: The library provides more resources than theirs, so ours is the better choice for academic research purposes.
ours.zh: 这家图书馆提供的资源比他们的多，所以我们的图书馆是学术研究的更好选择。

out.en: Many young people grow out of their bad habits as they mature and gain more life experience over time.
out.zh: 许多年轻人随着成熟和时间的推移会改掉他们的坏习惯。

out of.en: He walked out of the classroom.

outbreak.en: The outbreak of the disease prompted the government to implement strict quarantine measures nationwide.
outbreak.zh: 这种疾病的爆发促使政府在全国范围内实施严格的隔离措施。

outcome.en: The outcome of the game surprised everyone.
outcome.zh: 比赛的结果让所有人惊讶。

outdoor.en: Outdoor activities are popular in summer.
outdoor.zh: 户外活动在夏天很受欢迎。

organisms.zh: 科学家研究微小的生物。

organization.en: Effective organization of workplace resources can dramatically improve employee productivity and job satisfaction.
organization.zh: 有效地组织工作场所资源可以显著提高员工的生产力和工作满意度。

organize.en: University students must learn to organize their time efficiently to balance academic work and social activities.
organize.zh: 大学生必须学会有效地安排时间，以平衡学业和社交活动。

organizing.en: She is organizing a party for friends.
organizing.zh: 她正在为朋友们组织一个聚会。

organs.en: Human organs are very complex systems.
organs.zh: 人体器官是非常复杂的系统。

orient.en: Most universities provide orientation programs to orient new students with campus facilities and academic expectations.
orient.zh: 大多数大学提供迎新项目，帮助新生熟悉校园设施和学术期望。

oriental.en: The museum's exhibition on oriental art attracted visitors interested in traditional ceramics and calligraphy from East Asia.
oriental.zh: 博物馆关于东方艺术的展览吸引了对东亚传统陶瓷和书法感兴趣的游客。

orientate.en: Companies should orientate new employees with their corporate culture during the initial weeks of employment.
orientate.zh: 公司应在员工入职最初几周内让他们熟悉公司文化。

orientated.en: Many modern universities are increasingly orientated towards practical research that addresses real-world problems.
orientated.zh: 许多现代大学越来越倾向于从事解决现实世界问题的实用研究。

orientates.en: The building's design orientates all offices towards the north to maximize natural light and reduce energy consumption.
orientates.zh: 建筑设计将所有办公室朝向北方，以最大化自然采光并减少能源消耗。

overdue.en: The library imposed a additional fine because the book was already two weeks overdue and no renewal was processed.
overdue.zh: 图书馆收取了额外罚款，因为这本书已经逾期两周未还，且没有办理续借手续。

overestimate.en: Many candidates tend to overestimate their English proficiency before taking the actual IELTS examination.
overestimate.zh: 许多考生在参加实际雅思考试前往往会高估自己的英语水平。

overflow.en: During major holidays, the city's waste management system often overflows due to the dramatic increase in population.
overflow.zh: 在重大节假日期间，由于人口的急剧增加，城市的垃圾处理系统经常超负荷运转。

overhead.en: Birds flew overhead in the clear sky.
overhead.zh: 鸟儿在晴朗的天空中飞过。

overhear.en: I happened to overhear two strangers discussing the controversial topic of climate change policy on the train.
overhear.zh: 我在火车上偶然听到两个陌生人在讨论气候变化政策这个有争议的话题。

overlap.en: There is considerable overlap between the academic requirements for biology and environmental science programmes.
overlap.zh: 生物学和环境科学课程的学术要求之间有相当大的重叠。

overlook.en: City officials sometimes overlook the significance of preserving historical architecture while pursuing modern development.
overlook.zh: 城市官员在追求现代化发展时，有时会忽视保护历史建筑的重要性。

overlooking.en: The hotel is overlooking the beautiful beach.
overlooking.zh: 这家酒店俯瞰着美丽的海滩。

overnight.en: She stayed overnight at the hotel.

outfit.en: Many young professionals prefer to purchase their work outfit from high street stores rather than expensive boutiques.
outfit.zh: 许多年轻专业人士更喜欢从商业街商店而不是昂贵的精品店购买工作服装。

outlet.en: The shopping outlet located on the outskirts of the city offers significant discounts on branded goods.
outlet.zh: 位于城市郊区的购物中心提供名牌商品的重大折扣。

outline.en: Please outline your main points first.
outline.zh: 请先概述你的主要观点。

outlook.en: Her outlook on life is very positive.

outrage.en: The public outrage over the environmental pollution incident led to immediate government action and investigations.
outrage.zh: 公众对环境污染事件的强烈愤慨促使政府立即采取行动并展开调查。

outset.en: From the outset, it was clear that the research project would require substantial funding and specialized equipment.
outset.zh: 从一开始就很清楚，这个研究项目需要大量资金和专业设备。

outside.en: The cat is sitting outside the house.
outside.zh: 那只猫正坐在房子外面。

outsiders.en: New students often feel like outsiders.

orientating.en: The university runs an orientating programme to help new students adapt to campus life during their first semester.
orientating.zh: 大学开设迎新项目，帮助新生在第一学期适应校园生活。

orientation.zh: 新生入学介绍下周一开始。

oriented.zh: 这个项目以学生为导向。

orienting.en: The instructor spent the first week orienting international students to the academic expectations and grading system.
orienting.zh: 讲师在第一周花时间帮助国际学生熟悉学术期望和评分系统。

orients.en: A good map orients travellers and helps them navigate unfamiliar cities with confidence and ease.
orients.zh: 好的地图能为旅行者定位，帮助他们自信便捷地 navigate 陌生的城市。

origin.en: What is the origin of this word?

originally.en: The historic building was originally constructed in the nineteenth century as a railway station for the city.
originally.zh: 这座历史建筑 originally 建于19世纪，作为城市的火车站。

originate.en: Many traditional customs and festivals originate from ancient agricultural practices that have been passed down through generations.
originate.zh: 许多传统习俗和节日源自古代农业 practices，世代相传。

outskirts.en: The park lies on the outskirts.

outward.en: She showed outward signs of happiness.

oval.en: The architect designed an elegant conference room with a large oval table that could accommodate up to twelve participants.
oval.zh: 建筑师设计了一间优雅的会议室，配有一张可容纳十二人的大型椭圆形桌子。

oven.en: The cake baked in the hot oven.
oven.zh: 蛋糕在热烤箱里烤熟了。

over.en: Over the past decade, there has been a significant shift in consumer preferences towards environmentally sustainable products.
over.zh: 在过去的十年中，消费者对环保可持续产品的偏好发生了重大转变。

over the phone.en: She told me over the phone.

overall.zh: 整体表现有了显著提升。

overcome.en: She worked hard to overcome her fear.
overcome.zh: 她努力克服自己的恐惧。

overdraft.en: Bank customers should carefully monitor their account balances to avoid unexpected overdraft fees that can accumulate rapidly.
overdraft.zh: 银行客户应仔细监控账户余额，以避免可能快速累积的意外透支费用。

oversight.en: The construction project was delayed significantly due to poor oversight of the contractors and inadequate communication between stakeholders.
oversight.zh: 由于对承包商监督不力以及利益相关者之间沟通不足，这个建设项目被大幅延迟。

overtake.en: Electric vehicles are projected to overtake traditional gasoline-powered cars in sales volume within the next fifteen years globally.
overtake.zh: 预计在未来十五年内，电动汽车将在全球销量上超过传统的汽油动力汽车。

overthrow.en: The revolution aimed to overthrow the existing authoritarian regime and establish a democratic government that protected citizens' fundamental rights.
overthrow.zh: 这场革命旨在推翻现有的威权政权，建立一个保护公民基本权利的民主政府。

overtime.en: He worked overtime to finish the project.

overturn.en: The Supreme Court decided to overturn the previous ruling, citing new evidence that had not been properly considered during the trial.
overturn.zh: 最高法院决定推翻之前的裁决，引用了审判期间未被适当考虑的新证据。

overweight.en: The package is overweight by two kilos.
overweight.zh: 这个包裹超重了两公斤。

overwhelm.en: The sudden influx of applications overwhelmed the admissions office, causing significant delays in processing and reviewing candidates.
overwhelm.zh: 突如其来的大量申请使招生办公室不堪重负，导致处理和审核候选人的过程严重延迟。

overwhelming.en: The task seemed overwhelming at first.
overwhelming.zh: 起初这项任务似乎难以应付。

origins.en: We study the origins of language.

ornament.en: The museum displayed various ornaments from different dynasties, showcasing the artistic skills of past craftsmen.
ornament.zh: 博物馆展出了不同朝代的各类装饰品，展示了古代工匠的艺术技巧。

orphan.en: The charity organization provides education, shelter, and essential support for orphans who have unfortunately lost their parents.
orphan.zh: 该慈善机构为不幸失去双亲的孤儿提供教育、住所和必要的支持。

other.en: Some experts believe that besides economic factors, other social elements also significantly influence migration patterns.
other.zh: 一些专家认为，除了经济因素外，其他社会因素也会显著影响迁移模式。

other countries.en: Other countries may have different rules.
other countries.zh: 其他国家可能有不同的规定。

other parts of.en: Other parts of the plan need work.
other parts of.zh: 计划的其他部分需要改进。

other than.en: I have no hobbies other than reading.
other than.zh: 除了阅读，我没有其他爱好。

otherwise.en: The strict library rules state that books must be returned on time, otherwise fines will apply.
otherwise.zh: 严格的图书馆规定书籍必须按时归还，否则将处以罚款。

ought.en: You ought to finish your homework first.

ounce.en: There is not an ounce of doubt that renewable energy plays a crucial role in achieving sustainable development goals.
ounce.zh: 毫无疑问，可再生能源在实现可持续发展目标方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

pad.en: The student tore a page from her notepad and began jotting down the key points from the lecture.
pad.zh: 学生从笔记本上撕下一页，开始记下讲座的要点。

page.en: Open a new page in your notebook.
page.zh: 在笔记本上翻开新的一页。

pain.en: The pain lasted for several weeks.

painful.en: Losing a beloved pet can be an extremely painful experience that affects the entire family for months.
painful.zh: 失去心爱的宠物可能是一次极其痛苦的经历，会影响整个家庭数月之久。

painkiller.en: The doctor prescribed a painkiller to relieve the patient's discomfort following the minor surgical procedure.
painkiller.zh: 医生开了止痛药来缓解病人小手术后的不适。

paint.en: The art students were instructed to paint a portrait using only natural pigments and traditional techniques.
paint.zh: 艺术系学生被要求只使用天然颜料和传统技术来画一幅肖像画。

painter.en: The famous painter spent decades perfecting his unique style, which eventually influenced generations of artists.
painter.zh: 这位著名画家花了几十年完善他独特的风格，最终影响了数代艺术家。

paintings.en: The museum has many famous paintings.
paintings.zh: 这家博物馆有许多著名绘画。

pair.en: The couple purchased a pair of antique chairs at the auction, which matched their existing furniture perfectly.
pair.zh: 这对夫妇在拍卖会上买了一对古董椅子，与他们现有的家具完美搭配。

oyster.en: The coastal restaurant served fresh oysters with lemon, which became a popular delicacy among visitors.
oyster.zh: 这家海滨餐厅供应配有柠檬的新鲜牡蛎，成为游客喜爱的美食。

ozone.en: Ozone layer protects us from harmful rays.
ozone.zh: 臭氧层保护我们免受有害射线伤害。

ozone layer.en: The thinning ozone layer allows more harmful ultraviolet radiation to reach Earth's surface.
ozone layer.zh: 稀薄的臭氧层使得更多有害的紫外线到达地球表面。

pace.en: The pace of technological change has accelerated dramatically in recent decades.
pace.zh: 近几十年来，技术变革的速度显著加快。

pacific.en: The two countries signed a pacific agreement.
pacific.zh: 两国签署了一项和平协议。

pack.en: Please pack your bags before noon.
pack.zh: 请在中午之前收拾好行李。

package.en: The travel package includes accommodation, meals, and guided tours of historic sites.
package.zh: 这个旅行套餐包含住宿、餐饮和历史遗迹的导游服务。

packaging.en: The packaging was made of recycled material.
packaging.zh: 包装是用可回收材料制成的。

packet.en: The patient was instructed to take one packet of medicine three times daily after meals.
packet.zh: 病人被嘱咐每天饭后服用一包药物，每天三次。

pact.en: The international climate pact requires participating nations to reduce carbon emissions significantly.
pact.zh: 这项国际气候协定要求各参与国大幅减少碳排放。

paralysis.en: The sudden paralysis of the transportation system caused widespread disruption throughout the entire metropolitan area.
paralysis.zh: 交通系统的突然瘫痪导致整个都市地区出现 widespread 的混乱。

paralyze.en: The fear of failure can paralyze students, preventing them from taking risks necessary for academic growth.
paralyze.zh: 对失败的恐惧会使学生陷入瘫痪，阻止他们为学业成长承担必要的风险。

parameter.en: Researchers must carefully establish all parameters before beginning any scientific experiment to ensure valid results.
parameter.zh: 研究人员在开始任何科学实验之前必须仔细设定所有参数，以确保获得有效的结果。

parasite.en: Scientists discovered that the parasite in the local water supply was responsible for the outbreak of illness.
parasite.zh: 科学家发现当地供水中的寄生虫是导致疾病爆发的原因。

parcel.en: The exponential growth in online shopping has led to a significant increase in parcel deliveries globally.
parcel.zh: 在线购物的指数级增长导致全球包裹递送数量大幅增加。

pardon.en: I would like to pardon my classmate for being late, as the traffic conditions were truly exceptional today.
pardon.zh: 我想原谅我同学的迟到，因为今天的交通状况确实很特殊。

parent.en: Every parent wants the best for children.
parent.zh: 每位父母都希望给孩子最好的。

parents.en: Many parents worry about their children.
parents.zh: 许多父母担心他们的孩子。

park.en: The children play in the park every day.
park.zh: 孩子们每天在公园里玩耍。

parking.en: The parking lot was full this morning.

parking lot.en: The parking lot near the shopping centre is always completely full on weekends, causing significant inconvenience to customers.
parking lot.zh: 购物中心附近的停车场在周末总是完全停满，给顾客带来极大不便。

parliament.en: Members of parliament gather regularly in the capital to discuss and vote on proposed legislation that affects the entire nation.
parliament.zh: 议会议员们定期聚集在首都，讨论和投票表决影响整个国家的立法提案。

parrot.en: The parrot can mimic human speech.

part.en: Education plays a crucial part in shaping an individual's future and enabling people to contribute meaningfully to society.
part.zh: 教育在塑造个人未来、使人们能够为社会做出有意义的贡献方面起着至关重要的作用。

part-time.en: Many university students choose to work part-time jobs to gain practical experience while managing their academic commitments.
part-time.zh: 许多大学生选择做兼职工作，以在处理学业的同时获得实践经验。

part-time job.en: She works as a teacher with a part-time job.
part-time job.zh: 她当老师并做一份兼职工作。

partial.en: The project is only in partial completion now.
partial.zh: 这个项目目前只完成了部分。

participant.en: Each participant in the medical trial was carefully screened and monitored throughout the twelve-week study period.
participant.zh: 医学试验中的每位参与者都经过了仔细筛选，并在为期十二周的研究期间受到监测。

participants.en: All participants must attend the meeting.
participants.zh: 所有参与者必须参加会议。

participate.en: Students must participate in the discussion.

pant.en: After sprinting to catch the bus, she had to pant heavily for several minutes before she could speak coherently again.
pant.zh: 为了赶公交车快跑之后，她不得不喘好几分钟才能正常说话。

pants.en: In many formal workplaces, employees are required to wear pants rather than shorts, regardless of the season.
pants.zh: 在许多正式工作场所，员工需要穿长裤而不是短裤，无论什么季节。

paper.en: Please pass me a sheet of paper.

parachute.en: The experienced skydiver deployed his parachute at the correct altitude and drifted gracefully down toward the landing zone.
parachute.zh: 经验丰富的跳伞者在正确的高度打开了降落伞，优雅地飘向着陆区。

parade.en: The soldiers marched proudly in the parade.
parade.zh: 士兵们在游行中骄傲地行进。

paradigm.en: The invention of the internet represented a paradigm shift in how people communicate, work, and access information globally.
paradigm.zh: 互联网的发明代表了人们在全球范围内交流、工作和获取信息方式的范式转变。

paradise.en: For nature enthusiasts, Costa Rica is often considered a paradise due to its extraordinary biodiversity and pristine rainforests.
paradise.zh: 对于自然爱好者来说，哥斯达黎加因其非凡的生物多样性和原始热带雨林而常被视为天堂。

paradox.en: This situation presents an interesting paradox.
paradox.zh: 这种情况提出了一个有趣的悖论。

parallel.en: Researchers discovered a striking parallel between childhood education methods and long-term career success in later life.
parallel.zh: 研究人员发现儿童教育方法与成年后的长期职业成功之间存在显著的相似之处。

palace.en: The king lives in a grand palace.
palace.zh: 国王住在一座宏伟的宫殿里。

pale.en: The pale morning light filtered through the dense forest canopy, creating an eerie yet beautiful atmosphere for hikers.
pale.zh: 苍白的晨光透过茂密的森林树冠，为徒步旅行者创造了诡异而美丽的氛围。

palm.en: Palm trees grow well in tropical areas.
palm.zh: 棕榈树在热带地区生长良好。

pan.en: Critics chose to pan the new film adaptation, citing its weak storyline and disappointing casting choices as major flaws.
pan.zh: 评论家们严厉批评了这部新电影改编版，称其故事情节薄弱、演员选择令人失望是主要缺陷。

panda.en: The endangered giant panda has become a powerful symbol of wildlife conservation efforts worldwide and in China specifically.
panda.zh: 濒危的大熊猫已成为全球特别是中国野生动物保护工作的有力象征。

panel.en: The expert panel gave useful advice.
panel.zh: 专家小组提出了有用的建议。

panic.en: When the fire alarm sounded unexpectedly, there was a brief moment of panic before staff guided everyone to safety.
panic.zh: 当火警意外响起时，人们短暂恐慌，随后工作人员引导所有人安全撤离。

panorama.en: From the hilltop viewpoint, visitors can enjoy a breathtaking panorama of the entire valley stretching to distant mountains.
panorama.zh: 从山顶观景点，游客可以欣赏延伸到远处山脉的整个山谷的壮丽全景。

pans.en: She washed all the dirty pans.

participate in.en: Students can participate in after-school clubs.
participate in.zh: 学生可以参加课后俱乐部。

participated.en: She participated in the international conference last summer where she presented her groundbreaking research findings.
participated.zh: 她去年夏天参加了国际会议，在会上展示了她的开创性研究成果。

participates.en: Our school participates in community service programs every semester to help local residents in various ways.
participates.zh: 我们学校每学期都参与社区服务项目，以各种方式帮助当地居民。

participating.en: By participating in group discussions, students can improve their critical thinking and communication skills significantly.
participating.zh: 通过参与小组讨论，学生可以显著提高批判性思维和沟通能力。

participation.zh: 积极参与能提高学习效果。

particle.en: Scientists are studying the particle structure to understand how this new material behaves under pressure.
particle.zh: 科学家正在研究粒子结构，以了解这种新材料在压力下的表现。

particles.en: Dust particles float in the sunlight.
particles.zh: 灰尘颗粒在阳光下飘浮。

particularly.en: The elderly are particularly vulnerable to extreme weather conditions during the cold winter months.
particularly.zh: 老年人在寒冷的冬季特别容易受到极端天气条件的影响。

partly.en: The decline in fish populations is partly due to overfishing and increasing water pollution in rivers.
partly.zh: 鱼类数量减少部分是由于过度捕捞和河流污染加剧造成的。

owe.en: Many graduates owe substantial student loans that significantly impact their initial financial independence and career choices.
owe.zh: 许多毕业生欠下大量学生贷款，这严重影响了他们最初的财务独立性和职业选择。

owing.en: Success is owing to hard work.

owing to.en: Owing to increasing environmental concerns, governments worldwide are implementing stricter regulations on industrial pollution.
owing to.zh: 由于日益增加的环境问题，世界各国政府正在对工业污染实施更严格的法规。

owl.en: The owl can see clearly in the dark.
owl.zh: 猫头鹰在黑暗中能看得很清楚。

own.en: It is essential for university students to develop their own effective time management strategies for academic success.
own.zh: 对于大学生来说，培养自己有效的时间管理策略以取得学业成功至关重要。

owner.en: The owner checked the building every day.

ownership.en: Ownership of the house was transferred to her.
ownership.zh: 这所房子的所有权转移给了她。

ox.en: In many rural communities, the ox continues to serve as an essential draft animal for plowing agricultural fields.
ox.zh: 在许多农村社区，牛继续作为重要的役用动物用于耕作农田。

oxide.en: Aluminum oxide coatings are commonly applied to metal surfaces to prevent corrosion and extend material lifespan.
oxide.zh: 氧化铝涂层通常应用于金属表面以防止腐蚀并延长材料使用寿命。

partners.en: The two business partners decided to expand their company into international markets after five years of successful collaboration.
partners.zh: 这两位商业伙伴在成功合作五年后，决定将公司扩展到国际市场。

partnership.en: They formed a strong business partnership.
partnership.zh: 他们建立了稳固的商业伙伴关系。

partnerships.en: Many international partnerships have been established to address global environmental challenges such as climate change.
partnerships.zh: 许多国际合作关系已经建立，以应对气候变化等全球环境挑战。

parts.en: This machine has many different parts.
parts.zh: 这台机器有很多不同的零件。

party.en: We attended a fun party last night.
party.zh: 我们昨晚参加了一个有趣的聚会。

passage.en: Read the passage and answer the question.

passed.en: The bill was passed by the parliament yesterday.
passed.zh: 该法案昨天在议会获得通过。

passenger.en: The airline passenger complained about the poor quality of food served during the twelve-hour transcontinental flight.
passenger.zh: 这位航空乘客抱怨在十二小时的跨大陆飞行中所提供食物的质量很差。

passengers.en: The bus passengers waited for the delayed train.
passengers.zh: 公交车乘客等待延误的火车。

patients.en: The doctor helps many patients daily.
patients.zh: 医生每天帮助很多病人。

patriot.en: Many people consider themselves true patriots who actively participate in community events and national celebrations.
patriot.zh: 许多人认为自己是有爱国情怀的人，积极参与社区活动和国家庆典。

patriotic.en: Schools often teach patriotic values by encouraging students to learn about their nation's history and traditions.
patriotic.zh: 学校经常通过鼓励学生学习国家历史和传统来培养爱国主义价值观。

patrol.en: Security guards patrol the museum premises throughout the night to prevent theft and ensure visitor safety.
patrol.zh: 安保人员整夜在博物馆巡逻，以防止盗窃并确保游客安全。

patron.en: The restaurant's regular patron left a generous tip as a token of appreciation for the excellent service.
patron.zh: 这家餐厅的常客留下了丰厚的小费，以表达对优质服务的感谢。

patterns.en: The dress has beautiful floral patterns.
patterns.zh: 这条裙子有漂亮的花朵图案。

pause.en: He decided to pause before answering.
pause.zh: 他决定在回答前停顿一下。

pave.en: The city council decided to pave the old dirt road to improve transportation for local residents.
pave.zh: 市议会决定将这条旧的土路铺上路面，以改善当地居民的交通。

paved.en: Workers paved the road last week.
paved.zh: 工人们上周铺了这条路。

penguins.en: Penguins live in cold Antarctic areas.
penguins.zh: 企鹅生活在寒冷的南极地区。

peninsula.en: The Korean Peninsula has a rich historical heritage that dates back thousands of years and attracts millions of visitors annually.
peninsula.zh: 朝鲜半岛拥有可追溯到数千年前的丰富历史遗产，每年吸引数百万游客。

penny.en: Many people fail to realize that saving even a penny every day can accumulate into a substantial amount over the course of a year.
penny.zh: 许多人没有意识到，即使每天只存一分钱，一年下来也能积累成一笔可观的金额。

pension.en: The government has introduced new pension reforms to ensure that retired citizens can maintain a reasonable standard of living.
pension.zh: 政府推出了新的养老金改革，以确保退休公民能够维持合理的生活水平。

people.en: Many people enjoy traveling during holidays.
people.zh: 许多人在假期喜欢旅行。

pepper.en: Research has shown that consuming black pepper regularly may provide anti-inflammatory benefits and improve digestive health.
pepper.zh: 研究表明，定期食用黑胡椒可能会提供抗炎益处并改善消化系统健康。

perceive.en: Young children may perceive time differently from adults, often experiencing it as moving much more slowly during boring activities.
perceive.zh: 幼儿可能与成年人对时间有不同感知，经常觉得无聊的活动时间过得很慢。

perceived.en: The idea was perceived as good.

perceives.en: Each individual perceives the concept of success differently, depending on their cultural values and personal aspirations.
perceives.zh: 每个人对成功的概念都有不同的理解，这取决于他们的文化价值观和个人追求。

peel.en: Before cooking the vegetables, you should carefully peel them to remove the tough outer skin.
peel.zh: 在烹饪蔬菜之前，你应该仔细削皮以去除坚硬的外皮。

peephole.en: She looked through the peephole before opening.
peephole.zh: 开门前她透过窥视孔看了看。

peer.en: Researchers must peer carefully at the data to identify any significant patterns or anomalies.
peer.zh: 研究人员必须仔细审视数据，以识别任何重要的模式或异常。

peers.en: She compares herself to her peers.
peers.zh: 她把自己和同龄人比较。

pen.en: Some traditionalists believe that using a pen produces more thoughtful and careful writing than typing.
pen.zh: 一些传统主义者认为，与打字相比，使用钢笔能产生更加深思熟虑和仔细的写作。

penalty.en: The penalty for speeding in residential areas has been increased to improve road safety.
penalty.zh: 住宅区超速行驶的罚款已经增加，以提高道路安全。

pencil.en: Unlike pens, pencils allow artists to easily correct mistakes and create subtle shading effects.
pencil.zh: 与钢笔不同，铅笔让艺术家能够轻松纠正错误并创造细腻的阴影效果。

pencils.en: The teacher gave us new pencils.

pendulum.en: The swinging motion of the pendulum in grandfather clocks demonstrates principles of physics.
pendulum.zh: 落地钟里钟摆的摆动展示了物理学原理。

penetrate.en: Light can penetrate through thin curtains.

pat.en: She gave the crying child a gentle pat on the back to comfort him after he fell during the race.
pat.zh: 她轻轻拍了拍哭泣孩子的背，以在他比赛中摔倒后安慰他。

patch.en: The farmer discovered a small patch of discoloured crops in the corner of the field that needed immediate attention.
patch.zh: 农民在田地角落发现了一小块变色作物，需要立即处理。

patches.en: There are grass patches in the park.

path.en: The path goes through the forest.

pathetic.en: The pathetic state of the abandoned school building highlighted the urgent need for government investment in education.
pathetic.zh: 废弃校舍凄凉的状态凸显了政府对教育投资的迫切需要。

pathogen.en: Scientists are studying how this new pathogen spreads so they can develop effective vaccines to protect the population.
pathogen.zh: 科学家正在研究这种新病原体的传播方式，以便开发有效的疫苗来保护民众。

pathways.en: There are several pathways to success.

patience.en: Learning to play a musical instrument requires considerable patience, as progress comes only through consistent daily practice.
patience.zh: 学习演奏乐器需要极大的耐心，因为只有通过每天坚持练习才能取得进步。

patient.en: The teacher is patient with slow learners.
patient.zh: 老师对学习慢的人很有耐心。

pavement.en: Please walk on the pavement for safety.
pavement.zh: 请为了安全走在人行道上。

paw.en: Children at the park were delighted when a friendly dog lifted its paw to greet them with a gentle wag of its tail.
paw.zh: 公园里的孩子们非常高兴，当一只友好的狗抬起爪子，用尾巴轻轻摇摆来向他们打招呼。

pay.en: Can I pay by credit card?

pay for.en: Parents should pay for their children's education.
pay for.zh: 父母应该为孩子的教育付费。

payments.en: Monthly payments are due on the first.
payments.zh: 每月付款应在第一天到期。

pea.en: The farmer grows various vegetables including peas, carrots, and potatoes, which are sold at the local market every Saturday.
pea.zh: 这位农民种植各种蔬菜，包括豌豆、胡萝卜和土豆，这些蔬菜每周六在本地市场出售。

peaceful.en: We enjoyed a peaceful evening by the lake.
peaceful.zh: 我们在湖边享受了一个宁静的夜晚。

peak.en: Traffic congestion in major cities often reaches its peak during the morning and evening rush hours.
peak.zh: 主要城市的交通拥堵通常在早晚高峰时段达到顶峰。

peanut.en: Many children have severe allergic reactions to peanut products, which is why schools have implemented strict dietary policies to protect students.
peanut.zh: 许多儿童对花生制品有严重的过敏反应，这就是学校实施严格饮食政策来保护学生的原因。

pear.en: My favorite fruit is the pear.
pear.zh: 我最喜欢的水果是梨子。

pearl.en: Pearl farming is a lucrative industry in coastal regions where divers collect these precious gems from oysters.
pearl.zh: 珍珠养殖是沿海地区一项利润丰厚的产业，那里的潜水员从牡蛎中采集这些珍贵的宝石。

peasant.en: In many developing countries, a peasant typically works on small plots of land to grow crops for subsistence.
peasant.zh: 在许多发展中国家，农民通常在小块土地上耕作以种植自给自足的农作物。

peasants.en: Peasants worked hard in the rice fields.
peasants.zh: 农民们在稻田里辛勤劳作。

pebble.en: Children enjoy collecting smooth pebbles on the beach and using them to build small castles and sculptures.
pebble.zh: 孩子们喜欢在海滩上收集光滑的鹅卵石，用它们来建造小城堡和雕塑。

peculiar.en: Scientists discovered a peculiar species of fish living in underwater caves that had adapted to complete darkness.
peculiar.zh: 科学家发现了一种生活在水下洞穴中的奇特鱼类，它们已经适应了完全黑暗的环境。

pedal.en: Press the pedal to start the machine.

pedestrian.en: A pedestrian was seriously injured when a car failed to stop at the crossing and struck them unexpectedly.
pedestrian.zh: 当一辆汽车在人行横道未能停车时，一位行人被意外撞伤，伤势严重。

passion.en: He has a deep passion for teaching music.
passion.zh: 他对教授音乐充满热情。

passionate.en: He is passionate about teaching students.

passive.en: Passive learning methods, such as simply reading textbooks, are often less effective than active participation in class.
passive.zh: 被动的学习方法，比如单纯阅读教科书，往往不如积极参与课堂活动有效。

passport.en: Don't forget to bring your passport.

password.en: Remember to change your password monthly.

past.zh: 我们从过去的错误中学习。

paste.en: Students should learn to paste relevant images into their presentations to enhance visual appeal and understanding.
paste.zh: 学生应该学会将相关图片粘贴到演示文稿中，以增强视觉效果和理解。

pastime.en: Reading has always been a popular pastime that provides both entertainment and valuable educational benefits.
pastime.zh: 阅读一直是一种受欢迎的消遣方式，既能带来娱乐，也能提供宝贵的教育益处。

pasture.en: Sheep and cattle graze peacefully in the green pastures of the countryside during the summer months.
pasture.zh: 在夏季，牛羊在乡村的绿色牧场上平静地吃草。

pest.en: Farmers often struggle with the pest that destroys their crops each harvest season, leading to significant financial losses.
pest.zh: 农民经常与每个收获季节摧毁农作物的害虫作斗争，导致严重的经济损失。

pesticide.en: Many scientists argue that excessive pesticide use on farms can have long-term harmful effects on human health.
pesticide.zh: 许多科学家认为，农场过度使用农药可能对人类健康产生长期的有害影响。

pesticides.en: Farmers use pesticides to protect crops.
pesticides.zh: 农民使用农药来保护农作物。

pests.en: Farmers often deal with pests in summer.
pests.zh: 农民们经常在夏天处理害虫。

pet.en: Research shows that owning a pet can significantly reduce stress levels and improve mental wellbeing in owners.
pet.zh: 研究表明，养宠物可以显著降低主人的压力水平并改善心理健康。

petition.en: Thousands of citizens signed the petition demanding stricter regulations to protect endangered wildlife habitats.
petition.zh: 成千上万的公民签署了请愿书，要求制定更严格的法规来保护濒危野生动物栖息地。

petrol.en: I need to buy petrol for my car.

petroleum.en: The discovery of petroleum reserves beneath the seabed can dramatically transform a developing nation's economy.
petroleum.zh: 在海底发现石油储量可以极大地改变一个发展中国家的经济。

pets.en: Many families keep pets at home.

petty.en: Some critics argue that political debates over minor details are merely petty disputes that waste public resources.
petty.zh: 一些批评者认为，政治辩论中对细节的争论只是浪费公共资源的琐碎纠纷。

pharmaceutical.en: The pharmaceutical industry is growing rapidly worldwide.
pharmaceutical.zh: 制药行业在全球范围内快速发展。

pharmacist.en: The pharmacist advised me to take the medication with food to avoid stomach irritation.
pharmacist.zh: 药剂师建议我随餐服用药物以避免胃部不适。

pharmacy.en: I bought medicine at the pharmacy.

phase.en: We will phase the project gradually.
phase.zh: 我们将分阶段进行这个项目。

phenomena.en: Climate scientists study various natural phenomena to understand environmental changes better.
phenomena.zh: 气候科学家研究各种自然现象以更好地了解环境变化。

phenomenon.en: This is a common phenomenon in modern cities.
phenomenon.zh: 这是现代城市的常见现象。

philosopher.en: Plato was an ancient Greek philosopher.
philosopher.zh: 柏拉图是古希腊哲学家。

philosophers.en: Many philosophers throughout history have debated the nature of consciousness and human existence.
philosophers.zh: 历史上许多哲学家都争论过意识和人类存在的本质。

philosophical.en: Taking a philosophical approach to problem-solving can help individuals consider multiple perspectives.
philosophical.zh: 采用哲学方法解决问题可以帮助个人考虑多个角度。

philosophically.en: Some argue that technological advancement should be evaluated philosophically rather than purely economically.
philosophically.zh: 一些人认为技术进步应该从哲学角度而不是纯粹从经济角度来评估。

person.en: Each person has the right to pursue their own goals and make independent decisions about their future.
person.zh: 每个人都有权追求自己的目标，并对自己的未来做出独立的决定。

personal.en: This is my personal opinion on the matter.
personal.zh: 这是我对此事的个人看法。

personality.en: Her personality is warm and friendly.

personally.en: Personally, I believe that travelling abroad provides invaluable experiences that cannot be gained locally.
personally.zh: 就我个人而言，我认为出国旅行提供了在当地无法获得的无价经验。

personnel.en: All personnel must attend the safety training session.
personnel.zh: 所有人员必须参加安全培训课程。

perspective.en: Try to see the situation from my perspective.
perspective.zh: 试着用我的视角看这个情况。

perspectives.en: It is important to consider multiple perspectives when analysing complex social and political issues.
perspectives.zh: 在分析复杂的社会和政治问题时，考虑多种观点非常重要。

persuade.en: Teachers try to persuade students to read more.
persuade.zh: 老师们试图说服学生多读书。

persuading.en: He is persuading his friend to join him.
persuading.zh: 他正在说服朋友加入他。

pessimistic.en: Being overly pessimistic about technological advancement ignores the numerous benefits it has brought to society.
pessimistic.zh: 对技术进步过于悲观忽视了它给社会带来的众多好处。

perceiving.en: While perceiving the artwork, visitors often form emotional connections that influence their overall interpretation of the exhibition.
perceiving.zh: 在欣赏艺术品时，参观者往往会形成情感联系，从而影响他们对展览的整体理解。

percent.en: Women make up fifty percent of students.
percent.zh: 女性占学生的百分之五十。

percentage.en: A large percentage passed the exam.
percentage.zh: 很大比例的人通过了考试。

percentages.en: When comparing test results, educators should avoid focusing solely on raw percentages and consider overall learning outcomes.
percentages.zh: 在比较考试成绩时，教育工作者应避免仅关注原始百分比，而应考虑整体学习成果。

perception.en: Public perception of the brand has changed.
perception.zh: 公众对这个品牌的看法已经改变。

perfect.en: The perfect answer earned full marks.

performance.en: Her performance in the exam was excellent.
performance.zh: 她考试中的表现很出色。

performer.en: The young performer demonstrated exceptional talent and dedication, captivating the audience throughout the entire concert.
performer.zh: 这位年轻的表演者展现了非凡的才华和奉献精神，整场音乐会都吸引着观众。

performers.en: The performers gave an excellent show.
performers.zh: 演出者们呈现了一场精彩的演出。

photographic.en: She has excellent photographic memory skills.
photographic.zh: 她有出色的图像记忆能力。

photographs.en: The album contains old family photographs.
photographs.zh: 相册里装满了家庭老照片。

photosynthesis.en: Through the process of photosynthesis, plants convert sunlight into energy, which is essential for life on Earth.
photosynthesis.zh: 通过光合作用过程，植物将阳光转化为能量，这对地球上的生命至关重要。

phrase.en: Can you use this phrase correctly?
phrase.zh: 你能正确使用这个短语吗？

physical activity.zh: 体力活动改善我们的健康。

physical health.en: Mental and physical health are equally important factors that contribute to a person's overall wellbeing.
physical health.zh: 心理健康和身体健康是影响一个人整体健康的同等重要因素。

physically.en: People living in remote areas may find it challenging to access healthcare services that require physically visiting hospitals.
physically.zh: 生活在偏远地区的人可能会发现，需要亲自前往医院获取医疗服务是具有挑战性的。

permission.en: Students need permission to leave early.
permission.zh: 学生需要许可才能提前离开。

permit.en: The government will not permit any further commercial development in this ecologically fragile wetland area.
permit.zh: 政府不会允许在这个生态脆弱的湿地地区进行任何进一步的商业开发。

permitted.en: Smoking is not permitted in public buildings here.
permitted.zh: 这里不允许在公共建筑内吸烟。

perpetual.en: The perpetual hum of traffic from the busy highway creates constant noise pollution for nearby residents.
perpetual.zh: 繁忙高速公路上永不停歇的车流声为附近居民造成了持续的噪音污染。

perplex.en: The complex immigration policies and procedures often perplex international students trying to complete their applications.
perplex.zh: 复杂的移民政策和程序经常使试图完成申请的国际学生感到困惑。

persecute.en: Throughout history, minority groups have been persecuted for their religious beliefs and cultural traditions.
persecute.zh: 纵观历史，少数民族因其宗教信仰和文化传统而受到迫害。

persevere.en: To succeed in academic research, students must persevere through repeated experiments and numerous setbacks.
persevere.zh: 要在学术研究中取得成功，学生必须通过反复实验和多次挫折坚持下去。

persist.en: The rain will persist throughout the weekend.

persistence.en: Persistence is the key to success.

persistent.en: His persistent efforts finally paid off.
persistent.zh: 他持续的努力终于得到了回报。

perfume.en: She bought an expensive French perfume yesterday.
perfume.zh: 她昨天买了一瓶昂贵的法国香水。

perhaps.zh: 或许我们应该再试一次。

periodic.en: The museum has periodic exhibitions throughout the year.
periodic.zh: 博物馆全年有定期展览。

periodical.en: The professor recommended that students read at least one academic periodical article per week to stay current with research developments.
periodical.zh: 教授建议学生每周至少阅读一篇学术期刊文章，以跟踪研究动态。

periodically.en: The city council periodically reviews public transportation schedules to ensure they meet the changing needs of commuters throughout the year.
periodically.zh: 市议会定期审查公共交通时刻表，以确保全年满足通勤者不断变化的需求。

periodicals.en: The university library subscribes to hundreds of academic periodicals covering various disciplines from sciences to humanities and social sciences.
periodicals.zh: 大学图书馆订阅了数百种学术期刊，涵盖从科学到人文和社会科学的各个学科。

periods.en: Ancient civilizations went through distinct periods of growth and decline, each leaving unique cultural and architectural legacies behind.
periods.zh: 古代文明经历了明显的增长和衰落时期，每个时期都留下了独特的文化和建筑遗产。

perish.en: Marine biologists warn that numerous coral reef species will perish if ocean temperatures continue to rise at the current rate.
perish.zh: 海洋生物学家警告说，如果海洋温度继续以目前的速度上升，许多珊瑚礁物种将会死亡。

permanent.zh: 她找到了一份永久性职位。

permeate.en: The spirit of innovation seems to permeate every aspect of modern society, from education to business practices and technological development.
permeate.zh: 创新精神似乎渗透到现代社会的各个方面，从教育到商业实践和技术发展。

philosophies.en: Different cultures embrace varying philosophies about work-life balance, which can significantly impact employee productivity and satisfaction in the modern workplace.
philosophies.zh: 不同的文化在工作与生活平衡方面持有不同的理念，这会显著影响现代职场中员工的生产力和满意度。

philosophy.en: Her philosophy emphasizes the importance of honesty.
philosophy.zh: 她的哲学强调诚实的重要性。

phone.en: I need to phone my mother tonight.
phone.zh: 我今晚需要给我妈妈打电话。

phones.en: Most people carry phones everywhere they go.
phones.zh: 大多数人人手一部手机。

photo.en: The museum displayed a compelling photo exhibition documenting urban development and social changes over the past fifty years.
photo.zh: 博物馆展出了一场引人入胜的照片展览，记录了过去五十年的城市发展和社会变迁。

photocopier.en: The photocopier on the second floor is broken.

photocopy.en: Before conducting research, students are often required to photocopy relevant journal articles and academic sources from the library collection.
photocopy.zh: 在进行研究之前，学生通常需要从图书馆馆藏中复印相关的期刊文章和学术资料。

photograph.en: Amateur photographers are encouraged to photograph everyday scenes in their local communities to develop their observational skills effectively.
photograph.zh: 鼓励业余摄影师拍摄当地社区的日常生活场景，以有效培养他们的观察能力。

photographer.en: My uncle works as a professional photographer.

pickup.en: I'll pick you up at the airport terminal tomorrow morning at eight o'clock sharp.
pickup.zh: 我明天早上八点整会在机场航站楼接你。

picnic.en: We decided to picnic by the lake.

picture.en: Can you picture yourself living there?
picture.zh: 你能想象自己住在那里吗？

pictures.en: She collected pictures from her travels.
pictures.zh: 她收集了她旅行时的照片。

picturesque.en: The picturesque coastal town attracts thousands of tourists who come to admire its scenic beauty.
picturesque.zh: 这个风景如画的海滨小镇吸引了成千上万的游客前来欣赏其美丽的景色。

pie.en: Although apple pie is considered a traditional American dessert, its origins can be traced to England.
pie.zh: 虽然苹果派被认为是美国传统甜点，但其起源可以追溯到英国。

piece.en: Each piece of archaeological evidence contributes to our understanding of ancient civilizations.
piece.zh: 每一块考古证据都有助于我们了解古代文明。

pieces.en: Can I have two pieces of paper?

pierce.en: The sunlight was able to pierce through the dense forest canopy, illuminating the forest floor.
pierce.zh: 阳光能够穿透茂密的森林树冠，照亮森林地面。

pig.en: In some cultures, the pig is regarded as a symbol of wealth and good fortune in the community.
pig.zh: 在某些文化中，猪被认为是社区财富和好运的象征。

plantations.zh: 许多种植园种植咖啡豆。

plants.en: Most plants need water and sunlight to grow.
plants.zh: 大多数植物需要水和阳光才能生长。

plasma.en: Plasma, the fourth state of matter, is increasingly used in medical treatments for blood disorders and tissue regeneration.
plasma.zh: 等离子体，作为物质的第四种状态，正越来越多地用于血液疾病和组织再生的医疗治疗中。

plaster.en: Before painting the interior walls, workers should apply a layer of plaster to create a smooth and even surface.
plaster.zh: 在粉刷内墙之前，工人们应该先涂一层灰泥，以创造一个光滑平整的表面。

plastic.en: Plastic waste is a serious problem.
plastic.zh: 塑料垃圾是一个严重问题。

plate.en: She put the cake on the plate.

plateau.en: After years of rapid economic growth, the country's development reached a plateau and showed minimal progress.
plateau.zh: 经过多年的快速增长后，该国的发展达到了一个平稳期，进步甚微。

plates.en: The plates are clean and ready to use.
plates.zh: 盘子干净整洁，可以使用了。

platform.en: The train platform was crowded with commuters.
platform.zh: 火车站台上挤满了通勤者。

platforms.en: Many platforms offer free online courses now.
platforms.zh: 许多平台现在提供免费在线课程。

physician.en: The physician examined the patient carefully.

physicians.en: The physicians met to discuss the case.
physicians.zh: 医生们聚在一起讨论这个病例。

physicist.zh: 爱因斯坦是一位著名的物理学家。

physics.en: Physics is my favourite science subject.
physics.zh: 物理是我最喜欢的理科科目。

physiology.en: Understanding human physiology is essential for medical students who wish to pursue successful careers in healthcare and research.
physiology.zh: 了解人体生理学对于希望在医疗保健和研究领域取得成功的医学生至关重要。

pianist.en: The young pianist gave a great concert.
pianist.zh: 这位年轻的钢琴家举办了一场精彩的音乐会。

piano.en: She has been playing piano for years.
piano.zh: 她弹钢琴已经很多年了。

pick.zh: 你可以选择任何一本书。

pick up.en: Research indicates that young children have a remarkable ability to pick up new languages quickly and develop native-like pronunciation.
pick up.zh: 研究表明，幼儿具有非凡的能力，能快速学习新语言并形成母语般的发音。

pinpoint.en: The radar can pinpoint the location.
pinpoint.zh: 雷达可以精准定位这个位置。

pint.en: In many British pubs, customers can order a pint of beer as a standard serving size for social gatherings.
pint.zh: 在许多英国酒吧里，顾客可以点一品脱啤酒作为社交聚会时的标准份量。

pioneer.en: She was a pioneer in medical research.

pioneers.zh: 早期先驱者探索新领域。

pipe.en: The old water pipe system in the city needs to be completely replaced to ensure clean drinking water for residents.
pipe.zh: 城市里的旧水管系统需要完全更换，以确保居民能够饮用到清洁的水。

pipework.en: The old pipework needs to be replaced.
pipework.zh: 旧的管道系统需要更换。

pirate.en: Modern technology has made it easier to track down pirate websites that distribute copyrighted material illegally.
pirate.zh: 现代技术使得追踪传播盗版内容的非法网站变得更加容易。

pirates.en: The pirates attacked the trading ship.
pirates.zh: 海盗袭击了那艘贸易船。

pistol.en: Archaeologists discovered a pistol buried alongside other artifacts from the 18th century colonial settlement.
pistol.zh: 考古学家发现了一把手枪与18世纪殖民定居点的其他文物一起被埋藏。

plains.en: The cattle roamed across the plains.

plan.en: We plan to start the project next week.
plan.zh: 我们计划下周开始这个项目。

plan for.en: We need to plan for the upcoming exam carefully.
plan for.zh: 我们需要为即将到来的考试做好计划。

plane.en: The plane landed safely at the airport.

planned.en: We planned the meeting for Friday.
planned.zh: 我们计划把会议安排在周五。

planners.en: City planners designed the new park.
planners.zh: 城市规划者设计了这个新公园。

plans.en: Our travel plans have changed slightly.
plans.zh: 我们的旅行计划有轻微变化。

plant.en: The power plant has implemented new technologies to reduce its carbon emissions by thirty percent.
plant.zh: 该发电厂已经实施新技术，将其碳排放量减少百分之三十。

plantation.en: The historical plantation now operates as a museum, offering visitors insights into agricultural practices of the past.
plantation.zh: 这座历史种植园现在作为博物馆运营，向游客展示过去的农业实践。

pigeon.en: A pigeon perched on the ancient statue seemed completely indifferent to the tourists taking photographs below.
pigeon.zh: 一只鸽子栖息在古老的雕像上，似乎完全不在意下面正在拍照的游客。

pigment.en: This flower has bright yellow pigment.
pigment.zh: 这朵花有明亮的黄色色素。

pile.en: There is a pile of books on the desk.

pill.en: Some doctors believe that taking a daily pill could significantly reduce the risk of heart disease in older adults.
pill.zh: 一些医生认为，每天服用一粒药丸可以显著降低老年人患心脏病的风险。

pillar.en: The ancient temple's stone pillars have withstood severe weather conditions for over a thousand years.
pillar.zh: 这座古老寺庙的石柱已经经受了一千多年的恶劣天气条件。

pillow.en: After a long journey, the exhausted traveler immediately sank into the comfortable bed and hugged the soft pillow.
pillow.zh: 经过长途旅行后，疲惫的旅行者立即陷入舒适的床铺，拥抱柔软的枕头。

pilot.en: The pilot flew the airplane safely.
pilot.zh: 飞行员安全地驾驶飞机。

pinch.en: She added a pinch of salt to the soup, believing it would enhance the flavour of the fresh vegetables.
pinch.zh: 她在汤里加了一撮盐，认为这会增强新鲜蔬菜的味道。

pine.en: The pleasant aroma of pine trees filled the air as hikers walked through the forest trail during autumn.
pine.zh: 当徒步旅行者在秋季穿过森林小径时，松树的宜人香气弥漫在空气中。

pink.en: She painted the wall bright pink.

pitch.en: The team played on the pitch.

pity.en: It is a pity the game was cancelled.

place.en: Governments should place greater importance on preserving endangered languages before they disappear from our culture forever.
place.zh: 各国政府应该更加重视保护濒危语言，以免它们从我们的文化中永远消失。

placebo.en: The study compared the drug to a placebo.
placebo.zh: 研究将药物与安慰剂进行对比。

placement.zh: 学生寻求本地实习工作。

places.en: I want to visit many different places.
places.zh: 我想参观许多不同的地方。

plagiarism.en: Universities treat plagiarism as a serious offense, and students who copy others' work may face expulsion from their programs.
plagiarism.zh: 大学将抄袭视为严重违规行为，抄袭他人作业的学生可能面临被开除出项目的处分。

plague.en: Urban areas often face issues that plague modern society, such as traffic congestion and high air pollution levels.
plague.zh: 城市地区经常面临困扰现代社会的问题，如交通拥堵和高水平的空气污染。

plain.en: She wore a plain white dress.
plain.zh: 她穿了一条朴素的白色连衣裙。

plausible.en: His explanation sounds plausible but may be false.
plausible.zh: 他的解释听起来似乎合理，但可能是假的。

play.en: Children should be encouraged to play outdoors as it helps develop their physical coordination and social skills.
play.zh: 应该鼓励儿童在户外玩耍，因为这有助于发展他们的身体协调能力和社交技能。

player.en: An experienced player must balance technical proficiency with psychological resilience to succeed in competitive sports.
player.zh: 一个有经验的运动员必须将技术熟练与心理韧性相结合才能在竞技体育中取得成功。

players.en: All players must follow the new rules.
players.zh: 所有运动员必须遵守新规则。

playground.en: Children play happily in the playground.
playground.zh: 孩子们在操场上快乐地玩耍。

playing.en: The children are playing in the park.
playing.zh: 孩子们正在公园里玩耍。

plea.en: The defendant made an emotional plea to the judge, expressing remorse for his actions and asking for leniency.
plea.zh: 被告向法官做出了感人的请求，表达了对所犯罪行的悔意并请求宽大处理。

plead.en: The lawyer advised her client to plead guilty in exchange for a reduced sentence under the current law.
plead.zh: 律师建议她的当事人认罪以换取现行法律下的从轻判决。

politics.zh: 政治影响每个人的日常生活。

poll.en: According to a recent poll conducted by the university, most students prefer online learning to traditional classrooms.
poll.zh: 根据该校最近进行的一项民意调查，大多数学生更喜欢在线学习而不是传统课堂。

pollination.en: Pollination is essential for plant reproduction.
pollination.zh: 授粉对植物繁殖至关重要。

pollutant.en: Carbon monoxide is a dangerous pollutant emitted primarily from vehicle exhaust systems and industrial facilities.
pollutant.zh: 一氧化碳是一种危险的污染物，主要从车辆排气系统和工业设施排放。

pollutants.zh: 工厂每天释放有害污染物。

pollute.en: Factories pollute the air and water.

polluting.en: Factories are polluting the river with chemicals.
polluting.zh: 工厂正在用化学物质污染河流。

pollution.en: Air pollution caused by industrial emissions poses a serious threat to public health in many major cities.
pollution.zh: 工业排放造成的空气污染对许多大城市的公共健康构成了严重威胁。

polynesian.zh: 波利尼西亚文化有独特的传统。

pond.en: A small pond near the research station serves as an important habitat for studying local amphibian populations.
pond.zh: 研究站附近的一个小池塘是一个重要的栖息地，用于研究当地两栖动物种群。

poet.en: Many students study the works of the Romantic poet William Wordsworth to understand the emotional depth of English literature.
poet.zh: 许多学生学习浪漫主义诗人威廉·华兹华斯的作品，以理解英国文学的情感深度。

poetry.en: My teacher loves reading poetry aloud.
poetry.zh: 我的老师喜欢大声朗读诗歌。

point.en: The speaker made several valid points about environmental protection but failed to provide practical solutions to the problems he raised.
point.zh: 演讲者提出了几个关于环境保护的有效观点，但未能为他提出的问题提供实际解决方案。

point of view.en: Everyone has a different point of view.
point of view.zh: 每个人都有不同的观点。

point out.en: Could you point out the main problem?

poison.en: Never drink anything that might be poison.
poison.zh: 千万不要喝任何可能是毒药的东西。

poisoning.en: Food poisoning made him very sick.
poisoning.zh: 食物中毒让他病得很重。

poke.en: The journalist's decision to poke fun at the politician during the televised interview created significant controversy among viewers.
poke.zh: 记者在电视采访中取笑政治人物的决定在观众中引起了重大争议。

polar.en: Polar bears live in cold Arctic regions.
polar.zh: 北极熊生活在寒冷的北极地区。

plug.en: The government launched a campaign to plug the gap in public healthcare services across rural areas.
plug.zh: 政府发起了一场运动，以弥补农村地区公共卫生服务的空白。

plumber.en: When the pipe burst in our kitchen, we had to call a plumber immediately to avoid water damage.
plumber.zh: 当厨房的水管爆裂时，我们不得不立即叫水管工来避免水损。

plummeted.en: Stock prices plummeted during the financial crisis.
plummeted.zh: 股价在金融危机期间骤降。

plunge.en: Many tourists decided to take the plunge and explore remote wilderness areas during their holidays.
plunge.zh: 许多游客决定大胆尝试，在假期期间探索偏远的荒野地区。

plural.en: In English grammar, most nouns form their plural by adding the letter 's' to the end.
plural.zh: 在英语语法中，大多数名词通过在词尾加字母's'来构成复数形式。

pocket.en: I put my keys in my pocket.

pockets.en: Her coat has two deep pockets.
pockets.zh: 她的外套有两个深口袋。

podcast.en: I listen to a podcast every morning.

poem.en: The literature teacher asked students to write a poem that reflects their cultural heritage and identity.
poem.zh: 文学老师要求学生写一首反映其文化遗产和身份的诗。

pleasant.en: The park has a pleasant atmosphere in spring.
pleasant.zh: 春天公园有宜人的氛围。

please.en: Could you please explain the main factors that contribute to environmental degradation in major urban areas across the world?
please.zh: 请问您能解释一下导致全球主要城市环境恶化的主要因素吗？

pleasurable.zh: 阅读是一项令人愉快的活动。

pleasure.en: It is my pleasure to help you.

pledge.en: The government has pledged to reduce carbon emissions significantly within the next decade to effectively combat climate change.
pledge.zh: 政府已承诺在未来十年内大幅减少碳排放，以有效应对气候变化。

plentiful.en: The coastal region has plentiful natural resources, including fish, minerals, and beautiful beaches that support thriving local economies.
plentiful.zh: 沿海地区拥有丰富的自然资源，包括鱼类、矿产和美丽的海滩，支撑着繁荣的当地经济。

plight.en: The plight of refugees fleeing war-torn countries has become a serious global concern requiring immediate international cooperation and assistance.
plight.zh: 逃离战乱国家的难民困境已成为一个严重的全球问题，需要立即开展国际合作和援助。

plot.en: The scatter plot illustrates the correlation between hours spent studying and final exam scores achieved by students in the survey.
plot.zh: 散点图说明了调查中学生在花费学习时间与最终考试成绩之间的相关性。

plough.en: Farmers plough the fields before planting crops.

portraits.en: The gallery displays many famous portraits.
portraits.zh: 画廊展示许多著名的肖像画。

portray.en: The documentary attempts to portray the daily struggles of refugees, highlighting both their challenges and their resilience.
portray.zh: 这部纪录片试图描绘难民们的日常挣扎，突出他们的挑战和韧性。

ports.en: Ships arrived at the busy ports.

pose.en: The rapid advancement of technology poses significant questions about privacy and the future of human employment.
pose.zh: 技术的快速发展对隐私和人类就业的未来提出了重要问题。

posed.en: They posed for a photo at the park.
posed.zh: 他们在公园拍照摆姿势。

position.en: The job position requires three years.
position.zh: 这个职位需要三年经验。

positions.en: Workers hold different positions in the office.
positions.zh: 员工在办公室担任不同职位。

positively.en: Educational programs can positively influence young people's attitudes toward environmental conservation and sustainable living.
positively.zh: 教育项目可以积极影响年轻人对环境保护和可持续生活的态度。

possess.en: You must possess a driving license.

porcelain.en: The museum's exquisite collection of ancient Chinese porcelain demonstrates the remarkable craftsmanship of artisans from centuries past.
porcelain.zh: 博物馆收藏的中国古代精美瓷器展示了几个世纪前工匠们的卓越工艺。

porch.en: Sitting on the wooden porch of her grandparents' cottage, the girl listened to fascinating stories about life in the past.
porch.zh: 女孩坐在祖父母小屋的木制门廊上，聆听关于过去生活的引人入胜的故事。

pork.en: Due to religious and cultural dietary restrictions, many people in certain regions choose not to consume pork products.
pork.zh: 由于宗教和文化饮食限制，某些地区的许多人选择不食用猪肉产品。

port.en: The ship arrived safely at the port.

portable.en: I bought a portable radio yesterday.
portable.zh: 我昨天买了一个便携式收音机。

porter.en: Exhausted travelers at the train station gratefully tipped the porter who helped carry their heavy luggage up the stairs.
porter.zh: 火车站里疲惫的旅客们感激地给帮他们把沉重行李搬上楼梯的搬运工小费。

portfolio.en: She showed her design portfolio to clients.
portfolio.zh: 她向客户展示了她的设计作品集。

portion.en: She ate a small portion of rice.

portions.en: These restaurant portions are too large.
portions.zh: 这些餐厅的食物份量太大了。

portrait.en: The museum's new exhibition features a stunning portrait series that captures the diverse cultural heritage of indigenous communities.
portrait.zh: 博物馆的新展览展出了一系列令人惊叹的肖像作品，捕捉了土著社区多元的文化遗产。

ponder.en: People should ponder the long-term consequences of their daily choices on the environment before making decisions.
ponder.zh: 人们在做决定之前应该仔细思考他们日常选择对环境的长期影响。

pool.en: Children like to swim in the pool.
pool.zh: 孩子们喜欢在水池里游泳。

poor.zh: 这个贫穷的家庭需要帮助。

pope.en: The pope delivers speeches on various social and ethical issues that are heard and respected by millions of followers worldwide.
pope.zh: 教皇就各种社会和伦理问题发表演讲，受到全世界数百万信徒的聆听和尊重。

popularity.en: The popularity of the game is growing.
popularity.zh: 这个游戏的流行度正在增长。

population.en: The city has a large population.

population growth.en: Population growth is a serious issue.
population growth.zh: 人口增长是一个严重问题。

pole.en: The flag is attached to a tall pole in the square.
pole.zh: 旗帜被绑在广场上一根高高的旗杆上。

poles.en: The magnetic poles of the Earth shift over time, which can significantly affect navigation systems used by sailors globally.
poles.zh: 地球的磁极随时间推移而移动，这可能会显著影响全球水手使用的导航系统。

police.en: The police arrived at the crime scene within ten minutes of receiving the emergency call from the witness.
police.zh: 警方在收到目击者的紧急呼叫后十分钟内赶到了犯罪现场。

policies.en: Many multinational companies have adopted flexible working policies to enhance employee satisfaction and productivity.
policies.zh: 许多跨国公司采用了灵活的工作政策，以提高员工满意度和生产力。

policy.en: The new policy starts next month.
policy.zh: 新政策下个月开始实施。

polish.en: I need to polish my shoes before the interview.
polish.zh: 我需要在面试前擦亮鞋子。

polite.en: In many Asian cultures, it is considered polite to remove your shoes before entering someone's home.
polite.zh: 在许多亚洲文化中，进门前脱鞋被认为是礼貌的行为。

political.zh: 他写关于政治问题的文章。

politician.en: A successful politician must possess excellent communication skills to connect with voters from diverse backgrounds.
politician.zh: 一位成功的政治家必须具备出色的沟通能力，才能与不同背景的选民建立联系。

politicians.zh: 政治家经常讨论重要问题。

possession.en: The possession of private property is considered a fundamental right in many democratic societies around the world.
possession.zh: 在世界各地的许多民主社会中，私人财产的拥有被视为一项基本权利。

possessions.en: People often value their possessions too much.
possessions.zh: 人们常常过于珍视自己的财产。

possibility.en: We should explore every possibility for success.
possibility.zh: 我们应该探索每一个成功的可能性。

possible.en: It is possible that technological advances will fundamentally change the way we work and communicate in the future.
possible.zh: 技术进步可能会从根本上改变我们未来工作和交流的方式。

possibly.en: The weather forecast suggests it will possibly rain tomorrow, so we should bring umbrellas to the outdoor event.
possibly.zh: 天气预报显示明天可能下雨，所以我们应该为户外活动带伞。

post office.en: I need to go to the post office this afternoon.
post office.zh: 今天下午我需要去一趟邮局。

postage.en: The postage for sending airmail letters abroad has increased significantly over the past year.
postage.zh: 过去一年里，寄往国外航空信的邮资大幅上涨。

postbox.en: Please drop the letter in the postbox.

postcard.en: While travelling through Europe, she sent postcards to her friends describing the beautiful scenery she encountered.
postcard.zh: 在欧洲旅行期间，她给朋友们寄去明信片，描述她所看到的美景。

potato.en: I usually boil potatoes and serve them with butter and herbs for dinner.
potato.zh: 我通常把土豆煮熟，配上黄油和香草一起作为晚餐食用。

potatoes.en: I bought some potatoes from the market.

potentially.en: Artificial intelligence is potentially the most transformative technology of our generation.
potentially.zh: 人工智能可能是我这一代人最具变革性的技术。

pots.en: The gardening enthusiast filled several pots with soil and planted different herbs.
pots.zh: 这位园艺爱好者在几个花盆里装满土壤，种上了不同的香草。

pottery.en: She learned pottery at the community center.
pottery.zh: 她在社区中心学习制作陶器。

pound.en: I need to buy a pound of ground beef to make burgers for the family gathering.
pound.zh: 我需要买一磅牛肉末，为家庭聚会做汉堡。

pounds.en: This package weighs about two pounds.
pounds.zh: 这个包裹大约有两磅重。

pour.en: The barista will pour the milk carefully to create a beautiful pattern in the coffee.
pour.zh: 咖啡师会小心地倒牛奶，在咖啡上创造出美丽的图案。

poured.zh: 雨倾盆而下持续了好几个小时。

preference.en: My preference is to study in the library.
preference.zh: 我的偏好是在图书馆学习。

preferences.zh: 学生有不同的学习偏好。

preferred.en: Public transport is often the preferred mode of travel for commuters wishing to reduce their carbon footprint.
preferred.zh: 公共交通通常是希望减少碳足迹的通勤者的首选出行方式。

prehistoric.zh: 史前洞穴里有古老的绘画。

prejudice.en: Despite decades of anti-discrimination legislation, prejudice against minority groups remains a persistent problem in many societies.
