prejudice.zh: 尽管数十年来制定了反歧视法规，但对少数群体的偏见在许多社会中仍然是一个持续存在的问题。

premier.en: The restaurant is known for its premier cuisine.
premier.zh: 这家餐厅以其一流的美食而闻名。

premise.en: The entire theory is built on the premise that human behavior is primarily shaped by environmental factors rather than genetics.
premise.zh: 整个理论建立在一个前提之上，即人类行为主要由环境因素而非遗传因素塑造。

poverty.en: Many families still live in poverty today.
poverty.zh: 许多家庭今天仍然生活在贫困中。

powder.en: She applied face powder before work.

powerful.en: Social media has become a powerful tool for influencing public opinion and shaping political discourse worldwide.
powerful.zh: 社交媒体已成为影响公众舆论和塑造全球政治话语的强大工具。

powerpoint.en: The teacher showed the notes on PowerPoint.

powers.en: Governments hold significant powers over citizens.
powers.zh: 政府对公民拥有重要权力。

practical.en: We need practical solutions to this.
practical.zh: 我们需要实际的解决方案。

practically.en: Practically every household in urban areas now has access to the internet and smartphone technology.
practically.zh: 城市地区几乎每个家庭现在都能使用互联网和智能手机技术。

practise.en: Students should regularly practise speaking English to significantly improve their pronunciation and overall fluency.
practise.zh: 学生应定期练习英语口语，以显著提高发音和整体流利度。

practising.en: She is a practising lawyer in the city.
practising.zh: 她是城里一位执业律师。

predict.en: Scientists cannot predict when earthquakes will happen.
predict.zh: 科学家无法预测地震何时发生。

predictable.en: The weather here is quite predictable.
predictable.zh: 这里的天气相当可预见。

prediction.en: His prediction about the rain was correct.
prediction.zh: 他关于下雨的预测是正确的。

predictions.en: Weather predictions help plan outdoor events.
predictions.zh: 天气预报有助于计划户外活动。

predictor.en: Rainfall is a good predictor of harvest.
predictor.zh: 降雨量是收成的良好预示。

predominant.en: English has become the predominant language of international business communications in the twenty-first century.
predominant.zh: 英语已成为二十一世纪国际商业交流的主要语言。

predominantly.zh: 这个地区主要是住宅区。

preface.en: In the preface of his groundbreaking book, the author pays tribute to the mentors who inspired his research.
preface.zh: 在这位作者开创性著作的序言中，他向激励他研究的导师们致以敬意。

prefer.zh: 我更喜欢茶而不是咖啡。

prefer to.en: I prefer to study alone in the library.
prefer to.zh: 我更喜欢在图书馆独自学习。

postcode.en: Please ensure you write the correct postcode on your application form to avoid any delays in receiving your documents.
postcode.zh: 请确保您在申请表上填写正确的邮政编码，以避免收到文件时出现任何延误。

poster.en: There is a poster on the wall.

posters.en: Colorful posters are on the classroom walls.
posters.zh: 彩色海报贴在教室墙上。

postgraduate.en: She started a postgraduate program last fall.
postgraduate.zh: 她去年秋天开始了一个研究生项目。

postman.en: The postman delivers letters and parcels to our neighborhood every morning at approximately nine o'clock sharp.
postman.zh: 邮递员每天早上大约九点准时向我们的社区投递信件和包裹。

postpone.en: Due to the unexpected storm warning, the outdoor graduation ceremony has been postponed to the following week.
postpone.zh: 由于意外的暴风雨预警，户外毕业典礼已推迟到下周。

posts.en: Workers stand at their posts every day.
posts.zh: 工人们每天站在岗位上。

posture.zh: 良好的姿势可以预防背痛。

postures.en: Good postures help prevent back pain.
postures.zh: 良好的姿势有助于预防背痛。

pot.en: The clay pot in the garden contains various herbs that are commonly used in traditional cooking recipes.
pot.zh: 花园里的陶罐里装着各种常用于传统烹饪食谱的香草。

practitioner.en: Many medical practitioners recommend regular exercise as a way to maintain good health and prevent chronic diseases.
practitioner.zh: 许多医疗从业者建议定期锻炼作为保持健康和预防慢性疾病的方式。

practitioners.zh: 医疗从业者工作时间很长。

praise.en: She received high praise from her boss.
praise.zh: 她得到了老板的高度赞扬。

pray.en: In some cultures, people pray before meals as a way of expressing gratitude for the food they are about to receive.
pray.zh: 在一些文化中，人们在饭前祈祷，以表达对即将获得的食物的感激之情。

prayer.en: The school introduced a moment of silence each morning, allowing students to engage in quiet reflection or prayer if they wished.
prayer.zh: 学校每天早晨引入片刻沉默，让学生可以进行安静的反思或祈祷。

pre.en: The pre class meeting starts at eight.

preach.en: Parents may preach the importance of hard work, but children often learn better through observation and imitation.
preach.zh: 父母可能会宣扬勤奋的重要性，但孩子们通常通过观察和模仿学得更好。

precaution.en: As a precaution against identity theft, individuals should regularly monitor their financial statements and report suspicious activity.
precaution.zh: 作为防范身份盗用的预防措施，个人应定期监控其财务对账单并报告可疑活动。

precede.en: The opening ceremony will precede the main sporting events, setting an inspirational tone for the entire competition.
precede.zh: 开幕式将在主要体育赛事之前举行，为整个比赛奠定鼓舞人心的基调。

precedent.en: This landmark court ruling sets a significant precedent that may influence future decisions on similar environmental protection cases.
precedent.zh: 这一里程碑式的法庭裁决开创了一个重要先例，可能会影响未来类似环境保护案件的判决。

precious.en: Time is our most precious resource.
precious.zh: 时间是我们最宝贵的资源。

precipitation.en: Precipitation in this region is quite low.
precipitation.zh: 这个地区的降水量相当低。

precise.en: We need a more precise answer.
precise.zh: 我们需要一个更准确的答案。

precisely.en: The two cities are not precisely the same in size; one has a population of approximately 500,000 while the other has 480,000.
precisely.zh: 这两个城市规模并不完全相同：一个人口约50万，另一个约48万。

precision.en: Scientific research demands a high degree of precision in measurement and methodology to ensure reliable and valid results.
precision.zh: 科学研究要求在测量和方法上具有高度精确性，以确保获得可靠和有效的结果。

preclude.en: The lack of adequate funding may preclude the government from implementing all of the proposed environmental protection measures.
preclude.zh: 资金不足可能使政府无法实施所有拟议的环境保护措施。

predator.en: The disappearance of the predator from the ecosystem has created an imbalance, leading to overpopulation of certain prey species.
predator.zh: 捕食者从生态系统中消失造成了失衡，导致某些猎物物种的数量过多。

predators.en: Lions are natural predators in the wild.
predators.zh: 狮子是野外天然的食肉动物。

predecessor.en: The new policy differs significantly from its predecessor, introducing stricter regulations on industrial waste disposal practices.
predecessor.zh: 新政策与前任政策有很大不同，在工业废物处理方面引入了更严格的法规。

predecessors.en: The new policy differs from its predecessors.
predecessors.zh: 新政策与前任政策不同。

premises.en: No smoking is allowed on premises.

premium.en: Students are often willing to pay a premium for courses that offer better employment prospects.
premium.zh: 学生们通常愿意为能提供更好就业前景的课程支付 premium 价格。

preoccupy.en: Environmental issues continue to preoccupy policymakers and the general public alike.
preoccupy.zh: 环境问题继续 preoccupy 政策制定者和普通公众。

preparation.en: Good preparation leads to better results.
preparation.zh: 好的准备会带来更好的结果。

prepare.en: Universities should prepare students for the challenges they will face in their careers.
prepare.zh: 大学应该 prepare 学生应对他们在职业生涯中将面临的挑战。

prepare for.en: Candidates must prepare for interviews thoroughly if they want to secure the position.
prepare for.zh: 候选人如果想获得这个职位，就必须彻底地 prepare for 面试。

prepared.en: Governments must be prepared to implement strict regulations if pollution levels continue to rise beyond acceptable safety limits.
prepared.zh: 如果污染水平继续上升到可接受的安全限值之外，政府必须准备好实施严格的法规。

preposition.en: Understanding how to use prepositions correctly is essential for English writing.
preposition.zh: 理解如何正确使用 preposition 对英语写作至关重要。

prerequisite.en: A bachelor's degree is often a prerequisite for admission to postgraduate programmes.
prerequisite.zh: 学士学位通常是进入研究生课程的 prerequisite。

prevail.en: In many developing countries, traditional farming methods still prevail over modern agricultural techniques.
prevail.zh: 在许多发展中国家，传统农业方法仍然比现代农业技术更普遍。

prevailing.en: The prevailing winds came from the east.

prevent.en: Regular exercise can prevent many serious diseases.
prevent.zh: 经常锻炼可以预防许多严重疾病。

prevent from.en: Heavy traffic and unexpected road closures prevented us from arriving at the conference on time.
prevent from.zh: 拥堵的交通和意外的封路使我们无法准时到达会议现场。

preventative.en: Regular hand washing is a preventative measure against illness.
preventative.zh: 定期洗手是预防疾病的有效措施。

prevention.en: Prevention measures can significantly reduce workplace accidents.
prevention.zh: 预防措施可以显著减少工作场所的事故。

printers.en: The office has two new printers.
printers.zh: 办公室有两台新打印机。

prior.en: I had no prior experience with this.
prior.zh: 我之前没有这方面的经验。

prior to.en: Prior to starting university, I spent six months traveling abroad, which broadened my perspective on different cultures.
prior to.zh: 在开始大学学习之前，我花了六个月在国外旅行，这拓宽了我对不同文化的看法。

priorities.en: We must set clear priorities for the project.
priorities.zh: 我们必须为项目设定明确的优先事项。

priority.zh: 安全是我们的首要优先事项。

prison.en: He was sent to prison for theft.
prison.zh: 他因盗窃罪被送进监狱。

prisoner.en: Each prisoner should have access to educational programs, as this can help reduce reoffending rates upon release.
prisoner.zh: 每位囚犯都应该有机会接受教育项目，因为这有助于降低获释后的再犯率。

privacy.en: Social media users are increasingly concerned about privacy, as companies collect and sell personal data without explicit consent.
privacy.zh: 社交媒体用户越来越关注隐私问题，因为公司在未经明确同意的情况下收集和出售个人数据。

private.en: This is a private conversation between us.
private.zh: 这是我们之间的私人对话。

privilege.en: Access to quality education is a privilege that not everyone enjoys, and governments should work to ensure equal opportunities.
privilege.zh: 接受优质教育是一种并非每个人都能享有的特权，政府应该努力确保人人有平等的机会。

primates.en: Primates include monkeys and human beings.
primates.zh: 灵长类包括猴子和人类。

prime.en: This is the prime location for the shop.

primitive.en: Early humans lived in primitive shelters made of wood.
primitive.zh: 早期人类住在木头搭建的简陋住所里。

prince.en: The young prince has taken on increasing responsibilities in preparation for his future role as national leader.
prince.zh: 这位年轻的王子已经承担了越来越多的责任，为将来担任国家领导人做准备。

princess.en: The princess dedicated much of her time to charitable causes, particularly those benefiting underprivileged children worldwide.
princess.zh: 这位公主将大量时间投入到慈善事业中，特别是那些惠及全世界弱势儿童的事业。

principal.en: The principal reason for my absence was illness.
principal.zh: 我缺席的主要原因是生病。

principle.en: The fundamental principle of sustainable development requires balancing economic growth with environmental protection and social equity.
principle.zh: 可持续发展的基本原则要求在经济增长、环境保护和社会公平之间取得平衡。

principled.en: As a principled leader, she consistently made ethical decisions that prioritized the welfare of her community over personal gain.
principled.zh: 作为一位有原则的领导者，她始终坚持做出优先考虑社区福祉而非个人利益的道德决策。

principles.en: Teachers should follow basic principles in the classroom.
principles.zh: 教师应遵循课堂的基本原则。

print.en: Can you print this document for me?
print.zh: 你能帮我打印这份文件吗？

prescribe.en: In many countries, doctors can prescribe alternative medicines to patients with chronic conditions.
prescribe.zh: 在许多国家，医生可以为患有慢性疾病的患者开具替代药物的处方。

prescribed.en: The doctor prescribed me some medicine.

prescription.en: I need to collect my prescription from the pharmacy.
prescription.zh: 我需要去药店取我的处方。

presence.en: The presence of adequate funding is essential for the successful implementation of any community project.
presence.zh: 充足的资金对于任何社区项目的成功实施都是必不可少的。

presentation.en: The student gave a clear presentation.
presentation.zh: 学生做了一个清晰的报告。

presenter.zh: 演讲人介绍了这个主题。

presently.en: Presently, the government is reviewing policies related to environmental protection in urban areas.
presently.zh: 目前，政府正在审查与城市环境保护相关的政策。

preservation.en: The museum focuses on artifact preservation.
preservation.zh: 博物馆专注于文物保存。

preserve.en: We must preserve the old library building.
preserve.zh: 我们必须保护这座古老的图书馆建筑。

preside.en: The experienced judge will preside over the trial and ensure that both sides receive a fair hearing.
preside.zh: 这位经验丰富的法官将主持审判，并确保双方都能得到公平的陈述机会。

president.en: The president gave an important speech.
president.zh: 校长发表了一个重要演讲。

press.en: Please press the button to continue.

prestige.zh: 这所大学有很高的声望。

presumably.en: Presumably, the increase in tourism revenue will allow the local government to invest more in community infrastructure projects.
presumably.zh: 据推测，旅游收入的增加将使当地政府能够更多地投资于社区基础设施项目。

presume.en: I presume this is the right room.
presume.zh: 我假定这是正确的房间。

pretend.en: Some teenagers pretend to study while actually spending hours on social media applications on their devices.
pretend.zh: 一些青少年假装学习，而实际上却在他们的设备上花数小时使用社交媒体应用程序。

pretext.en: The meeting was arranged under the pretext of discussing team projects, but it was actually about budget cuts.
pretext.zh: 这次会议是在讨论团队项目的借口下安排的，但实际上是为了削减预算。

privileged.zh: 只有特权学生获得奖学金。

prize.en: She won first prize in the contest.
prize.zh: 她在比赛中获得了一等奖。

prizes.zh: 他们今天赢得了两个奖项。

probability.en: The probability of passing the exam is high.
probability.zh: 通过考试的可能性很高。

probable.en: A probable consequence of rapid population growth is increased demand for housing and public services.
probable.zh: 人口快速增长的可能后果是对住房和公共服务的需求增加。

probably.en: Without immediate action, we will probably see more species becoming endangered in the coming decades.
probably.zh: 如果不立即采取行动，我们可能会在未来几十年看到更多物种濒临灭绝。

problem.en: I have a problem with my homework.

problem solving.en: Problem solving is an important skill.
problem solving.zh: 解决问题是一项重要技能。

problems.en: Many students have problems with pronunciation.

prey.en: The hawk caught its prey quickly.

prices.en: Prices of vegetables increased last month.

prick.en: The nurse used a sterile needle to prick the patient's finger to obtain a small blood sample for testing.
prick.zh: 护士用无菌针轻轻刺破病人的手指，以获取少量血液样本进行检测。

pride.en: Many citizens feel a deep sense of pride when their national team wins a major international sporting competition on the global stage.
pride.zh: 当他们的国家队在全球舞台上的重大国际体育比赛中获胜时，许多公民感到深深的自豪感。

priest.en: The village priest has been providing spiritual guidance and support to families throughout the region for decades.
priest.zh: 这位乡村神父几十年来一直为该地区的家庭提供精神指导和帮助。

priests.en: The priests conducted the morning service.
priests.zh: 神父们主持了早间仪式。

primacy.en: The company emphasized the primacy of customer satisfaction over profit maximization in its business philosophy.
primacy.zh: 公司在其商业理念中强调客户满意度的重要性优先于利润最大化。

primarily.en: The new policy is primarily designed to protect the rights of minority groups in the education system.
primarily.zh: 新政策主要旨在保护教育体系中少数群体的权利。

primary.en: Education is the primary goal of this program.
primary.zh: 教育是这个项目的首要目标。

primary school.en: Children usually start primary school at age six.
primary school.zh: 孩子们通常六岁开始上小学。

procedural.en: The procedural requirements for the examination must be followed carefully by all candidates to avoid disqualification.
procedural.zh: 考试的所有程序要求必须被所有考生认真遵守以避免被取消资格。

procedure.en: Understanding the proper procedure for visa application is essential for international students planning to study abroad.
procedure.zh: 了解正确的签证申请程序对计划出国深造的国际学生至关重要。

proceed.en: Let us proceed with the experiment.

proceeded.en: The meeting proceeded smoothly after the chairperson addressed the concerns raised by the committee members.
proceeded.zh: 在主席解决了委员会成员提出的担忧后，会议顺利进行。

proceeding.en: Before proceeding with the experiment, the researcher ensured that all equipment was properly calibrated.
proceeding.zh: 在继续实验之前，研究人员确保所有设备都已正确校准。

proceedings.en: The legal proceedings attracted considerable media attention because of the unprecedented nature of the case.
proceedings.zh: 由于案件的空前性质，这场法律诉讼引起了媒体的高度关注。

proceeds.en: The proceeds from the charity concert will be donated to organisations supporting education in rural areas.
proceeds.zh: 慈善音乐会的收入将捐给支持农村教育的组织。

processed.en: All applications will be processed in the order they are received, and candidates will be notified within two weeks.
processed.zh: 所有申请将按收到顺序处理，考生将在两周内收到通知。

profession.zh: 教学是一份有意义的职业。

professor.en: The professor delivered a compelling lecture on climate change that inspired many students to pursue environmental research.
professor.zh: 这位教授发表了一场关于气候变化的精彩演讲，激发了许多学生从事环境研究。

proficiency.en: Her proficiency in English is excellent.

profile.en: Her social media profile shows her interests.
profile.zh: 她的社交媒体简介显示了她的兴趣爱好。

profit.en: The company made a big profit.
profit.zh: 这家公司获得了丰厚的利润。

profitable.en: The new business proved to be very profitable.
profitable.zh: 新业务被证明非常有利可图。

profits.zh: 这家公司获得了丰厚的利润。

profound.en: The discovery had a profound effect on science.
profound.zh: 这个发现对科学产生了深远的影响。

program.en: I will program the computer today.

progress.en: The students made significant progress this year.
progress.zh: 学生们今年取得了重大进步。

progressive.en: Progressive approaches to education that incorporate technology are transforming the way teachers deliver lessons.
progressive.zh: 融入技术的先进教育方法正在改变教师授课的方式。

prohibit.en: Many countries prohibit the use of mobile phones while driving to reduce the risk of traffic accidents.
prohibit.zh: 许多国家禁止在驾驶时使用手机，以减少交通事故的风险。

prohibit from.en: The strict dress code prohibits students from wearing casual clothing such as shorts and tank tops.
prohibit from.zh: 严格的着装规定禁止学生穿着短裤和背心等休闲服装。

project.en: Our team is working on a new project.
project.zh: 我们的团队正在做一个新项目。

projector.en: The teacher turned on the projector.

prolong.en: Regular exercise and a healthy diet can help prolong life expectancy and reduce the risk of chronic diseases.
prolong.zh: 经常锻炼和健康饮食可以帮助延长预期寿命并降低慢性病的风险。

prolonged.en: The drought caused a prolonged shortage.

prominent.en: She is a prominent scientist in the field of biology.
prominent.zh: 她是生物学领域一位杰出的科学家。

proposed.en: The government proposed new education policies.
proposed.zh: 政府提议了新的教育政策。

proposition.en: She made an interesting proposition at the meeting.
proposition.zh: 她在会议上提出了一个有趣的建议。

prose.en: Unlike poetry, prose typically follows conventional grammatical structures and flows in a natural narrative manner.
prose.zh: 与诗歌不同，散文通常遵循传统的语法结构，以自然的方式进行叙事。

prosecute.en: The government has decided to prosecute individuals found guilty of serious environmental violations in the region.
prosecute.zh: 政府已决定起诉在该地区犯下严重环境违法行为的人。

prospect.zh: 就业前景看起来很有希望。

prospective.en: Prospective employees must demonstrate both technical skills and strong interpersonal abilities during interviews.
prospective.zh: 未来的员工在面试中必须展示技术能力和良好的人际交往能力。

prospectus.en: Please read the course prospectus carefully.

prosper.en: Countries that invest heavily in renewable energy and education are likely to prosper in the coming decades.
prosper.zh: 在未来几十年，大力投资可再生能源和教育的国家可能会繁荣发展。

prosperity.en: Economic prosperity does not always correlate with increased happiness and life satisfaction among citizens.
prosperity.zh: 经济繁荣并不总是与公民幸福感和生活满意度的提高相关联。

prosperous.en: The prosperous coastal region has attracted significant foreign investment and created numerous employment opportunities.
prosperous.zh: 这个繁荣的沿海地区吸引了大量外国投资，创造了众多就业机会。

promise.en: I promise to finish the work on time.

promising.en: She is a promising young musician.
promising.zh: 她是一位有前途的年轻音乐家。

promote.en: The company wants to promote the new product.
promote.zh: 这家公司想推销新产品。

promoted.en: The team was promoted to the top league.
promoted.zh: 该队被晋级到顶级联赛。

promotion.en: He earned a promotion after two years.

prompt.en: The government should take prompt action to address climate change before the environmental damage becomes irreversible and affects future generations.
prompt.zh: 政府应该采取迅速行动应对气候变化，以免环境损害变得不可逆转并影响后代。

prompted.en: Curiosity prompted her to ask questions.
prompted.zh: 好奇心促使她提出问题。

promptly.en: The bus arrived at the station promptly.
promptly.zh: 公交车准时到达了车站。

prone.en: Children are prone to catching colds.

pronoun.en: Understanding the role of pronouns is essential for improving English writing skills, as they help avoid repetition and create more coherent sentences.
pronoun.zh: 理解代词的作用对于提高英语写作能力至关重要，因为它们有助于避免重复并创建更连贯的句子。

processes.en: The manufacturing processes have been streamlined to reduce waste and increase efficiency in factories worldwide.
processes.zh: 制造业的流程已经得到简化，以减少浪费并提高全球工厂的效率。

processing.en: Data processing requires sophisticated computer systems to analyze large volumes of information quickly and accurately.
processing.zh: 数据处理需要复杂的计算机系统来快速准确地分析大量信息。

procession.en: The royal procession moved slowly through the crowded streets as citizens gathered along the route to watch.
procession.zh: 皇家车队缓缓穿过拥挤的街道，公民们沿途聚集观看。

processors.zh: 快速的处理器提高电脑速度。

proclaim.en: The government should proclaim clear environmental policies to address pollution concerns affecting major urban areas.
proclaim.zh: 政府应该宣布明确的环境政策，以解决影响主要城市地区的污染问题。

procrastination.en: Procrastination often leads to poor results.
procrastination.zh: 拖延经常导致糟糕的结果。

produce.en: Factories produce thousands of goods daily.
produce.zh: 工厂每天生产数千种商品。

product.en: The new product launch was highly successful, exceeding initial sales expectations within the first quarter.
product.zh: 新产品的推出非常成功，在第一季度就超过了最初的销售预期。

production.en: Mass production of electronic devices has made technology more affordable for average consumers worldwide.
production.zh: 电子设备的大规模生产使技术对全球普通消费者来说更加负担得起。

productive.en: My colleague is very productive at work.
productive.zh: 我的同事工作很有成效。

prophet.en: Some economists have been described as prophets for accurately predicting the 2008 financial crisis before it occurred.
prophet.zh: 一些经济学家因准确预测2008年金融危机而被称为预言家。

proportion.en: A large proportion of students passed.
proportion.zh: 很大比例的学生通过了。

proportional.en: The voting power should be directly proportional to the population size of each region in a fair democratic system.
proportional.zh: 在公平的民主制度中，投票权应与每个地区的人口规模成正比。

proportionally.en: If the company increases its workforce, it should also increase its budget for training proportionally.
proportionally.zh: 如果公司增加员工，也应按比例增加培训预算。

proportionate.en: The punishment should be proportionate to the crime committed, ensuring that justice is served fairly and appropriately in all cases.
proportionate.zh: 惩罚应与所犯罪行相称，确保在所有案件中公平公正地伸张正义。

proportionately.en: Countries should contribute proportionately to international aid efforts based on their economic capabilities and available resources.
proportionately.zh: 各国应根据其经济能力和可用资源，按比例向国际援助工作作出贡献。

proportions.en: The problem has reached alarming proportions, requiring immediate action from governments and international organizations worldwide.
proportions.zh: 这个问题已达到惊人的规模，需要各国政府和国际组织立即采取行动。

proposal.en: The proposal was approved by the board.
proposal.zh: 该提案获得董事会批准。

propose.en: Many environmental experts and scientists propose that renewable energy sources should gradually replace fossil fuels to effectively combat climate change.
propose.zh: 许多环境专家和科学家建议，应逐步用可再生能源替代化石燃料，以有效应对气候变化。

pump.en: We need to pump water from the well.

pumped.en: He pumped water from the well.

pumpkin.en: In Western countries, children traditionally carve pumpkins into jack-o'-lanterns for Halloween celebrations.
pumpkin.zh: 在西方国家，孩子们传统上会在万圣节时把南瓜雕刻成杰克灯来庆祝。

punch.en: The boxer delivered a powerful punch that immediately knocked his opponent to the ground.
punch.zh: 拳击手打出了一记有力的直拳，立即将对手击倒在地。

punctual.en: Being punctual is highly valued in professional environments, as it demonstrates respect for others' time.
punctual.zh: 在职业环境中，守时是非常重要的，因为它体现了对他人时间的尊重。

punish.en: Some educators believe that teachers should not punish students for making honest mistakes.
punish.zh: 一些教育工作者认为，教师不应该因为学生犯了诚实的错误而惩罚他们。

punished.en: The company was severely punished for repeatedly violating environmental protection regulations.
punished.zh: 该公司因反复违反环境保护法规而受到严厉处罚。

pupil.en: Each pupil in the school is required to attend at least one extracurricular activity per week.
pupil.zh: 学校里的每个学生每周必须参加至少一项课外活动。

pupils.en: The young pupils learned to read.
pupils.zh: 年幼的学生们学习阅读。

puppet.en: Critics accused the new leader of being a puppet controlled by powerful business interests.
puppet.zh: 批评人士指责这位新领导人是被强大的商业利益集团控制的傀儡。

purchase.en: I will purchase the tickets online tonight.
purchase.zh: 我今晚会在网上购买票。

purchased.en: The university recently purchased new laboratory equipment to enhance students' practical learning experience significantly.
purchased.zh: 大学最近购买了新的实验室设备，以显著加强学生的实践学习体验。

purchaser.en: The purchaser should carefully examine all property documents before completing the transaction to avoid potential disputes.
purchaser.zh: 购买者应在完成交易前仔细检查所有房产文件，以避免潜在的纠纷。

purchasers.en: First-time home purchasers often face challenges navigating mortgage applications and understanding complex financial requirements.
purchasers.zh: 首次购房者经常在办理抵押贷款申请和理解复杂的财务要求时面临挑战。

purchases.en: Online purchases have increased dramatically over the past decade due to the convenience of digital shopping platforms.
purchases.zh: 由于数字购物平台的便利性，过去十年网上购物的数量急剧增加。

purchasing.en: Purchasing organic produce supports sustainable farming practices and promotes better health outcomes for consumers.
purchasing.zh: 购买有机农产品支持可持续农业实践，并促进消费者的健康。

pure.en: The water from this spring is very pure.
pure.zh: 这个泉眼的水非常纯净。

purely.en: The decision to study abroad was not purely academic; many students also seek cultural immersion and independence.
purely.zh: 出国学习的决定并非纯粹出于学术原因；许多学生也寻求文化沉浸和独立性。

purification.en: Water purification is essential for public health.
purification.zh: 水净化对公众健康至关重要。

purify.en: Indoor plants can naturally purify air quality by absorbing toxins and releasing oxygen into living spaces.
purify.zh: 室内植物可以通过吸收毒素并向生活空间释放氧气来自然净化空气质量。

protect.en: We should protect the endangered species.
protect.zh: 我们应该保护濒危物种。

protection.en: The helmet provides protection for the head.

protective.en: Parents naturally feel protective towards their children and want to ensure they grow up in a safe environment.
protective.zh: 父母对子女有自然的保护欲，希望确保他们在安全的环境中成长。

protein.en: Eggs contain a lot of protein.

protest.en: Thousands of workers gathered in the city center to protest against the proposed changes to employment laws.
protest.zh: 数以千计的工人在市中心聚集，抗议拟议中的劳动法修改。

protocol.en: Follow the safety protocol at work.
protocol.zh: 工作时要遵守安全协议。

prototype.en: Engineers developed a functional prototype to test the feasibility of the new renewable energy technology before mass production.
prototype.zh: 工程师们开发了一个功能原型，以便在大规模生产之前测试这项新能源技术的可行性。

proud.en: I am proud of my students.

prove.en: Scientists need to prove their hypothesis through rigorous experimentation and comprehensive data analysis before publication.
prove.zh: 科学家在发表之前，需要通过严格的实验和全面的数据分析来证明他们的假设。

proved.zh: 这个理论被证明是正确的。

pushed.en: He pushed the door open gently.

put.en: The university decided to put a new scholarship program in place to attract talented students.
put.zh: 这所大学决定实施一个新的奖学金项目以吸引优秀学生。

put away.en: It is wise to put away at least ten percent of your income as savings for the future.
put away.zh: 明智的做法是把至少百分之十的收入存起来以备将来使用。

put forward.en: Several experts put forward recommendations to improve the current education system.
put forward.zh: 几位专家提出了改善当前教育体系的建议。

put in.en: Please put in your request today.
put in.zh: 请在今天提交你的请求。

put off.en: Many people put off making important decisions because they fear making mistakes.
put off.zh: 许多人拖延做出重要决定，因为他们害怕犯错。

put on.en: She decided to put on her warm coat.
put on.zh: 她决定穿上暖和的外套。

put together.en: We need to put together a plan.
put together.zh: 我们需要制定一个计划。

put up with.en: Living in densely populated areas, residents often have to put up with traffic congestion and noise.
put up with.zh: 生活在人口密集地区，居民经常不得不忍受交通拥堵和噪音。

psychologist.en: The psychologist helped the patient cope with stress.
psychologist.zh: 心理学家帮助病人应对压力。

psychometric.en: The company uses psychometric tests for hiring.
psychometric.zh: 公司在招聘中使用心理测量测试。

pub.en: Let's meet at the pub after work.
pub.zh: 下班后我们在酒吧见面吧。

public.en: The public library is open now.

public health.en: Investments in public health campaigns have significantly reduced the spread of infectious diseases in developing countries.
public health.zh: 公共卫生运动的投资已大大减少了传染病在发展中国家的传播。

public transport system.en: The city has a good public transport system.
public transport system.zh: 这个城市有很好的公共交通系统。

publicity.en: The widespread publicity surrounding the celebrity scandal generated intense public debate about privacy and media ethics.
publicity.zh: 围绕名人丑闻的广泛报道引发了关于隐私和媒体伦理的激烈公众讨论。

publish.en: Academic researchers are under increasing pressure to publish their findings in high-impact journals to advance their careers.
publish.zh: 学术研究者面临越来越大压力，需要在高影响力期刊上发表他们的发现以推进职业发展。

purpose.en: My main purpose is to learn English.
purpose.zh: 我主要的目的是学习英语。

purse.en: She bought a new leather purse.
purse.zh: 她买了一个新的皮钱包。

pursue.en: He decided to pursue his dream career.
pursue.zh: 他决定追求他的梦想职业。

pursued.en: The detective pursued the suspect through several narrow alleyways before finally catching him near the train station.
pursued.zh: 侦探追捕嫌疑人穿过几条狭窄的小巷，最终在火车站附近将其抓获。

pursues.en: She pursues her passion for music by attending concerts regularly and practicing piano for several hours every day.
pursues.zh: 她通过定期参加音乐会和每天练习钢琴数小时来追求自己对音乐的热爱。

pursuing.en: The ambitious student is pursuing a master's degree in environmental science to directly address global climate change challenges.
pursuing.zh: 这位雄心勃勃的学生正在攻读环境科学硕士学位，以直接应对全球气候变化挑战。

pursuit.en: Her pursuit of knowledge never stopped.
pursuit.zh: 她对知识的追求从未停止。

pursuits.en: Her various artistic pursuits include painting, sculpting, and photography, which she practices diligently during her leisure time.
pursuits.zh: 她的各种艺术追求包括绘画、雕塑和摄影，她利用业余时间勤奋练习。

push.en: They push the door hard to open it.
push.zh: 他们用力推门想打开它。

published.en: The book was published last year.

publisher.en: The publisher rejected the initial proposal but offered constructive feedback on how the manuscript could be improved for future consideration.
publisher.zh: 出版商拒绝了最初的提案，但提供了建设性的反馈，说明如何改进手稿以供将来考虑。

publishers.zh: 出版商每年印刷许多书籍。

publishes.en: The prestigious university publishes a monthly magazine featuring groundbreaking research from its faculty members and notable alumni.
publishes.zh: 这所著名的大学每月出版一份杂志，介绍其教职员工和杰出校友的开创性研究成果。

publishing.en: She decided to pursue a career in publishing after gaining valuable internship experience at a leading literary agency in London.
publishing.zh: 在伦敦一家领先的文学代理公司获得宝贵的实习经验后，她决定从事出版事业。

pudding.en: Traditional sticky toffee pudding remains one of the most popular desserts in British restaurants, attracting both locals and international tourists.
pudding.zh: 传统的太妃糖布丁仍然是英国餐厅中最受欢迎的甜点之一，吸引着当地人和国际游客。

pull up.en: The bus driver suddenly pulled up at the roadside when he noticed a child running dangerously close to the moving traffic.
pull up.zh: 当注意到一个孩子危险地靠近行驶中的车辆时，公交车司机突然把车停在路边。

pulled.en: The child pulled his mother's hand while crossing.
pulled.zh: 过马路时，孩子拉着妈妈的手。

pulse.en: Medical professionals recommend checking your pulse regularly to monitor heart health and detect any irregularities at an early stage.
pulse.zh: 医疗专业人员建议定期检查脉搏，以监测心脏健康并在早期发现任何异常情况。

rafting.en: They went white-water rafting last summer.
rafting.zh: 去年夏天他们去玩激流漂流了。

rag.en: The cleaning staff used an old rag to wipe the dust off the classroom tables.
rag.zh: 清洁人员用一块旧抹布擦掉教室桌子上的灰尘。

rage.en: The manager's sudden rage at the employee was inappropriate and unprofessional.
rage.zh: 经理对员工突然发怒是不恰当的，也是不专业的。

raid.en: Police conducted a raid on the suspected drug operation early yesterday morning.
raid.zh: 警方昨天清晨对涉嫌毒品交易场所进行了突击搜查。

rail.en: Passengers must wait behind the yellow rail.
rail.zh: 乘客必须在黄色栏杆后面等候。

railroad.en: The cross-country railroad system connects major cities across the continent efficiently.
railroad.zh: 跨国铁路系统高效地连接了大陆各地的主要城市。

railway.en: The new railway opened last month.

rainbow.en: A beautiful rainbow appeared after the rain.
rainbow.zh: 雨后出现了一道美丽的彩虹。

raincoat.en: Remember to bring your raincoat tomorrow.

question.en: Before answering any question in the reading section, I always read the passage thoroughly to understand the context.
question.zh: 在回答阅读部分的任何问题之前，我总是仔细阅读文章以理解上下文。

queue.en: Students queue outside the library every morning.
queue.zh: 学生们每天早上在图书馆外面排队。

quiet.en: The library is usually very quiet.

quilt.en: The antique quilt displayed in the museum represents the cultural heritage and traditional craftsmanship of the region.
quilt.zh: 博物馆里展示的这床古董被子代表了该地区的文化遗产和传统工艺。

quit.en: She decided to quit her job last month.

quite.en: The remote village is quite isolated during winter months when heavy snow makes transportation extremely difficult.
quite.zh: 这个偏远的村庄在冬季月份相当封闭，因为大雪使交通变得极其困难。

quiver.en: Despite her nervousness during the interview, she managed to keep her voice steady without allowing it to quiver.
quiver.zh: 尽管面试时很紧张，她还是设法保持声音稳定，没有让它颤抖。

quantitative.zh: 这项研究使用定量方法。

quantities.en: Large quantities of food were wasted.

quantity.en: While quality is important, the sheer quantity of products manufactured daily is remarkable.
quantity.zh: 虽然质量很重要，但每天制造的 产品数量却相当惊人。

quarrel.en: The neighbors had a quarrel over the boundary line of their properties last week.
quarrel.zh: 上周邻居们因为房产边界线的问题发生了争吵。

quart.en: The recipe calls for a quart of milk to make the sauce properly.
quart.zh: 食谱要求加一夸脱牛奶才能正确制作酱汁。

quarter.en: A quarter of the students failed the exam.
quarter.zh: 四分之一的学生考试不及格。

quay.en: The ship docked at the busy quay.
quay.zh: 船停靠在这个繁忙的码头。

queen.en: The queen visited our school yesterday afternoon.
queen.zh: 女王昨天下午参观了我们的学校。

queer.en: The artist's queer interpretation of traditional themes challenged viewers' conventional perspectives.
queer.zh: 艺术家对传统主题的独特诠释挑战了观众 conventional 的视角。

quest.en: The quest for sustainable energy solutions has led to significant technological breakthroughs.
quest.zh: 对可持续能源解决方案的追求带来了重大的技术突破。

puzzle.en: This math puzzle is very difficult.

puzzled.en: The difficult math problem puzzled the students.
puzzled.zh: 这道难题让学生们困惑不解。

pyramid.en: Tourists visit the pyramid every day.

qualification.en: Having the right qualification is often the first step toward securing a desirable job in today's competitive market.
qualification.zh: 在当今竞争激烈的市场中，拥有合适的资质通常是获得理想工作的第一步。

qualifications.en: He has the right qualifications for this job.
qualifications.zh: 他具备这份工作所需的资格。

qualify.en: To qualify for the scholarship, applicants must demonstrate both academic excellence and financial need.
qualify.zh: 要获得奖学金，申请人必须展示学术卓越和经济需求。

qualitative.en: The study employed qualitative research methods to gain deeper insights into participants' personal experiences.
qualitative.zh: 该研究采用定性研究方法，以更深入地了解参与者的个人经历。

quantify.en: We need to quantify the results.

rainfall.en: Heavy rainfall caused flooding in the city.
rainfall.zh: 大雨导致城市发生洪水。

rainforest.en: The Amazon rainforest has amazing wildlife.
rainforest.zh: 亚马逊雨林有令人惊叹的野生动物。

rainforests.zh: 雨林有很多奇异的动物。

rainwater.en: Fresh rainwater is good for plants.

raise.en: The company will raise prices next month.
raise.zh: 公司下个月将提高价格。

raised.en: She raised her hand to answer the question.

rake.en: Before planting the new seedlings, the gardener used a rake to clear away dead leaves and debris.
rake.zh: 在种植新苗之前，园丁用耙子清除枯叶和杂物。

rally.en: Thousands of citizens gathered to rally in support of environmental protection policies proposed by the government.
rally.zh: 数千名公民聚集起来集会，支持政府提出的环境保护政策。

random.en: The numbers were chosen at random.
random.zh: 这些数字是随机选取的。

ranged.en: The survey responses ranged from strongly agree to strongly disagree, showing diverse public opinions.
ranged.zh: 调查回答从强烈同意到强烈不同意不等，显示出公众意见的多样性。

quota.en: Many countries have implemented immigration quotas to manage the number of people entering their borders each year.
quota.zh: 许多国家实施了移民配额来管理每年进入其边境的人数。

quotations.en: The article includes many famous quotations.
quotations.zh: 这篇文章引用了许多名言。

quote.en: You should quote the author in your essay.
quote.zh: 你应该在论文中引用作者的话。

rabbit.en: The study found that rabbits bred in captivity develop different behavioral patterns compared to those living in the wild.
rabbit.zh: 研究发现，在笼中饲养的兔子与野生兔子表现出不同的行为模式。

race.en: The runners prepared for the final race.

races.en: The car races started on time.

racial.en: Laws against racial discrimination have been strengthened in many countries to promote greater equality in society.
racial.zh: 许多国家加强了反种族歧视的法律，以促进社会更大的平等。

racism.en: Racism is a serious problem in many countries.
racism.zh: 种族主义在许多国家都是一个严重问题。

rack.en: The clothing rack in the store displayed a wide range of winter jackets for customers to choose from.
rack.zh: 商店里的衣架展示了一系列冬季夹克供顾客选择。

ranges.en: The price ranges from $50 to $500 depending on the quality, brand and origin of the product.
ranges.zh: 产品的价格从50美元到500美元不等，取决于质量、品牌和产地。

ranging.en: The participants, ranging from university students to retired professionals, shared diverse perspectives on healthcare reform.
ranging.zh: 参与者从大学生到退休专业人士不等，对医疗改革发表了不同的观点。

rank.en: Many sociologists argue that wealth should not rank as the sole measure of an individual's social status.
rank.zh: 许多社会学家认为，财富不应该被视为衡量个人社会地位的唯一标准。

ranked.en: She ranked first in the exam.

ranking.en: She is ranking the students by their scores.
ranking.zh: 她正在按分数给学生排名。

rap.en: Hip-hop and rap music have become increasingly popular among young people worldwide, influencing fashion and language.
rap.zh: 嘻哈和说唱音乐在全世界年轻人中越来越受欢迎，影响了时尚和语言。

rapid.zh: 快速增长让每个人都惊讶。

rare.en: This rare bird can only be seen here.
rare.zh: 这种珍稀鸟类只能在这里看到。

rarely.en: She rarely eats fast food these days.

racket.en: He bought a new tennis racket.

radar.en: The new surveillance system operates like a radar, detecting movement and objects within a wide area with remarkable precision.
radar.zh: 新的监控系统像雷达一样运作，以卓越的精度探测大范围内的移动和物体。

radiate.en: Heat radiates from the central heating system throughout the entire building during the cold winter months.
radiate.zh: 在寒冷的冬季，热量从中央供暖系统散发到整栋建筑。

radical.zh: 这个计划需要彻底改变。

radically.en: The internet has radically transformed the way people access information and communicate with each other globally.
radically.zh: 互联网彻底改变了人们获取信息和与全球各地的人交流的方式。

radio.en: I listen to the radio every morning.

radioactive.en: The government faced criticism over the safe disposal of radioactive waste from the nuclear power plant.
radioactive.zh: 政府因核电站放射性废物的安全处理问题而受到批评。

radiocarbon.en: Scientists used radiocarbon to date the ancient bones.
radiocarbon.zh: 科学家用放射性碳来测定古代骨骼的年代。

radius.en: The search party expanded their radius to ten kilometers to ensure they covered all possible areas where the hiker could be.
radius.zh: 搜救队将搜索范围扩大到十公里，以确保覆盖徒步旅行者可能所在的所有区域。

receiver.en: The telephone receiver on the old rotary phone was heavy and required effort to hold during long conversations.
receiver.zh: 那台老式旋转电话的听筒很重在长时间通话时需要用力握住。

recent.en: In recent years there has been a significant increase in the number of international students choosing to study abroad.
recent.zh: 近年来选择出国留学的国际学生数量显著增加。

reception.en: The wedding reception was held in the garden.

receptionist.en: The receptionist welcomed us warmly at the hotel.
receptionist.zh: 酒店接待员热情地欢迎了我们。

receptive.en: A receptive attitude towards new ideas and different cultures is essential for anyone planning to work abroad.
receptive.zh: 对新的想法和不同的文化持开放的态度对于计划在国外工作的人是必不可少的。

recession.en: During the global recession many companies were forced to downsize and reduce their workforce significantly.
recession.zh: 在全球经济衰退期间许多公司被迫裁员并大幅减少员工数量。

recipe.en: Following a traditional family recipe she prepared a delicious three-course meal for her guests on Sunday evening.
recipe.zh: 按照传统的家庭食谱她在周日晚上为客人准备了一顿美味的三道菜晚餐。

recipes.zh: 她收集了许多家庭食谱。

recipient.en: The scholarship recipient was required to submit a detailed progress report outlining their academic achievements.
recipient.zh: 奖学金获得者需要提交一份详细的进度报告，概述他们的学业成就。

reciprocal.en: The two universities established a reciprocal exchange programme allowing students to study abroad for one year.
reciprocal.zh: 这两所大学建立了一个互惠交换项目，允许学生出国学习一年。

recitation.en: The English teacher organised a poetry recitation competition to help students improve their pronunciation and confidence.
recitation.zh: 英语老师组织了一场诗歌朗诵比赛，以帮助学生提高发音和自信心。

recite.en: Candidates who can recite key definitions accurately will demonstrate a thorough understanding of the subject matter.
recite.zh: 能够准确背诵关键定义的学生将展示对该学科的深入理解。

reckless.en: Reckless construction practices have caused significant damage to historical buildings in many developing countries.
reckless.zh: 鲁莽的建筑施工方式已经对许多发展中国家的历史建筑造成了重大破坏。

reckon.en: I reckon the project will succeed.
reckon.zh: 我认为这个项目会成功。

recognise.en: I could not recognise my old teacher.

recognised.zh: 他的工作获得了国际认可。

recognition.en: She received recognition for her work.

recognize.en: We must recognize that effective environmental policies require collaboration between governments, businesses, and citizens.
recognize.zh: 我们必须认识到，有效的环境政策需要政府、企业和公民之间的合作。

realm.en: In the digital realm, young people are increasingly exposed to various perspectives from around the world.
realm.zh: 在数字领域，年轻人越来越容易接触到来自世界各地的不同观点。

realms.en: Students explore different realms of science.
realms.zh: 学生探索不同的科学领域。

reap.en: Students who dedicate time to regular practice will ultimately reap the benefits of improved language proficiency.
reap.zh: 那些投入时间进行定期练习的学生最终将获得语言能力提高的好处。

rear.en: Please meet me at the rear of the building.
rear.zh: 请在大楼后面和我见面。

reasonable.en: The price seems reasonable to me.
reasonable.zh: 这个价格对我来说很合理。

reassess.en: Governments should regularly reassess their policies to ensure they remain effective in addressing current challenges.
reassess.zh: 政府应定期重新评估其政策，以确保它们在应对当前挑战时保持有效。

reassessed.en: The value of the property was reassessed after significant improvements were made to the neighborhood.
reassessed.zh: 在社区进行了重大改善之后，房产价值被重新评估了。

reassessing.en: Many companies are currently reassessing their strategies in light of changing market conditions.
reassessing.zh: 鉴于市场条件的变化，许多公司正在重新评估其战略。

reassessment.en: A comprehensive reassessment of the education system is necessary to meet the demands of the 21st century.
reassessment.zh: 对教育系统进行全面重新评估对于满足21世纪的需求是必要的。

ray.en: A ray of light came through the window.
ray.zh: 一道光线从窗户照进来。

razor.en: The invention of the safety razor in the 20th century revolutionised personal grooming practices worldwide.
razor.zh: 20世纪安全剃须刀的发明彻底改变了全球个人护理的习惯。

reach.en: The train will reach the station soon.
reach.zh: 火车很快就会到达车站。

react.en: She did not react to the news.
react.zh: 她对这个消息没有反应。

reacted.en: The stock market reacted violently to the unexpected announcement, with prices falling dramatically within hours.
reacted.zh: 股市对这一意外的公告反应剧烈，价格在几小时内大幅下跌。

reacting.en: Instead of reacting impulsively to criticism, political leaders should take time to evaluate the merits of the argument.
reacting.zh: 政治领袖不应冲动地对批评做出反应，而应该花时间评估论点的价值。

reaction.en: His quick reaction saved the child.
reaction.zh: 他迅速的反应救了这个孩子。

reactionaries.en: Throughout history, reactionaries have consistently opposed social reforms that threaten established hierarchical structures.
reactionaries.zh: 纵观历史，反动派一直反对威胁既定等级制度的社会改革。

reactionary.en: Critics argue that the education minister's policies represent a reactionary approach that undermines progressive values.
reactionary.zh: 批评者认为教育部长的政策代表了一种损害进步价值观的反动做法。

reactions.en: Her reactions to the news were surprising.
reactions.zh: 她对这个消息的反应令人惊讶。

readinglist.en: I added this book to my readinglist.
readinglist.zh: 我把这本书加入了我的阅读清单。

real.en: This is a real diamond ring.

realise.zh: 我终于认识到自己的错误了。

realism.en: The painter is known for his realism style.
realism.zh: 这位画家以现实主义风格著称。

realistic.en: Students should set realistic goals for their studies to ensure they can achieve them without excessive stress or pressure.
realistic.zh: 学生应该为学习设定现实的目标，以确保他们能够在没有过度压力的情况下实现这些目标。

reality.en: We must face the reality of the situation.
reality.zh: 我们必须面对情况的现实。

realize.en: I did not realize how challenging the writing task would be until I actually started working on it.
realize.zh: 直到我真正开始写作任务时，我才意识到它有多困难。

really.en: The new environmental policy has really changed public attitudes towards sustainable development in the country.
really.zh: 新的环境政策真正改变了国民对可持续发展的态度。

rascal.en: The young boy in the story was depicted as a rascal who constantly played tricks on his neighbors but eventually learned important lessons about honesty.
rascal.zh: 故事里的这个小男孩被描绘成一个调皮鬼，经常捉弄邻居，但最终学会了诚实的重要性。

rat.en: The research facility uses rats to test new medications before they can be approved for human use in clinical trials.
rat.zh: 该研究机构使用老鼠来测试新药物，然后才能在临床试验中获批用于人体。

rather.en: The weather is rather cold today.

rather than.en: She chose study rather than travel.
rather than.zh: 她选择学习而不是旅行。

ratio.en: The ratio of students to computers in many underfunded schools is far below the recommended international standard.
ratio.zh: 许多资金不足的学校中学生与电脑的比例远低于国际推荐标准。

rational.en: A rational approach to environmental protection requires balancing economic development with conservation efforts.
rational.zh: 理性的环境保护方法需要在经济发展与保护工作之间取得平衡。

rationally.en: She should think rationally about this problem.
rationally.zh: 她应该理性地考虑这个问题。

raw.en: Many developing nations rely on exporting raw materials rather than finished goods, which limits their potential for significant economic growth and stability.
raw.zh: 许多发展中国家依赖出口原材料而不是成品，这限制了它们显著经济增长和稳定的潜力。

raw materials.en: Factories need raw materials to make products.
raw materials.zh: 工厂需要原材料来制造产品。

reactive.en: Children are often reactive to changes in their environment, adapting quickly when circumstances shift unexpectedly.
reactive.zh: 孩子们通常对环境变化反应灵敏，能在情况意外变化时迅速适应。

reactivity.en: The reactivity of certain chemicals requires careful handling and proper storage procedures in laboratories.
reactivity.zh: 某些化学物质的反应性需要在实验室中小心处理和适当的储存程序。

reactor.en: The government announced plans to build a new nuclear reactor to meet increasing energy demands.
reactor.zh: 政府宣布计划建造新的核反应堆以满足日益增长的能源需求。

reacts.en: She reacts calmly to stress, which makes her an excellent team leader during crisis situations.
reacts.zh: 她面对压力时反应冷静，这使她成为危机期间的出色团队领导者。

read.en: I read extensively about climate change before writing my essay on environmental policy reform.
read.zh: 在写关于环境政策改革的论文之前，我广泛阅读了有关气候变化的资料。

read about.en: I read about the new policy.
read about.zh: 我阅读了关于新政策的内容。

reader.en: A skilled reader can extract key information quickly and identify the author's main argument efficiently.
reader.zh: 熟练的读者能够快速提取关键信息，并有效地识别作者的主要论点。

readers.en: The readers love this popular magazine.
readers.zh: 读者们喜爱这本流行杂志。

readily.en: She readily agreed to help her classmate.
readily.zh: 她欣然同意帮助她的同学。

reading.zh: 阅读是我最喜欢的爱好。

reassure.en: The teacher tried to reassure the anxious students that the upcoming exam was not as difficult as they feared it would be.
reassure.zh: 老师试图安慰那些焦虑的学生，让他们相信即将到来的考试并没有他们担心的那么难。

reassuring.en: Her reassuring words made me feel calm.
reassuring.zh: 她令人安心的话让我平静下来。

rebel.en: Some young people tend to rebel against traditional values and seek alternative lifestyles that differ from their parents' expectations.
rebel.zh: 一些年轻人往往会对传统价值观产生反叛心理，寻求与父母期望不同的另类生活方式。

rebellion.en: The historical rebellion against colonial rule inspired many subsequent independence movements throughout the developing world.
rebellion.zh: 历史上反抗殖民统治的起义激发了发展中世界许多后来的独立运动。

rebuilding.en: The city is rebuilding homes after the earthquake.
rebuilding.zh: 地震后这座城市正在重建房屋。

recall.en: I cannot recall his name right now.
recall.zh: 我现在想不起他的名字。

recalls.en: He recalls his school days often.

recede.en: As the floodwaters began to recede, residents cautiously started returning to their homes to assess the extensive damage.
recede.zh: 随着洪水开始退去，居民们谨慎地开始返回家园评估严重的损失。

receipt.en: Please keep your receipt for warranty purposes.
receipt.zh: 请保留好收据以便享受保修服务。

receive.en: I will receive my test results tomorrow.
receive.zh: 我明天会收到考试成绩。

refuse.en: Many job applicants refuse to answer personal questions during interviews because they fear discrimination.
refuse.zh: 许多求职者在面试时拒绝回答个人问题，因为他们害怕受到歧视。

refused.en: He refused to answer the question.

refute.en: Researchers must carefully design experiments to refute existing theories and provide stronger evidence for new ones.
refute.zh: 研究人员必须仔细设计实验来反驳现有理论，并为新理论提供更有力的证据。

regard.en: Most educators regard critical thinking skills as fundamental to student success in higher education.
regard.zh: 大多数教育工作者认为批判性思维能力是学生在高等教育中取得成功的根本。

regarded.en: She is regarded as the best teacher.
regarded.zh: 她被认为是最优秀的老师。

regarding.en: The professor provided extensive feedback regarding the thesis structure and citation methods.
regarding.zh: 教授就论文结构和引用方法提供了大量反馈。

regardless.en: He went ahead regardless of the risks.

regardless of.en: Everyone should succeed regardless of their background.
regardless of.zh: 无论背景如何，每个人都应该成功。

regenerate.en: The forest can regenerate after a fire.
regenerate.zh: 森林在火灾后可以再生。

regime.en: The new environmental protection regime requires all factories to reduce their carbon emissions by fifty percent.
regime.zh: 新的环境保护制度要求所有工厂将碳排放量减少百分之五十。

recorder.en: The data recorder on the weather station has been monitoring temperature changes for over a decade.
recorder.zh: 气象站的数据记录器已经监测温度变化超过十年了。

recording.en: I played the recording for my students.
recording.zh: 我给学生们播放了录音。

records.en: Historical records suggest that climate patterns have significantly influenced agricultural development.
records.zh: 历史记录表明，气候模式对农业发展产生了重大影响。

recover.en: He needs time to recover from surgery.
recover.zh: 他需要时间从手术中恢复。

recovery.en: The patient made a quick recovery.

recreation.en: Swimming is my favorite recreation after work.
recreation.zh: 游泳是我下班后最喜欢的娱乐活动。

recreational.en: The park offers many recreational activities for children.
recreational.zh: 这个公园为孩子们提供许多娱乐活动。

recruit.en: The organisation aims to recruit volunteers from diverse backgrounds to promote social inclusion.
recruit.zh: 该组织旨在招募不同背景的志愿者，以促进社会包容。

recruitment.en: The company started a new recruitment campaign.
recruitment.zh: 公司开始了新的招聘活动。

recruits.zh: 公司录用了三名新员工。

rectangle.en: The architect designed a building with a distinctive rectangular shape that maximises the use of office space.
rectangle.zh: 建筑师设计了一座具有独特矩形形状的建筑，以最大限度地利用办公空间。

rectangular.en: The table has a rectangular shape.

rectify.en: Governments must take immediate action to rectify the environmental damage caused by industrial pollution.
rectify.zh: 政府必须立即采取行动来纠正工业污染造成的环境损害。

recur.en: Similar problems tend to recur when adequate preventive measures are not implemented in time.
recur.zh: 当没有及时采取适当的预防措施时，类似的问题往往会再次发生。

recyclable.en: Many manufacturers now prioritise recyclable materials to reduce their environmental footprint.
recyclable.zh: 许多制造商现在优先使用可回收材料以减少对环境的影响。

recyclables.en: Please sort recyclables into the blue bin.
recyclables.zh: 请把可回收物放进蓝色垃圾桶。

recycle.en: The local council provides special bins for residents to recycle paper, plastic and glass products.
recycle.zh: 地方议会为居民提供专用垃圾桶，以回收纸张、塑料和玻璃制品。

recycled.en: Please put the recycled paper in the bin.
recycled.zh: 请把回收的纸张放进垃圾箱。

recycling.zh: 回收利用有助于保护环境。

refrain.en: During the formal presentation, audience members were asked to refrain from making any comments until the Q&A session.
refrain.zh: 在正式演讲期间，观众被要求在问答环节之前不要发表任何评论。

refresh.en: Students should refresh their memory of basic concepts by reviewing notes before attending the advanced workshop.
refresh.zh: 学生应该在参加高级研讨会前通过复习笔记来更新对基本概念的记忆。

refreshment.en: After the exhausting examination period, a week of vacation provided much-needed refreshment for the exhausted students.
refreshment.zh: 在紧张的考试期结束后，一周的假期为疲惫的学生提供了急需的休整。

refreshments.en: Refreshments will be served after the meeting.
refreshments.zh: 会议结束后将提供茶点。

refrigeration.en: Refrigeration extends the shelf life of food.
refrigeration.zh: 冷藏延长了食物的保质期。

refrigerator.en: Most modern households rely heavily on refrigerators to preserve fresh produce and prevent food from spoiling.
refrigerator.zh: 大多数现代家庭严重依赖冰箱来保鲜农产品并防止食物变质。

refuge.en: The old barn became a refuge for the lost hikers.
refuge.zh: 那座旧谷仓成了迷路徒步者的避难所。

refugee.en: The government has established new policies to help refugees integrate more successfully into the local community.
refugee.zh: 政府已经制定了新政策，以帮助难民更成功地融入当地社区。

refund.en: I asked for a full refund.

refusal.en: Despite the manager's initial refusal to consider flexible working hours, the proposal was eventually approved.
refusal.zh: 尽管经理最初拒绝考虑弹性工作时间，该提案最终还是获得了批准。

reeds.en: Birds hid among the tall reeds.
reeds.zh: 鸟儿藏身在高大的芦苇丛中。

reefs.en: Divers explored the beautiful coral reefs.
reefs.zh: 潜水员探索了美丽的珊瑚礁。

refectory.en: Students eat lunch in the refectory.

refer to.en: Please refer to the manual for instructions.

referee.en: The referee made a controversial decision during the football final that sparked intense debate among spectators.
referee.zh: 裁判在足球决赛中做出一个有争议的判罚，引发了观众们的激烈争论。

reference.en: Let me check the reference book first.

reference books.en: The library has many useful reference books.
reference books.zh: 图书馆有许多有用的参考书。

reference room.en: The reference room on the third floor provides computers and databases for students to search scholarly resources.
reference room.zh: 三楼的参考资料室为学生提供电脑和数据库，以便搜索学术资源。

references.en: Please include three references in your job application.
references.zh: 请在求职申请中包含三封介绍信。

referred.en: The teacher referred students to the library.
referred.zh: 老师让学生去图书馆查阅资料。

refine.en: Scientists must refine their experimental methods to obtain more accurate and reliable results in future studies.
refine.zh: 科学家必须改进他们的实验方法，以在未来的研究中获得更准确和可靠的结果。

refined.en: Many processed foods contain refined sugars that contribute to health problems such as obesity and diabetes.
refined.zh: 许多加工食品含有精制糖，这些糖会导致肥胖和糖尿病等健康问题。

reflect.en: The lake can reflect the mountains.

reflected.en: The survey reflected public opinion clearly.
reflected.zh: 调查清楚地反映了公众意见。

reflection.en: The essay shows deep reflection on the topic.
reflection.zh: 这篇文章对这个主题进行了深刻反思。

reflex.en: The body's natural reflex responses allow humans to protect themselves from sudden environmental dangers.
reflex.zh: 身体的自然反射反应使人类能够保护自己免受突然的环境危险。

reforestation.en: Reforestation programs have shown positive results.
reforestation.zh: 再造林项目已经显示出积极成果。

reform.en: The government introduced economic reform last year.
reform.zh: 政府去年推出了经济改革。

refraction.en: The refraction of light through a prism creates the spectrum of colors visible in a rainbow.
refraction.zh: 光通过棱镜的折射产生了彩虹中可见的光谱颜色。

recollect.en: I recollect that my grandmother used to tell stories about her childhood during the war, which fascinated me greatly.
recollect.zh: 我记得我的祖母过去常常给我讲她童年时期战争年代的故事，这让我非常着迷。

recommend.en: I recommend this book to all readers.
recommend.zh: 我向所有读者推荐这本书。

reconcile.en: It is often difficult for former rivals to reconcile their differences after years of bitter competition and mutual distrust.
reconcile.zh: 曾经的对手在经历多年的激烈竞争和相互不信任后，往往很难化解彼此的分歧。

reconciliation.en: The reconciliation between the two neighboring countries required many years of diplomatic negotiations and genuine mutual understanding.
reconciliation.zh: 这两个邻国之间的和解需要多年的外交谈判和真诚的相互理解。

reconstruct.en: They are trying to reconstruct the historical building.
reconstruct.zh: 他们正在尝试重建那座历史建筑。

reconstructed.en: The historical building was carefully reconstructed using traditional materials and techniques to preserve its original architectural features.
reconstructed.zh: 这座历史建筑使用传统材料和技术进行了精心重建，以保留其原有的建筑特色。

reconstruction.en: The reconstruction of the damaged city after the earthquake took several years and required substantial international aid and funding.
reconstruction.zh: 地震后受损城市的重建工作历时数年，需要大量的国际援助和资金支持。

record.en: She keeps a record of her expenses.

red.en: She chose a red dress for the event.
red.zh: 她选了一件红色的连衣裙去参加活动。

redeem.en: Many argue that education programs can help redeem young offenders by teaching them valuable skills and preparing them for future employment opportunities.
redeem.zh: 许多人认为教育项目可以通过教授他们宝贵的技能和为他们未来的就业机会做准备来帮助拯救年轻的罪犯。

redefine.en: Modern technology has forced educators to redefine their teaching methods to accommodate students' changing learning preferences and digital habits.
redefine.zh: 现代技术迫使教育工作者重新定义他们的教学方法，以适应学生不断变化的学习偏好和数字习惯。

redefined.en: The traditional boundaries between work and personal life have been redefined by the widespread adoption of smartphones and remote working arrangements.
redefined.zh: 传统的工作与个人生活界限已被智能手机的广泛采用和远程工作安排的普及重新定义。

redefining.en: E-commerce platforms are continuously redefining how retailers approach customer service, inventory management, and overall marketing strategies in modern markets.
redefining.zh: 电子商务平台正在不断重新定义零售商如何在现代市场中处理客户服务、库存管理和整体营销策略。

redevelopment.en: The ambitious redevelopment project in the city center aims to transform abandoned warehouses into modern housing complexes and vibrant shopping districts.
redevelopment.zh: 市中心雄心勃勃的重新开发项目旨在将废弃的仓库改造成现代住宅区和充满活力的购物区。

reduction.en: There was a significant reduction in costs.

redundant.en: The automation of routine administrative tasks has made many clerical positions redundant, forcing workers to acquire new skills or seek employment in different sectors.
redundant.zh: 日常行政任务的自动化使许多文书职位变得多余，迫使工人获取新技能或在不同的行业寻找就业机会。

reed.en: The reed beds along the riverbank provide essential habitats for various species of waterfowl and help filter harmful pollutants from the water supply.
reed.zh: 河岸边的芦苇床为各种水鸟提供重要的栖息地，并帮助过滤供水中的有害污染物。

reinforcement.en: Positive reinforcement is widely considered an effective method for encouraging desired behavior in children at school.
reinforcement.zh: 积极强化法被广泛认为是鼓励儿童在学校养成良好行为的有效方法。

reintroduced.en: The minister reintroduced the bill to parliament.

reintroduction.en: The reintroduction of wolves helped the ecosystem.
reintroduction.zh: 重新引入狼群有助于生态系统。

relapse.en: The patient had a dangerous relapse.
relapse.zh: 病人经历了一次危险的复发。

relate.en: It can be difficult for students to relate abstract theories to real-world situations without practical examples from their teachers.
relate.zh: 如果没有老师提供实际例子，学生很难将抽象理论与现实情况联系起来。

relate to.en: Does this topic relate to your research?
relate to.zh: 这个话题与你的研究有关吗？

related.en: Health and diet are closely related topics.
related.zh: 健康与饮食是密切相关的话题。

relation.en: There is no relation between them.

relations.zh: 良好的关系在商业中很重要。

regimes.en: Many authoritarian regimes have faced international criticism for human rights violations over the past decades.
regimes.zh: 许多专制政权在过去几十年里因侵犯人权而面临国际批评。

region.en: The mountain region has clean air.

regionally.en: The charity organization operates regionally, providing aid to communities across different states.
regionally.zh: 这个慈善机构在区域范围内运作，为不同州的社区提供援助。

regions.en: Different regions have developed unique cultural identities shaped by their historical backgrounds and climates.
regions.zh: 不同地区由于历史背景和气候条件形成了独特的文化特征。

register.en: Students must register for the course.
register.zh: 学生必须注册这门课程。

registered.en: The property was officially registered under the new owner's name after completing all legal procedures.
registered.zh: 在完成所有法律程序后，该房产已正式登记在新业主名下。

registering.en: The university is currently registering students for the upcoming semester's language proficiency courses.
registering.zh: 这所大学目前正在为即将到来的学期的语言能力课程进行学生注册。

registers.en: The temperature in this area often registers above 35 degrees during the peak summer months.
registers.zh: 该地区在夏季高峰期的温度经常超过35度。

registrar.en: The university registrar processed over five thousand enrollment applications during the admission period.
registrar.zh: 大学注册主任在招生期间处理了五千多份入学申请。

release.en: They will release the new album soon.
release.zh: 他们很快将发布新专辑。

released.en: The new app was released last month.
released.zh: 新应用在上个月发布了。

relevance.en: Many students question the relevance of studying classical literature when they need practical job skills.
relevance.zh: 许多学生质疑学习古典文学的相关性，因为他们需要实用的工作技能。

relevant.en: Please find relevant information for your research.
relevant.zh: 请为你的研究找到相关信息。

reliability.en: The reliability of this machine is very high.
reliability.zh: 这台机器的可靠性非常高。

reliable.en: He is a reliable and honest person.
reliable.zh: 他是一个可靠且诚实的人。

reliably.en: Modern technology can reliably predict weather patterns several days in advance with remarkable accuracy.
reliably.zh: 现代技术能够可靠地以显著的准确性提前几天预测天气模式。

reliance.en: Our reliance on technology is increasing.
reliance.zh: 我们对技术的依赖正在增加。

reliant.en: Rural communities in developing countries remain heavily reliant on agriculture as their primary source of income.
reliant.zh: 发展中国家的农村社区仍然严重依赖农业作为主要收入来源。

relied.en: Early human civilizations relied on natural resources such as rivers and forests to meet their basic survival needs.
relied.zh: 早期人类文明依赖河流和森林等自然资源来满足基本生存需求。

relocation.en: The relocation of the company's headquarters to a new city created uncertainty among employees who worried about commuting distances and housing costs.
relocation.zh: 公司将总部迁至新城市的做法给员工带来了不确定性，他们担心通勤距离和住房成本。

reluctance.en: Despite clear evidence supporting the policy change, there remains considerable reluctance among policymakers to implement the reforms.
reluctance.zh: 尽管有明确的证据支持政策变革，政策制定者在实施改革方面仍存在相当大的抵触情绪。

reluctant.en: He was reluctant to accept the job offer at first.
reluctant.zh: 起初他不愿意接受这份工作邀请。

rely.en: You can rely on my support.

rely on.en: Small businesses rely on local customers.

relying.en: By relying on renewable energy sources such as solar and wind power, countries can significantly reduce their carbon footprint.
relying.zh: 通过依赖太阳能和风能等可再生能源，各国可以显著减少其碳足迹。

remainder.en: After allocating funds to healthcare and education, the government spent the remainder of the budget on infrastructure development.
remainder.zh: 在将资金分配给医疗保健和教育之后，政府将剩余预算用于基础设施建设。

remark.en: During the conference, the scientist made an interesting remark about how climate patterns have shifted over the past decade.
remark.zh: 在会议期间，这位科学家就过去十年气候模式如何变化发表了一个有趣的评论。

remarkable.en: She showed remarkable courage during the crisis.
remarkable.zh: 她在危机中表现出非凡的勇气。

relief.zh: 这个消息带来了极大的宽慰。

relies.en: The success of any business relies heavily on its ability to adapt to changing market conditions and consumer preferences.
relies.zh: 任何企业的成功在很大程度上取决于其适应不断变化的市场条件和消费者偏好的能力。

relieve.en: The medicine helped relieve his headache.
relieve.zh: 药物帮助缓解了他的头痛。

relieved.en: The student felt relieved after the exam.
relieved.zh: 那个学生考完试后感到宽慰。

religion.en: Religion plays an important role in her life.
religion.zh: 宗教在她的生活中扮演重要角色。

religious.en: She attends religious services every Sunday.
religious.zh: 她每周日参加宗教仪式。

relish.en: Elderly people often relish the opportunity to share their life experiences and wisdom with younger generations.
relish.zh: 老年人通常乐于与年轻一代分享他们的人生经验和智慧。

relocate.en: Due to economic restructuring, many workers will need to relocate to different regions where new employment opportunities are available.
relocate.zh: 由于经济重组，许多工人将需要搬迁到有新的就业机会的不同地区。

relocated.en: After the factory was relocated to a suburban area, local residents complained about the increased traffic and environmental concerns.
relocated.zh: 工厂搬迁到郊区后，当地居民抱怨交通增加和环境问题。

relocating.en: Relocating to a foreign country for work requires careful consideration of cultural differences, language barriers, and family adjustments.
relocating.zh: 为了工作搬迁到外国需要仔细考虑文化差异、语言障碍和家庭适应问题。

regret.en: I deeply regret not having studied harder for the examination when I had sufficient time available.
regret.zh: 我深感遗憾的是，在有足够时间的时候没有更加努力学习备考。

regular.en: We have regular meetings every week.

regulate.en: The government must regulate traffic safety rules.
regulate.zh: 政府必须管理交通安全规则。

regulated.en: The government has regulated the industry carefully.
regulated.zh: 政府仔细管制了这个行业。

regulates.en: The hormone insulin regulates blood sugar levels in the human body through a complex process of glucose management.
regulates.zh: 胰岛素激素通过复杂的葡萄糖管理过程调节人体内的血糖水平。

regulating.en: Regulating traffic flow in major cities requires careful urban planning and sophisticated technological infrastructure.
regulating.zh: 管理大城市的交通流量需要精心规划的城市设计和复杂的科技基础设施。

regulation.en: The new regulation starts next month.

regulations.en: New safety regulations were introduced last month.
regulations.zh: 上个月出台了新的安全条例。

regulator.en: The independent energy regulator monitors prices to ensure fair competition among utility companies in the market.
regulator.zh: 独立的能源监管机构监控价格，以确保市场上公用事业公司之间的公平竞争。

regulators.en: Environmental regulators have implemented stricter guidelines to control industrial pollution and protect natural ecosystems.
regulators.zh: 环境监管机构已经实施了更严格的准则来控制工业污染并保护自然生态系统。

regulatory.en: The regulatory body issued new guidelines.
regulatory.zh: 监管机构发布了新的指导方针。

rehearsal.en: Regular rehearsal of presentation skills can significantly improve students' confidence and academic performance.
rehearsal.zh: 定期排练演讲技巧能显著提高学生的信心和学业表现。

rehearsing.en: The actors are rehearsing for the play.
rehearsing.zh: 演员们正在排练这出戏剧。

reign.en: The reign of the Tudor dynasty lasted for over a century and fundamentally shaped English political development.
reign.zh: 都铎王朝的统治持续了一个多世纪，从根本上塑造了英格兰的政治发展。

reigns.en: The king reigns over his kingdom.

rein.en: The government must rein in excessive consumer spending to prevent economic instability and inflation.
rein.zh: 政府必须控制过度的消费者支出，以防止经济不稳定和通货膨胀。

reinforce.en: Schools should reinforce the importance of environmental awareness through practical conservation activities.
reinforce.zh: 学校应该通过实际的保护活动来加强环境意识的重要性。

reinforced.en: The army reinforced its position at the border.
reinforced.zh: 军队加强了边境的阵地。

replacement.en: I bought a replacement for my old bag.
replacement.zh: 我买了一个新包来替代旧的。

replicate.en: The study tried to replicate earlier results.
replicate.zh: 这项研究试图复制早期的结果。

replied.en: The government spokesperson replied to journalists' questions about the new environmental policy during the conference.
replied.zh: 政府发言人在会议期间回答了记者们关于新环境政策的问题。

reply.en: I will reply to your email soon.
reply.zh: 我会尽快回复你的邮件。

reporter.en: The reporter interviewed several residents to understand how the new highway construction affected their daily lives.
reporter.zh: 记者采访了几位居民，以了解新高速公路建设如何影响他们的日常生活。

reporters.zh: 记者们报道了这个事件。

represent.en: She was chosen to represent our school.
represent.zh: 她被选为代表我们学校。

representations.en: Media representations influence how we see issues.
representations.zh: 媒体的表现方式影响我们看待问题的方式。

representative.en: This sample is representative of the whole population.
representative.zh: 这个样本代表整个群体。

repression.en: The historical repression of free speech in certain regimes has led to long-term consequences for artistic expression.
repression.zh: 某些政权历史上对言论自由的压制已经对艺术表达产生了长期影响。

remarkably.en: The results were remarkably good, showing significant improvement in students' performance over the academic year.
remarkably.zh: 结果非常出色，显示了学生一整年表现的显著进步。

remarks.en: She made some interesting remarks at the meeting.
remarks.zh: 她在会议上发表了一些有趣的评论。

remedy.en: Many people believe that education is the most effective remedy for reducing social inequality in developing countries.
remedy.zh: 许多人认为教育是减少发展中国家社会不平等的最有效方法。

remember.en: I still remember the first day of university when I felt both excited and nervous about starting a new chapter.
remember.zh: 我仍然记得大学第一天，那天我对开始新篇章既感到兴奋又紧张。

remind.en: Please remind me to submit the report.

reminder.en: This note serves as a reminder.

reminding.en: She sent an email reminding us of the meeting.
reminding.zh: 她发了邮件提醒我们开会。

reminiscent.en: The modern architecture of the new museum is reminiscent of traditional designs from ancient civilizations.
reminiscent.zh: 新博物馆的现代建筑风格让人联想到古代文明的设计。

remote.en: The remote village has no electricity.
remote.zh: 这个偏远的村庄没有电。

removable.en: Modern electronic devices increasingly feature removable batteries, which allows consumers to replace them easily.
removable.zh: 现代电子设备越来越多地采用可拆卸电池，这让消费者可以轻松更换。

require.en: Students who wish to study abroad often require a certain level of English proficiency before admission.
require.zh: 想要出国留学的学生在入学前通常需要达到一定的英语水平。

requirement.en: The main requirement for this scholarship is that applicants demonstrate outstanding academic achievement.
requirement.zh: 这项奖学金的主要要求是申请者展现出卓越的学术成就。

requirements.en: The requirements are clearly listed here.
requirements.zh: 要求在这里清楚地列出。

requires.en: Success in any professional field requires dedication, continuous learning, and strong interpersonal skills.
requires.zh: 在任何专业领域取得成功都需要奉献精神、持续学习和强大的人际交往能力。

requiring.en: The new regulations, requiring all companies to reduce carbon emissions, have been met with mixed reactions.
requiring.zh: 要求所有公司减少碳排放的新法规引发了不同的反应。

requisite.en: Having the requisite qualifications is essential when applying for senior management positions in any organization.
requisite.zh: 具备必要的资质条件对于申请任何组织的高级管理职位都至关重要。

rescue.en: Emergency services worked tirelessly throughout the entire night to rescue trapped survivors from the collapsed building.
rescue.zh: 紧急服务部门整夜不知疲倦地工作，以从倒塌的建筑物中营救被困的幸存者。

research.en: More research is needed on this topic.
research.zh: 这个话题需要更多的研究。

researcher.en: The lead researcher presented compelling evidence that suggests a strong link between diet and mental health.
researcher.zh: 首席研究员提供了令人信服的证据，表明饮食与心理健康之间存在密切联系。

researchers.en: Researchers found a new solution to the problem.
researchers.zh: 研究者们找到了这个问题的解决方法。

repay.en: Graduates should repay their student loans responsibly once they secure stable employment after completing their studies.
repay.zh: 毕业生在完成学业并获得稳定工作后，应该负责任地偿还学生贷款。

repeat.en: The teacher asked students to repeat the sentence.
repeat.zh: 老师要求学生重复这个句子。

repeated.en: The same mistake was repeated again.

repeatedly.en: Scientists have repeatedly warned that immediate action is necessary to prevent irreversible damage to the planet's ecosystem.
repeatedly.zh: 科学家们反复警告，必须立即采取行动以防止对地球生态系统造成不可逆转的损害。

repel.en: Natural remedies such as certain herbs can repel mosquitoes, reducing the need for chemical-based insect repellents.
repel.zh: 某些草药等天然疗法可以驱蚊，减少对化学杀虫剂的需求。

repertoire.en: A versatile performer must continuously expand their repertoire to meet the diverse expectations of modern audiences worldwide.
repertoire.zh: 多才多艺的表演者必须不断扩展自己的表演曲目，以满足全球现代观众的多样化期望。

repetition.en: Academic writing requires avoiding unnecessary repetition, as it weakens arguments and diminishes the overall quality of essays.
repetition.zh: 学术写作需要避免不必要的重复，因为这会削弱论点并降低文章的整体质量。

replace.en: Online courses may replace traditional classrooms someday.
replace.zh: 在线课程有朝一日可能取代传统课堂。

replaced.en: Plastic bags were replaced by paper ones.

resemblance.en: There is a striking resemblance between traditional farming methods and modern sustainable agriculture in terms of resource conservation.
resemblance.zh: 传统农业方法和现代可持续农业在资源保护方面有着惊人的相似之处。

resemble.en: The two brothers resemble each other.

resent.en: Many residents resent the government's decision to relocate historical monuments for urban development projects.
resent.zh: 许多居民对政府为了城市发展项目而搬迁历史遗迹的决定感到愤恨。

reservation.en: Despite my initial reservation about online education, I acknowledge its potential for reaching remote learners.
reservation.zh: 尽管我对在线教育最初持保留意见，但我承认它在帮助偏远学习者方面的潜力。

reservations.en: Some critics have raised serious reservations about the long-term environmental impact of hydraulic fracturing technology.
reservations.zh: 一些批评者对水力压裂技术对环境的长期影响表示严重保留意见。

reserve.en: Please reserve a table for dinner.

reserves.en: The country has large oil reserves.
reserves.zh: 这个国家有大量石油储备。

reservoir.en: The new reservoir will provide a reliable water supply for agricultural irrigation in the surrounding region.
reservoir.zh: 新水库将为周边地区的农业灌溉提供可靠的水源。

reside.en: According to recent census data, a significant proportion of immigrants choose to reside in metropolitan areas.
reside.zh: 根据最近的人口普查数据，相当比例的移民选择在大城市居住。

residence.en: His residence is close to the school.

reproach.en: The teacher reproached the students for their lack of effort on the assignment, emphasizing the importance of consistent practice.
reproach.zh: 老师责备学生们作业上缺乏努力，强调持续练习的重要性。

reproduction.en: The rate of biological reproduction in endangered species is a critical factor determining the success of conservation efforts worldwide today.
reproduction.zh: 濒危物种的生物繁殖率是决定当今全球保护工作成功与否的关键因素。

reptile.en: The reptile warmed itself on the rock.
reptile.zh: 那只爬行动物在岩石上取暖。

reptiles.en: Some reptiles can survive without eating for months.
reptiles.zh: 一些爬行动物可以数月不进食。

republican.en: The republican candidate outlined plans for economic reform during the televised debate, focusing on job creation and tax reduction.
republican.zh: 这位共和党候选人在电视辩论中概述了经济改革计划，重点关注创造就业机会和减税。

reputation.en: The restaurant has an excellent reputation.
reputation.zh: 这家餐厅有极好的声誉。

request.en: The committee made a formal request for additional funding to support the ongoing conservation project in the national park.
request.zh: 委员会正式请求额外资金以支持国家公园正在进行的保护项目。

requests.en: The office receives many requests daily.
requests.zh: 办公室每天收到很多请求。

removal.en: The removal of the old trees took all day.

removals.en: The removals industry has grown substantially in recent years, driven by increasing numbers of people relocating for work opportunities.
removals.zh: 搬迁行业近年来增长显著，主要是由越来越多因工作机会而搬迁的人推动的。

remove.zh: 工人们每天搬走旧家具。

removed.en: The old tree was removed from the garden.
removed.zh: 那棵老树被从花园里移走了。

removes.en: The new automated system removes the need for repetitive administrative tasks, allowing staff to focus on more complex responsibilities.
removes.zh: 新的自动化系统消除了重复性行政任务的需要，使员工能够专注于更复杂的职责。

removing.en: Removing subsidies from traditional energy sources could accelerate investment in sustainable alternatives and reduce carbon emissions significantly.
removing.zh: 取消对传统能源的补贴可以加速对可持续替代能源的投资，并显著减少碳排放。

renaissance.en: The city experienced a cultural renaissance in the 1990s.
renaissance.zh: 这座城市在1990年代经历了文化复兴。

render.en: Without adequate professional training, young graduates may find it difficult to render quality services to clients and stakeholders.
render.zh: 如果没有足够的专业培训，年轻的毕业生可能会发现难以向客户和利益相关者提供优质服务。

rendering.en: The computer is rendering the image now.

renew.en: You should renew your passport before it expires.
renew.zh: 你应该在护照过期前更新它。

renewable.en: Solar power is a renewable energy source.
renewable.zh: 太阳能是一种可再生能源。

renewed.en: The campaign brought renewed attention to climate change.
renewed.zh: 这场运动让人们重新关注气候变化。

renovate.en: The city council plans to renovate the old town centre to attract more tourists and boost the local economy.
renovate.zh: 市政委员会计划翻新旧城中心，以吸引更多游客并促进当地经济发展。

renown.en: The scientist gained international renown for her groundbreaking research on climate change and its devastating effects.
renown.zh: 这位科学家因其关于气候变化及其破坏性影响的开创性研究而获得国际声誉。

renowned.en: The university is renowned for its excellent business program.
renowned.zh: 这所大学因其优秀的商业课程而闻名。

rent.en: They pay the rent on the first day.
rent.zh: 他们每月第一天支付租金。

rental.en: The rental price is very high.

reoccur.en: If similar problems reoccur in the future, the company will need to implement more stringent quality control measures.
reoccur.zh: 如果类似问题将来再次发生，公司将需要实施更严格的质量控制措施。

reopen.zh: 这家店明天将重新开业。

repainted.en: They repainted the living room last week.
repainted.zh: 他们上周重新粉刷了客厅。

restoration.en: The restoration of the old building took months.
restoration.zh: 这座旧建筑的整修花了数月时间。

restore.en: They plan to restore the old building.
restore.zh: 他们计划修复那栋旧建筑。

restored.en: The historic church was beautifully restored.
restored.zh: 这座历史悠久的教堂被精美地修复了。

restrain.en: Security forces had to restrain angry demonstrators to prevent violence from spreading to other parts of the city.
restrain.zh: 安全部队不得不控制愤怒的示威者，以防止暴力蔓延到城市的其他地区。

restraint.en: Despite public criticism, the prime minister showed considerable restraint in responding to the opposition's harsh allegations.
restraint.zh: 尽管受到公众批评，首相在回应反对派的严厉指控时表现出了相当大的克制。

restrict.en: Many developed countries restrict the use of certain pesticides to minimize damage to wildlife and human health.
restrict.zh: 许多发达国家限制使用某些杀虫剂，以减少对野生动物和人类健康的损害。

restricted.en: Access to the area is restricted.

restricting.en: Some economists argue that restricting trade between nations could ultimately harm global economic prosperity.
restricting.zh: 一些经济学家认为，限制国家间的贸易最终可能损害全球经济繁荣。

restriction.en: There is a restriction on mobile phones at school.

restrictions.en: There are many restrictions on smoking in public.
restrictions.zh: 公共场所对吸烟有许多限制。

response.zh: 她的快速反应给所有人留下印象。

responses.en: Different cultures have varied responses to environmental issues, reflecting their unique values and priorities.
responses.zh: 不同文化对环境问题有不同的反应，反映出他们独特的价值观和优先事项。

responsibility.en: Taking care of pets is a responsibility.

responsible.en: She is responsible for the project.

responsive.en: A responsive education system should adapt quickly to changing societal needs and technological advancements.
responsive.zh: 一个反应灵敏的教育体系应该能够迅速适应不断变化的社会需求和技术进步。

responsiveness.en: The responsiveness of customer service often determines whether customers remain loyal to a brand.
responsiveness.zh: 客户服务的响应速度往往决定着顾客是否会对某个品牌保持忠诚。

rest.en: The rest of the food is in the fridge.

restaurant.en: I ate dinner at a restaurant yesterday.
restaurant.zh: 我昨天在一家餐馆吃了晚餐。

restaurants.en: There are many restaurants near the school.

restless.en: The restless students found it difficult to concentrate during the lecture on such a hot afternoon.
restless.zh: 焦躁不安的学生们在如此炎热的下午发现很难集中注意力听讲座。

resident.en: The average resident in this metropolitan area spends approximately two hours commuting to work every day.
resident.zh: 这个都市地区的普通居民每天花费大约两个小时通勤上班。

residential.en: This is a quiet residential area.
residential.zh: 这是一个安静的住宅区。

residents.en: The local residents complained about the noise pollution.
residents.zh: 当地居民抱怨噪音污染问题。

resign.en: Several senior managers decided to resign after the company announced significant budget cuts.
resign.zh: 公司宣布大幅削减预算后，几位高级经理决定辞职。

resignation.en: The unexpected resignation of the team leader created uncertainty about the project's future direction.
resignation.zh: 团队负责人的意外辞职给项目的未来方向带来了不确定性。

resilience.zh: 孩子们表现出很强的适应力。

resilient.en: Children are often more resilient than adults.
resilient.zh: 孩子们通常比成年人更有适应力。

resist.en: We must resist pressure to change the rules.
resist.zh: 我们必须抵制改变规则的压力。

resistance.en: The army showed strong resistance against the enemy.
resistance.zh: 军队对敌人表现出强烈的抵抗。

resistance to.en: They showed strong resistance to change.
resistance to.zh: 他们对变革表现出强烈抵抗。

resume.en: After working for two years, I decided to resume my studies at the university to complete my degree.
resume.zh: 工作两年后，我决定回到大学继续学习以完成学位。

retail.en: She works in retail at a department store.
retail.zh: 她在百货商店做零售工作。

retailer.en: The retailer offers a wide selection of products.
retailer.zh: 这家零售商提供多种产品选择。

retain.en: Students must retain key information for exams.
retain.zh: 学生必须记住考试的关键信息。

retention.en: Universities are increasingly concerned about student retention rates and are investing in support services.
retention.zh: 大学越来越关注学生留存率，正在投资支持服务。

retire.en: My father plans to retire at sixty-five after working for over forty years in education.
retire.zh: 我的父亲计划在教育领域工作四十多年后于六十五岁退休。

retired.zh: 那位退休的教师住在这里。

retirement.en: Many workers look forward to retirement.

retort.en: When the interviewer challenged her experience, she gave a confident retort that impressed the panel.
retort.zh: 当面试官质疑她的经验时，她自信地回击，给评审团留下了深刻印象。

retreat.en: The army decided to retreat from battle.
retreat.zh: 军队决定从战斗中撤退。

retrieve.en: The dog learned to retrieve the ball.

retrospect.en: In retrospect, I realize that studying abroad was one of the most beneficial decisions I have made.
retrospect.zh: 回想起来，我意识到出国学习是我做出的最有益的决定之一。

return.en: I will return the book tomorrow.

return ticket.en: It is advisable to book a return ticket in advance to secure more affordable travel prices.
return ticket.zh: 建议提前预订返程票以获得更实惠的旅行价格。

return to.en: We plan to return to the city.
return to.zh: 我们计划回到这座城市。

reunion.en: The family reunion brought together relatives who had not seen each other for over a decade.
reunion.zh: 这次家庭团聚让十多年未见的亲戚们聚在了一起。

reuse.en: Governments should encourage citizens to reuse plastic bags and reduce environmental pollution.
reuse.zh: 政府应该鼓励市民重复使用塑料袋，减少环境污染。

reveal.en: The archaeological discovery may reveal important information about ancient civilizations.
reveal.zh: 这一考古发现可能会揭示有关古代文明的重要信息。

revealed.zh: 研究揭示了有趣的结果。

revelation.en: The scientific revelation about climate change has fundamentally altered how we view environmental protection.
revelation.zh: 关于气候变化的科学发现从根本上改变了我们对环境保护的看法。
