specifications.en: All building materials must meet the strict safety specifications established by international construction standards.
specifications.zh: 所有建筑材料必须符合国际建筑标准规定的严格安全规格。

stab.en: The sudden stab of pain reminded him to visit the doctor immediately.
stab.zh: 突然的刺痛让他想起要立即去看医生。

stabilisation.en: The stabilisation of the economy requires careful fiscal and monetary policies.
stabilisation.zh: 经济的稳定需要谨慎的财政和货币政策。

stabilise.en: Governments should stabilise prices to prevent social unrest and economic disruption.
stabilise.zh: 政府应该稳定价格，以防止社会动荡和经济混乱。

stabilised.en: After months of treatment, the patient's condition finally stabilised.
stabilised.zh: 经过数月的治疗，病人的病情终于稳定下来。

stabilises.en: Regular exercise stabilises both physical health and mental well-being.
stabilises.zh: 定期锻炼能稳定身体健康和心理健康。

stabilising.en: The stabilising effect of education on social mobility is widely acknowledged.
stabilising.zh: 教育对社会流动性的稳定作用得到了广泛认可。

stability.en: Political stability is essential for attracting foreign investment.
stability.zh: 政治稳定对于吸引外国投资至关重要。

stabilization.en: The stabilization of volatile markets demands coordinated international efforts.
stabilization.zh: 不稳定市场的稳定化需要国际社会的协调努力。

stabilize.en: Emergency measures were introduced to stabilize the struggling banking sector.
stabilize.zh: 推出了紧急措施来稳定陷入困境的银行业。

stabilized.en: The housing market has gradually stabilized after years of fluctuation.
stabilized.zh: 经过多年的波动，房地产市场已逐渐稳定下来。

spiral.en: Costs began to spiral out of control.
spiral.zh: 成本开始螺旋式上升失控。

spirit.en: She has a kind and gentle spirit.

spiritual.en: Many individuals seek spiritual fulfillment through meditation, prayer, or connection with nature.
spiritual.zh: 许多人通过冥想、祈祷或与大自然接触来寻求精神上的满足。

spit.en: Many countries have implemented laws prohibiting people from spitting in public places.
spit.zh: 许多国家已实施法律，禁止人们在公共场所吐痰。

spite.en: He did it just out of spite.
spite.zh: 他那样做只是出于恶意。

splash.en: The children made a big splash as they jumped into the swimming pool on a hot summer day.
splash.zh: 在炎热的夏日，孩子们跳进游泳池时溅起了大片水花。

splendid.en: The city boasts a splendid array of historical monuments and cultural heritage sites.
splendid.zh: 这座城市拥有大量壮丽的历史遗迹和文化遗产地。

split.en: They split the cost of dinner.

spoil.en: Parents who spoil their children may unintentionally hinder the development of independence.
spoil.zh: 溺爱孩子的父母可能会无意中阻碍孩子独立性的发展。

spoiled.en: The spoiled child never shares toys.
spoiled.zh: 那个被宠坏的孩子从不分享玩具。

stabilizes.en: The government's new monetary policy stabilizes the fluctuating economy and restores public confidence in financial markets.
stabilizes.zh: 政府的新货币政策稳定了波动的经济，并恢复了公众对金融市场的信心。

stabilizing.en: The stabilizing effect of international trade agreements has significantly boosted investor confidence across the region.
stabilizing.zh: 国际贸易协定的稳定作用极大地增强了整个地区的投资者信心。

stable.en: The patient is now in stable condition.

stabled.en: The horses were stabled overnight at the equestrian center during the three-day international competition.
stabled.zh: 在为期三天的国际比赛期间，马匹被安置在马术中心过夜。

stables.en: Many historic stables across the country have been converted into trendy restaurants and boutique hotels.
stables.zh: 全国各地的许多历史马厩已被改建成时尚的餐厅和精品酒店。

stack.en: Researchers recommend that students stack related concepts together when revising to improve memory retention.
stack.zh: 研究人员建议学生在复习时将相关概念堆叠在一起，以提高记忆力。

stacked.en: The books were stacked neatly on the shelf.
stacked.zh: 书整齐地堆放在书架上。

stadium.en: The new stadium holds fifty thousand.
stadium.zh: 新体育场可容纳五万人。

stadiums.en: The city built two new stadiums.
stadiums.zh: 这座城市建造了两个新体育场。

staff.en: The dedicated staff at the university library provides invaluable research assistance to both undergraduate and postgraduate students.
staff.zh: 大学图书馆敬业的员工为本科生和研究生提供宝贵的研究协助。

spectator.en: The spectator at the tennis match watched intently as the players competed for the championship title.
spectator.zh: 这位网球场上的观众专注地观看着球员们争夺冠军头衔。

spectrum.en: The exam covers a wide spectrum of topics.
spectrum.zh: 考试涵盖广泛范围的主题。

speculate.en: We can only speculate about the results.

speculation.en: Much speculation exists about the exam results.
speculation.zh: 人们对考试成绩有很多猜测。

speech.en: The president gave an important speech.
speech.zh: 总统发表了一次重要的讲话。

speed.en: The speed of technological innovation has dramatically changed how people communicate and conduct business.
speed.zh: 技术创新的速度已经深刻改变了人们的沟通和经商方式。

speed up.en: The new processing system will speed up the application review procedure significantly for all candidates.
speed up.zh: 新的处理系统将大大加快所有候选人的申请审核程序。

spelling.en: Spelling tests help students improve writing.
spelling.zh: 拼写测试帮助学生提高写作。

spend.en: I spend two hours on homework daily.
spend.zh: 我每天花两个小时做作业。

spice.zh: 这道菜需要更多的调味料。

spicy.en: While some people enjoy spicy food for its bold taste, others find it uncomfortably overwhelming.
spicy.zh: 虽然有些人喜欢辛辣食物的强烈味道，但其他人觉得难以承受。

spider.en: A spider built its web in the corner.

spill.en: Factories must take precautions to prevent chemical substances from spilling into nearby rivers.
spill.zh: 工厂必须采取预防措施，防止化学物质泄漏到附近的河流中。

spin.en: Politicians often try to spin negative news stories to make their policies appear more favorable.
spin.zh: 政客们经常试图巧妙地处理负面新闻，使他们的政策显得更有利。

spine.en: Exercise helps keep your spine healthy.
spine.zh: 锻炼有助于保持脊柱健康。

sports center.en: The new sports center opens today.
sports center.zh: 新的体育中心今天开业。

sportsman.en: A true sportsman demonstrates good sportsmanship by respecting opponents regardless of whether they win or lose.
sportsman.zh: 真正的运动员通过尊重对手来展示良好的体育精神，无论输赢。

spot.en: I can spot the mistake easily.
spot.zh: 我能轻松发现这个错误。

spouse.en: Many couples find that sharing household responsibilities with their spouse helps maintain a harmonious and balanced marriage.
spouse.zh: 许多夫妇发现与配偶分担家务有助于维持和谐平衡的婚姻关系。

sprawl.zh: 城市无序扩张破坏自然栖息地。

spray.en: Please spray water on the plants.

sprays.en: The sprays covered the plants with water.

spread.en: The news spread quickly across the campus.
spread.zh: 消息很快在校园里传开。

spread to.en: The fire quickly spread to nearby houses.
spread to.zh: 火迅速蔓延到附近的房屋。

spring.en: Spring is considered the best season for planting vegetables in temperate climate regions around the world.
spring.zh: 在世界各地的温带气候地区，春季被认为是最适合种植蔬菜的季节。

spoken.en: Her spoken English is very clear.

spokesman.en: The government spokesman addressed the media regarding the new environmental policies announced yesterday.
spokesman.zh: 政府发言人昨天就新环境政策向媒体发表了讲话。

sponge.en: Porous materials like sponges can absorb several times their own weight in liquid substances.
sponge.zh: 像海绵这样的多孔材料可以吸收其自身重量数倍的液体。

sponsor.en: The company will sponsor the local marathon.
sponsor.zh: 该公司将赞助当地马拉松比赛。

spontaneous.en: Despite careful planning, the most memorable moments during our trip were often spontaneous and unplanned.
spontaneous.zh: 尽管有精心计划，我们旅途中最难忘的时刻往往是自发的、未经安排的。

spoon.en: In many Asian countries, people traditionally use a spoon rather than a fork for eating soup dishes.
spoon.zh: 在许多亚洲国家，人们传统上使用勺子而不是叉子来喝汤。

spoons.en: Spoons are on the kitchen table.

spore.en: Fungi release microscopic spores into the air, which can trigger allergic reactions in sensitive individuals.
spore.zh: 真菌向空气中释放微观孢子，这可能引发敏感人群的过敏反应。

sport.en: Regular participation in sport helps children develop teamwork skills, discipline, and physical fitness.
sport.zh: 经常参与体育运动有助于培养孩子的团队合作能力、自律性和身体素质。

still.en: Despite numerous technological advances, many traditional craftspeople still maintain their skills and techniques.
still.zh: 尽管技术不断进步，许多传统手艺人仍然保持着他们的技艺和工艺。

stimulate.en: Coffee can stimulate your mind during busy work.
stimulate.zh: 咖啡在忙碌的工作中能刺激你的思维。

stimulates.en: Regular physical exercise stimulates blood circulation and improves overall cardiovascular health significantly.
stimulates.zh: 定期的体育锻炼促进血液循环，并显著改善整体心血管健康。

stimulation.en: The puzzle provides good mental stimulation.
stimulation.zh: 这个谜题提供了很好的脑力刺激。

stimulus.en: The new rule was a stimulus for change.
stimulus.zh: 新规定是推动变革的刺激因素。

sting.en: After the jellyfish sting, the lifeguard immediately applied vinegar to neutralize the venom effectively.
sting.zh: 被水母蛰伤后，救生员立即涂醋来有效中和毒液。

stipend.en: Many universities offer a monthly stipend to support postgraduate research students with their living expenses.
stipend.zh: 许多大学为支持研究生研究人员提供月度津贴，以帮助他们解决生活费用。

stir.en: The controversial documentary stirred heated debates among viewers about environmental protection policies.
stir.zh: 这部有争议的纪录片在观众中引发了关于环境保护政策的激烈辩论。

stitch.en: After the minor surgery, the doctor used dissolvable stitches to close the wound without removing them later.
stitch.zh: 在小型手术后，医生用可溶解的缝线缝合伤口，无需之后拆除。

stock.en: We stock the shelves every morning.
stock.zh: 我们每天早上补充货架。

standpoint.en: From an economic standpoint, the new policy has both advantages and disadvantages for local businesses.
standpoint.zh: 从经济角度来看，这项新政策对当地企业既有优势也有劣势。

stands.en: The school stands near the main road.

staple.en: Rice is a staple food here.

star.en: The movie star generously donated a substantial portion of her earnings to educational charities.
star.zh: 这位电影明星慷慨地将她的大部分收入捐给了教育慈善机构。

stare.en: It is considered socially unacceptable to stare at other people in most Western cultures.
stare.zh: 在大多数西方文化中，盯着别人看被认为是社交上不可接受的。

stars.en: The stars were bright last night.

start.en: Many university students find it challenging to start their thesis writing without proper guidance.
start.zh: 许多大学生发现，没有适当的指导，开始写论文是具有挑战性的。

start off.en: Let's start off with a warm-up.

start up.en: The government offers financial incentives for young entrepreneurs who wish to start up new companies.
start up.zh: 政府对想要创办新公司的年轻企业家提供财政奖励。

steak.en: I prefer my steak medium-rare, but my friend always insists on ordering his well-done.
steak.zh: 我喜欢三分熟的牛排，但我朋友总是坚持点全熟的。

steal.en: The government should implement stricter penalties to prevent criminals from stealing cultural artifacts.
steal.zh: 政府应该实施更严厉的惩罚措施，以防止罪犯窃取文化文物。

steam.en: Steam rose from the boiling pot.
steam.zh: 蒸汽从沸腾的锅中升起。

steel.en: This bridge is made of strong steel.
steel.zh: 这座桥由坚固的钢建成。

steep.en: The hill has a very steep slope.

steer.en: She helped steer the project to success.
steer.zh: 她帮助引导项目走向成功。

stem.en: The scientist examined the stem of the plant to understand how nutrients are transported.
stem.zh: 科学家检查了植物的茎，以了解养分是如何输送的。

stems.en: The current economic instability stems from poor regulatory policies that were implemented by the previous government administration.
stems.zh: 当前的经济不稳定源于前任政府行政部门实施的糟糕监管政策。

step.en: Taking the first step towards learning a new language can be challenging but rewarding.
step.zh: 迈出学习一门新语言的第一步可能具有挑战性，但也是值得的。

steps.en: Follow these steps to solve the problem.
steps.zh: 按照这些步骤来解决问题。

starter.en: Many cultural events begin with a starter activity designed to help participants feel comfortable and engage with one another.
starter.zh: 许多文化活动以一个开场活动开始，旨在帮助参与者感到舒适并相互交流。

startle.en: The sudden loud noise from the construction site did not startle the experienced workers who were accustomed to such sounds.
startle.zh: 建筑工地突然传来的巨大噪音并没有吓到那些习惯了这种声音的经验丰富的工人们。

starve.en: In some developing countries, communities continue to starve due to food shortages and inadequate agricultural resources.
starve.zh: 在一些发展中国家，由于粮食短缺和农业资源不足，社区居民继续遭受饥饿。

state.en: Please state your name on the form.
state.zh: 请在表格上说明你的姓名。

statement.en: The company released an official statement.

statesman.en: The respected statesman delivered a compelling speech about the importance of international cooperation in addressing global challenges.
statesman.zh: 这位受人尊敬的政治家发表了一场引人入胜的演讲，讲述了国际合作应对全球挑战的重要性。

static.en: The population has remained static for years.

station.en: The train arrives at the station at noon.

stationary.en: Passengers are advised to remain stationary while the bus is in motion to prevent accidents and ensure their safety.
stationary.zh: 建议乘客在公交车行驶过程中保持静止，以防止事故并确保他们的安全。

stationery.en: Students typically purchase essential stationery such as notebooks, pens, and folders before beginning a new academic term.
stationery.zh: 学生通常会在新学期开始前购买必要的文具，如笔记本、钢笔和文件夹。

stale.en: The stale air in the classroom made it difficult for students to concentrate during the important examination.
stale.zh: 教室里沉闷的空气使学生在重要的考试中难以集中注意力。

stalk.en: Many women feel anxious when strangers stalk them on social media platforms, which has become a serious concern.
stalk.zh: 许多女性在陌生人在社交媒体上跟踪她们时会感到焦虑，这已成为一个严重的问题。

stall.en: The market stall owner struggled to sell fresh produce due to the intense competition from nearby supermarkets.
stall.zh: 由于附近超市的激烈竞争，市场摊主努力出售新鲜农产品。

stamp.en: In some countries, collectors pay substantial amounts of money for rare postage stamps from the nineteenth century.
stamp.zh: 在一些国家，收藏家为十九世纪的稀有邮票支付大量资金。

stamps.en: My grandfather collects old stamps from many countries.
stamps.zh: 我爷爷收集许多国家的旧邮票。

stand.en: I cannot stand people who litter in public parks and leave垃圾 behind without any sense of responsibility.
stand.zh: 我无法忍受那些在公园里乱扔垃圾、毫无责任感的人。

stand for.en: The abbreviation GDP stands for Gross Domestic Product, which is a crucial economic indicator measured annually.
stand for.zh: 缩写GDP代表国内生产总值，这是一个重要的年度经济指标。

stand out.en: Applicants who can demonstrate practical work experience tend to stand out from other candidates during interviews.
stand out.zh: 能够在面试中展示实际工作经验的申请者往往比其他候选人更突出。

standard.en: This is the standard procedure for tests.

stations.en: Passengers wait at train stations daily.
stations.zh: 乘客每天在火车站等候。

statistic.en: One compelling statistic reveals that approximately 70 percent of international students choose to study abroad for career advancement.
statistic.zh: 一个引人注目的数据显示，大约70%的国际学生选择出国留学以促进职业发展。

statistical.en: The statistical data shows clear trends.
statistical.zh: 统计数据显示了明显的趋势。

statistics.zh: 统计数据显示出明显的趋势。

stats.en: The stats show sales increased last month.
stats.zh: 统计数据显示上个月销售额增加了。

statue.en: The statue stands in the city square.
statue.zh: 雕像矗立在城市广场上。

status.en: Education can improve one's social status.
status.zh: 教育可以提高一个人的社会地位。

steadily.en: Prices have risen steadily this year.

steady.en: Maintaining a steady income is crucial for families planning long-term financial goals such as buying property.
steady.zh: 保持稳定的收入对于计划长期财务目标（如购房）的家庭至关重要。

stereo.en: The old stereo in the corner of the room was playing classical music that helped him concentrate on his studies.
stereo.zh: 角落里那台旧音响正在播放古典音乐，帮助他集中精力学习。

stereotype.en: Many stereotypes about elderly people are being challenged as they increasingly embrace modern technology.
stereotype.zh: 许多关于老年人的刻板印象正在被挑战，因为他们越来越多地接受现代技术。

sterilize.en: Hospitals must sterilize all surgical equipment properly to prevent the spread of dangerous infections.
sterilize.zh: 医院必须正确消毒所有外科设备，以防止危险感染的传播。

sterling.en: The candidate demonstrated sterling qualities that made her the ideal choice for the leadership position.
sterling.zh: 这位候选人展现了卓越的品质，使她成为领导职位的理想人选。

stern.en: The stern professor insisted that all assignments be submitted on time without any exceptions allowed.
stern.zh: 那位严厉的教授坚持所有作业必须按时提交，不容许任何例外。

steward.en: Environmental stewards play a crucial role in protecting natural habitats from human destruction and pollution.
steward.zh: 环保管理员在保护自然栖息地免受人类破坏和污染方面发挥着关键作用。

stick to.en: You should stick to your plan.

sticky.en: The hot and humid weather made the kitchen surfaces feel uncomfortable and sticky throughout the day.
sticky.zh: 炎热潮湿的天气让厨房表面整天都感觉不舒服而且黏腻。

stiff.en: The stiff competition in the modern job market requires candidates to have exceptional qualifications and skills.
stiff.zh: 现代就业市场的激烈竞争要求候选人具备出色的资历和技能。

stage.en: The project is now in the planning stage.
stage.zh: 项目现在处于规划阶段。

stagger.en: Many small businesses continue to stagger under the weight of rising costs and decreased consumer spending.
stagger.zh: 许多小企业在成本上涨和消费者支出减少的压力下继续艰难维持。

stain.en: The coffee stain on the white tablecloth proved difficult to remove despite using multiple cleaning products.
stain.zh: 尽管使用了多种清洁产品，白桌布上的咖啡渍仍然难以去除。

stained.en: The ancient church featured beautiful stained glass windows that depicted various scenes from religious history.
stained.zh: 这座古老的教堂以描绘宗教历史各种场景的美丽彩色玻璃窗为特色。

stair.en: She carefully placed her foot on each stair, ensuring she would not slip on the wet wooden surface.
stair.zh: 她小心翼翼地把脚放在每一级台阶上，确保自己不会在潮湿的木质表面上滑倒。

staircase.en: The staircase leads to the third floor.

stairs.en: She ran down the stairs quickly.

stairways.en: The old stairways need safety repairs.

stake.en: Environmental groups have a significant stake in the outcome of the proposed conservation legislation.
stake.zh: 环保组织对拟议中的保护立法的结果有重大利益关系。

stakes.en: The stakes are too high to risk.

strategically.en: The government has strategically located healthcare facilities in rural communities where medical services are most urgently required.
strategically.zh: 政府战略性地在农村社区设立医疗设施，那里最迫切需要医疗服务。

strategies.en: Effective strategies for reducing carbon emissions involve transitioning to renewable energy sources and improving energy efficiency.
strategies.zh: 减少碳排放的有效策略包括转向可再生能源和提高能源效率。

strategist.en: The political strategist advised the candidate to focus on economic policies that would appeal to middle-class voters.
strategist.zh: 这位政治战略家建议候选人关注能够吸引中产阶级选民的经济政策。

strategists.en: Leading strategists from various industries gathered at the conference to discuss innovative approaches to market expansion.
strategists.zh: 来自各行业的顶尖战略家在会议上聚首，讨论市场扩张的创新方法。

straw.en: Many fast-food chains have replaced plastic straws with biodegradable alternatives to minimize environmental damage.
straw.zh: 许多快餐连锁店已用可生物降解的替代品取代塑料吸管，以减少环境损害。

strawberry.en: Studies show that strawberries contain high levels of antioxidants, which contribute to their well-documented health benefits.
strawberry.zh: 研究表明，草莓含有高水平的抗氧化剂，这对其公认的健康益处有重要贡献。

stream.en: We sat quietly by the stream.
stream.zh: 我们静静地坐在小溪边。

streamline.en: The new software helped the company streamline its customer service operations, reducing response times considerably.
streamline.zh: 新软件帮助公司简化了客户服务运营，大大缩短了响应时间。

streams.en: Clear streams flow through the mountain village.

street.en: There is a bank on this street.

stress.en: The doctor advised me to reduce stress.

stressful.en: Exams can be very stressful for students.
stressful.zh: 考试对学生来说可能压力很大。

stretch.zh: 跑步前你应该做伸展运动。

stretched.en: The road stretched for many miles.
stretched.zh: 这条路延伸了很多英里。

stretcher.en: The injured climber was carefully placed on a stretcher by rescue teams before being transported to hospital.
stretcher.zh: 受伤的登山者被救援队小心地抬上担架，然后送往医院。

stretching.en: Stretching before exercise helps prevent injury.
stretching.zh: 锻炼前做伸展运动有助于防止受伤。

stroke.en: The doctor treated the stroke patient.

stroll.en: Many elderly residents enjoy taking a leisurely stroll through the park in the morning to maintain their physical fitness and social connections.
stroll.zh: 许多老年居民喜欢早晨在公园里悠闲地散步，以保持身体健康和社交联系。

strong.en: He is strong enough to lift it.
strong.zh: 他足够强壮可以举起它。

strongly.en: The environmental report strongly suggests that immediate action must be taken to reduce carbon emissions and combat climate change globally.
strongly.zh: 环境报告强烈建议，必须立即采取行动来减少碳排放并在全世界应对气候变化。

struck.en: The lightning struck the tall tree.

structural.en: The building has structural damage after the storm.
structural.zh: 这栋建筑在暴风雨后有结构损坏。

structurally.en: While the old cathedral is structurally sound, the interior requires extensive renovation work to restore its original artistic features.
structurally.zh: 虽然这座古老的大教堂结构稳固，但内部需要 extensive renovation 工作来恢复其原始的艺术特征。

structure.en: The structure of the building is strong.
structure.zh: 这座建筑的结构很坚固。

structures.en: The ancient structures attract many tourists.
structures.zh: 这些古老的建筑吸引了许多游客。

storey.en: The building consists of only one storey, which limits its capacity for housing multiple families within the complex.
storey.zh: 这座建筑只有一层，这限制了其在综合体内容纳多个家庭的能力。

storm.en: The violent storm last night uprooted numerous trees and caused widespread power outages across the city.
storm.zh: 昨晚的猛烈暴风雨刮倒了许多树木，并导致全城大范围停电。

storms.zh: 风暴造成了大范围的破坏。

story.en: The teacher told us a short story.
story.zh: 老师给我们讲了一个短故事。

stout.en: Despite his stout appearance, the man surprised everyone by completing the marathon in record time.
stout.zh: 尽管他身材魁梧，这位男子还是以创纪录的时间完成了马拉松，让所有人都感到惊讶。

stove.en: In many rural areas, households still rely on traditional wood-burning stoves for cooking and heating.
stove.zh: 在许多农村地区，家庭仍然依靠传统的柴火炉灶来做饭和取暖。

straight.en: Go straight ahead to the school.
straight.zh: 径直往前走就到学校了。

straight away.en: The teacher answered the student's question straight away to avoid any misunderstanding.
straight away.zh: 老师立即回答了学生的问题，以避免任何误解。

straightaway.en: Please call me straightaway if there is a problem.
straightaway.zh: 如果有问题的，请立即给我打电话。

strain.en: The work strain made him very tired.
strain.zh: 工作压力让他非常疲惫。

strains.zh: 有些细菌菌株有耐药性。

strait.en: The Strait of Malacca is one of the busiest shipping routes in the world, connecting the Indian Ocean with the Pacific.
strait.zh: 马六甲海峡是世界上最繁忙的航运通道之一，连接印度洋和太平洋。

strand.en: The researchers found a single strand of DNA that could potentially help diagnose certain genetic disorders.
strand.zh: 研究人员发现了一条可能有助于诊断某些遗传疾病的DNA链。

stranding.en: The boat is stranding on rocks.

strange.en: That is a strange looking animal.
strange.zh: 那是一只看起来很奇怪的动物。

stranger.en: A stranger approached me on the street and asked for directions to the train station, which made me feel somewhat uncomfortable.
stranger.zh: 一个陌生人在街上向我走来，问去火车站的方向，这让我感到有些不舒服。

strangers.en: Children should not talk to strangers.
strangers.zh: 孩子不应该和陌生人说话。

strap.en: The backpack has a sturdy strap that can be adjusted to fit different body sizes comfortably.
strap.zh: 背包配有可调节的坚固肩带，能适应不同体型舒适地使用。

strategic.en: The company made a strategic decision to expand.
strategic.zh: 公司做出了扩张的战略决策。

structuring.en: The structuring of academic essays requires clear paragraphs that each present a single main idea supported by evidence.
structuring.zh: 学术论文的结构需要清晰的段落，每段呈现一个由证据支持的主要观点。

struggle.en: Many university students often struggle to balance their demanding academic responsibilities with part-time jobs and various personal commitments.
struggle.zh: 许多大学生经常难以平衡他们繁重的学业责任与兼职工作以及各种个人承诺。

student.en: A student asked a question during class.
student.zh: 一名学生在课堂上提了一个问题。

student card.en: Remember to bring your student card.

student union.en: The student union organized a trip.
student union.zh: 学生会组织了一次旅行。

students' union.en: The students' union organized a party.
students' union.zh: 学生会组织了一场聚会。

studio.en: The artist works in her studio.
studio.zh: 那位艺术家在她的工作室工作。

study.en: The study room is on the second floor.

study skills.en: Strong study skills are important for exams.
study skills.zh: 强大的学习技巧对考试很重要。

stocking.en: The factory produces thousands of stockings daily to meet the growing market demand for hosiery products.
stocking.zh: 这家工厂每天生产数千双袜子，以满足市场对袜类产品的需求。

stolen.en: The stolen wallet was never found.
stolen.zh: 被偷走的钱包从未找到。

stomach.en: My stomach feels empty after exercise.
stomach.zh: 运动后我感觉胃里空空的。

stomachache.en: After consuming street food during her vacation, she developed a severe stomachache and had to visit a clinic.
stomachache.zh: 度假期间吃了街边小吃后，她患上了严重的胃痛，不得不去看医生。

stool.en: The doctor requested the patient to provide a stool sample to conduct tests and identify potential health issues.
stool.zh: 医生要求病人提供粪便样本进行检查，以识别潜在的健康问题。

stoop.en: Because of his age, the elderly gentleman had to stoop down carefully to pick up the fallen book from the floor.
stoop.zh: 由于年事已高，这位老先生不得不小心翼翼地弯腰从地板上捡起掉落的书。

stop.en: The bus stop near my university campus becomes extremely crowded during morning rush hour commute every day.
stop.zh: 我大学校园附近的公交站在每天早上的通勤高峰时段都会变得非常拥挤。

storage.en: The lack of adequate storage facilities for perishable goods leads to significant food waste in many developing countries.
storage.zh: 易腐货物储存设施的不足导致许多发展中国家出现大量的食物浪费。

store.en: We store food in the fridge.
store.zh: 我们把食物存放在冰箱里。

stride.en: The company has made great strides in developing sustainable technologies over the past decade.
stride.zh: 该公司近十年在开发可持续技术方面取得重大进展。

strife.en: Political strife between different factions has hindered the country's economic development significantly.
strife.zh: 不同派别之间的政治冲突严重阻碍了国家的经济发展。

strike.en: Workers may decide to strike if their demands for better wages and improved working conditions are not met.
strike.zh: 如果工人对更高工资和更好工作条件的要求得不到满足，他们可能会决定罢工。

striking.en: The results show a striking improvement in test scores.
striking.zh: 结果显示测试分数有显著进步。

strip.en: The government plans to strip the corrupt officials of their authority and illegal assets.
strip.zh: 政府计划剥夺腐败官员的权力和非法资产。

stripe.en: Some people believe that animals with different stripe patterns have distinct behavioral characteristics.
stripe.zh: 一些人认为，具有不同条纹图案的动物具有不同的行为特征。

stripping.en: Stripping paint from old furniture takes time.
stripping.zh: 从旧家具上剥离油漆需要时间。

striving.en: Striving for academic excellence requires dedication, perseverance, and effective time management skills.
striving.zh: 追求学术卓越需要 dedication, perseverance, and effective time management skills.

submit.zh: 请在网上提交你的申请。

submitted.en: The report was submitted on time.

subordinate.en: In many workplace hierarchies, subordinate employees are expected to follow instructions from senior management.
subordinate.zh: 在许多职场层级中，下属员工被期望听从高级管理层的指示。

subscribe.en: Many young professionals choose to subscribe to digital newspapers for convenient access to current affairs.
subscribe.zh: 许多年轻专业人士选择订阅电子报纸以便便捷获取时事新闻。

subscribe to.en: Parents who subscribe to educational magazines often help their children develop better reading habits.
subscribe to.zh: 订阅教育杂志的家长经常帮助孩子培养更好的阅读习惯。

subscription.en: I cancelled my magazine subscription last month.
subscription.zh: 我上个月取消了杂志订阅。

subscription fee.en: I pay a monthly subscription fee.

subsequently.en: The company expanded into Asian markets in 2018 and subsequently opened three new regional offices.
subsequently.zh: 该公司于2018年扩展到亚洲市场，随后开设了三个新的区域办事处。

subside.en: After several hours of heavy rainfall, the floodwaters gradually began to subside, allowing residents to return.
subside.zh: 经过数小时的大雨后，洪水逐渐开始消退，居民得以返回家园。

substitutes.en: Many fast food chains have started using plant-based substitutes for traditional meat products, which appeals to health-conscious consumers.
substitutes.zh: 许多快餐连锁店开始用植物性替代品取代传统肉类产品，这吸引了对健康有意识的消费者。

substituting.en: Instead of substituting fresh ingredients with processed ones, restaurants should prioritize quality to maintain customer satisfaction.
substituting.zh: 餐厅应该优先考虑质量，而不是用加工原料替代新鲜食材，以保持顾客满意度。

substitution.en: The substitution of traditional energy sources with renewable alternatives has become a pressing global concern.
substitution.zh: 用可再生能源替代传统能源已成为全球关注的紧迫问题。

subtle.en: There is a subtle difference between the two.
subtle.zh: 两者之间有细微的差别。

subtract.en: If you subtract the total expenses from the annual revenue, you will obtain an accurate net profit figure for analysis.
subtract.zh: 如果你用年收入减去总支出，就能得出用于分析的准确净利润数字。

suburb.en: They live in a quiet suburb.

suburbs.en: Many families prefer living in the suburbs because of the access to larger homes, green spaces, and reputable schools.
suburbs.zh: 许多家庭更喜欢住在郊区，因为那里有大房子、绿地和声誉良好的学校。

subway.en: The subway system in Tokyo is renowned for its punctuality and efficiency, transporting millions of passengers daily.
subway.zh: 东京的地铁系统以其准点性和效率而闻名，每天运送数百万乘客。

succeed.en: Students who manage their time effectively are more likely to succeed in their academic pursuits and achieve their long-term career goals.
succeed.zh: 有效管理时间的学生更有可能在学业上取得成功，并实现其长期的职业目标。

stuff.en: The garage was filled with old stuff that had been accumulating for years without any organization.
stuff.zh: 车库堆满了多年来无序积累的旧杂物。

stumble.en: Candidates often stumble when asked unexpected questions during job interviews in English.
stumble.zh: 求职者在英语面试中被问到意外问题时经常会出现失误。

stump.en: The complex mathematical problem completely stumped the students during the examination.
stump.zh: 这道复杂的数学题在考试中完全难住了学生们。

stun.en: The unexpected result of the election was designed to stun voters and gain media attention.
stun.zh: 这个出人意料的选举结果旨在让选民震惊,从而获得媒体关注。

stunned.en: Everyone was stunned by the sudden news.
stunned.zh: 所有人都被这突如其来的消息惊呆了。

stunning.en: The view from the mountain is stunning.

stupid.en: It would be stupid to ignore the overwhelming scientific evidence supporting climate change.
stupid.zh: 忽视支持气候变化的大量科学证据是愚蠢的。

sturdy.en: A sturdy backpack with proper lumbar support is essential for students carrying heavy textbooks.
sturdy.zh: 一款带有适当腰部支撑的坚固背包对于携带厚重教科书的学生来说是必不可少的。

style.en: She has a unique writing style.

styled.en: The modern restaurant is elegantly styled with minimalist furniture and ambient lighting.
styled.zh: 这家现代餐厅采用极简主义家具和环境照明进行优雅的设计。

styles.en: Different cultural styles of architecture can be observed when traveling to various countries around the world.
styles.zh: 环游世界时可以观察到不同国家的各种建筑文化风格。

styling.en: The hair styling industry has grown significantly over the past decade, creating numerous employment opportunities.
styling.zh: 过去十年间，美发行业增长显著，创造了大量就业机会。

stylish.en: Living in a stylish apartment in the city center often comes with a much higher price tag.
stylish.zh: 住在市中心时尚的公寓通常伴随着更高的价格标签。

sub.en: The sub replaced the injured player.
sub.zh: 替补队员替换了受伤的球员。

subconscious.en: Researchers believe that much of our decision-making process is influenced by the subconscious mind.
subconscious.zh: 研究人员认为，我们的大部分决策过程都受到潜意识的影响。

subject.zh: 数学是我最喜欢的学科。

subjective.en: Art appreciation can be very subjective.
subjective.zh: 艺术欣赏可能非常主观。

submarine.en: The submarine exploration revealed previously unknown species living in the deepest parts of the ocean.
submarine.zh: 潜水艇探索揭示了生活在海洋最深处的先前未知的物种。

submarines.en: Military submarines can stay underwater for months.
submarines.zh: 军用潜水艇可以在水下停留数月。

submerge.en: When heavy rainfall occurs, certain low-lying areas may submerge completely under floodwater.
submerge.zh: 当大雨来临时，某些低洼地区可能会完全被洪水淹没。

subsidiary.en: The company operates as a subsidiary of a larger multinational corporation, which controls its strategic decisions and financial operations.
subsidiary.zh: 这家公司作为一家大型跨国公司的子公司运营，母公司控制着其战略决策和财务运营。

subsidize.en: The government plans to subsidize renewable energy projects to reduce carbon emissions and promote sustainable development across the nation.
subsidize.zh: 政府计划补贴可再生能源项目，以减少碳排放并促进全国范围内的可持续发展。

subsidy.en: Farmers depend heavily on government subsidies to maintain their livelihoods and keep food prices affordable for ordinary consumers.
subsidy.zh: 农民严重依赖政府补贴来维持生计，并保持普通消费者能负担得起的食品价格。

subsistence.zh: 他们生活在仅够维持生计的水平。

subspecies.en: This bird is a subspecies of eagle.

substantial.en: We made substantial progress this year.
substantial.zh: 我们今年取得了重大进展。

substantially.en: The population of urban areas has increased substantially over the past decade, putting enormous pressure on public services.
substantially.zh: 过去十年间，城市地区人口大幅增长，给公共服务带来了巨大压力。

substitute.en: The teacher used video as a substitute.

substituted.en: The traditional written examination was substituted with continuous assessment methods to provide a more comprehensive evaluation of students.
substituted.zh: 传统的笔试被持续评估方法所取代，以更全面地评价学生的表现。

successfully.en: Many international students have successfully adapted to university life in foreign countries despite initial language barriers.
successfully.zh: 许多国际学生尽管最初存在语言障碍，却成功地适应了外国的大学生活。

succession.en: The succession of leadership within the organization requires careful planning to ensure continuity of operations.
succession.zh: 组织内部的领导 succession 需要仔细规划以确保运营的连续性。

successor.en: The new CEO is expected to continue the successful strategies that were established by her predecessor.
successor.zh: 新任首席执行官有望继续执行其前任制定的成功策略。

such.en: Many people are deeply concerned about such critical issues as climate change, deforestation, and ocean pollution.
such.zh: 许多人对气候变化、森林砍伐和海洋污染等 such 关键问题深表担忧。

suck.en: Babies suck milk from their mothers.
suck.zh: 婴儿从母亲那里吃母乳。

sudden.en: There was a sudden change in the weather.

suddenly.en: The experienced teacher stopped speaking suddenly when she noticed several students struggling with the complex concept.
suddenly.zh: 当那位经验丰富的老师注意到几名学生在理解这个 complex 概念时遇到困难时，她突然停止了讲话。

sue.en: They decided to sue the company.
sue.zh: 他们决定起诉这家公司。

sugars.en: Natural sugars exist in many fruits.
sugars.zh: 天然糖存在于许多水果中。

suggest.en: The research findings suggest that regular exercise is more effective than medication for treating mild depression.
suggest.zh: 研究结果表明，定期锻炼比药物治疗轻度抑郁症更有效。

suggestion.en: I have a suggestion for improving the plan.
suggestion.zh: 我对改进计划有一个建议。

suicide.en: Rising suicide rates among teenagers have prompted many governments to invest more in mental health awareness programs.
suicide.zh: 青少年自杀率的上升促使许多政府在心理健康意识项目上投入更多资金。

suit.en: This color does not suit you well.

suitable.en: This book is suitable for beginners.

suitable for.en: This book is suitable for students.

suitcase.en: My suitcase was delayed at the airport, so I had to purchase essential toiletries and clothing during my trip.
suitcase.zh: 我的行李箱在机场延误了，所以我不得不在旅途中购买必需品和衣物。

suite.en: The hotel suite has a beautiful view of the ocean.
suite.zh: 酒店套房可以看到美丽的海景。

suffer.en: Many students suffer from exam anxiety during important tests, which can negatively impact their overall academic performance.
suffer.zh: 许多学生在重要考试时会因考试焦虑而苦恼，这会负面影响他们的整体学业表现。

suffer from.en: Many elderly people suffer from arthritis.
suffer from.zh: 许多老年人患有关节炎。

sufferers.en: Support groups help sufferers cope with daily challenges.
sufferers.zh: 互助小组帮助患者应对日常挑战。

suffering.en: Many people are suffering from the heat.
suffering.zh: 许多人正遭受高温之苦。

suffice.en: A brief summary will suffice for the overview section of the report, as the detailed analysis follows later.
suffice.zh: 简短的摘要就足以用于报告的概述部分，因为详细的分析会在后面呈现。

sufficiency.en: Food sufficiency is a major concern for developing countries with limited agricultural resources and growing populations.
sufficiency.zh: 粮食充足是拥有有限农业资源和不断增长人口的发展中国家面临的主要问题。

sufficient.en: We have sufficient time to finish the assignment.
sufficient.zh: 我们有足够的时间完成作业。

sufficiently.en: The government has not been sufficiently proactive in addressing environmental issues, leading to increased pollution.
sufficiently.zh: 政府在处理环境问题上一直不够积极主动，导致污染加剧。

sugar.en: Too much sugar is bad for health.

surname.en: Her surname appears on the list.
surname.zh: 她的姓氏出现在名单上。

surpass.en: The new teaching method allows students to surpass their previous academic achievements considerably.
surpass.zh: 新的教学方法使学生能够大大超越他们之前的学业成绩。

surplus.en: The factory has a surplus of unsold products.
surplus.zh: 工厂有大量未售出的产品过剩。

surprise.en: To the surprise of many researchers, the experiment yielded unexpected and groundbreaking results.
surprise.zh: 令许多研究人员惊讶的是，这项实验产生了意想不到的突破性结果。

surprised.en: She was surprised by the good news.
surprised.zh: 她对这个好消息感到惊讶。

surprisingly.en: Surprisingly, the remote village has better healthcare facilities than some urban areas nearby.
surprisingly.zh: 令人惊讶的是，这个偏远村庄的医疗设施比附近一些城市地区更好。

surrender.en: Some psychologists argue that surrendering to negative emotions without addressing them can lead to mental health issues.
surrender.zh: 一些心理学家认为，不加处理地屈服于负面情绪可能导致心理健康问题。

surrey.zh: 那辆四轮马车看起来很美。

sun.en: The sun rises early in summer, providing longer daylight hours for outdoor activities and tourism in many countries.
sun.zh: 太阳在夏天升起较早，为许多国家的户外活动和旅游业提供更长的日光时间。

sunglasses.en: She wore sunglasses to protect her eyes.

sunlight.en: Plants grow well with enough sunlight.
sunlight.zh: 植物在充足的阳光下生长良好。

sunny.en: It was a sunny day at the park.
sunny.zh: 那是公园里阳光灿烂的一天。

sunrise.en: The spectacular sunrise over the mountains creates a stunning view that attracts photographers from around the world.
sunrise.zh: 山上壮观的日出创造了吸引世界各地摄影师的绝美景色。

sunset.en: Watching the sunset at the beach has become an increasingly popular tourist activity in coastal destinations worldwide.
sunset.zh: 在海滩观看日落已成为全球沿海旅游目的地日益流行的旅游活动。

sunshine.en: The warm sunshine allows children to spend more time outdoors, which contributes to their physical and mental development.
sunshine.zh: 温暖的阳光让孩子们有更多时间在户外活动，这有助于他们的身心发育。

super.en: This is a super opportunity for us.
super.zh: 这对我们来说是个极好的机会。

superb.en: The professor delivered a superb lecture on environmental protection that provided deep insights into current ecological challenges.
superb.zh: 教授进行了一场关于环境保护的精彩讲座，为当前的生态挑战提供了深刻的见解。

surround.en: The ancient city was built on a hill, and mountains surround it on three sides, providing natural protection from invaders.
surround.zh: 这座古城建在山上，三面环山，为古城提供了天然的防御屏障。

surrounding.en: The surrounding buildings are very old.
surrounding.zh: 周围的建筑物都很古老。

survey.en: A recent survey conducted by the university shows that students prefer online learning over traditional classroom settings.
survey.zh: 大学最近进行的一项调查显示，学生更喜欢在线学习而不是传统的课堂教学。

surveyed.en: The researchers surveyed over 500 participants to gather data about their shopping habits and dietary preferences.
surveyed.zh: 研究人员调查了500多名参与者，以收集有关他们购物习惯和饮食偏好。

surveying.en: The team is currently surveying the area to assess the environmental impact of the proposed industrial development project.
surveying.zh: 该团队目前正在对该地区进行勘察，以评估拟议工业开发项目的环境影响。

surveys.en: Regular surveys conducted by universities help identify trends in student satisfaction and areas that need improvement.
surveys.zh: 大学定期进行的调查有助于识别学生满意度的趋势和需要改进的领域。

survival.en: Food is essential for survival in the wild.
survival.zh: 食物对野外生存至关重要。

survive.zh: 动物必须适应才能生存。

susceptible.en: Children are susceptible to catching colds.

supposedly.en: The supposedly safe medication has raised concerns among medical professionals and patients alike.
supposedly.zh: 这种据说安全的药物已经引起了医疗专业人员和患者的担忧。

suppress.en: Governments should not suppress the freedom of the press in democratic societies.
suppress.zh: 在民主社会中，政府不应该压制新闻自由。

supreme.en: The Supreme Court plays a crucial role in safeguarding constitutional rights in many countries.
supreme.zh: 最高法院在许多国家中扮演着维护宪法权利的关键角色。

sure.en: It is important to be sure about your career choices before making long-term commitments.
sure.zh: 在做出长期承诺之前，明确自己的职业选择是很重要的。

surfing.en: I tried surfing for the first time.

surge.en: The sudden surge in energy prices has significantly impacted household budgets across the nation.
surge.zh: 能源价格的突然上涨严重影响了全国的家庭预算。

surgeon.en: The surgeon explained every detail of the operation clearly before the patient signed the consent form.
surgeon.zh: 外科医生在患者签署同意书之前清楚地解释了手术的每一个细节。

surgeons.en: The surgeons operated on the patient yesterday.
surgeons.zh: 外科医生昨天给病人做了手术。

suited.en: This job is well suited to her skills.
suited.zh: 这份工作非常适合她的技能。

suited to.en: This job is suited to her.

suits.en: A formal dress code suits the professional atmosphere of corporate environments.
suits.zh: 正式的着装规定很适合企业环境的职业氛围。

sulfur.en: Sulfur emissions from industrial factories contribute significantly to environmental pollution.
sulfur.zh: 工业工厂排放的硫磺对环境污染有重大影响。

sulphur.en: The sulphur compounds released during volcanic eruptions can affect global weather patterns.
sulphur.zh: 火山爆发期间释放的硫磺化合物会影响全球天气模式。

sum.en: Let me sum up the main points briefly.
sum.zh: 让我简要概括主要观点。

summarize.en: Can you summarize the main points please?
summarize.zh: 请你总结一下要点好吗？

summary.en: The executive summary provides a comprehensive overview of the main research findings.
summary.zh: 执行摘要提供了主要研究结果的全面概述。

summon.en: The parliamentary committee may summon expert witnesses to testify on educational reform.
summon.zh: 议会委员会可能会传唤专家证人就教育改革作证。

suspect.en: Police suspect that he is guilty.

suspend.en: The university decided to suspend classes for a week due to the severe air quality index in the city.
suspend.zh: 由于城市空气质量指数严重，该大学决定停课一周。

suspended.en: The game was suspended due to rain.

suspension.en: The student faced suspension from school.
suspension.zh: 这个学生面临停学处分。

suspicion.en: I have no suspicion about his honesty.

suspicious.en: The tourists felt suspicious about the extremely low prices offered by the street vendors near the famous landmark.
suspicious.zh: 游客们对著名地标附近街头小贩提供的极低价格感到怀疑。

sustain.en: Food and water sustain life on Earth.
sustain.zh: 食物和水维持地球上的生命。

sustainability.en: The company focuses on environmental sustainability.
sustainability.zh: 这家公司专注于环境可持续性。

sustainable.en: Sustainable development is important for all countries.
sustainable.zh: 可持续发展对所有国家都很重要。

supervised.en: The child was supervised at all times.
supervised.zh: 这个孩子一直受到监督。

supervisor.en: My supervisor approved my vacation request today.
supervisor.zh: 我的主管今天批准了我的休假申请。

supper.en: In many British households, families gather together for a traditional Sunday supper with relatives.
supper.zh: 在许多英国家庭中，家人会在周日聚在一起与亲戚共进传统晚餐。

supplement.en: I take vitamins to supplement my diet.
supplement.zh: 我服用维生素补充饮食。

supplements.zh: 维生素补充剂改善了她的健康。

suppliers.zh: 我们有几个可信赖的供应商。

supply.en: The government must ensure there is an adequate supply of clean water to all rural communities during the dry season.
supply.zh: 政府必须确保在旱季向所有农村社区提供充足的清洁水源。

supporters.en: The proposal attracted many new supporters.
supporters.zh: 这个提议吸引了许多新的支持者。

suppose.en: I suppose the meeting starts at nine.

supposed.en: The supposed plan was never used.
supposed.zh: 那个所谓的计划从未被使用过。

symbolised.en: In many cultures, the lotus flower has been symbolised as a sign of purity and spiritual enlightenment.
symbolised.zh: 在许多文化中，莲花被象征为纯洁和精神启蒙的标志。

symbolises.en: The ancient temple symbolises the cultural heritage and religious beliefs of the local community.
symbolises.zh: 这座古老的寺庙象征着当地社区的文化遗产和宗教信仰。

symbolising.en: The coming-of-age ceremony, symbolising the transition to adulthood, varies significantly across different societies.
symbolising.zh: 象征着成年过渡的成年仪式，在不同社会中差异很大。

symbolism.en: The use of light and darkness in the novel represents a deeper symbolism about the struggle between good and evil.
symbolism.zh: 小说中光与暗的运用代表了更深层的关于善恶斗争的象征意义。

symbolize.en: The Olympic rings are designed to symbolize the five inhabited continents coming together in peaceful competition.
symbolize.zh: 奥运五环的设计旨在象征五大洲在和平竞赛中汇聚一堂。

symbolized.en: The fall of the Berlin Wall symbolized the end of the Cold War era and the reunification of Europe.
symbolized.zh: 柏林墙的倒塌象征着冷战时代的结束和欧洲的统一。

symbolizes.en: The phoenix, which rises from its ashes, symbolizes resilience and the ability to overcome adversity.
symbolizes.zh: 从灰烬中重生的凤凰象征着韧性和克服逆境的能力。

symbolizing.en: The memorial statue, symbolizing sacrifice and bravery, serves as a powerful reminder of those who fought for freedom.
symbolizing.zh: 象征着牺牲和勇气的纪念雕像，是对为自由而战者的有力提醒。

symbols.en: Flags often feature important national symbols.
symbols.zh: 旗帜常常展示重要的国家象征。

symmetry.en: Architects often incorporate symmetry into building designs to create a sense of balance and visual harmony.
symmetry.zh: 建筑师经常将对称融入建筑设计中，以创造平衡感和视觉和谐。

take on.en: The new manager decided to take on the challenging project despite the potential risks involved.
take on.zh: 新经理决定接手这个充满挑战的项目，尽管存在潜在风险。

take over.en: The company was forced to take over its failing competitor to maintain its market share.
take over.zh: 该公司被迫接管其即将倒闭的竞争对手以维持市场份额。

take place.en: The meeting will take place tomorrow.

take up.en: She decided to take up painting last year.
take up.zh: 她去年决定开始学画画。

takeoff.en: The airplane accelerated rapidly down the runway before making a successful takeoff.
takeoff.zh: 飞机在跑道上快速加速，然后成功起飞。

takeover.en: The hostile takeover of the smaller company caused widespread concern among employees.
takeover.zh: 这家小公司的恶意收购引起了员工的广泛担忧。

tale.en: The ancient tale of the hero's journey has been passed down through generations.
tale.zh: 这位英雄旅程的古老传说已经代代相传。

talent.en: Many universities offer scholarships to students who demonstrate exceptional talent in the arts or sciences during their application process.
talent.zh: 许多大学为在申请过程中表现出艺术或科学非凡才能的学生提供奖学金。

talented.zh: 她是一位有才华的音乐家。

tales.en: Grandmother told us fairy tales last night.
tales.zh: 奶奶昨晚给我们讲了童话故事。

sweater.en: This warm sweater is perfect for winter.
sweater.zh: 这件保暖毛衣非常适合冬天。

sweep.en: It is important to sweep the floors regularly to maintain a clean and hygienic living environment for the whole family.
sweep.zh: 定期打扫地板以保持整个家庭干净卫生的居住环境是很重要的。

swell.en: Her ankle began to swell after the fall.
swell.zh: 她的脚踝摔倒后开始肿胀。

swept.en: He swept the floor yesterday morning.

swift.en: The swift response saved the project.
swift.zh: 迅速的反应挽救了项目。

swim.en: I learn to swim every summer.

swimming.en: I enjoy swimming in the summer.

swimming pool.en: The hotel has a large swimming pool.
swimming pool.zh: 这家酒店有一个大型游泳池。

swing.en: The children swing in the park.

swallow.en: The graceful swallow glided effortlessly across the sky, its distinctive forked tail making it easy to identify from other birds.
swallow.zh: 那只优雅的燕子轻松地滑翔过天空，其独特的叉形尾巴使其易于与其他鸟类区分开来。

swallowed.en: The fish swallowed the bait quickly.

swamp.en: The tropical swamp provides a crucial ecosystem for numerous species of birds, reptiles, and aquatic plants.
swamp.zh: 那片热带沼泽为众多鸟类、爬行动物和水生植物提供了至关重要的生态系统。

swan.en: The elegant white swan glided gracefully across the peaceful lake, its reflection shimmering perfectly in the calm water.
swan.zh: 那只优雅的白天鹅在平静的湖面上优雅地滑行，它的身影在宁静的水面上完美地闪烁。

swap.en: International students often choose to swap cultural experiences by living with local families during their academic studies abroad.
swap.zh: 国际学生通常选择在海外学习期间与当地家庭同住，以交换文化体验。

swarm.en: A massive swarm of locusts descended upon the agricultural region, destroying crops and causing significant economic damage.
swarm.zh: 一大群蝗虫降临到那片农业地区，摧毁了农作物并造成了重大的经济损失。

sway.en: The old oak tree began to sway gently as the strong wind blew through the forest throughout the night.
sway.zh: 当强风整夜吹过森林时，那棵老橡树开始轻轻摇晃。

swaying.en: The trees were swaying gently in the wind.

swear.en: Despite intense pressure from his family, the young man chose to swear by his own principles and pursue his chosen career path.
swear.zh: 尽管面临家庭的巨大压力，这位年轻人选择坚守自己的原则，誓言追求他选择的职业道路。

sweat.en: He began to sweat in the hot room.
sweat.zh: 他在闷热的房间里开始出汗。

tag.en: Please tag all the boxes before moving.
tag.zh: 请在搬运前给所有箱子贴上标签。

tail.en: The dog wagged its tail happily.

tailor.en: The tailor made a new suit.

tailored.en: The course was tailored for beginners.
tailored.zh: 这门课程是为初学者量身定做的。

take.en: It is essential for students to take responsibility for their own learning and develop self-discipline outside the classroom.
take.zh: 学生对自己的学习负责并在课堂外培养自律能力是至关重要的。

take after.en: My younger brother takes after our father in terms of personality, as both are naturally outgoing and confident.
take after.zh: 我弟弟的性格像我们的父亲，两人天生外向且自信。

take away.en: Fast food chains should not be allowed to take away the business of traditional family-run restaurants in local communities.
take away.zh: 不应该允许快餐连锁店抢走当地社区传统家庭餐馆的生意。

take care of.en: Governments have a moral obligation to take care of elderly citizens who can no longer support themselves financially.
take care of.zh: 政府有道义上的责任照顾那些经济上无法自理的老年公民。

take off.en: The aviation industry predicts that air travel will take off dramatically in the next decade due to lower fuel costs.
take off.zh: 航空业预测，由于燃料成本降低，航空旅行在未来十年将显著增长。

switch.en: Please switch off the lights before leaving.

switch off.en: Students often switch off during long lectures, which suggests that teaching methods need to be more engaging and interactive.
switch off.zh: 学生在冗长的讲座中常常走神，这表明教学方法需要更加生动有趣和互动。

switch on.en: When people switch on their computers each morning, they immediately begin consuming electricity that powers their entire workday.
switch on.zh: 当人们每天早上打开电脑时，他们立即开始消耗支撑整个工作日的电力。

sword.en: In the story, the warrior lifted his sword to defend the innocent villagers from the approaching invaders.
sword.zh: 在故事中，战士举起剑保护无辜村民免受逼近的侵略者的伤害。

syllabus.en: Before enrolling in any course, students should carefully review the syllabus to ensure it covers all the topics they wish to study.
syllabus.zh: 在注册任何课程之前，学生应该仔细查看教学大纲，以确保它涵盖他们想要学习的所有主题。

symbiosis.en: The symbiosis between plants and bees demonstrates how different species can benefit from working together in nature.
symbiosis.zh: 植物和蜜蜂之间的共生关系表明，不同物种如何在大自然中通过合作而互惠互利。

symbol.en: The dove is widely recognized as a universal symbol of peace, often appearing in political campaigns and international agreements.
symbol.zh: 鸽子被广泛认为是和平的普遍象征，经常出现在政治竞选和国际协议中。

symbolic.en: The annual ceremony is symbolic of the country's commitment to preserving its cultural heritage for future generations.
symbolic.zh: 一年一度的仪式象征着这个国家对为子孙后代保护其文化遗产的承诺。

symbolically.en: The couple symbolically planted a tree together to represent the growth and strength of their marriage bond.
symbolically.zh: 这对夫妇象征性地一起种了一棵树，以代表他们婚姻纽带的成长和力量。

symbolise.en: Many cultures use the lotus flower to symbolise purity and spiritual enlightenment in their religious traditions.
symbolise.zh: 许多文化在宗教传统中使用莲花来象征纯洁和精神启迪。

system.en: The system crashed during the meeting.

systematic.en: We need a systematic approach to this problem.
systematic.zh: 我们需要系统地处理这个问题。

table.en: According to the table, the unemployment rate decreased by 3 percent in urban areas over the past decade.
table.zh: 根据表格数据，过去十年城市地区的失业率下降了3%。

tables.en: The restaurant has round tables outside.

tablet.en: The introduction of tablet technology in classrooms has transformed traditional teaching methods and enhanced student engagement.
tablet.zh: 课堂中平板电脑技术的引入改变了传统教学方法并提高了学生的参与度。

tablets.en: She takes two tablets every morning.
tablets.zh: 她每天早上服用两片药。

tack.en: When the initial plan failed to produce results, the committee decided to take a different tack to solve the problem.
tack.zh: 当初的计划未能产生效果时，委员会决定改变策略来解决这个问题。

tackle.en: We need to tackle this problem immediately.
tackle.zh: 我们需要立即处理这个问题。

tact.en: A manager must exercise considerable tact when addressing employee concerns about workplace conditions and policies.
tact.zh: 管理者在处理员工对工作条件和政策的担忧时必须运用相当的机智。

tactic.en: One effective tactic for improving time management is to prioritize tasks based on their urgency and importance.
tactic.zh: 提高时间管理的一个有效策略是根据任务的紧迫性和重要性来安排优先级。

sympathetic.en: The sympathetic attitude of the university counselor helped the student cope with exam stress and anxiety.
sympathetic.zh: 大学辅导员富有同情心的态度帮助这名学生应对考试压力和焦虑。

sympathize.en: Many people sympathize with earthquake victims and generously donate to humanitarian relief organizations.
sympathize.zh: 许多人对地震灾民表示同情，并慷慨地向人道主义救援组织捐款。

sympathy.en: Despite my sympathy for the homeless population, I believe systemic policy changes are more effective than temporary charity.
sympathy.zh: 尽管我对无家可归者表示同情，但我相信系统性政策改革比临时慈善救助更有效。

symphony.en: Attending a live symphony concert is an enriching cultural experience that international students often find memorable.
symphony.zh: 参加现场交响音乐会是一种丰富的文化体验，国际学生通常认为这是难忘的经历。

symposium.en: The academic symposium brought together researchers from different countries to discuss climate change adaptation strategies.
symposium.zh: 这次学术研讨会汇聚了来自不同国家的研究人员，共同讨论气候变化应对策略。

symptom.en: Fatigue and difficulty concentrating are common symptoms of burnout among university students during examination periods.
symptom.zh: 疲劳和注意力难以集中是大学生考试期间倦怠的常见症状。

symptoms.en: The symptoms appeared after one week.

syndrome.en: The patient was diagnosed with a syndrome.
syndrome.zh: 病人被诊断出患有某种综合症。

synthesis.en: The synthesis of traditional teaching methods and modern technology has significantly improved student engagement in classrooms.
synthesis.zh: 传统教学法与现代技术的结合显著提高了课堂上的学生参与度。

tell.en: The professor told the students that the assignment deadline would be extended by one week.
tell.zh: 教授告诉学生们作业截止日期将延长一周。

tell off.en: The manager told off the employee for repeatedly arriving late to work.
tell off.zh: 经理斥责了那个反复迟到上班的员工。

teller.en: The bank teller patiently explained the various account options to the new customer.
teller.zh: 银行柜员耐心地向新客户解释各种账户选择。

temper.en: She struggled to control her temper when she discovered her project had been carelessly damaged.
temper.zh: 当她发现自己的项目被粗心地损坏时，她努力控制自己的情绪。

temperament.en: A calm temperament is often considered an advantage when dealing with stressful situations.
temperament.zh: 冷静的性情在处理压力情况时通常被认为是一种优势。

temperature.en: The temperature dropped suddenly last night.

temperatures.en: The temperatures dropped significantly last night.

temple.zh: 我们参观了那座古老的寺庙。

temporal.en: While temporal success is measurable, we should also focus on achieving lasting and meaningful outcomes.
temporal.zh: 虽然 временные成功是可以衡量的，但我们也应该专注于实现持久而有意义的成果。

temporarily.en: The library was temporarily closed for renovations but is expected to reopen to the public next month.
temporarily.zh: 图书馆暂时关闭进行翻新，预计将于下个月重新向公众开放。

temporary.en: We found a temporary solution to the problem.
temporary.zh: 我们找到了临时解决方案。

tempt.en: Food manufacturers often tempt customers by using vibrant colours and appealing images on product packaging.
tempt.zh: 食品制造商经常在产品包装上使用鲜艳的颜色和吸引人的图片来诱惑顾客。

temptation.en: The temptation to use private cars instead of public transport remains strong despite environmental concerns.
temptation.zh: 尽管存在环境问题，开私家车而不是乘坐公共交通工具的诱惑仍然很强。

tempting.en: The smell of fresh bread is very tempting in the morning.
tempting.zh: 新鲜面包的味道在早上非常诱人。

tenancy.en: The tenancy agreement lasts for one year.

tenant.en: The tenant pays rent on time.

tend.en: Students tend to feel nervous before exams.
tend.zh: 学生往往在考试前感到紧张。

tend to.en: Young people tend to use social media daily.
tend to.zh: 年轻人往往每天使用社交媒体。

tendency.en: There is a growing tendency for people to work remotely.
tendency.zh: 人们远程工作的趋势正在增长。

tender.en: The government launched a tender for companies interested in building new infrastructure projects in the metropolitan area.
tender.zh: 政府发布了招标，邀请有兴趣在大都市区建设新基础设施项目的公司参与竞标。

targets.en: The government has set ambitious targets to reduce carbon emissions by fifty percent within the next decade.
targets.zh: 政府设定了雄心勃勃的目标，要在未来十年内将碳排放量减少百分之五十。

tariff.en: Import tariffs on foreign goods have been significantly increased to protect domestic industries from international competition.
tariff.zh: 进口关税已大幅提高，以保护国内产业免受国际竞争的影响。

task.en: One of the most challenging tasks for modern educators is to keep students engaged and motivated to learn.
task.zh: 现代教育者面临的最具挑战性的任务之一是保持学生对学习的投入和积极性。

tasked.en: The committee was tasked with reviewing the current education policy and recommending necessary reforms to parliament.
tasked.zh: 委员会被赋予审查当前教育政策并向议会提出必要改革建议的任务。

tasks.en: She finished all her tasks today.
tasks.zh: 她今天完成了所有任务。

taste.en: She likes to taste different foods.
taste.zh: 她喜欢品尝不同的食物。

tastes.en: The coffee tastes a bit bitter.

tasty.en: Many people believe that healthy food cannot be tasty, but this perception is gradually changing in modern society.
tasty.zh: 许多人认为健康食物不可能美味，但这种观念在现代社会正在逐渐改变。

tax.en: The government plans to tax sugary drinks.
tax.zh: 政府计划对含糖饮料征税。

taxation.zh: 税收政策影响经济增长。

teens.en: Many teens love playing video games.
teens.zh: 许多青少年喜欢玩电子游戏。

teeth.en: Brush your teeth twice a day.

telecommunications.zh: 更好的电信提高了商业效率。

telecommute.en: Many workers now telecommute from home.
telecommute.zh: 现在许多工人远程在家工作。

telegram.en: Although the telegram is considered obsolete today, it played a crucial role in transforming business communication during the nineteenth century.
telegram.zh: 尽管电报在今天已被视为过时的通信方式，但它在十九世纪商业通信转型中发挥了关键作用。

telegraph.en: The telegraph was an important invention.
telegraph.zh: 电报是一项重要的发明。

telescope.en: Scientists use the powerful telescope at the observatory to study distant galaxies and gather data about the early universe.
telescope.zh: 科学家们使用天文台强大的望远镜来研究遥远的星系并收集有关早期宇宙的数据。

telescopes.en: Astronomers use telescopes to study stars.
telescopes.zh: 天文学家使用望远镜研究星星。

television.en: Television broadcasts the news to millions.
television.zh: 电视向数百万人播放新闻。

tank.en: The water tank on the roof needs to be cleaned regularly to ensure a clean water supply for the entire household.
tank.zh: 屋顶上的水箱需要定期清洗，以确保整个家庭的供水清洁。

tanks.en: The tanks were filled with clean water.
tanks.zh: 水箱里装满了干净的水。

tanzania.zh: 坦桑尼亚有许多野生动物园。

tap.en: Researchers tap into traditional ecological knowledge to develop more sustainable farming practices.
tap.zh: 研究人员利用传统生态知识来开发更可持续的农业实践。

tape.en: Please use tape to seal the box.
tape.zh: 请用胶带封住这个盒子。

tar.en: Prolonged exposure to tar and other harmful substances can lead to serious respiratory diseases among workers.
tar.zh: 长期接触焦油和其他有害物质可能导致工人出现严重的呼吸道疾病。

target.en: The government set an ambitious target to reduce carbon emissions by fifty percent within the next decade.
target.zh: 政府设定了一个雄心勃勃的目标，要在未来十年内减少百分之五十的碳排放。

targeted.en: The scholarship programme was specifically targeted at students from rural and disadvantaged backgrounds.
targeted.zh: 这项奖学金计划专门针对来自农村和弱势背景的学生。

targeting.en: Marketing campaigns are increasingly targeting younger audiences through various social media platforms.
targeting.zh: 营销活动正越来越多地通过各种社交媒体平台针对年轻受众。

talk.en: We need to talk about the project.
talk.zh: 我们需要谈谈这个项目。

talk about.en: Let's talk about the new project.
talk about.zh: 让我们谈谈这个新项目。

talk over.en: Before making a final decision, the team should talk over all the available options carefully.
talk over.zh: 在做出最终决定之前，团队应该仔细讨论所有可用的选项。

talk to.en: I want to talk to my teacher.

talking.en: The students are talking in class.

tall.en: He is a very tall basketball player.
tall.zh: 他是个很高的篮球运动员。

tame.en: Some wildlife species that were once wild have become tame due to urban expansion and feeding by humans.
tame.zh: 一些曾经是野生的野生动物物种由于城市扩张和人类的喂养而变得温顺。

tan.en: Many tourists prefer to spend their holiday tanning on the beach rather than visiting cultural attractions.
tan.zh: 许多游客宁愿在海滩晒日光浴度假，也不愿参观文化景点。

tangible.en: The evidence was tangible and clear.

tangle.en: The politician tried to explain the complex issue but became tangled in his own contradictory statements.
tangle.zh: 这位政治家试图解释这个复杂的问题，却被自己矛盾的言论缠住了。

technically.en: Technically, the experiment was successful, but the results were not practical for everyday application in most situations.
technically.zh: 从技术上来说，这个实验是成功的，但大多数情况下，其结果对于日常应用来说并不实用。

technician.en: The technician was able to fix the computer problem within a few minutes thanks to his specialized training and experience.
technician.zh: 由于技术员接受了专业培训并富有经验，他能够在几分钟内解决电脑问题。

technique.en: He learned a new painting technique.
technique.zh: 他学了一种新的绘画技巧。

technological.zh: 技术进步改变了我们的生活。

technologically.en: Although the country is technologically advanced in urban areas, rural regions still lack adequate infrastructure and basic services.
technologically.zh: 尽管该国城市地区技术先进，但农村地区仍然缺乏足够的基础设施和基本服务。

technologies.en: New communication technologies have transformed how people interact, creating unprecedented global connectivity and reshaping social relationships fundamentally.
technologies.zh: 新的通信技术改变了人们的互动方式，创造了前所未有的全球连通性，从根本上重塑了社会关系。

tedious.en: Many workers find repetitive office tasks tedious and unstimulating, which can lead to decreased motivation and reduced productivity over time.
tedious.zh: 许多员工觉得重复性的办公室任务单调乏味且缺乏激励，这可能导致动力下降和长期生产力降低。

teenager.en: A teenager's brain is still developing during adolescence, which may explain why young people sometimes make impulsive decisions.
teenager.zh: 青少年的大脑在青春期仍在发育，这可能解释了为什么年轻人有时会做出冲动的决定。

teenagers.en: Most teenagers enjoy spending time with friends.
teenagers.zh: 大多数青少年喜欢和朋友待在一起。

taxes.en: We have to pay taxes every year.

taxi.en: I took a taxi to the airport.

tea.en: I like drinking tea in the morning.

teach.en: Teachers play a crucial role in shaping young minds, and they should be properly trained to use modern technology in the classroom.
teach.zh: 教师在塑造年轻人思维方面发挥着关键作用，他们应该接受适当培训以在课堂中使用现代技术。

teaching.en: Teaching requires patience and good communication skills.
teaching.zh: 教学需要耐心和良好的沟通能力。

team.en: Our team won the match yesterday.

teamwork.en: Good teamwork helped finish the project.
teamwork.zh: 良好的团队合作帮助完成了项目。

tear.en: Be careful not to tear the paper.

technical.en: The team solved the technical problem quickly.
technical.zh: 团队很快解决了技术问题。

thank.en: I would like to thank the organizers for providing this opportunity to share my research findings with you.
thank.zh: 我想感谢组织者提供这次机会，让我能与大家分享我的研究发现。

thankful.en: Young people today should be thankful that they have access to unlimited information through the internet.
thankful.zh: 今天的年轻人应该感谢他们能够通过互联网获取无限的信息。

thanks to.en: Thanks to her I passed the test.
thanks to.zh: 多亏了她，我通过了考试。

that.en: Many scientists believe that climate change poses the greatest threat to our planet's future survival.
that.zh: 许多科学家认为气候变化对我们星球未来的生存构成最大威胁。

that is.en: The use of fossil fuels continues to rise; that is, emissions have increased by thirty percent since 2000.
that is.zh: 化石燃料的使用持续上升；也就是说，自2000年以来排放量增加了百分之三十。

the.en: The government should implement stricter regulations to protect endangered species from extinction.
the.zh: 政府应该实施更严格的法规来保护濒危物种免于灭绝。

the united kingdom.en: My friend lives in the United Kingdom.

the amount of.en: The amount of homework has increased recently.
the amount of.zh: 作业的数量最近增加了。

the basis for.en: Trust is the basis for friendship.

the most important.en: Health is the most important thing.

tests.en: The teacher tests students on vocabulary every Friday.
tests.zh: 老师每周五测试学生的词汇。

text.en: The text discusses how technology has transformed communication patterns in contemporary society.
text.zh: 这篇文章讨论了科技如何改变了当代社会的交流模式。

textbook.en: Although the textbook provides essential background knowledge, students should consult additional sources for current perspectives.
textbook.zh: 虽然教科书提供了必要的基础知识，但学生应该参考其他来源以获得当前的观点。

textbooks.en: Students should read the textbooks before class.
textbooks.zh: 学生应该在课前阅读课本。

textile.en: The textile industry has evolved significantly due to innovations in manufacturing processes.
textile.zh: 由于制造工艺的创新，纺织业已经发生了显著的变化。

textiles.en: Handcrafted textiles from developing countries often face competition from mass-produced alternatives.
textiles.zh: 来自发展中国家的手工纺织品经常面临来自大规模生产替代品的竞争。

texts.en: Academic texts frequently employ specialized terminology that students must master to understand complex theories.
texts.zh: 学术文本经常使用专业术语，学生必须掌握这些术语才能理解复杂的理论。

textual.en: A thorough textual analysis of the poem reveals multiple layers of meaning hidden within its structure.
textual.zh: 对这首诗的彻底文本分析揭示了其结构中隐藏的多层含义。

texture.en: The texture of a painting can significantly influence how viewers perceive the artwork emotionally.
texture.zh: 一幅画的质感可以显著影响观众在情感上如何感知这件艺术作品。

than.en: Living in urban areas is generally more expensive than residing in rural communities.
than.zh: 生活在城市地区通常比居住在农村社区更昂贵。

terrestrial.en: Most terrestrial animals live on land.
terrestrial.zh: 大多数陆地动物生活在陆地上。

terrible.en: The food at that restaurant was terrible.
terrible.zh: 那家餐馆的食物非常难吃。

terrific.en: Many students find the support from their teachers truly terrific when preparing for important examinations.
terrific.zh: 许多学生在准备重要考试时发现老师的支持真的非常棒。

terrify.en: Graphic images of violence in news reports can terrify young children who are watching television.
terrify.zh: 新闻报道中的暴力画面可能会吓到正在看电视的幼儿。

territory.zh: 鸟类经常为领地而争斗。

terror.en: The victims of the natural disaster lived in constant terror for months after the earthquake completely destroyed their homes.
terror.zh: 自然灾害的受害者在地震完全摧毁他们的家园后的几个月里一直生活在恐惧之中。

terrorist.en: Governments around the world are working together to combat terrorist activities that threaten international security.
terrorist.zh: 各国政府正在共同努力打击威胁国际安全的恐怖主义活动。

test.en: Most universities require international students to test their English proficiency before granting admission offers.
test.zh: 大多数大学要求国际学生在发放录取通知书前参加英语水平测试。

testify.en: Witnesses are often asked to testify under oath in court to ensure the accuracy of their statements.
testify.zh: 证人经常被要求在法庭上宣誓作证，以确保其陈述的准确性。

testimony.en: The testimony given by the expert witness was crucial in helping the jury understand the complex scientific evidence.
testimony.zh: 专家证人的证词对于帮助陪审团理解复杂的科学证据至关重要。

tennis.en: Playing tennis regularly can improve cardiovascular health while providing a social outlet for individuals of various age groups.
tennis.zh: 定期打网球可以改善心血管健康，同时为各个年龄段的人提供社交渠道。

tense.en: I always feel tense before important examinations, which sometimes affects my ability to concentrate.
tense.zh: 在重要考试前我总是感到紧张，这有时会影响我的专注能力。

tension.en: Political tension between the two neighboring nations has increased significantly over the past decade due to border disputes.
tension.zh: 由于边界争端，两个邻国之间的政治紧张局势在过去十年中显著加剧。

tent.en: We will sleep in a tent tonight.
tent.zh: 今晚我们将在帐篷里睡觉。

tentative.en: The committee has made a tentative decision to postpone the project until funding is secured.
tentative.zh: 委员会已经做出了暂定的决定，将项目推迟到资金到位为止。

terminal.en: The bus is at the terminal.

terminate.en: The company decided to terminate the employment contract due to persistent performance issues.
terminate.zh: 由于持续存在的绩效问题，公司决定终止这份雇佣合同。

terminology.en: Understanding the specialized terminology in academic texts is crucial for effective research.
terminology.zh: 理解学术文本中的专业术语对有效研究至关重要。

terrace.en: Many ancient civilizations developed terrace farming techniques to cultivate crops on steep slopes.
terrace.zh: 许多古代文明开发了梯田耕作技术，在陡坡上种植农作物。

terrain.en: The rugged terrain made rescue operations extremely challenging for the emergency services.
terrain.zh: 崎岖的地形使紧急救援服务进行救援行动变得极为困难。

the most popular.en: English is the most popular subject in our school.
the most popular.zh: 英语是我们学校最受欢迎的科目。

the near future.en: Changes will happen in the near future.
the near future.zh: 变化将在不久的将来发生。

the present day.en: Many old customs survive in the present day.
the present day.zh: 许多古老的习俗在当今仍然存在。

the rest of.en: The rest of the students arrived late.

theater.en: The movie theater in our town recently installed new digital projection systems for a better viewing experience.
theater.zh: 我们镇上的电影院最近安装了新的数字投影系统，以提供更好的观影体验。

their.en: Young children should take responsibility for their actions and learn the consequences of misbehavior early on.
their.zh: 年幼的孩子应该对自己的行为负责，并从小就学会了解不良行为的后果。

theirs.en: Our university has state-of-the-art laboratories, and the facilities are comparable to theirs.
theirs.zh: 我们大学拥有先进的实验室，其设施可与他们的相媲美。

them.en: Many teenagers are influenced by social media and tend to imitate the behaviors they see from influencers.
them.zh: 许多青少年受到社交媒体的影响，往往会模仿他们从网红那里看到的行为。

these.en: These environmental challenges require coordinated efforts from governments, businesses, and individuals worldwide.
these.zh: 这些环境挑战需要来自全球各地政府、企业和个人的协调努力。

they.en: They suggest that children who learn musical instruments perform better academically than those who do not.
they.zh: 他们表明学习乐器的孩子比不学的孩子在学业上表现更好。

thickness.en: Measure the thickness of the cardboard carefully.
thickness.zh: 仔细测量硬纸板的厚度。

thief.en: The thief was caught by security cameras while attempting to steal electronics from the store.
thief.zh: 小偷在试图从商店偷窃电子产品时被监控摄像头拍到。

thieves.en: Thieves stole money from the bank.

thigh.en: Regular cardiovascular exercise can strengthen the thigh muscles and improve overall running performance.
thigh.zh: 定期进行有氧运动可以加强大腿肌肉并提高整体跑步表现。

thin.en: The ice on the lake is thin.

thing.en: The most important thing is to understand the underlying causes rather than just treating symptoms.
thing.zh: 最重要的是理解根本原因，而不是仅仅治疗症状。

think.en: Students think carefully before making decisions.
think.zh: 学生做决定前仔细思考。

theme.en: The theme of the movie is about friendship.
theme.zh: 这部电影的主题是关于友谊。

themselves.en: Many teenagers prefer to solve their problems themselves rather than seeking advice from parents or teachers about sensitive issues.
themselves.zh: 许多青少年宁愿自己解决问题，而不愿向父母或老师寻求关于敏感问题的建议。

then.en: Students should conduct thorough research first, then analyze the findings carefully before drawing any conclusions from their study.
then.zh: 学生应该首先进行彻底的研究，然后仔细分析发现，之后才能从研究中得出任何结论。

theorem.en: The Pythagorean theorem is fundamental in mathematics education and has numerous practical applications in engineering and architecture.
theorem.zh: 勾股定理在数学教育中至关重要，并在工程和建筑领域有众多实际应用。

theoretical.en: The course focuses on theoretical aspects.

theoretically.en: Theoretically, the new recycling program should reduce waste by thirty percent, but actual results may differ considerably.
theoretically.zh: 从理论上讲，新的回收计划应该减少百分之三十的废物，但实际结果可能会有很大差异。

theories.en: Various theories have been proposed to explain the rapid changes in global climate patterns over the past few decades.
theories.zh: 人们提出了各种理论来解释过去几十年全球气候模式的快速变化。

theorise.en: Scientists theorise about the origins of life.
theorise.zh: 科学家们建立关于生命起源的理论。

theorist.en: The renowned theorist proposed a groundbreaking model that fundamentally challenged existing paradigms in social science research methodology.
theorist.zh: 这位著名的理论家提出了一个开创性的模型，从根本上挑战了社会科学研究方法论中的现有范式。

theorists.en: Modern theorists often build upon the foundational work of earlier scholars when developing new frameworks for understanding society.
theorists.zh: 现代理论家在发展理解社会的新框架时，经常以早期学者的基础性工作为依据。

theory.zh: 爱因斯坦的理论改变了物理学。

therapeutic.en: Swimming is very therapeutic for me.
therapeutic.zh: 游泳对我来说很有治疗作用。

therapy.en: The therapy helped him walk again.
therapy.zh: 这种疗法帮助他重新走路了。

there.en: Ancient civilizations established settlements there primarily because of the abundant freshwater sources and fertile agricultural land.
there.zh: 古代文明在那里建立定居点，主要是因为那里有丰富的淡水资源和肥沃的农业用地。

thereafter.en: The government implemented strict environmental regulations in 2010, and thereafter air quality in major cities showed significant improvement.
thereafter.zh: 政府在2010年实施了严格的环境法规，此后主要城市的空气质量显著改善。

thereby.en: The company reduced its carbon emissions significantly, thereby demonstrating its commitment to environmental sustainability and corporate responsibility.
thereby.zh: 该公司显著减少了碳排放，从而展示了其对环境保护和企业责任的承诺。

therefore.en: The evidence presented was inconclusive; therefore, the committee decided to postpone the final decision.
therefore.zh: 提出的证据尚无定论；因此，委员会决定推迟最终决定。

thermal.en: She wore thermal clothing in cold weather.
thermal.zh: 她在寒冷的天气穿保暖衣服。

thermometer.en: Use a thermometer to check the temperature.

threaten.en: Deforestation threatens numerous species with extinction and disrupts the delicate balance of natural ecosystems.
threaten.zh: 森林砍伐威胁着众多物种的生存，使自然生态系统的微妙平衡受到破坏。

threatened.en: The storm threatened our travel plans.
threatened.zh: 暴风雨威胁了我们的旅行计划。

three.en: The research team examined three different teaching methodologies to determine which was most effective.
three.zh: 研究小组检验了三种不同的教学方法，以确定哪种方法最有效。

threshold.en: Once students cross the threshold of basic literacy, their academic opportunities expand significantly.
threshold.zh: 一旦学生跨越基本识字的门槛，他们的学业机会就会显著扩大。

thrift.en: Thrift has become a respected virtue as consumers recognize the environmental cost of disposable products.
thrift.zh: 节俭已成为一种受尊重的美德，因为消费者认识到一次性产品的环境成本。

thrifty.en: Thrifty shoppers often compare prices across multiple stores before making significant purchases.
thrifty.zh: 节俭的购物者在大额消费前通常会比较多家商店的价格。

thrill.en: Watching the final match was a huge thrill.
thrill.zh: 观看决赛是一次巨大的兴奋体验。

thrilled.en: I was thrilled by the concert last night.
thrilled.zh: 昨晚的音乐会让我非常兴奋。

thrive.zh: 植物在阳光充足的地方茁壮成长。

tied.en: She tied her shoelaces before running.

tiger.en: Due to illegal hunting and habitat loss, the population of the wild tiger has decreased dramatically over the past few decades.
tiger.zh: 由于非法捕猎和栖息地丧失，野生老虎的数量在过去几十年中急剧减少。

tight.en: The rope is too tight to pull.

tighten.en: Please tighten the screws before use.

tile.en: The bathroom floor is covered with ceramic tiles that are easy to clean and maintain over time.
tile.zh: 浴室地板铺有陶瓷瓷砖，这种瓷砖易于清洁和维护。

till.en: The workers will continue their strike till their reasonable demands are fully met by the management.
till.zh: 工人们将继续罢工，直到管理层完全满足他们的合理要求。

tilt.en: The computer screen has a convenient tilt feature that allows users to adjust the viewing angle easily.
tilt.zh: 电脑屏幕有一个方便的倾斜功能，可以让用户轻松调整观看角度。

timber.en: The house was built with timber.
timber.zh: 这房子是用木材建造的。

tiresome.en: The tiresome journey across the desert took several days to complete, testing the endurance of all participants.
tiresome.zh: 穿越沙漠的漫长旅程花了好几天才完成，考验了所有参与者的耐力。

tissue.en: She reached for a tissue quickly.
tissue.zh: 她很快伸手拿了一张纸巾。

title.en: What is the title of this book?

to.en: Many students aspire to attend prestigious universities to pursue their academic and career goals.
to.zh: 许多学生渴望进入著名大学学习，以追求他们的学业和职业目标。

to some extent.en: I agree with your opinion to some extent.
to some extent.zh: 我在某种程度上同意你的观点。

to the point.en: Her speech was clear and to the point.
to the point.zh: 她的演讲清晰而切中要害。

toast.en: For breakfast, I usually have toast with butter and jam, which provides a quick and satisfying meal.
toast.zh: 早餐时我通常吃涂黄油和果酱的吐司，这是一顿快速而令人满意的餐点。

toaster.en: I put the bread in the toaster.
toaster.zh: 我把面包放进烤面包机里。

tobacco.en: The government has implemented strict regulations on the sale of tobacco products to protect public health.
tobacco.zh: 政府已经实施了对烟草产品销售的严格规定，以保护公众健康。

today.en: Today, many universities are incorporating online learning platforms to supplement traditional classroom teaching.
today.zh: 如今，许多大学正在将在线学习平台纳入传统课堂教学的补充。

thorough.en: The researcher conducted a thorough analysis of the collected data before drawing any conclusions about the study's findings.
thorough.zh: 研究人员在得出关于研究结果的任何结论之前，对收集到的数据进行了彻底的分析。

thoroughly.en: Please clean your room thoroughly tonight.
thoroughly.zh: 请今晚彻底打扫你的房间。

those.en: Those who maintain a healthy lifestyle tend to live longer and experience fewer chronic health problems in later life.
those.zh: 保持健康生活方式的人往往寿命更长，在晚年经历的慢性健康问题也更少。

though.en: Though the weather was unfavorable, the outdoor event proceeded as scheduled despite the logistical challenges involved.
though.zh: 尽管天气不好，户外活动仍按计划进行，尽管涉及后勤方面的挑战。

thought.en: I thought about the problem all night.
thought.zh: 我整晚都在思考这个问题。

thoughtful.en: The university campus features many thoughtful design elements that enhance the learning environment for all students.
thoughtful.zh: 大学校园有许多深思熟虑的设计元素，为所有学生增强了学习环境。

thousand.en: The ancient library contains approximately a thousand rare manuscripts from various historical periods across different cultures.
thousand.zh: 这座古老的图书馆收藏了大约一千份来自不同文化各个历史时期的珍稀手稿。

thread.en: The speaker skillfully wove together different themes to create a coherent and compelling narrative thread throughout the presentation.
thread.zh: 演讲者巧妙地将不同的主题交织在一起，在整个演讲中形成了连贯而引人入胜的叙事线索。

threat.en: Climate change is a serious threat.
threat.zh: 气候变化是一个严重的威胁。

throat.en: A sore throat can significantly impact a speaker's ability to communicate effectively during an oral examination.
throat.zh: 喉咙疼痛会严重影响演讲者在口试中有效沟通的能力。

throne.en: The historical throne that once symbolized absolute power now serves as a major tourist attraction in the royal museum.
throne.zh: 那把曾经象征绝对权力的历史王座现在成为皇家博物馆的主要旅游景点。

through.en: Through careful research and systematic analysis, students can develop a much deeper understanding of complex academic topics.
through.zh: 通过仔细的研究和系统的分析，学生可以对复杂的学术课题有更深入的理解。

throughout.en: The rain continued throughout the day.

throw.en: Please throw the paper in the bin.

throw away.en: The government should implement stricter policies to discourage citizens from throwing away reusable materials and resources.
throw away.zh: 政府应该实施更严格的政策，以阻止公民丢弃可重复使用的材料和资源。

thrown.en: The ball was thrown into the air.

thrust.en: The rapid development of artificial intelligence has thrust the issue of job displacement into the public spotlight.
thrust.zh: 人工智能的快速发展将失业问题推到了公众关注的焦点。

thumb.en: With a simple thumb gesture, modern smartphone users can scroll through endless content on various social media platforms.
thumb.zh: 通过一个简单的拇指手势，现代智能手机用户可以在各种社交媒体平台上浏览无尽的内容。

thunder.en: The thunder echoed across the mountain valley, reminding everyone of nature's overwhelming power and unpredictability.
thunder.zh: 雷声在山谷中回荡，提醒着每个人大自然的巨大力量和不可预测性。

timely.en: The timely intervention of the government prevented the environmental disaster from getting worse.
timely.zh: 政府的及时干预阻止了环境灾害进一步恶化。

timetable.en: Students often struggle to balance their academic timetable with extracurricular activities.
timetable.zh: 学生经常在学业时间表和课外活动之间难以平衡。

timid.en: The timid child was reluctant to participate in group discussions during class.
timid.zh: 那个胆怯的孩子不愿意在课堂上参与小组讨论。

timing.en: The timing of the advertisement campaign was crucial for maximizing its effectiveness.
timing.zh: 广告活动的时机对于最大化其效果至关重要。

tiny.en: She lives in a tiny room.
tiny.zh: 她住在一个极小的房间里。

tip.en: Here is a useful tip for your exam.
tip.zh: 这里有一个考试的有用建议。

tips.en: Many experienced travelers share valuable tips online about finding affordable accommodation abroad.
tips.zh: 许多有经验的旅行者在网上分享关于在国外找到实惠住宿的宝贵建议。

tire.en: The constant pressure of work can tire employees and lead to decreased productivity over time.
tire.zh: 持续的工作压力会使员工疲劳，并随着时间的推移导致生产力下降。

tired.en: She looks tired after the long day.
tired.zh: 漫长的一天后她看起来很疲倦。

think about.en: Students should think about their career goals.
think about.zh: 学生应该考虑自己的职业目标。

think over.en: The committee will think over the new policy proposal and provide their detailed feedback by next Monday.
think over.zh: 委员会将仔细考虑新的政策提案，并在下周一之前提供详细的反馈。

thinking.zh: 批判性思维提高解决问题的能力。

third.en: The third report on climate change provides compelling scientific evidence about rising global temperatures.
third.zh: 第三份关于气候变化的报告提供了关于全球气温上升的令人信服的科学证据。

third year.en: She started university in her third year.

thirst.en: The increasing thirst for knowledge among young people is driving educational reform movements worldwide.
thirst.zh: 年轻人对知识的渴求正在推动世界各地的教育改革运动。

thirsty.en: After running for an hour under the hot sun, the marathon runners were extremely thirsty and needed hydration.
thirsty.zh: 在炎热的阳光下跑了一个小时后，马拉松运动员们非常口渴，需要补充水分。

thirteen.en: At the age of thirteen, children typically begin their secondary school education in many countries.
thirteen.zh: 在许多国家，孩子们通常在十三岁时开始接受中学教育。

thirty.en: Approximately thirty percent of the world's population currently lives in areas with limited clean water access.
thirty.zh: 目前世界上约百分之三十的人口生活在清洁水源有限的地区。

this.en: This research demonstrates that regular physical exercise significantly improves both mental and physical health outcomes.
this.zh: 这项研究表明，规律的身体锻炼能显著改善身心健康状况。

thus.en: It was late thus we went home.
thus.zh: 时间很晚，所以我们回家了。

tick.en: Students tick the correct answers on the test paper.
tick.zh: 学生们在试卷上勾选正确答案。

ticket.en: I bought a movie ticket online yesterday.
ticket.zh: 我昨天在网上买了一张电影票。

ticket office.en: The ticket office opens at nine.

tickets.en: Two concert tickets cost fifty dollars.
tickets.zh: 两张音乐会票要五十美元。

tide.en: The tide comes in twice a day.

tides.en: The tides rise and fall daily.

tidy.en: Her bedroom is always clean and tidy.
tidy.zh: 她的卧室总是干净整洁。

tie.en: Please tie your shoelaces before class.

toll.en: The accident caused a high toll.

tomato.en: Fresh tomato sauce is a fundamental ingredient in Italian cuisine, adding rich flavor to pasta dishes.
tomato.zh: 新鲜的番茄酱是意大利美食的基本原料，为意大利面菜肴增添了丰富的风味。

tomatoes.en: Organic tomatoes grown in greenhouses are becoming increasingly popular among health-conscious consumers.
tomatoes.zh: 在温室中种植的有机番茄在注重健康的消费者中越来越受欢迎。

tomorrow.en: Students are advised to review their notes tonight and prepare thoroughly for tomorrow's examination.
tomorrow.zh: 建议学生今晚复习笔记，为明天的考试做好充分准备。

ton.en: The recycling plant processes approximately one ton of paper waste every single day.
ton.zh: 这家回收厂每天处理大约一吨纸张垃圾。

tone.en: His tone of voice sounded very friendly.
tone.zh: 他的语气听起来很友好。

tongue.en: She learned a new tongue last year.
tongue.zh: 她去年学了一门新语言。

tons.en: The truck carried tons of sand.

towels.en: Please bring clean towels for guests.
towels.zh: 请为客人带来干净的毛巾。

towers.en: Towers stand tall in the city.
towers.zh: 塔楼在城市中高高耸立。

town.en: I grew up in a small town.

toxic.en: The factory released toxic chemicals nearby.
toxic.zh: 工厂向附近排放了有毒化学物质。

toxin.en: Certain types of food poisoning are caused by natural toxins produced by bacteria in improperly stored or handled food.
